text: Service was great. Mussels were very good. I do, however, think the prices were very high and I would never return. I now see that they serve Foie Gras and I would definitely never step foot in a place that serves foie gras.

The crew was everything I could have hoped for: efficient and thorough, even added on little extra touches on the spot. They were very pleasant and they were done before I knew it. I always worry about my landscape plants, but they were careful and respectful. Highly recommended!

Another place that gets people there because of the name. This is pretty much soft serve with regular toppings for twice the price. I mean it is good soft serve and if you are already nearby, go for it, but I wouldn't make a trip across town for it

Like a lot of Santa Barbara fish places, this place is okay. Nothing spectacular, but they have decent food. If you go for happy hour be warned that you will be crammed in next to strangers and the stools you are forced to sit on are very uncomfortable.
The food was remarkable; if it weren't for the horrible customer unfriendly POS system at the door, would have rated 5 stars. Seriously, you need better software.

This place deserves all of the good reviews it has gotten. While I really enjoyed our keema chat and tikka salad chaat; I think the rose lassi and ras malai were insanely good. Would highly recommend the rose lassi and ras malai. Definitely coming back again!

Denny's food, decent beer, over crowded with abysmal table service. If you must eat the food from there you're better off going up the road to O'Malley's and sitting in the back patio area and calling over to the Santa Barbara Brewing Company for takeout.
Nice selection, friendly staff, ok prices. I'd rather trek into the city to hit the Italian Market but when I can't make it this is a decent substitute.

I'm just showing what customers should expect if they order the cheese cake with strawberry and chocolate or cherry and chocolate. Maybe some folks like it prepared this way . I prefer not this way..this is not how I would present my food to the public.
This is my favorite Restaurant I love its a perfect hidden spot I bring all my close friends here Best tacos xoxo
Round 2 at Alla Spina didn't impress quite as much as brunch did, but still offered unique, tasty animalfocused dinner or an excellent option for brunch .

Have been going here for years and it seems like it is always improving which is amazing because it is already wonderful! This place is like our second home lol. Best Italian food around, nothing else compares.

This is a good little brewery. Small restaurant, nothing unique about the ambience but good craft beer. The food is decent, and the staff is very friendly. It's usually more of a stop of convenience for meif I'm in the area looking for beer, I might swing by.

Just when you think the staff has hit an ethical rock bottom with deceptive policies and outright lies, they've actually sank even lower and emailed the entire building offering entry into a contest for a $750 gift card to post a positive review on Google!

Was going through Delaware on a road trip home and decided to get an IPL treatment on my way back to NY as everything was still closed. So glad I stopped! Excellent facility, knowledgeable staff, and amazing results!! Thank you!
Terrible customer service, the "skate guards" make fun of kids that can't skate, this place is a complete joke of an establishment and organization.

I reached out to this school about placing two of my preschoolers here and the school never got back to me. If they cant even respond to an inquiry, I cant imagine what I would deal with if my kids were in the school.
Passing through, excited to have a burger, have a service animal and they have a large yard with picnic tables but do not allow dogs on property At All. No signs. Waited in line. Lame...

Love the beers here! They have so many. This is also the only Ultimo I go to. Everyone here is very nice and helpful. I only live 2 blocks away, so it's also very nice to walk here and just chillax with a cup of tea or some beer!
We ate here about six weeks ago and i will never eat here again. Our waitress was terrible and i had to send my steak back because it was raw and i ordered well done.

First time we went it was really good, but came in today & got a centerfold but there was only 1 piece of bacon & 1 small slice of turkey on 1 side of the sandwich. NOT worth $8.50 & change... very disappointing!!
DSW is aday discount card. For a place that calls it self a discount store they should be a little more competitive on price, just sayin.
Spinach and eggs was runny. Kitchen was so slow. Servers are amazing however. The manager or owner is just too loud and should not be working the cash register if he does not know how to do it.

THE most delicious food we had in New Orleans. Ridiculously flavorful shrimp & grits. They were sweet enough to split the portion into two adorable skillets for us I wanted all the pastries, but only had room for the blueberry/ginger muffin. And the lighting!!

My husband and I Split the Spicy Asian BBQ Brisket & Bang Bang Shrimp Banh Mi and side of the Cajun Crack Fries...deliSo good! You have to try them out!! Super clean restaurant, very friendly staff and amazing food! We will definitely be going back.
Way. Too. Freaking. Loud. One os forced to be anti-social because one cannot scream loudly enough to be heard by anyone else at the table. Seriously, folks.

Really nice and friendly service, but the pizza definitely tastes like cardboard...no flavor whatsoever. It's convenient and filling if you're just grabbing a slice before seeing a movie across the street, but it's not quality pizza. Great combo deals though so we can't be too bummed.

I love this little cafe, their breakfast sandwiches are made with so much love and attention to detail and the lattes are also wonderfully made. It's my favorite place to get fresh delicious breakfast.

Long, long, long wait. By the time we sat down to eat, I was so tired after a day of walking in the hot sun, and drinking. My food was delicious, but I don't remember much else. I'm not sure if I'd go back here and wait again.

Since new management has taken over, things have gone from bad to worst! Worst, most unwilling company I had to deal with. Any people looking to move here better think twice and make sure to check your fine print because more often than not, you will suffer the consequences.

Have not had the opportunity to taste the food, was stonewalled by the terrible customer service by the lady at the font door. Was told you are rude and can wait. Smelled great, however the front door service lost my taste.

Service was friendly enough but was told by my beer drinking friends that I definitely overpaid here for the Sam Adams 1/2 case that I bought. Service was fine, parking is easy, and the location is convenient. Be more informed about the prices here, if you are counting your pennies.
This place has great location and a very nice interior, indoor/outdoor seating. The only downfall to this place is that the beer selection isn't that good and it isn't the best beer in town.

Very helpful staff and a pretty decent selection. The employees don't always seem to be in the best moods but I have found the more I try to be chatty the friendly they can be. Remember to always look for a coupon on your phone before checking out!

Horrible service....horrible experience We had to ask for silverware We had to ask if they could remove our appetizer dishes so we have room for our main course. We had to wave down the Waiter because never came around to see if we needed anything. My cocktail was horrible .
I got the cheesesteak sub and my wife got a slice of pepperoni pizza, we fell in love with this place. Highly recommend!

I have been coming here for years, but my return isn't for the food but the view from the patio sitting area. The food has always been just okay, nothing really special. Most of the time it's a bit on the salty side.

I waited 35 minutes for a personal pizza. Pizza was awesome but it was kind of really lame waiting here and reading all the jibberish on the walls. I think artsy pizza shops are now way too mainstream, how about a an old-school pizza shop now for a change?

On our first visit the waiter was very rude and a smart aleck. On our second visit we set at the bar and the bar tender Tina was very rude and called my wife a liar to her face saying my wife ordered something she didn't. Terrible place

This place is unbelievable. Good over the top. We had brunch and it was amazing. Presentation was supper and service supreme. We were in Tennessee wearing Kentucky blue on way to ball game and manager and staff were so sweet to us. Great spot.
Pretty disappointing that they're only open til five, I would love to stay and do homework here pretty late, unfortunately I'll never be able to go. Pretty good coffee though
One if the POOREST run BW3 restaurants, ever. Long wait, only one section of the restaurant is being used, several people complaining about their order, slow service re: waiting for food. Horrible!
Nice and clean with a very good breakfast, but the pool was down for maintenance for 2 weeks in the middle of summer!!!
I would have given this a 5 star review if I didn't have to get up from my table to use the restroom LOL! FOOD IS FANTASTIC! Get the lobster Mac or the grouper blackened worth every penny!
they were a bit messy and i had to pay extra for multiple colors, the matte top, and the shape, would not recommend.
Mold, insect problem, low water pressure, 2 broken appliances in one year, water heater burst, trash outside everywhere, kids throwing trash in other peoples patios

4 Stars for atmosphere 1 Star for food 3 Stars for Service 5 Stars for drinks I really wanted to love this place. It has a great atmosphere, but incredibly BLAND food and slow service . The drinks on the other hand were superb!
Transitions in wrong frames false delivery info delayed delivery too busy to take complaint on phone no reply for email written to corporate poss bad RX
I can't talk about a crepe this time, but my Mexican mocha, Chai latte, and a Belgian waffle made for a nice start to my day.

Food was good and came out fast. Friendliness of staff was only ok though. They also used styrofoam for to go boxes and coffee cups which is stupid with all the recyclable and environmental friendly options available.

After a $200 meal, the waitress lied about validating my parking and I had to pay another $15 for parking downstairs. The lobster lava sushi roll is disgusting. Quality of food here is on the level of Chili's or Olive Garden.

Cute place but the workers are not friendly at all I was late for 5 min they gave my sit away this is very unprofessional and I made reservations a day before traveling 2 hr to get to the location very sad the way they treat people

They don't bill your credit card, which they put on record at the time of your visit, until after billing insurance. Was overcharged. My insurance EOB showed that my out of pocket cost should have been $70 but my card was charged $128.

Bought a couch and ottoman there 3 months ago and bought a warranty which they claimed will cover the structure of it. 3 months later the ottoman is broken in the middle. Armrest is collapsing. And now they claim the warranty doesn't cover it.
Great food, always fresh, no matter what you order. Best Fast food Chinese Food in the Truckee Meadows Prompt service as well Its my pleasure to highly recommend this restaurant

Jub jubs is a friendly place bartenders are great I'm to fond of the music but this is the only place I know where I can get a great absinthe drink they have one bartender there who just knows how to do it

This company is criminal and should be closed down. They tow your car and then tell you they don't have it, then tell you a time to come across town and not even open. Then they only take cash $150...criminal

I've been here quite a few times, and the fried rice is probably the only food worth getting. Avoid the green onion pancakes as they have no green onions in it, and the crab ragoons are almost entirely cream cheese.
The worst service at a Subway. I was told by a person behind the line that he could not roll the Subway properly and have it the way it was.
Food took way too long ! We arrived at 6:30 pm food didn't come out until 9pm on the bright side we had a nice server and great drink and hookah !

Having eaten here over a half dozen times I can say without reservation that Pho Saigon is as consistantly good as it gets. Flavorful aromatic broth, fresh veggies and assorted meats make this pho memorable. Do not hesitate to experience the glory that is a bowl of Pho done well.

OK, for those not from Tucson, or for those new to town, there's a fascinating tradition of shrines around the area that were new to this NY native when I moved here. I love riding up Starr Pass by Atoknown bit of Tucson's unique side.

The amount of times they have messed up a to-go order is uncanny. This is the first time I have ever written a review because it is the only time I felt inclined to. It's not difficult to be thorough when taking and processing an order.

Came in because brother got bit by something and foot was swelling up not a sole in the place and front desk lady was a bitch and wouldn't even tell us how long it would be since she didn't want to set an expectation """

We got duct sealing and cleaning from Mister Quik when we bought our home. We had to have them come back out multiple times because the vents were still visibly dirty or not properly sealed, but they were eager to make it right. It took some time but overall satisfied.

OMG ! the 12 inch BBQ shrimp poboy was incredible ! the spices were on point and the sweet potatoes fries were nice and crispy, the fried okra was spicy and delicious. Staff is very friendly and they are open until 4am ! cc accepted.

This is one of the most rude coffee stores in Sparks NV . He only employee who was working at the time we drove by never acknowledged us as we drove to the drive thru she flat out ignored us for 3 minutes! Ugly baristas get ugly reviews!
pull up to the drive thru and the person behind me pulls up to the second one next to me and gets served first. every time i come here their soup is cold. worst steak 'n shake i've ever been to

You can't really go wrong with a gigantic slice of cheese pizza for $3.50. The actual pizza isn't that special- it's still good! But it's not knock your socks off good; the massive size of it is though ;) especially after a night out

Totally sucks driver smelled like pot. Guy picked me up 25 minutes late on return trip he called and said he would be there in five minutes Then never showed, This is my first and only time dealing with these dirtbags. DO NOT USE THIS COMPANY!
Posted hours are incorrect, they're only open until 10 and they start the "last wash" at 8:45 Still a clean and decent laundromat if you can go during the day.
I'm waiting to pick up my contacts, there are multiple people who clearly work here but none of them can hand me my contacts that I already paid for? I'll be finding a new place to go.
This is a horrible Walmart employees are very rude Store is overcrowded I spoke with a lady that was suppose to be a supervisor and she could care less about helping me
Not pleased booked for Hotel & Casino no Casino only got 1/2 found out later may never re-open be careful when booking
We ate here last night. Atmosphere was nice, service was very good; however the quality of the meal was not as good as similar places in the area. Probably will not go back again.
No one behind me in the drive thru. Had to pull up after paying so the timers for the drive thru don't show how long people have to wait for their food.

John did an awesome job with our yellow jackets. Not only was he able to respond to our requests quickly with a fair quote, he was able to change his plans when our situation turned urgent. Excellent experience!!! Totally recommend!

Would give zero if I could. Manager or whoever was giving an apparent new employee his schedule and let myself and at least three more customers trying to check out stand and wait. Great show of customer service.
I just need to say that the kids combo box needs to be reconstructed I literally just dropped the box three times and it's so flimsy the whole thing broke everywhere in the theater
Great people but they should have a shortcut to get in the building to drop off the recycling so you don't have to wait for the people disposing of refuge to do so.
Bought some produce here that went rotten in 1op carries the healthiest sugar free sweetner: Xylanithial, in bulk, so it's cheap here.

Food is superb. Would give 5/5 stars for food alone. However, I bet your wondering why I'm giving only 3. Well unlike the common pig I like to eat off a plate and not a slop tray, for the love of god, please get some dinnerware and proper utensils.

The nachos were AWESOME!!!! Hard to find a place to sit at the bar, its small but they have great seating outside on picnic tables! Servers are all friendly and fast! I think they have some specials on Margaritas or whatever...the party I was with had one.

About a year ago the service there was very good, I don't know the owner has been changed or what, all the staff there were not respected to the customers anymore and the food was not as good as before.

Worst service ever, the employees will not answer questions. They have AirPods in and when I asked why my order was taking over 40 minutes they had no idea why it was taking that long. Worst service ever
Menu just sounds way better than it tastes, lack of flavor and overall underwhelming my favorite was the rice balls but even those were less exciting than expected

Had planned to take the family today. Drove up and discovered it was 20 freaking dollars to park. HARD PASS. There is nothing at all around and you justify 20 dollars to park on top of the high cost of entry. I guess it's just a tourist trap now.

Visiting from out of town and was told to stop in, so glad I did. Great staff, charming atmosphere and the food was very good! I have family that I visit often and I will make it a point to dine here when I'm in town.
Literally trash. food and drinks are fire but the hostess was rude as anything, used profanity towards us for no reason, and would not sit our party together. also didn't get my beer and it's a while

Location was kind of scary, folks on drugs looking crazy for a minute couple drug dealers, but my room was decent no smell no real noise on my end slept like a baby when I finally went to sleep with the heater blasting
Just went there for the monthly wine tasting as usual a great group of wines and people to visit with while tasting. Bought a case and then had dinner. Yuri's fish and a burger. Fabulous evening!
I did not enjoy the food here. I had the enchiladas, and they were skimpy on the shrimp, and fell all apart and I ate them in little pieces. Not the experience I was looking for.

The food and atmosphere were both great, it was just unusual that our server discouraged me from ordering the king crab legs because it was "too expensive" ... I ordered them anyway and they were very good. Just rubbed me the wrong way.
It's a good cheesesteak, but not anywhere near the top tier, which for me is topped by Jim's and John's Roast Pork . The bigger chunks of steak are fine, but not how I'd do it in a perfect world.

I would think based on their menu and the wait time that this place would have really great food but neither my boyfriend or I enjoyed our meals. The service was not good at all but our appetizer, the fried macaroni and cheese was awesome.

Now that I've been to the other Asian market but at least they have a good stock of ingredients and sauces. And while a small selection but this place is as close as it seems we've got for the time being. And hey duck feet.

Nice, good wines, good food but everything is way over priced Food quality is very good but not impressive being of the type small plates Friday and Saturday evenings it is very busy can be hard to get a table Staff very good and knowadgable
I follow my nail girl Jenn who was working for another nail bar to her new location and I love it!
Food is a hit or miss . Service is Awful if you find yourself in the area and need a place to eat it's ok but don't go out of your way to try it
The General Tso Shrimp is still great, but they need to either cut the portions down or give more rice w/the order!

Been here a few times and it's a basic liquor store that has what you need, except if you want High Noons. Last two times I came here looking for High Noons and they were out. Reasonable place with other good selections.
Not much more to say than this: Came for the 1900 Ice Cream which might be the best ice cream I've tasted and worth the $12
They didn't let me use bathroom because it was closed due to covid even though this is B's because I've gone into stores and they had no problem letting me use theirs
Great room, great price, great service, cheap cab to / from bars, RIGHT across from the zoo and VERY CLOSE to museums. Stayed in King non smoking. Check in/out super simple!!
With 4/5 stars I expected an amazing authentic experience, but was left extremely disappointed when it was just a place to grab your average burrito. ..won't come back, won't recommend. ...

I've been visiting Sabrina's Cafe for years in Wynnewood so I thought I'd switch it up and check out the one in center city. Due to COVID-Food was great, but to be honest my appetite was ruined so I decided to box my food up and head home. Never again!
nasty chilli burgers could be easily purchased at Costco Great view of the Canal, people watch Interesting wood interior Handicapped access Blocked by bikes

A mecca of hopefuls and hasstudent cheap. And if you wake up the next morning not quite remembering where you were at the night before, one whiff of your smoky shirt will snap it all right back into your brain like a bad dream. Good times, good times.
Really bad customer service. Lady laughed when I asked why with a reservation, the car was still not ready for the arranged pick up time. Go elsewhere.

I personally had a great experience here, we stayed a little over a week, had very little staff interaction to be fair but the room itself was great and the few staff interactions we had were also great!!

Back in Philadelphia after a week away, jet a plus, since I hate when a place shortchanges you on dressing. If you're out late and are tired and/or jet-lagged and/or intoxicated and/or craving diner food, this is a good spot to seek out.
A great place to eat, the lobster taste so good, the place is so clean and the staff is so out going .. And they have byob . I will be back again
I love this place! The laid back atmosphere is great, the staff is friendly, and they have a unique take on barbsounds weird but, SO good! Oh, don't forget the banana pudding!!

There's nothing like being a loyal customer and when your order is incorrect, and the business is NOT sorry and does not accommodate you. I am highly upset with this bravo location. I hope their customer service improves soon.

Is the first time I at noon to attempt a large bowl of beef noodles in soup here is very good also. Then I bring my friends to come here, they all like it very much also very enjoy the environment. The sushi here is also very delicious.

Clean and spacious airport. Not a lot of concessions ... but there are enough. There is a cubicle area that not only provides power outlets for your electronics, but also allows you to order food delivered to your desk.

Young grasshopper, when you can walk across the rice paper without leaving a trace, you will be ready to eat here. Steaming rice, sizzling vegetables and protein await for you here. Yum Chum Chinese Master.

Clean and refreshing store with a great location right by the mall, restaurants, and a movie theater! Decent sales and friendly sales representatives; though I can't quite say the same about the cashiers, they're just the typical non-interactive employees...nothing too stand out to note down.
I'm a craft beer fan but I haven't checked this place out since it opened because I didn't see the point in a "craft beer store" go beers being reasonably priced!
Ordered a new nebulizer machine a few months ago for some reason they won't unsubscribe me from their emails been past 14 days still getting them

I've been to the majority of breweries in bucks county and the surrounding area, so I was excited to add Great Barn to the list. I wasn't super impressed, the beers were okay, nothing special. I like the outside seating area and it's a nice spot in New Hope.
Got a regular chick fila sandwich and a small order of nuggets the sandwich was cold and the nuggets were dry not a good lunch
the store is nice overall but some of the workers treat you like you're poor if you aren't wearing designer and they're very judgy lowkey

Food was delicious! Perfect modern lunch spot with a great bar as well. The choose 2 lunch menu was the perfect serving size and allowed me to try some New Orleans favorites such as the shrimp po boy and the gumbo! The NOLA mule was delicious as well!
If you have to pee don't go here the workers are rude and won't let you use the bathroom even if you buy 50.00 worth of gas.
Cuban coffee tastes like a regular latte Turkey nothing but salt Bacon undercooked Eggs tasted like a premix Music was good Lol

Time is not of the essence at this Starbucks watching everybody lollygag behind the counter they are more concerned with filling ice or working at other things rather than filling the 20 people who want to drink orders

this store is ok. The overall selection is good. There is frequently not enough carts and some things are a little off, like the jackfruit had flies all around it last time I was there and there is often a sewage smell in the parking lot .
Cup of cheese for my breadsticks had a big clump of dried cheese in the center with melted cheese all around it. Disgusting.
Oh man.. this place is great! Staff is always friendly Now the food A++++ Smoked Salami no words easy to get to and glad these guys are in our neighborhood. Support local!
The food is on par with other TBs. The drive thru has been greeting less and typically ask you to hold on before they can take your order every time. Faster to go inside.

i ventured here after getting a sweet local deal on my fav good denim selction some labels that i have seen abroad, walking distance to my favorite place in the city cons-security guards, some of the sales women could care less.
I had a hard time matching the pictures on the website to the rooms and their names when I wanted to make a selection, which was discouraging but the place seems wonderful

New place in Rockford Illinois. Wow! Great ambiance, super efficient and super observant staff. Very large venue, with plenty of supporting staff. You can see they are well trained as nobody is running around like they are going crazy and out of control. Definitely a new fav place. HIGHLY RECOMMEND.

Went last night for my partners birthday and the staff was friendly and accommodating, the set up is awesome and the food/drinks are delicious. There's so much to do and was a ton of fun. Big ups to the bartender Ann, she was a delight and super friendly/knowledgeable.

Pizza had lots of flavor, but could have used more cheese. Our waitress brought out our drinks, walked toward our table, and then proceeded to put them down on the table behind us and took someone else's order. That was just weird.
Just re-emphasizing how good the cakes and bread products are. Staff seems to have gotten a little rude and slower since I was last here but overall they offer a quality product.
Our favorite part of the meal was the toffee! Pizza was a bit bland and unmemorable - we were bummed because the decor is so quaint and we wanted to love the place.
The place was very loud and dirty the food was terrible only ate a few bits and left the rest steer clear
Having been a few times, Aya's has been become my go allowing you to enjoy a casual meal, then take a stroll through the neighborhood. Good to enjoy with friends or a date.

Rob was really helpful, and is very knowledgeable about the products that he promotes. Nice showroom and free consults. Unfortunately, he seems to be exclusive to larger more expensive home improvement projects, but he will let you know if he is suited to your project or not.

Does not have many good options of real authentic Filipino food. One dish, chicken afritada, tasted so bland, like it was boiled and thrown in with a sautéed sauce, meat was not even tender. They serve overly sweet juice that couldn't be drank, had to throw it out. Overpriced too!
The new pasta entree is not worth 21 $ . It is a small pool of sauce with less than 10 noodles swimming in it, I would have had to eat 3 portions to get filled up .
I think their food is delicious yeah it's a living more expensive but it's because of the quality of the product. I definitely recommend Social House.

Possibly the best roast beef poboy in the city. Fettuccine alfredo was also on point. If your limping off bourbon, and looking for some good New Orleans cusine, this is a good spot with 0 wait time. I promise you will not be disappointed.

Focus is on being a "fancy restaurant", and not on food. The food is fine some is good, even. But it is not up to the standard of top Philadelphia foody restaurants, and for the price you can get much better.
Place smelled amazing.. but after having 5 different employees look at us at the "wait to be seated sign" for 10 minutes- we decided to leave since none of them could come over to seat us.

My wife and I ate here when we stayed downtown for a night. Food was really good, location was great and neat, older building. We were the first ones there and they opened a couple minutes later than they had posted but quick service and would eat here again.

Amazing donuts! Stopped by here on a Sunday morning and got the fruity pebbles, dark side, vanilla sprinkles, and s'more donuts, with an iced caramel macchiato. Perfect sizes, and packed with flavor. Great service as well!

Well, it's been over a year since my review and I'm still awaiting someone to reach out to me, as I was under the impression this would happen . I have concert tickets to see Sugarland, in July, at GSR but I will look into hotel options elsewhere.
Their service and steaks are very, very good, but the place's acoustics are so bad it is hard to have a meaningful conversation.
I ordered pizza Pizza was bland Sausage topping was bland $17 for 2 toppings on a large pizza 75 cents for blue cheese

Food is decent but the staff clearly doesn't want to be there and definitely doesn't want you there either. They'll blast you out of the restaurant with dad rock music before you've even had a chance to taste your lukewarm food.

Went in lastnight with a buddy of mine to eat and grab some beer before we head over to the Luke to watch some high school football. No complaints at all. Fast friendly service, food was great and tasted fresh. Don't know why this spot is getting bad reviews

Angela does an excellent job cleaning thoroughly but efficiently, and has a lovely disposition. Sometimes it's tricky to have someone in your home, but Angela's diligent work ethic and care with which she cares for your home make the decision easy.

Good car wash, free vacuum. If you buy the plan there is no way of signing up without giving them your credit card number for a subscription service. I personally hate this business plan, if you do too, watch out. I've tried contacting them, no response. Blah...

Best pho in town! I work just down the street, and we pick up food here for everyone in the office almost weekly, if not more often. They are always very polite and fast. We love all of the flavors, especially the chicken and rare steak. Yummmmm!

The staff was so nice and helped me so much. The girl who worked with me was such a sweetheart and had an all around good experience for my first time in Lululemon. The store was organized and was handicap accessible. Will definitely return

The food is dumbed down, as are the Scotch and wine offerings, from the amazing food and drink of Fumar, on the bright side it's cheaper. But without the cigars I won't be back. They gutted the soul of it.
Love this place but please someone do something about the smelly dirty bathrooms. The rest of the store is great and Starbucks is great as usual but the bathrooms are just a turn off for me.

Normally I have a great experience at this location but today I was refused service at a 24 hour drive thru by employees who wore headphones on and one person even had a headset on. I expected more at this location.
Had I known this place has been around for 13 years, and 1 upstairs, on Coast Village, I would've visited a long time ago. Fresh and local deliciousness will in a cup or cone!

Dr. Yankee was very gentle, and excellent with children. He made the experience very comforting for my anxious son. It was my first visit with Dr. Yankee, and I'm so happy to have found a dentist that I know I can trust with my child's dental care.
Mr. Nunemaker is wonderful! I called Wardtime customer and he didn't even charge me a dime, but he is now my go-to person if any more critters show up. I recommend him 100000%! Thank you, Mr. N!!!

The Absolute WORST WF Bank Branch. I deposited a check from "Wells Fargo" and this branch has chosen not to release any part of it for 2 days. It is a check from Wells Fargo! I SUGGEST YOU DO NOT USE THIS BRANCH.
Not a great movie theater, but good enough. I typically go here just because it's close by, but if you want to see a 3D movie, or enjoy comfortable chairs, it's probably best to go somewhere else.

Food was really delicious, and the bar had a nice atmosphe however it was a but overpriced for the portions and while service was courteous, it was extremely slow and some dishes were forgotten...Had to keep chasing down our drinks and food order.
Frozen yogurt is always awesome. They don't have very many flavors to choose from and the employees seemed put out that we interrupted their conversation to ring us up.

You can find something here for anyone. Hence the term Melting Pot. From handmade goods, to overtop greeting cars, incense and novelty items galore, waterpipes and bongs in the rear of the store, and sexy hippy lingerie - is that even possible? . A gumbo of delightful hippie goods.

Typical drive thru issues. We order two nacho grande meals, we drive away and we are missing a hard taco and utensils for the meal. I had to turn around, walked inside and walk into a puddle of a water on the floor. The whole building smelled bad.
We went here because we thought it was the same as the Sam's to Go in IV but it was not! The meat smelled like it was old and also undercooked. We had the pastrami and roast beef, both were inedible.
La atencion pobre, la sopa fria los tallarines verdes Sin sabor, hecho solo con espinaca terrible nunca mas vuelvo a este lugar, hacen quedar mal a la cocina peruana

Woman in kids section was not very customer service oriented; they usually are. Books expensive and at full price. Front table full of antTrump idiocies. Fine! Their choice. But now I choose to spend my conservative dollars online and my friends won't be buying me gift certificates from Chaucer's anymore.

I can't believe I'm giving a review for Hooters... but strangely enough I've actually gone to a Hooters a handful of times, mostly with a bunch of guys - surprise, surprise! And I'll say it...I like their wings. I really like their wings.
The restaurant isn't much to look at, but my son and I decided to try it based on the other yelp reviews. The food was good with decent portion sizes and the service was great. I'd return.
Nice people here great food but the speed accuracy of my order is lacking seriously I was here almost a hour waiting on my to go order...........damn
Fun to play pub poll and trivia Tuesday's and Wednesday's Food is great and staff is awesome Only Shuffleboard in town Highly recommended

First review ever written to say that this place is horrible! They only care about making money off their patients and will give you sub-standard treatment/cleaning if you don't agree to their intensive treatments.

They told me my whole hose needed to be repiped due to a costly leak that couldn't be found their estimated cost $7k, we'll it was only a toilet leak and fixed it my self cost $25. Sorry I didn't help make your moth by ripping me off fellas
Went to Katie's on the 13th and had a really nice time but I checked my account 3 days later and they charged my card 3 times! I will definitely not be going back here.

Typical Hudson News you'd expect at any airport - books, overpriced magazines, snacks, electronics, soda and some other items. I avoid these plagues like the plague due to their sky high prices, but they're always there if you forgot something.
Worst staff and horrible coffee.. they don't even have light fraps anymore who wants to pay 8 bucks for a glass of fat and sugar - well maybe some but you lost me when u took away light versions.

This place has taken a change for the worse. A couple of years ago, this place would have gotten a five but now- I would rather go to Tai Lake or go next door to Sang Kee. The food is disappointing compared to how it used to be.

So I haven't eaten here yet but I was pretty surprised to find it walking around town. Seafood! Crabs! Shrimp! Fresh and steamed and fried. They also have traditional American diner type stuff, and there is a bit of an Asian theme to a few items See the pics.
Add me to the list of shippers who had their package stolen / "misplaced" with FedEx and this is the last know location the package was.
cop shop wop Larry is a little crazy but he Will get the job done probably one of the best welder in Tucson hands down.

We spent a quite Saturday afternoon sitting outside at Goody's enjoying two scoops in a cup of their fine homemade ice cream. It is on a very peaceful street surround by tall leafy trees. their selection of candies and caramel corn look delicious as well.

Nice, clean place. Disappointed we could not sample any flavors due to COVID. They really didn't have any kid flavors such as Superman, cotton candy, etc so my kids had to choose flavors blindly . A lot of flavors had nuts or peanut butter. The blueberry cheesecake was a favorite.

Food was fine service was good but for the price NO WAY! There are plenty of better places to go for that same general food that does not cost anywhere near as much as Claim Jumpers I left feeling just ripped off.

A cute, modern and clean coffee shop! Lattes and chai were flavorful and delicious just like the pastries! Also one of the few coffee shops with almond syrup, its a great place to grab coffee and spend the day working or relaxing, a quiet but relaxed vibe with friendly staff
Food was good the service prevents anything higher. I had to get up in order to find a server to help us after being there for a while without being greeted.

I dont know where to start with this place I wish they had a negative star 37minutes 37 minutes took them to make cheeseburger BATHROOM IS DISGUSTING, worker came out of toilet and didnt even wash his hands. STAY AWAY FROM THIS NASTY PLACE
One of the best comic shops in the state store appearances from Marvel, local artists and well as hosting annual comic events such as 24 Hours. Great staff of hard-working, nice people!
I stopped in to look at a Kia Sorento, as we were narrowing our search for a car. I looked at a pre that day I saw the used car advertised on their website for $6k less than what they told me. Sad.

I had some last minute birthday invitation done here and they were amazing, not only did they have them ready the same day but the quality was over the top! thank you very much for saving the day !!!! Customer for life
forget the food but the ice cold cheap local lager is amazing especially after walking out of a 8 hour medical licensing examination!!! yay GAP

They went out of business, no loss, loud, bad food, bad business practices, had to give them your debit card before the meal, would not go to any other locations if they have them. Do not waste your hard earned money on this place.
Crab fries Buffalo tenders Decent service What's up with the leggings? Clean bathrooms Interesting sinks in the bar area Hyoooge Taxi crab for 10$ Not too far of a walk to the ballpark
We love this location for delivery! The customer service over the phone is on point, the food is always delivered on time, and we appreciate the no contact option!
It's a small regional park right outside French Market, as a place to sit in the shade and rest after wandering round the marketplace.

Don't let this location fool you. They actually take care of their Arnold location. Always a different cleaning person there at different times of the day but they can't have one person clean this location. I see trash in the same place for a week straight. Ridiculous.

Came here with some friends and figured it would be good since it had good reviews on yelp but ended up being disappointed. Prices were high and food was below mediocre. Pizza had hardly any cheese and our Cesar salad was subpar at best. Would not go back!

Food and experience was amazing. Customer service was very good. Our waiter was a little unusual and came off as rude at one instance but was very nice the rest of the experience. They provide clear instructions on how long to cook things and allow great independence in cooking.

Service slow, bartenders could not careless about 3 girls sitting at bar, cared more about flirting with some guys at bar. Food good, wide variety, typical bar food. Great beer and hard liquor selection

Updating because I've been to the deli here a few times recently...they make good sandwiches. Still not a great selection of produce, in my opinion, but for deli and friendly service, I'll upgrade to 3 stars.

This place isn't too bad for a quick Tex mex/ Mexican place. I've had the chicken burrito, beef tacos and tostadas and the burrito and tacos were ok but the tostadas are fantastic! Treat yo self and get the tostadas

I came here with my sister and it really isn't that great at all besides the space inside. The smoothies tasted like something I could have made in 5 seconds at home with jelly and orange juice I got from the Chinese supermarket.

This was our first visit with our new puppy. The office was still under Covid rules, so we were not allowed to go in with her, but the doctor came out and answered all my questions. Looking forward to her next appt so we can see the office, etc.
These hoes upped the price for family sized Chicken Alfredo then had the nerve to reduce the chicken portion to no joke 6 parcels of meat each roughly the size of a cheeze-it. To hell with them.

Do not waste your money here. Everything smells moldy, the area doesn't look safe, the rooms are FILTHY, and the driver almost crashed twice on our way to the hotel. I am disgusted with this place and wish I hadn't made a reservation.
The food was good we only had appetizers because the service was horrible the waitress didn't smile and never check on us I advise to set at the bar the bartender was awesome.

Enjoyed it. The food was really good and the drinks were perfect the staff did yell across the restaurant a couple times at each other, which wasn't the most professional. All in all, great drinks/food/atmosphere...
I stopped in to try their holiday flavors this weekend and their eggnog latte is one of the best ones I've tried in a really long time!
REALLY GREAT FOOD. Absolutely delicious. Parking was a little hard to find, the location is a little out of the way but definitely worth a trip up there if you have a car and have time.

I have been wanting to go to this place for awhile now but extremely disappointed to read about the homophobic slurs. Supporting local businesses is one of my passions but why give love & support to someone who treats another human like this? I erased this place off my list.
This is more like 3.5 stars: Tried the Mickey po'boy, which was pretty good, but not as 'knocksocks for sothe-counter staff, who are both efficient and friendly as heck.

I just finished my second massage appointment with Jamie! Almost everyone experiences pain in this life. It's a great feeling to know you can come to RSVP and have the stresses of life relieved, feel great afterwards, and restore the peace that we all yearn for. Thanks RSVP!

George and the repair crew here does a great job of taking care of your auto repair needs, always fair and honest. A real neighborhood old world gas and repair shop where the staff does it with professionalism.

If you know EXACTLY what you want and EXACTLY where it will be in the store...this is the store for you. If you need ANY help at all you'd might as well stay home because the number of informed employees here is very minimal...

Usually like the service they provide. Last visit was dismayed to find that my wife's tuna sandwich had red sauce where the knife from a previous customers meatball sandwich. I couldn't believe that they would not even try to clean their utensils between sandwiches.

This isn't for the weak of heart. I would say that I wish the space was designed in a way that was categorized in a way that you could avoid sections you're not too interested in. I think after this exhibition you should have a fun activity planned!
I only write reviews when I'm really impressed. We got sat down, given drinks and chips and taken our order within 10 minutes and the delicious food came out super fast too. Great service!!!!

The screens are so small I may as well sit in comfort of my own home to watch a movie The prices are steep too! And the movie goers are a pretentious group Don't waste your time. Head to old city for a flick

Fatty boneless wings, the onion rings had no flavor so I tried to eat just onion inside and again 0 flavor! Wtf Hooters is really sucking! Stop cutting quality you will only lose business as you have lost mine now.

Unfortunately I cannot leave a good review. Service was great but the food was a c- We ordered the Georgia peach pancakes and the peach topping was cold and the peaches hard There was no flavor in the peach topping either. The bacon was average.

Service as expected. Lots of variety. Good balance of protein, veggies and carbs based on what you select Inexpensive Quick Well that's what you expect when dining at Panda Express. And this place delivers it consistently.
This place its the worst ever !! The management making money with the residents and they rent the apartment in airbnb and they smoke week and they are very rude !!!!!

Really really dry over cooked burgers and chicken. Like the Sahara desert in my mouth. I ordered online and put in for 7:45 pickup arrived at 7:43 I arrived and the place was empty and they had not started my order. Two of four burgers were dressed wrong.
Can't speak to the rest of the menu this cold and rainy Friday morning, but this place certainly has hot decent coffee at a great price . Service for the drive thru was fine.
Outstanding pepperoni pizza and an outstanding grandmothers pizza both pies were cooked to perfection best local pizza shop in the Gloucester Township area

The place doesn't have air conditioning and all the beer is rancid from being overly warm and they will not accept returns for rancid beer that is so to their poorly maintained facility. I wouldn't suggest buying anything from here if you don't like wasting money.

This Italian restaurant has a lovely ambiance. Service was good and food was good, though it seems like quite a bit of the menu was seafood, which I personally don't eat. Portions were very nicely sized.

Daniella is spectacular...She made me comfortable trying something new, and I have been back a few times since, and I still love what she does. And the price can't be beat. It is downtown service and talent at an affordable price. So happy to have this in my neighborhood!
When you deny service to 3 Philly pd patrols 40-minutes before closing, you SUCK as a company, citizen, and should close up shop.

A fan of what sounded like a really good menu, I wasn't impressed with either the portions or the combinations of plates presented. Perhaps it was too new that even though we tried several dishes as a group, the overall was a weak impression.

I don't really see why this is getting more than 3 stars because all the food there is mediocre. The only thing I would get there is probably the baos because all the food there you could get it cheaper and better at other places.

Decent selection of food items with a huge drink selection. I found a lot of the thing I order to eat to be a tad on the sweet side but overall still enjoyable. Service was on the slow side but still accommodating.
Came here to get my oil changed and while I water the employees told customers that they didn't need to wear a mask while inside with everyone. Great safety protocols.
This is a terrible Popeyes, they are always out of chicken, the order is 9 times out of 10 wrong AND the customer service is a joke ! I will be taking my business down the road to KFC .
this place was ok ... my gf took me here not the biggest fan but i'm from Houston the places that we have in Houston is sooo much better...

This place is amazing! Makes you feel like a badass, and it's one of the HARDEST workouts ever! All of the instructors are super friendly and encouraging, plus they play jams all class long to keep the energy up.

The absolute best place for drunk pizza on main street. They gauge you on price after hours, but the slices are boardwalk size and they're fresh, not the leftovers from the day as you might expect. Also a good choice for delivery.
Applebee is now charging customers 1.99 for that touch pad and they have a nasty cracker jack cheesecake which looks like crappie and a cheap idea
We normally do drive-thru, but my wife and decided to go in and sit down, we had a fantastic experience and our waitress Katie was absolutely phenomenal!

The hot chocolate was powdered and tasted like crap. The iced coffee tasted like water and everything was super expensive. Not to mention, the lady taking my order was very rude to me and my dad and she's the reason I won't be back.

Exceptional oysters, super fresh and the other food their menu is really good as well. I went on a Saturday night and it was very busy, but I was still seated quickly and the high customer volume certainly didn't affect the service.
good food at great prices grilled tilapia fish tacos were very good, delicate and crispy enchilada plate is also tasty and portions are always generous.

If your looking for great local home style food this is it they have the type of food that your looking for when you are fast food burned out and just want down to earth breakfast or dinner friendly fast service have never been disappointed!!!

Staff is nice. If you are looking for travel clothing, Scottevest, q zip, pick pocket proof clothing, RFID wallets, not your store, although orvis on line states they have these items. Trout fishing, yes. I'm going to REI.

It's a solid workout but they don't allow time between classes or allow people in early so it's congested before class. That also means there's a mad rush to get in when they open the doors. It's better than other workout classes though.
Owner is great and the shop is amazing such cute stuff to look at while waiting so start on my hair. Tolerant of kiddos if you have the to bring them, great vibe too

They're some of the best damn tacos I've ever. Period. THESE ARE STREET TACOS white people. Don't ask for lettuce and cheese. Do ask for onions and peppers on the side, and check it their salsa bar this stuff makes these tacos come alive!

Been here a handful of times. Staff is great and so is the food. Would recommend to anyone who wants a quick and easy sit down or takeout meal at a place with friendly staff and menu that has something for everyone. Prices are competitive as well.

Went for lunch on a Friday. Food was good and healthy. Service excellent. If you're looking for a healthy and pretty tasty meal in a nice environment and willing to pay a little extra, it's a nice place to go.
Love Fisher's still.... Great selection of hard to find plumbing parts, good prices on bird seed, and of course senior citizens' discounts on Tuesdays for the gray set.

I made this place a pit stop because I really wanted to play at a trivia night while on vacation, and this one fell perfectly into the schedule. The bar was surprisingly large with multiple floors . Trivia occurs Thursdays at 8pm and was entertaining.
Nice environment, gokd service but the pizza had very minimum ingredients and was cooked in gas oven although it can give the impression is wood oven. Not impressed
Dr. Eagan is amazing! I got one syringe of Juvederm Ultra XC lip fillers and I couldn't be happier with the way they turned out! I definitely recommend her! I'll be coming back for more :)

I hate this Dunkin they have the worst service of any in the area and they always get my order wrong and then the give me a hard time when you try to return the the item very unfriendly I think one star is too much
I ordered 2 sets of two tacos through Uber eats and only got two tacos total so I am pretty disappointed
I enjoy this place. Great beer selection, good pizza, and Awesome apps. The down side is, it's a little pricey for how small the pizza's are, and as far as the pizza goes, its pretty good.
I think this is the best place for haircut thank you so much Sode she is very professional she did my haircut I cannot believe it this is the best clubs I have never I have it before.

stopped in here while in st. louis for a business trip. not a bad place, the darker beers were definitely better, i wouldn't rate the blonde much above a bud light but would probably go for the stout or amber again. quesadillas were decent and so was the calamari.
By far the worst publix I've ever shopped at, I came in looking for gluten free flour and organic baby food, guess what I got? Nothing.
I have ordered from them many times. Always something missing. I always let it go, but today, they gave me half a bowl of wilted lettuce, with again, several items missing. Time to order elsewhere.

Spa Manhattan closed in August of 2013. Randall, the owner has walked away with thousands of dollars of clients money and has made no contact with me personally to work out a refund for my 220.00 gift certificate that was purchased from here. Outrageous! Reported to BBB.

So my husband ordered enchilada and did not like it at all it didn't taste authentic to him. I ordered the appetizer and fish and shrimp taco and they were ok but I must say it didn't taste like true Mexican food
Food was good, ambience was nice and the server was very accommodating even though I arrived 10 minutes before the place closed.
I love this place. It's a little on the pricey side and they take a long time to prepare their food, but it's worth it. Just don't go when you're on a time constraint!

I think this may be my first three star review yet... I just didn't like it... Felt like the Margarita was the best thing, got there classic It was Ok Taco's were just too much Too much sauce Too much guac Just too much Chips were ok I

The WORST experience I've ever had. The Friday night before ArmyNavy game. If you don't want to see people wearing sneakers, raise your nose in the air, get past the goons at the door and this place is yours. As for me, I'll never step foot in this place again.

Left the salon today quite happy the hairdresser was very nice good blow dry an nice curls asked for a balayage with light and dark blonde wasn't happy with the colour she has offered to fix free of charge which was nice

Great ambiance & food! Love that they have vegetarian options! Location isn't in the best area and the waiter could crack a smile every once in a while but will definitely be back to try other menu items!
Lots of tvs Bar service was terrible Out of everything - when the bartender finally told us the kitchen closed Manager did not charge us for the partial drinks we had we came in for food
The staff was extremely frieldly, fast, and courteous and the interior was by far the most comfortable and beautiful fast-casual restaurant I have visited recently.
The food is a little pricey. But everything does taste fresh. The parking is terrible. But overall it is a nice spot to go to and they have brunch with mimosas so that's a nice perk
Variety selection of foods to choose from. The Mexican food is packed with flavor it's approx. $15 for dinner but if you sign up for a players card then you get a free meal voucher, can't beat that!
Server aleynna was so great but the cook was a female so damn nasty and she keep touching her face cooking people food and and sneezed in her handle
Awesome experience! My fiancée and I went for a couples massage, and the vibe could not have been better relaxing, stress-free, and peaceful. We will definitely go back again!

Watch out. We were ready to settle and after the sellers had already moved out told us the mortgage would not go through for an item they should have caught day 1. Refused to make good - too much risk to use these guys
Great place with good food my wife and daughter love it as well. Everything we order is hot and fresh can be slow at times when busy but the food is worth the wait
Dave came up very quickly and when I needed a re treatment was able to come the same day - fast service

I absolutely adore this place! My girlfriends and I came on a Friday night last week and were completely amazed by the ambiance, scrumptious food, and such attractive wait staff . We ate the "GSpot" and their $6 peach martinis. I was in heaven! I'm definitely coming back to Gordon's!

One of my favorite local pizza chains in the world. You must, must, must try the Lasagna Pie. A carboholic's ultimate treat, you just can't do any better than a tasting, zesty Italian lasagna layered into a deep dish Chicago style pizza!

While visiting NOLA I tried to eat at as many places as I can and by doing so I didn't get full meals. So I tried the crab cakes at Oceana and what a great choice! The setting was gorgeous and conveniently close to Bourbon street.

Went to Mony's today for the first time and I have to say it is definitely one of the best Mexican food I've had in Santa Barbara. If you're in the area I highly recommend you check them out. The staff is friendly and knowledgeable.

I ordered two bibimbap bowls and they were a bit dry, the flavor was good but the meat was fatty and not all of it edible. The menu is super diverse so I'll give a few other things a try in the future maybe.

When I call the Comcast store to request a local technician, I get a national, generic answering system that is terribly complicated. So here is a generic review for ALL OF COMCAST/XFINITY byshorthairs monopoly status keeps them unaccountable to their customers. I'm very disappointed.

I dove in here from the rain and a nice young woman was be rordered a Paloma which has become one of my favorite mixed drinks behind the counter. It was a bit tart, but definitely yummy. I feel like the price was high, $13.25. Oh well!
we stopped by after a greyline tour great hot roast beef po-boy, great melted muffaletta with a tasty side of jambalaya, local IPA to wash it all down and less than $30. total.

I always sit outside at the tiki bar which is really nice and gives a great view of the sunset. Don't eat here to often because they are really pricey, but the quality of food I've gotten when I have has been excellent. Service had always been good.

My husband and I ate with our senior friends for late lunch and by evening, we were both having stomach pains! Now, three days later we are still sick! Over cooked and terribly slow service make this restaurant a no no for future visits.

After 1 visit I am feeling 1000% better, the machines that Dr. Grazer has are amazing with full body massage and muscle stimulation. However, the one thing I will say is he advertises free consultations for new patients but I was charged a $70 consultation fee.

It's nice to know that what ever Cheesecake Factory we go to that we are going to get great service. We ordered appetizer and of course 5 different cheesecake so we could all sample We ordered lemon drops to cdlebrste friends getting together

The St Charles Bennie has a cult following but do yourself a favor & do "The Peaceemaker", which is having the choice of 2 - choose the Shrimp Boogaloo! Also the stuffed French toast.... & the Irish coffee over ice..... yeah, just eat here. Eat everything. You won't regret it!

Sunday afternoon post-Center City shopping was the perfect time to stop in for a pitcher of cold 1860, the house special brew. Plenty of space, good snack food, and friendly service. What's not to like?
I love that they have dairy free options, and this place, it's easy to be healthy, but even easier to be unhealthy haha, and it's a little expensive, but it's a nice treat here and there!
We always have a great time at doce zola, they allow us to BYO wine, the pasta is home made, and the dishes are usually really good. Good service all during our 5 or 6 visits
Me and my friend are traveling south towards Florida and needed a place to crash in Nashville, looking for cheapest rates. We ended up paying way too much for what we got. Don't stay here!

This place is overated and crowded, food wasnt that great, didnt enjoy my ice cream that i got from astro either! The pizza was not good and not a lot of kid options, i brought my 3 kids and they did not have fun.

Was scrambling a week out from my wedding to find someone to do my hair after some last minute changes and they not only got me in but did an AMAZING job!! I can't thank y'all enough for helping me on my big day!!!!
Blown away by the supportive staff and willing to fit me in during a busy day- not to mention my nails have never looked so good. And the place was super cute to boot. Will be back again for sure!
I got the steak tazza fajita wrap and it was missing half the things in it that the menu said it had. No sour cream, rice, or cheese was in it. The steak was dry as well.
Easily the best Mexican food in East Nashville. Super authentic and delicious. It's kind of a hole in the wall compared to some of the bigger budget places but that just mean locals only.

I like the doughnuts well enough, but way too expensive. I get it, they're a little bigger, but I'm gona want to eat 4 different when I go, not 1 gigantic doughnut. The place leaves something to be desired as well.

Delicious ice cream. Unique flavors and very friendly staff willing to let you try all the flavors. I went with a triple scoop fish, chocolate mole, strawberry balsamic vinagerette with white pepper and the ooey gooey butter cake. It was like an artisanal neapolitan, amazing!

Not very helpful employees Returned a gift without receipt & they BULLY. Seem more concerned about how fast they can chase a customer out of the store even before the store is closed rather than letting the shopper finish.

The print team went ABOVE & BEYOND for us on a last minute very large urgent print job for the Santa Barbara International Film Festival. Ian & Shireen in particular are ROCK STARS. We will continue to use Office Max Print Center for our printing needs.

One of the best parts about Eastthus, you'll find me here weekly. Madeorder tacos are topmealsone . Guacamole is fresh & quite cheapmug me if I'm there with 5 outtown friends, and I'll extend you the same courtesy.
I went for the first time yesterday. It was interesting and a cool place to dig for things. The only thing I don't like is that it's a little dirty in there and there was glass in some of the bins.
2nd on "the machine ate my money and can't get a hold of management" train. Too bad because the car wash is decent but I'll just have to find somewhere that doesn't steal their customers' money.

Anthony Camillo provided excellent service by helping me when I ran out of gas and was efficient and kind and really saved the day for me by arriving and working so fast. Definitely an amazing reminder that there are good people out there on this chaotic morning!
Love BYB! Whenever I have a great workout and don't want a burrito to counter balance it I come here to get the much needed protein but least guilty feeling! My go J
Holy wow Home run Super great menu Crisp knowledgeable service Great presentation Creative approach Great quality Wanted to order half the menu

Delicious bloody marys, nice bartenders, lots of tvs for march madness. Draft beers are a little pricey and the place can get a little crowded because there isn't a lot of seating. A nice getaway from Bourbon Street.
Upgrading to 3 stars bc there's some really cute guys here. And whenever I need to take a friend out to eat this place fits the bills for all makes and models!

This is the worst dishonest dealership I have ever seen in my life, they over charge on everything by 120%, totally disgusted from dealing with them, they charge extra for everything and wants more than anyone else .
Went and had lunch with my mom this afternoon and it was fabulous when I was leaving I also bought sourdough loaf of bread OMG
Food was good. The 3 stars is because of Nikki the bartender. She was not happy to be a team player and help her co) too many good people need jobs that would smile!!!!

How is that I place an order at 1:04pm to have in not put in until 1:33pm. For a single item of fried rice how is it that I'm asked to wait another 10min to get FIRED RICE 50 MINUTES AFTER PLACING THE ORDER. WTF is that.
Service as usual in New Orleans is mediocre, unfriendly I can't generalize, but that's how it is in canal and bourbon The French market has nicer people

Manfred's had me at comfort food, hooked me with tacodilla, tickled my tastebuds with the texture of hard melted cheese, and left me wanting more with friendly conversation. Until next time, Manfred's.
The food is what it's supposed to be but my god do they get my order wrong almost every time I come to this location. I don't know if it's a faulty speaker or the employees but it's so frustrating.

Been in NOLA for 3 days and tried a few oyster bars and by far this spot was the most consistent in oyster size and already off the shell also. Flavor was good along with service. Will definitely come back here again the next time I'm around.

Really good food. For what it's worth, i think they season their burgers with old bay seasoning, so if you're not a fan of that taste, you may opt for chickenwhich is fabulous. The atmosphere is pretty lame, but again, the food is really good.

Not really impressed. The drinks were not great, I guess if you like absinthe they maybe do a good job with that, but everything else was mediocre. The vibe wasn't great to me either, just felt kind of cheesy to me. Overall, meh.
We are from NY City and went in not expecting much but was pleasantly surprised by how great their pizza was! We went with the basic Margherita pizza. It was delicious!

Usually the food is good but I changed up my order and got the pizza with the works and it was undercooked. The cheese wasn't melted all the way. I had to cook it a little longer so the cheese would melt
This restaurant has really good service. If you are not familiar with Thai Food, just ask and they help you discover what your tastebuds have been longing for.
I found a roach in my sandwich and when I told Victor he was extremely rude unprofessional, I do not recommend!!

They have stuff you might need, but never ever go in if you are in a hurry. There seems to be no urgency, slow to call additional cashier when the line gets long, and a general feeling of not caring. The second star is mainly for convenience of location.

I've been going to these guys for years and they do stand behind their work. However after some research on a recent repair they did on my Jeep I found out that I was charged $900 for a $300 part. To me that's a little over the top.
Such a bummer! I've gone back several times since that visit, and either the order is wrong and/or takes like 15 minutes to put two salads together.

The more I go the less I'm loving it. We order out for lunch at least 3 times a week and they've become the last resort due to the high pricing and anytime the girls get hot sandwiches or boxed meals they come Luke warm and soggy.

Love this spot! My husband and I come here often to get work done, grab coffee with a friend or get the life-changing avocado toast. All their baked goods are sourced from a local bakery, staff is friendly, what's not to love about this spot?
I dunno. Maybe I'm spoiled by all the blowouttheto-but if you're a foodie like me who eats out rather often, you probably want to look to somewhere more exciting.
Food is great bad part it's very loud when you try and talk to anyone you have to compete against everyone else as well it's not wheelchair accessible
The pasta was bland and left much to be desired, but the staff and atmosphere were lovely, and as many others have said... the fries are delicious!

Visited here while in town for work, because it was close to the hotel, quick and cheap. The bloody Mary deal was amazing, but unfortunately I got sick directly after eating the gumbo here which wasn't as good as I'd hoped for. The service was spectacular however

Whitney only gave it a tentative three stars because she doesn't know the inside track on what to order from this Boise Chinese food institution. I've been going to this family-General Tong's chicken .

Nice little shop, with friendly staff. We got the rose petal gelato, which was very nice, and the chocolate covered bacon, which was nothing special. The gelato flavors were very varied and interesting, and I would definetly be interested in coming back and trying more flavors.

So so delicious!! The scampi is beyond incredible! I had it delivered to my hotel while I was in town and they were so kind to package everything so nicely. The food was spectacular as was the delivery. Thank you!

Cool spot - came in on a cold day and ordered a tea which was amazing. I emailed them to find out more about it and they responded right away, even pointing me to the manufacturer as I live out of town. Great stuff and great service!

I was next door getting my nails done and stumbled upon this place. Happy hour drinks were great. My daughter ordered the chicken quesadilla and myself nachos since I really wasn't that hungry and could eat them later when I got home watching horror movies.

Ralph's is the perfect redAmerican classics, this is your spot. Service is also excellent. Ignore the fact it is in a hotel, and also ignore the attempt at upscale atmosphere, and enjoy it for what it is. It is a place to go for an excellent, "red gravy" meal.
Every other Cold Stone I have been to has been stellar. We love cold stone, we were shocked to find ice cream so old it had freezer burn with crystals on top.... Disgusting

We have an 1887 Victorian with 2 old chimneys. They were falling apart and a hazard but Iilya and his crew did a FANTASTIC job of replacing the chimneys with light, long lasting materials that totally keep the Victorian look of the house!

This establishment needs help. Tables need cleaning, trash is piled up near the side door and supplies are stacked on your way to the restroom. Produce looked stale and one server looked overworked while the other was mean and seemed frustrated.

Meh...don't really get all the hype. The toppings were plentiful and the girl at the counter was very nice and friendly, but I couldn't find a froyo flavor I really liked....and I love froyo! I personally would not return, but I'm glad so many other people like it.
They just served me a raw quarter pounder with cheese how can they do that I guess They need to make $28 an hour to be special skills to cook a freaking hamburger
I love their hoagies but hate their hours. I would eat like to eat here often but with their limited hours it's just not possible or worth the hassle.

Mix of tourists and locals, had a long line almost out the door and the place was packed which is a good sign. I had the 3 piece dinner plate, ribs, brisket, and bbq chicken. The meat flaked off the bone... Good southern cooking and good value.
Great food, low price, great service, its the whole 9. It honestly doesnt look like much but I went in on a slow time of day and still had fresh and hot food. Ita almost worth the 30 min drive.
Very happy with the estimate, work done on the exterior trunk lid of my Mazda CX-5 and experience with Keenan collision. Highly recommend.

Coffee was fine. Not very good COVID protocols. Quite a few people congregating inside and without masks. Because if this I waited outside after ordering my coffee and the barista was nice enough to bring my drink outside.
Never answer the phone or respond to voicemail or email or website inquiries. I've got good credit and income and I'm very flexible as to where I'm looking but evidently they don't want business.
Very casual seafood restaurant. Great for lunch free drink with check but this is a good option when you want a low-key lunch with fresh seafood.

Records and CDs, both new and used, posters, an AMAZING collection of stickers, ttype jewelry and accesories, incense, and lots of "smoking products", wink, wink... Be ready to climb some stairs and lose an hour, or so, if you like looking at music.
Had my haircut and it looks not the best. I am surprised on how fast she cut it but it says it in the name she literally chopped all my hair off. Even after I told her specifically what I wanted.
Wow, the food in this place is so good, I got Marsala Pork Chops with garlic mashed potato, out this world. AAA+++ Service was great.
Price are to overrated especially when every toy in there is made in China mightest well grab a object around your house and be pleased as well even better !!!!

Loved the chicken and shrimp philly so much that I had to get another on my way out of the city. Forgot to tell them no jalapenos so I had to pick them out. It was still delicious. I love this sandwich.

Food was just okay, the drinks were not good at all, and the atmosphere has to be the worst we've found here in Boise yet. If you HAVE to eat here, get the breakfast sandwich on a croissant... but also note: they don't do bacon here either.

Meh. My 13 VERY bland. The price was right, it was convenient to our hotel, but I wish we had wandered farther to find something better. It was not terrible and at the same time I wouldn't eat there again. Three stars because my son liked it.
The mole mini tacos were great; however, I would have had to consume about six of them to fill my hunger. At $4 a pop, I would most like go somewhere else to sit down for a complete meal.
Amazing old school Chinese place. Everything is homemade, service is awesome, and the tea that they give you for free is my favorite tea in the world.

The pizza is better than average, and salads are fresh and okay. What I really miss are the soups which were so good on those days when you catch a cold or flu bug. I wish they would bring back the soups!

This place is massive, and the way they numbered their meeting rooms makes no sense to me. That wouldn't have bothered me if the people working there could give good directions, but they seemed as lost as I was!

I made an appointment a week in advance. Gave them my insurance info. The day before they called me saying they lost it and I needed to bring in my member handbook to show what my insurance pays for you shouldn't make one! They suck!!
Overpriced drinks and women that look like they were hired from narcotics anonymous meetings, you'll see way better looking women just going to the bars.

If you're looking for fresh roasted coffee and a better than average latte this is a great place. Privately owned and attached to a cool gift shop with lots of sweets the locals are always here and you can even sit outside.

Great selection behind the bar but horribly understaffed. For the longest bar on all of Lower Broadway, there are only three bartenders slinging drinks currently and ours also happens to be waiting on and bussing the tables behind us. Dang, Bo.
Took my sport coat in for its first every dry cleaning and when I got it home one of the buttons was broken in half. It was the first cleaning ever and now I know not to go back there.
First time flying out of here. Check-in and ticketing and security were all easy and moved quickly, but the plane was getting here so my flight got delayed..
This place was so good! We got there just before the rush of Friday dinner and so glad we did because it stayed busy the entire time we ate. Definitely didn't disappoint!

There is no bug wash station and the staff that is supposed to brush for bugs before you enter wash are young kids that usually are chatting with each other and don't scrub the car. The wash itself hardly cleans. I've come out still dirty most washes.

I have been trying to get a hold of Charley Belcher about a story he did that I needed the info on. Called several people, left messages and even emailed him. Total joke and has proven to me he cares nothing for his viewers.
Pathetic, got to watch two employee's today argue over who was making my smoothie, tired of this place servicing the public that way. Don't bother.

1) Deal with Calvin if you do business with them. He does his best for his customers. 2) at drop off make them inspect and insure all your items such as blinkers, headlights, tail lights all work and when you pick up your car recheck these items.
Food and service alway great, love the Panang curry, green curry, spicy basil noodle, laub, papaya salad, chicken coconut soup, and so much more! Clean decent prices good portions.

First time swinging in this place. Well stocked with very friendly employees. Nail trimming/ grinding prices are great and the groomers were pleasant and made me feel comfortable leaving my pup there for a quick nail trim.

The service and waitstaff are terrific but the food is just horrible. After several attempts to like this place, I give up until they change their menu and stop trying to pass off overcooked pasta in Ragu as real Italian food.

Hidden jewel in noisy French Quarter! Their coffee fragrance caught our attention even outside its closed doors. Inside, the smooth friendly service, fragrant coffee and fresh pastry, clean and cool ambience are refreshing compared to many hot dirty crowded tourist traps.

Walked in randomly today with my mom and was met with very friendly and welcoming staff we ordered the pulled pork and chicken breast, baked beans coleslaw and baked Mac n cheese, everything was so delicious !! We will definitely be going back and I highly recommend saucys .

Tried the food here was ok veggies were fresh and crunchy but wasn't to thrilled with food fried rice was dry chow mein was greasy.past that if someone else was paying I would go back but not thrilled about it
Bland food Skimpy portions compared to Chipotle Meat tends to be over salted Sassy employees Forever wishing it was a Chipotle instead :, (
This place is a dump also nasty floor staff is slow I had to actually ring the bell for service then I got help with a attitude
