Bad service, bad food and over charged. Be sure to check before you pay. We never received water, egg rolls was size of a thumb, pad Thai was pho rice noodles and veggies not even mixed. The girl there was dragging her feet and giving everyone bullshit, bad service.
Good calzone, weird stares Got the vibe that they're rather be doing something els than be open on a supposed holiday but who wouldn't I guess. Service did good in the end, upped a star.
As a south side resident I want to support businesses in Southern Plaza but I won't be going back to this store. I've been there twice and find the staff to be rude and lack customer service skills.
large great variety and fresh, staff is friendly and place is always full, be prepared to have cash as the do not accept cards.
Why I tried a Hattie B's again is beyond me19 crisis and I did in fact pay and not receive food, my vision for helping this place included food as you could imagine.
Quality food, I had the honey mustard chicken sandwich, it was a lot of breading and sauce, so made it difficult to manage, wouldn't suggest the tator tots, but fries were very yummy!
Got some take out for late dinner tonight. Service was super fast with my food ready in 10 minutes and friendly staff who gave me a surprise 10% discount for their grand reOK."

The diner you visit, well because you always have! Not the cleanest place around, nor the most delicious food. But, you can rely on the menu being pretty much the same, and settling in with your friends or family like old times.
The only hazy on the strip! Much lower key and chill than the other breweries, but still has a couple of tvs to watch the game while listening to some Reggae!
Delivered wrong pizza and when they finally delivered the correct one the delivery person questioned whether we got the wrong pizza originally. Had the wrong name on the ticket and no toppings!
Pretty good place. I don't make it to NOLA often but when I do I make it a point to stop by at least once. I love their butter sauce for the fries!

Awesome local place. Honest work. Main line Toyota gave me a quote of around $2000 for maintenance repairs and an inspection. Took my car here all I needed was a serpentine belt and they fixed my light sensor on my door jam for free only costing me $100 ish total.

Thanks for the comments Ambler but you still charge a customer $70 to look at something. I'm just letting others know the facts and you can defend all ya want but there are plenty of places in the area with quality products and service that don't charge for an.....estimate!
Great shop had a great selection were very helpfull there pricing was a littel on the high side but they did have nice quality e cigs and mods
Although their drinks taste pretty good and are generally consistent, I had to wait an unacceptable amount of time for my orders to be prepared, so I give it three stars.

While walking around historical districts in Philadelphia, there is a lot of impressive statuary and sculpture to gaze up at. Most people, of course, want selfies at the Rocky Statue, but there is no reason to deprive yourself of good outdoor art work like this.
every time i walk into DGi'm slightly sketched out by the music, the people that work there and the cleanliness of store...but JEEZ everything is so gosh darn inexpensive, i keep going back!

Called just to be put on hold for ten minutes only to be told they are closed and no one could help me even though it was six minutes to 5 o'clock! Obviously they don't care about getting business so don't waste their time by calling.

It was ok, over priced yuppy establishment good to go if your twenteen and want to pay Starbucks prices for food and coffee that is just ok. I would recommend for a out of Town history lesson visit but not as a regular stomping ground for Alton residence.

I came to this place after reading reviews on here and I wasn't very impressed. First of all, we had to wait about 15 in order for us to be sat which wouldn't have been that big of a deal had the place been packedespecially because of the price.

The planetarium small. Entertaining enough for children. Little free exhibit and little gift shop with not much to offer compared to say, OMSI in Portland, OR which is enormous. The planetarium itself is the highlight with shows playing every day. Again, most entertaining for children.

Cutie a bit too dry/crumbly, but I'd love to try their linzertorte, since I'm a huge meringue/zest muncher, and maybe that dryness would translate into a perfect flakiness that is suitable for a torte?
I bought a hybrid insight from Joe Lewis on September 4th. The customer service was so great and I'd recommend him to every one who wants to be taken care of when buying a car!!!

Unless you wanna eat popcorn or nachos from the PileCrap Cart this is your only choice. After enduring the food and the horrible service I suggest heading straight to your gate and holding out for the free peanuts. They would be cheaper and more satisfying .

I ordered my cupcakes days before for my son's birthday party and even called back to confirm, and when my husband went to pickup the order, they didn't find it, and the attendant admitted she never placed my order. Such terrible experience. No cupcakes for my son's party.
Place is pretty cool although after I sat down with my family it took them almost 15 minutes to check in at our table to take our order. Food was decent... Well deserved three star
They are supposed to be open until 1am every time I come on a Saturday night they say they are closing at 11pm. Use to be a good place to go to the hours are horrible now.
I always use them for my wife's hose cleaning supplies, only ones to carry it, I use to get them at the truck stop but they stopped carting them
One of the gentleman at les schwab worked on and replaced the drums on my classic. Did a phenomenal job and helped me get the car on the road for the first time in over 25 years!

Some dining experiences are enjoyable, others are memorable for different reason the total dining experience. I wholeheartedly and enthusiastically recommend August to anyone looking for beautiful and inspired French cuisine in the heart of New Orleans. You won't regret it.
We have ordered drunken noodles which was good and Thai fish cakes which was pathetic, they have just heated it in microwave and gave to us.

On Sunday, a dear friend and I met for lunch at Renee's. The subdued, calm atmosphere provided a pleasant break from the hot, humid, and sunfree desserts. Yes... kudos to Renee's for using organic veggies, featuring gluten-free bread and desserts, and having such a hospitable and attentive wait staff.

Super grocery store, even Supergroceryout point levels of vantagepoint. I probably only grocery shop every other week, but I always take a quiet moment to gaze out over fair philadelphia. Other conveniences are that a dollar store and liquor store are just underneath the Superfresh for one-stop shopping.
Hands down the best pizza in Philly! Were not in the delivery area but we order the take out on a regular basis and drive across the city for it.

It's really worth to come, cuz the taste is amazing ~~~~! the manager who opened a restaurant in LA is very nice, I know she had many experiences on operating restaurants before. Everything in here is awesome. Just come in guys!
Came here yesterday and went through the automatic wash, paid for the top level wash, and now my car is covered in water spots.

This place has an absolutely beautiful set up, it's truly just amazing but the food is mediocre in my opinion. You could probably take good pictures here but if you're only looking for food it may not be the best spot. 3/5 accurately describes this place in my opinion.

Worst service ever. I was double charged for my meal, showed proof that I was double charged, and the store manager wouldn't give refund. Ridiculous. Unprofessional. Rude. They don't deserve the one star given.
My husband was really excited to see the Partheneon here, and the kids and I were glad to see a playground area when we got here too. I also liked the plane and train on display.

Been watching the barista bounce back and forth between other tasks rather than making my drink- 21 minutes and counting. Coming from a coffee shop and other customer service settings, pretty disappointed at their lack of urgency when it comes to satisfying a customer. Great products but horrible service.
The food is good. But just watched the man who cooks in the deep fryer take chicken tenders out of package with bare hand &!put chicken tenders in the deep fryer! Should he be using gloves???? YES!!!

I always like seeing historic sites and especially if you can go inside and learn more about it. This monument is right in the downtown area and makes for a quick and fun addition to your visit while in Indy. Great view from the top!

They did a great job on my daughters hair. I've been searching for a salon that is similar to the many salons in New York for over a year and I think I've found it with Triple A. We will def be back as regulars!!

busy little cafe that serves good coffee. i'm a crepe fanatic but the crepe i had left me with indigestion. i am willing to go back and try the dessert crepes since my brunch buddy seemed to enjoy hers too much to share.
Hey guys! Thanks for wasting my time by not fulfilling my mobile order this morning. Waited 20 minutes before leaving empty handed and with $5+ less on my mobile account Hope you do better next time
We moved to Tamp in 1982 and we have been buying hot fresh donuts form Bruce since he opened his door, we love them and his networking service too!

Food was so good. Definitely affordable Italian food. The happy hour menu was half off entrees and 5 dollar martinis. The bread is so good too! Service was slow and the restaurant was soo loud but I think it was because there was a big party going on.

I love Roots clothing especially their hoodies and sweaters. They don't have a Roots chain in the SF Bay Area so I made sure when I visited Canada, I would come back with a mess of Roots gear to rock during our cold months. It helps and they're so warm!

Amazing and fun place between the belly dancers and the wait staff dancing and the breaking of plates it was very entertaining everyone was friendly and you can tell They home made a lot of their dips etc ! Will definitely be back

Really good burritos. The salsa is super delicious and has a rich smokey flavor. Their portions on the tacos are perfect if you want to sample a bit of everything, and they're reasonably priced so that you can binge if you want.

Amazing beer selection, amazing bar good and awesome service ! I've been looking for a place like this since I've moved to Reno and I think I've finally found my spot :) very very impressed.. I think I'll become a regular here
Awesome food, ate here in May, back in Phoenix from Ohio and made the trip to Tucson for a great meal.
One of the best places to go to Purchased any import products and the best selection on meat products I personally love their pork grinds that they sell there wonderful staff great service.

We had guest come into town from Georgia and wanted to present them with some Tampa Bay flare and they loved Ulele. The food was great and the service was good. The atmosphere was nice and I love the night scene.
Yogurt was bland and the girl behind the counter seemed annoyed that I interrupted her computer time - lost a sale.

Update: we received a check for about 50% of what we had paid for the chair the day before. So not a complete loss, but still disappointed that we were not given a refund for a return after less than 24 hours.

Great new addition and I am happy another good place went in because we were sad the ones in the past closed. Everything we had so far from there has been delicious. Great truffle fries, homemade pasta, chicken cutlet sandwiches, and pizzas. Can't wait to go back!
A huge excellent burger but there was nothing special about it and at $10 a burger with no side was a little extreme. This is a great burger if your in the area but the price is a little extreme.
Amazing! Just wanted a quick spot by my hotel and whatever the special crepe was today was incredible and I don't even like crepes. Great spot!
Came here with a few friends we got a pepperoni pizza they enjoyed it but for me the dough was a bit under cooked staff was friendly and polite

Decent downtown lunch option. There is often a wait for a table at lunch time, so plan for that. The food is just ok. Sometimes you get lucky and everything is done well, other times your carne asada is rubber and your taco al pastor is funky.

I have no idea how it's highly rated. It's outdated, But worse of all it caused me horrible allergies, I had to check out early and go to another hotel. The carpet is old and dirty, The breakfast is a joke, the website is deceiving.

This is the worst red lobster I have ever been to I never got served was there for an hour other tables was being served and I asked for the manager he said my server was in a meeting and there was no one to take her place I left

If I could leave more stars I would. Seriously, so freaking good. Highly recommend the crawfish grilled cheese if they have it, their onion rings were phenomenal, and you haven't lived unless you've had their mac n cheese bites.

Two words: pulled pork! My husband and I picked up some bbq meats from Big Woody's the other night by-side comparison, the pulled pork was deemed the better dish. Definitely check this place out if you are in the St. Charles area!
Food came out quickly and generous portions, however the food didn't have much flavor and with all the great reviews and word of mouth and the location is perfect on beach drive.
Great, great, great! As an extra bonus, there is funny reading material scrawled on the walls from all kinds of drunk people who have sat at the small counter.

The best Steakhouse in the West! We love the French onion soup! The best garlic filet I've ever had! My wife and I live in the Bay Area and once or even twice a month we travel out here for the best soup, steak and service we've ever had!
This is your average Bruegger's Bagels with lots of seating. I suggest parking along the side or in the back because the parking spots are smaller and more difficult to get in and out of.

Never had a bad experience until today. Ordered a Southwest Chile Lime Ranch Chicken salad, and the avocado was ROTTEN and about a third of the leaves had brown spots. I am trying to support businesses during crazy times, but at least don't give me rotten or bad food!

Not sure what the fuss is about... to be fair, we did not order oysters in raw form; we had the roast beef poboy and the peacemaker poboy, both fine but unremarkable. Not even size able left a little hungry. Certainly wouldn't recommend standing in any line to eat here.
Needed a full new set of acrylics, wanted long trails and ended up short and stubby, but 3 stars because Van was sweet.
I order a number 15 and no they hang up this is trash and they also have Burger King foot lettuce

Was at kasablanka on Thursday the food and entertainment and waitress was great but the bartender was slow and just about useless. She was slow and just not worth a sh$@. She made it hard on the other staff in the restraunt.

It's a good newspaper in print but has easily the worst online presence of any newspaper in the US in a city with a population above 200, 000. It has no Facebook presence profoundly odd. Though its Twitter feed is ok.
Best meal I've ever had. I'll be making a point to going back here as many times as possible in my last months living in philadelphia. Foody heaven!

Yelp listed this place has curbside pick up. When I ordered ahead of time, I called in but the lady told me to wait on line outside the stores like others that are ordering at store. No point to order ahead of time and no curbside pick up.

The new coffee shop on Dayla vina Street, I was not very impressed. I found the price is a bit high in the coffee quality was just above fair I will have to give it another try. Maybe it was just a bad day
Not a very friendly place to buy beer, Owner should take courses on how to be a business owner, It was like he was annoyed to answer some questions.
Best butcher shop I have encountered yet. I have tried a few butcher shops before and market butchers and not one of them had such delicious and fresh meat and great service!

The service was extremely slow. We waited for our check for over half an hour after waiting twenty minutes to place a dessert order. The plates came out looking uncomposed, sloppy even, which was a bit of a turn off but the taste, and the margaritas, were good.

The shoes were poorly constructed and my credit card info was stolen. This is not a reputable company. MBT shoes used to made in Switzerland but I learned that company went out of business and this MBT USA is likely a scam.
Staff is very nice, however engaging diners while they eat to try and sign them up for rewards cards is tacky and impolite. Food average and stick to wine or beer. Bartenders are subpar

It's a bit better than an ordinary grocery store because it has good fresh produce and an unusually large and well-stocked organic section. I don't buy my meat or fish there, but I do buy chicken and that's fine. The deli department is awful.
5 stars to these guys the professionalism is second to none and I never say that in my reviews so South Philly support them.

We had a tricky situation with a very old car that was not very maneuverable and a couple places that were quite complicated. But the Catalina guys were very skilled, careful and patient, and we are grateful that our old girl made it safely to her new home.

My husband and I were new to the area and live fairly close by so we went for dinner one night. The food was presented beautifully. It was not the best tasting I had had. Went home and both of us were sick all night. Never again

szechuan hunan is super fast and reasonably priced. other than that, it's pretty average chinese food. nothing to write home about but a solid option when you're in the mood for chinese or when you want something quick and cheap.

I went to this salon last Friday as I usually do but this time was such a horrible experience. I got a gel mani and it was so sloppy and the coats were not enough which showed my original nail color. I am not coming here again.

Decent atmosphere. No beer on tap. Would probably be a sweet place to hang out if you had a group of 4 or more and wanted a place that was almost to yourself. I will be going back during their happy hour to try out the food.
This is a great place to venture out and try a new roll because the sushi is so fresh and tasty, you will never be disappointed! Try the Wasabi Special or M&B II

After relocating to Tampa, I was looking for a new eye doctor, and was referred by Michele to Newsom Eye and Dr. Petit. Office was clean, professional and Dr. Petit made me immediately comfortable. I highly recommend this practice.

Freezing cold rooms and hallways! ATM never worked and the front desk refuses to call cabs for guests. There is one guy who is in charge of cabs and if he's not there they make you call one yourself. Rooms are clean and spacious. Great TV channel selection!
I have been to this location a few times and it has fantastic products however when I was with a friend I followed the yelp directions and it took me to a residential home. Not okay.

Rusty's is a nice place to get pizza if you've only ever had frozen pizza and want to gradually arrive at the level of delight that comes with eating a fresh pie. This location benefits from an old bank theme to entertain the old bank enthusiasts in your party.
I tried to order food off of grub hub the wait time was 3 hours the people on the phone were incredibly rude.

Very disappointed with the service today. My pedicure was fine, but the woman doing my manicure cut my cuticle so bad it was bleeding and when I pointed it out, she was rude towards me for the remainder of the manicure. Will not be returning.
It's expensive. That said, with the only other option being pizza in this wing of the terminal, it was a pleasant quick bite. I got the half salad with soup and a diet tea came to $12.

Good taste! I like it not just for I can pick all the flavor myself, but the attitude of staff makes fell comfortable. I got there very late so there was few people. I am sure I will get to the same store in Chicago, if have one...
ZERO STARS Got the last table on the patio Finally did long story short food was not good so soggy had to eat with a fork - Zero stars

A few times they have told me that my pick up was cancelled because I "missed a call" but I had my cell phone glued to my head the entire time. When i say, I did not, they proceed to tell me that I'm lying. Crazy. Bad company, find another.

I was excited to try this place I don't think it lived up to the hype or other many of the other great pizzas I've had. I ordered my pizza to go, but as not happy with the quality. My reasoning for the 2-very disappointing.

This man is an angel. After my wife had surgery on her jaw, and couldn't come to his office, he made house calls to her for months to help her get through it. He's a truly gifted chiropractor, and a genuinely good man.

Dave in the Service Dept. doesn't believe in communicating with customers. He claims to have called to let me know my car was ready for pickup, but I never rec'd the call, nor did he leave a message. Very poor customer service!!

Very tasty food, good portion size, a bit crowded inside but nice atmosphere - nice byob close in the plymouth mtg/Lafayette hill area. Food is always good, very true Italian recipes, bring your own nice bottle of wine to go with your meal and desserts are delicious!
This is a tourist trap Food was just ok as expected, but since it is a place for tourist you will pay $10 for frozen drinks. Our bill was $63 for 2 people.

This while while is nice good customer service and they always busy they closed it down for money to to remodel but it looks like the same store so I don't really know what they remodeled but I love this Wawas
Although the gas is a little more expensive here the service is fantastic. I love that this place is family owned and they always have more of a selection than a regular gas station.

I'm pretty picky when it comes to burgers, and I've tried several around town that don't cut it I got the grassquality and have good flavor. So far, this is the best I've had in Tucson, so give it a shot.
I can only speak for the Chinese food from Thai China Bistro but not only was it the most expensive Chinese take out I've ever had but it was also the worst tasting too.
The outside looks a little scary, and it is certainly a hole in the wall restaurant, but the food is amazing and the prices are great!

Comparable to Chipotle, better than Taco Bell. When my husband and I visited this particular Qdoba, the cashier was ridiculously rude to her coworker and scolded him multiple times in front of the customers. Inappropriate.

If you enjoy creative small plates and yummy gnocchi with a side of overly pretentious service, I would highly recommend Stateside. Be forewarned the happy and pleasant food runner will completely and totally make up for the pretentious server.

Tasty hot and sour soup, crispy egg rolls and spicy Kao pao chicken... good food and same family owners for over 15 years. It's been a stable for my family on a busy work night with not enough time to cook for the family.
Whatever you do, do not order over the phone, I was scammed out of my money, the people that answered were not Pizza Hut workers.
Serviceterrible Unsure why I even bothered going out? $34 for bad food and bad service is just a kick to the gut, which after eating here is doing hula hoops.
Thank you for your exceptional service and delicious food I had the Spin Salad with Chicken and took the Thai Chicken to go... People were wonderful and super helpful thanks you guys

A very disappointing meal after a great one, oh well, the salads were ok, the pastas so-so, the desserts nice but not great, someone in our group loved the trout. We'll return but weren't wowed this time. SORRY!

Beautiful space that will likely be out of business within a year. Hope the food is better than the service-my visit stalled out in the ordering phase so didn't have a chance to even place an order before I moved on to another restaurant.

Did a wine and paint here for a work retreat and when the chef heard I couldn't do the cheese on the pizza he made a couple without cheese. Superb service, they make a mean sangria, and the space was perfect for the painting session.
This is my goout a lot and you can even just order the $4 lunch potstickers and be on your way.
Best place in boise to drink fancy well made craft drinks eat really good local food and relax by the fire outside. One of My favorite places.

Very poor service, mediocre food, and several consistently poor experiences means my work group won't be returning here for a long while, despite being within walking distance. Only come here for a drink, as their wait staff tries but can't handle lunch or dinner crowds.

So cheap! The burgers are great! The fires are from froZen as well as the onion rings, so if you come here expect the cheap juicy burger to be the item that satisfies. Also be sure to get a mug of their own root beer.

Had the half shawarma half gyro plate and it was excellent. The sauces are really great too. I think the rice is better at Shawarma on the Go uptown but if you are on the westbank this is a great food option.

Went here once. I don't know if it was an off day, but the hummus they served me was the absolute worst hummus I have ever tasted thick and bitter. I think it might have been straight tahini. I've been afraid to go back ever since.

These guys worked really hard to make sure I was happy and they were honest with me and kept their word. They are hard working fellows just trying to keep their customers. For me, anyone who keeps their word and does what they say earns my respect.
The sandwiches deserve 5 stars but they lost a star to bad service and another for not wearing face coverings during the pandemic
Advertise that you have boba drinks but don't have tapioca balls bc and I quote "you have to make them fresh" what the?? Never going here again!
She's very nice but I went in a couple of times and just wanted a book of stamps and she didn't have them??? I don't understand why she wouldn't have stamps!

One of our new favorite spots in St. Louis! Will definitely be back. Oysters were amazing, mussles- perfect, and the drinks were the perfect addition. Oh, and the owner walked around and greeted tables through the evening and they have a cooler of free water bottles for everyone!

The pork was delicious, but the shrimp had a funky taste, as did the rice Cucumber salad had very good flavor, but included canned pineapple pieces- yes, canned! This offense brought the place down a whole star.

I gave 3 stars bc I have come here for years, as everyone else in NOLA however, this was a bad experience. I have had dinner, lunch & breakfast many times leaving happy with my meal. I ordered a roast beef poboy. Surprising for Mother's.

I'm waiting this review I called to have a cab come pick me up and the refused to because I was only going 3 miles and they said it was not worth thier time because it would not be enough money for them to come get me
Refuses to allow human contact but long automatic system to avoid cancelations & company Refuses to set a return unless you pay.. even though cancelled before shipment started
Dissatisfied I rescheduled for the next day and the did a mistake and reschedule me for the same day day at 11 am and mins you that I booked for 5pm wow

I think it's a great place however the drinks are awfully expensive and getting on the beach now they're charging people to get on it. I think that's a bit ridiculous. Although the inside of the restaurant is very pleasant.

It's McDonald's. Definitely not gourmet, but it's fast and convenient for the kids. At this particular location, they could have a better supply of napkins and ketchup at the customer's disposal, but like I said: it's McDonalds. You generally go in knowing what to expect.

Crappy music blasting Mediocre to sub par service Questionable cleanliness Smoothie pretty good. In short, it felt like I walked into some 19 yr old's dirty dorm room and they made me a smoothie in their sink that tasted alright.

The prices for Dinner went WAY up over the past year but patronage went WAY down since the new prices reduced the value negatively. Service and overall quality have not been consistent. I can't recommend this place for Dinner but Breakfast and lunch sandwiches are good and reasonably priced.

I've been to a lot of threading places, and this one was fantastic! The place is modern and clean with some light background music, and they take walk-ins Decent price: $13 for eyebrow threading The person who helped me was knowledgeable & fast . Would definitely go back!

Avoid the unit in Maplewood Commons if you need or want wi-fi. They don't make it available to customers and give no explanation why, Also now charging for side dishes that formerly came with the entre'. Poorly managed and now ripping people off.

This place took a huge dive in quality since their remodel. Instead of a nice cafe atmosphere, they changed it to an express 'get you out as quick as possible' type place. I am very disappointed in JSB, this used to be my favorite place to eat, but not anymore.

Only ate their once, the burger was ok, the toppings are what make it stand out, the meat itself lacked flavor. Fries weren't crispy, I assume it's because they use fresh potatoes. Customer service was subpar, I felt as if I was being done a favor.
This place is alright, overpriced for the quality of food you get and beer is pretty expensive too, I had a burger which wasn't too bad but the quesadilla's my mom got where just ok.

This is one of the little whole in the wall places that has an extensive hot dog sausage and catfish menu. Don't forget the bologna. We greatly enjoyed all of the vegetarian choices and The various condiment selections. A definite try again next time.

For a family of four we spent over $80 for blackened burnt pizzas and a bland Caesar salad. Best part of dinner was lemonade. We should have sent our food back but we were too exhausted after a full day of walking and just wanted to eat and go.
They have an old guy there that is just mean!! I mean he would easily get squashed like a bug, but it's almost funny how rude and tough he thinks he is!!

A shining star. Great service and even better food. Extremely accommodating with my reservation which I modified. I highly recommend ! We spent 150.00 for two with wine/drinks, appetizers, 2 main courses, they gave us mini desert samplers and appetizers for free from the chef. It was really nice.

I ate here a few times it's always been pretty decent food but today wasn't one of those days I'm not sure if the chef was on brake or what but it didn't have the love in it it was mediocre at best maybe next time or not hmmmm

Nail tech did exactly what I asked even tho she seemed less inspired that I didn't want a pedi too, but I would come back for mani. The pedi area is small and in back, kinda claustrophobic. A tiny spot for local ladies.
All you can eat bbq was flavorless and boring drinks were made poorly not a good experience would not eat here again for the price and flavorless food

Definitely worth going to! The guy that checked is in was super friendly and recommended we try the pork and brisket so we did and it was generous portions and so freaking delicious! Definitely coming back!

Excellent service and a great value. My review is only 4 stars because I made an early appointment and had to wait a while for the mechanic to arrive, but I'll definitely be going back and will bump the review to 5 stars if that was just bad luck.

We had a very different experience from Mark J. below. My husband ordered a whole small pie of the "meat lovers" pizza and the pizza was good and the veal parm was on a great-tasting Italian roll. No complaints here. And they deliver to Wallingford!

This is a local bar it has a pool room upstairs they have regular bar services and have food as well.they have televisions for sports, soccer etc. Parking is a chore but it's that way with all business'es on that side of town

Update - They've been out twice and i still have a broken washer... Maybe they'll get it right the third time but if you need something fixed and don't have a month to wait, don't go with RC Appliance.
Casino is great but don't go there hungry, we went to the 55 dollar buffet and it was OK, but for 11 bucks you can go to Golden Corral and get the same. My wife and I wasted $120 for nothing.

Service was good I ordered the carbonara dish, it was ok but sauce was over done, and Italian ham was a bit dry . The dessert was very good it's was taramusi strawberry more like strawberry shortcake.

Showed up with 12+ people ready to buy drinks but the bouncer/asshat tried to charge us 10 dollars a head on a Wednesday! We were ready to buy way more than 120 bucks worth of alcohol. Long story short I will never return to the mercury lounge.

Cute ambiance, and good service.. I was frustrated when I had told the server I had a gluten allergy and my salad came out with crostini and the mussels with a piece of bread resting on top.. but it was quickly fixed and the food was good.
Excellent, alway 's very good highly recommended, will continue to eat at all of them, love the steaks and unique atmosphere

This is an excellent sushi place and now with ramen dishes added, it offers a variety of quality and tasty Japanese affairs. However, the service is a bit on the slow side. More wait staff should be added.
Never one time always leave and never come on the time you say you need to. I have a docror at 9:30 but they never come on time and they say they'll be here 20 minutes and not here yet

I would never order from this location ever we ordered at 8 pm at didn't receive our good till 2 hours later. Young lady never informed they were backed up and short staffed after three calls still didn't receive food till was informed it was finally out

This is the closest parking to my job. When arriving early, you are forced to park against the wall where you will then be blocked in by several cars. Getting your car out becomes a night mare. There is one valet, he has to play musical chairs with the cars.
Love a great Hamburger once in while i been going to in out since early 80's Lancaster Ca love there animal style with grilled onions
I was here back in May or June because I got my nails eyebrows done before I came to Hawaii and the food was delicious. The staff are very accommodating.

Service isn't the best, some of the people behind the counter taking orders have an attitude as if they're doing a huge favor by taking my order. Also, how can you mess up a burger? No flavor whatsoever and the bread was a bit moldy. Beer was ok.

I really loved my first "Family Chicken Dinner." At $36 seemed ok for three adults and two young ones. But the second one did not have the pickle in the cucumber salad and the potato side that came with the first order was not included. What gives?
I've never been to a bad ChickA before.... fries were half full with four packages of garlic ranch inside the fry container, drink wasn't filled either, and the sandwich was old...

One star for being close to home. One star for the laughter we get from the waitresses lack of capabilities . One star for the T.V's. No stars for the food, sorry guys but your food is so hit and miss it wouldn't be fair one way or the other.
Big thank you to the port of subs team for making my birthday dinner with dessert, everything came out perfect and nobody went home hungry.
People either seem to love or hate ChikAfilfil so be sure to five yourself plenty of time to get your chicken on!
Great service Good spot for a light meal Pricey but worth it Help to connect with my inner zen before a flight

amazing stylists. As for the two ladies managing the place... it's not ok to be drinking ALCOHOL at work or be getting drunk at lunch and expect to be able to professionally handle clients. that's not ok.

Do NOT come to Grand Sierra Resort while COVID30 minute wait in the ELEVATOR LINE, just to get up to the room. Elevator lines coming down are 519 restrictions. Look elsewhere for your stay you don't have to put up with this, it is not normal.
Had the country special 3 eggs sausage bacon home fries and toast only 7 dollars tasted very good bathroom was a little "old" but overall good experience

Cheese muffins were warm and very good Must try the peach tea very very good Classic pulled pork Cole slaw and baked beans Good taste. The slaw had a little tang of spice. The server was Ashley and she was very nice and attentive.
Really enjoy their Sonoran Hotdogs however, the El Guero Canelo on the west side of town seems to have a better atmosphere and vibe to it.

Omg this definitely hit the spot! Haven't had a Cuban sandwich in a while and decided to order one from box of cubans; absolutely delicious and filling! I also ordered a beef empanada it was good but definitely not as good as the sandwich lol!

We ordered from the China Inn in Royersford last night and had it delivered. Sadly it was under seasoned, my shrimp toast was burnt *and* super greasy and to top it off the food arrived cool to the touch. Very disappointing.
Pretty average tasted like a regular hotdog from the grocery store and small and kinda pricey was still hungry after too
Fried pickles my first time Ever they were Amazing !!!!! Best fried shrimp oh and the crab cakes delicious Music and service team were Great too We be back for sure

Great spot for a cheap, quick meal. If you're looking for the best pho you've ever tasted, then I'd say keep looking this is not the place for that. But the food is decent, good portion size, and you really cant beat the prices.

Good experience, food was fine, prices high. The spices weren't as much as I expected. I wouldn't come back or recommend it to a friend, although they among the few that are open for Sunday brunch. Omelets looked interesting with the shrimp in it.

One of my favorite nail salons- they definitely top many places near me in Philly, so often when I travel to see my family in the burbs I make an apt. Great service and they really do an excellent job. They are super friendly & it is very clean!

I'm all about free cheese! These service was great, and the atmosphere is fun, but the tacos and Cuban sandwich are where it's at! I didn't get the flan, but I'll be back to try that later along with sangria, and some more fish tacos!

Just now getting around to doing this review, but I refuse to eat here again. As we sat down to lunch, a roach crawled across the table, and after eating the sushi, my partner came down with food poisoning. If I could give negative stars, I would.
I have been coming here for 20 years, and other than the poor customer service and bad attitudes, it's solid expensive pizza by the slice. I smile and a thank you wouldn't kill this place.
Ordered a vegetarian sandwich for my daughter. Got home to find a piece of bread, two cucumbers, a tiny piece of a tomato, and a piece of cheese... complete waste of time and money.
I didn't try the food, just had a beer flight but the bartender was very nice and knowledgable about their selection of beers. She put together a pretty good flight given what I was looking for.

The steak was fine, a little over cooked The smothered option was definitely not worth it, the service was average at best, the Brussels sprouts were pretty tasty. Not rushing to go back but didn't hate it. It was just kind of meh.
I had the pleasure of trying a sazerac and a hurricane at Pat O'briens, the bartender was very friendly and made a great drink. That was my very first Sazerac, and Hurrican

Ghetto!!! Do not go here!! You will be highly disappointed. I wish I could've took a picture of the young guy working at the cash register eating french fries out of a bag as he was taking my money for my food. Ghetto fabulous!!

Cool little place with plenty of tasty desserts. I chose 5 different deserts for a little get together and everyone was pleased, the tab on that was around $20, not too shabby. The chocolate bomb is my favorite.
This place was quite good for lunch-not sure I would call it fine dining with its atmosphere during the day, but definitely willing to give it a try at night. The chowder was very good.

Deserves zero stars. Their staff can't handle basic requests, they never deliver on what they promise, and yet have attitude like no others. Really CID, time to reassess why your "product" keeps getting worse - otherwise you're just the fraud you appear to be.

First impressions: Very nice atmosphere and very convenient location. Friendly and professional staff. Warning: They are not orthodontists so you can only get X-rays and cleanings done and if needed, make an appointment elsewhere to see an orthodontist.
I wince in pain every time someone suggests McAlisters, which may be one of the most average places in the state! I've tried it about 15 times and each time is as disappointing as the last.
Like the rest of the reviews say the pizza here is nothing special even though I do like the this NYC style crust. You cant beat the $5 for beer and slice of three meat pizza though.

I want to congratulate this place on their customer service because it's quite possibly the most upbeat and helpful staff I have experienced. The food is amazing, the baked goods are close to unbeatable with taste alone not to mention how beautiful they are. 10/10.

I finally went to try out this place and the place wasn't as busy as I thought it would be because I hear a lot of comments about Bluefin Poke. I was so glad that it wasn't busy and the service was super friendly! The wonton chips tasted really good!

Terrible establishment, ugly people, horrible service, old hags everywhere, the FOOOOOOD MADE MEEE WANT TO THROW UPPPPPPPP, what did they put in their FOOOOOOD!!!!!??? Never go to this place or you will die
Great burger and Mac n cheese using foul language in front of me and my 7 year old daughter in regards to his not wanting "to go back in there."

Mark the General manager told me because I'm out of state and wont use his service department you effectively show yourself to be a bad dealership. if you're in the Tri-state, don't support Mark and his weird out of state policies.

Great food, great people, but...they need to do something with their air filtration. The smell of grease and fish after you leave that permeates your clothes and hair is enough to make you not want to go back.

as a ny native i miss hale and hearty a LOT. when i saw brodo i was like finally! a concept i can get behind. i like my soup and salad there this place has the food - the prices just have to match the portion size.

this sandwich is incredible, believe the hype. the bread is perfect, the olive salad is amazing, and room temperature is imo the correct temperature to serve a muff. one of the best sandwiches in the country.
Been here for hours no service Never take occasion to use this app but this establishment deserves some kind of guidance.

I waited in line for 15-20 minutes to be helped by Matthew at the register he was absolutely rude and has no customer service skills whatsoever. He doesn't even know the difference between Trenta and Venti. I not happy with their service at all. This Starbucks needs some real training.

Pretty expensive food here. The sushi rolls weren't bad, but the entrees were nothing to shout about. It may be worth it to come during happy hour to get the sushi roll discount, but everything else here is too pricey for what you get.

Terribly slow service for breakfast on a simple take out order. Over 20 minutes and all I heard was the cook complaining that to-go orders fall to the bottom of the pile. Not worth breakfast at this place

I have been going to Sunnys for about 7 years and all the barbers there can give a good hair cut. its a cool old school environment! All the guys are friendly! Stop looking around for barbers and just go here you won't be disappointed!

such a disappointment. do not go. horrible service. bad food as well. not worth any part. Sent back my food because it tasted so horrible and the waiter refused to take it off the bill even when I only ate one bite!

We were in Nashville for a wedding and looking for a Mexican restaurant. If you like authentic Mexican food, try this restaurant. We were so full from the meal until we got our dessert sopapillas to go to enjoy later at our hotel! 5 stars for us!

I will not recommend anyone to visit this store. Customer service is really bad, an I felt they were little racist too. Manger Brain doesn't have patience to even listen to customer issue, and he suggested me to switch to another service provider. Not even a star worth customer service.
My son loves coming here. Never a bad experience. My only complaint is a bit of a wait at times, but I guess part of that is because they do a great job.

Ok u have to come in and try the bacconmac and cheese bites the taste expensive !! Good games on the tv, fast to be seated, u can see the workers are constantly on eveyting no ones la gagging hard working ! Ohh and try the gummy bear shot yum

It's mall ramen so we set our expectations accordingly but luckily we didn't have to set them very low because the broth was nice and flavorful and the noodles abundant. Also had milk bubble tea which was also very tasty. Really enjoyed it and will definitely be back!

Just tried for the first and last time got a strawberry ice cream and it taste like a cheap ice pop from the frozen section in the supermarket, it's not even the consistency of ice cream. Very disappointed!
Drinks are always good and workers are always nice and grateful, but this store stay closing earlier than the time it says so annoying and inconvenient.

Friendly staff who seem to care about their service and their coffee beverages. They do a dry foam on their macchiato, which I am not a fan of, but other than that the drink had a good flavor and satisfied my need for an espresso drink while visiting.

Their advertising is deceiving for their meals vs combos and when trying to inquire about them their staff is rude and lacking customer service skills. The food is super greasy and not lacking salt x10! Won't be back!!

Heartbroken and angry where is the ticket money going toward? The shark exhibit is overcrowded with large fish that have to swim in order to breathe, these poor creatures, my heart breaks for them. Please don't support this, it's animal cruelty in disguise.

Have been back here almost a dozen times. Each time the food has been fantastic. Service is much better than it used to be. Highly recommend the bibimbap, the sweet and sour appetizer and the atka mackerel in addition to the other dishes from my first review!

Wahoo's is decorated really beach-y...its dope! The food was decent priced but its worth it cause the portions were HUGE i couldnt finish mine my fish taco was puuuurdy good and the rice and beans were tastyyyy :) good service, friendly waiters
S/o to the employee who was clearly high and gave me the wrong cookie, and touched it with his bare hands. Meanwhile, 5 or 6 employees stood around talking in the back. Nice! Never going back.
Stopped in for a drink atmosphere was ok a little dark food smelled good but I wasn't hungry service was kind of slow. But not too slow

Always have loved their pumpkin festival and so appreciate that they were open for it this year! Everything was really nice I just wish they had enforced mask wearing more- especially at the hayride when you actually pass a staff volunteer and at the haystacks where the kids were playing.

Always An awesome. The atmosphere is typically consumed with professionals and mature adults. I joined the winery club and has been satisfied with each tasting, their seasonal wines and most importantly the promos service.
fantastic breakfast, slightly heavy but as long as you are looking for that this place is hands down best breakfast i have had in a long time

I don't ever choose to come here, but my friend wanted to celebrate her birthday here. The vegan cobb salad was pretty darn yummy. I was happy to find something filling and fairly delicious at a chain restaurant that hardly caters to vegans while celebrating a friend's birthday.

You should not at all feel intimidated at Hazard's. Bruce the owner and Josh the manager are very friendly, helpful and respect a new cyclist as much as a seasoned veteran. Their service and attention to detail and follow up is astounding.

My turkey burger was barely seasoned, his turkey sandwich had one slice of turkey on it and the mac and cheese was bad. My server was weird and slow, and the host was the same. Not worthy my Saturday morning.

I drove around the Tanque verde Kolb Safeway mall looking for this store FYI it has moved to grant road but none of the google maps etc have this change? Called Travis at this store he was helpful. But difficult to access with traffic fro afternoon 2pm

Front office staff They are very rude & over the top almost as if we have principles that right our complex & they try to pin everything on residents they Typically don't like. Wouldn't want to live here again I would think twice if your considering it.

They say they take walkin right when they open they can't tattoo you and want you to come back in the evening. Most people when they come to Reno they want to get a tattoo right then and there, not having to come back.

The food is about a 3.5 but the patio boosts it to a five. Cheap lagers and several TVs for games. Stromboli was a bit undercooked but they also have a pool table & indoor bar if you're in the mood for that. Great place!

After a very long waiting period of about 40mn I got my pizza, I can't lie I had high expectations on that margarita. I opened it and it was very messy and overcooked, it was very low on cheese and tomato sauce it's still good but not worth the money.
Bar tender was cold, rude and not helpful, and did not seem to be aware of all the customers at the bar. Will not be spending my time and money at this establishment ever again.

Used to be better when I moved to Tampa but food quality seems to have slipped to be middle of the road. Ingredients are canned and most apps and food are buttery or fried. Orders jade always been prompt and correct and good online ordering.
Went to the Airport " Dook's Place." Great, everything was just GREAT. I tried most of the popular items on the menu and I must say it was all " TOPS" FANTASTIC food memories. I will go back

This is not as nice as most cvs stores in the area. Seems little less stocked and kinda dim inside. I will run in if it's urgent but prefer to go to the one on 73 in Marlton or even better green tree road in mt laurel.
I have been practicing yoga for years and one of the most important aspect of the center is the community aspect. I like many of the teachers but it feel the lack of community.
Typical Indian restaurant with bad service. I walked out as they were unwilling to seat me at decent table when more than half of restaurant was empty.
Chicken cheesesteak best in town Gluten free pizza good to Very loud and a lot of booze hounds makes the place uncomfortable for families with younger children

Ordered a make your own poke bowl. They put so much rice and not much sushi and other stuff. This is the 4th time I have eaten from this place and every time it feels like they increase the rice ratio more and more.
This is a great place to eat the only downside is if you buy a lot of dumplings/large order they sometimes get it wrong.

Go here if you want to have the worst dental experience of your life with rude dental hygenists who seem like they would be better off working at a Bowling alley instead of being medical professionals.

Kind of expensive for what I believe are average tasting macaroons. Flavors are usually pretty innovative and I like that they rotate to keep things interesting, but I just can't bring myself to pay for such a small, mediocre treat. It does satisfy my occasional macaroon cravings though!
The cab smelled of smoke the driver was late and he tried to charge me more then what the meter said because he said it was broken. I refused gave him what was on the meter and no tip.

The most disgusting and dirty Subway I ever seen. Walked in the other day noticed roaches crawling on the floor under a table where people were eating, the whole place looked unclean and dirty. I turned around and walked out, health dept needs to pay a visit here

Was super disappointed that the person making the sandwiches was wearing their mask under their chin exposing their full mouth and nose. Sad to see that happening during a pandemic. We left without getting anything because we were so disgusted
Never again lady who answers the phone is rude my Bbq pork was not done everything was horrible wouldn't recommend this happy dragon at all

Sadly, lots of beers on the online menu were not available. The available IPA was meh. Against my good judgement I got the fish & chips that were so greasy I literally couldn't taste the food - I left 3/4 of it on the plate & wasn't even asked why....
MY GIRLS LOVED IT! THIS IS A MUST SEE FOR ALL ROCKY FANS they've seen Rocky 1-4 we just ordered the rest and we can't wait to watch them! Keep Punching #SouthPaw

Super good and super loud. I took away a star because it's always so loud, you literally have to scream at the person across from you. Besides that part the food is great. My favorite italian place in the city.

Quaint place with nice outdoor seating, service a little slow and waiter forgot our ceviche, bringing it out with the entrees. However food was freshly made, authentic, and very flavorful with good portion sizes. I'd like to try all the ceviches!
I have never been to a Goodwill Outlet before and this place was even better than I thought it would be! I got a cart full of stuff for $17. You cannot beat that. Will be back!

Overall awful experience. Waited for my food for 45 minutes and in line for 15. Despite the fact that there were about 20 customers waiting for their drinks, the baristas still had time to chat and take their time.

I am a 66 year old Mexican American woman. I recently took daughter in-law to Bertha's for lunch and she also agreed the food is the most authentic Mexican food we've ever had!! Food was excellent! Highly recommend !!
Great for kids up to 4 years old My grandson loved it Lots to climb and he loved the tube wall

How can I give it anything else but a fiveout, delivery, and the best selection of Filipino food in the whole Philadelphia/South Jersey area. If you love Filipino food, you have to go there and try it out for yourself. That's all I can say...and I'm definitely going back!
This place was good but they closed up shop in August to go on vacation according to a note on their door. I drive by it on the way home from work and it looks vacant. They are Closed for good..

Fun place! Super cute and attentive bartender mixes up interesting cocktails from the menu or something different to your liking check out the swanky velvet sofa in the back room. Little pricey at @9 a cocktail . Easy to run up the bill having fun n trying new things.

I've been here about a week now and I love it. I think the negative reviews were from previous management or something because this place is safe and not a bad place at all. I love it. I would highly recommend this complex to anyone.
This serves as a lesson on why it may be better to buy and fit a suit while there is a tailor instanding branch as this branch may not be an accurate representation of the brand's line.

I found this place far from authentic nor tasty. The beef noodle soup I ordered was tasteless and the soup dumplings tasted like something from the freezer of an Asian market. Also the spicy cucumber was too oily and sweet. 2 stars for service.

GOOD GOD a snowball can't get any better than this! The condensed milk on top of anything is a sure way to make your day a little better and it is always cheap. For less than $5.00 you can air condition your belly and get full.

Great place, excellent food and my server JT was the best. He make sure we had everything we needed to make the visit comfortable and enjoyable honestly make me feel like at home I will recommend it 100%. See you soon.
Very disappointed!!! We made reservations on open table, drove for 35 minutes with a 3 year old and when we arrived the restaurant was closed. Terrible service, DO NOT go there!
So i've seen these other reviews about the Mab Graves bags and i wanted to say i ordered one& it was perfect!!! it also came in a timely manner. keep up the good work much love

With the exception of losing most of the time when we go, it really is a nice casino. Very bright & airy. Nice people for the most part, of course, u do come across those few rude dealers or patrons but that's the nature of the business I suppoose ;)
I love Peabody's ! I have come here a couple of times and I've had Danielle as a bartender and she's been so nice and personable I would recommend everybody to come here.

Only gave it a one star so I could write a review! This place was horrible every meal my family got was blan flavor less and even made my husbands stomach hurt as soon as he finished his food. Really nice inside food was the worse we have had!!!!!!!

Ordered a mushroom cheese steak and a Italian hoagie. 3 stars because the cheesesteak was awesome and the larger size of the rolls were great however the Italian was not good. The cheese wasn't sharp and it had an over abundance of ham

When there's a little bit of chill in the air, there's nothing better than a 4style chili as opposed to Cincinnati chili, but since I can't find that here locally, this is the next best thing. You just can't beat this place for value.

The food is pretty tasty, but the fact that they add a 15% gratuity to every check is a bit excessive. I usually have the same server, and while he's nice, he wasn't excellent. Overall, it's a decent place to go to if you're not expecting too much.
The overall set up is pretty awesome with lots to do . Not really a huge fan of their beer but it is definitely a very family friendly place and the bartenders are nice.
The workers don't care, no ice, and they rushed the cooking bc they didn't prepare steak overall not a good experience

Can the hostess Elena be any less personable? She is abrasive and runs her station as if the customer is an underling that needs to be reprimanded for your mere presence. She needs to be trained or fired. Wait staff is efficient and friendly.
This is very good place, room is clean, no bad smell, the manager very nice, treat you like family And price is very reasonable. I'll say 5 stars and first recommend motel in westbank !!!!!
Fret time at this quaint spot. Food was delicious.. the vegetarian ravioli was to die for and partnered with a bottle of wine from the corner spot it was an economical and delicious meal.
Nice atmosphere food is ok not great no real flavor steak no flavor crab cakes shredded crab really no spice it seasoning draft beer flat staff is great but food needs alot of help

Watch your wallet at this place. He tells you you need work done that you do not need. Before agreeing to any work get a second opinion especially for periodontal work for which he is not trained to do. Dentists are the biggest rip offs

For the first time yesterday I made it to this Chipolte. I was feeling a need for Mexican food. However I did not find it appetizing that every employee behind the food counter was wearing some sort of mouth piercing. Big turnoff if one is hungry.

No complaints here with the quality of the food. Everything is clean and organic and customer service is superb. The donuts are awesome if you get them when they're fresh in the morning, otherwise it's a no$15 for a meal at this stylishly themed restaurant.
I thought Chickie and Pete's were famous for their crab fries yet I just got the worst fries ever they are taste like they were microwaved and barely seasoned. Super disappointed.

its pretty expensive for a sandwich, chips, and water. it came out to about $12? granted, i was full after my meal... but its not like a bay area sandwich that is loaded with a bunch of awesomeness and weird ingredients that taste so good together. twas aiight.

No matter where you are, this place always tastes the same. While that taste is a few good notches above mediocre depending on what you order, it's still a chain, and that ruins the excitement of trying someplace new. Life is too short for long waits for mediocre food.

I tried to call so I wouldn't have to drive there to see if they had sombreros or not but their phone system doesn't permit that. So I drove there and there was customer with a big dog inside the shop. Gross! And unlawful.

Their food and deserts are absolutely incredible, I love their burritos, and the cool pick 3 item build ur own and my wife loves their margaritas, Great kids menu, quesadillas are awesome. The service is ALWAYS prompt, polite, and courteous, excellent atmosphere and decor Definitely recommend, we love going there.

This is probably one of my favorite bar/restaurants in the area, the food is excellent prices are great and the service is very friendly, including the owner. Because of this I find myself coming at least once, sometimes two or three times a week haha. Highly recommended!
Awesome sauce! We have been here before and everything from the steamed shrimp shumai to the seaweed salad to the sushi rolls were excellent! Also, it's byob! Will def return.

Order the seafood, pork entrees; avoid the steaks. Really disappointed in getting a bunch of gristle on a $28up" local specialties. We've been there multiple times been here; if we go back hopefully we'll see my review and stick to seafood and pork.

I'm really disappointed with this clinic. The doctor turn over rate is so high, they make me schedule two appointments every time I need to go in to establish care with the new provider. On top of that the appointments are too far out in the future to be helpful.

I was so excited to be there. Good price and good service, they always have a smile on their face, I will definitely suggest to give them a try! It is my favorite massage store in Tucson. I will go there in my life!

We have great food here soul food seafood and Jamaica food all home made . And very great pool players and the best bartender in the city so come on in and have a great time . And Dj are great too!!!!! I give five stars!!!!

The description says wheelchair accessible, but it should be noted that if you are a woman and in a wheelchair you will not be able to access the bathrooms as they are on the second floor. Men, however, have two restrooms on the first floor.

I really love their desserts and every sandwich I have had here was delicious. The coffee is good too. My main problem is paying so much money for everything and still feeling like I am an imposition to the staff for just being there.
Delicious drinks and cool atmosphere. When we went, the bar was a little understaffed and took a little longer to get our drinks, but in the end it was worth the wait.
Had a local take us as he states back in the day it was the best but now just a tourist thing to say you did. It's OK. Can't say much.
First they wouldn't accept their yelp deal unless I printed it and then they wouldn't accept it because they were have a problem with Yelp paying them their money. This place is a joke!
I organized a private 1 encourage guests to bring or print out the stepstep directions on their website - they helped!

They seem great until you need to contact them, then they'll ghost you and refuse to answer texts and pick up/return your dozen phone calls when a problem arises. I'll definitely go with someone else next time.

This place was great. Clean with liners in the foot tubs that they switched out. They even helped me pick which color looked best and would last longer and wasn't a fake brand that would chip easily. I only got a simple pedicure but the experience was very good.
I attempted to make a reservation and kept getting tossed from one person to the other had to change the venue for our party and thank god we did cuz someone got shot there that same weekend.
idc how many free pastries you give me, if you don't serve shoestring hash browns you're not a real breakfast diner.

The sushi was very good. Went for restaurant week and the portions were small also the shrimp dumplings weren't really dumplings. The ahi tuna was ok but not filling I had to eat all of the rice and broccoli which was dry and could've used some more sauce.

I want to love this place and I do appreciate the concerts, community, and Lout ambiance Green Line is not the best Philly offers. I usually only order because I have to, not because I crave anything on the menu.

This is a huge theater and since I know to stay away on weekend nights, the crowds aren't too bad for weekend matinees . The concession stand has a wide variety of options and movie theater popcorn always hits the spot.

This a great place to go to enjoy the French inspired patio Although I've been a few times and the food never really shines. The portions are small. Most of the time my items have been overlooked or under seasoned. My least favorite of this restaurant group.

Everything was simply fabulous!! Used Yelp's Waitlist feature to add our name to list before we left the houseonly waited about 10 minutes when we got there! Great food, great service and super fun vibe.

I ordered 6 different meals, received only 2 and the chips were stale. So now, I have to order from a different place, pay delivery charges again, and hope I get my whole order. Horrendous service and poor quality of food.

We had a great experience at zahav last night! The food was delicious, we had the cauliflower, the squash, the Halumi cheese, the warm hummus and the lamb with the Persian rice. The warm hummus was the best I've ever had and our server Laura was amazing!

Was in Philly for a quick trip, and my hotel recommended Rotten Ralph's for their pizza. Well, they don't serve pizza, but their drinks were reasonably priced, and the French onion soup and chicken wings were very good. I would recommend this bar, but don't go there for pizza )
Had a local take us as he states back in the day it was the best but now just a tourist thing to say you did. It's OK. Can't say much.

Our party group tried to go to Razzoo on Friday night but we were denied because the guys in our group were wearing "bro tanks". Serously?....Puhish though which was a little disappointing. The bouncers were very nice and funny though so I appreciated that.
If you are looking for reasonably priced then La Carreta fits the bill . Chicken Nachos are great both are great - as for the latter, dint drink too fast as the brain freeze is no bueno!
Ordered delivery, pizza was fine however it took an hour and a half for delivery after we were quoted 30 mins.
I tried checking in at 2:45pm (check-in time was 15 mins later at 3pm. The front desk lady says "I can't give you a time estimate when a room will be ready, but come back in a few hours" ???

Love this place! I've been here several times and every performer has been fabulous and entertaining. Very friendly folks run and MC, theater seats are comfortable and each seat has a great view, even if it's close up magic with cards. Highly recommended!!

Body Altar Massage with Andy Blum I drove 100 miles to have Andy work her magic on me and it was worth every mile. She is simply special and her style has spoiled me forever. Please treat yourself to a session on her table.

Food is good service is good, try the empanadas and the soups, staff is very gentle and the food taste very authentic, prices are very fair considering the size of the portions. Nice Colombian touch Try it

The service was great miss my buddy I usually have coffee with had my regular 4 venti soy 2 Splenda iced latte. Yummy to the max today, great service. Only thing to make it better would be if my friend was here with me.

The worker I talked to on the phone was such a sweet guy so this in no way reflects on the staff but that ice cream is sooooo gross like it's chewy and has noooo flavor it's just nasty so sorry ever had ice cream like that in my life
The place looks decent from the outside, the only problem you will find here is welcoming staff and warm hospitality so warm and welcoming ambience makes people come back to your establishment.

styed there for a night with 2 adults plus 2 kids pros: close to the beach and walking distance to the center clean and well maintained room high ceilingon rooms of 2nd floor cons: rooms are not spacious breakfast was very simple

Love the style and ambience of the space as well as the coffee. Even though it's a solid 15-20 minute drive from my house I tend to make the trip here at least once every week or so. Though quite caloric, the pecan croissant/sticky bun is incredible!

If you require tasks done efficiently or to see a MD, this is NOT the office for you. Unreliable means of communication, untimely completion of tasks, after 4 years I have never been seen by or spoken to an MD.

Kind of was disappointed in my visit to Peg Leg. My father and I got the ribs and they were very dry and toughhour I wish we would have chosen somewhere else. I will go back to try the pulled pork but wouldn't recommend the ribs.

Looking for lunch delivery on a rainy day, Osaka was by far my best option in the Langhorne/Penndel area. I'd been there for eatin area where you walk in isn't huge, but it feels upscale and they are more than willing to accommodate a large group without advance notice.
Gorgeous dresses on every rack! Plus they have an amazing staff that make it their priority to find you THE dress that'll make you feel gorgeous on your big day.
Love to go here small not as big as Phoenix less traffic. I love to hear the air crafts fly thank you to my men and women who serve America every day I can't say it enough
Excellent location, great decor, wonderful staff, delicious & unique food, good prices just wish I could get a rum and coke but its worth it! The beer choices are great. Definitely a must go!!!

over priced, underwhelmed not my biggest concern though. While sitting at our table inside, a whole family walked in, mom dad 3 grown children NOT one mask amongst them. If the rules are ware a mask until you sit down than EVERYONE should be compelled to follow them.

This place is fine if you just want a drink or want to watch a game . But if you're hungry, go somewhere else before you get here the menu is generic and the food isn't that great. They have karaoke, too.
CROOKLYN!! I've been here about three time over the past 5 years, the place is kinda looks like there's crumbs everywhere and it's outdated. Personally the pizza reminds me of DiGorno, kinda blah..

A Revzilla manager reached out to me said my review was denied because I used names of employeespar and nothing but issues. HJC will still never get a dime from me again- they didn't even respond to any emails or messages.
I totally agree with Nicoleat best. I do hold Bryan Peters responsible for allowing this woman to treat people the way she does as well as for trying to gouge people for services. Yuck!

I went into jacks and received a horrible haircut. I asked for a fade and she gave me about the exact opposite. She said her name was "Steel". Was a nice enough woman but was extremely displeased with my haircut and that I had go pay to get it fixed.
Everything we had was really good, and pick up was easy. Of what we had, the best thing was the gnocchi, followed by the sticky rice, then meatballs, then potstickers, then salad
I wouldn't take my dogs to go eat there too dam n expensive Foods no damn good I'll give him one star and they're not worth that fucking star
The Key Lime pie is hard as a rock and terrible, the avocado chicken wrap is good as are the sweet potato fries. The service was adequate, the atmosphere is nice.

lovely meal! calamari was amazing, bread was so good we ate 2 batches, and the risotto entree and penne with lobster cream sauce entree were both delicious. Will definitely be back to try more things!

Tried to get at the breakfast advertised on the street at 11am during French quarter festival and were turned away because it ended at 11. Went next door to cafe pontalba, which was packed! Sat down and had an excellent breakfast. Tableau is clueless to the business they are losing
Went 1/25/19 and the room was freezing cold they had a lil floor heater in the room and the music needs to be updated .. I will definitely go back
Love the food and the owner is very friendly and explained everything I said we needed it we're from Chicago we love this food!

Everything is wonderful about this restaurant except noise level, it is extremely loud especially 2nd floor We were a party of six and could barely talk or hear one another without damn near shouting. I noticed around the room, everyone, I think, was experiencing the same thing.

*Updated Review uh hello, I'm not eating expired food GROSS. This place continues to look dingier and dirtier each time I go back, and the more I explore Whole Foods, Trader Joes, and even Dierbergs, I realize I can get the same items there for cheaper.

I don't normally leave reviews, but this place is the real deal when it comes to Mediterranean! The Greek salad has awesome vinaigrette, reminds me of the best Greek places in Chicago, comes with a pita, EXCELLENT add on! The tzatziki sauce... chefs kiss. Will be ordering again

Hot and fresh donuts, super cute shop, what's not to like? The staff was super friendly and so welcoming, the shop itself smelled amazing, and the menu has am array of donuts and fried chicken. The donuts were so good, I can imagine the fried chicken is a close contender.
This place has the best coffee that I totally forgot about it, why pay more when you can get the same satisfaction. try that double dark coffee!!!

Ordered flowers from them twice for different occasions. They delivered wrong arrangement & card attached. I live out of town so I was hoping ordering locally would be best but now will look at other options. Pathetic they can't get their orders straight.

Needed a quick bite before an Academy of Music show. Had a fantastic dinner here last night that made me homesick for the deli I used to eat in growing up. Fallon, our waitress, was a sweetheart. This place is a hidden gem!
Worth getting the car washed here, maybe not getting the interior done here tho, wax came out nice but could have done a better job cleaning the inside of the car.
Twice last week I needed electronics ASAP, and this Best Buy was a short hop in Iday, the staff was exceptionally friendly, helpful, and accommodating.

Consistent & always delicious!! & the homemade jam is amazing alone! I haven't ordered just a side of home-fries so I am not sure of the serving size; however the quantity received with meals/sandwiches could be a bit more generous. Other wise delicious & *Highly recommend home cooking style grub

Full range of stuff here, cheap to quite extravagant liquor, but I come for the craft beer. Best liquor store I've been in around Nashville, and you could say I'm a bit of a tourist and/or frequenter of liquor stores.

They have a couple of good technicians, but, on the other side, they have inattentive, irresponsible technicians that shouldn't be trusted to serve tea, much less, to service a vehicle. Will never return to this place again, not in this lifetime.
Not sure if today was a bad day but the garlic bagel w/ lox's made me kinda sick to my stomach. I've eaten them before so I'd go back and maybe just get the plain.

If you put an InOut Burger next to this place, they would be out of business in less than a year guaranteed. Hamburgers here are awful and that serves IBC Root Beer which isn't unique. Just because a place has been around a while doesn't mean it is any good.

So frustrating that they don't open on time. There are so many times I'm leaving work and would love to order and pick up dinner but no one is answering the phone and it's 5:20. Best Pad Thai in Tucson.
Food is not bad at all very impressed by what they can serve and I mean it's New Orleans you can never be mad about anything. Pricing was not bad either

So they have policy changes and NEVER Let the customers know. Even though they have our emails. Worst customer service ever Don't bother they take your money and leave you hanging and now I can't get my cars washed with them because of a policy change. Such bs
Nice people. Good wine. Too bad thier tastings are $10 for 6 and right next door is the Santa Barbara Winery and their tastings are $5 for 6 with a free glass! We had a great time at both locations.
it is nice to be able to see Winter, the place is small and very tight when moving around with a stroller. I have been but not going back. I have better aquariums locally.

Pretty solid food that may be slightly overpriced for what it is, but it most likely on account of the location. Friend got a burger that was pretty big and had no e flavor. Would definitely recommend the bone in over the boneless wings as well despite messiness.

Bliss yoga spa is clean, classy and quiet. However, I tried the facial fillers with Dr Marcia and the result was not pleasing at all when compared to the 1800$ I paid for it. The service was not nearly delivered as advertised.
This restaurant has really cheapened everything they offer and is really sad and disappointing because I used to eat their food 17 tiny squares of squash and they never answer their phone.

Very convenient so; nothing to brag about but Standard pub fare. Service was also so I may be too old to be your typical brewery patron but I'm here every 3 and business customers generally tip generously - if the service is good!
The dinner was ok. Maybe my palette is too developed, but for the area and price is worth a trip for happy hour specials and drinks.
Sure, it has the basic hotel niceties, but the walls are as thin as paper. So if you want to be kept awake all night by your neighbors' TV and random babblings, then this is the place to be.

Ehh the white wine sangria was weak but yummy. The food was bland but the cheese dip tasty. In a city of amazing food this was not my favorite but the server was attentive and I do live a nice white wine sangria. Just saying
Saw the good reviews here and went for it maybe I had a bad batch of fish but it was upsetting to spend money on a mediocre quality.
love this place with its creative and fresh menu, but the long wait times and crowds truly ruin the experience-so much that i haven't been back in months. waiting an hour for breakfast is insane!
Quick trip to STL and this place is already the highlight. Delicious food, nice ambiance, and relaxed yet attentive service means we'll be back at least once more before we leave town.
