This place is gross bartenders suck, walk around half naked and believe me it's nothing no one wants to see, can't get a drink, place smells like urine and vomit.Cockroaches crawling across the bar disgusting

Their pork pastellios are my absolute faveee! Only reason I gave 4 stars instead of 5 is because sometimes they give you fresh and sometimes they've been sitting under the heat lamp and are luke warm. I'm willing to wait for hot and fresh! Very friendly staff.

A fantastic tour that was very informative bringing together a sense of place, history, cultures, story telling and humor. While we were a bit larger group, it felt very personable and he did a great job keeping us all together. Definitely do the tour!
If you like waiting almost an hour for $15 fish and chips that doesn't even come with tartar sauce and will leave you still hungry check this place out.
Haven't eaten here in quite a while. Food was good last time, but when we walk by, we can't help but notice how much dirt and old tape is on the front windows. Doesn't appear too clean.

OK food with a lot of options. The Karma burger is pretty good as far as veggie options go but most of the food is a bit on the bland side. Good choice if you have a variety of tastes in your group, though.

So happy to have this addition to the neighborhood! I've been twice now and I'm pleasantly impressed with all the precautions taken 2 people in the waiting room at a time. The staff is super friendly and helpful, and waxes have been quick and efficient!

3 things I loved: The fried ribs, the bloody mary AND last but certainly not least.. THE HOSPITALITY. The waitstaff has a sense of humor that I just love and they are so quick to tend to any needs! Thank you for a fabulous first eat in NOLA Jimmy!!
Horrible service I was in drive thru line got out went inside and cars that was behind drove out before being served or even started so I asked for money back and walked out

The waitress tolde rudely i have to ...mu fav word lol beside throwing my drink out be4 i even finish by costumers requests sent by the dude im being stalked...they are expecting Me everywhere allday all restaurant bar streets etc ...#corygibbs #serialstalker...#fifa #chicagofire

Literally horrible service the manager has a horrible way of handling customers late delivery...I seriously wanted to flip out...I sent my whole order back & I'm dam sure never ordering from them again at least this Location NEVER GO TO THE ST.ANN LOCATION THEY SUCK!!!!!
I guess it's purposeful so you don't wait in person for your car, but the waiting room seats are god awful! Be prepared for a serious case of "bleacher butt". And to top it off, there's no coffee.

This LabCorp is one of the busiest and understaffed locations I've ever visited. Still, despite this burden, the staff is excellent; professional, kind, and efficient. The gentleman and woman who staff the front always treat me with respect and courtesy and the blood draw is always quick, comfortable and professional.

This place was great. The guys that own this place definitely take the time to do it right and we're friendly. I always use the pulled pork sandwich as my test gauge for a new bbq spot and they came thru with great flavor. Will definitely be back.

I had previously written a review for 97 hot pot however most recently had discovered that their lunch special had increased in price. Also, item size had decreased and service had become minimal - hence the decrease from 4/5 to 3/5. Overall I still love hot pot though!
It is very unusual for them to get my prescriptions correct, and in the correct quantities, or even have in stock the meds I use every month. about 1 month in 7 it's been aggravation-free.

The sushi and shumai were decent. Nothing impressive. They did not have thai tea or wonton soup and had a fairly small menu of cooked foods and the standard sushi menu. The décor was nice and the atmosphere was relaxing. The server I had was very polite.

Okay guys... great coffee...legitimately great... if you drink it with 2 cremes, 3 eye roles, 5 passive aggressive sighs, a general lack of compassion, and endless bad attitudes... customer service is awful and sad yall...

I ordered the carne asada meal and I was very disappointed. The meat was very fatty and chewy. The waitress forgot to bring is our chips and salsa until near the end and then she never checked back with us again. Another Mexican restaurant disappointment.

The engagement pictures were terrible My daughter paid more on the deposit and now they are refusing to return it we were told that is just how it is terrible business practices and terrible people who refuse to return phone calls

My friend Bryan W went there to see if his jacket had some warranty on it, and the sales lady named Becky was very helpful. Even though the jacket was old she was able to get him a new updated product. Great to know that Patagonia stands behind their warranty.

Unbelievably good desserts. Their toffee by itself is incredible. Therefore by combining their toffee with items such as chocolate chip cookies and cheesecake, you are left with a truly unique dessert that is sure to knock your socks off.
Food was good, but a bit overpriced. We brought our 1 year old and there were no high chairs so we had to lug our stroller in :(

How can you have one place for the entire park to get ice cream, when you are a summer, warm weather park for kids? Ice cream should be available at like 6 places throughout the park. Please think about your customers more or they will stop coming.

So good! I'm so glad there's finally a location near me! It's not hard to make your own smoothie just throw some fruit, protein or whey powder with some milk but I like environment! I like that I can grab a smoothie to drink while I grocery shop, very nice!
I've been twice and both times left unimpressed. Food is decent and service is good, but for the price you pay the quantities are very small and there is no 'wow' factor.

Was scared by the negative reviews, but I think those were just a result of working out the kinks opening week. Had a great burger here and their unlimited drinks for brunch for only $13.99 are a steal . Fun atmosphere and friendly staff. Try it out!

Just called the location several times. No answer. Even corporate & foreign lady didn't direct me properly to the store but to an automated system in which I had questions on. Errored again even by a Representative

Dont go if your in a hurry.... we had a waitress that well just didn't have a clue - asked if we would like menus and then about 20 minutes later we had to ask her again .. crazy but the food was good
Park at the public beach lot at 46th a couple blocks away and then enjoy attentive service, great prices and a frisbee sized plate of fantastic ceviche. Bueno!!

The past few times i have been here the service was terrible with me sitting for 10 mins without even a greet. Floors have been sticky and gross with trash laying around. I was here today and left cause after i was seated no one came to my table.

Friendly service but not really impressed with food. I'm been to many tapas places in big cities and I would suggest Black Sheep do a little more research in bigger cities to understand how to improve. Service was a bit slow.
Great rooftop bar, ok burger, cold beer, could use better selection of music only appeared to have one waitress for entire rooftop which isn't enough.

Stephen Starr on North Broad... If you don't hold that against him, its not all that bad of a place =P 4star for me. So in the end, 3 and a half stars gets rounded down to 3 since happy hour is only 4:30 to 6:30.

Works if you're on South St and want a steak. Don't do it if the line is too long but they tend to use a bit too much oil on their steaks at times. The crew that works here are all boxing fanatics star for customer service.

This place is almost never crowded, which is great. Both sushi and hibachi are awesome. Staff is accommodating. It's one of the hidden places in the city that I know I'll get a good, filling meal an have zero wait.
I've been looking for good Chi esp in the area and have yet to find one I love but this is one of the better options so far. Crab rangoon was good. I had the cashew chicken and was meh.

I have stayed here at least 3 times. Location and amenities are excellent since the remodel. Pool and hot tub. Options for beach walkunfun entertainment. If you are looking for action the place is 4 star, if you're looking for peace & quiet, you can do better.

The food is great but the portions can be quite small considering the price. I caution though to not get takeout, the time I did they basically just threw everything in a cardboard takeout box. It tasted great, but looked nasty.

The food was terrible. The Caesar salad was wilted and brown. The flatbread was a joke. There were barely any toppings. I enjoy the atmosphere in the restaurant, and the alcoholic drinks are superb, but I will definitely not go back for the food again.
Everyone deserves a second chance, eh? Anyways, the staff here were helpful & friendly while my family and I visited here to stock up for the pre-thanksgiving crunch. Thanks, Vons in La Cumbre ?
Best grilled cheese ever! Try the truffel Grilled cheese! They have expanded and there is an actual restaurant now not just a kid with a panini press in the back! It's the place for cheese!

Had a couple of other flavors... They were better but nothing special, nothing "strange" about the flavor combinations available, didn't mention before though the counter person was very polite and courteous so I'm giving the bump up for that but overall was not very impressed
I was craving Thai food, I went to my favorite place in Tucson Four Season but it was closed :(, so I decided to try Chinese Combo and the place was ewwwwwww, I'm not going to comeback.
I have been waiting on my purchase for a month nothing yet called number it is a mobile number no answer emailed them No Response THEY ARE CROOKS TAKING PEOPLE MONEY GETTING AWAY WITH IT

Earned the 5th star with my last two visits. Thank you for reaching out to me after my last review - back to being my favorite go to place for lunch! I love the salads, but end up with a delicious stir fry most of the time!

The barista was 100% not helpful about wifi. Also it makes no sense to have a ton of outlets where there is benches and coffee tables but barely any outlets by the table. Also I find the whole concept kinda pretentious. Not my scene.

Love Sal's Brownsburg. Very nice place since the remodel. Food has always been authentic Italian and now they have a great setup from more room, to greater atmosphere to same great Italian food. We are part of the Sal's Family . Highly recommend!

I called Liberty in the morning and by lunch time there was someone at my house working on my pest issues. Justin is a very courteous and informed senior technician. I would highly suggest Liberty to anyone looking for pest services.

We had takeskip the shrimp they're tiny, wasn't bad wasn't great. Probably wouldn't return for future vacations but if I did I would get the authentic Thai cuisine because it seems like that's where this restaurant probably shines.

I ordered some wings and they came out so cold like Gucci mane, ICYYYYY BURRRR . Took more than 2 hours soooo irritated but than it's Saturday but they showed still get their stuff together and make it feel homie for he guest
We eat here quite frequently food is always good I little pricey service is always great I'd recommend it to anyone who likes chicken

Dined here twice while in Nashville, can't say enough good things. Food was delicious both times, servers were on top of their game and super friendly, and a decent selection of beer which I can't go without while on vacation! Good stuff!

I ordered a buffalo chicken cheese steak from here recently. Nothing special. Rather boring actually. Definitely overpriced for the quality of the sandwich. I've found better pizza places nearby that actually put some effort into their food that will continue to get my business.
On their website it says hours updated recently, we went and stopped here on a road trip only to be told they closed already even though on their website it said they were open.

Long wait for simple items and when you inquire about the status, the young lady in the front very rudely pushes the food at you without a word. Horrible customer service. Will never return. I'd give no stars but that didn't seem to be an option,
Eh. I expected better: no recitation of the daily specials by server; no, those spots in the cup weren't part of the pattern in the porcelain.

Normally i get a great car wash and interior wash. And frankly they returned my car a mess and told me your car was really dirty and u should have paid more for a better wash. Looks like it's time for a new place
Placed an order to go and the man who answered the phone cursed at me a few times and then laughed I will never order from this place again.
This is the Beat Italian food in this area all the dishes are homemade and made with perfect Amount of spice and cheeses, The pizza is perfect Too.

Ordenamos una torta cubana y unas enchiladas rojas La torta estaba aceptable Pero las enchiladas están muy mal preparadas con salsa de lata saben muy mal Además no venden café ??? Que bueno que solo estoy de paso por la ciudad así que no volveré a este lugar
The Nashville hot chicken was way too salty for me and I love salt so that says a lot. Their food is just okay I wouldn't go around recommending this place but it was at least fun to try out
Good food, horrible service. Excuse, one chef at lunch hour, waited 15 minutes for 3 hand rolls, only one done at that time, 10 minutes for dessert roll. So did not even get that one.
I really do love this place. Everything I've had is delicious. Although I have been ordering the fragility salad and it's awesome, but I don't think it's worth the $9 price tag.

Just when you think the service can't get any worse...it does. A lot worse. Too bad since it's the closest restaurant of its kind near me but hey, I can go somewhere farther away, eat and still be back most likely before I even get my food.
Food was good. Guy at the counter didn't seem pleased to have a customer. It was weird. He took my order, I paid, he told me it would be ready in a few minutes and just walked out of the shop.

Seen Robert in collision and after the long day I had with insurance and warranty companies all my stress was put to rest. Robert at courtesy truly believes in customers first and helping. I would never take my Camry anywhere else
I haven't eaten here in a long time, but from what I remember they had good sandwiches, though I thought it was a bit pricey even for SB standards.
They really messed up the draft beer. I havent been there for a while and they used to have a great draft selection but I dont think that beers like lionshead belong anywhere but a frat party

Everything was overpriced, no value with the food we ordered . There was so little short rib in our nachos that we asked for another side of meat and were charged an additional $8, smh. If you claim to be good you have to over deliver.

It's aggravating enough to STILL be required to wear a mask, but your employees should not be telling customers how to wear them! I've given PetSmart a lot of business in past years, but I'm done with PetSmart until masks are made optional.

Poor customer service. They forgot to include a biscuit in my order, which I did not discover until I was 5 min down the street. After returning, they gave me my biscuit, but did not include any apology or additional incentive to accommodate me for the inconvenience.
Yum! Cold Stone is so awesome today I got a oreo overload it was awesome also note that it is fun to watch them prepair your order :)

Pizza that I tried was okay just not as great as I thought it would be; I tried the New Port Richey Special. I will try something else but I would not recommend this pizza choice. It's ok just not good enough for a second try.

If you like seating yourself and a server never coming to take your order or check on you then this is the place to be. Food is below par and everything is over priced. Only good thing they have is on Wednesday's they have $1.50 drafts.
Been here a bunch if you want to get to LAX out of ATL on a less full flight come through MSY.
Order delivery was fast but food couldve been better ordered Mandarin chicken but the chicken was cut real thin and taste like it was battered with bread crumbs but the fried sweet biscuits were good
They are trying, the chicken wrap was missing pickled onions and avocado, our server Morgan F was awesome, we will be back. The manager did correct the chicken wrap.
Good empanadas but they won't give out tap water with your meal. I specifically asked for a cup of water with my hot empanadas but if you want water they make you buy bottled water.
Great food, the meatbuns, and boba tea are delicious, I wish they would be open later, but if you're looking for a quick refreshing snack, they'll be happy to oblige
Stay away bad service I will drive 10 min away to go to a another McDonald's then go back to this one.

Staff is friendly after you hunt someone down. Have a variety of sports equipment and apparel. The cost of everything is a little high for the same products that they carry at Dick's Sporting Goods and Modells.

The 'create your own hash' breakfast was delicious! Great service! even though it was packed, they still brought coffee refills to us, even though it is more of an orderthe-counter type of casual restaurant. I would definitely go there again next time I'm in SB!
I used to play quizzo here and I think I liked it a lot more back then, but I still like the ambience and it's still a fun place to get in a fight over Man. U. with some hooligans. GO REDS!
I was visiting the area and decided to visit this thrift store I was amazed how much good stuff was in there with great prices I would definitely come back again
My teen is a competitive skater so the Public Skate is not her thing but she enjoys the River Rink from time to time each winter. Lots of special events here too. Gets crowded.
The food was great but the service was terrible. We did arrive near closing and we were trying to make a decision about the food as quick as we could. The waitress never checked on us.
This pizza is decent. A little annoying that they do a grub hub situation instead of delivering directly, which means delivery costs more yet less goes into the delivery persons pocket.

These guys are awesome. I bought a light for my Acura and couldn't get the light in. I went back into the store and ask the guys to help and with questions or hesitation they came out and installed the light. Great team!

Meh. I found the coffee to be overpriced and the cafe lacking charm. I had high hopes of buddy brews becoming a go-to spot to relax and read but I probably won't be back. I think I paid about $4 for an itty bitty Americano and $16 for a pound .

Wasn't very impressed but unfortunately I will be back since it's the only food vendor in the square and I'm too lazy to walk elsewhere. 1 Food takes forever long 3 Lemonade was tart but definitely better than one that is overly sweet.
Pool is closed for no good reason, looks nice but they don't have it open even though it's a nice day out, seems like management is just being lazy

Absolutely awful. Called me to cancel my appointment less than 24 hours before the appointment due to the MD having to go to another meeting that was more important and offered no other appointments that day.

Great Frozen Pastas and Daily Fresh Bread. The staff in no greeting, etc. Busy talking about last night's plans and trying to avoid those pesky customers who interupt them to ring up their purchases. Great place to stock up on Italian specialty items!

Came to this restaurant. The food was disgusting. The chicken tacos tasted like the chicken was boiled. It had a weird smell too. We took one bite & left $30 worth of food on the table less than 5 mins after we got it. SMH

Four stars for the ladies that work there, because they remember me by name even though I only come in four or five times a year. Four stars for their laundry and dry cleaning. Two stars for their clothing repair. I've started taking my repairs to an alterations person.

4 1/2 stars. Tons of great info about Cash's life, along with terrific artifacts and memorabilia, with lots of film/video footage, & interactive parts. Wish there were dual headphones at each iPad station though, would cutdown on wait time and allow couples to proceed along the path together.

What a great local deli. Sandwiches are made fresh and are well priced. Never had a bad experience and I buy breakfast for my work crew once a month and they always get it right even with over a dozen orders.
A mall is a mall, right? Pretty much. Cherry Hill's got your usual stuff A sporting goods store that sells water shoes OK place to shop, if you ask me.

Three days late filling a critical medication, which is required daily, then the phone staff takes every opportunity to talk right over you. Not that they care in the slightest, but I won't ever be back.

Food took about a hour and it barley was anybody inside the restaurant. Sever was rude. Plus my girlfriend went to get some food one time and the chicken was raw like this is a bad place to go never again
Wait staff was great, presentation of food was great, price was fair, but flavor of good was not as robust as I expected.

It's a nice clean gym. Most people seem to clean off their equipment after use. I'd recommend wearing headphones, the last time I forgot mine I ended up hearing the male staff talking loudly about sex toys. Pretty gross.

Poseidon was just ok. I liked the coconut shrimp appetizer. The shrimp stir-fry udon was lacking in flavor. The server handling my meal was on the phone taking an order the whole time & had to go to the back office just to make change.
I enjoyed the food as I always do at this location but there is a young lady working on staff named Mariah that needs an attitude check. Had she not been nasty I would've rated 5 stars.
I've had a lot of good French toast in my day, but this is by far the best I've ever had. Hashbrowns are amazing, great coffee. And 24 hours? Brilliant.
Eggs Benedict eggs had to be recooked but they were perfect on second try. Bloody Mary was unremarkable- the bread on the eggs Benedict and the bacon was to die for and I rarely eat bread!

In general the food here is decent and the service is also. Today the hispanic girl with the bleached blond hair bleated out YA when she noticed me standing there and she needs to be fucking reminded she is at work NOT hanging with her homegirls.....

NOT WORTH WHAT WE PAID. The course was in HORRIBLE condition: bald greens with irregular patchy grass & out & out bald dirt on several greens. $120? Save yourself the time & money, plenty of better courses in the area.

Great venue, big, cool looking, but WAYYY too loud. Now I'm not a dork and I go to a lot of concerts and I like my music loud but it was PAINFUL. I have permanent hearing loss from it now. My right ear rings constantly. Maybe consider earplugs

it's HOT, you need ice cream!!!! Yamani was so helpful & friendly, all of our desserts were perfect, the one handicapped spot is next to the front door but directly at the end of the Drive Thru, lane, make all the front parking blue

Went here for lunch. After ordering the lobster roll Connecticut style I've made the money saving decision that I don't like lobster in its own. I'll come back again sometime and try their oyster bar since I liked the atmosphere there.

The displays are well stocked and order is maintained. They have a complete grocery department, they have in-stock common office supplies Other than the staff being not so friendly it is overall okay.

This coffee place is okay. The coffee is good, but they an do better in regards to service and food quality. I have not been back since my first visit and plan on avoiding for the food, but will consider partaking in a latte.

I received a call a few days after purchasing my furniture - Half of my order contained furniture that was discontinued and the remaining half was never delivered. They changed the delivery date without me knowing. Horrible experience. Will never shop at Bob's again.
The quality of the food is not bad but by no means is it Cajun as they claim you're better off to go to Popeyes and get red beans and rice then we eat this mid western Cajun wanna be

This Pike Plaza Meijer does not keep the jello stock up like the other locations. I go there specifically to get the peach jello for my uncle cause it's his favorite and they never have it! So frustrating.

Ingredients are okay to decent, but they break the cardinal rule of burrito building: thou shalt evenly distribute all burrito ingredients. If you like full bites of guac or cheese, go for it. If not, skip this place.

Nice. New looking DMV decent times. Same grumpy mumbling frowning employees Some real stanky people come here, though. They called my number to come up and WHOA I had to sit right back down and wait for guy before me to wrap up and move. P U

This location has less collection of cars when compared to that of other locations with emerald aisle. The staff tries to help you with smaller free upgrades, but not as good as the hot wheels at emerald aisle location.
I cannot decide how much we liked this place, prices were good, service was excellent food was okay, but we haven't been back so it didn't really make it to the repeat list.

I tried to order a gyro here and received the most disgusting sandwich I've ever tasted. This place should be ashamed to call them selves Mediterranean. I hope they go out of business befor they have a chance to continue to serve such garbage to unsuspecting people

While it is a gorgeous restaurant, the food left something to be desired. The corn soup was excellent and the octopus was great, but the beautifully presented beef tartar tasted good, not great, and the crab risotto could have been much better.
I have been a customer here for 3 years. The attendants have dented my car and 2 or 3 times I've come out to literal garbage on my car from leaking pipes

OMG! Soooo good. I'm from the west coast and find it hard on the east to locate seafood that is fresh and easy to eat. Luke's is that the lobster roll is amazing, convenient, and fast. This spot rocks!
Great burgers and extremely convenient. I am disappointed when I call the phone and it's busy, only to arrive to order in person to see the phone is purposely off the hook.
It's a simple, smaller in size pub. If you want to pay for your drinks and food with credit card there is minimum of 15$ to be spend. Otherwise you need cash. Service is very nice.

Proino Breakfast was amazing there food had so much flavor and tasted amazing, only reason why I didn't give the rating of 5/5 is because the fresh squeezed orange juice wasn't so fresh but the food definitely made up for it!
Eh... given the following this place has and the hype it gets, maybe I had some over the top expectations for my poCity on other business.

I'm kind of a nail salon snob and expect hightodo it with a new color; nice to see a business going the extra mile to keep their clients happy! If you're in Nashville and need a quick pick me up, this little salon would be great choice!

I'm disappointed to report that Katy, the floral designer, left Verde a couple of months before our wedding, and it seems pretty up in the air about whether she will be replaced, leaving us floristshirts and greeting cards, their wonderful jewelry selection and eclectic gifts.

This place was great but be aware it is seat yourself and then go up in order so if you come in to stand in the line you'll be kind a looking for a place to see it but other than that the food was outstanding in delicious
We got to shake shack yesterday at 9:58pm ready to enjoy our dinner and the staff told us they were closing. Google maps indicated that they close at 11, not 10. We were really disappointed.
They are always out of gluten free bread and never answer the phone so your can check before you show up. Huge bummer. Maybe time to increase the gf bread order?

This food is... fine. That's it. It's fine. The service was fine. I really don't know why anyone would go here UNLESS YOU WANT GIANT PLATES OF GENERIC FOOD YOU COULDN'T POSSIBLY FINISH. That's the best thing it has going for it. You can do better and you really should.

The food is decent. However, one night I had came here with a couple of friends, and there was a roach crawling on the table. The waitress was standing there and just slapped it down. I haven't been back since....

Although it's proximity to the Tampa General Hospital and it's quaint historic style overrides an aging former glory of yesteryear that made everything worth while PS: Don't go expecting St Pete's Vinoy...
I LOVE LOVE LOVE THEIR FOOD. but the delivery service was shit excuse my language but the guy treated me very bad and asked me to tip him in front of my friend which was very embarrassing!!

Very rude airport staff. Although once you get through the airport experience and onboard the plane, the service and food are about average- no better or worse than any other airline in the US. However, Lufthansa will delay your flight here with no explanation given whatsoever.

I paid to get into the establishment when I was green about a year ago. I haven't received a private dance at this location. Somebody also tried to give me some weed but I rejected it cause they was having too much fun, the dancers wore Jordan's.
This place sales junk be aware, they don't honer they'r warranty they don't return calls simply you buy, you end up with junk, stay away from this place don't go what i went through,

Nice please to eat! It's clean and the food is great! They need to focus more on service. And the cashier whose name may or may not be Martina but close to that ignores customers so she can text and that's not right.

Muy buen lugar... las porciones ideales, la atención muy ágil y agradable, el ambiente restaurado y adecuado para el tipo de productos, y las personas que atendían en la caja muy profesionales Ojo, se llena mucho... mucha paciencia por favor

Wasn't for us greasy, and not good. appetizer big chunks of grease dry both fish, and bun greasy Broccoli dry We tried and will not be back again. Can't understand what all the hype is about this restaurant-

A fab burger joint in Santa Barbara, they do their burgers right . They have the right mix of "menu" burgers and make your own, plus you can modify their "menu" versions which is what I did! This is a must stop whenever in Santa Barbara!
I can assure the person who said the good reviews are phony, that I do not work for or have I been paid to state the fact that I love this place. Try the fish...Yum!

If I could give this 0 stars I would. Me and 2 others stood there waiting to be seated for 20 minutes. There were only 2 servers and all they did was stare at us and the manager went in the back and stayed there. Don't go here.

Its sunday 11/21/21 and ive literally been waiting in the drive thru for 35 minutes, this will be the last time i come to this mcdonald. Need better management and more employees. This is the mcdonald in ne phila of castor ave..

Waiter ignored us for quit a while and so when he came back, we would tell him all the things we needed and he'd forget what we told him. The sushi is okay ... I would recommend making your own roll if you are vegetarian because the veggie rolls are NASTY.

Service, food, drinks, and prices - subpar Typical tourist trap, but it is right on the water so the atmosphere and view is amazing! If you wanting a place you can sit in your bathing suit right off the beach and chill, this place is good.

So much fun! Two dueling pianists and great big drinks... what more could you want in NOLA? If you return your "souvenir" glasses at the bar, they give you cash back and cuts your bill almost in half.

I dont know what all the hype is about this place. The park is pretty small and the sculptures are just ok. It would be nice to take a stroll through here on a pretty day but I don't plan on returning for a second visit.
I made him and offer of $60 cash plus $100 to help me unload my antique car off a semi trailer and put it on the ground he hung up on me!
Really tasty wraps. Had the papal paneer wrap and the chicken chana, chicken was a bit chewy, wondered if they maybe accidentaly swapped with vegan chicken chana
5 year anniversary celebration couldn't have been better. The food was great, the drinks were good, the ambience could have been better The five course meal was worth every penny I would say.
I have had a plumbing issue for about a year he identified the problem immediately, replaced a part and the problem has been resolved!!!! THANK YOU, Tracy!!!!

It's not that the food isn't tasty for what it is. More that the initial ardor has cooled? More that, upon living in Philly and realizing the breadth and span of the Starr Empire, that the Continental isn't quite four-star material? Thus, I revise. Lobster mac and cheese, though. Dang.

really wanted to try this place but as soon as we walked in we noticed the bartender and chef were both not wearing masks. it's a shame, because otherwise we would've loved to stay. please care more about your patrons health so we can try your food next time!
This place is FABULOUS. They've done several arrangement for our business and every arrangement is beautiful, unique, and much more expensive looking than the actual price! WOW.

Stayed in the newly renovated rooms, not too shabby amazing views since our original room was not ready at checkin was quick and easy but it isn't till 4pm so if you get to SB early plan on keeping yourself entertained for awhile. Overall a nice stay

I went in looking for a job, and left with a massive burrito! It was pretty good, I ordered "the most popular thing on the menu" and I wasn't too blown away with it. Definitely a massive portion, so be prepared to have a full stomach after!

Waitress informed us that this was the last week this business would be open as it was being sold. As we had been here before, we noticed that all the pictures on the walls had been taken down, and the menu and beer list was much smaller.

Reliable local pub with above average food, good beer selection, and friendly service. We eat three times in the pub for every dinner upstairs because it's convenient, but the food is always well prepared and delicious upstairs or down.
Terrible service with rude staff. The drinks are so sweet, they are undrinkable. Do not go there, there are a lot of nicer places in the area so don't waste your time with this place.
I love the soda parlor! The only reason I didn't give 5 stars is because it took 15+ minutes to make a milkshake, but it really was one of the best milkshakes I've had in a long time

Fantastic food at very reasonable prices. We took our track team here twice for dinner during Penn Relays your-own pasta and pizza options, and almost every dinner was in the $10 range. I had salads and flatbreads and all were really tasty.
I just sat here for over thirty minutes to put in a To go order and was was completely ignored and couldn't even get a menu to look at while I waited
The absolute slowest drivethru service is so bad that I don't believe Starbucks as a company would be proud of it.

Good beer, good location, and good service. Not the best value though. My burger and duck tacos were decent but I thought on the smaller side for portions and lacking in any excellent tastes or seasonings. Also there were no accompaniments on the plate or bread served or anything.
Price is outrageously high. Park needs work this could be a great addition to the marana community if the owners took time to make it great.

I was really hoping this was going to be the restaurant of the century... Boy was I wrong. My meal was cold, the service was fair and I saw some health violations that had my stomach not in the digesting mood. I'm gonna have to go elsewhere.

I find the food/wings to be generally good. Atmosphere is typical of a sports bar and is generally family friendly as the kids are entertained. The service tends to be spotty - sometimes you get great service other times it's a very slow and painful process.

Horrible, horrible, horrible. Please do yourself a favor and find something else. Leo came to my place to fix a plumbing issue and he was so unprofessional and made this place a disaster. STAY AWAY from this company! Youll thank me later!

I highly recommend! The facilities are fantastic; the float tanks have high ceilings so they feel very spacious and open, the lighting is inviting and warm, and everything is clean, quiet, and exactly what you need to relax. We had a great time and will definitely be back!

The saleswoman was great. She was incredibly knowledgeable, helpful, and patient. Good prices and full service. I went with a different brand through no fault of theirs, but if you want an Olhausen table these guys are the place.

Second time here. Cute little place and good attentive service. I got the pollo tacos on taco Tuesday. 3 for $7. The chicken was a bit greasy and runny, I was starving so I still ate it all but will probably get something else next time.
I've never been there was a good and what did you have. I have never been there so how can I give you a review I have a friend that's gone there she and her husband were quite happy

Although this place has changed over the last few years and occasionally the staff can be a little crude Dr. Garrett is awesome, she's personable and cares about the root cause of problems which means a lot since most drs seem to only want to treat symptoms.

Got the chorizo tacos, built your own burrito and churro bites. Flavors were awesome, ready when they said it would be ready, the woman at the counter was so sweet and welcoming. Will definitely order from here again

This place is nice breakfast is good this my second time nice reasonable prices lunch 2 and they do dinner on friday and Saturdays cool spot and they have Dominican breakfast to a little twist to i like that check them out.

I've been going there for about 2 years now and the new lady does not know how to properly thread eyebrows without ruining them. I tried growing them out twice and she ruined it both times. She needs training!!

Ordered takeout, staff weren't that friendly, pizza slices weren't cut all the way through, and overall left more to be desired-especially for the price. As a resident of the hill, i hope they do well but have some work to do.
Had dinner here last Saturday tried there family dinner with steamed rice and crispy garlic chicken at best it wasn't bad but food was average and somewhat salty. Atmosphere was nice

I was actually a little disappointed this place was just mediocre. Nothing was bad, but nothing was great, this was surprising. I will give it another shot and I am sure my take will improve, but for me it was just ok.

Great food great service, Vicente out waiter was outstanding. I had the enchiladas, the portions were large, the shrimp was a little bit hard for my taste I also had a soft drink orchata, very delicious. Over all a good experience. I will def come back
We had been driving for 12 hours, ordered our food and were told 45 mins at 10 on a Wednesday night. An hour and 45 mins later our food finally arrived.... COLD!!!

I just remembered that years ago I saw the dude at the sushi counter straight up sneeze on the prep area then rub his nose with the gloves on a keep working! Just remembered telling someone about this.

Best Eggs Benedict in Tucson !!! Great family restaurant that knows how to make great food, enjoy Tucson, wonderful cinnamon rolls, pancakes, especially with sausage, and have had great food, each time been here.
I'm not reviewing the entire restaurant just the bbq chicken pizza it's not very good it was pretty bad I do not recommend It it's not good
Cute place for a great breakfast, very busy at brunch time you have to stalk tables to grab one if you are with a larger party. Very much a NOLA vibe.
This place is full of scammers and they're rude and overpriced my service advisor was a guy name Taylor and he's a big thief! I don't recommend this place at all go to Tampa.

Excellent service, so helpful, efficient, took me to the cars that were in my price range and had what I was looking for in a car. No messing around, trying to get me into a new car that we didn't want. Beautiful dealership. Highly recommend for your next car!!!
Large portions, very friendly service. If you're a fan of the tried and true mongolian beef theirs is right up their with the best of them.

The place is really nice, and the antipasto and tagliatelle were good. However, service was terrible. We did not get offered the specials, had to ask for bread, didn't see our server after she took our order, and had to flag somebody down to get our check...
I kid you not I came in here from a long trip with my mom for Mother's Day and it filled up pretty quickly we were waiting for 40 min and our order wasn't ready so we canceled it and left

Food was everything I expected and more !! Big portions & tasty ! Most of staff friendly except servers behind the counter dishing up your food but it's a small price to pay for quality food !! I was hopping miss Robbie popped out so I could get a pic but no luck

I wouldn't go back. The service was lacking and the meat was too tough to chew. They bring the food but don't check back to see if it's right. Also, the prices are too much for what you get, so going when they have specials would be the best idea.

Second time back to the Wesley Chapel store, liked the original much better, why did they mess with a really good thing. Reminds me when Coke introduces New Come years ago and realized it was a big mistake and went back to the old Coke. Hint Hint BM
I had to get a dress tailored at the last minute, and they charged me what felt like and outrageous price - but they did do a great job.
They staff are all very knowledgeable, patient and kind. Came in for a puppy wellness exam and vaccinations and they have a great health care plan that's really a great deal for a puppy's first year!

Went for my favorite, Paella and was very disappointed. Hadn't had it in three years and they have changed it so badly I don't think it can be called paella anymore!! Service was okay but won't return.
I'm very picky when it comes to my coffee so when I can go through the drive through and it's right every time that's impressive

The service was phenomenal. The massage therapist was one of the best I have ever had. The facilities were wonderful. The only downside being not having a jacuzzi. From the therapist to the attentive service providers to the drinks and snacks it was truly an enjoyable experience and highly recommend.
We bought our Subaru from them two years ago and have had nothing but good experiences each time we have service done. I would absolutely recommend them.

I manage a local pet store and they are the vet we use and recommend. The staff is always friendly and helpful. Dr. Samuels DVM is a wonderful reptile vet with a wealth of knowledge, we are grateful to have such an invaluable resource here in Tucson.

The beer is good; I tried the Pale Ale and enjoyed the flavor very much. The complimentary pretzels and mustard are nice to have when you're a little hungry and don't want to spend $8 on a fruit salad.
You can find the "Who's Who" of Tampa here at this place, however we didn't feel that the restaurant was worth the hype, and/or the price. Our "VALUE" category for this place isn't a recommendation.

You will be told one thing one day then another thing the next day. They can't keep their answers straight when you ask a question do not invest with this company you will have problems left and right. This company can not be trusted.

Great atmosphere, but their portions vary greatly so it is hard to know what items are a fair price and which are expensive. Ordered some fajitas to split and they were very small. The taste was ok, nothing special, comparable to Chili's.

I didn't eat here so I can't speak on the food, but every drink I had here was really really heavy tasting. Regardless, it was strong. The cap'n morgan pirate, though has got to go. The dude is creepy and tacky and drove me nuts!

It's an ok salon. Went in today and received a dip manicure. To cut off the cuticle, the technician used the electronic scraper and it cut up my skin around my nails pretty bad. Bad enough to cause them pain when I wash my hands.

The food is awesome, fresh and delicious but the service is painfully slow, and the orders have been incorrect for us on many occasions. I still come here for the food, but the service leaves something to be desired, considering this is supposed to be quasi fast-food.

One of my allmaz-ing, Pad Thai, Drunken Noodles, Sushi. I dont usually stray from those main things but I've definitely tasted other items that family members or friends have gotten. Please try this place out. I promise you wont regret it!!!
Had to return something from amazon. Quick simple, just brought in the original package it came in and a QR code and they took it within seconds.
This is a great store. I found three suits that I am in love with and bought them all. I am hoping they are tailored well but so far I am very happy with the great service and sales prices.

The Bull USED to be a great place but since they downscaled their menu, they seemed to have also down-scaled their quality. The last few times there, the only thing that was good was the french fries. It definitely needs a revival.
Love the food and restaurant! However I'm usually disappointed to drive across town and see that the place is closed for a private event so I end up going home hungry with no margaritas. Wahh
They had a great menu and great service, but they don't have umbrellas and sat us outside in the hot sun. Keep that in mind when planning on sitting outside.

Great service. But, when I went there I had an omelet. I can't remember what one. But went to the doctor the next day throwing up every 10 minutes and to weak to stand for more than 5 minutes. Got food poisoning. Will never ever go back.
This manager was so rude and made a mistake and didn't want to admit it and was very mean and tried to lie his way out of it. I'm never coming back ever again.

I like this place and had a good Philly cheesesteak here, and my friend enjoyed his French toast although he admitted it was good but not his #1 choice for French toast. Service was friendly, and I would eat here again.

Great service if you mention yelp free appetizer we got the red fish good I ordered oyster pasta good but oysters a little salty. Everyone else got the gumbo Jambalaya they didn't like they sent it back but our waitress was still pleasant.

I've been here both when sober and inebriated and, each time, i think, you have to actually TRY to make food taste this bad, I've had better food in public school cafeterias. In terms of quality of food, this place holds the title of worst i've ever had in Philly

Black Dog used to terrific. We keep retrying the food hoping it goes back to it's former standards. Hint the chicken that was used in dishes was LIGHTLY coated, now it is a thick coating that is full of oil. Please rise above again.

This Dunkin isn't amazing, but it's better than the other locations I've visited in town. My order is always correct, although sometimes the iced coffee has so much gritty sugar in the bottom it's hard to drink. Lesson learned: order without sugar.

the food was gross the burger was mushy grey frozen filler patty my wifes steak was nothing but a cheap fatty cut and my sons "chocolate"pankakes were dry pancakes with burnt chocolate morsels on it never again will i go back

Great OMG the long island teas are the BOMB DIGGITY!!!!!! The frozen concoctions are ok as well, but if you're not into the frozen daiquiri, the long island iced tea is GOODT ... and you only need one to get you there, two if you're BRAVE!
Mediocre food, fairly good service. Bourbon street smells really bad and they left the doors open for the aroma from outside to enter, that was disgusting.
I love this bar. Not enough to warrant a 5 out of 5 but enough to make it a place I feel no remorse in sitting in till close.

I eat at Chinese buffets all over the US, as I travel a lot for work. This one is not the standard format buffet that you find everywhere, and I thought it was quite good, with the food quality being higher than normal buffet fare.

If you like pork then you'll probably enjoy the spot more than I did but they didn't have a different type of broth except for the mushroom one, which tasted plain. They also didn't have spicy ramen. The price didn't match the quality either.
Horrible service ran out of water and never did get a refill, the food was not good at all it was very awkward the owner called me and my boyfriend "ladies".. on our way out..

The food was good but we were a party of nine and the first dish came out twenty five minutes before the last person got their meal. It really hindered our experience that we weren't able to actually eat together at our meal out. So overall an okay experience

Amazing place! I had the Coronation chicken salad with pasta salad as a side and it was the perfect size that I ate the whole thing! Great, fun and cozy environment and the food is delicious! I'm so glad to find this unique cafe and will be back soon.

They changed their Nashville Hot sauce, not hot at all and oily. Asked the waitress if they changed the sauce and she went and asked and said they did, bad choice for whatever reason they did. Best tenders just went to KFC!
Nice place to check out while at the pepermill but service is S L O W & drink are a little pricey.
Just tried to talk to the sales associate here that picked up the phone and was hung up on because of how "busy" they are. The folks that used to run this store a couple years ago were really great.
Although it took a long time for service to startup they never really miss a pickup now I hope that continues!

A natural grocery store that has a juice bar: five stars from me! Now I finally have a place to get my obnoxiously bougie green juice. This store reminds me of a Sprouts kind of like a small Whole Foods, but less expensive and with fresher produce.
Awesome spot for brunch! Even when it was super busy the staff was very attentive and nice, didn't rush us and constantly checking on us throughout. The Food and cocktail were good too!

Worst place to get your nails done, the people are rude and make jokes about you. They do everything like it's a hassle worst service don't waste your money coming here if I could give 0 stars I would

Fast service for ready to go muffaletta sandwiches, large portions, good prices. The sandwich was good but oozed oil in every bite, which is how it's supposed to be, but it felt heavy to me. Good quality meat and cheese.

5 stars only because SB the bartender was amazing and very attentive, the other worst staff, especially the other woman that never introduced herself was rude. Thank you SB for making myself and my guest feel great tonight! Hookah is good too

My friend and I stopped by last night for a quick mid WTF? Typical for this type of place. Other than that - it was an OK experience, but I probably won't go back on a Friday or Saturday night. I'm sure with a busier crowd the service is worse.
Best i was in my way to New York we went to see what was better geno or pats pats wins best cheesesteak in a long time
This place was great! I would give 4.5 if I could because it took a while to get our food even when it wasn't very busy, but other than that food, service, and atmosphere were great!

Killer atmosphere, great draft picks, not quite enough options for pescetarians but the food is amazing. Went back after I started eating meat again and the pork belly banh mi is the most irresistibly flavor-packed banh mi I've ever had.

The owners must have made changes to the bartenders as they are more engaging and don't seem to be on their cell phones anymore. Nice selection of beers, except one that tasted like strong, sour pickle juice. Andy Reid would have approved.
Was a little salty for my liking and the crab legs were cooked too long which makes it a lot harder to get the meat out. Great concept just needs rounded out a bit better. Food isnt bad.

Slowest Eegee's location in the entire valley. Consistently walking in with groups of employees chatting about their personal lives, while my DoorDash order hasn't been prepared yet and is ready for pickup 10-15 minutes past it's pickup time! Great food, bad employees at this location.

Best coffee & espresso that I've found on the beach, great pastry offerings, and a very very nice, high-end surf shop. With kids options & super high quality boogie, skim and surf boards. Highly recommend!
They make awesome homemade ice cream, cookies, AND gluten free waffle cones in the back and sling awesome customer service in the front!

They're fast and nice but they literally throw extra fees while you're getting pedi/mani just for asking to do things how I'd prefer. I believe It should be done how the client wants without charging more to shape nails or asking to change something

Fantastic shwarma sandwiches? Vegetarian/Vegan options? French fries that haunt my dreams? The food here is ridiculously delicious for the price, and authentic to boot. The service can be a bit slow, but who's in a hurry when you're sitting on a patio drinking tea while you wait?

Very hip yet warm and friendly. We have eaten at both the bar and tables. Either way the staff is prompt and friendly. Food is simply delicious. Drinks here are a real treat; the bartendors are creative and unique drinks are enough to make this a place not to miss.
The spring roll was served with oyster sauce and peanuts, really disappointing also its is 90% vegatables and one shrimp in each roll..... they are not very appetizing.

This Burger King is in a lot by itself on Route 23. In most respects, this is a pretty standard Burger King with adequate standards of cleanliness Please don't put mustard and pickles on my plain burger when I've specifically asked for a plain burger please thanks you

ABSOLUTELY TO DIE FOR. NO KIDDING. If you do not go here for breakfast, or even when you feel like some good comfort food, then you are missing out. I regularly go and order anything i'm feeling in that moment, topped with gravy! IT IS A MUST.
Went here for lunch with a couple coworkers both ordered the Pho beef and steak bowls which were massive and they said were pretty good. Would come back for the Pho but probably not for sushi
What a wonderful place. They do an amazing job grooming the dogs whether you know how you want them to look or just want to leave it up to them.

This place is amazing!! So many different food options! Everything I have tried here was delicious I love all the little different stands they had and a very cool place as it used to be an old train terminal
Nothing really special about this place, the bubble tea is mostly ice, the hoagie are mostly bread and the pho was a bit bland.

Great space, quality coffee. I am a fan of this place. It's a 4 or 5 in my book. But the ventilation is awful. You don't really notice it while you're there, but when you leave your clothes, backpack, everything will smell a bit like food exhaust. Not good.

The smoothie was dank, the delivery driver was super quick and got it done. The panini absolutely sucked though. Turkey felt old, the tomatoes were so hard I couldn't even bite into them, and the bread was soggy and weird

Best Benedict's ever!!! Love this place small but cozy and great service we even got a free cinnamon bun pancake for our first visit was to die for! We brought our 3 month old was family friendly too...will definitely be back!
Good, reasonabletopreference calzone. I've only been to the Carmel location and West Lafayette location, and of the two, I preferred the atmosphere in WL. But good food at both.
Gross Hot and sour soup no good General tso chicken like sweet and sour chicken onions not cooked will not be back

Excellent. I went for the first time today and already I am plotting to get back there again tomorrow. The sides are great. I had the Roasted Cauliflower and I have designed on the Roasted Brussel Sprouts next time and perhaps the Truffle Fries.
I'm indifferent about this place Clean Some restaurants are over priced Would say your better off going somewhere else but if you want quick food then come here
if you want popeyes then go to your murfreesboro road location or gallation road location you will get treated fairly and tell them that mark sullivant sent you
I continually say I need to go to more concerts and for some reason I never make it happen as often as I would like, but the HiFi is a fantastic place to do that.

The food was excellent, staff was pretty good. We couldn't seem to flag down our waitress to get refills on our beverages until right at the end of our meal but other than that I thought that this Hooters was pretty good.
Meh. I'm so used to Shoprite, that even stopping at an ACME when he saw that I was ready to check out. Very nice man. I'd stop again if in the area, but I'm a 'Shoprite Girl' through and through! .
Best burger I ever had way better tha 5 guys a little pricy but very good staff was friendly and courteous and ever brought u the food

A perfectly serviceable middle eastern place for an affordable and casual meal. There were real problems with some of the dishes but service was friendly and quick, and we more or less enjoyed what we had. Order the Sahara combo mezze platter for a nice start to the meal.
I made an appointment at Architeqt Salon and Gallery to see Brittiany Cunningham for a L'Oreal Power Dose Treatment and Blowlooking hair.
I can't say enoough about my visit to Ichiciro house sangria as I was looking for something sweet would highly recommend and will definitely be back to try more!

20 minutes in the drive thru for an ice cold burger, plus they repeatedly close early when they are supposed be open till midnight. Was in the drive they at 10 and could see people working but they wouldn't take our order. Done with the jackets at this location.

Not bad, not good service mediocre I ate mine but was dreaming of pf Chang's frozen dinner i had left in freezer and regretting the trip. Someone nearby was having a dish that looked great. I've been to the Hendersonville location and it was a similar experience just less crowded

Our last night in New Orleans ...the youngsters were getting tattoos at Electric Ladyland, soul food sounded good for a change, and Praline Connection was both close and welldress shirt, tie, and Fedora-nice touch!

The food was delicious and the drinks were strong! One dish took awhile, but the manager came out and apologized profusely for the wait, and explained that they had just gotten a lot of new staff who were still training.

Expensive. Uneven. Best when clarity eg poached lobster with uni foam.More often unbalanced or over zealous combinations led to obfuscation or sludge: deconstructed guinea fowl~ pulled pork or amusee bouch - unrecognizable . No warniing that bird breast was smoked.Good wine list.Wooden service. No Michelin star here.

Lives in Tampa 12 years an have driven by Anthony's Pizza for yearstried it for the the first time in September and was not disappointed. Really good pizza ! Recommend you order asking for extra cheese. Great pizza! Military discount a bonus!

These are the best kaiser rolls I've found since moving to NJ, and I've looked every possible place I could think of in this area. The snowflake rolls are really tasty, too. Other baked goods all need more salt. They're all just kind of bland.
Fantastic food, ready when I got there, my wife said it was the best lunch I had ever brought to her at work. Highly recommend, nice place, great people!

Celebramos el cumpleaños de mi hermano acá, el plato para niños excepcionales, probamos la crema de langosta y es realmente esquisita, no me gusto solo el ruido alto de conversación en el lobby. De resto todo estaba deli, volvería
I happen to like the atmosphere, but I have been three times and I've got to say that the food kinda sucks and the wait staff is weird. Really.
I really like Jeni's, but it's SO expensive. It's the best, but I just wish I could get a scoop pint for less than twice what the next best place costs.

I checked out 1912. I didn't take advantage of it but I love that they have a system where patrons can prepay for a pint for Veterans or first responders. As a Veteran I appreciate that. Things were frenetic because of beer week but the bartender was friendly and attentive

Snappy, friendly service. Surprisingly underwhelming, uneven food. All of the tapas on the menu leave you feeling like you had a decent meal with fresh ingredients, but not a single thing was anywhere close to inspired. Everything is a slight bit off.
I've seen so many good reviews for this place so I was expecting to be wowed but I was really underwhelmed. It was nothing special or worth coming back to but still a solidly good breakfast.

C'mon Ruth's Chris. I grew up with y'all. If Ms. Ruth was around she would never allow a fine Cabernet poured from a beer spout and changing an amazing bread puddin recipe! why would you do that??? Ruth's Chris is a top steakhouse! Don't cut corners!
In the middle of it all. Right now with road construction it is hard to get in this place, but when the road is done they will be sitting pretty.

So, it's my day off & I had a hankering for a non3 sizes larger than a shot glass compared to the large which was in a 16 oz. glass. Overall experience was average. Not horrible but also not memorable either.
Don't miss this place And sit at the oyster bar if at all possible, the folks that work here are full of stories.
Best vape juice hands down nice and clean and loads of flavour.i would tell any one who wants good juice to go here great juice obe of the best if not the best but at a reasonable price

I absolutely love this place. Great sandwiches and great people. It's a good place to get a good sandwich before work and generally the manager Kevin is there and always takes care of me with a smile on his face!
Great food great atmosphere and then the drinks are the bomb chicken fajitas and it to male waiters are one Taylor and Marcel and I will be back and I forgot my B-Day coupon.

Good place for homemade chocolate with a good variety but for the price I would probably go to Qachbal's on Channelside they are not necessarily cheaper but definitely a bigger portion. Why 3 stars..... the owner appeared to be a bit grumpy on that day.

Beef empanada was good. Need 2 if you have an appetite which means $12. Owner talks non-stop. I love friendly and try not to be rude but I literally had to take cash and hold it between our eye contact to get on my way.

We are just traveling through and decided to get breakfast here because our hotel did not offer breakfast. The food was just okay. Kids had ENORMOUS chocolate chip pancakes and my husband and I had Colorado omelets The service was good and the restaurant is very clean.
your dry oriented, green dry cleaners shortly after they opened a couple of years ago usable vinyl zip-bag and carry your cleaning out and load it in your vehicle. i put my money where my mouth is!

Saw a worker run his hands through his greasy hair, rub his eyes and mouth, and stick his hands up his shirt and then proceed to make someone's meal. While the food that comes out may be good, the workers' attention to hygiene is lacking. Watch them make your food.

Love their drinks and onigiris. Too bad they do not have more seats, and I didn't really like this one big guy working there because he was not only very rude, but also messed up my order when I only ordered two things.
The food I'd rate as a 3aged lady that works there is so incredibly rude that I don't care if I ever go back. Such a shame too...we've always enjoyed the food.

When I ate at wildflower cafe my tongue was in heaven I said to myself it's like angles came down and sprinkled fairy dust on my food you just got to try the honey butter so good! I went from this to this and I was in heaven!!!!!!!!!!!!

I had an issue with electrical work done. communicated with Jason at least a dozen times with what seemed to be honest either promising to come himself or have his foreman come out to fix their error. never showed. wouldn't recommended, not honest

Pros: Really fast and friendly service and tasty burgers. Cons: A little pricey for what you get and your clothes will smell of burgers for the rest of the day. The spreadable cheddar is loved by many but I would scrape of 2/3 of the amount they give you.

I always bought martabak from Pandawa market or Martabak Raja or Home seller, and I give it try from this store, honestly these are to expensive for a pan of Martabak, the taste was plain sweet n because they use cheap butter, and not juicy like martabak should be

You got to try the pork tenderloin with mashed potatoes, a little spicy because of the spicy Thai Chili and Hoisin sauce but is a piece of heaven. This is one of my favorite restaurants in the Bay area, the service is outstanding.
I went here on a Sunday afternoon and was seated immediately, my waitress asked me what I wanted to drink, I waited 15 minutes and I still haven't seen her or my drink. Extremely poor service for me

I stopped by today. Great bubble tea, friendly people, didn't get a chance to try the eggies or the fruit based drinks but they look delicious. My main request for improvement would be that they offer a green tea option, even matcha would be good.
The food was ok it wasn't wowing like before but I guess everyone have a off day. It definitely too loud in there they have a live band and my ears hurt every time I leave there and bad singers.

Hmmm well my friend goes to the restroom and a ceiling tile falls on him injuring his shoulder...then the bartender tells the customers next to us to move to the back of the restaurant because there are less drive-bys there... wtf??!! Needless to say we will not return..

Exceptional service, extremely understanding, kind and caring, prompt service and same day delivery in Goleta, reasonably priced and beautifully crafted bouquets. My husband ordered a bouquet from her it was the most beautiful one i ever received and it lasted for more than two weeks, gorgeously presented.

Giving credit when due. The owner left a message for me after evidently seeing this review . He apologized and made it clear they care about their business and customers, they without being asked, refunded the cost of our food from that order. I appreciate the effort.
The service never disappoints had a problem with my battery losing charge 3 diffenernt places could not tell me Will did a great job found my problem FIXED

Very poor service i would say till date the worst experience i ever had....i called for a deliver and even after 2 and half hours they dint deliver my food and on top of that they charged me for the food and still dint deliver very pooor service

The service and location tends to be the best points of going here, as for the coco / nilla swirl it melts before you get your car door open. Prefer Toppers on East bay for lack of melt before I leave the parking lot and flavor.
Placed a reservation a week ago and when me and my family arrived they couldn't find the reservation or accommodate 5 people, horrible experience so far!
Waited for a "15 minute shuttle" for 50 minutes. Not to mention when we got there they told us they messed up our reservation and wanted us to go from Orlando all the way to Tampa to get a new car.

Kristine cut both my boys hair she was super friendly and engaging and patient with one of my twins who wouldn't sit still. They were also excited to get their haircut! This is our third time here and we love it every time.
Love this salon and employees, but was irked when I was told a service would be complimentary then was charged for it. .
Good food, had chicken soup, steak sandwich, BLT, egg salad etc stop here every year, certainly recommend as a stop when traveling on rt 40

Friendly service good Decor was tired but tidy Lot of free parking Chicken noodles good Green beans tasted pretty great Cranberry Muffin! Would recommend yes East side location is good Give the college try

The Parrillada is a meat lover's dream. Really high quality seafood as well: the Pulpo was cooked perfectly and the Vieras con Rajas were unlike anything I've had before. One of the best, most affordable wine lists in Tucson.
The place is small but it has a wide variety of products, some which I haven't been able to find anywhere else. It was well kept and everything was organized.

By far the worst experience I've ever had When an owner thinks his cheesesteak sandwich is the shit, and treats his customers like shit It results in an epic diarrhea That's what it was Poor customer service Poor manners And a very very shitty meal Keep up the attitude boys!

The Service Went Down Since my last visit i understand the short of employees everywhere, but your waiter a guy who have alcohol smell on him. Then he put in your order late making the wait time forever than he wanted a 18% tip please.

One of the easiest airports in the country. I was able to drop off my rental car, go through security, and be at my gate in under 15 minutes. The food options are pretty good really, and the whole place seems overly clean with such few travelers coming through.

Very long wait time for a short order. Too small to accommodate for inside seating so had to wait outside in the summer heat. Felt uncomfortable walking in, the employees and other patrons stared as I did not seem to fit in with their culture.
This is by far the best place to buy any electronics, selection is good, staff if friendly and helpful, easy return policies if something is not to your liking.

Pretty good. Liked the grouper tacos. Terrific spot & sunset. Give it 4 stars, even 4.5 if: the staff was more responsive - the crowd was less dodgy If you're in the area, you need to give Frenchie's a try. There aren't any better places nearby anyway. Enjoy!

Place was great for 3 hours, then the " minority owner/head bartender" was the rudest person I've ever encountered in the service industry. Atmosphere was wonderful but completely ruined by horrible customer service.
Absolutely terrible. First hand knowledge. My last post was reported and removed . I hope people get to see this ahead of time, if you want your dogs to live long healthy lives pick a new place .
had the chicken strips, bad idea as they just burned them to oblivion and beyond, the only thing saving this place from me giving them 0 stars is that the service was good, hence the 1 star.

Went to Lunch with my Mom yesterday she will pulled the Chair out to sit down and the back came off I didn't like the food at all I got the Chicken Pita it was so Blah !! Service was horrible ! I wouldn't go back! I don't recommend this place

Be careful when u park here. Someone cut out my catalytic converter while I was visiting. After talking to the police because security will not help me - they said this happens very frequently at this location.

Adding a star after having a nice happy hour here. The cheesesteak dumplings are good and potatoes au gratin was really delicious. But the bar plates and drinks are on the expensive side so the cost adds up surprisingly quickly even for happy hour.

Extremelyyyy slow service. If you drop off a car to get service and have requested a loner car, you will wait 30 minutes to an hour before being given your loaner car. No one acknowledges you as you wait. Very horrible experience.. would not recommend

I am so bummed to give such a low rating to what was once one of my favorite places to eat. They expanded the size of the restaurant and the two times I have been here since has resulted in having to send back overlooked and or cold food. :-(((

I have been here on a few occasions and while it has its pluses, the food quality seems to be going in the wrong direction. Hoping that it has just been a misstep because in the past it has been really good.

A bar you can smoke, drink, watch the game, and eat. The food was actually really good and I personally enjoyed the pizza! The drinks weren't all that great, they were really strong but I mean if you like that then no complaints lol.

The worst experience ever. Do NOT ever take this bus. The service is terrible, no one tells you that you need to "check in" before departure, otherwise you're not given a seat. They were late for ~ 40 mins without prior notice or explanation. The buses are old and stinky.
It's not to bad, if you're a local like I am, think golden wheel on fairview ave, or Doug's Berger den, and it tastes the same.

The food was ok, our server was awesome as well. When you present your yelp coupon for a free glass of wine they will tell you it's not valid lol, just a heads up if you try getting a free glass of wine.

Good customer service, free sample and food tastes great. Thwy also have great homemade sweet tea that often sells out. The only problem I have with it is that you def can find similar food in the surrounding area for cheaper for the portions that they give you.

MINUS 5 STARS. I was wandering around the market, enjoying bites from different vendors and I got the bright idea of having a quick bite of sushi - WITHOUT CHECKING YELP FIRST! Oh my, this place is terrible. Overpriced, tiny portion and lousy tasting. Yuck! AVOID this place. Sorry.

I got their Fallafel and thought it was terrible mostly because I was half expecting meat. Being as far from vegetarian as possible and not knowing what Fallafel was at the time I had a pretty bad experience.
Delicious philly cheese steak sandwich!!!! The waiting line is long so if you are ordering sth to go it might be a good idea to order online
The service is great and the food is wonderful. The only problem is that it was not easy picking on the menu due to Italian food being my favorite types of food. Highly recommend
A warm broth noodle soup spilling over with duck, roast pork, dumplings and veggies is enough to stave off the winter cold!

It was good, and the brunch was tasty. It just wasn't as good as their other concepts, which we love. While the space was warm and fun, the food did not seem as well thought out, or tasty, as it's sister concepts.

Pretty good place to watch soccer! Huge TV screen outdoors to show games. IBG is a beautiful beer garden with both sunlight and shade and has plenty of fun games, like Jenga, Checkers, Connect 4, and cornhole.
very snobby barista, God forbid you ask for your drink to be made properly and/or ask for a condiment that is empty...maybe her nose piercing is too tight

Place was pretty good, not my favorite but not my least favorite. Food was pretty good but was way too expensive in my opinion. Glad I tried it but don't know if I'll come back, there's better places that I can go too that are far less expensive.

Ordered food from here after a night out, told the wait would be about an hour, never received my food or my money back. Never got a justification, also claimed they delivered to someone else which to me sounds like non sense. Dont order unless ur trying to get robbed

Burgers arnt good, they are small and greasy, the fries where cold and when you order cheese fries you get a tiny cup of cheese. Everyone here looks miserable and kinda lost. The milk shakes are so hard to drink threw the straw I got frustrated and threw it away.

Was here last night for the "sweet potato taste no kidding! The sweet potato tasteinsection of mall goers. Deep inside the restaurant, the ambience is good, with poppish music playing and a lively atmosphere not sure about this one.

SLOW. If you're thinking "hey, they have a drive through, I'll just pop over there on my 30 minute break and get some lunch" FORGET that $&£%. You will wait 15-20 to get your food. That said, the burgers are good and the fries are great.

I don't know why people love this place! To me is overprice mini burgers. For the same price of these "cheeseburgers" go to square 1 burger or burger culture and get a HUGE really good gourmet burger.
Waited over an hour for a pizza for them to tell me they tried to deliver it and no one was there. Bad service, manager was rude. If i could give zero stars, I would.
Classic, non glam pizza parlor. You know when you just want a slice of plain with some garlic knots and sit on a hard plastic seat? This is the place. Cheap. Delicious.

Sad service. I went by at 2:00 this afternoon to get a quote and the girl at the front was very polite but said "They all just went into a meeting, can you come back tomorrow?" I was a little shocked. Not the way to run a business.

Good selection but I never get the feeling the people working there are interested in helping and several times they've had a real attitude problem. And this has been consistent over several years, not just a one or two time occurrence.
The manager was non pleasant. I asked for an item out of the ordinary and she rudely said, she could do it that time but don't ask again.

The iced lattes are lit, their new stickers are cool, the space is awesome, but the recent price hike after their prices already being borderline Starbucks prices prevents me from granting them that extra star.

This store only cares about money. They charged me $10 to receive a UPS Access Point package which should NEVER have been charged and so far have chosen not to return my call. I'll definitely drive another few minutes to avoid this store again.

So cute and the people running it are so sweet. It may take a minute to get your order, but if you like quality food prepared with care, you won't mind waiting. The eggs, bacon, and brioche were cooked perfectly and the coffee is delish.

Our favs: salt water taffy hits it out of the park, rice krispies covered in caramel then milk chocolate on a stick . The waffles stuffed w/caramel, covered w/dark chocolate and sea salt were WAY TOO SALTY. The service was so friendly and quick. Great people!
Mushy, Mushy, Mushy! My 2 soups were great as well as the fried shrimp, but disappointed that I got all the way home just to have to throw my noodles away, the main dish.
Just waited 25 min in drive through with one vehicle in front of me worst service I have ever received at McDonald's and there have been some bad ones

For me this is my own version Fortress of Solitude.i can always just sit & listen to myself & reflect on everything bout life, accomplishments achievements people i hurt loss & met.I sometimes find myself to myself asking a lot of things with no one judging me!

Good, cheap banh mi, nasty, NASTY service. The older woman behind the counter made a store full of people wait while she ranted at the staff for 15 minutes. It made me so uncomfortable I left my purchases unpaid for on the counter.

I'm here for work and my work booked my room here personally I would've never picked this place I pull up and one of the windows are broken to one of the rooms looks unsafe not to clean :-/ note to self check out the area before you book
