I love this place great food always fresh and tastey but good lord stay away from the lunch buffet its marginal at best cold sushi and seemingly stale selection. Dinner is where its @ Anthony B out ^

BRANDON IS VERY HELPFUL AND FRIENDLY. He is very knowledgeable and efficientgetter" person who represents his company well. I greatly appreciate the way he went out of his way to not just quickly find light bulbs for my truck, but also put them for me right in the parking lot!

Pizza was really good, so was the price. The cinnamon sticks were just bread sticks with cinnamon sprinkled on top though, maybe they were out of cinnamon sticks Ann's just winged it? If we hadn't gotten those this place we be a solid 4

Wings were awesome, definitely try the hot honey sauce. I loved them. I'll definitely be going back to get some more. Next time I'll get the jumbo wings because I accidentally ordered the smaller size not knowing how small they'd actually be.

Staff at the registers do not wear their mask properly. You breathe out of your mouth and nose so not covering both put anyone you come into contact in jeopardy of transmitting Covid or any other airborne diseases. I would think a pharmacy would know better
I'm in love with this place Angie is so friendly all of them are very profesional I would definitely recommend this place

Dont order off of Yelp for delivery A VERY rude person called and said they are not bringing my food and I need to cancel. After they already received my payment. I live a block away. This place needs to go out of business.

The restaurant was freezing cold. Despite all the customers wearing hats jackets, they waitress, hostess, and bouncer refused to close the door letting in the draft. Should have packed my marmot gloves proofed for -40 degrees haha food was OK.
The service was slow and the food was not hot many tables where not buses and had dirty dishes on them and the staff was yelling but I will give em another chance but .....
8 charging points at this location and 3 are out of order as of 11/07/21 5he max speed I am getting is 70KWh here so not super fast. And this location always shows busy than usual on the maps.

This place makes appointments then you wait for more than 2 hours I didn't make an appt with shiller then shiller sat there and told somebody's story about pain Then screamed "who cares " you're right. My history doesn't matter" he literally started screaming crazily again- this guy is crazy
This place is fun to watch a game with a group of friends, but the food and drinks are way overpriced and the food portions are TINY!!!! Left there hungry and thirsty.
Just ordered the buffalo chicken cheesesteak and a Ceasar salad with grilled chicken and my Ceasar has no grilled chicken on it. The buffalo chicken overall was ok but doesn't come with enough cheese
It smelled soooo bad in the store. Like Arby's and farts. The art was meh, shallow and pedantic. I waited 10 mins to ask a worker about a piece, and then I had to leave because of the smell.
I would love to give this place a higher rating because I love most all of the food I have tried unless you want to be around cigarette smoke. One more trip may be strike three and we won't return.
I won't be ordering from here ever again. Not only was my sandwich the laughing stalk of the break room at my job, but the delivery driver was higher than I could've imagined.

My family eats at Kickin Wingz often, sometimes in the establishment, sometimes via take3 for always striving to make things right. To be honest, I really want to love this place, it has great potential.
Great pizza - I love the spinach and tomato. The problem with this place is that the staff is rude, especially if you are not sure what to order and at lunch the line is outside.

The last time I went, the food was dry and cold. I haven't been back and after reading how they treat their staff, I certainly won't be spending any more money there. Don't want a side of COVID with my burger, no thanks.

So it's a little small, but the employees are friendly and courteous. I recently ordered almost 100 baked goods the day before I needed them, and they prepared my order promptly and professionally. Even better, they were delicious! I recommend this Publix for a great shopping experience.
Rude ass employee Gave me sh*t for self check out With no one waiting Man coughing in line For only open cashier So I'll check out here I'm diabetic Can't risk covid infection Let me pay in peace

Bartenders are miserable and the atmosphere is boring. I have been here a handful of times and really want to like the place because the building is awesome and the location is perfect but always end up leaving disappointed.
Do not say something will be ready in an hour if it is going to be an hour and 45 minutes. I had 100 other better to do than sit on your uncomfortable wooden stools.
This is always our last stop before heading back to California. There are a ton of pumps and snacks but the bathrooms are NASTY so use them only if you absolutely need to.

Very happy with the atmosphere it was fantastic. I have had a similar kind of pizza before but they've differentiated theirs by using a lemony dressing on the arugula which gives the pizza a unique flavor that goes well with the salty prosciutto. Would definitely go again!

I picked up the Rick James at Palmer Park today and it was seriously THE BEST chicken sandwich I've ever eaten! If you ever have the opportunity to eat their food, DO IT!! Crunchy and juicy and so tasty!
Great selection and tends to lean toward upper end brands and prices. Not my usual Choice but they do have some brands of jeans I can't find elsewhere and have some Awesome sales from time to time.
Fantastic food great service. Not much room to sit down. Don't ask for a fork when you come here you just have to dig in with your hands and get nasty.

I went here for Vegetarian soup with friends. Found out once we got there they use chicken broth or animal product in all soups and they don't have a vegetarian option. Very disappointed in that. Felt very unwanted as a vegetarian.

Solid service, delicious food. I tend to get the zucchini and feta platter; I can never finish it, but I prefer it over the sandwich because the hummus that comes with it is excellent. I was there today, and I might have to go back for lunch tomorrow...

Yea my experience first time horrible everything. Wasn't greeted, waited in the longest 2 person line, food tastes super greasy, all tables were dirty, ice machine faulty and wouldn't shut off, arguments in the kitchen... Just to name a few, the place should probably be closed down...

Really disappointed because they had been recommended by my neighbor. I waited forever to then was sort of helped by a grumpy guy who just seemed like he hated his job. I decided to try Costco and had a great experience.

If you've ever been disappointed that the restaurant staff refused your request for substitutions on a pricepriced, generously portioned bento box lunches and quiet atmosphere will make even the most picky sushipinkposy
While the pizza when hot and on time can be good, my last two orders via the Slice app have come up short. Tonight my takeout order took over an hour and I sat and waited for it.
Very tasty food but make sure you don't forget a third of the order when it's picked up by UberEats, Doordash, etc.

Best office ever!!!Everyone that works in his office from the office girls all the way up to the assistants and hygienists and the dentists are exceptional! Very caring and thoughtful. They always make you feel comfortable. Excellent knowledge and great dental care.

I love the new location, much nicer and cleaner. The staff is fantastic, friendly but it is typical bar food and when I say that I don't mean it isn't good but it is salty as all get out. Reduce the salt and I'll add a star.

Horrible. The salad was wilted, calamari was obviously frozen, grilled shrimp over cooked, salmon was bland and chocolate mousse dessert taste like Nestle Quick. The one positive was the waiter, very friendly and helpful.

This restaurant has a nice ambiance but the service could have been better. After all, who would like to wait for a glass of water after having falafal and chicken curry on a hot July afternoon Food quality: Good Service: Average Price: Not cheap

Excellent barbecue, but I would NOT brave a hour-plus long wait to dine there again. Carry out is a possibility, because that line is shorter, but I've had barbecue in town I thought was just as good with less wait.
Loooong lines Hangry people waiting in those lines All to find out that the food is overrated Sauce isn't that special Warm and friendly service
I asked for a veggie pizza and expected typical pizza toppings and literally got a pile of broccoli, cauliflower and carrots on my pizza.
This restaurant has the best food and ice cream and I would definitely recommend to go here with your family and friends!

I was pleasantly surprised when I got inside and it was actually a Panera Bread, one of my favorite places to eat. The self help kiosks were great, allowed me to customize my sandwich exactly the way I wanted it. The order was made quickly and the food was great.

I am a little confused why there is a "grill items" section and the calamari is under that heading but the calamari is fried. It's misleading and I would not have ordered the calamari if I would have known it was fried. Lesson learned. Not sure that I will return...
Great tacos, but to go's have been hit or miss and the elimination of some proteins and avocado at a taco place due to COVID is unfortunate and has kept me from being the usual I was precovid.
Natural beauty of a different kind than I'm used to, but I'm glad I had the experience to see the saguaros and American desert.

i chose this place because of how good the ratings were, but I ordered the steak tostada salad and it honestly tastes pretty fishy and the lettuce looks old and flimsy. I can barely finish it and the thing was $14 so I don't think I'll be back
"I personally prefer not to tell people when we punch the greens." - General Manager. So you don't want to put it on golfnow, because you still want people to pay full price for all sand greens.

I've been in the store a few times and while they do have good selection the last two times the service has been subpar with very rude sales people. It almost felt like he was talking down to me. Learned my lesson though and not going back.
I have to say this one is my third favorite behind Jim's and Pat's . It is an iconic Philly establishment, so if you have the time and appetite, try it to see what you think!

Definite scam - they keep sending letters to an old address of mine and I am sure they are the ones that keep calling me from random local numbers that I continually block. I guess they do not understand a "Do Not Call" request

Last time I ate here I sat on the patio with my dog, they even brought her a water bowl. My food was sub-par, she had a bite of my companion's chicken and enjoyed it but then again, she also eats rabbit poop so I wouldn't trust her palate.
Just average, the best thing was the eggs. The waitress got everything right but it took awhile to be acknowledged to be seated and to have our order taken. Do have good portions

Good food, good service. Terrible small cramped tables ruin the entire experience. When you don't even have room to get your entire order on the table and have to send food back to the kitchen because it doesn't physically fit something is seriously wrong.

It's cool to go to the beautiful park to see it and take a pic BUT going up it is quite a process and time consuming. Very small in tram you take up and down and very narrow to walk up top of the arch. Not worth your time.
David's has a nice selection of jewelry and one thing that we searched the whole quarter for - cuff links with shirt studs . Staff were helpful and patient. Lots of unique and interesting items.
Honestly, I think the guy was just lazy and didn't want to deal with 10 certified letters and told us to go to Vassar.

The quality of Panda's food has steadily declined over the last few years. It used to be decent, but now the chicken is deep fried and fatty and the rice is slimy and gross. Won't be going here anymore.
Food was good as always service was good we were very pleased with our entrées and as always the margaritas were delicious

Some of the better mix drinks I've stumbled across. Sadly the beer menu is a bit lacking, but then again all of NO seems to be behind on the craft beer trend. Music is perfect. There, but not in your face.

Food was basic, mediocre at best food. The rigatoni tasted like hamburger helper definitely need a real chef. The inside the restaurant looks awesome but the food sucks would not recommend this restaurant if you want good Italian cuisine.
The bowls are great but the staff can never hear what we order over their loud music and blenders so we've gotten the wrong order twice now.

Everyone at Dons is very helpful with your whole experience! They even ask for your pack of cigarettes that you undoubtedly have in your pocket when in the market for an eCig so I think it's great they actually care and aren't in it just for the money!

I went yesterday for a Fillcharge for gel polish on acrylic however they charge 25 more dollars! Although this may be pretty affordable for some I find it outrageous compared to other nail services I have received for the same quality.
Great place to hang out before and after the game, especially if you're looking to save a few bucks on the brews. Great atmosphere!

What I liked: The rooms are spacious. What I did not like: No wifi in the rooms On 2 out of 3 mornings, housekeeping was knocking on the door before 9am. - Low water pressure. The bathroom, like the rest of the room, is long overdue for an update.

First advantage is the biggest joke, I am not even sure they use people whom live in America, everyone sounds like they are in a telemarketing room filled with people and no one speaks fluent English. Same thing as a telemarketer from pakistan.
Great guy working. I believe his name was Pierre. He was running the place by himself but great little place in the airport to drop by for a clean healthy meal.
Will never order a $20 bowl Togo from here from delivery ever again! This location is horrible even in these hard times these employees don't know how lucky they are to have a job and it shows

Their food is amazing and prices are well appointed, how ever customer service needs improvement. When you forget to deliver part of the order, they make the customer wait twenty minutes before they bring what they forgot. By then the food is cold and they dont care.

The service and sushi was great not a lot of rice to fell you up so was able to try a lot of new items we never try and they was excellent.. The manager and the waitress and waiter was very helpful .We recommend Tokyo sushi !!!

If in New Orleans this is a fun tour but they drop you by some local bars and ask you to buy. Depending on who you are with this could be good. The historical tour is very good depending on if you actually believe what they say.

How can this place be a Philadelphia area restaurant and NOT have scrapple on their breakfast menu? For the un-initiated, scrapple is what they sweep up from the floor at the sausage factory, but it is extremely tasty with fried eggs and Heintz ketchup or catsup, whichever you prefer.

Here at 10:28 PM with my family shopping and there are no registers open with cashiers. I believe it is absurd to pay the same prices for merchandise that were marked up meant to make up for having employees.Self service should be an option.
Amazing view then go spend your money at The 19 at the Bellevue - where the food, service and ambiance matches the price and expectation.
Great food, great decor as a multi level establishment to reflect an English pub. The are a lot of steps to keep in mind for those who mobility maybe challenged as I didn't see a lift.

The best dry cleaners in all of pinellas county I drive 15 minutes to have my dry cleaning done by The staff at flamingo Great price Always comes out perfect Never an issues in 6 years 5 star all the way

Our first night there someone came into our room late at night while we were at dinner and stole my bags. Including some camera equipment. The bobby hotel didn't seem all that interested in finding my things. They didn't offer to comp anything at all.

I was left botched and broke, had to recieve medical treatment from a true doctor. Unfortunately the med spa did not return my money or reimburse me for the funds I paid another facilty to restore my face from the horrible filler injections.
Lol don't get delivery they'll be 45 minutes late even though you set a delivery date an hour in advance The worst part is it was 3 times in two weeks!
Part of my order wasn't included and when I called to have it re not what I ordered and just lazy service.
I was shocked how unbelievably rude the asian bartender was to us when we went there just to have a few drinks. Wont be going back.

Don't waste your time. Go to Acme across the street. It's worth the wait. The rice was stale and the food was really salty... sucks Bc I wanted to like this place but there's a reason there was no line here and an hour wait across the street.

They have such great food and beautiful area. The service was so so the waitress made our order incorrect twice. She also never came to check if everything was okay, instead she was standing at a table and chatting with customers the entire time...

We got there and waited a lot time for our waiter, then when we ordered we waited 30 mins for our food!!!! Ridiculous and our waiter wasn't even apologetic about it! Our wings and nachos were cold ! Disappointed.

Good but not great. And considering the price point, I was expecting more zing from my Fish Monger burger. The fried calamari were also very average as were the onion rings which had way too hight a batter to onion ratio.

Nice exteriors, looks very nice the seats are very comfortable, but the food court just have 4 businesses, the food court was very clean the outdoor musicians are excellent, nice fancy stores coach mk underarmor and other brands, i wish to have hollister sephora or ulta, Victoria secrets

I order a Cori-Basil cocktail w/ simple syrup so it was too sweet which made for a good drink. On other hand, the bacon jalapeno wontoon while it was appetizing, a little disappointed as they used bacon bits instead of real cooked bacon pieces.

Such a great place nice and friendly staff. The food is fantastic I got the chicken cheesesteak with extra cheese no sauce or onions come out perfect rolls are soft and tasty. I really suggest that if you have the chance you should eat here

I went to Mac's almost a year ago to get my windows tinted after having checked out a couple other locations. I decided on Mac's because of the price and service. Very nice staff. They did an amazing job on my vehicle. Will come back.
Pizza and panini's are really good, however I'd pass on the wings next time, they're small and not much to them.

Ordered lunch today through their online ordering and the food was great. However i did tell them in the special instructions that I was allergic to tomatoes and they put them in my asian chicken salad anyways. The carrot cake isn't sweet but other than that my meal was great!
After a day of looking at property in Trenton this hole in the wall served up good food just like in Brooklyn. Bleak area makes you eat fast and run. Bare bones spot.
I have used heritage for all my heating and cooling they are always there when you need them very kind and timely. Always honest
Truly one of the worst places I've ever taken any of my pets. I recommend staying far away from this place & spending your hard earned money with an honest company that actually cares.
I am also giving this McD's two stars because there is no drive through. I'm sorry but the point of being a McD's is to have a drive through so lazy people like me don't have to get out of our car.

I had pretty much given up on finding good Chinese food when I decided to pop into this little hidden location. Love the fried riceespecially pork. They prepare it right when you order and it is hot, well-give it a try.
Las mejores carnitas de el sur de California a hora en Indiana Recomendadas Los tacos surtidos están de lo mejor que ay en Indiana. El pulque curado muy artesanal recomendado

I just want back today trying to give them another chance. Two separate coupons you can't use in here the coupons I don't even know why I bother going here the sales people are so rude nothing's changed I need to get in my head just to stay at Sepora

Surprisingly good and pleased with our visit. If there would have been more flavoring on the lemon pepper and garlic parm and not so much of the butter sauce, this experience would have been over the top. Will return for sure. Oh yeah, garlic parm cheese sticks were the bomb!

This is only good if you go in the mornings. I went in the afternoon one day and the donuts were kind of dry and they didn't have too many options to choose from. My wife loves these though probably because her boss gets them super early in the morning!

On the 3 for $10 only choices are one beef choice and lots of chicken or shrimp choses which is unfair when people don't really want to Many chicken and shrimp choses they shouldn't be advertised fajitas if they aren't going to have beef on that menu

Del pez Nice place on the Wilmington Riverfront Think the decor is great and the service is speedy however for the pricing I think the portion size a bit small especially during lunch service Chicken street tacos are savory and guacamole is tasty Good place albeit pricey
Always has amazing food fresh sushi rolls today I ordered Diamond, wonderful, Godzilla and Sunset rolls and they were all so delish!
Awesome service. I had a drink that was awesome and basically a twist on a manhattan and my fiancée had a drink that was a more lemony lite drink that she loved, too.

There will likely be a longer wait at this location than at the Hillsboro one, but the food is phenomenal at both I've been to! I recommend the chicken and waffle. I take everyone who visits nashville here :)

Rude cashier! Ordered to go and asked some questions about the similar items in the menu and gave me a rude answer and charged me the wrong item. Never coming back. Atleast learn how to smile it's free and contagious.
Line was sooooo long food was good but meat was bland The corn tortillas were fresh and made to order had to try it so many good reviews.

Not sure what's happened in the last few months but the customer service and so forth used to be stellar. Come on guys, get it together. You offer great supplies but it's getting to the point of paying more is worth better service from a different vendor.

Usually hotel breakfasts are take it or leave it, but this one was great with a huge buffet of options and my omlette was cooked to perfection with delicious and fresh seafood. Be sure to grab some beignets to go!

cheeseburger, small round and perfect and fries and a sweet tea $8, A shack that has been here since the twenties. Simple but effective. No frills no nonsense, dark with the occasional spot of music in the next room and bud on tap. It's a state of mind.
Update: they did go out of their way to provide a refund so for that I feel 4 stars is more worthy

We ordered calamari starter on Ubereats and it was very disappointing . They stuff our plate with salad, it was overly salted . The only reason that I gave 4 stars is because the other dishes was good I will still order there but I will never again get the calamari.
I don't know how the food taste, but the trash outside of their location is disturbing enough to not want to go there.

This place is the bomb! I got the shrimp taco salad and it was amazing, paired it with some queso dip and a shrimp corn chowder. Ahing!!! I love the donut selection. The restaurant is clean and staff is super friendly. 10/10 recommend.
It's an interesting place with two resident cats I go for seed blocks but enjoy perusing original art and Talavera ceramics. It's a friendly shop. I'll continue to bring my business there.

The gowns are stunning however this locations customer service was disappointing : and all is well. I am so impressed with the gown and I feel like you should absolutely come here and explore their incredible selection. Just be cautious when you order! Cheers

This place is my favorite best burgers anywhere I take anyone who comes to town friends family whoever every single burger is delicious the fries are just right and the milkshakes are amazeballs. GO HERE! I can't wait for the new pub to be open
Hearty food that pairs well with beer! I've been fortunate enough to dine here several times when I've patronized the watering holes at The Waterline simply just walk in and get in line. Worth it!

Cooks don't know that grinder means to toast the hoagie. When asked to heat it, they were rude and barely warmed it. Got it back to work only to discover that it is dry despite me asking for oil & vinegar and mayo. No love given to customers here.

Very overrated and way too expensive for what it is. Had the fish, doesn't matter what kind of fish, because it was drowned in sauce that tasted fine but wasn't worth $30. Definitely wouldn't go back.

Frozen bushwackers are addictive and delicious! More of a dive bar feel but still a chill atmosphere and the prices are a good bit cheaper than broadway or Kung fu. Dance floor can be hit or miss but they do have darts, which is fun.

Mt Rose is OK it is very good for beginners they have a nice long green run and alot of open space. The resort is pretty small and very windy. I will go back since it is only 25 mins from reno and parking is very close to the lifts.

Came here for a ketoy. the spinach was way overcooked and very bitter, the broccoli was cooked okay though. overall it was OK but what i ordered was definitely simple, just vegetables and fish but yet it wasn't what i expected.

Great place for bubble tea. There isn't too many good bubble tea places in the area but this is a popular chain and had quality teas. Staff is great and friendly. Also place is great for studying for social gatherings.

Twice they messed up my appointment time. 3rd time I said adios. The Manager is rude, belligerent and unprofessional. Michelle was a decent enough stylist but got tired of being her therapist hearing her whine about troubles with babysitters, daycare and her mother.

Just enjoyed a spur of the moment dinner at gypsy Blu we decided to stay and were quite happy we did! Excellent waitress food was delish!! Will be back for sure- welcome to the new member of ambler s restaurant community!!
Not sure if these guys have all their friends write good reviews because these sandwiches are tiny, overpriced, and not very good. Sorry guys, just being honest.

Guy with a beard chewing gum- first, spit the gum out and then learn how to sell to your customer. If I were your manager, I would be mad that you let people walk out of your store saying "I'll just go to another verizon store, thanks."

I love to come here for scones with clotted cream and jam. They are normally amazing! Yesterday I visited with a friend from out of town and the scone was overcooked, dark brown and hard around the edges. Please advise staff not to overcook them :(

Carlos did an amazing job with this tattoo! The picture is more than a year after the tattoo and still looks as fresh as when it was brand new. Will definitely be heading in for more work from Carlos!
Food is good and really cheap, but the super sticky floor makes me concerned about the cleanliness of the food preparation area that I can't see. Hence the 4 stars.

The line scenario is a joke. Lie, cheat and steal to be in line 1 or you just wasted 2 hours of your life standing in the sun. There are plenty other places for great live music. Would not recommend the experience.

Decent food but everytime we went it took a while to get our order. It's probably because it is incredibly understaffed. The last time we went the lady messed up and gave us someone elses order but made us pay for the mistake.

only gave them two stars because our waitress Sabrina was awesome. And the man who met us at the door and danced us into the bar was also fantastic. As far as service from those helping Sabrina and speed of service and the band those would have a zero rating.

The roof top concept is a great idea and with live music it was a fun atmosphere with a great view of the mountains. That's the best part. The food is average, nothing special. The fries were the best part, and the cauliflower bites were a fun different.

Just so you know I went to Mike Ford of Couer d'Alene and they were booked solid just like your dealership BUT they had me come back at the end of the day and did the oil change for me. That's what I call service. Not like your company .

I ordered my food to be delivered over an hour passed and I was assured when I ordered they knew where I lived. They told me after waiting an hour and half they will cancel my order because the driver didn't know how to get there. So annoying

My fiancé and i visited here about 4 months ago and it was a pretty decent hotel however The floors in the rooms were filthy and the eggs were watery as heck. They didn't even try to control the amount of people in the pool either.

McDonald's is really feeling the heat from Starbucks as evidenced by this location. It is brand new and it feels like a modern coffee shop, complete with big, comfortable padded chairs and outlets everywhere. Business-types would feel comfortable having meetings here.
I usually have wonderful things to say about honeygrow but the last couple times my meal has had very little chicken and vegetables. It's been mostly noodles.
Beautiful piece of nature in the middle of Santa Barbara, slightly of the beaten path, neighborhood was a little sketchy, next to the train depot. Watch out for the fallen figs.
The Mumbo Gumbo was delicious, but my favorite was the bread pudding! And a bonus that Sno-La is next door to snag a yummy Chantilly Cake snowball if I'm in the mood afterwards!

This is probably one of my favorite restaurants, because of their incredible crepés. Although their food is so good, I hesitate to give The Perch a full 5consuming and demanding, wait times are sometimes simply ridiculous. I love crepes, but two hours is simply too long to wait for lunch.
It's really a sweet spot, there home made juices are to die for my favorite is the carrot juice must try!!!!

Writing this over three months after service was done. No leaks, no complaints from me. The place is not fancy and kind of sketchy, but my windshield was replaced fast, it was not ridiculously expensive, and it's still fine months later.

My favorite nail salon in Santa Barbara. My gel manicure lasts 3-4 weeks every time and everyone is so helpful and nice. I always call ahead to let them know I'm coming or they'll let me know a better time to come in to avoid a wait.

The worst experience ever. The music is extremely loud for a coffee shop. When asked to lower the music they said the speaker was "broken" and the music could not be lowered or turned off per the managers order. I feel like I'm at a nightclub at 11am.

OMG! I am so thankful there is an Asian Grocery Store in St Louis! I just moved out to St. Louis from Southern California and I brought my own Ponzu sauce because I was afraid that I wouldn't be able to get it here. Thank goodness!

The food is EXCELLENT here! The atmosphere is very welcoming and comfortable, my only complaint would be the same as the other reviews I've readaddicts who needed a turning point? We are not judging! Just genuinely curious how the place got the name!

It's great ice cream, but you'll need a second mortgage on your house just to afford a cone. We go there a few times a year when we have a discount coupon and it's still more than we pay for any other equivalent treat in town.
Amazing tacos. We found this place just before moving out of the neighborhood and I've considered going back just for their Tacos al Pastor. So good.
They're idiots here, too. Definitely don't place a Grub Hub order. You at least won't get it per the time window that Grub Hub states, and you may not get it all!
The last time I went their the food was great but the waiter seemed in a bad mood in return my family seemed in a bad mood that ruined the night
Service sucked server sucked then ugh me when asked for management bad and I'm s server from one server to another u sucked
Great pho spot in Indy! You won't find the best pho in the US here, but in the Midwest it will satisfy the beef broth craving. Get some Pho Dac Biet here if you're looking for some lunch!

Was there for a wedding and it was a decent experience~ The hall was nice, nothing special, The food was decent, nothing special, the steak could have been better considering the price, The highlight was the dessert table, now that I could do again!

Cheap drinks and cheap food. They have a lot of space in here to hang out from beat up couches to small tables and a full bar. They have skeeball in the back, pool tables, and darts for you bar game folk. The food is below average bar food though.

Ordered pizza for delivery online...quoted 1 hour and after 2 hours called and was told it had been cancelled because they had called twice with no response...I had 0 missed calls, so i was blatantly lied to by a "supervisor"...worst delivery experience I've ever had.
Got purple head woman screaming at purple head man using the most horrible language I ever heard and she is in charge ? don't go here this place sucks

We were initially pleased with the ease of setting a pickup date for the remaining items but we never received a call-back. We have made arrangements with Alpha Thrift to pick up these items and will do so in the future.
There's something in the pho soup that makes my mouth feel weird after consuming, which is why I'm removing 1 star from this place. Maybe too much msg? I get super thirsty afterwards as well
This was so good. Everyone loved what they had. I had the pork with eggrolls and it was so good that I didn't say a word until my bowl was gone! We will definitely be back!

Food is bland. Low quality. Restaurant needs to be renovated as the booths are torn.. second time coming to give it a second chance and we still felt bad spending $30 for 2 ppl and we barely ate nor enjoyed.

Solid place and a good value. Lots of food and differetn kinds of small plates that were good. Service was a little lacking manager had to come over and answer our questions because the server didn't speak english that well.

I like the atmosphere and the greek salad. I haven't really got much else here but will be back again and again for the greek salad with cucumber ranch . I know it's a brewery but I'm normally here for lunch while working so I haven't ever tried their beers.
While security is always quick and there is hardly any back up at the airline checkand-out airport, but not one you want to linger around in.
everyone should smile and say "How can I help you?" this may be old fashioned but this will make me spend $ here instead of going somewhere else -would only go there if in neighborhood

Pros: Nice decor, ample seating, good servers, good meal portions.. good food, good menu selection, nice margaritas Cons: no kids menu, food taste is good, but not good enough to give you a wow feeling and hence 3 star rating...

A gorgeous restaurant with lovely ambiance. Unfortunately the atmosphere doesn't fully mitigate the service or the food. The eggplant is a disappointment, and though two staff members touted the scratch kitchen - my entree was over sauced with both the wrong sauce and pasta.
I like the Chowfun here its really good and i don't wait long i have it at least twice a mouth

Can't call it a rave. The seats are uncomfortable and they don't put enough butter on the popcorn. But the screens are big, and the projectors are good, and it's five minutes from my house, so whatcha gonna do.
Did not honor posted price. Employee said that sometimes different price tags are put on the front and back of the box, so it may have been flipped around. Ridiculous.
This place is unreal, the bread, the pastry, the coffee, it's kinda hard not to get a dessert or a baguette to go, basically you ll have a small taste of a really good bakery in paris

I'm going to have to go back & try some other things. I had: Asparagus w/ Cheese Fondue Butternut Squash Ravioli w/ Figs Apple Tart with Ice Cream & Caramel Sauce & Black Salt We sat in the bar area. The booth was comfy & the servers were very nice.

Went to lunch today . Disappointed in a few things . They stopped having shrimp awhile back and for lunch their is no calamari or scallops : and had to ask for to go boxes :( . Food was ok . I'm hoping next time is better . Won't do lunch again .

Use their pharmacy only if you don't value your time. You routinely have to wait 20packaged prescription down from the shelf, and that was only after I called them on my phone from the waiting area and asked them to bring the box up to the register.

Food 2 stars Value - 2 stars If I had to choose between Geno's or Pat's, I would choose Geno's because the food came out hot. I will not be returning but if you're in the area you might as well try Geno's and Pat's and decide for yourself.

I stopped by this Dunkin Donuts on West Main Street this morning to pick up a dozen glazed donuts. There was not a line at the drive thru, the donuts were fresh and the employee at the window seemed friendly. Overall it was a decent trip to this Dunkin Donuts.

We decided to try because the good reviews. And oh my !!! Their food is very tasty, made me wish to visit the Mediterranean countries. The service is amazing, I think they also won a reward for their service if I not mistaken I saw in the restaurant.

Ways great food here! Out waitstaff member was more involved watching a infomercial about a power washer, than getting our service on- she seemed distant when she came to the table the first time so we should have guessed her mind was on other things!!
Best breakfast place in uptown hands down if your in west oak lane area this is where breakfast food is at. The best!
It's huge. Between the Court & The Plaza you can literally get everything here it's a giant parking this place is 4 so 3 stars from me!!!

Shan is awesome, so friendly and outgoing even during a rush. I wish we could say the same for her coworker who has a nasty attitude and treated the guests as though they were a nuisance instead of a customer. Go Shan!

I've tried on 3 seperate occassions to eat here and I somehow get thwarted each time. All I want is a beef pie but everytime I get there they apparently decide that they didn't feel like cooking for the last THREE HOURS of being open. Super inconvenient, don't bother.

Great seafood and the best onion rings ever! We ordered the Thursday special fried haddock buy one get one free, sample oyster platter and the grouper sandwich; everyone was happy with their order and will be back to try more!!!!

Went in this past Saturday and I had such a great experience. Everyone was so kind and knowledgable. With me being gluten free, I was worried I would leave empty handed but they had plenty of options and knew exactly what to recommend! Love it! Definitely going back

The cover is pricey but this is a great bar for the 25$10 cover, $5.00+ for a drink, $20 to get a song played, etc. It's definitely not a cheap venue, but for something that doesn't include a techno theme and disco ball, it is a good choice!

It's probably been years since I've been back to the original cafe du monde. I feel like they been slowly going down hill. Maybe they cut back on some ingredients, or perhaps they had a off day, but it was kind of stale and don't have that doughy fresh place
The theater is not as cool as it was when the dragon worked, the service from the concessions staff, especially from the Yogunfruz was really sub-par!!

Don't be fooled by the restaurants name. I'm sorry but if you're like me who enjoys a good Italian pizza and a crispy crust then don't come here. Ordered a large combo. Sauce was bland. Cheap style pizza. Would not recommend

I'm giving this Starbucks and the morning crew demanding conditions. I've seen horrible service at other Starbucks with just a dozen people in the store. This morning crew deserves a bonus and it shows how important it is to have the right person as a manager.

I loved this place! The food was great! Definitely check it out. I didn't like the parking arrangements because of the restaurant being in an apartment complex so you have to drive for a while to find some one whose leaving...so it's a pain in the butt!
Chinese- riverside New Jersey Not bad, food is just ok, very nice people, ribs aren't like others, meaty, just not great tasting. Shrimp I don't care for

Good beer, bad food. "Shepherds Pie" stew from a can with excessive celery, with some Worcestershire to hide the taste, covered in a white goop pretending to be potatoes. Pizza on under cooked wheat "pastry". Arrive hungry and you're fine. A little effort on the food would improve things.

Very pleasantly surprised by this restaurant. It has a nice upscale look and diverse menu with a little bit of everything when it comes to Asian food. The servers do their jobs without asking or interrupting your meal
We go this place for many years, it used to be a good place for dinner, but check your bill before you pay, they over charged us, sorry you lose the royal customer.

Good service but it seems that it's a place to just come for the atmosphere and the history because the food was mediocre and consisted of mostly overpriced sandwiches. The bruschetta and shrimp remoulade were decent, but the sandwiches were mostly just bread. Inner courtyard is nice.

This place doesn't look all that but the food is very good the Thai tea is one of my favorites Parking sucks but when I order for pickup I just pull up in front people can eat me Pretty reasonable prices

Good coffee really sweet service. As a local I can see it being the neighborhood spot, as an out of Towner it just seemed like a "green" coffee shop on side of the road. Wouldn't go out of my way to go back but it was cool to visit.
Excellent food and service exactly what you are looking for in a burrito joint clean fast and filling definitely a spot to checkout when I'm the area we will definitely be back

Very slow service. We had to wait 45 minutes for food and service and once we were waited on the delivery of our food was slow as well. I was very disappointed with this location - I have gone to other locations and like them much better.

the delivery guy was rude. since i ordered on grub hub, you can add tip on the app when u checkout. he said "no tip" and i said the tip was included and he said "no" considering i paid money, im pretty sure i know what i paid. but thanks.

The bar was cool and staff nice but this is the only reason this isn't a 1 Star. I just ordered nachos and after powering through half of them I was so full of grease I was almost sick. Sorry Michael's but never again.

Nasty bedroom, they don't change the sheets unless you ask them, breakfast is disgusting, elevator is slow, hallways look like a crack house/Brooklyn projects, and phones don't work in your rooms. It's a nasty place.

Excellent food and cocktail list. Good variety of tacos and a cool laid back atmosphere. Food quality was great. Only criticism is it is expensive for the portion sizes, but since the quality is great I am willing to pay for it.

Awesome outdoor area, friendly staff and decent crowd. Not usually over crowded like Brenda's or other hipster hot-spots, and a good mix of hipsters and townies that leads to a great night. 3 dollar city wides

She has literally anything you can think of in this store. Super affordable, QUALITY products. Vania is so sweet and helpful if you aren't sure what your looking for she can definitely steer you in the right direction ! Highly recommend this place.

Tried something new while visiting Tucson for the first time. I definitely recommend smash burger. They got our food out super quickly and super nice to us when we took a moment to look at the menu. Would definitely visit again.

nice place.. super clean and very nice staff, the owner comes by to see how everyone is and if they like their order. The waffle fries are amazing.. seasoned goodness.. yummmm Chocolate chip pankacke is more like chocolate center filled pancake.. im not complaining : )

Ramen bowl was slightly above average but this place became a sit down place and for lunch it cost $15 including tip for a regular bowl of ramen. Very expensive for a bowl of noodles. I will not be going there for lunch.

awful. driver cursed other cab drivers prior to and during our ride. drove aggressively. had on no "air" circulating in van on humid night in NOLA, but when asked to do something about it, said "too many whiskeys" . never again.
Jared and his team had me in and out in a jiffy! I drive from Lebanon for my oil changes at this location and I'm always more than satisfied with the level of service every visit. I highly recommend!

The food never came ordered at 6:45 and writing this at 9:45 pm. No apology, can't reach them after they don't pick up the phone after letting it ring 5 times just to disconnect it. I guess they don't need customers. Hopefully I'll get a refund, smh
Nice cafe to hangout for deserts and cold drink. I had the pina coco cream on a frozen small half pineapple shell but I think it was pricey for $20! Or else I'd give it a 4 stars.

Ordered a selection of cigars nearly three weeks ago and paid for express delivery and still haven't received them. Called customer service and the representative stated it was an error on there part and would have them shipped next day. I'm still waiting for them...

A unique find! Looked like fast food in a strip center, BUT it was a family owned, family serviced, high quality food place with great tasting Cajun food! Where else can you go where the husband and wife come check on you? Great find!
I was lured in my the great taste of their bourbon chicken, and as I'm eating I find a dead fly in my food. It appears as if it was cooked in with it.

This is a lovely little place right on the Delaware River. The food is good, but not great. We were hungry and it was getting late, so we decided to enjoy the view and assumed the food wouldn't be too bad, we were right on both counts.

Slow service, no silverware until we flagged down a random server, no designated server in the bar, my drink was terrible and made incorrectly... what kind of Mexican restaurant can't make a margarita correctly? I won't go back and I regret that I even left a tip.
Worst experience and my nails are ugly she didn't listen to anything I asked for she wanted to over charge me for something I didn't even want
Staff very unprofessional!!!! Do not recommend that spot there are plenty of other places in philly with good customer service and better food & drink!
As this restaurant is known by locals as the goboy, but a couple drawbacks from a fully satisfied launch were that the po boys were quite expensive and you had to pay cash only.

We did the ghost tour with Stacy. She was very informative, entertaining, and professional. Despite the fact a parade was going on the next street over, she projects and enunciates well, so we never had trouble hearing her. We really enjoyed the tour and would recommend it to anyone!

Good wings. Sandwich portions are huge. There is such a thing as too much bacon so you will need a taste cleanser if you order a BLT - avoid the green beans as this has too much butter/oil; opt for broccoli instead. Good food overall.
Can we say fish tacos! Yummy you must try them. Not much going on in Continental Ranch as far as food but this little place has great service and stands out as a great place to dine!
Excellent service! I needed a custom hoodie for a last-minute present and they were able to whip it up for me in about a half hour. Very friendly, and the print turned out great!
The food is fine. It is NEVER ready in the time they say it will be. This is the 4th time I have ordered from here and it takes more than twice whatever time they tell you.
The meal was good. We had the pho and special vermicelli. The soursop smoothie we ordered was not good and tasted powdery, disappointed and quite sweet even though we asked for half sweetness.
We were in the area and it was brunchtofriendly options, unless you are in the sweet mood for challah french toast, which looked amazing. The restaurant has a nice ambience and it is BYO.

Most flavorful sandwich I have had in IV a long while. Had Lizzy's Lips with stuffed jalepeno poppers - couldn't really taste the poppers so could've done without adding that for an extra charge. Despite this, super yummy! I am craving going back!

Definitely one of the worst Dunkin experiences I've had. I never write these reviews like ever, but I've tried time and time again to go back here and hope for better service, but they're always unfriendly and quality of food and coffee is either always wrong or just not great.

I don't know if it normal for someone to fart while taking your order then scratching their ass at mission bbq, but that's what happend. That was really weird but looking past that the food was good. probably wont come here again until that weirdo is fired.

Good food that's just a little bit on the adventurous side. The menu was a little bit too hard to navigate as a vegetarianwould have been easier for a vegan in some ways. Side dishes, drinks, and dessert were best for me. Outdoor seating was nice.
The food was delicious and my patron margarita was on point the waiter was extremely nice and her service was the best definitely my favorite chili's and spot to eat extremely recommend this place

I have been trying to recoup $2100.00 that was taken from my account on behalf of this business and the services they charged for were NEVER RECEIVED!! I have called at least 1-2 times per week for 3 months with continuous run around and no resolution. Be careful!!!!
Funky name, Good food, Great prices! Hard to beat! Have to admit I thought the concept of Korean and Mexican fusion seems pretty odd, but it's all Korean when it comes to flavor! Awesome!

We enjoyed this restaurant, Smoked salmon platter was really good, my daughter had a avocado and shrimp wrap for lunch which was sooo yummy. Right in front of the Marina with beautiful views. Nice experience overall!!

Best burger around, however when the owner Ayman is not around they have trouble bringing out the fries & burger together. Fries arrived 10 minutes after burger. Owner needs to spend more time at restaurant or replace his cook. Not the first time I've had this experience.

This place is quick and consistent. It's a sandwich place, they do it well. Always exactly the same, nice delivery people. It's my go to easy place when I'm hungry but don't want to pay lots of money or deal with complicated restaurants.

Horrible experience! Purchased a mother of the bride dress in a size 4 Wondering why I didn't go directly to China if I wasn't getting any services from the local business. I have 3 more children - Would go elsewhere next time.
I don't know what all the hype is about because I really didn't care for these donuts or the cinnamon rolls. Just my opinion.

Woody's barbecue, and it isn't named incorrectly one bit. Anything and everything you could imagine on a grill, they're serving it top quality and in good quantities. Be sure to stop here anytime you're craving barbecue, or just want to experience one of the best atmospheres in the Goodland area.

Food is good but service is slow at best and the staff will literally ignore you. It is so bizarre to eat out and get the cold shoulder from the owner of a business u are trying to give money to. Very poor customer service.
Their cake is good. Yeah, they deserve two more stars just for the cake alone - but that still doesn't bring it up to 5 stars. They need to ONLY serve cake.

This store supports nazism. The store sells nazi trinkets - when we confronted the staff they were rude to us and clearly lacking empathy to my Jewish boyfriend who's grandma was a concentration camp survivor.
The sales people are super friendly and not overly pushy the products are okay but a bit over priced in my opinion for a store that has discount in the name.

Chipotle gets a big "meh" from me. I admit I might be hard on them because of their reputation for being amazing, but I just find it to be okay. And yes, I do get to pick all of my ingredients, but I've been 3free!

I went in with my family for the breakfast buffet it was so disgusting food I ever had everything was cold and food was hard and naughty. No refills for drinks I will never go back again . The waitress was so rude and no good service.
line is ridiculously long. Lol, so if you looking for someplace to grab a quick bite to eat you better look somewhere else unless you want to wait half an hour for a burger..

Went here for lunch with 4 people. Cons: condiments not in the right place and a lot were empty at opening Not offered drinks Bathroom clean -Fresh ingredients Probably wouldn't come back but really happy that there is a hot pot option on the South side.
My office is up the street from Michael's, and it used to be our gofree" is, and were not able to tell me if their Ranch dressing was gluten-free or not.

My go to taco spot, the food is excellent and creative they sell beer so that's a plus I can eat from everyday lol the customer service is also great give them a try trust me you won't be disappointed

The location is great & the place is really cute. The massage was good. I'd suggest they change the sign at the back door if it's not an entrance, put on their site & literature if they charge additional credit fees, & put signs up if they have suggested tipping.

This place has been the go to Pizza place at Clearwater beach for decades. They don't make the best Pizza in my opinion, but they are always consistent and many people seem to love it. This is more Greek style Pizza, and I prefer a thinner crust.

Ordered to-go: large hot n sour soup and moo shu pork. Brought home to SLO only to discover the soup was a cup and this was the saltiest moo shu I've ever had. Also the mushrooms weren't the traditional black, they were generic button. Overall disappointing . Pffft.

Stopped in for the first time today for breakfast and had a wonderfully inventive and delicious meal. Kitchen was backed up but they told us that when we arrived, so we got a table outside, enjoyed our coffees until breakfast arrived. Worth the wait!
The food is good and I might even return again if it were not for the horrible aroma permeating throughout the place!

The service was so bad; no utensils and no napkins, even though they knew we were staying at a hotel. They also forgot to deliver our mango lassi, waited an hour for it to come, and of course it came without a straw. The food was not bad.
I give this ALDI 5 stars, it's really clean, and very bright, shelves were fully stocked, and all of the fruit is fresh, no they don't have Apple Pay yet
Food and service was good, My wife was in the hospital and it was convenient to walk from, I will be going back during future visits, I would recommend this place to others.

Food and service is what you would expect from a bar/tavern. I was here with a large group and the food was good but the service was slow but not at the fault of the server. There should of been another server assign to the group.
I'm completely shocked to see this place has good reviews. The food was terrible, the restaurant was dirty and the only thing lining up to eat here were the flies, literally there were tons. Yuck.
This was my first time ever at a Buffalo Wild Wings maybe a burger next but it certainly wouldn't be my first choice of places.

The atmosphere is quite nice; the barristers not exactly welcoming; the coffee warm ; the flourish on the top of the coffee priced . With so many coffee places to choose from, I chose this one. I won't go back.
Put the doors back on the bathroom please. I love Barnes and Nobles but really, I don't want to hear the man with diarrhea while I'm in the bathroom because you all took the doors off.

This is an update for the previous review I wrote. After writing an email to the Siena, we were contacted and set up with a comped suite for a weekend of our choice. The suite was very nice and we had a much better time.
They shouldn't get no stars- this is the worst Wendy's on the Westbank there not professional one bit with the customer service here
Not bad, a bit overpriced Ravs are very good, I had the Tuscan Fettuccine, can't complain, service was good, and salad was one of the best I've had in a long time.

Do not waste your time with this rude management and understaffed restaurant! I was treated so poorly and was told that if I didn't like the fact that we got skipped 3 times for the same table size we could just leave.

Busy which I thought was a good sign but the shape of my nails was careless and more of what she wanted rather than what I requested. They have a lot of powder dip colors but I wouldn't say they have perfected their technique.
went to get my hair colored its been years, the service was ok. just was left w no type of magazines or anything to read, kind boring, not very personable, id go back maybe try again.
Employees service was good but result of my manicure was really bad and not worth of paying $100 in Houston, TX, , , so disappointed

This place was awesome from top to bottom. The food was delicious and the prices were very reasonable. The staff recognized that we were from out of town so they gave us suggestions on kid-friendly places we might want to take our child.

See my tip. While I really like my doctor and think she is knowledgeable and very caring, everything else that goes along with an office visit here is generally substandard. Another tip would be to get the first available appointment so that they don't fall too far behind schedule.

The food is always fresh, plentiful and tasty. The staff is friendly, courteous and remembers us . Slowly we have been ordering other things off the menu instead of just the standard pho and vermicelli and everything has been delicious. Also byob.

Totally understaffed on a Friday night. More like a circus rather than a night out. Hostess seemed frazzled and totally clueless. I drive by this place all the time but not worth the time or money and aggravation on a poorly run business.

Tried to go here for dinner but we had to leave after being sat because when we went to order we were told that they wouldn't accommodate for food allergies. It's a shame they aren't inclusive to people with food restrictions.
Complete let down. The name implies an elite voodoo shop, but there are many more that are equal to and superior to Marie laveaus. An ok stop, but definitely doesn't represent NOLA voodoo culture.

Nice part of town but if you are attending a soccer tourney at The Family Sports Park look for something else. Very uptight management. Not team friendly. Take your money elsewhere. I am Hilton Diamond and couldn't be more disappointed in this location.

Ok, not really my kind of food, but I took a friend of mine who was last there like 30 years ago!! She said nothing had really changed and loved it. Everything was good and it has a nice little bar for enjoying a cocktail.
Service was slow and our waitress as well as the hostess seemed disinterested particularly the hostess Food was good Beer was good But overall things just did not flow and it did not seem very busy
Very disappointed in this place. Ribs: tough as shoe leather and didn't have that smokey spicy but bland, broccoli saladok, Mac and cheese not much better than ez Mac with mushy noodles.

I called a cab at 12:30 and it was going to pick us up in 15 minutes but 1 hour and 15 minutes later it still has yet to arrive. As little Tampa cab experience as I have I am fairly confident there has to be better options.

They did an amazing job hemming and taking in my scrubs that I needed to start my nursing classes on Monday! 2 sets of scrubs perfectly altered in 3 days . Will be going back for anything I need altered in the future!

Really awesome atmosphere. The food for the price is great they have a few dishes where if you order one you can take another meal home for free. The portions are very generous for dinner and dessert.

They have a courtesy call system where they are supposed to call you 20up that cal. I was in the shower and then because the guy went somewhere else, had to wait 2hours to make sure you don't miss them.

The owner contacted me and said my dish didn't appear to be made correctly, and provided a refund. I'll give them another try in the future the menu has a lot of great options and I'm hopeful that I'll like them next time!

Disgusting. First I was grossed out the my drink tastes like mold, then I opened my breakfast sandwich and it's burnt to death. It's not that hard to use your brain - "If I wouldn't eat this, I shouldn't serve it to a customer"

We went because of our love for Gordon Ramsey! We enjoyed our experience. Tried new food and had the pleasure of being served by one of the longtime waiters who was in the episode we saw. Beautiful atmosphere and eclectic customers. Worth the trip and befriending this local establishment!

This is a good place to go to a "classy" strip mall restaurant when you are entertaining cheap friends who don't want to spend a fortune on a meal. It doesn't dazzle and it doesn't disappoint. It's 2.5 stars, but Yelp requires rounding up to 3.
Pretty solid Mexican style dishes cooked in a home kitchen style. The food doesn't bowl you over with flavor or presentation but still far out strips the Taco Bell's of the world.
I could not understand the person doing my toes. Very frustrating. Also they want you to pay cash for services as they charge a fee to use your debit card or a credit card

Tried out this restaurant for philadelphia restaurant week it was okay, nothing special. I had the Gnocchi w/ tomato sauce, fresh bazil and mozzarella as my entree the only decent one was the cannoli. All in all, the food was okay restaurant week day.
We arrived at 8 pm on a day they close at 8:30 and were told they wouldn't serve us because they had a "situation" ridiculous!
Their food has always been excellent but tonight it took 45 minutes for a take out order after I was told 20 minutes. Wish my service was better!

Perfect lunch spot ~ we ordered an iced latte, hot latte, crab avocado toast, pumpkin soup, Autumn salad, and chicken sandwich. All were fresh and delicious! The service was wonderful. Very fair pricing and nice portions. Clean restrooms. Followed Covid protocols. Thanks for having us!

Based on the single drink I had I should have either gotten a beer or not pissed off the bartender. I think I got a revenge pour as that thing was way too strong to be a normal drink, let alone a cocktail. Not cool.
The place is good the service is good, but I would not come back just because the steaks didn't taste well. The pork ribs were terrible, we had to return them. The onion soup was delicious though.
Horrible and inconsistent service. They don't speak English and it seems as though they make fun of their customers by the sarcastic faces and laughs made after interactions. Go elsewhere.
I would give a zero star if I could. The lady bartender we had yesterday was THE WORST bartender I've ever met and so rude to me and my husband. We wont be back if she is working there!

The staff is very kind and nice, but the service was very slow when there weren't a lot of people there and the food was generally bleh. I really wanted to like this place because everyone was so lovely, but it just didn't measure up. 2/5 for kindness.

i signed in to order new contacts and after waiting for 30 minutes or so, i practically had to ask for help. there were a couple of employees sitting on a laptop blithely unaware that there were customers waiting. i will be going elsewhere for my next eye exam.

Do not eat here!! Used to eat here regularly however, went this past Sunday and got food poisoning. It is now Tuesday night and I'm still dealing with it, may have to go to the ER, seems like E. coli to me so please beware!

Just another Chinese buffet. My rating is a 2 because of the false advertising, and the fact that the buffet wasn't that good. If you want to serve 10% Brasillian cuisine and a rest is all Mexican, don't call your restaurant the Brasil buffet... make sense?

I came here with a coworker asked our waiter to close the door, they took about thirty minutes to do it because the chef wanted to keep it open. Um, we're the customers and environment counts when dining. Note for the staff. The food was great though!
Excellent service. Great lunch buffet. I'm a fan of Indian food and this place can definitely hold its own against some of the better Indian restaurants here in Las Vegas.

They should shut this place down i've ordered plenty of things from here and every time I come the order is always wrong!!! Always! I don't know if it's the management or what but they need to get their act together.
Size is great and building is new but overpriced cheap and disgusting food/beverages make this a no-go as far as I am concerned. Will be pushing my company to never book here again.
Delish food! We got a large plain pizza and the pasta Bella, which is penne with crabmeat and shrimp in a vodka sauce. Everything was very tasty and the service was great!

We drove 45 minutes to get there based on the great reviews, I tried the banana cream, filling was good, the bottom crust had a cardboardy texture which was hard, my guess is they overworked the dough. I ate the filling left the crust, and honestly will not be back.

You might want to bus your outside a little more. Our time sitting here has been shared with a couple of kids who not only bought no drinks but also smoked cigarettes non-stop and openly drank booze from a half pint. Classy.
This store really has some good deals on home decor you may never think of to add some flair to a room.

You know those mornings you wake up and your brain knows you can't handle ALL the memories from the night before so it gives you bits and pieces each hour. Well, that's what happened with Greg's. Did we go to Greg's? Oh my god we did.
The food was phenomenal!! Would definitely go there again even with how busy it was on 4th of July weekend the service was still great and fast.
This is an amazing place, treat yourself to the freshest ice cream made right as you watch, that's right rolled to your liking and flavors

It was ok. Had the fried green tomatoes, which I was disappointed in, because they were not green. Just a red tomato deep fried. The hog fish was good fried but the grilled had to many tomato garlic stuff on top that over powered the fish. Overall disappointed
We had a great time for date night with really amazing sushi and great service ... we are not front ey area so it was a shot in the dark but ended up being a great experience all around d

Great atmosphere, real old school diner. Awesome food. Best classy breakfast I have ever had! The only reason that this place does not get a 5 star review is that the booth sitting is a little too old school, mine and my friend's was broken.

They get 2 stars for service. The staff fails to deliver proper customer service or follow instructions. I love Capriottis yet each time I visit this location they forget something in the sandwich or just find it difficult to believe that I would like my slightly toasted.

Food excellent, 1800 year old lady who has her grandchildren package the takeout, never smiles and makes you feel she is doing you a favor letting you eat there not so good. Food five stars old lady one star.
The closing of a drive-through by putting a car facing the wrong direction is not a way to entice loyal customers. Low class move.

Everything I try here is solid. The garlic bread cheesesteak and wings are simply amazing! The service is always friendly polite, the beer selection has it's fair share of craft brews, and the prices are fair.
Very slow service - it took the server almost 30 minutes just to get a pepsi not to mention our food and the restaurant was not very busy. Sushi did not taste fresh and looked pale.
Excellent food, great customer service, drive thru is a huge convenience A+ I got the sesame beef it was very good and a good price for the quality and quantity
Good fish and chips, although the fact that they used Guinness for the fish beer batter didn't really do much for me.

Absolutely delicious vegan place in West Philly. The sheer atmosphere inside is enough to make you want to come back but after tasting the food, there's no question about it! The seitan was cooked perfectly and the veggies were so fresh and yummy as well :)

Enjoyed the Union Burger made medium well with cheese, arugula, pickled onion, tomato, bacon jam ) on a brioche and their water was served in mason jars. Service was good and the ambience was pretty decent for Tucson. I would come back again. ;)

I wish I could leave a review for ABC 1Tree, however a different company, subcontracted through them showed up without notice, and did a sub standard job. It's a few months later, and I'm having to find another company to do the same job again.

Updating this review as a Cenlar representative contacted us on Yelp after reading our message and the issue was resolved very quickly . That said, I would recommend making resolutions accessible when people contact them directly rather than having to go through a third party platform.

Ice cream was just ok. Nothing good nothing bad. My concern was that on the first day of MANDATORY wearing of masks that during our visit two customers came in and were served without masks. Think we will try someplace else.

You get what you pay for. They do have electrical outlets and WiFi. DC is much more organized. Philly says they pick you up at 30th Street Station but it's on the road across from the station and sadly, there is very little organization regarding boarding.

The food was good I have to give them that but when we were the only ones there at night, they had a little conversation right behind the counter next to the table. And let me tell you, it wasn't quiet.

Definitely part of the New Orleans experience. Muffaletta sandwich was giant, flavorful, but tart and not balanced. Décor is bare-bones tired and shabby and crowded, and the place was hygeinic but not clean, but that's ok for a sandwich joint.

decent food with decent selection but over priced ridiculously I guess because of the neighborhood its in but still the same 1.50 candy I got from them I could have gotten from a papi store for 75 cents.

So sad they removed brunch from their weekend menu and raised prices. The breakfast sandwich is still available but it doesn't come with potatoes so the only option is to order a side of fries for an extra cost. Really disappointed.

I think the Philadelphia stores have a larger selection but the man who waited on me was very knowledgeable and didn't try to sell me something that wouldn't work for my dog. An honest and knowledgeable salesperson? How refreshing! High-end dog food and toys available.
We got a pitcher of beer without any individual glasses like we asked, so I went up to the bar to ask for some empty glasses. Her response: "Are you kidding me right now?" Enough said.

going to the courtesy diner is definitely an experience! It's best if you go late at night for some good people watching. Overall it's a fun place, the foods nothing to write home about and it's a little dirty, but it has lots of character!

Angela is freaking incredible. She is so informative, knowledgeable and kind. She really knows her stuff and has such helpful, objective feedback. Everyone has to go here as part of their dress-buying experience even if just to learn more about what you really want!
The pecan french toast was great. I saw pictures prior for the kitchen sink and couldn't wait to try but it fell short for me in what I expected and it was very salty.

I hate selfcheckouts. I hate it so much I am boycotting Meijer from now on. They do have a decent selection of skin care lines, but their prices aren't that great, and the service is only semi-helpful. Over it!

I wanted to love this place and went three times before deciding I can't go back. My nails look great and the dip lasts 3 weeks but each time, a dip manicure takes 1 hr 45 minutes I hope the technician can learn how to file without hurting clients.
I thought this was traditional Korean bbq and it wasn't. If you want to pay for every little dish and side dishes that you would get for free in Seoul come here.
I would have given it All Stars except they price gouge, by rushing you through the line so quickly you don't even realize that you've been overcharged
Great iHop, even tho their all the same, this one is nicer and doesn't smell like rotten eggs and Bibles like the rest of them. Overall, okay for an iHop. 3 stars.
The sesame chicken was fantastic but everything else was just okay. Guang Zhou has pretty good fried rice flavor4 people and that there is not currently any seating in the restaurant at this time.

I was shocked when I ate here, in a completely fantastic way. The food was exquisite, the service was incredibly friendly, and I left feeling extremely full, and I'm so ready to drive an hour back there for more.
Usually have a great stay, felt a little busy this last time and the attention seems to have faded a bit.
They have washing machines but apparently have no change. I'm not sure what sense that makes and they have no manager on duty to get the change from the machines. Sounds pretty foolish to me.

Went to rent a boat today and really felt like I was bothering the people there. When I asked to rent a Tritoon and the guy walked out and asked another employee if they had any Tritoons that were running I knew it was not the place for me.

After eating here for five years and being pleased with both service and food, it is definitely time to give 5 stars. Favorites include the seasoned tofu app, the fresh spring rolls, and of course the pho.

I have given this salon several chances, but once my foot was literally rubbed to bleeding as I tried to tell a new employee to stop. The next time I got a fungal infection on my toe that has resulted in losing my toenail.
this place is not the hype that people make it out to be they overload the sandwiches it's disgusting, and on top of that when I went there I did not see some of the employees wearing gloves
was there last night for new years eve and sat at the bar, had food and drink, the bartender was horrible

The food is amazing and the Service is great. We ordered the Shrimp Fried Rice, Sushi w/spicy tuna and salmon, with a side of the Shrimp Tempura appetizer, and the Seaweed Salad. Everything was delicious.

It's by far one of the better M&3s in town and the Sunday brunch while not cheap has always had a tasty and diverse selection. They got a little love going on there-I mean as much as possible for a buffet. Parking and seating are limited.

I have been working with DMS for several years and there are always problems. Always. They are always waiting on someone else and blaming someone else and they do not follow up on outstanding items in a timely manner. It is absolutely ridiculous.
I'm sorry but this was not a good experience. Food was not good, old decor, clueless staff, nothing special going on here at all just a strip mall chinese noodle place.

This is usually one of my favorite places, but something was really off in the kitchen tonight. One of my standards - the Avocado BLT salad didn't have the same good flavor in the dressing and they were really skimpy with the bacon and lettuce. Disappointing for sure. :(

Outstanding! Rear sprocket froze up. Called this shop, brought bike in and within 10 minutes the problem was fixed, and for a price more reasonable than I would have imagined. Extremely experienced technician who was more than accommodating and more importantly, he knew his stuff!

Amazing! The customer service is top notch. They missed my call when I wanted to place an order for pick up and someone called me back 2 min later! Definitely not something they had to do, but it really impressed me. I highly recommend this place. Get the egg scramble!

If you've tried Popeyes before, then this is no different. Middlinggood, this is pretty basic fast food. Note to franchisee/company: ditch the tip option at your till; it's very inappropriate for a fast food restaurant which offers only counter service. Meh.

I tried the pumpkin pancakes, crab cake with bacon slaw, apple beignet, country fried steak, and fresh OJ . The ambiance is very southern fresh comfort style. Other important info: most side streets have free 75 min parking, located on busy State Street, small interior and exterior, gets crowded pretty early.

This is a horrible place. Don't ever go here. It's a wonder how Sheriff Gusman, a Harvard graduate, could oversee an institution that has been condemned repeatedly by the Department of Justice. Im giving it two stars because illegal drugs are easier to get inside than out.
Good to see Latin American cuisine in a upscale environment. The service was great the visual presentation of our meal was superb, however the food was pleasing yet could have been refined.

If you want to pay money to sit in a chair that's about to break to watch a movie on a screen slightly larger than your TV, then this is the place for you. If not, I would suggest waiting for the DVD release.

Loved the happy hour dishes and drinks so much that we decided to go back the next day for their brunch buffet. Great service, lovely decor and music. I wish this place was in LA so I could go more often! I'll be back the next time I visit.

Nothing spectacular about either the food or service here. Our server was very friendly and relatively attentive, but one of our food orders was delivered 5 minutes later than the rest of the table. I've had better experiences at other BJ's.

This Starbucks is not for people who like a friendly staff. They were not rude but they were not like the type of staff I am used to having at my CA Starbucks. So if you don't mind that, then this is a good Starbucks.

Meh..weird, rubbery chicken and flavor lacking broth. If you want some soup while at the mall, it's an ok option, but if you want some real tasty pho, then skip this place. The small size was plenty big for me.

The service here is great and all, but for the love of god, please save your money and go eat somewhere else. The only item on the menu I would willingly order is the salsa, besides that, it's a waste of stomach space and money.

Loved everything except one thing, , , Who in their right mind would put cold holindays sauce over a beautiful hot breakfast??!! That killed the whole thing for me. Loved the vibe, coffee, and food was high quality. But cold sauce killed it for me.
