Food is 5 stars, only come here if you want to get it "to go", don't bother dining in, since they make To-go orders first.
Unfortunately if you go out the walnut side entrance, there will be people asking you for money and homeless people sleeping.
As service was great the food tastes like it was cooked earlier in the day and nuked and then served to me over all bad

I have made the mistake of going here twice for routine blood work. The test results were not ever sent to the requesting physicians, but they didn't mind billing my insurance and taking my money. I should have heeded the negative reviews.

Great locations, nice front desk staff. Dirty rooms and I even think I saw dried up blood on my comforter - although, at that point, that would be the last thing I saw that surprised me in New Orleans.
The BEST roast beef poboys in the city. Restaurant not much to look at, but everything I've gotten here has been good, but I just keep going back to the roast beef!

Honestly this is the worst dealership, they will set you up with the worst financing that will set you back for years. They don't listen to your requirements for sale. I deeply regret involving myself with this company.

This place was so frikkin good, from the music to the food, even our service was impeccable - and our server was juggling us and a huge party, our drinks were never empty. Best ribs I've ever had in my life. Highly recommend!
We paid a visit to this place in the first evening of our stay in New Orleans for Mardi Gras 2019. The waiting line was crazy. Tip: wait on the takesee!

The entire building smelled like fabuloso, I order strawberry banana French toast and had to order a separate side of eggs and sausage. Which was all very cold and dry once we received it 25 mins after ordering. Got home still hungry because food was not appetizing.

I've been going here a couple years it took me a year to find a place I like now I travel about 40 min to get them done. It's worth it they are nice sunny & Angie as well!! Always a good vibe in there thanks guys !!

I really wanted to love Johnny Sanchez, but I wasn't blown away. The chips and salsas were good, the shrimp ceviche was delicious, but none of our group was too thrilled with our actual main courses. All in all, it was ok. Not a memorable meal but not terrible.
I gave them a two because this is the second time that I went there and the service was slow, the waiter charged the wrong amount to my friend's credit card and the food was not all that great.
I loved the 7-item vegetarian sampler plate, but the bread it comes with is spongy in texture and has little taste. Maybe it's an acquired taste. I had never eaten Ethiopian food before.
Food was excellent. Best drunken noodles I have had in a while. They were a bit understaffed during our visit which delayed service and our order but the quality of the food was good
I love this place. The coffee is amazing as is the hot chocolate you can even bring your dog in to hang out with you. but the best part; TABLE TOP MISS PACMAN!!!!!
Shaved my sons hair when he asked for a trim ! Horrible experience... they didn't listen to what was needed and also left him with a buzz cut which was not what he wants !
Winn Dixie - North Dale Mabry I will no longer shop at your store as you are not wiping down the carts due to COVID virus.
They are always so awesome! I deliver food with DoorDash and many times they have given me a free dessert or something to drink as I wait on an order. Their salads are DELICIOUS too!

One of my favorite places to go with the family service is always excellent salad is always clean and they are very reasonable. Would recommend it to anybody in the Tampa area for a visit. The more people you bring the less it costs!
the food is so good and the employees are so kind and professional. however it was WAY too hot inside, so i can only imagine how the employees behind the counter feel working in those conditions.
Nice customer service but horrible wait times. Even if you have an appointment you can expect to wait at least an hour for a doctor instead of about 2 hours without an appointment.

Well. On the plus side seating was immediate Thats it. Wrong order Missed side Chicken sandwhich with a slice of chicken breast that cover 20% of bun What is it about Avon? Second chance. Never again.
Doesn't even deserve one star. We got here when it wasn't busy at all and the drinks came out late and the food took an hour. Absolutely ridiculous. They weren't all that friendly either.
Really nice store, very new and well stocked. The employees were very knowledgeable and helpful, and the fitting room staff went out of their way to make sure I had what I needed.
Sooo yummy!! Staff is nice and very helpful :) they had a ton of options to choose from and helped me pick out delicious combinations.

I absolutely love this place! Brunch is on point and the staff is wonderful. They always remember you and despite the crazy covid world we all are experiencing; they continue to give top notch services with a smile behind the mask they wear.
I'm only giving it two stars because it's Taco Bell. This particular location is terribly slow and they have messed up my order the 3 times that I have gone there. It's upsetting :(

I love Bakersfield. They get so busy with customers, but maintain excellent service. I have visited many times, but tonight, I noticed all of the following staff provide excellent service: Alaina, AMP, Jeff, Sam, and Marshall. Thank you all for your hard work and top notch customer service.

Great beer selection . Good little neighborhood bar with food. Wish they still did all you can eat crab legs even though it was one of the more expensive places in the area for grabs. Definitely stop buy if you are looking for a good bottle selection to take home.
I really wanted to like Tulip Noir. As a vegan, I was excited to see several vegetarian options on their menu that could easily be made dairyrun restaurant.

Had a hot sausage poppy, my wife had the oyster poorboy absolutely oyster sandwich was really good, the hot sausage Po boy was OK. For two sandwiches and a drink at $36 I won't come back. Staff was excellent
Absolutely fantastic the food is incredible and the service and staff is great definitely hands down the best German restaurant in Tampa bay we will definitely be back a lot!!!!!!

Don't waste your time or money! If I could minus stars that's what they would get! Place is a fire hazzard & they guys behind the counter make fun of the customers that just left Go some place where they know what they're doing!
Pretty tasty pulled pork BBQ sand wedge. Very meaty and the bread was fantastic, but I could see it getting soggy if u don't eat it right away.

Ordered the Sampler everything in it tasted stale, as if it was sitting out & had been cooked hours ago. Hope this was due to lack of heavy traffic due to COVID, but still not acceptable to not cook food to order.
I went to Nora License Branch on North Merdian and was pleasantly surprised as to the cleanliness, professionalism and the wait time was under 10 minutes

Tess does a great job she really listens to what you want done but also makes sure to provide recommendations to ensure your hair is protected. I have been going to Tess for years and really trust her expertise. I really enjoy the Hair Lounge, it's really cute and relaxing.

I went for happy hour . The happy hour drink selection was lacking and did not seem like a deal, although the drink i ordered was good. The bartenders were friendly and the service good. I ordered the grilled octopus and it was really salty. Overall, I probably wouldn't go back.
Don't bother going pizza stinks and forget the soup it's like dirty water with noodles If I could give minus stars I would.

The food is tasty, I'll give them that. But when one buys a $9 cup of soup, to be you need to purchase a half baguette if you want a piece of bread with the soup because they are low on bread is absolutely ludicrous.
I've taken my cars to 3 they gave us no discount at all, and double charged on one of the repairs. Their motto is laughable - we talked to them, wrote to them, to no avail.
Excellent service! Great bartenders! I am not sure what this place is supposed to be so I am only going to rate the awesome staff behind the bar!
I was a customer here when I lived in S Tampa last 18-19 bucks by the time you get done with a tip. Makes me miss the 10$ haircuts in Gainesville, thats for sure.
Cory was very friendly on the phone and got me in even though it was late so I could safely drive to a funeral in the morning Thank you team !

I wish this place was better, since we live upstairs, but the service is incredibly lacking and the food is insanely overpriced. Best bet is to try the halfforoff professionals that would spend money there if the prices were better and the service was halfway decent.
Went with a group of 8 and everything ordered was amazing, nothing just "ok" or "pretty good" every single item was excellent.

The all u can crab leg dinner is not worth it the service is very very very slow 3 hours to get two orders my table . Manager and waiter just we're not helpful. Don't waste your time or money here . The crab legs taste really bad after the long wait .

It's McDonald's so I cannot in good conscience give it 5-stars. But as far as fast food and McDonald's go, this one is clean, service is good, food is prompt and always filled correctly. So, overall if you like McDonald's, I recommend this one.
Ordered my food and it came decently fast and is always accurate. The only issue I've had is when placing orders for a certain time to be deliveried it's been 20 minutes late.

Besides the long lines Autozone pretty much always has the items I need as a do it your selfer. Unfortunately this location is always under staffed - I only saw 2 at the register and assume maybe one in the back or making deliveries.
The food is decent here, but I went here twice and both times, I saw the girl behind the counter handle money and then prepare the food with no gloves on.

What this guy can do with tailoring is amazinga true professional. He altered a sports coat which involved removing some buttons, and I can't even tell that he did itit looks like it came from the store that way.

I've always had such an amazing experience here, my nails are always exactly the way I want them, lily and the whole staff is so amazing ! I've been coming to lily for years and I will continue! 5 stars for me !

this place is OK if the machines are working and you have a debit or credit card. if you need to interact with the employees you're better off leaving and going to Staples and buying your own damn printer.

Tried to drive in for a quick meal but ended up waiting in the drive another 5 one of the bags randomly had mayonnaise on just the outside of it and the actual food was very poorly made. Really upset with the service, would definitely not go again.

Really good food! Everything looked amazing and was cooked to order. They even had gluten free toast and Lavazza coffee. It was very busy in a Sunday morning but still had a table ready for us when we walked in, with fast and friendly service.

We came for lunch and got seated right away. I ordered the seafood okra and sautéed shrimp poboy was different from what I am normally used to which is a fried version. This was sautéed & a little on the saltier side.

We've been all over Florida within the past 8 days and this was by far the best breakfast we've had in Florida and the best prices! I got the eggs Benedict and one biscuit and gravy and both were AMAZING!

The only good thing about the buffet was papad!! Rest of the food was cold and looks like they have just re heated the entire buffet foods and tasted like stale food. Would not recommend this to anyone.

This would be a 3-star decent Brazilian restaurant in Los Angeles but considering it is located on Main Street in Santa Barbara, the food was pretty decent and relatively authentic. Great service and we were able to get a small table with our puppy enjoying a quiet lunch.
When I paid for the full tank of gas, they charged me for 13 gallons, when the car's tank size was only 10!!!!

My mother and I share a birthday and decided to wonder and we found Aspirations Winery absolutely adorable along with wonderful service. Along with family we tasted some fruit infused delicates overall left with two bottles and for sure visiting again

Lou and his staff went well beyond what was expected by producing a very high quality poster for a very low price. He did this in record time and saved my butt. I would definitely recommend Lou and his staff for all of my future printing, shipping, and business needs.

9/17 @11am on foothills highway in boulder, I was driving the speed limit in the right lane, cab nr 109 was tailgating me and start honking. They moved to the left lane, back to the right lane, then left lane...weaving and speeding
The place looks great and has an awesome feel, but the food did not match the ambiance on the day we were there. Wanted to like it but not so much; will try again soon.

I give up on this place. I have heard good things about it yet, the 5-6 I've tried to go there in last year, they have been closed every time! Even though it says they are supposed to be open. Not a good way to run a business.
Taste nice and food is really fresh, if you want to have sth before go up to mt lemmon, hoki poki is a good choice.

Ate there on vacation and it was "ok" Further down the boardwalk are a couple of restaurants that you will get way more for your money. Our waitress at another place called it a "tourist trap" and that's exactly what it was. Too expensive for the mediocre food.
I have always found this place to be over righted and very expensive and the food was OK but not worth the price
Decent food and service but charged us for the tea we drank, otherwise this was a pretty decent place to eat after skiing.
Without a doubt the best sushi I've found in Boise. My favorite rolls: anger management, Poseidon, inception, man on Fire, the rock, dragon roll, and the seared tuna nigiri is also great
No stars if possible. The service is not so good, my friend and I felt we were not welcomed after finding some problems with one of the dish.

Love their happy hour! Normally a little pricey, I always order the Encarnacion Nachos, which are delicious and filling so you don't have to order as much to be full. I really like the mango mojitos during happy hour toorefreshing and just sweet enough.

Absolutely awful. service dept, will consistently lie to your face about repairs. Went to replace my oil pan under warranty and had to go multiple times for months and was dismissed over and over. Disappointed a luxury car dealership would treat clients this way.
yes they take quite awhile to deliver but the driver always apologizes and today gifted a free full size bottle of coke for the wait.
While all the other Mitsubishi was offering 0% financing, they offered normal bank rate, which was 6ons, they make the most profit.
This movie theater is so dirty the seats are broken people were talking the whole movie and the one star is because I liked the movie
Best service! They definitely got my car in 35 min also have a nice spot we're you can sit and wait for your car to be done as well! Definitely recommend!

I come here quite often, great service, awesome food. Great poke, but I wish the crab was a free topping not another protein. I also really miss when the pitas were rolled up and served handheld, the bowl is really disappointing and defeats the whole purpose of a pita.

Good value overall for price the pizza was good and selection of toppings was good the one thing that bothered me was the garbage is right next to where you get your napkins and extra stuff some fellow diners shared the dough knots and those are different and good !

It was ok at best. Service was fine although the place was almost empty on a Saturday night. So why do the seat a family of 5 next to a couple who are out on a birthday date night? ? Killed the evening for me.
It's part diner, part kosher style deli. No part of it would stop me from going up the street to Kibitz Room for food that is infinitely better.
Food is good and the service in the restaurant is good; however, if you sit outside, they seem to forget about you.

My favorite bubble tea place in the whole city. Why? Because they're the only ones who keep up with food and make the cafe mocha with extra chocolate chunks exactly how I want it and they're always smiling! I love them!

Every previous visit was great, but after the last I won't return. Ended in a vet visit for one of my pups and my other dog was in a cone for two weeks from being cut and yes, they still charged full price.
I live in Belleville and no place of this name exists. The only tavern in town is the VFW and you must be a member or be accompanied by a member to imbibe. Don't waste your time looking for a tavern!

Too bad they have such horrible customer service, given the great brands they carry. The associates are just so full of gossip and disdain for the customers that I can't make myself spend money there. I'll be taking my business elsewhere.

Mainly leaving a review because there was mold on one of the buns of my sliders I shared with my boyfriend. I just took the bun off and didn't say anything. I recommend checking the food before it goes out. Service was okay, kind of slow.
Great food!!! I came yesterday for lunch and had the dry aged beef, sesame crusted tuna, the pork chop and the doughnuts for dessert . It was a really great experience!

This is the best pizza, great wine choices, salads and atmosphere! Our server is fun and always welcoming! This is our go to place just wish it was open on Sunday after a long weekend we would love to chill and cozy at the NOOK!

I come to stay at this hotel every year for a convention, and this place is a great place to eat at. I still would recommend to eat here. However, today was the first time I was disappointed because I guess it's a bother to order a togo order here.
Let me start this by saying coupons, Kohl's cash, reward cards - like you're doing way too much and it is very confusing.

Fast, professional service on a Sunday afternoongreatly appreciated! They answered the phone right away and called to confirm a time window and again when the plumber was on the way. Fair prices and speedy, professional service to unclog the main drain line!

Hmmmmm mmmm mmm!!!! Want some good sushi then look no further. I've been goin here for years. My friends girlfriend used to work here and would bring home goodies for us often so that's how I learned about this restaurant. This place is an SB classic...enjoy!
Best tacos in town, and the ambiance in the mercado is great so friendly and accommodating, and the food was amazing. Highly recommended.

This is one of the best customer service experiences I have ever had. I highly recommend this is a great business that doesn't rip people off my car was going to cost me 1, 200 and it ended up being 180... I will be back.

Alright prices for alright quality items. I'm not a fan of the style of the products, but I've come down here during my lunch break when I needed a dog carrier and one of those grandma-like caddies that everyone's wheeling their groceries in nowadays.
Too small to enjoy but the Music was good and it had one of the best loony Mary's we had and we tried a few others. I'll be your Huckleberry shirts available

Used to be my favorite spot. They would fill the bowls to the rim. I guess they are getting cheap. I will not be returning unfortunately. Not worth 11$ after I asked for extra chicken bc they barely put any in I was told it would be extra.

Worst restaurant ever! Today is Christmas Day, the waitress keep us waiting for 50 minutes just gave us soup and told us they out of the other stuff we ordered without any apologize.And she even forgot our raw oysters at all. What a happy Christmas!

Survival in Tucson makes sense after eating a sandwich at this place. Great sandwiches/hangover cures. Though its client base is like entirely Univ of Ariz students, it is worth the stop if you find yourself in Tucson.
I would've given this place 4 stars based on past experiences here, until I read that apparently you can't smoke anymore, which is bullshit. Regardless, it is a really nice venue for live music.

Yummy! Very good coffee place! It's fun to watch the beans being roasted right in front of you. Terrific selection of iced and hot beverages. I enjoyed a tall iced mocha this last time around and is one of my favorite selections; good seating and fairly priced.
Koa Tip is no longer!!! Reopened under new ownership it is now called House Of Thia Cuisine newly decorated, very nice, check out the reviews so far..
This is one of the best places to eat in the university city, they have 'actual student ' discounts which actually students use and enjoy. the ambience is chilled and fun. try the southwestern wings
Was yelled at by the delivery man to not order from here again because it took too long to deliver from broad to 22nd... Don't worry I won't be ordering again.

Best service, best attitude... This is where I feel the most comfortable for my fur -baby family! To me my dogs are family... I am very particular who I trust my family with and their health and I feel very comfortable at this veterinarian!
the best buy in ventura is more friendly and staffed in my experience. i was still able to get my cable modem at goleta bb but i wish my experience could have been a bit better and more efficient.

Ordered tonight from so burger and could not be more disappointed. What should have been a large salad is lacking in size and the order of fries was child sized in portion. The hamburger was fine. All in all such a waste of time and money.

~ very good overall Food & Service MY MENU: * Coffee = good * Orange Juice = good * Water = good * Sausage Biscuit Bowl = very good * French Silk Pie = very good NOTE: You can sit at the counter if you're alone;-)
Best BBQ I have had in a long time here I am on business and I want BBQ the way my family would have. Coworkers told me this is the place and they sure are right. I will be back on my next trip
Jen is the best she's super friendly and does a fantastic job on my hair and she's available on the weekends!

Nice ambiance, and pleasant/knowledgeable staff ***our waitress actually recommended a different wine than what we originally ordered I thought it was a bit over-priced, for not "wowing" anyone at our table. Several times I heard the comment "if I were making this at home I would..."

What's great about this place: cool vibe, lots of TV's, you can hear the game, indoor slow service even though the place was not busy. We will go again because we liked the place, just hope for better service next time.

We came in on a weeknight and it took a while for them to even take our order the seating area isn't very clean, and some of the food looked old. The food wasn't great - I probably wouldn't come here again.

Wings, Wings, Wings, Beer, Beer, Beer, Cards, Blues, Rams. BDub's is the same everywhere you go but the customer service at this location seems to slack with the best of them. Seems to be consistent and have switched to pick up instead. Go STL

Adrienne, Trisha and Melanie are some of my favorite people. This studio is wonderful and if you love to sweat and want a great workout this is the place to go. I have been going for a couple years now and absolutely love the staff and the environment.
All I can say is I see why they're slogan is "Almost Famous!" The roast beef and pastrami were good, but was not a fan of the bread and my fries were cold!
The chicken is hot and reasonably priced but the last time that I went it was not a flavorful hot just a uncomfortable burning hot.

Tried to go here on a Saturday night around 10:30. Both their Yelp page and their website say they're open until midnight on weekends, but when we got there they were closed :( The menu looks great; wish we could have tried it...

As malls go, this one is okay. They have the sole remaining Macy's in SB, which is eerily quite. There are a load of empty store fronts or closing businesses so I am not sure how they will keep it going in the long run.

Chatoity, but fun to walk around and check out all they have. Cool to drop in once in awhile for a meal or treat, but I definitely wouldn't make a habit of it, unless you want a fatter waistline and a thinner wallet.
I wish I liked this place because I like to support local places, but their ice their homemade gelato is AWESOME.

I have a Belgian waffle with fresh strawberries and I decided with whipped cream on top Eggs and bacon and I love it. the environment reminds me a favorite pancake house in Fishers, now I don't have to go that far! coffee is good server was great prices are reasonable

It's Epcot Mexico, with all that implies. Margaritas are really good, but overpriced. Guac is really good but overpriced. Decor is interesting but over... everything! With so many more interesting, authentic, and reasonably priced Mexican joints everywhere in the city now, El Vez should be left to the suburbanites.
Pura Vida has lost a star for me . . . sad day . . . the food is still delish, but had a not so great dining experience there last night and will be walk walk walking there in the future.

I had a very pleasant lunch here with the hubs earlier this week. The space is nice . Our waiter was superlish! Bottom line: I'm not sure it will replace Central Table as my go-to lunch option in the CWE, but I would definitely come back.

Came in to tour at 4pm and closing sign said 5pm, yet the assistant manager refused to tour. Been to several places all day and this was the only place who stated "they stop showing at 4" why would we rent if they refuse to tour?? TERRIBLE CUSTOMER SERVICE

This bowling alley is alright. The place is very old and and the food is really expensive, but that doesn't necessarily mean you can't have a good time with the family or some friends. However, there are better places in town like Splitsville.

FIXED- My hair is fixed after one visit, I have no more orange and Marina listened to what I wanted and actually did what she said she was going to do. She's a MUST SEE. She's great and her work shows off how great of a job she does

I'm not a hardcore biker, just a running errands kind of biker so it is a little intimidating going into a 'real' bike shop. The owners made me feel at home and did some solid work on my crappy bike. They are a welcome addition to the neighborhood.
It was good but lacking cheese, the bread was perfect, meat was tender, onions was good but the cheese was lacking, when it's called a cheese steak and lacks cheese there is a problem
Most the cool stuffs a bit overpriced, but you can find a deal on something funky if you really set your mind to it.

Unfortunately, I would like to give a much higher rating for this establishment but after waiting 2 days to come and eat the way in which I was rushed to eat my food and pretty much leave for the next group of people to sit doesn't feel okay to me
Great Pizza and Sandwiches I stumbled on this by accident and it is a great find The service was excellent and location right off 295

Small but cute place...apparently a favorite of the locals. But we arrived yesterday 2/7/10 and waited quite some time for coffee and another 20 minute for our bowls of uncooked oatmeal. Hm. Nice people, but there are other places in town just as cook
I was in with some family and I was greeted by the best waitress/bar tender named Ky and she was very pleasant! I would suggest anyone to come here specifically to meet Ky!!!

One of my favorite places to eat when visiting NOLA. They are located by the river within the Hilton and have a wide variety of food: salads, steak, shrimp, sandwiches, and best of all 40 minutes before being seated.

Honestly terrible food and service, enchiladas are one of the most basic foods you can get at a Mexican restaurant and this place completely misses the mark on spices, flavor and consistency. Literally none of the food we ate except the chips tasted seasoned at all.

The previous reviews were true. It was really loud and the service was not good. The food was ok, but overpriced. They had cloth tablecloths, but covered them in white paper which made they way less classy and my husband got a paper cut. Somehow it was still crowded.

Servers, and customer service was really nice but the food was blah. If I want a hibachi experience, I'll drive 1 1/2 hours to Benihana where I know the fried rice will be really good. I'm sorry guys, I tried it but it was not a home run. Sorry Kobe
Seems to be the same employees, beer and food when it was The Flying Pig, It now has metal dart boards and minor interior changes.

I order from here all the time. The staff is amazing and the food just melt in your mouth. Prior to Covid, I used to walk into this place all the time and everything they would make just smelled so good. Order the "works" Pizza, it's the best!!!

The manager Stephanie is so rude... the food is great but you can't even find anywhere to sit with all tables filled with kids using their laptops drinking only water? Are you serious?? I'm calling Corporate later to complain... WORSE MANAGER EVER
Margaritas were great but ordered nachos and were too salty for my taste it might be the beans but definitely will come back to have more drinks and try something else because I liked the ambiance .
My derm there knows nothing, I had acne for many years, she didn't check my skin just gave me some ointment to use! Btw, those ointment are around 1000 bucks.
Service was great. The chicken fingers were a little on the dry side but the size of them made up for it if you used a dipping sauce. Pretty standard chicken tenders and fry combo.

Decent food and cold draft beer. Wooden countryside interior, lounge style sitting, plenty of TV's, free parking, walk in- you probably will find place to sit it is big enough. Outdoor fireplace with wooden sitting was great and nice to look at. We stayed for hours!

Love the baristas here! Sometimes it gets a bit busy here..some more staff would be nice during the rushes, but other than that, they always find a way to make my drinks better, thanks for everything!

This was the worst experience, we waited an hour and a half for a pizza just for it to get canceled 2 minutes before delivery time. When we called the place they were extremely unhelpful and rude. DONT ORDER FROM HERE !!

OH MY ARTERIES! I've never tasted such oily foods. I mean for the price, it's pretty darn cheap, but I thought I was going to die half way through the meal . Other than layers of grease, their calamari is quite good, and their portions are huge, good for family.

Super busy. Friendly and efficient staff. This is one of the original Wawa's. Seeing as there is a Sunoco on the left and the Septa Station to the right, the likelihood of it being torn down and rebut is slim. There's a larger number of homeless people who congregate here.

The fried chicken is by far amazing. As for the rest it was either very mediocre or salty. The place was also very moist and sticky. I think there was a broken washing machine and they didn't bother to fix it and let it leak and soak the carpet
This people are horrible and rude as hell just walk the extra steps to Iron Age they act like they are too good to help you....it's not worth the time
Eh, it's hit or miss. I always order their enchiladas, the first time I went it was great and the second it wasn't that good, and then good again the third! But it's super cheap and large portions
Service and food was great. I had the carnitas and the pork was moist and tasty - the piece of tres leches cake at the end of the meal was a nice touch. Definitely worth the drive.

I should have known to never take restaurant recommendations from a hotel I am staying at. The service was horrible, food was average and they totally screwed up my dinner bill and had to end up paying cash. I will not be going back.

It was just like back home in Hawaii. Great service and food was super fresh. When we got there, it was a closing time, however the owner was super nice to accommodate what we wanted to eat without hesitation. That is the hospitality!!

Great experience start to finish. They just finished installing our new unit and they cleaned up so good you can't even tell they've been here 7 hours. Fair pricing, quick turnaround, and nice people.
Aside from the fact that they are terribly, ridiculously stingy with the parmesan cheese, and now offer no paper plates, the food is great!

I made a reservation for a good table and got a very nice one on the back patio; a very quiet table away from the saturday night noise. Ordered shrimp and grits and the pork shank. The food was very good and very nice service.

The fried chicken tasted and had the texture of being fried a day or 2 before up your chicken and mashed, frying oil, potatoes game-you could do well and last on this community, I"m giving a 2 star rating soley for the chicken and potatoes.
The shrimp and grits was delicious. Big nice shrimps and tasty. The only thing is that they should add a dinner roll or some type of bread on the side to go along with the dish. 3 stars overall
Excellent place for apps or dinner service was outstanding food was excellent better than the bar foods in Jon Johns Pass restaurants on the boardwalk

I came here for the Spring Beer Fest and it was AWESOME! For $50 I got a giant plate of delicious cajun food, unlimited beer samples, bottled water and cans of soda, PLUS passed appetizers which included pork rinds, bourbon bread pudding, baconexistent.

Love this place! It's a nice quick place to stop and gamble & you can park your travel trailer overnight with the truckers while you gamble. I recommend this place because there is always food at anytime 24/7. The games are also nice for the kiddos.

Everytime I've came here it's nothing but rude employees, they never look happy. Food is good, but they ruin it. For pick up orders, they take forever to answer the phone calls, but when you go in the people are just standing there.

Decent tasting food and generous portions. The specials are a good value. The service and interior were both lackluster. Drinks weren't refiled without having to ask and food took a long time to be brought out with few customers dining. The carpets were torn and the styling was very dated.
Rich has personally helped my family with real estate investments and proven his expertise, support for the community, and altruistic morals. He's the first agent I think of when referring a friend.
Horrible twice my card has been charged twice for one order and now today's visit they got my order wrong just horrible any los betos is better than this one

I was so excited to hear this brewery opened up a tasting room and a patio in garage brew house with darts. The beer is excellent as always and I loved the coffee stout. They offer bombers to purchase also. Try the Share project also.

The food here is very good but the wait is absolutely horrible. Over 30 minutes for three frickin tacos. I would love to come here often but if you have a time restriction, I wouldn't rely on them to deliver your food in a timely manner.
I used to work in this place and is NOT CLEAN AT ALL the way they are doing the sauces, HEALTH DEPARTMENT doesn't work after midnight, that's why they do the sauces at that time.
the worst place i had never been an will no return placed order for 10 wings an it was 9.99 then got my order 35 minutes later got home wings were so small an burnt last time i will visit a wing stop

I stopped by here a while back for a quick bite to eat. If you are on Olive, it can be a bit tricky/confusing getting to and leaving this location due to limited options for turning on/off Olive. Quality is okay and consistent with the subway average.
Kind of a circus, and a little overwhelming. Everything is incredibly expensive, and I've had an easier time getting through airport security than trying to get to my seats for a game.
This food not worth more then 1hr wait on a Thursday afternoon, had visitors from Texas and because of reputation we visited the restaurant but is just average Mexican food
They do good work but are a little slow, I understand that you want to make your customers happy but all the socializing isn't really necessary.

DONT ORDER ONLINE your order will never be ready in time. First couple of times I've given them the benefit of the doubt but it's now been 60minutes of me waiting for my online order to be ready. Horrible.

For services, don't go here, I repeat don't go here, They are horrible, rude, they just want to take your money and mess up your car for more services that you don't even have. A bunch of kiss ass service ref.

I like this place but they're pretty inconsistent in their food prep. Sometime Sammys are packed so full you can barely eat it, other times there is so little meat you get lots of bread. It a cute place but very cramped, desserts always look yummy.
Great food, service could be better and the cocktails were not 5/5, but I have always enjoyed the food here, and they are dog friendly :-)

I was excited for the Philly roll, but it was made of "crab" sticks, cucumber, and Philly cheese. Should have been more careful reading the menu, just didn't expect a Philly roll not to have any salmon in it. Overall the food was fine.

Looking for a better experience when I drop $5 on one coffee. Here the tables are all full, the barista stares at you until you greet her, and honestly the weak and sweet Azteca Mocha was disappointing.

Yeah, the proverbial "end of the line" at least, that is, for the Broad St. subway line. Reasonably clean, lots of trains. The automatic doors on the subway cars are exceptionally cool, and the Star Trek like talking computer voice is not to be missed.

This location is truly a knock off to the more authentic, customer focused Daisy Dukes on Chatres! I would highly suggest walking those extra steps and standing in line for a better quality of food, lower prices and better customer service at Daisy Dukes Chartres!

Love this place, the waiter was very friendly, the decor was interesting and I came here to have dinner with an old friend of mine. The food was great and offered vegetarian/vegan options. Would definitely come back!

Southern Jersey I'm Burlington City truly needs help! Scheduled an appointment since 10am and still waiting it's 12 noon what was the point of making an appointment if you cannot commit to it but you can take payment from the insurance I pay for! Ridiculous!
It was okay. My chilli cheese dog was good, friees were okay, and the chocolate cake was not what I expected - I thought it could have been better. Service was good and staff were all friendly.

Drive-thru is the closest to my office for those really busy days, but I am really disappointed that this location NEVER gets my order right! Today's order...burger no onion, tots and a drink. Got back to the office...onions and no straw.

The absolute worst. They will not help clear accoubts, children or senior. Every opportunity is taken by them to increase, tack on extra charges or simple avoid all responsibilities for ther company the absolute worst ever made, invrnted or run by anyone
I only had two pieces of chicken when I ordered a three piece never again will I spend money on delivery the biscuits my corn on the cob wasn't good also I didn't get my sauces I ask for either
I don't know if they still serve it, but if they ever serve the chipotle pumpkin bread pudding or the "desert nachos", avoid at all costs

I got the liang pi, biang biang noodles, and lamb skewers to- I had called to order beforehand, but when I got there to pick up the food they realized they forgot to send the order to the kitchen so they told me to come back in 10 min.

Came here for a quick bite to eat, and was left waiting for an order while I watched others come and go. The food isn't any better than any other pizza shop. It's also cash only, which is a draw back.

This was the first restaurant I ever tried in New Orleans but they have some amazing vegetarian options that any omnivore would love! The portobello and chicken appetizer was amazing as well as the portobello panini! The seating was a little off hopefully just a quirk.
I just waited 20 minutes for a pretty good slice of pizza. If there's no line this place is probably legit, but if you're here for a big conference across the street, don't bother.
Brisket is great. Jambalaya is good. Boudin tasted like lighter fluid and the andouille Mac & cheese had no pieces of andouille in it, tasted like regular mac.
We came down to the Provisions shop in the morning after a very wonderful hotel stay two muffins, a small quiche, and a coffee was 35 dollars!! And it wasn't even good no thanks.

Grilled salmon with brown rice and the house salad was just what I needed - the cocktail named after the owners recently published book "all bets on me" was delicious with cognac and peach schnapps. I look forward to going back and exploring more of the menu

I ordered a classic chicken sandwich here, the young lady with dark hair at the drive thru window saw that someone she didnt like was in the car, and loaded my sandwich with hot sauce. Never coming here again
Once again my visit to Thompson cigars was excellent with the customer service from Orlando and especially Naima who really went out of her way to assist me I always go there when I'm in Tampa
Since I live here, I love to "shop Montecito", but the selection and prices make it an even easier choice stock our wine cooler - highly recommend.

Should have gone during a peak hour so my food was fresher. This location is alright, its kind of weirdly placed you have to drive thru a quik trip to get to it. Chipotle try to make the queso better if you can.

Great restaurant but I heard the people say that they were untouchable so I wanted to let people in Indiana know that this is not acceptable in the United States or an any country. So I wanted to let Indiana's know that it's ok to touch them.
I was treated very rudely when I asked for a mug without chips out of the rim, which is a health code violation.

Shockingly bad customer service when I called to check the status of my watch. An employee engaged me in a hostile and accusatory argument after I asked a routine question whether my watch was ready to be picked up. I won't be using this store again.

went yesterday to donate, and almost a fight broke out on the donating floor! i know they have a guard, but the dude wasn't where he should have been, and if you got a big needle in your arm, you are almost defenseless right?

The management at Distrito has gone to great lengths to rectify the situation They reached out multiple times and asked for more information about my visit in order to find out where the problem occurred . They made the situation right, and for that, I am very pleased. Great customer service.

Very rude staff serving bubble tea at the front. I use to come to this locational all the time when it was called chattime and I always had a good experience. By this time staff had an attitude, bubble tea was expensive and unremarkable.

Not what I expected. Firstly, I'm here now and the door is locked; perhaps there's a good reason. I came for south Asian food items, but could see none in the small store; they had tobacco products, but no curry leaves.

I was 3 hours late and these guys waited around, showed no attitude when I finally arrived and unloaded the truck with insane speed and precision. They were polite to everyone in my building, despite the inconvenience we were causing current residents. Would highly recommend these guys.

The service isn't always that great, but I have never had an issue with any food ordered here. I absolutely love the wor won ton soup here and of course all the other cafe foods - one of my favorite late night spots while visiting Reno.

This is the 'famous'GenoMs Steaks which is right across the street from the 'famous' Pat's. The sandwiches weee good but not exactly what I expected as far as flavor goes, but it was a good experience.
Love love ninja!! The moment you walk In till the time you leave, everyone is so attentive, welcoming and the sushi and sashimi are yummy!!!
Worst car wash I've ever seen. Completely missed 2 fenders. Got the tire shine and afterwards my tires were nasty but I could wipe gunk off the lettering with my finger.

Great park that hosts many events. 3 different playgrounds offer something for kids of all ages. Walking paths, tennis courts, baseball diamonds, basketball courts and a volleyball court are all free to use, all near downtown Zionsville.
Hotel is quiet but the mold and the grouchy old man at the front desk made this stay less than enjoyable.

The manager messaged me directly asking if there was anything he could do to improve my experience and invited me back you have to continue to reach out to customers, even when your staff causes them have a negative experience. I'll update if/when I receive another response.
I love Prep & Pastry! If you like to have a delicious brunch with friends in a beautiful atmosphere - this is the place to go! I recommend the Harissa Shakshouka! It's my favorite.

Staff is always friendly and food is always fresh but they need to add curbside pickup as an option for mobile orders. It doesn't save me any time by placing a mobile order and then having to wait in the almost always wrapped around the building line.

The store is very clean, and the staff is extremely friendly and helpful~ I'm thinking maybe all the other 1 star reviewers came here on a off day? My experience here was great, nothing to complain about~

I like Khols, they have nice clearence and good oddsends and you can usually find things for a reasonable price. I don't go here much and this isnt my go-to store but good to walk around if your in the area.

I wonder if the prepared foods can/should be kept refrigerated longer, or what else could be done to promote the sense that the food is actually fresh. I typically feel nauseous while consuming this food, and I eat Mexican food from many places often.

Tex-Mex fast food, chain store variety. That being said, it's typically pretty good considering its chain store fast food. For the love of God, get rid of the corporate mandate making employees yell "welcome to moes" every time somebody walks in the door.
I love the Troc! It's small and the main floor is standing room only, so you get to be very close to your favorite bands!

We enjoyed this place. The food and location were great. Also our waitress was sweet. She seemed to take a real interest in the customers who were there and would sing them a song to celebrate their occassion for traveling to New Orleans.
The only place I've ever been overcharged! Complained the folly day and told we were see ed something that wasn't on the menu and had actually saved money. Well below average regardless!
Still my favorite place for a huge decadent burger! Especially the insanely good Greek Burger with gyro and feta on it steady local clientele this is our go to place!!

I noticed that many more reviews of this store can be found under the heading "Reward" in Philadlephia. "The Reward Project" is a name that seems to be used primarily by those connected with the store, whereas most people just use the actual store name, which is simply "Reward."

I LOVE the pizza here. Seriously! When we first moved here, I used to say to my husband, "let's order from that place that makes the 'boardwalk' pizza." because that's what it reminds me of! Plain, cheese.... delish!
I always have a great experience here, Britney is my go to Barber she always does a great job the atmosphere is fun prices are very fair and they are very thorough and take their time.

The all around atmosphere was pretty good. It took almost two hours for me to receive my sandwich I ordered and my friend got dessert and it took the same. The music was mediocre and our server had an attitude until it was tip time... then he was extremely nice.
Not very friendly - food is good but people working morning shift just stare at you and doesn't make you feel comfortable but the manager came to the rescue and was very friendly

Stopped by for the 1st time & scored some of the best Tom Ka Gai soup ever. Expertly seasoned, plenty of chicken, loved it. However, I also ordered the Pad Thai with pork & am sorry to report it was dry, gritty and fairly flavorless.
Gentleman that assist me Wednesday afternoon was very rude on explaining how to Order and explaining the topics never go back there again I felt discriminate.

The variety from the cappuccino to the pastries, soups and salads, you can even have fresh sandwiches made in front of you, etc etc the options are endless. Especially for the newly found eating fresh people.. this place is a great option to eat out.
Went for lunch twice this week and both times it was very good service was good too will be back can't wait to see what the chef brings to the table
I loved this hotel. Staff was amazing and friendly. Room was exactly as described and wonderful. I had a great time even though I didn't spend much time in the hotel room it was the perfect retreat.

I went in there and ordered the seafood chowder and it was above average I was surprised to see the high prices on the menu but it looked like they give you alot of food and theyre always crowded for brunch
Very great hot dogs. Good bar too. I feel like this place could make it as a hole in the wall hot dog stand if it doesn't make it as a full restaurant/bar. Great food late night
Grate foods and service chef Brandon brought me my food very well manners an welcomed me as if I was in my own home I will be back soon very soon
No longer have Cheddar Bos so really what's the point? That's pretty much the entire reason why I would even go to the place seeing as their chicken is subpar at best.

Always love this place. I wish they had what i was looking for but They're always my main go to for beauty and hair products. It does seem like it's hard to find assistance there for my needs. I have to somewhat wonder around looking for things I want.
One of our go19 precautions. Sarah and the team are doing a great job and Sunda now completely deserves a rare five-star rating from me for doing it all consistently now!

This is the best dentist I have been to! The staff is always friendly and always able to accommodate you. I was searching for a good dentist after my childhood dentist retired and I am so glad I found Life Smiles.
Not a very big or variable beer selection in terms of beer styles, but the raspberry milkshake IPA was the highlight of my experience, surprisingly light and tasty.

Shoulda been a 4+. Service was good. Food was good. Owner wandering around the patio talking loudly with his mask around his chin about stuff that maybe shouldn't be talked about loudly in the business he owns is what brought it down.
I was not totally impressed by this place. The food seemed more than a bit over-priced but it a good alternative to the fried food pizza places or chain restaurants on the main strip of Jenkintown.
The food was really good here! The service was a bit slow, but it also was really busy so I don't know if what we had was normal. Definitely interested in coming again
Horrible service. Five people at the bar when we walked in and left after 10 minutes of waiting to even be acknowledged by the bartender.

This is our go-to BBQ spot. They never disappoint even during COVID. Just brought home the Township Line Brisket Cheesesteak. Piled high with Wilson's delectable smoked brisket, it was so filling that I could only eat half, which never happens for me. Looking forward to the other half for dinner.

The store racks were so packed with clothing, making it a bit difficult to pull a garment from the rack, look at it and put it back on the rack if it wasn't what I wanted. But prices were great for the brands available.
I went to Verizon's Smithridge store in Reno, NV yesterday, 12/12/2019 after I purchased a new iPhone 11 onstore service stinks.
Staff was very kind! Despite having a large catering order being prepped ahead of me, I only spent about 10 minutes total in the restaurant. Food was great!
By far, the worst chipotle. Customer service was trash, food was bland, portion sizes were small, it was 5p on a Saturday and they were out of menu items!
I have been buying from Creative Silver for so many years, George is and always has been a professional and kind jeweler. He always has something special, he can fix anything

Everyone who works here is personable and goes above and beyond to make you feel comfortable and put your mind at ease. Let's face it, it's an uncomfortable thing that you're here for and they make it quick and easy. Highly recommend.

Watching the planes take off below you is the real draw here, so sit outside on the balcony if the weather is nice. Their chicken & waffles is stellar. Everything else I've had is mediocre. Great place to take nonof-towners.

INCREDIBLE customer service and AWESOME selection of candy. I placed an order and needed it expedited, so I reached out to customer service and heard back the next morning that they had shipped my order out with 2-day shipping. HIGHLY recommend checking them out!

Have you ever had a Italian ice, well this is what this yogurt taste like. A bit on the sweet side and it's self serve and clean. It does cure your sweet tooth just be careful with the sizes and all the toppings cause it's priced by weight.
Definitely one of the best shawarma places in town I've been here many times and enjoyed every single time totally recommend it.
The loaded chili cheese fries were a bit more appealing than the other photos on here, still I knock it down to 3 because the service was pretty off-beat even for late at night.

Great atmosphere, great customer service and the manager Gabe did a excellent job making us feel at home and providing everything we needed. Went for a late light snack and turned into a all nighter. Great server as well Chloe did an excellent job with timely check ups
Food and service were good but it was expensive for Mexican food Enchiladas with mushrooms were unusual but quite tasty Taco salad and chicken salad were good but nothing special
**Do not be turned away by the surrounding plaza!** It's true they served yum yum sauce in a bowl with a spoon Take my advice - try this place!
Used to have best large frozen margaritas but now they are just served in standard water glass and they charge same price . Manager wanted us happy so comped a drink.
The food is ok and not very pricey here but when you order delivery I found them to be rude every single time so I'm done giving them my money.

Great tasting cheesesteaks quickly, even with long lines. I work down the street at another restaurant and when we are working long hours I will sometimes pick up some cheeseteaks for lunch. They taste great and they're quick!!

Been coming here for about 65 stylists or you may be unlucky and there are only 2-3 stylists, which increases your wait time. Overall they do a good job on men's cuts and I will continue using this location when I need a cut.
The barista was very nice. The coffee shop was quite spartan and the coffee tasted pretty burnt. We would go back and try it again to see if it was an off day due to the efficiency of staff.

Considering it was 3am and we ordered takeout with no issues I can't complain. The pizza could have had a little more pizzazz which is why I gave it four stars but considering it was so late and a Saturday night I'll give it a thumbs up!

Don't eat here. Terrible food and service from the kitchen. Would give zero stars. Food didn't come out as on the menu and they advised they didn't have it made so I couldn't get it. Terrible management

Typical configuration in the Southwest terminal, which is far less than adequate seating capacity, horrible layout, gates whose audio talk all over each other so you have no clue when you're supposed to be paying attention for critical updates. Bathrooms were clean. NO Starbucks on site. :-(

Picked up dessert. The line was bit long and I was standing there for about 15 mins before being helped even though i was he only one there. Picked up baklava and shamiyyat which were delicious but little dry.
ima sucker for fish n chips n Legends is definitely one of the spots that made my list who makes this dish pretty damn good. u wont be disappointed.
We had some amazing Gyro plates and roasted peppers from the Opa Greek shop paired with a flight of beers from the bar inside. So much food! And all delicious.

Chargrilled oyster is the bomb! What we liked Gumbo and Jambalaya are both tasty What we disliked - Friend catfish and shrimps were okay ... They are so heavy and the mountain of fries were not adding much to the plate I would highly recommend the chargrilled oyster
If you dont have the time to wait in long lines at Pappy's or Bogarts, Salt + Smoke is a great alternative. The food is really good and very affordable, just like BBQ should be.
It's a nice cozy place but I think it's a bit overpriced for the quality of the food and the service. Not my favorite but not the worst.
Fantastic! Front desk staff is super friendly and the massage therapists have great training 19 which allow for a safe environment even with the current pandemic.

This place is awful. Ordered 2 munchies meals, employee said they don't come with a drink when it blatantly has a drink on the website and the menu at their own restaurant. Stopped going to this one a long time ago. Won't return, will just stick with the Telegraph location.
I've got one word for this joint if you don't like either of these dishes, then you're out of luck here, as that's all they have. In the scheme of calzone and salad places, SOTS is just ok.

pizza, burgers, chicken tenders and mozzarella bacon fries are my favorite items on the menu! I have tried some of their appetizers and blahhh I wouldn't really experiment if it's my first time ordering from here. Their delivery time is amazing, they come to my door in like 20 min.

I dropped in yesterday for a quick sandwich, and I had the lemongrass tofu. The bread was very good, and the lemongrass tofu itself was decent enough. So if you're in the area and in the mood for a well-priced lunch, this is a place that I'd recommend.

They charge you over the phone THEN send you an invoice with their rules that state that customer agrees to those rules. The best part is that they will charge you additional money on your card months later without your consent.

Popped in on a sunny Saturday for lunch, service was solid, nice spot. They need more umbrellas for the sun flavored stuff Green goddess wedge salad: nice tasty little salad, good mixture of ingredients quite good.

I'm not sure why but this is one of my least favorite Fry's locations and all of Tucson. There's nothing necessarily wrong with it it's clean the customer service is mediocre and the selection is typical for a Fry's there's just something about it.

I had previously rated this establishment lower but after giving feedback to management, I was very impressed by how they handled it. They were appropriately apologetic and took the right steps to make this situation right.
Airport is small Wine Bar, Bud Bar, and One more restaurant bar. All decent, just not anything to get excited about if you are delayed or have to fly out at 7:30 everytime i come here.

Love everything about this place! From the blood orange margaritas to the sopes to even the salsas! I'm picky when it comes to any sort of Mexican food because I compare it to my Mothers cooking every time BUT this place does the job! Highly recommend!
The tortillas are seriously drool-worthy, the staff is friendly and efficient and the huevos rancheros are the best this native Tucsonan has ever had. Highly recommend!

This is the most amazing place St Pete's gains a treasure. Take the time to get to know Heather & Brookie, you will be rewarded with gastronomic delights, and excellent beer recommendations. If you are lucky enough to become a regular, then I envy you!
I have to say that Famous Dave's used to be my favorite but yesterday I bought a rack of ribs that were tough and boney! After eating such tender ribs at Kiss of Smoke I can't handle tough ribs!!

Great atmosphere! The service was ok. Our food was cold after waiting 30 Mins. I will give the manager credit for coming out to the table to explain and the server came out and made sure I received new fries and a hot meal.
Everything is amazing even the drinks!!! Been going here since I've been in Louisiana and taken and referred a lot of people here everything is seasoned to perfection

We had an excellent time there yesterday and this afternoon at the bar with the young ladies there. Then a guy started tended and all he could do was run his hands thru his hair and touch the fruit and the glasses. That was it.
My kids are allergic to milk so I appreciate the staff always using a fresh spoon to scoop sorbet from a fresh batch. Thank you!
Our first night out on the town with her group was able to catch the sunset and enjoy the sunset shots. Wait staff was pleasant and prompt

It's the only one in NOLA so they don't have a huge selection all the time, for instance what you see on the manikins are not really in the bends but they had great customer service! No trouble with getting store credit either!

Classic old Reno/sparks. Simple & tasty seafood in a friendly spot. I always enjoy a shrimp cocktail, some oysters, a nice pan roast it is always a lovely trip down memory lane with a cocktail too of course. Thank you.
Odd menu. I'm not foodie/trendy enough to dig this place. Not saying that they're not good, I just prefer a classic simple taste over forcing something as simple as chicken and waffles to be exitoc.
Ed showed up faster than expected. We were anticipating getting our car towed, but he helped get our car running and gave us some good tips on what the issue was. Very knowledgeable and friendly.

Ordered at 8:15 was told 30 min. Arrived onTOOK FORVER!! Also, sea urchin roll looked like one roll. When I asked about it they said that was the portion and space they could separate into more rolls if I wanted. BEWARE!!
Had a wonderful time with my daughters food was good and all love to go back again soon cakes are so yummy too 3 people and appetizers and deserts 77.96 can't beat that love it

The only thing that is extreme about this place is the crappy food and service I will definitely not be going back here again. Stick to the basics guys. Read your reviews adjust to your customers your food flat out sucks

If you want bad service and bad food...this is the place for you. And don't you dare complain about that hair in your food because they will question you about where it came from and give you attitude as a comp

Meh, so so.. Food was good, not great. Service was good. Prices were too high for what you get. I would have felt better if I got to put some of the $ in one of the servers g-strings, would have made it worth it..

This location is terrible. They service is rude and uninviting and the drive through people make you wait for your order in the front for ever - why would I go through drive through and the. want to drive around to front of restaurant and wait?? Weird.
Good burger. Your waitress's stubborn refusal to recommend anything specific on the menu may lead you to assume there's nothing else on the menu worth trying.

My second review for this place, I came to witness a pitiful performance by my beloved Eagles. But I left with free shots from the new owner and a stomach full of those delicious sweet chili wings and nachos. Looking forward to the future of this place.
I'm not a huge fan of hot dogs but I stopped by The Dog this afternoon to have lunch with my coworkers enjoyed their dogs too!
Well what can I see really good work and price for the new screen that I needed for my Galaxy S III. Thanks for the great job.

This is the 4th time in as many months that I've dined at the Bonefish on Vets and had a horrible experience. I've NEVER seen such unfriendly and rude bartenders. This restaurant's drinks are generally weak already so nastiness certainly doesn't help.

This is hands down the worst credit company around. Do not use them unless you like a company run by lazy people that do not care to help the customer. They have forever lost me as a customer. 0 star review

First time customer. Phenomenal! The pizza is amazing, Lexi, our cashier/server is amazing, and enjoying our pizza at the adjacent craft beer place was also amazing. This is a great concept and was a great experience. Will definitely return.
A bit pricey for the amount and quality if food Consider it is located on a higher end of Wesley Chapel. Very tasty and fast.

I am always so confused by the organzation and layout of this placebusy saturday afternoon as the workers were too eager to grab our plates or trays....I don't like that as I am a talker and a slow eater and will pick around with my plate for awhile....

I was so disappointed to bring family from out of town only to be treated so rudely by the self-proclaimed 'manager.' I get that they hire young hippie types because they're cheap labor but please teach them some basic customer service skills. We will never go back.

Key didn't work. Went down to get it reprogrammed, still didnt work. Called from the floor, instead of getting me another key that would work, just opened it with a master key and left me with the same defective key.

Dr. Smith is easily one of the most helpful and compassionate vets I have come into contact with since moving to Nashville. Becki is always a caring and friendly face to see behind the front desk. I can not recommend Natchez Trace Vet Clinic enough.

Shrimp poboy really strong flavor, I've never had gumbo like this. it was good just a lot to handle Huge portions, fair prices, friendly staff. I can see why this is a local favorite, but I liked Domilise's better for a poboy outside of my neighborhood.

Clone Caroline. This lovely, old Lancaster, Amish produced - but there wasn't a whole lot of care put into taking it apart to add to the sauce: There were some huge chunks of beef . All in all, I'd go elsewhere; I kind of hope Caroline does too.

Serious the best salads ever. I hate pizza but my husband loves it so this place works for both of us. I eat 2/3 salads from here a week good prices for the size of the salad and the high school girl behind the counter is always nice and helpful.

My husband and I have been to many dealerships in search of the perfect vehicle, and Pelligrino had given us the best experience! Bob is the absolute best! Will most certainly be buying future vehicles here again.
Use to be better years ago. Must be under new management. The food was lacking flavor and the owner had an attitude when my mother in law found something foreign in her food. We won't be back.

O M G. raving about this place to everyone we know. Highly recommend the eggs Benedict places We've tried). BUT, the red velvet tiramisu pancakes were unbelievable, I don't have a sweet tooth but it was just the right amount of sweetness. I'd give it a 6/5 if I could
The new Yats on Mass Ave, though it lacks the liveddrive thru meal as you're passing through/exploring Mass Ave or the Cultural Trail.

The sunset views with dinner and a drink, can't be beat. Menu and drinks are pricey imo but the atmosphere makes it acceptable! Everything is good, just don't get the Mac and cheese, it seems they can only make it right if it has to be remade!
Honeygrow is one of my favorite places to eat, but the last 2 times I have gotten stir fry there, it has been dry, 1/2 full, and disappointing. Hope they fix everything soon.
First time here. Food was alright, drinks were good. Not sure it caught my attention enough that I would come back anytime soon being that it is a bit of a drive from where we live.
This place is a hidden gem if you're into welcoming dive bars with a good atmosphere definitely check this place out!!!

Got delivery. About 1 hour's wait, as advertised. Dishes that were good: Drunken noodle, thai basil, vegetarian rolls OK: Pad thai Less good: red curry Terrible: vegetarian lemongrass soup, Buddha dumpling

Never coming here again! The lady who did my pedicure did not listen to what I wanted then told me if I wanted what I had originally said she would charge me more! She was arguing with me about what I told her. Terrible service!

This Michael's is in a good location- right next to Home Goods and Best Buy, and right up the road from the Muvico. They've got a pretty average size and stock for a Michael's, but this particular location seems a little understaffed.

The only reason to come eat here is for the yeast rolls. It's definitely not for the ambiance, the quality or the service. Use a coupon if you must eat here because paying full price is not worth it-not even for those delicious rolls.

This a pretty standard donair place. We tried their regular beef donairs with sweet sauce. Both the meat and sweet sauce were adequate, but nothing special that would set it apart from other donair shops in the city. The owner was very nice and welcoming.

It seems nobody in this theater knows how to shut the fuck up during a movie, literally everyone was talking it's almost like they were in the same group. If I wanted to hear a shit ton of talking I would've stayed home with 500 fucking kids
Went with my Mother to get shots for her dog and they where absolutely rude and all about keeping the doors open. Unbelievable first impression.
Service was terrible. Even told the manager it seemed like everyone didn't want to be there, her response was"yea we are all really tired". Definitely my last time eating at Qdoba, ever.

I ate here because Casita Taqueria was closed . The food here really isn't great. I've found the flavors rather bland and just kind of meh. It really surprised me because there is often a lineup, however, the food just isn't good enough to make me want to return.

I found the salesperson to be rude. We needed help furnishing our new home, but the salesperson required a commitment to let them do all our ordering from their website. We felt uncomfortable with our salesperson and decided to order our furniture from another store.

The RIBEYE Philly is to die for. I also got some Parmesan garlic fries. To be honest I ate there 2 days in a row it was so good. There was a long line and it took a while to get my food but it was well worth the wait.

As an Italian American whose father was a chef in NYC and wife is a gourmet cook, for fine southern Italian food in a quality and classy atmosphere, its ether Roberto's or Paul Mano's. You can't go wrong with either choice.

Lovely little shop for any occasion. Reminds me of my favorite shops in Portland, OR and Seattle, WA in that it stocks such unusual and hard to find items. The owner curates a great collection of special cards and gifts. A classy place to shop.
Cheap and chill Smells like cigs heavy so if you smoke it's a plus but if yooo don't like smoking places dont go Great service speeddy bartender And jukebox music
Great breakfast place, thought we would wait but walked right in and sat upstairs, food came fast and was really good and more than I could finish.

The food was amazing and the customer service was even better. We ended up here for a last minute dinner on a Thursday and it was just GREAT! Our server kept bringing out things for us to try from the chef while we wanted on our meal as well.
McD is horrible at best, but 20 minutes waiting for a car order to me made from our auto Because a customer was carrying a gun is OUTRAGEOUS

Wanted to get an authentico cheesesteak in Philly. Thought this place fit the bill with its "high end" offerings of ribeye steak, but in the end it was pretty greasy and not cheesy enough. Not bad, just wouldn't go back especially since it's at a premium price point.

Alterra has always provided us great service Aaron came out today and took his time to take care of the outside and inside, including our second level where we've had some issues lately. I would recommend Alterra to anyone.
I was taken here by a friend on a rainy night in the summer. It was practically empty, but the courtyard is a lovely place to drink a bottle of wine and enjoy a nice conversation.

Since they switched to AMC they did away with the free large Icee refills and that was one of the main reasons to go. The theater itself is cool and there are plenty of room between seats. Very comfortable and very enjoyable
Great place for great beer. Love their Little Italy stout. Nice to sit outside on Main St and relax or sit inside and listen to music when they have live bands.

My only complaint with Bub's is those serving ice cream need to wear gloves and wrap the bottom Of cones in napkins or cone covers. I sat and watched them serve ice cream as they took money, wiped down counters, etc ., and then serve ice cream!

I loved the food, and their homemade ketchup was fantastic! The only down fall is that it is very claustrophobic with all the tables so close together, and then the waiting area was so small... Not ideal for small children.
Meh it's ok honestly I don't think I'd bother visiting wasn't great wasn't bad nothing to write home about everything mediocre.

Cool space! Looking forward to seeing what else pops up here. They do a thing now where you pay $5 to park and get a $5 voucher to spend on food/drinks inside. There is street parking too if anything.

The soup was watered down and had no flavor, a portion of my order was missing, and they did not give me a receipt so I could see what was paid for. Extremely disappointed and won't be back. Do not recommend.

Best bakery ever, Mrs. Benner's cakes and pies are the absolute best and freshest! Amazing fresh food and deli. Those are the only things i shop there for because everything else is a little more pricier than most grocery stores. They do have good meat sales when available though.

Ruined Starbucks for me!! One u have had real espresso, from a place like shaws that roasts their own beans, u realize how mediocre Starbucks is! Great coffee, yummy desserts, always worth a stop when I'm in the city!
Worst service ever. Food was average at best, but even if the food had been decent I would never go back because the service was that bad. Don't waste your time or money.

Terrible employees. A few years ago we walked in and asked if they had wood planters, the employee laughed out loud and was very unprofessional in telling us we were basically stupid and that doesn't exist. I'm sorry, what? 1 star.

Good prices, excellent customer service, and delicious food! The salsa is perfect, with just the right balance of tomatoes, onions, and cilantroflavorful but not spicy. My only 'complaint' is that it is easy to miss on Hwy 36I drove past it both times I have been there.

Service and atmosphere great corn purée very very sweet and didn't really get the smoky flavor. Staff was pushing the short ribs and I found it very unspecial unless and until I've made it thru my list of other must try's

BEER FLIGHTS!!!! probably my new favorite thing but I'm definitely a girl who likes to challenge my tastbuds on different pilsners, IPA's, sweets, and spurs... this place definitely hit the spot! The prices were definitely fair and the selection was astounding.

This place is listed under bars. I have no idea what your idea of a bar is, but for most I know it's not pizza and beer. Hey, their pizza and beer may be spectacular, but this is a pizza joint and not a bar.

Super clean. Lots of choices for toppings. Not lots for frozen flavors :( I liked it. Next time I'll try the chocolate, I heard it's really chocolaty! Overall, I felt more spoiled in choices at some other fro yo places, but the cleanliness of this one keeps me coming back
The sorriest drive through wait times!! 22 minutes folks with no way to get out, it was the Starbucks Coffee black hole preventing on-time arrival to work.
Adrian offers an integrated approach to massage with stretching, myofascial release and Thai yoga all to bring a better more long-lasting experience in massage.

My family booked, paid, showed up to hold a room and the management Mishandled this, claiming we were a no show ...even tho two of us went in person to reserve the room. Caution when booking here especially during the gem and bead show!
Ordered medium black turbo hot and an egg and cheese on a wheat english muffin this morning- GOT a medium black turbo hot and an egg and cheese on a wheat bagel. Every third time...without fail...

I know this is McDonald's and no one should have high expectations but the management here is really horrible. I went in the drive through the other day and the manger on duty Will was so rude to his staff and me as a customer. Get it together dude.

Came with 7 other bridesmaids. Half of us had to redo our hair before the wedding we were in. Granted we got our hair done at 10 AM that morning and the wedding was at 5 but our curls were completely gone at around 2.
Best burritos in Tucson. They are a quaint food truck with tables set up out front, the service is always amazing and the food is the best
Place is absolutely amazing and food is top notch, if you're going to go make it worth it and pig out! Salad pizza and desert to end it all! Oh my goodness !

I absolutely LOVE this place. I order from here all the time and never had a complaint except for the last time, the bottom of the pizza was burnt. But i will still order from here. The taco pizza is YUMMY!
Our favorite new pizza place! We started off with a really yummy gnocchi appetizer & then my husband and I shared a small pizza that gnocchi y'all!!

I won't speak for the world but definitely best wings in Tampa. Ordered on Uber eats and was very impressed. The restaurant itself could use some inviting updates to the exterior/interior only reason why I give it 4 and not 5 stars. Food is definitely on point.
Ashley did an amazing job taking my golden blonde hair and making it platinum in just one session, she kept my hair so healthy and looking amazing!! 100% recommend her and this salon!

The Chicago style pizza was about as good as anywhere not in Illinois and the Italian beef was good but didn't have any seasoning at all which just makes it a beef sandwich with cold raw peppers on the side truly unamazing.
2/8/2020we eat lunch buffet, I saw Chinese waitress rude customers, she look like greedy, not polite, food not fresh, toilet dirty,

Went in, asked for JUST a medium fade, nothing else, and ended up walking out with barely any hair ontop my head. One of the worst haircuts ive ever received. Probably going to shave the rest of my head tomorrow and just start over

Manager James took me in on Easter Sunday for in oil change. Service was quick and very detailed. I'm going back to this location and my business will always be with Jiffy Lube thanks to John and James at this location!
The chicken burrito is the best I cant believe the amount of times i get it, best meal on a busy day with their great green chile sauce, will continue to come.
One of the cashiers is always sound angry and rude at the 15 or less items register, it was my second time I saw the same cashier with the same attitude
