The food has always been great herethan-busy times, too. I think it just depends on the server and the day, but overall, a good place to go for your brunch fix!

Choose your nights wisely. A great, well appointed bar with leather couches and a pool table first half of the week, and any evening for an early cocktail. Steer clear on Fridays and Saturdays, unless you are hotel middle management looking to score a sorority sister.

Still overall ok gym, but they seem to have switched the soundtrack to some really distracting religious stations lately. Nothing against the genres of music, but the songs they've been playing have been less than ideal for a good workout.

Wow, the place is so LOUD that it's painful. The noise takes away from just about whatever you're eating. Yes, their pesto pasta was fine and their tapioca was outstanding but I can't go back until they put in some noise reducing fixes.
Too quick to take my order properly, then made my drink slowly and incorrectly - wrong type of milk with a dairy allergy = not appreciated.

For burgers and a salad bar this is our first choice. We've had good service and food ever time we've stop at this location. Place is always clean and the restrooms are pretty immaculate compared to many of the other nation chains in this category.

Disappointed with our visit. Poor service, bland food and the band playing on a Saturday night did more talking than singing and couldn't, or wouldn't, sing more than the refrain of just about every song.

Awesome spot for drinks, dinner or dessert! The staff is fantastic and you can bounce to the upstairs bar with an Arch view after for a different vibe and DJ! Great new scene in STL. You're home, but feel like you're out of town.
Delicious and rich French style pastries, kind of speedy tough, I believe it's about $3-8 each, but very decadent so you don't need many. One of my go to for special friends birthdays

We saw rascal flatts, Chris Jansen as well as some other acts here. There really is no bad seat in the opry. It's a must see experience, the backstage tour was sold out so if you'd like to do that book way in advance. Also easy to park.
Paid for a gel manicure and an extra $5 to use special topcoat to make my gel mani last even longer. What a rip off. Three of my nails chipped the next day. I will never go back.
Typical meal at hooters. Was the first place I saw while driving around looking to eat something for dinner after a long flight from AZ.

Great pizza, Fast service I guess I'm giving dominoes another chance, because I don't like Papa John's.....I used the app it was easy to use, I will be ordering from this location again, it's right around the corner not bad at all.
Great for families & groups many of the lanes were under repair which sucked because we had to wait for a lane. Had good food & video games

Do not go here unless you want to wait 45 minutes for a drink that's made wrong. Sorry but this store needs to get rid of the old lady in drive thru if she can't take orders the right way and in a timely manner.

Man, Rebel Brewer rules! The shipping time is excellent. The shipping cost is excellent. Mostly, the customer service is excellent. We received an item that got broken in transit, and Rebel Brewer took care of it before we could even ask about it. Outstanding! We appreciate the excellent customer care.
Excellent in every way: friendly staff, especially the front dest Great Italian restaurant in the lobby area Good ADA room on the first floor Kudos to everyone

This is a dry cave, the tour usually lasts about 40-45 minutes. During the summer time the temperature inside the cave drops a bit compare to the Tucson surface temperature but not by much. If you have an hour or so to kill this is an interesting place.
Got carry out on the recommendation of a friend who is a "foodie" The only word I can think of which describes their food is : vile Needless to say, won't be returning.

Groupon gave a refund right away with asking for any more details after we questioned why they were still offering them considering all the negative reviews. We never received a return call from the business saying they were sorry and trying to rebook.
Only rating at three stars because they were a whole 30 mins late other than that I got a hot meal exactly what I ordered staff was very polite
I did not appreciate the way I was spoken to when I picked up my order today they need to learn better customer relation skills
On top of the unsatisfactory visit, someone finally replied to my review with an offer for a free appetizer or entree and deleted their response with my offer. That is unbelievable to me.

ScanCafe does an excellent job! I've used them on several large and small scanning projects and the results are great. They are not the fastest but they have ALWAYS done what they said they were going to do at a good price.
Came here for the first time today and it was the best pizza I've had from a Little Ceases in a really long time.
i go to both Sams club and Bj im in walking ditance to Bjs also did well there they take coupons where sams club doesnt take coupons thjey have alot of good deals at times ya have to watch out

You won't be disappointed by the great location here. They also have great outdoor dining area with and without shade. if you get here on time they do have the happy hour and out the oyster /chicken wings are pretty good.

The venue itself is nice but towards the end of the night I heard the owner make some racist remarks towards one of his employees. I will not be attending this venue again. To pay money to this establishment would be condoning this type of behavior.
This is now my go they did not have my medication in stock, but it was inconvenient to have to stop by twice. Meanwhile - the 2 female pharmacists I have spoken to were both great. I'll be back.
COVID practices are ridiculous. They are only letting five people in at a time, so you have to stand out in the sun in a very slow moving line.

I just washed my German shepherd here and it was a great experience! The staff was very friendly and alert, everything was very clean and tidy, and on top of that self wash is totally free for service dogs!

Glad to have a neighborhood spot again. The volcano shrimp were yummy as was the spicy veggie quesadilla but the fish and chips left lots to be desired. Bland batter and fish served with soggy fries. Drinks were just ok.

I went to order food before you close on Friday it says on website and on your phone answering machine that you are open till 10 and your store closed early, I went at 9:25 pm if your closed earlier than you need to change your public information! Ty

The good: The atmosphere was casual and intimate so The entrees were disappointing, the rice was watery and half cooked Parking is annoying I would've rated it two stars but the extra one star for the wine that was pretty good.
Don't come for all you can eat sushi on New Year's Eve. They will serve other people before you. We have been waiting an hour for our food and we had to flag down a waiter to take our order.

This Dunkin has gone drastically downhill since changing ownership. The drinks we ordered were sweet teas, and it took the employee 10 minutes to help us and still did not get 2 sweet teas right. The staff is inattentive, unfriendly, and the facility is not remotely clean.

Meghan is the rudest person ever to come in contact with. She is very condescending and hateful. When you ask her a question it's like you are annoying her: I'm about to move 6 different Rx's I have for myself and animals to murfreesboro Kroger because of her.
Breakfast with a view! Ordered French toast from the first floor and brought it up to 6th to enjoy this view alongside the oyster and sushi bar!!! This place is bomb!
Our golden retriever loves going to Murphy's! He's a bit of a shy guy, and the ladies at Murphy's dote over him and made him feel quiet at ease. :) We're return customers and will continue to be!
The food was horrible . I couldn't even eat any of it. The restaurant was so small . The waitress sprayed bleach on the next directly next to us so that made me have a bad taste in my mouth

My family and I are regulars here but sadly management was unwilling to accommodate our group of 20 on today. I'm disappointed in the service and we will find a new restaurant to spend our money especially when we're going to have large groups
Joe stopped by to check out what we thought was an issue and was open and honest and told us it was not an issue. He didnt even charge us. Will definitely use him again!

The food at Himalayan is reasonably good, but they can't get a takeout order ready on time 20 minutes to whatever they tell you, or you will sit listening to background music and looking at the carpet that desperately needs cleaning. Time for a new place for Indian takeout.

If you have been east of the Rockies and are familiar with Panera, then you know what Beyond Bread is earned money on a restaurant I'd rather spend it on a hot meal where I feel like I'm getting my money's worth.
Always understaffed. Time for managers to do some managing instead of always being caught out by the rush or whatever other excuse is flavor of the day

I have been to this Resteraunt three times now, each time was a good experience. The customer service is excellent, the food is tasty. Nothing critical to complain about, if your near this place and in the mood for BBQ it won't let you down.

The absolute best pizza I've ever had. This a must go place in Delaware county, the three cheese pizza is a must get and the white pizza with broccoli is another good one to try very friendly people. We drive 45 minutes from Chester county to come get it

I never had service like the type I had here! The food was great and I had a really hard time picking something off the menu because everything looked so darn good. The seafood dishes are where it's at. Loved it! I can't wait to go there again!

Aaaand I am writing to say that I have received harassing "compliments" from various people claiming to be associated with this restaurant in response to my review. The upside: at least they are reading their terrible reviews - maybe they'll use some of the advice to improve the place!

Lunch here was mediocre for the price. My "gyro" sandwich had skimpy thin pieces of meat on it-it was more a lettuce, onion and tomato sandwich on a pita rather than a gyro sandwich. Booths by window were freezing cold. Unimpressed.
Eh, all diners kinda suck. This is kinda sucky for a diner but I'll give it the benefit of the being "A good coffee and now open 24hrs again. So, that's a plus.

Met my bestie here for lunch and the food was delicious. They had great mixtures of Indian flavors and I was pleasantly surprised because I had passed this place tons of times before. The buffet had me stuck wanting 3rds and 4ths.

Not ~bad~ just ~not great~ Maybe my expectations were too high because of the positive reviews here but dang overall super underwhelmed. With so many great vegan/veg options in the area I find it hard to justify spending money here.

Terrible dealer. I was there and one of the employees that works there was in a customers car and they were involved in an accident. They still have t told the customer. I believe they're racist as well. Terrible business. Terrible service.
Ok... Probably a good place if you need a place to recover from your hangover from last night, but that's about it. Tables are sticky and dirty, food on the greasy bar-food side of the spectrum.

The chicken is crunchy and the meat is tender. It seems like a perfect piece of fried chicken, however the pieces of chicken had little meat - mostly bone, cartilage and fat, which was quite disappointing. Anyhow, it remains a good fried chicken joint.

I ordered the steamed crabs last night for dinner. We mixed the butter garlic and Cajun sauces together the crab the crabs were clean and fresh but I did have to add a little more seasoning when I got home other than that it was great!!
Went for the happy hour the pizzas were good, the Bellinis were great just the wait staff was a tad snooty. love the mint cookies you get with the bill!

This place came highly recommend. Stay away, an hour after we ate both my wife and I got stomach cramps. A man came in with a dog and sat next to us, dog sat there begging for food, when he didn't get any he jumped on the table.

There's parking, the staff is friendly, and the food is decent. If you're in West Edmonton Mall and just looking for a place that's a little better than your typical lined up restaurants in there it's worth trying.

Went back here after 2 years and I would say the quality of food taste has decreased. The meat did not have a lot of flavor was cooked right but the best thing about this restaurant is the desert called Kunafa you just cannot go wrong there.

Continues to excite. Had lunch here with a friend yesterday - yummy, as always. My friend sure is a picky eater, so I was glad to hear him say to the waitress "I'll be back." Not the most posh place, but their food still delights.
Pricing, I would give 4 Stars, other than Pharmacy Friendliness 4 Stars Pharmacy 1 Star Produce 1 Star Cashiers 5 Stars Teresa Ryan S. Tampa
Really wish I could love this place because it is ADORABLE but the baked goods are mediocre and the staff is super unwelcoming.
Waited more than an hour for my order and got a phone call from GrubHub they cancelled my order because they were closing in 10 mins making an excuse their system wasn't working

Usually the burgers are solid, but since we've been doing COVID takeout, we have had increasing problems. The most recent disappointment involved missing toppings, cold food, stale burner buns, and missing drinks that the staff were unwilling to remove from our order without an unreasonable wait time .

I wondered why the app told me it would take 1/2 hr for my ham, egg & cheese on a bagel to be ready. So u arrived after 15 min, only to wait while the cooks moved behind the stove like they were waist deep in quick sand.

The worst happy hour menu to date. I think they're forcing you to order off the 'regular' menu by putting the worst drinks and food on the happy hour menu. The liquor is the lowest grade. How do I know? I have an immediate headache. Thanks guys!
The food really good but I just order Moros with Maduros and vistec a la palomilla, with some yuca fried was really spence

Food was fine, waiter was fine, kitchen wad SLOW! Meal took over am hour to come out and many around us recieved their meals first even though they were seated well after us. When requested to speak to a manager, they sent over another waiter.

This place feels like home. Family run bagel place that is cheap yet not lacking in taste and diversity of menu or combination of bagel sandwiches. Not a place that you sit and eat at but great take out!

Stopped by this location the other day with a friend and tried a number of items. The wings were alright, but nothing spectacular and my friend ordered a hamburger and didn't even finish it saying it was garbage. Oh well, sometimes you strike out.

We went through the drivethru and ordered 2 burger combos, not upcut fries were really good. Unless you want to try one of their "specialty" burgers like the jalapeño/guac or Texas burger, don't be shocked when it tastes very familiar.
Denied twice about a month or more apart due to our family size even though they had empty tables to accommodate us. Will not try again.

Terrific *Jordanian* food. This is not Greek, so if you come here expecting Greek, you may be disappointed. If, however, you understand that the Middle East/Mediterranean is a big place with a lot of people groups, you will be pleased.

Cute addition to the line up of bars off Central. Love the decor here and the set up. Service was super slow and basically had to pick up after ourselves all night but the drinks were good and all the appetizers we got were great!
The food is good and flavorful with a wide variety on the menu but the waiters and waitresses could use some training in proper customer service.

This was for a call in order on a Sunday night. Was told food would be ready on 20 minutes. Waited 45-50 minutes. Employee could not offer an explanation for delay in good being done nor did he offer compensation for long wait time.

Just went to get donuts here and the Asian woman helping me was chewing donuts while waiting on me and then spit it all over the dozen she had in her hand! This is repulsive! Never ever will I return here it is a health concern

2 cartoons playing back to back on Valentine's Day. Yeah, like my girlfriend's gonna go for Spongebob... What I really don't get, is what kind of parents take their children to a 9 o'clock cartoon movie on a school night.

Great Tasting Food! Love the interior! Awesome Customer Service! I purchased an e-gift card for my friend as a birthday present last December because I believe what this resto can provide and offer to its diners!
Your average vegetarian restaurant. It has lots of kale and peanut sauce, smatterings of cashew cheese, some fake meats, and not a whole lot of creativity.

The service center just tries to make as much money as possible on every visit by pointing out "lots of things" that need attention. No real interest in listening to customer concerns. Service advisors seem to have a don't bother me attitude. Avoid if possible.
Good lord are you kidding me! Items WAY OVERPRICED adorable but beyond any consignment shops I've visited take a peek if you have a hifh budget then this is your spot
Their food is okay, but they don't have very many vegetarian or vegan options, and the prices are high for what you get.

We went to Saladworks at 8:10 which gives them 20 minutes to make our food and it usually only takes them 5, but when we got there the doors were locked and they said they were closed. Honestly, we usually live this place, but it's ridiculous that this happened.
The beer is very expensive IV been in some deli that have more this place is just a rip off beware !!!!!

What a great find. I had read about this place in National Geographic Traveler a few months ago, and just happened to be driving by. The service was friendly, the pork and chicken dishes were tasty, and the sandwiches were huge. Definitely try the house sangria best I've ever had.

Probably the best Korean restaurant I've been to in Philly since leaving Cali 2yrs ago. I haven't eaten at a lot of places here, just a couple in jersey and cc but this place reminds me of home! The spicy pork bulgogi is perfect!
Food is good, place is pretty cool, but the best thing about this place is the drinks and the amazing bartender, Ivo :) He makes his drinks strong and delicious!

Hit or miss. We've had good nights and bad. Just ordered a chicken/red pepper pizza-which was good last time we ordered. No sauce, breaded chicken, looked like they threw the peppers on after it was already in the oven, and the crust was tough. No more for us, too inconsistent,

If you've lived in Reno for at least 20 years, then you know that Miguel's has been an excellent place to go for a great Mexican meal. It's exciting that after so long, they FINALLY opened another. It's just as good as the original!

As others have written, it's really more of a diner than a restaurant. Pros Some of the food is a bit overcooked. I've learned through the years what to get and not to get, so I enjoy O'Grady's and will be enjoying breakfast there tomorrow!
We are visiting from out of town and wow this is one of the best meals I have had in a long time! Highly recommend

This place has great staff and great street style tacos. It's a great place to grab a quick bite for not a lot of money. My kids love this place and will eat multiple tacos each we all leave full and happy without breaking the bank.

We drove in from Houston to stop by and eat at this little gem of a restaurant and we are so glad we did! This place was delicious and the staff was AMAZING! I highly recommend this place if you are in the New Orleans area for good eats!
Great pho. Service was whatever but your paying 10$ for your meal and asian restaurants arn't exactly know for service so who cares. Great deal ~10/10 would eat again
Sat in the back patio and had a delicious chicharron sandwich w/ homemade plantain chips from this cute family owned restaurant! Will definitely come back here again.

Best Orchestra in the world! I have listened to them all, Berlin, Vienna, London, Royal, Chicago and the usual suspects I am guessing because of the old ladies? But there is a complimentary coat checkinlifetime!
I love this restaurant 2 nd st its the best one in Philly food and people are great love it love it love it
Horrible when a company turns political and leads parades and runs cars off the roads and advertises swear words on their mobile billboards!!!

Cheesy atmosphere, food was good! Got the giant pretzel and Rahm Schnitzel, both were good. I've had better pretzels but it was good. I like german environments but I felt like the singers were just trying to remind us to buy a beer with their songs.
Slowest drive through service East of the Mississippi! Don't order a frozen drink because it will be a room temperature mess by the time you get to the service window!

I really like Einsteins bagels, cream cheese flavors, bagel thin egg white sandwiches and awesome e- and I'm not on their payroll. This is not a one time observation, this has been my experience on each visit to this particular shop.

This place is AMAZING. The food is like nothing I have had locally. I had the impossible burger, which is one of the best veggie burgers I have ever had and I have been a vegetarian for 10 years. I can not wait to eat here again!!
FOOD IS AMAZING. Now for the bad news after me and my friend stuffed our faces and forced ourselves to eat more because it was delicious we saw a large adult size roach crawling on the wall.

I had the absolute best birthday ever at Eddie V's. Not only was the food amazing, but Alejandro and the rest of the wait staff went above and beyond to make sure I had a great evening. You have to get the truffled Mac and Cheese and the Bananas Foster.
everything is horribly overpriced!! I mean, it's USED, I'd rather go to Ross for NEW clothing instead of paying 80 dlls for some used boots... great selection but for a ridiculous price

I have to agree with Ibo. The tea room is a great place to go on a date and the selection of green tea is fairly extensive and good. The workers are very informative and helpful. Frequent buyers can sign up for discounts.

Amazing place to buy a car everyone was so helpful the sweatshop I've never seen anything like it my wife got the perfect car at the perfect dealership Thank you Dimmitt Chevrolet for the great service

Delicious lobster roll. A bi, a lot pricey, which is why I don't go there too often, and why I didn't give 5 stars. But cool decor, reminds me of Maine, I'm from New England, and very friendly staff. Like I said, delicious, but way too expensive.

I've definitely had better but this is no way a terrible place. I feel as though this place could use a proper makeover, not just with the decor but with the food as well. It has plenty of potential and a great location with plenty of parking.

AMAZING! My bf and I were in a bind and needed to get his passport renewed in a day and Howard couldn't have been more helpful. We dropped off all necessary documents to his office on Sunday afternoon and had his renewed passport by 5:30 Monday. Howard saved our vacation!!

Strange that they can't make an açaí bowl with banana, strawberry and avocado toppings into smoothie form with no real reason. Alternatively the detox smoothie + avocado was delicious. This place also offers 23 mg of CBD oil for $2.50 which I thought was cool.

Just moved out after a year of staying there, and I couldn't have been happier. From the staff and property manager, Jennifer to the living conditions and amenities, I highly recommend the property to those looking in the area.
Absolutely the best pasta in town!! Added bonus is supporting a local business! The Ivan a la Vodka with Chicken is my go to, but I've had just about everything on the menu and it's all amazing!

They have a good breakfast. Some of their lunch & dinner entrees are a little bland. It's a cool place to watch a game and nice for the area if you want to avoid driving to Adelphia's, but the atmosphere is a little generic.
Food is great!!! 100% recommend I am arab and went to this place with high hopes of the food and these hopes were defiantly met :)
The poor puppy mill pups that get sold here Sad cages full of dog poop and they all have diarrhea from the crappy food there fed Dislike this place

Expected much more from a Westin hotel & resort. Here's my experience in a short list: PROS Free pilates class on Saturday morning CONS Bathroom door does not close properly Coffee in the room was expired Dated shower and tub. No resemblance of "luxury" at all.
They say they are open 24/7. I work overnight and have tried to order food at this location many times between 12AM-2AM and the staff continually says they are closed.
fuck this place don't go here I had to stay here for 4 hours only for them to ask me 10 questions and tell me I was fine to leave

Nice place for a meal and a few beers, hang out at the upstairs bar for some good conversation and to hang out with some friends and be prepared to make some new friends too! They have a fantastic beer selection, friendly service and greta fries.

This place has zero customer service. The employees are extremely rude and the owner allows them to continue their behavior. They talk back to the owner all while the employee at the register hands me the receipt and says "take this." Will definitely not return again.

Interesting use of technology, well crafted food, comfortable well lit dinning area, efficient service, over priced wine, optional small or large plate menu. Overall good experience. Would recommend it and will too again soon.
A really wonderful fast food joint which is a rarity nowadays This place really surprised me and the food was absolutely delicious as well it's worth a visit if you're in New Orleans

This place is breath of fresh air Its cozy and fresh I had: Vanilla latte 5/5 just amazing Lemon ricotta pancakes - 4/5 All together a great experience and i enjoyed my self a lot and will surely be back anytime i stop by santa Barbara
Took awhile for me to get service from the people working because they were busy talking in the back so that made me kinda annoyed, but other then that it was a good meal..Nothing really special.

This is the only breakfast spot I choose to go to whenever I am in SB or drive by because it's so delicious. I started coming here four years ago and it never gets old. Also, Julio is awesome. Thanks Dawn Patrol!!

Mel seemed in a rush. My sons hair was uneven. Don't let your wife or daughter go in there either, cause he is sketch and will probably try to pick up on them. Dude is a perv and tries to always get with young girls.
Not a fan anymore. I tried to order take out and they are rude and yelled at me for even assuming that the online menu was accurate. The food tastes reheated too,

I wouldn't recommend going to this office to anyone, especially with Dr. Christian Peralta. I was told after getting X they're just trying to get as much money as possible without thought for the patient.

Honest about what needs to be done, you can trust his work. It's hard for women who don't have automotive skills, and lots of time to find someone who they trust aren't going to gouge them. Take your car to Tony. Joan B.

Food was Great!!!!!!!! The bartenders are what buried this restaurant......They would leave the wait staff waiting for a while for drinks to be brought out, all while the bar staff was talking with the regulars.
Food was okay normal Panda Express that's about it staff was very rude and seemed irritated that I was evening ordering food
Many people just come for the desserts, which are extremely good but I must say their food is just as great! Extremely popular around lunch and dinner times but worth the wait.

Honestly i heard bad things about the people here and the selection, but I don't listen and tried it for myself... Bunch of red necks with attitude problems if you got a little pigmentation under your skin spend that dollar elsewhere they don't want your money ‍

Very disappointed the owner or manager whatever her title is was so rude. Told me kids in a snotty voice you cannot jump in the you are too big then later followed my child around and jerked a horn for bday party out of his mouth. Will not return

Stood in line for like 30 minutes only to be told that my girlfriend who was in the bathroom by the time I got to the ticket counter had to show her ID to get into an R movie. We were then sent to the back of the line. Pathetic!
The portions were reasonable so were prices and if you are in the area, I would definitely recommend them for a quick lunch. Yummy

It's hard for the mens to invade a waxing establishment, but EWC is definitely the place to go for us new . Is waxing painful? Only if you're a little tittybeater and think no one cares. Go to EWC. You will love their staff, their work and the new you.

Excellent service as always. Ken and his crew are always fast and efficient. I've been coming to this location for years and no matter who is working the service is wonderful and the staff is so polite. Quality service is always provided. Thank you and keep up the great work!!!

Excellent must go here on a Monday night that's all I need to say but if you want good music this is but one good option and the drinks are fine and staff plus patrons fine too so prices not bad what else do ya need just go check it

Food was great but service was slooooooow. Perhaps an abnormally busy Monday night had too few staff working but if not ordering dessert, 40 minutes between finishing eating and walking out the door is a lot.

The yogurt here is pretty good and a great ending to a meal. True, the sushi isn't the best but it is edible and much tastier and healthier than the other options in suburban station. Plus you can get your lunch and dessert in one fell swoop. .

I had a facial here today by Amanda and I loved it! They use all organic products that felt great. I have had facials before where I left feeling worse than when I came in, but this experience was so pleasant and positive. I definitely plan to return!
Typical VZW where they try to sell you the moon, but I just needed a new cover glass so I was in & out quickly.

The food is always great! The service is subpar. After waiting 20mins of waiting after we were done, I had to go inside and ask for the check. It was also hard to ever find a waiter to refill our water, take our order, and give our credit card back.
Yeah I like to drop in here for some Ribs when I'm craving them. This location is always clean and vey friendly Always good and as a matter a fact I could really go for some right about now...

This was terrible the French fries are over seasoned, the wings have a weird buttery taste and there soda machine wasn't stocked properly and there customers service sucks they didn't want to redo my order

Poorly run. You don't know it's not first come seating-you're suppose to see the hostess for any seats, not that it's stops anyone from sitting & being chased away. Great place to watch many many tvs.
While I'm not usually a greasyforI'd recommend Monkey Burger! They have great chairs, too, which is a weird thing to note but my friends and I couldn't get over how comfortable they were.

This was the first time I ate a pie five pizza and it was really good I like the fact that you can create your own pizza and they don't charge you by the topping so check it out and the guys were very nice and very helpful. Great service
Tacos where cold meat was good they replaced em and they brought me salsa I loved the staff very friendly and the ladies where gorgeous great personalities def will go back next time I come through

Good burgers, just the way you want them. Great milkshakes and if you're a fan of homemade potato chips, these are excellent - ours were piping hot and crispy when served. It's a chain with a retro '50's decor/graphics. Good menu for a burger restaurant.
Average food, fries were dr. It was very busy so I guess a lot of people like it, I just didn't find anything specifically different in the burger taste
I've only been here once and when I had their enchiladas it wasn't too bad until I bit into it and there was a long black hair and a bitten off finger nail!!!! They're a bit pricey in my opinion too.

i ordered carryout. the basic pizza i always order from a place i'm visiting for the first time is pep and sausage thin crust. so comparing it to all the other pizza's i've had, this was just average- not bad, but nothing outstanding.
No matter how much I love this pizza and always go back to it, the delivery from this location really sucks. Currently 30 minutes past the quoted time, and this has happened on many occasion.

Great! The burrito had a good size and had just the right amount of moisture so it does not desolve during your feast. Very fresh. The restaurant interior was clean and modern. Quality small-chain Mexican greatness.
Garage got messed up right before Memorial Day weekend. These guys were awesome, came out on Saturday of the the holiday weekend and did a good job at reasonable price. Very satisfied!!!!

I realize this is a lower cost hotel but I registered for two people there was only one bath towel, there were no kleenex, there was no radio to set an alarm, no coffee pot, and the worst part they want to charge extra $3 for wifi!

I've stayed in the hotel several times, so I'll keep it brief. Pros: Card key access for every floor Very quiet Huge bathrooms Fi too expensive Actual room very cramped King beds never available at checksmoking rooms still smell like smoke - boooo.
Their margs are so delicious and they have a great choice of flavors! Only complaint I have is their food is a bit too salty but the service is great and it's such a cute little restaurant.
Too specify for thick sandwiches that I can't even eat, and their cakes, way to pricy, employees are forced to go up and down with trays, filled of food . That's not right
I'm so conflicted on this place factor going on here, which is maybe a strange reason to want to come back, but I hope I love it next time. I'm thinking maybe the pizza?
Cool building good service good beer The spinach artichoke dip was disappointing As was the burger And how can you make burgers and not have mustard ?

Finally a crab boil in Florida!! I absolutely love the savory spicy flavors. Great atmosphere, everyone is always so friendly. My go to place for seafood. If you are a seafood lover and not afraid of spicy or seasoned food for your palette this is the place for you :)

This is based only on their brunch. Stayed at the hotel with a friend and we got brunch the next morning and I got the steak and eggs with of course a mimosa. Very good. Have to come back for dinner and drinks sometime.

Ordered pizza for delivery ish, it didn't detract from the flavor - both amazing. I eat a lot of pizza and these were two of the best I've had, and the price is about what I expect. If I wasn't visiting from Toronto, Domenica would be a twice/month visit.
Moved to Tucson from LA Cali Stopped by and bought a couple of these famous dogs and boy was I surprised. These dogs were so good..never had a hot dog like the Famous Sonoran dogs...so good...yummy

Called to get an estimate, and charges $105 minimum and doesn't come out for estimates, wants pictures...when I told him that was a lot to put a latch on a gate, he literally hung up on me. Wowww... with that kind of customer service, whew, I dodged a bullet!

Great place for a good hamburger, the onion rings are great. Good place for the children. They will enjoy the food and the food comes in a old time car they really got a kick out of that. Way better then taking the kids to a fast food hamburger joint

Gave the store a second try. Mike was very helpful and made the prepaid amazon shipment smooth and easy and quick. The previous visit, a different associate who helped me was beyond rude and unprofessional, make sure to ask for Mike when going to this store.
Hostess seated parties of the same size that arrived significantly after we did well before we were seated-after greeting the later arriving parties by name. Disappointed in this level of favoritism.

Wow!!! Best BBQ ever! Mac n cheese is literally to die for!!! The BLT was okay I would recommend getting the ribs and brisket over anything else!!! The corn bread app was the best overall all of them and you get that sweet butter for your rolls with your meal!

Great food, we had Oyster Rockefeller, a shrimp po-boy, and a cup of gumbo. We had to wait a little longer and I assume there was a mix up with our food, but in all it worked out. The staff interacted with customers and it had a great atmosphere.

We return to Toscos Pub repeatedly for two reasons which was really no big deal the bacon Cheeseburger was cooked perfectly and the wings were delicious. Ps- I didn't get it this time but the guacamole and chips is always yummy as well as nachos!

For something that keeps you active and allows you to drink at the same time This place is where it's at! Seriously ligit this place has kept its integrity through the decades and is on the rise again! So much fun

This place is terrible. The food is overly salty and greasy and lacking in flavor/execution. The dining room is filthy. I was originally very excited to see what I thought was an authentic Sichuan place near my office, but what a disappointment. I will never order from here again.
Fairly unremarkable, chain, "steakhouse lite"polite vibe going on, and did not excel in any one area to make up for that.

I'm a physician and all I have to say is after talking to their pharmacy, I would not recommend their service to anyone under any circumstance. They are grossly incompetent. They have no business dispensing medications, especially prescriptions; very scary.
Went to David's on a Monday night around 9pm. Got seated right away with a 6time thing, but if they burn me again, they wont be getting my business anymore.

The food selection and quality are very good. Usually the service is good, but the last time we went we had less than good service. It was slow and appetizers were obviously forgotten and then brought after the main course was brought without any apology or explanation.

NCO called me all day and night. I called 8776810 and they immediately stopped the phone calls from NCO. They then settled my bank debt for 25 cents on the dollar when I had the ability to pay a few months later. Don't be intimidated by these bottom feeders.

I wish I remembered the name of the guy who helped me but the experience was so quick that I don't even think I caught it. He was very smart and professional and I will definitely call these guys again.
If you don't mind slower service because the young staff want to joke around and pay attention to other things, then come on in for a really good hoagie. Stick with the Godfather!
Had to wait a while after my app told me I was first in line but the device and food made it worth it. The service was great and the seasonal French toast was better.

I have never wrote a Yelp review but the service at this location was terrible I requested a basic service but the management gave me a bait and switch. Too bad said the manager. We did the work and now you need to pay.

The chef has reduced the portion size of the Sushi set for lunch to the point where it's no longer a good value. Service is still good and they still charge the same but alas, greed has struck once more, sad to say..... welcome to America

We were only there for drinks but the waiter was so pleasant, accommodating, and attentive. The building itself is chock full of history and the atmosphere is open and inviting with a lovely back atrium area with a small pond.
Decent merchandise, but pricey for a second hand store I guess next time if I go in there, I will need to be kind of rude to get assistance to look at something behind the counter??? That's not cool

Food is delicious and the young man who was at the cashier was very nice and respectful. Only down side was the Mongolian bar was very dirty with toppings all over the place and a messy sauce bar. Besides that food was on point!

Awesome window box at the front of the restaurant but nobody pays attention to it - you have to uncomfortably push into the bar to order anything. With 1hr+ waits you'd think they'd have better staffing up front to serve those waiting.
I'm so sad they no longer sell pizza but nonetheless the sandwiches are excellent and their wings and fries are delicious. Every time I visit Philly I make sure I visit!

Top notch service and great pricing. They fixed my window at a lower cost than the other shops I looked at and they came to me to fix it. It took them only 30 minutes to fix my window. The service and price were excellent. I highly recommend.
My dessert had a bug crawling on the plate and looked like it had been sitting around for a while and was stale. The service was super slow.

There's an old joke -.... two elderly women are at a Catskill mountain resort, and one of 'em says, "Boy, the food at this place is really terrible." The other one says, "Yeah, I know; and such small portions." Well, that's essentially how I feel about taco mamacita.
They fixed my new iPhone 5 and sold me on a more protective case. I am sure there are more cost efficient options around, but they seemed to get the job done quickly and effectively.
This is my favorite pet store because they always greet me when I arrive, they have a good inventory and competitive prices and they offer good advice.

Pretty decent spot for a quick bite. Matzo ball soup had great flavor and matzo balls were light, but they didn't hold together well so that was disappointing. The turkey club was very tasty and I liked that they used oven roasted turkey for the club. It was very delicious

Unremarkable My husband and I dropped in for lunch on the recommendation of a local. I ordered the kimchi, chicken and tofu soup and my husband ordered a lunch special - spicy salmon sushi and spicy tuna suchi with a house salad. The food was good but not remarkable.

Ate here last night. Was disappointed with the meats as they were not properly seasoned. Unsure if it was due to the large crowds eating at this establishment and the cooks needing to get food out quickly, but the dining experience was sub par.

This is a mid-mall gelato stand and the gelato was good. It was a bit pricey, but it was rich, creamy and very tasty. The small size gets you a very generous portion and is enough to top off a meal or good for a quick snack.
I love Eegee's, but it's SOOOO STUPID how they make you pull up and wait for just an order of fries!!!! Why!?!?!?!?! Especially when no one else is in the drive thru or inside!?!?!?! Dumb!!!!

Such a yummy breakfast/brunch spot. Even though there's not very many tables in the restaurant, the staff were very accommodating getting us off the wait list very quickly. The Cuban breakfast sandwich was delicious and they have some of the best cheese grits I've ever had.

What a dump, the people who take care of this cemetery are horrible, the grounds are a complete disaster and the mosoleum are atrocious ceilings falling apart carpeting ripped up stinks inside, good thing no one was around, the most disgusting cemetery I've ever been too
the ladys on the phone made it very easy. deliverd in time and with a smiling face you are great and will set a preadent for the canabus industery thank you all

Original little boutique with gorgeous summertime dresses. All onea-kind options and well made apparel. Funky jewelry and friendly staff. Great place for a party dress..scoop something up while you're visiting that you can confidently say you won't be able to already find hanging in your friends' closet back home.
Good place to get cheap stuff for cheap if you're in the area. It took me a while to find what I was looking for the store is not laid out in a very organized way.

This place can burn in hell. It's a scam and at this point I'm going to be relying on Lyft or Uber, rather than drive my own damn car. Make sure to sign up for overtime because PPA is gonna rob you blind.

Yelled at by the cashier about cart not going outside, I had a lot to carry, she was extremely rude about it. It was fine, I just wished she hadn't yelled and been so aggressive. Love michaels; this one is smaller than most though

I can see the appeal, and you'll definately know if its your kind of place within 10 seconds of walking in the door. Think community room at some large non profit institution. People are nice though, and you'll see some unique things here.
We usually have a good meal at cheesecake factory's and we have been to a lot of them But tonight for dinner our food was not up to par ! The music was loud and food was served cold !
1st time customer, good selection, nice clean store, seemed kinda expensive, parking not too bad, couldn't find space out front, but not too long of a walk from lot.

Uncle Bills has been a staple in south St.louis, Always good food and service but in the last few years the quality of food seems to slipping food seem to taste old pancakes taste heavy and not fully cooked and cooked on greasy griddle. Interior of restaurant feels dirty,

We were having a great time until my friend asked the waiter for the ingredients behind the drink she was enjoying. Our uber cool skin head waiter Said '"shut the fuck up". I had him apologize to her but it ruined the experience.

Service was quite distasteful, luckily the hostess tried to remedy the embarrassing situation. When we finally got back home, the food was cold, but delicious. Will never go again, sure to share our negative experience story with local friends, even the people who recommended us to go.

I don't understand why everyone seems to like this places. It's not bad, just not as good as some of the feedback I have received from people I know who go there. Upstairs bar is fine but the downstairs dining is much nicer.

Every time American Arborists come to our house I feel like our trees are in good hands. They are extremely knowledgeable and I have never felt like they are trying to recommend services just to make some money. What a great company to entrust your trees to!
Loved the massage chairs while you're waiting for your toes to dry but they didn't rub my legs as long as I like. I'll probably be back.

I love this place! Inexpensive and delicious. Sometimes there's a big crowd at lunch ... a sign that others like it as much as I do too, so it's a good idea to go a little early or late if you want a weekday lunch there.
You have to get the double decker. It is what makes the place so special. Like you took 2 thin crust pizzas and laid them on top of each other, and gave it a nice crust handle. So GOOD!

If you don't like this man, you won't like anyone. He is the nicest service shop to go to and if anything goes wrong, he does his best to make it right. None are as good as he. Thanks for the good service! Will be back!

Disappointing. Having lived in Japan and Hawaii and dining at some great sushi spots, sushi should be a delicious meal as well as an awesome dining experience. Fish not fresh tasting. Atmosphere- meh. Tasted and felt like a C grade fast food spot. Won't be back.

Old Navy is Disposable Clothing, The Gap's lowinterested, underpaid staff has a n "I'm too busy stocking to talk to you" vibe here produced, el the snooty law firm folks I work with could sniff that out in a minute. Instead, I lavish my pre love the cheap socks.

Went with family after a long day of work, got a spicy tuna roll ehh it wasnt good, full of the crunchy stuff but I had the Thai spicy shrimp delicious! ! Will be returning, but not for the sushi, will come back to try more!
I'm still on the hunt for a good delivery Chinese place, my go-to closed so I figured I'd try this place. Solid meh. Food came quickly which was a bonus but idk nothing to write home about.
Great bands but no draft beer. Service is great and fast, even in a Saturday night. Be prepared to tip the band if you like them, Legends doesn't charge a cover so you can too the band!

Service is great and attentive. I am a vegetarian so I cannot comment on the quality of the meat dishes, but have enjoyed trying all their vegetarian options. Great flavor and texture! For the location on state street and the overall ambiance I was pleasantly surprised at their price point.
Breakfast 96 and tacos is where it's at at my opinion you should go and try it out best Mexican food ever

Good ramen, great egg, normal ramen price, soso chashu pork topping, the one complaint I have is subpar amount of noodles compared to the likes of the good ramen places I am used to like Monta, fukumimi, Sora in Vegas.

Martini's were great the service however was below par. Our waitress was unsure of what was in the drinks and when asked about items on the menu was not very knowledgeable. Overall the place is great to have a drink and a conversation.

Was hotter than blue blazers in here they messed up our order the burgers were okay no better than what I could make it home very small helping of fries we will probably not be back and it's walking distance from our house

Love coming to this place. The owner John is super cool. Went in today for a inspection and walked out full from a couple slices of pizza, inspection done, and a new tail light. I highly suggest this place especially for inspections.
First time here tonight for Dinner, The food was excellent and Chelsea our server was very friendly, we will return for sure.

Ordered the Chicago dog and a footlong all American chili cheese every bite was delicious the bread was toasted to perfection would def be coming back when in town the owner I believe is also the server and cook awesome guy thanks !
Nice place, food is good. The only thing is that it is so loud in there it is almost impossible to hear what people at your table are saying without having to yell.
Worst company I have ever delt with I would not recommend to anyone please run away as fast as you can
One of the Best BBQ places I ever gone to the meat is big af how it should be, the sauces are ok but I wished they had better tasting sauces, the ribs OMFG STUPID FIRE, Going again

Ordered a smoked chicken quesadilla last night and there was a long hair in it that was threaded through the chicken. Super disgusting! Last time I was here there was still wax paper in the beef brisket. This kitchen needs to get it together with their quality control!

I'm so glad I found Total Wine and more. They always have exactly what I want and at the best prices. Everyone is so kind and helpful. So, if you too are new to Tucson do yourself a solid and put Total Wine and more on your shopping list.
Sushi was above average service is average atmosphere was slightly noisy would only come here again out of convenience for it being close to where I park
The food there is great, but there customer service needs to improve there is always a long wait when you go through drive thru and sometimes they only accept cash
The food is always fresh and delicious, plantains tend to be a bit greasy more than crunchy, but I am a repeat visitor so they're doing something right
Been with for a few months very professional, prompt with work orders, everyone in office so far to me are nice. Much better than last landlord I would recommend BBW to others. 5 stars
Meh.much better choices in Indycheese plate included cheese with dried out edges duck wings noooo chips were good solo not bad no reason to return
Looking for a restaurant to get a steak or a burger, Tucker's Place is a great place to grab a bite to eat and the steaks and Burgers are amazing.

If you go here go to Kim. Kim period. My nails are perfect. My girls nails took 2.5 hours because the guy messed them up and at least 4 other people worked on her nails to fix them. Kim is the truth tho.

Sauce on the side is a good calzone shop, but nothing special. I have been a couple of times and never had a bad meal. I have had issues when I pick up my food though, staff will sometimes take a while to come up front to grab your order.

Excellent retreat restaurant with ocean views and access to a dock with a few chairs if you play your cards right. The fresh fish is phenomenal and the wine list is impressive. Order dessert and consider the key lime.

Major bait and switch outfit. When Steve was managing the store you could get a real deal. NO MORE! Don't believe anything that is listed on their website as a special as it will not be close to the final sale price!! Stay away!

The food was good. But it did not reflect the price.But that was not the bug issue. Our waiter had a strong perfume to cover the cigarette adore which was still there and the perfume was conflicting with our senses to truly taste the food.

This place gets 4 stars cause the oysters were hooked up but they were very grainy. vegetarian options are close to none service was excellent I would have chosen the the spinach dip but the server didn't sound like it was anything special,
The pizza was good and the service was fair I have been here several times before and continue to go back. I would recommend this place for lunch and take out
The ladies here are a lot of fun as well as professional We recently had a bachelorette nail party and the ladies decorated the salon and even provided champagne.

Nice alternative to Trader Joes in the East Beach area of Santa Barbara. Lots of fresh produce & fruit. No meats. It's a good place if you want to load up on stuff for your vacation trip, college dorm, or sex fantasy!
Staff was very rude and just threw everything into the bowl. When they said it was create your own i didn't actually think I'd have to assemble my taco on my own

We have been coming here for the past 15 years and have consistently received high quality care for all our dogs here. Dr. Jarchow is very knowledgeable, thorough and great with the animals and clearly explains all the treatment options.

The Chicago dogs are very good & I love how they do their fries but to be honest the Italian beef when dipped & added hot peppers is simply outstanding. I highly recommend folks try all the above but mainly the beef. As Mike Shannon would say " unreal folks".
Great price good portion I have had other Pho and this is right at the top best to dine in the take out is with all take out Pho not as good as eating in

The puff pastry is the star of the show here. It's expertly done, flaky, light, and buttery. Though the shape might not be what an iconic meat pie looks like, it is easily the best tasting meat pies around this area. There is nothing bad on the menu.

We were anxious to see the mission, but when we arrived we were disappointed to see most of the building surrounded by scaffolding. We didn't even get out of the car since the website said people are only allowed inside the entryway and only for 5 minutes.

Do I have to give it even one star?!?!? This place is nasty! If you want to meet a crack whore then this is the place for you, as there are plenty to chose from. Paid for room online showed up, and left!!!

I'd like to try their other dishes but you simply cannot go wrong with #tacotuesday Fresh authentic tacos in chicken beef or pork for $1 with live music. Corn tortillas filled with grilled meat onion and cilantro. Fresh chips and smooth salsa. Will definitely be back!

Can't wait to go back! HOT TIP - you can get all you can eat at their tables! We made the mistake of waiting for a sushi bar stool when we could have sat and enjoyed the feast together. Large groups can reserve tables. FOOD not fuel!
Amazing food. Service was a little slow but seeing there was a huge party in the back I can understand waiting a few extra minutes. Will be going again!

The bank itself is fine, but the drive thru takes forever - it's terribly slow and usually only has one lane open. I always deposit what I can online rather than go though this drive thru and sit forever.

I wouldnt say iam regretting my visit but neither enjoyed it, service was decent, taste was mediocre and the food actually was a lot pricey for what i think was a frozen microwaved food Complementary bread was a bit comforting

considered the best BBQ in Nashville Jack's is definately in the best location right on 5th and broadway had the pulled pork and also beef brisket very small inside great food. great location, ok indoor atmosphere

Its nice and relaxing place when the TV isn't blaring. The lady cut my toe so bad I've been to the ER and my family doctor to be treated for a real bad infection. I'm hoping this second antibiotic cures it but I won't be back.
Did not understand the hype. Was not great. The place is adorable and the staff are awesome but the food is not up to par with other classic Tennessee biscuits and chicken.
The salesclerk went out of her way to find just the right balloons and fresh plant for my brother who is in the hospital. Extremely helpful and conscientious!
Quick update ... all is well at Monday Night, loving their Darkest Subject Matter yummm Also met Matthew they are working on putting in permanent extra bathrooms yeehaw.

Fresh & Flavorful! Great for kids and adults. The ambiance is casual and inviting! I had the Noble Pig with pepperoni, sweet fennel sausage, spicy soppressata, pickled peppers, caramelized onions, tomato sauce, fontina, and parm! If you're a light eater, the pizza can be shared between two.
I ordered 2 slices then watched as the kid touched every slice as it came out of the oven with his bare hand .......hello have heard about covid 19 highly recommend NOT eating here
It's a Starbucks by name not quality, all the food prices in the case are covered so you don't know how much they are charging for the food

Kate the server upstairs goes above and beyond to greet and take care of customers. The music and vibe is still as awesome as it always has been but that girl runs her tail off and is phenominal. Does it all with a smile. Go see her. Great bar

LOVE 59 Almshouse, !!!!!!!!!! The food is superb, creative, delicious, and presented beautifully. Hostesses, servers, and management went out of their way to ensure we had a wonderful dinner for 2 to celebrate our anniversary. We will be back again and again.

Biggest bunch of idiots... they gave me a contract with the wrong drop off location, quoted me the wrong price of mileage, and then gave me a truck with a dead battery. I was there for over an hour for a standard pickup.
Great atmosphere, great coffee, great cause. I had a well made vanilla latte and also tried a sample of a pumpkin chocolate chip muffin, it was very moist and delicious.
Airport sushi, for me is a complete gamble I wasn't in the mood for the infamous 'hot chicken' all without even a slightest of eye- fingers crossed they recycle!

Risha cut my hair yesterday, she listened to me with patience as to how I would like it cut, and then told me how to make the cut work after I did myself, washed it this morning and it looks great, going back!!!! Thank you!

This Wawa is always crazy busy but it is basically the best place to fill up before returning your rental car. You almost always have to wait for a pump to open but quicker and safer than other locations. They have Covid practices in place so masks are required.
Went here for a last single drink with a friend, his dad, and party before he got married in the quarter. The place was nice and calm . Interesting history...

I avidly eat pho, and I can say that this experience was not authentic. The spring rolls were not fresh at all, the pho was subpar, the ambiance was below average, and the service was slow. Won't be returning.

one of the most amazing stores i've ever been to! just going in there is like experiencing a kaleidoscope of the whole world. their bead selection alone is reason enough to go, but you always discover some vintage hat or kimono or some obscure artifact you never knew you needed.
Food was exceptionally good only problem is they forgot our ice teas a with a $16 tip on top of itThen on the family meals I forgot the the rollsThey need to work on their customer service

Will give it another shot, fries were excellent and so was the Nashville Hot Chicken sandwich, albeit it was quite thin. Great ambience and kitchen manager came and apologized. Will add another review on the next visit. Friendly staff as well, seems to be a welcome addition to downtown.

Second time I've been there, second time I left feeling sick to my stomach with the strange, disgusting smells lingering in my brain. Save yourself! Even Panda Express would be five-stars compared to this toilet.
Owner claims they don't "cross the river" into West Philly, in spite of being located in center city and advertising as serving Philadelphia and Philadelphia suburbs. Sketchy.
Reserved a car online only to arrive at the location and have them tell me it was unavailable with no option of a substitute except for a 300% upsell.
wowza this place was amazing!!! i never finish meals and i ate the whole thing and the portions are perfect like not too big and still plenty!!! amazing flavor like wow. just wow!!!!!!!!!!!

It's a hit or miss with customer service at this location. I've came multiple times where the employees are just gathered in a group talking and don't even look at you when you walk in and other times someone will come up and ask you if you need help. (:

Surprisingly enough, they have great breakfast burritos. Ham or sausage. ...... you can't go wrong. Whenever I am heading to McCall I call in for a to go order and they have it waiting for me. Who would have known, golf courses are not just for golf anymore!!!
Very good ribs and there homemade chili is awesome the wings are crispy and delicious this was the first time I had been here definitely going back

The toppings seem to be just throw on by the handful, so don't expect the pizza to be put together delicately and evenly. But it was delicious! I regret having waited so long to try it since I'd heard heard ago.

Didn't know what to expect at first when arriving as the place is a little secluded and small, but the tacos were excellent! Had lengua, asada, chicken, and the marinated pork. The pork was my favorite - definitely recommend!
Good craft beer selection, meats were very flavorful but were lukewarm at best, sides were a bit of a letdown too. I'd give it another try but so far not impressed.

Quality has dropped drastically. Combine that with the rotten customer service and the ridiculously long delivery times which result in luke warm or even cold pizza and it's a wonder this place is still in business.

Very very good! The outside has heaters for when it's cold and it's a nice environment to hangout with a big group of people. Sushi taste fresh! Highly recommend the baked salmon with snow crab. I'll definitely be back!

4/8/16: What a step backward. While the service was still good, tonight's food left much to be desired. I had the sausage & shrimp cheese grits. Once you get past the grease floating on top, beware of the "nacho cheese either way, I highly recommend glory days now.

i gave it just one star only because it had no deli, and I went in to get coleslaw and that meant i had to drive to kolb and speedway . I could not believe the layout of the store. Come on Walmart corp get real.

After I referred my issues to the Pinellas County Consumer Complaints division of the county prosecutor's office, the company finally responded promptly and fixed both leaks by removing old shingles and re-doing the work correctly.

Matt and his supervisor Julie we're great, they compensated with a free app because they could not take a coupon that was for another location. Also, our 8oz sirloin came out perfect and the margaritas were great!

One great relic of a pizza dive. Judging from the other reviews it seems they're not good for take out, but for eat just good old Italian favorites served with lots of bread. The placemats have ads for local businesses and a map of Italy. Need I say more?
Another messed up order Missing cookies Wrong type of wings No new products sold out Not sure why I keep going here Maybe the new one Morgantown Is better

I personally prefer Sephora. Just because I can always leave with 72752916539 free samples, and they actually will walk around with me and help me with my selections. I mainly go to Ulta to by NYX products.

I ordered to go. I had the tempura vegs and spicy tuna roll. It was OK I was not terribly impressed with the tempura. Maybe next time I will order in and see if there is a difference, I will say it is just OK.
The food was nasty not what I expected gumbo didn't even taste like gumbo red beans had no flavor an I had one piece of meat spent 35 dollars
I came here with a craving for nachos. They were beautiful, but had no delicious flavoring. I got it with the beef chili, which tasted closer to loose meat sandwiches than any chili I have ever had.
Yummy, very sweet milk tea. We were disappointed with the doughnut though - it was tough, wasn't sweet at all, and was actually just fried dough. Must try some of the soy/tofu desserts next time!

Horrible service. Two women were working and booked 8 clients at the same time. Three people ended up leaving. Worst gel manicure I've ever gotten, looks like I've had them for a week and the lady that did my nails cut my pinky.
Live music on Wednesday nights, a dance floor, and an older crowd that still knows how to have a good time.

They have a great atmosphere, very clean, great service, great sushi, but my boyfriend and I got ramen with no eggs which were supposed to be included and the broth was very oily. I had to stop eating because it left an oily aftertaste in my mouth after each bite.

I had high expectations for this restaurant given the hype of some colleagues. The experience didn't match the hype. The food was very highly priced for the quality, and the service was extremely slow - 15 minutes waiting and I hadn't even been greeted by my server.
This place was " satisfactory" at best. Service was good but the food left me feeling that the best part of the meal was the wine I brought.

Amazing views, good cubans, great deviled drabs, just wish they were bigger for the price, but we were the only ones sat up stairs on our side and the waiter was gone so long I never got hot sauce for the deviled crabs. Food=great! Service upstairs alone=crap

Great food, excellent value. Big portions and friendly, family run staff. The strip mall location and simple storefront might cause you to pass this one up, but that would be a mistake. Go in and get the Gyro plate and meet Mike, the owner.

Doesn't deserve the rating it has. The food was less than average. The live music might be alright, but the barbecue is out matched at other locations in Nashville, and the sides I had were sub par. Mission Barbecue is a better alternative that's not a too far away.

This place makes their own pasta, red gravy and prepared foods. I recommend coming here if you want a good meal at home but don't have the time to cook from scratch. My favorite is the lasagna. The prices are great and the foods is even better.

I have mix feelings about this place, I had a baby pancake, they served with caramel popcorn, I almost broke my tooth because there were some un-popped popcorn. For the prices I think Chefs could be more careful.

Met up with friends here for a drink. Really tasty cocktails, but i think too crowded and loud and out of my way to come again. Was tempted by the boards, but they seemed too pricy for what they were and we wound up not getting any food.

Okay first of all this place is good but one of the workers flipped me off I couldn't be more offended and I didn't even do anything I was trying to get my vente iced water my bad maybe she was having a bad day

Hmfh. This was my first Starbucks. I LOVED the ambiance of the shop inside an old house, so I hung out here way too many times to count. Unfortunately, they bulldozed the house and replaced it with a smaller, cookie-cutter store that looks like the rest of them. Pity.

Buel puri was not fresh, medu vada was ok but sambar had no flavor and was very watery, chutney was not good. A blind man could have made a better chutney and sambar, chicken tikka was also average. Save your time and money. Try another place

The pharmacy line is always ridiculous. Long line to pick up medicine another long line just to ask a question. Went 5 hours after my doctor appointment to pick up my prescription and they said half hour wait along with 7 other sick people waiting for theirs. Staff accordingly!
I come here every day for lunch if you are going to provide this place for people to eat, can't you keep it clean?"

The Heart Attack Waffle!! Interesting mix. It was surprisingly good but unfortunately, my eggs were overcooked and by the time the food arrived, the waffle was saggy and the cheese was like melted wax.
Pizza under cooked if i wanted that would of gone to lorenzos on south street its always under cooked too not just a few times :(

What a great place to have breakfast and watch planes land. Had a great time there on Sunday morning watching all the planes land had a great breakfast wrap which was called Southwest Airline. All the people there were very friendly and nice. Would come again.

This is an overprice diner. It's a little dated in the service is slow. The food was about the quality you would expect at a diner but the prices were more of a Greek restaurant. We will probably not return
I wanted to like this place but the food wasn't good. My husband's burger was well done even though he asked for medium and my French dip was very salty with very little cheese. I do not recommend!
I rarely write Yelp reviews, but this place is so wonderful I've never done anything to my hair colorkey place, too, very downearth and comfortable.

Muy buena la comida pero el servicio de la que toma las órdenes muy malo le falta carisma. No regresaría The food is really good but the person that takes the orders is not very nice, will not come back

A solid 3-star pizza joint. Not the greatest but if you ever grow tired of the hordes of ostentatious rich folk down the street at certain well known establishments, it offers both great respite and a chance to view the "common man" in his natural habitat.
Went to breakfast at the Pandora Diner on Christmas morning w/ my wife and the InInInInInpar, but at least they filled us up . Service was excellent, our waitress Karen, was friendly & attentive.

This is still one of my favorite happy hours in town. I absolutely love the seared ahi poke with caramelized onions and fish tacos. Only bummer is that everybody else loves this place too so you have to get there pretty early before it gets filled up.
Small place Only a few tables Birds flying in and out of the restaurant Beignets were okay Cafe au lait were good.

Pretty hit or miss in general. Fried pickle chips are the way to go. I'm writing this review mainly to correct Steve M below - El Camino Real is NOT owned by the Cantina folks. It is owned by the same people as Bar Ferdinand.
Wasn't too fond of the pizza. And if you walk in and only order by slices they ask you to sit on the closest side to the door. Garlic knots were very bland. I would suggest go to West Shore Pizza!
Unpleasant service. Ordered 3 sandwich's and was told "we gave you hot sauce" when we were given a tiny container of hot sauce on the side.

I had seen the TV commercials on this place, and I was in the area so I opened the door to see what it was all about. There were about 5-you have to ask for them." Really???? I have to ask for napkins? Won't go back.

I've only tried the noodle dishes here, and they are all decent. The portion sizes are on the small side, though not terribly small. Not much else to say except that it's your typical Thai place and very similar to Thai Singha down the street.
Great service. My husband ordered a cheese and bacon burger and I got the crawfish sausage por bo both well made and great tasting.

Octavia was amazing! She was friendly, knowledgeable and we had the best ride! We Definitely recommend the sunset trail ride to anyone both Tucson residents like we are on a staycation and/or out of towners! Thank you so much for the best time! We will be back!
The service here sucks pretty bad I had to wait over 30 minutes to get my second drink and nobody even asked me about it I had to pull someone aside to get my order amazing views though

Very very delicious food and completely interesting atmosphere. I went with my boyfriend after work and it was extremely satisfying. He's a big guy so an assortment of meats that could be unlimited if you let it was right up his alley.
I only tried the lamb shank, it taste natural and original, Maybe go there to try other kabob or combination plates.

Dinner was delicious! We ordered the Buffalo Jumbo Shrimp OMG it was so good, and the Pan Seared Chilean Sea Bass was delicious and cooked to perfection with lots of flavor. And the Redstone Famous Lodge Cornbread was yummy. The atmosphere and service were great.

This Starbucks gets really busy ever since they close the one on Robb dr but even though they get slammed, the baristas are always polite and they always give great service. I'm happy for this Starbucks. It's conveniently located too.
Very poor service! Spent $30 to try and watch "Straight out of Compton" they rejected me and my friends because my friends and I didn't have ID's with them! More like Nazi Germany!
Could be better all around. Food is not great and soda always flat. Very expensive to visit for a day after you pay for parking, entrance, overly priced food and junk from gift carts.

Such an incredible experience! Tyler the owner went out of his to make sure I was informed of what was going on and a time frame the whole time! Just moved to Clearwater and will not go anywhere else!
Well nothing changes sometimes a second chance isn't worth it food was awful tasted like it was cooked in old grease and took forever never again!

The pizza here is nothing to write home about. The sauce was like water, the cheese came off in chunks as if the pizza sat around for awhile, and the crust was burnt to a crisp. I would rather eat a .99 cent frozen pizza from Publix.
Took forever to be seated, eventually got seated with no menus, sat for another 10 mins with no drink or water offered. Won't be heading here no time in the near future.

Really wanted to like this place but the food is just average at best. No flavor. They charge extra for sour cream! I'm a vegetarian so maybe the meat are better but I've talked to people in town and they've had the same experience.....

7pm Sunday evening Jan17. Asked for one of a least 8 high top, tables, was told we can't sit there because that area was already cleaned, swept. Two hours before closing. I asked because I have a hip problem and hightops are preferred.

The flavor of the food was good, but none of it was hot and service was slow. We were only people in the restaurant on Tuesday night, but it took ages to get our waitress when we need anything! Most of the food was cold(

Amazing food, amazing service, one of those small hole in the wall restaurants located in the strip mall no one would ever guess that in amazing Italian restaurant sits right there. Please go try it you won't be disappointed.

Pretty reasonable prices...and food were pretty good, the only complaint I have is the potatoes in the dishes I got were too big and not really that much seasoned. But all and all I would still go back and order again from them.

It's a bit dark inside, but not uncomfortable. There are some really adventurous dishes on the menu, but if you are expecting authentic Vietnamese, look elsewhere. The food isn't bad, it just isn't that harmonious bouquet of flavors that we have come to know and love from Vietnamese Cuisine.

Nice little place. The bar gets insanely packed during happy hour sometimes and is very loud for such a small area. They close kinda kinda early and unless you are getting whatever food special there is, The food and drinks are very overpriced

Keith Larkin, the owner of FISH, is really nice to have in your own and did a very good job...Clean, prompt and friendly. Excellent price especially given the large amount of work he needed to do to get my windows, storms and sills clean

Sooo good and they have great customer service. Their chicken is amazing and it's always reasonably priced especially considering we're in Santa Bárbara. They also have outdoor heaters and allow you to control the setting yourself - why does no one else do this!
Terrible quality and service. Worse than every other chain pizza place in the area and was expecting it to measure up with some of the better ones in the area. It was very disappointing.
The hotel is pretty awesome, the restaurant however is terrible. Food is low quality and the prices Are insane town, steak last night was cold they "reheated it" prob in a microwave . Don't eat there

Good breakfast place, unfortunately my dish was barely warm and the flour tortilla hard, it also barely had any chorizo in it. We tried a variety of food here, I like the biscuits and gravy, the biscuits were made fresh and flaky, gravy nice and spicy.

Take NY Times' restaurant critic's review of Guy Fieri's American Kitchen and Bar in Times Square and substitute "Cheesecake Factory" for "American Kitchen and Bar" and your questions are answered. Seriously, my margarita tasted like diabetes and off-brand antifreeze.
We did the take out so can't review service. Food was delicious and fresh, we had the pork and pork belly sliders, YUM, also shrimp spring rolls and pate PO boy.

Food is amazing, although you would not expect it based on the facility! Quick and simple service....good Cajun breakfast....true southern comfort! From what I gathered you can have this food delivered but I don't think that would be the way to go! Just dine-in for the real experience!!!
It is mine and my husbands first time here. Food is expensive and it's mediocre.. we got our order wrong but we decided to just try it because it is just the type of flavor for our wings.

It was a nice walk around downtown Nashville and I learned a lot about the history. Our guide, Eliza, knew a lot of fun anecdotes and described events from a hundred years ago using 21st century language.

It shocks me that they want to charge me $184 to do a name change. To me, that's theft. I already got over the part where they charge more to carry your bags on, than to check but this is ridiculous. Beware.

The biggest complaint is the fact that as soon as you walk in, your nostrils are consumed by a nasty smell. A mixture of smoke and bar funk. Most of the time, it's so bad we have to go somewhere else.
If you are looking for creative face paint they close at 5PM on most weekdays and they are not open on Sundays.
