I know the steak is good when my husband closes his eyes after the first bite! He had Duke's Filet, fire roasted filet, mediumroasted, topped with sautéed mushrooms and artichoke hearts, nestled on a bed of Parmesan risotto and gilded with lump Lousiana crabmeat. Beautiful!
The last time I went there they under-charged my internet order by 1 cent and when I went to pick it up they insisted I go to my car and get a penny instead of just eating the lousy cent.
Sorry Abuelita, but there's a new soup queen of my heart. This little remodeled house in Tampa offers the best Cuban soups and sandwiches you can eat and it's worth 2-3 times the price you pay.

Food was pretty good. Was disappointed that website had Boudin listed and they did not serve it as letting my parents and girlfriend try it was the whole reason for our venture south. What we had was ok other than some overpriced jerky made out of pork...

Okay food, sarcastic waitresses. Got the food relatively fast. Floors looked like they haven't been cleaned in ages. So if you're looking for a morning insult and okay food for an okay price, this is the place for you!

My inlaws selected their caterer before choosing the location. The staff at the Colonial Dames was wonderful and so accommodating; I'd love to attend another event there and would recommend it to anyone looking for a beautiful event space accommodating up to 100 for a smaller wedding or party.

Visited yesterday as a guest of an out of towncooked approach to food @ The Chop House. And it has been very successful for that. In the future, however, with so many choices locally, home and many of these being non I'll pass and go elsewhere.

ABP may be a chain but they bake their bread in house and the ingredients are fresh! I had the chicken bacon avocado sandwich here and the baguette was crusty, the avocado was creamy, the chicken moist, and the bacon crispy. Really sign up for the E outright!

Staples is an awful company. They will take orders for products they don't even really sell or carry, then bait and switch you after unilaterally cancelling your order . They will also spam your phone with calls after the fact. I will never order from a staples again.
They don't have sushi any more This was our go to restaurant bc I would get bbq and my wife would get sushi. Not sure we can go back bc she doesn't like the red meat options.

We went here for the first time the other night, we recently moved to the area and were willing to try the local restaurants. We found this place to have an amazing selection and friendly service. We will certainly be coming back.
This used to be one of my favorite pizza places until I received a messed up order and they gave me a hard time about fixing it. I've since started ordering from a different place...

This place is an awesome experience, it's huge, it's an awesome place to catch a phillies or eagles game, and they have pretty decent food as well. The atmosphere and size alone earn this place 5 stars easy... out of towners, you should check this place out...crab fries

It used to be a more formal place but has slowly downstepped to a casual semiportion options and the soup/salad combos are fantastic. At this location service has slowly gotten less stellar and we've yet to have an issue-free dining experience in a few months.
this is worst walmart only one register open you have to wait 2 hours to get your staff one star is to much for this no customer service I don't recommend to shop from this Walmart...

Chef Cheri' has created a delicious menu! The split pea soup with sweet basil is to die for, best meatball sandwich in town, and my chopped greens with Gorgonzola salad was amazing. Definitely stop in!

There is a lot to like here like the avocado toast, but they only accept credit cards and the avocado toast comes in a box that when opened is difficult to eat from. I kept trying to slip it back in the box.

Very good Thai maybe a little pricey but the lunch special is affordable and plentiful They give you spice level options. Spring rolls were fresh and crispy, not over done or oily. And the dipping sauce was not the usual "duck" sauce, it had fresh ginger and scallion.

Horrible...apparently they let a lot of people go and now the park is not operating at full capacity and there are lines everywhere, worst than pre-covid!! Restaurants are partly closed and food selections are worst... no healthy options for adults or kids.

Found this place by walking up Haley and was absolutely amazed by the atmosphere, quality of the drink and incredible service. I love the presentation and that they're very environmentally conscious. A great place to study, meet for a drink or quiet self-reflection.

If i could give this 0 stars I would. I just left jack in box. First they denied me service because supposedly they're only taking online orders, supposedly, and the whole time yelling with so much attitude. Then proceeded to curse me out. Horrible disgusting service.

You know, I've been to this place twice and both times they amazed me with the friendliness, fast service and overall quality and taste of the food. This is a great inout breakfast chain if you want to avoid the Denny's on the world
Do yourself a favor, forget the two famous cheese steak establishments you always hear about and get your cheese steak here. I'm from New York and have my new go to place for authentic cheese steaks

Wonderful staff and dentist. Very thorough and explained everything. They made my daughter feel very comfortable and took the time to answer all of her questions -she was very inquisitive. I really appreciated their patience with her.

1.Safety lock is broken. 2.bed bugs on pillows and sheets. 3.call from stranger say they gonna rob, might be hotel front desk because no one else knows the hotel number except him. 4. Front desk staff was so mean and rude.
Gumbo was pretty good. The banana budding dessert was really sweet and tasted like a Cinnabon and the server didn't seem that enthusiastic; maybe because it was close to the end of the night.
Awesome service, from Brianna Rambo, helping with questions online and setting up the pre-approval to Jay Everett who helped me in the showroom. An amazing, welcoming, friendly staff!!

Having DIY'd 2 homes, I dread having to go to any home improvement store. The area around the store and folks mulling around the parking lot look sketchy but the employees were friendly and helpful. And they had everything we were looking for in stock so that's a positive.
Slow service. Got to the window and asked for syrup and the guy insisted there was some in our bag and we got home to find out there was none. How hard is it to do your job?

it's charbux. I wouldn't recommend it to anyone. try a local coffee house. been here once only cuz a friend was into it and I wouldn't talk someone out of what they like despite my opinion. gotta keep you happy
Ijji all you can eat sushi different kind of sushi I I can try mmmm and the waitress was so kind to us blacla
The workers always seem angry but this greasy spoon spot always does the food right so you deal with this rudeness of the workers just for the food.
Really good buffalo and BBQ pizza !!! But I feel that they are overprice for the size of their pizza and you need to pay extra for a dressing

This place has an interesting style, but really no substance. The service is incredibly slow, from the wait for a table, getting drinks at the bar, during dinner and even in the lounge. If u do ever go pay ur babysitter for overnight. The fried chicken was really good though.

The best thing about this place is you can watch them build hotrods, the food was nothing special and over priced for the portion size and quality. The burger I had was okay but low on the taste scale. Needs more flavor, and seasoning.

Let's start with "parking" = very limited. Food was extremely Over Priced for being simple plates of soup or rice bowls. Service can be highly improved, we weren't even asked what we wanted to drink and there were only 7 people at the restaurant
Bar is cool food is decent but the bartender working 4/24/21 in the upstairs needs to not be in the service industry. What a nightmare. Only 86 other bars to go to.

Good looking menu and good service. I hadn't been there in a while but I did recognize one of the Chefs that used to own a local restaurant. We were big fans. Prices were decent too. I look forward to going back.
Because of all the great reviews I've been wanting to come check this place out and I wish I would have came sooner!! The reviews are all accurate! This is definitely my new favorite spot!!
Best onion rings I've ever had. Seriously. Order them. Otherwise I think the food is fairly average, but it's a fun place to grab a bite in this amazing city!

Don't let the area or outside of the building fool you- the drinks were great and the food was even better. A friend of mine and I split the nachos & tacos! Both were amazing and reasonably priced. I'll be back again!

While the waitress was most pleasant, the Dover sole special 2 of us ordered was awful - smelled fishy & was dry. Had the guy deboning it not been snapping at the waitstaff around him creating a tense environment we would have sent them back. Disappointing.
Best tomato pie...........If your having a party or just for something to leave out for guests on a Saturday do yourself a favor and pick up a large sheet.

Average Thai food. It's overpriced for the portion and quality of food you get. I've definitely had better Thai food in other cities. However, it's probably the best Thai food you can get in the suburbs, so I guess we all have to settle. Also they're stingy with the rice.

This place is always my go to when I'm in the area besides the other Mexican joint across from my business but sometimes I go out of my way just to come here. Real good authentic food here for sure keep up the great work!
It was good. I had the mount Vesuvius. Where I can say it was good and the ambiance was charming, I thought it wasn't great and the price didn't match the quality.
I wanted to like this place, but I put my foot in the tub and there was left over sugar scrub from the previous pedicure. And my gel nail polish was very streaky.

Had pho here for lunch, was good, large menu, would like to get back and try some more things, especially the Hot Pot; which is only served for dinner. It was very busy, but they got us seated right away ;)

Wow this is the best massage therapist I have ever had. Whatever I need...cellulite reduction...deep tissue...relaxation - I've been coming here for 6 months and I buy the large packages because I know I will never go anywhere else.
I've been disappointed the last 6 times visiting this location, the coffee is flavorless and basically just taste like steamed milk.. retrain your employees

Clearly I missed the awesomeness of this store as found by other reviewers. It's messy, expensive and looks like it stocks what didn't sell on the clearance rack of party city, for twice the price. I don't get it.

Delicious yummy barbecue with great drink prices and attentive service. Don't usually like to do a repeat but we have come here twice in the last week and we keep finding the food is better and better. Cheesecake is homemade and one of the best we've ever had!
It's a good pizza once in a while. As a ny pizza fan I would say I couldn't eat pizza fusion all day long but sometimes the mood strikes. When I go it is enjoyable plus they have a lot of promotions.

I fly in to Indianapolis several times per year to visit family and always make time to eat here. I've been to Thailand and frequent many Thai restaurants as it's my favorite type of food and no Thai restaurant that I've been to is better than this.
Usually order food from here at least once a week to work, always great food and the prices are reasonable too. The delivery always gets there earlier than they say too which is nice.
Got a soup and salad the soup is actually pretty big so along with the salad it was decent for $10
While the drinks are good, there are many places in Philly making cocktails that are as good or better without the smug attitude this place works hard to give it's customers.

Horrible horrible customer service. They do not get the approvals from insurance companies on time and then call the evening before to tell you that you have a huge copay that they never told you about. Skip this Rose Radiology location.

This place is hella slow. Dinner took over 90 minutes on a weeknight. Had the duck breast. It was just okay . . . nothing extraordinary. Had marble potatoes as a side and they were absolutely amazing, but not enough to justify the overall wait and excessive price of the meal.
Excelente servicio, me gusto la comida, vivo en Atlanta GA, y de verdad que valió la pena venir a este lugar. Dios les bendiga y los siga prosperando.

Just picked up food. Workers are nice but none of them were masking and talking loudly which definitely causes aerosol and if not worried about COVID but secretions falling in food?? I have been coming to this location and it's the first time I was so disappointed
The food is good the large pizza is a little smaller than most other pizza places but it arrived very quickly and very hot I would definitely return. We ordered a large meat pizza
Best Korean food in Tampa, every time I come to Tampa for work I hit this place all the time, great food, great service.

This place is so good! Amazing portion sizes for the price, even the kids menu have huge portions! I got there are 830 and it seemed like the perfect time to get there because by 9 it started getting busy and a little crowded. I would recommend this place!

Avoid! Overpriced and super mediocre. If I pay $15 for a burger and fries, I expect it to be better than what I can get at Wendy's. Cheap bun and nothing elevated or gourmet about the presentation or taste of the burger I had.

$5.99 for a kids meal seems expensive to me Maybe have a more simple less expensive choice without meat Good service and food was good Empty room out of three one was closed Lots of people waiting to be seated when I left Tuesday 10:45am

Paid $15 for a stamp and upstairs access, left to get my wallet from the car and was threatened by the bouncer and told "no entry" 40 min to 2 am never informed of a time limit or no re entry rule for paying your money then leaving. Typical.
A place that has an all you can eat wings item cannot do anything worse than 3 stars even if the wings are crappy... which they are not here they are 4 star wings... everything else is crappy though.

Closed at 12 instead of 2 and would only take Uber or doordash even though I bet my Oder was smaller than doorshar or any other color service. I work in fast good service and know id be fired if I closed this early
This used to be a really good fast food restraunt. What are the biggest problem since they have a manager on duty that rather be on his phone then dealing with customers. That's my only problem

If my husband were ranking Superb Sushi it would have gotten all 5 stars. This is his handsware fun. My main hesitation is the sauce. Not the Superb Soy Sauce but all the many, other sauces decorating the rolls, like they were trying a little too hard.

I got the hot wings I was so looking forward for my food realized they look like a baby size wings and grade quality was not worth even grading and the fries were so soggy I just felt sad. Please don't go there unless every food establishment is closed
This place is the place to go if you are looking for souvenirs of Philadelphia and many of it's historical places. The owner was knowledgeable, helpful and friendly. Support local!

The service was not good, the server brought the wrong plates to us and did not return for a very long time. When we finally got our correct order, our server did not return and we had to go to the bar to get refills on our drinks.

Typical local bar. It's packed on the weekends and always a good time. They have 2 DJs, one is awesome and the other is terrible, hes been playing the same playlist on repeat every weekend. Weekdays is much slower. The pizza is amazing here! And they offer takeout.

My fiancée and I came here Thursday evening to get some wine for the night and stumbled upon them having a free wine tasting from 6-8. They have a great selection and a wonderful staff! I will be back again!

Always a good time here!! Food is great and the view is excellent!! Wine and drinks are a great compliment to the scrumptious food. Whether you sit on the patio connected to the main restaurant or the tiki patio you will be amazed by the food, service and ambiance.

Right off the bat, I should mention that I like the atmosphere here more than the food. The bar area has lots of seating, both indoor and outdoor, it's on State Street so you get a nice view of everything, and the staff is friendly as well.

Service is OK so long that my husband had to actually flag the waitress down and say, "Um, can we order now" Food is OK site, especially not the stuffed ones, such as tortellini and ravioli. Ambiance is nice. Parking is easy.

The avocado toast is really different from those I've had at other places, really tasty with a mixture of refreshing flavors. Latte is also a good pair! Service is very nice and I like the environment a lot!
I go here every morning and they always have my order ready when they see me coming; the best iced red eye in Philly! Friendly staff, great service. I keep coming back for a reason.
Walked in on a Tuesday and were told we'd be better suited to come back on a Wednesday or a Saturday. Huh. Or probs not at all

Ordered the chicken BLT the first time I came out the bread was done reordered it second time that came out the chicken was a pan seared had a very distinctive oil smell and taste about it definitely need to improve.
Still love the food, but definitely feeling it is overpriced after a few return visits, which will make me think twice before suggesting Winslow's Home in the future.
IBT's in a nutshell: Sunday 2 for 1 Monday 3 for 1 Thursday 2 for 1 Good DJ's, fun vibe, cheap drinks, what's not to love?
The owner of Eat contacted me personally and apologized for the service my family and I received. I am very impressed with him and I will be coming back on my next trip and writing an updated review.
Having tried this place a couple of times, after a late night hunger attack, I have got to say that Hidden pizza just flatvamp the current crust and switching to a firm crust, keeping the thin crust.

The baked lasagna was soooo good. The service, however, kinda sucked. And they ran out of Tiramasu!! Overall, it was a disappointing the experience, but the lasagna was so good that I had to give it 4 stars.
The store was closed for a while now it's a bigger more premium store like the 23rd and market well worth the wait

Rude waitress food was not good don't come here the waitress said she was anti military cause I wore a marine sweatshirt and the waitress said I won't take pics cause of the USMC sweatshirt and said I don't support the military marines don't support this place
Sadly this place has closed down and opened up as a full dining experience restaurant in Wesley Chapel. I wish them the best of luck, but not sure when the next time I'll be able to savor their food.
Pros: Fun, lively ambiance with lots of flat screens for your sports tasted like something you could get at Applebees or a "meh" chain restaurant. Made the mistake of getting the lo NOT to eat.
Wait in line for 15 to 20 minutes, we asked them if this was fast food and their reply was we're not. Horrible customer service.
At first we were skeptical because of how the place looked and the seating but the food was A-1 I recommend the shrimp poe boy.

I've had cookies from here twice and each time they've been soft and gooey inside with a crunch on the outside. I've had the chocolate chip and the double chocolate chip. Decent size for the price. And they are toasty warm when you get them!
Extremely overpriced for the amount and quality of food. Have tried a couple of times because they are very friendly and like to support local business but feel let down each time
McDougals fried chicken it's such a fun restaurant to go to. I cannot wait to return to Tennessee so I can take my two girls and experience this fun atmosphere family owned restaurant has to offer.

Had the Circus on Friday for lunch and was so blown away by flavor that I came in AGAIN on Saturday with my parents in tow. WOW Service each day was a 10! Thank you Kassie and Alicia. Can't wait to return
There phone person just hung up when I said I can't understand what she was saying not a way to do business

Went to checkers on 10/20/19 a few minutes before 8pm. There were 4 cars ahead of us. Got to the drive through speaker, the gal asks for our order, I ordered a vanilla milkshake and a sundae and then asked a question oh sorry the ice cream machine is broken.
My boyfriend ordered the carne asada nachos and loved it! I ordered a carnitas wet burrito but got a carne asada burrito since the kid that took our order, spoke little English. My burrito was gross.
The airport itself was very nice, although due to late arrival, I didn't get to really spend a lot of time there Florida business.
Service is always wonderful people are pleasant and management staff is always there with a smile but today it was a horrible experience food was cold and management was colder won't be back

They are pricey but they are worth it. Did a great job on me & my daughter gel set. I gave four stars because I told the guy who did my feet no gel just for my daughter but he did it anyways and I still had to pay.

They had a long line of people out the door waiting. They knew how many car reservations they had, but only scheduled two overworked young women to fill all of the reservations. They deserve a raise, and some co-workers.

They put a very rude dude standing at the door of the men's room who told me to wait outside while two other guys were smoking in there. Seriously?!! The drinks are wayyyy overpriced for an overall awful experience. The live music scene is mediocre at best.

After some initial problems, Miller made it right. Still paying a little more than originally discussed but I'm now the proud owner of a 2016 Ford Focus ST and loving it. I'll be in the market next year for an Expedition so I'll be back.

Its a pretty small airport, no outstanding places to eat even though you have just landed in the food obsessed part of the country. I bought a newspaper and it was the st. tammany edition which is about 50 miles north of the airport-weird.

I have no gripes with the food, drinks, or service here, but Twoedge. Thou, if your really jonesin' to lose your restaurant, how about sponsoring the "Guns, Booze, & Babies" event I've been trying to get picked up. That shit is a lock!
I did not enjoy my omelette but the French Toast looked incredible. I don't think the meal was worth the long wait time but I am new to the area so it seems to be a local favorite spot.

Great restaurant, wonderful atmosphere. We ordered a portobella burger and vegan nachos. Both tasted really good. The only knock was that in the middle of our order and the lunch rush our waitress decided to take her lunch break so it created a little longer wait than expected

Good food, average prices. But don't expect their staff to understand the words "thank you" or to comprehend that being courteous and smiling is appreciated by customers. Going into this place is not a pleasant experience.

Probably the worst Taco Bell in the St. Louis area. The service is horrible and this is on a consistent basis. If you have the option to go some where else I suggest doing that because this location will absolutely disappoint you every visit

I love this place they make their margarita mix in house which is light and delish not like the usual tourist trap margaritas. A great place to relax waterside. Their prices are reasonable and the food quality is excellent.

Anyone know what happened to Nick? I had been seeing him for a few months and had finally been making progress after a bad car accident a few years ago. Would love to know if he's a another studio! Thanks!

These guys are amazing! Fast, friendly, affordable, good local service. I went in there to have a watch band adjusted after running all over 4th Ave where nobody could do that for me and I will definitely go back next time.
Last time I was there the chicken was just ok what got me was the rice and red beans something I love it was horrible tasted mody what has happened to this place?
This State Store is grand because you can get your sneaky bottles of booze to drink in Rittenhouse Square Park on a sunny afternoon. Location Location Location.
Minus one star for serving a burger on a stale bun thanin true to the name Belgian tavern feel and a beer to please all senses, with fair prices across the food and drink menus.
Jennifer Lee is absolutely, hands down the best hairstylist that has ever touched my hair!!! My hair was super damaged and she saved me from losing all of my hair and I'm forever thankful for her!!!

Absolutely delicious each time I come! I usually like the best of the best burrito and the everything donut but today I got the donut and one of the sushi burgers. Amazingly flavorful each time! Service is great! Prices are amazing! Love love love it here!
Celebrated a 40th birthday with about 100 people and everything from reserving the venue to the food and service were excellent!!

Great place to go and enjoy your self with family and friends . There is a lot to do with the kids you can also enjoy some adult time there with a few drinks, parking was $20.00 but it put you rite there .

Just left Wraps, had great a great burito, the guac is really fresh, as are the chips, we also love the caso cheese sauce. We love that it is a locally owned business. Friendly staff and clean environment. WINNER, WINNER, BURRITO DINNER.

Honestly, I don't get the hype. Yes, it is better than Geno's, Pat's, and Tony Luke's but at the end of the day, it was a cheesesteak and not worth the parking hassle and having to wait in a small stuffy room packed in with not so friendly people.

Adopters beware! This place gives out your personal information to people who foster the pet you want to adopt, and then allows the foster family to harass you until you let them keep the pet. This was awful.
Husband and I went and weren't sure what to expect, the food was good, we enjoyed everything we got, we were happy with the service and prices were fair. We'll definitely be going again!

The restaurant is cute, but the service was terrible. The waitress was curt and rude. She didn't bring silverware and when I asked for a side of ranch she acted as if it were an inconvenience. It made our experience less enjoyable. Don't wait tables if you don't like people.

Pros: nice setting, good ambience and service, easy to find parking Cons: bland food, reminded me of an upscale Olive Garden but with worse tasting food. Overall I don't think we will be coming back again.
I had their burgers & fries to go, not the shake. The food here is pretty good, but if you're like me who's from the west and used to eating at Inout, then you won't find anything special.

Tried this place for the first for football on a Sunday and it was great! Amazing atmosphere plenty of TVs great drinks prepared by an even great bartender named Kelli who was fast and attentive even with a large crowd! I will definitely be back soon!

I've always had friendly wonderful service. The food is nothing special, I prefer my own breakfast to it honestly, but my daughter loves it and since there's never a wait it's well worth it for a relaxing breakfast out.
Dang we walked out and are never going back. Didn't even get a chance to try the food we were so turned off by the vibe and the attitude of the counter person.
I love them food be soo fresh and good they can get my money anytime ‼ they fish and burgers are good and they fries

I'm not a big fan of seafood speaking showoffs we had in tow :) ] So yeah, if you're in new orleans and you're not a fan of seafood, take a page out of my timid food book and go for the red beans and rice. you won't regret it.

Delivery took over an hour, salad was missing chicken, calzone was missing cheese and credit card was overcharged for amount online ordering gave. Called manager said they sent me a gift card for one of the items.

Every time I have been to this location the service has been terrible. I guess it would also be unreasonable to say that a Taco Bell should have better service due to the fast food oriented environment, yet I have been to other locations that treat their customers much better.
Just left there after taking my brand new car with only 6500 miles on it and they got grease all over my seats! Not going back there! Wtf?

I had a surprisingly delightful lunch at Champps ofmill formula cooking - but if you choose wisely you can get a decent meal here. Tip: Come after the lunch rush during the week when the place is much less crowded. So surprised I liked it as much as I did.
Service was extremely slow for a Tuesday night, food was only mediocre and the waiter got half our order wrong anyway. Don't think I'll be back.

The store smells really nice, and the person behind the register was really friendly. They interesting decorations, jewelry, and art. I wouldn't go out of my way to visit again, but it's worth checking out if you happen to be in the area.

Good bang for the buck. You get a lot of food6 which definitely fills you up, and the food isn't flavorless as well. But I would probably not eat here unless I am very hungry and don't want to spend a ton of money.

They take your name but call the food order out instead. Everyone run over to see if that's your bagel! Cashier was not an active listener or responder to questions, not sure why she seemed distracted as it wasn't so busy.

I had had my car washer here, and I thought that his wash equipment sprayed a paint like material on my car, and found out later that it couldn't have happened there. So this is my retraction. I apologize to the operator of wizard car wash. Aston, Pa.
I had my SUV detailed and they broke my center console. They didn't tell us until after a day when my wife found it and they don't want to talk to us. They never returned our call or emails.
Sorry: Too tourist-y, too corporate, too many of the bartenders have attitude, and the beers would have been awesome 10 years ago but in the midst of the craft beer revolution, no longer impressive.

This place made me feel so uncomfortable I don't want to come back to this red lobster ever again, I love red lobster just not this one. My waitress made me feel awkward, and ashamed to be there. The food was good, but I didn't enjoy being there
This was by far the best Vietnamese food in Indy! The old owners recently retired and I'm hoping to go try and see if the menu stays the same and the quality of food remains!!!
With all of the great Mexican taquerias, this is not the place to go for the food, but you can't beat the fun vibe and the great assortment of margaritas.
Tam cut me and made me bleed while carelessly chopping at my cuticles and didn't even offer me a discount or anything. My cuticle is still inflamed and hurts! Never going back

I love Fishtown diner from the girls that answer the phone to the delivery drivers they are amazing if they make a mistake they fix it right away no questions ask I just want to thank them and tell them keep up the good work
Best haircut I have had in the Trito-earth and knowledgeable about hair and would never make you feel like you were talking to a glamour drone.

Again this company Gold Medal, against City of Philadelphia Ordinances, collects and crushEd trash before 7 am in 200 block of South Sydenham Street between Walnut and Locust Streets, waking residents whose condos back onto S. Sydenham, Philadelphia. This happens repeatedly.

Want to pass on super "kudos" to Tony, who delivers what I believe to be one the best "straight razor" shave experiences, not only Indy, but around the country. His attention to detail is superb and his ability to make you feel welcome is excellent! Obviously, I'll be back!

I uploaded my prescription with my order. They emailed me three times that they needed my prescription. I never got a tracking number and they'd shipped my order after the second email but still kept asking for my prescription. Very confusing/frustrating.

Went there to fix flat tire and tire balance. Went good but they forgot put donut back in the trunk had to go back from phily spent hour in traffic and they said, -"we are really sorry"not the good answer will never go back there
Po boy 4 stars Restaurant 1 stars Classic New Orleans but place was pretty dirty hard for me to enjoy the sandwich
Took deposit when they knew they had a different size floor plan and said they were going to return it and never did. The office manager always had an excuse.

The coconut shrimp appetizer is really good! Also, if the weather is nice and you'd like to sit out by the water, this is a great spot for that! Service was a little slow, but we were tourists and not in a hurry on our last day in Tampa.

Very disappointing. Their food isn't made from scratch and they use bad oil - I had the buffalo cauliflower and felt horrible after eating. Better off going to another restaurant that has limited vegan options.

We had the pleasure of having both Randy and Brian as our tour guides! They were both amazing guides, engaged with the group, and were very informative with interesting stories and facts about the area!!! Highly recommend!!!

Excellent mac & cheese along with steelhead trout slider made up for the sour puss attitude of the lady taking orders. I'd eat here again, but would hope to not receive the same cold glare. Funny, she was all smiles and the young man in the business suit.

Love the makeown menu!! Super tasty, fun vibe, great staff. Great neighborhood place. Definitely coming back especially since it's so hard to find a great burger these days - what happened to the classics?? Also it's BYOB, so grab a beer from the bottle shop .
Feels like a chain. I got the iced coffee, looks like they put a little hazelut in it, which isn't that special, but not bad. Better than Starbucks IMHO though :)

Decent pizza, but I was astonished by the remarkably slow service. Twice I experienced a frustratingly long wait. First to order, second to check out. Toasted ravioli is pretty good and waitress was helpful when she was around, but plan on this meal taking a lot longer.

Cute place, it was an old hotel but is clean and updated and still has individual charm, priced great, includes breakfast and social hour drinks, parking is an issue but they will give you a free voucher to park across the street in a garage.
Free tours by foot is a great way to see the most important sights on a limited time and money budget

I have given 1 star because there is nothing lower. The worst service you can experience The waitress wave very rude and could not get an order right The food is just as bad as the service. Definitely find a different place to eat

I had ordered the ultimate nachos for pick up, and once I got in the car and looked at them, I realized that there were hardly any toppings on them. I feel as though I paid $12 for just tortilla chips- definitely not satisfied.

I'm assuming it was happy hour; with all the people surrounding the bar using Very Loud and Very Excessive Foul Vulgar Language. We were not greeted upon entering, We sat ourselves but at least The Food was good!~

Pulled pork sandwich was very good but did need one of the provided bbq sauces for moistness aperntly the Brussel sprouts were over cooked my compadres like them al donte. Still very delicious. I'll be back to try another dish.

I went with a group of people and we tried the pulled chicken BBQ sandwich, meat and vegan burgers, and the chicken salad and were thoroughly disappointed. I'm told the salads are good and their mint brownies but I would have to be pretty desperate to go back.

The food was edible but the service sucked, everything came out wrong, a cheese burger with no cheese, lettuce wraps came with mushrooms when ordered without, plus the sauce had to be requested as the server forgot it. Just your typical Peppertree shoddy performance
I give zero star to this place staff zero security zero homeless person Goes to baffle & sets breakfast unbelievable never go back stay 7 nights no choice. Disappointed

Got the Beef Lo Mein very very good, and the Sweet & Sour Chicken - real good and they give you a huge amount of that. First time there and will definitely go back, a bit pricey but I think most Chinese places are nowadays. Very good and highly recommend.
Very friendly staff and quick service. I only get mozz sticks from White Castle, and they were hot and stringy just how I've come to expect from them. Good job with keeping with consistency.

After 20 minutes of waiting for the guy o stop talking to his friends and actually acknowledge myself and the 5 other people waiting to get keys made, it takes someone getting a manager to get this guy to do his job.
I am updating this review and adding in an extra star because I received a very nice apology email from the bridal shop. This was an unfortunate fluke but I am very appreciative of them reaching out!

This diner ONLY accepts cash! I'm not sure what century they think they're in. Also, I paid $2 for a glass of OJ concentrate, and the prices of the food, as well as their quality were bad. The ONLY good thing was their big biscuits, even though they were dry.

I think the décor is very nice, however, our service was not good, the hostess was very crabby, needs to smile once in awhile! As far as the food, average at best. Overpriced too. We won't be going back.

One of the worst retail experiences ive experienced. On top of lacking common sense and general people skills, the management and other employees were very rude and seemed highly uneducated on their products. Id feel better buying jewelry at walmart.

Have been here multiple times and every single time the food is on point not only decor and ambiance, but the music is great. Staff is super friendly. Overall, great experience and delish food! Great for girls night or date night!

We dined here for breakfast on Mothers Day morning! My Bananas Foster French told was sinful! Cute restaurant, good service. My husband couldn't decide so he ordered both the special pancakes that contained both strawberries and I believe bananas and an omelet. Very reasonably priced ($33 for three breakfast entrees

Went here today to have my first New Orleans poboys. My wife and I split a shrimp and roast beef poboy and goodness gracious it was good. It being my first New Orleans poboys I might not have the credentials to give this 5 stars, but I did anyways...

First time back in over a year, very pleased with the service a food quality. until the end when they refused to take our gift cards! There was no notification on the door and even told wait staff as we ordered and shared we would be paying by gift card!
When what I knew before as "Moxie Java" locations we re your mileage may vary if you go into the shop.

Ugh. This place is SO good. I live in California but my boyfriend lives in Tampa and every time I visit I make sure to stop here at least once before I fly back home. The staff is super friendly too! 10/10, no complaints.

Very nice place and a lot to offer. The only suggestion is if your new ask for a tour and understand what the cost and membership includes as they were not very helpful at the front desk when I went in.

Service was great food was not. I ordered the special it came to me cool not hot temperature so there it was a turn off, I really dislike cold food yuck. The whole dish was slathered with the can crab meat. Not my cup my cup of tea restaurant.

I am super picky about the jobs that get done on my nails and I come here to see Hannah everytime religiously and she does an amazing job she took such good care of me I will be coming here for a long time

This was not bad not good the bar tender was by far the best part she was amazing. When I went the kitchen was limited for some reason I did order food and it was good so no complaints there . Just wish there was more options .

they're closed on Sundays, despite what they have posted.. Really annoying when you spend 30 minutes deciding on an order for a household, only to find out they're info is wrong. should really update that !
This place is great the food and drinks was amazing and well that Mississippi Mud Pie was delicious definitely will be back

Always gotta go with my staple, Big T Diablo. I usually get food at the Primo's in Collegeville, but since I've switched jobs, this one was closer to where I now work. Gotta say, this place did not disappoint. Great food, as always.
Top notch service. I went for the notary and was pleased with how friendly they were. Even though I have a UPS store closer, I plan on driving a bit more to go to this one from now on.

I ordered mild chicken wings it had barely any sauce on it. I didn't enjoy my pizza either I ordered half hawaain and half pepperoni, it was hard like a cardboard toppings falling apart and also dry. Don't waste your money here.
After receiving some communication from this business - I'm happy to report, I'm going to give it another shot and report back with a new review!
Hello I had City and Suburbs Pest Control come out and Sam was very thorough and did a great job with providing professional service. I definitely would recommend him to come out.

Ordered online for a pickup about 20 minutes later. The spring rolls were barely warm and slightly soggy, the chow mein noodles were cold in places, and our beef and broccoli entree had almost no beef in it. We won't be back to this location.
Love the vibe and water front views. Great place to catch up with friends when you are looking for something a little different on the south edge of downtown.

The pizza is really horrible here.. I don't know anyone who thinks this place has the best pizza but it is cheap and my kids love it. Their salads are just simply horrible but the desert pizza may be worth the trip;-)
They never answer the phone I called no answer so I went to the location and placed an order and watched them not answer the phone while stood there and did nothing and they screwed up my order

I usually don't go for chains, but I can make an exception for this small midwestern chain with about 15 or so locations. I have mainly been here for the 2 for 1 fish and chips on Mondays. Consistent, tasty and plentiful. Well worth it.
Dilapidated, run down and musty. If you just have no other place to stay it will do, but I highly recommend spending a little extra to stay some place else!

Not much love for Biscuit Love. After waiting almost an hour in 40+ degree weather to try this Nashville hot spot the biscuits were dry even under the bland sausage gravy. The highlight were the bonuts. Doughnuts made with biscuit dough. If you're hungry for something special skip this place.
I've been here a few times and every time the meat has been too salty, service too sassy, and portions too small. So I'm going to say no thanks. The decor is nice though!
It was good but put to much condiments on steak and the people were mean and rude and the scenery was awful but the steak was semi good next time just do takeout.

Great service. Great rice. Great lemonade. Thai curry had lots of chicken, which was very tender. However, the curry sauce was watered down, pretty bland, not sweet enough, and appeared to be made with water rather than coconut milk. Yuck.

Wonderful food, excellent service. There were countless parties waiting the average time of an hour to be seated, but Rebecca and I played it cool by heading to the bar and ordering. Artichoke and lobster risotto, dee-licious. Don't mind if I do.
I am tired of driving to this store, to buy large quantities of sale items, and they don`t have any left. I have been here early morning, the day a sale starts, and they are out of what I want.

Outdoor market comprised of a slew of stands selling tons of cheap NOLA gifts along with some handmade jewelry and pottery. For eats, there are a number of stalls including some very healththrough at least once.

If you're a tourist then it's "Geno's or Pats" either way the cheese whiz philly was good with a large portion 2x subs were about $20 CASH ONLY - eating here outside at night is sketchy a f. Strap up.

Great experience. I didn't really have high expectations going because it is a discount retailer, but the staff were extremely. Funny thing is, they were much more helpful than in big box stores and they gave me a coupon to use on my purchase which made it even better!!

I've been here several times and everyone that works there is so miserable. I like the food and the prices are VERY reasonable, but usually the people that work there have a bad attitude, are un-helpful, and in general make the experience not worth going back.

Ordered delivery and the quality just wasn't there. Honestly one of the worst sushi dinners I've ever had unfortunately. I ordered four different sushi rolls. I had really high hopes for this place but the rice was just really hard and old and all the fish was abnormally mushy.
I first time there I wasn't impressed food was hot pepper pepper pepper I don't know what it was but that's my first on my last time there
If you like overpriced and under-cooked food, come to this cafe. Service was good. I think I will go to Denny's or Village Inn next time as the quality of food and price is better there.

Calamari was rubbery and serving size very small for the price, the parmesan flakes overwhelmed the taste, however the garlic parmesan wings were really good, I'd come back just for those. Server was good.

We had to wonder around a little to find Bocca until we gave up and went in here, which was ironically, formerly Bocca! $12 for a 16" plain pizza, and it was "orgasmically" delicious. Will probably make this a weekly thing.
Great customer service, love the atmosphere and the food was on point definitely coming back with the family, good prices too. Little more care on the cleaning side of the floor and bathroom's
I just recently moved to Tampa and was worried I wouldn't be able to find Thai food as good as back home. The Thai fried rice and cashew nuts sautéed chicken were amazing! We'll definitely be back.

We stopped in for ice cream recently. The ice cream was good, the cone was stale, but they were frying falafal in the back and we left smelling like grease. We had to shower and change clothes afterwards to get rid of the smell. Not what I expected.

Food is usually excellent and make sure you save room for the smores dessert that you cook over your own personal flame. Service has been spotty though and they are not very accommodating for large parties.

The vegetarian rolls were on par with other veggie rolls you'll find around town - but the 3 stars come from the house salad. $5.50 for half a dozen huge chunks of iceberg lettuce and a sliver of tomato and cucumber. Skip the salad and get another roll.

I think this place, service and atmosphere is great. Though I think they should expand their food menu a bit, it was all very tasty and the beer choice is awesome. The food quantity was perfect n not overbearing.
Helpful and friendly, prices are average but they will spend the time with you, sometimes that is worth paying a little more for.
Disappointing, both the quality and the quantity of food served has been compromised. I don't care a lot about the quantity; but I started coming here for the quality, which sadly isn't the same!

The The General Tso's chicken was pretty good but the broccoli in it tasted watery so maybe they use frozen broccoli. The shrimp lo mien actually lacked salt which I never say about Chinese food. I had to add soy sauce to it for flavor.
Great atmosphere, nice menu. Got the ceviche which was good enough but would have enjoyed it 10 times more if they had chips available to eat it with.
I wish the food at this place was as good as its interior design. I keep going back because its in the neighborhood and I want to like it, but every time I have been disappointed by the food.
This shop is fair priced and quick service with no nonsense...I started by lettiing then work on my VW Passat then my Toyota Camry and now my Tundra - these guys know what they are doing!

I re-visited Umai Umai last week. Unless I'm mistaken I think they dropped the prices in their specialty rolls. Basic rolls are still $8 but the specialty rolls seem to have dropped to the low teens from the mid teens.
They unlocked my heart, and now I'm finally able to love again. I also bought a wrench so that I can throw it at my big toe so I can go out on disability
No no no no do NOT SEND YOUR KIDS HERE the teachers are rude and the iss i have heard is horrible.

Been eating at the old spot for over 5 years....today "the computer lost our ticket"... after being steamed for a min, the kitchen mgr came out and gave us that portion of our meal for free!!! Appreciated that, but I still miss old Neyows
I went by here today, the two ladies working were extremely helpful and went above and beyond to help me find the scrubs I need for my new job. Will definitely be back.....

I really like the selection here food and juice is great... Only reason I give it 3 stars of because not once have I Been into goodness and the staff was polite. Almost like stuck up snobby vibe... Kind of a deal breaker

Thanks Matt for your help in getting pest control done on an urgent request and also for your help with tightening the shower curtain bar. I always get the best from the maintenance crew here in Waterford Down Apartments.

The Pita Pit is pretty average, the food doesn't really excel in any regard. I have been served by people that are cheery and not so cheery. It a little on the expensive side unless you have a coupon, but I guess that's what you get for alternative food options.

Fuck jack in the box I waiting a whole hour to get my food to order I had to wait 10 minuets to order the food was raw I suggest to close this place down or have health inspection check this place out.

Unless you are planning on staying awake until 2am this is the worst hotel:/ the theme is nice but it's ridiculous how the rooms vibrate for hours because of the music below the rooms. One of the worst experiences with any hotel I've experienced unfortunately
The place has some good vegetarian options.. taste is good...!however, the curry dishes have very less curry in them ; further u literally have to hunt for the noodles in the spicy noodles dish
Miroslav Ostojic at Crown Jaguar was our salesman and he was so knowledgeable and personable that He made buying my new car a great experience. I will definitely be a return customer!! Josephine T
Soooo, I was on a first date tonight and the biggest roach I have ever seen starts crawling down the wall!!! And everyone else there just kept eating!! I'm at a loss for words honestly
Just a regular chain restaurant - the food is the same as all other Chili's, but the service is pretty good. You can't go wrong if you like the Chili's chain.
Had to call them on month 2 and 3 to remind them to due my yard as they missed it both. Didn't need to hire a company I have to babysit and remind them I am a customer.

Came here to have a gel manicure.I had to soak off my old gel and while sat and soaked the manicurist say in front of me eating her Starbucks breakfast.She proceeded to do my nails and I must say she was anot smooth finish.Overall ok job.

Food is always good. YoYo is the best cook. Service not so good... They will make you wait until a table is filled up, we use to be regulars but now don't enjoy being there for two hours from the time we are seated to the time we leave.
A friendly local Spot with a good tea and coffee, on campus vibe I love the vegetarian panini I came back twice for it .
Order Cancellation customer service number seems to be as below in their FAQs Customer Service Phone: 1***888**** from their contact us page and not their FAQs page
We recently moved from Texas 8 months ago so needless to say we have been looking for great Mexican food since. I tried the steak, fish, and shrimp tacos here and was really only fond of the steak.

Their coffee is over priced for really small sizes, it's completely over-rated. It's really annoying to go there on concert nights because you can't stop in just to get coffee without having to pay the cover charge.

Every single time I go to this location they are very very skimpy on the amount of food that they will give you and if you order a foot-long you only get meat and veggies that are equivalent to a 6 inch.

We stopped in for a late lunch, and had quite satisfactory sandwiches. I had the chicken melt, which was pretty good; tasty, and good pannini, but perhaps a little dry; it came with a hoempty time service was prompt and friendly, and the TV and music weren't distractingly loud.

We had some positive experiences however the last visit will be our last. There's an aggressive dog that apparently comes from time to time and the owner doesn't think about the safety of other dogs to keep away. My dog was bit this past weekend and infected. Please be careful.

Again they failed to pickup my recycle and my neighbor's. After 3 phone calls they still didn't show up. The people in the office are helpful and understanding, but the people picking up the recycle don't seem to be responsible.

Beware!!!!! The owners/workers make your drinks mediums/large and add extras without asking and charge you more and sneakily don't give you the receipt. I noticed it twice and the most recent times I was there and instead of getting my money back I deduced to write this.
Yeah it's in a "farmers Market" and there are only about 6 seats outside this little side eatery can you say... CRAB CAKES!!!! Delicious!

Don't go here they don't put your food in the bag, I ordered food and back to back twice in a row they didn't put my food in there. at least double check before you leave or tell your DoorDash to check.

Place was awesome! Can't wait to go back. You can't go wrong with good beer, arcade games, and pinball. Plus the guys who own the place and the bartender were super nice and talked to us for a long time about their place.

Went to Terrain for dinner and was NOT disappointed. Every detail is beyond lovely. The walk through the nursery to find the cafe, the hanging lanterns, twinkle lights, stone walls, mason jars, and candle light are a gardeners dream. The food was elegant and well done. Every bite/sip was delicious.

I understand that customer service has gone down since the pandemic But I called in a small order for one pancake and an order of country ham (was told the total was eight dWell when my husband arrived to pick up order no order was ever processed. Bad

Its not bad. Like it better than Starbucks. Kinda has the vibe of a corporation like Target attempting to be hip in the guise of a third wave coffee shop but not QUITE ditching the corporate feel. Still, it'll provide the caffeine fix.

Somehow got charged $5 per sandwich on the 2 for $6. Mentioned it to the lady at the window and she charged me full price anyways. My water cup had HiFil-A and I'm just writing this review because I know from experience that good service is not that hard.
Good pub food and friendly atmosphere. They are one of the best places to take our kids as they are always very accommodating and understanding of kids' needs.

I've tried calling this business multiple times to schedule an appointment to no avail. Not sure if there is an issue but I've purchased services to use at Wink and Wax and I can't even get a hold of them to schedule anything.

I started coming to Balducci's 35 years ago and still make it a point to stop when I am in town. They have always had the best pizza in town and their Balducci wines are pretty good. Now if they would only open a restaurant in Kansas City!

I ordered some special and got a starchy mess with very little flavor. I advised the waitress and nothing was done. My wife ordered trout and they served her some other fish without telling us that they were out of the trout. I wont be back

Yes it's bigger than it looks, but the prices are really high. If you need a couple of things on your way home from work, it's worth stopping and seeing if they have what you need. But I wouldn't do my regular weekly shopping trip here.

Great Midtown Bar, all the bartenders have been excellent, great service, video machines have been a lot of Fun Entertainment for me & others there Late Night to Relax & have a Great Time at. O'Shea's !!!
If you have anything on this menu make sure it is the Banana Split waffle ice cream dish oh my God it's heavenly

Great class with Russell who really made an effort to make sure every cyclist new and regular was properly set up on their bikes. Also showed and reminded everyone of proper form. Bring your own shoes or cycle in your sneakers.

Second time getting a salad and both times pretty disappointed. Maybe the other options are better on the menu but overall the lettuce was old, the salad lacked flavor and the ingredients weren't fresh.

Wonderful takes on Mexican food with devilishly good bartenders this joint never fails to be packed on a weekend or any weekday for that matter. The food is always good even if they are always packed and loud with a good wait staff to top it all off

I have been to Ashburner's several time at and truly enjoyed each time the pizza is great and the service very good. Good job you guys keep it up . sorry I don't have a pick for got to take it will update it when I go back

I ordered one sliced of pepperoni pizza. Crust was thin and crispy, and there was a good amount of pepperoni, but other than that, there was nothing special really. It was a little overpriced in my opinion.
I feel like the attitude of the staff was fucks you I'm never coming back here I'm never buying a car here if you like the service was terrible I feel like the attitude of the staff was abusive.
Man, am I glad to have this place nearby after living in L-town for 3 years and really missing city food. Their pho is pretty darn good, but I wish they had a more extensive Vietnamese menu.

It was the worst food I ever had I complained about my dish the waiters like I'm sorry that you didn't like it but I will never ever go to that restaurant When I visit New Orleans the only thing was good was a margarita did not leave a tip
Pretty clean interior design, here are some traditional Chinese cuisine with a few Taiwan cuisine, a little bit Americanized but good though.
Still a great selection of beer and the bands are fun, but the whole cash only thing takes it off the list of options most nights.

Just a small little place with a small buffet of greek food. The guy that runs it is a character and just doesn't stop addressing random people that enter and exit his place. He's definitely part of the experience. It's a good lunch spot, but not amazing.
Went in here hoping to find a green juice and couldn't find one, but they did have a large-enough breakfast menu with everything from steel cut oatmeal and overnight oats to breakfast burritos.

HORRIBLE!!!!!!! Stay away... Food was not good. They kick you out of the bar on Sunday's for Pittsburgh Steeler fans who arrive one hour before their game even starts!!!.. The waitress took forever to bring a glass of wine. I will never go back

Longtime customer who will never go back. Extremely rude cashier totally ignored us when picking up our order. Waited there long enough, even though our pizza was ready, to observe sweat from the workers faces dripping into the pizzas they were making and boxing up-completely disgusting.
Food had no taste. We went for the Oct 6-7 German Festival. Food was probably better outside in the tent because every 5 minutes the server would run out with the Aluminum pans for the food tent.
Unfortunately a very unfriendly staff will prevent me from giving this beautiful hotel any more stars, or any more of my money.
Food quality was gross. Immediately after eating, food went right through me. Server was nice, she didn't bring me the drink I ordered but something else and she didn't charge me for it.
When the food like tempura n gyoza is left under the hot lamp it's not crispy anymore same for the onigiri shouldn't be under heat lamp if in wrapper! Maybe ramen is good haven't tried theirs yet!

They're very rude & disrespectful.. they can't answer the phone without a attitude.. especially the older lady that works there. If y'all not trying to have your appetite ruined just don't come eat or get food here because you will regret it.
Unique but comforting flavor combos. Crab cauliflower soup was rich and delicious. Fried chicken sandwich with serrano slaw was a tasty mix, and the fried chicken was a winner in its own right.

This location closed! So good though. Chocolate gelato is better than chocolate froyo. Chocolate and strawberry shells are amazing and the staff were alway friendly and somehow know all there is to know about the flavors. All flavors are good never tried pops

Be careful this company will sell you lemon cars with A LOT of problems!!!! They are a bad company to get any used vehicle from. They will give you false information on the vehicle & will give you the run around if you bring it back to them!!!
Chicken kheema and egg roll 5/5 Chicken masala and egg roll 4/5 Chicken and rice 1/5. I don't know what that was but I literally saw them mix milk with some instant powder and serve it to me.

God, do I have good memories of this place. Of course, it could have been a mix of the smoke, Guinness, drunk off their asses frat-type boys, Irish drinking songs, Dave Sharp's guest appearances, and grad school procrastination that color my memories.

Stopped in for a quick bite. I ordered the orange chicken lunch special, it was ok but I was surprised by the orange yellow colored fried rice. The crab Rangoons weren't very good and there was no crab in them, sadly disappointed.

The space is pleasant and the coffee was fine, but the barista was rude and shooting me death stares for reasons I couldn't divine, which made me feel really uncomfortable there. I definitely won't go back.
I love DSW and maybe I went at a bad time for this location, but there were about 10 pairs of shoes I would have loved to try on but couldn't because they didn't have my size.

Nice outdoor market when in Philly. I do like Reading Terminal more, but this has more of an eclectic feel to it which is also pretty cool. My favorite stop here was Paesano's which is a must visit for sure!

I ordered one of the poached egg dishes and had to flag another waiter down to send back the dish as our waitress never checked on us. Dish was cold, sloppy plate and the eggs were cooked through not poached. Terrible service. Will not be back.

We always prefer Home Depot to Lowes. Unfortunately, there isn't one on our town, so we can't go there as much as we would like for our projects. Home Depot staff is just so much more friendly, and it doesn't matter which store you are in.
Generally good and convenient location, however there are some other Pho places nearby with some better taste, but still worth it if you're in the mood.

Went there on Sunday Service was terrible Waited for over 20 minutes for someone to clean off the table Drink order was taken Margarita was terrible Was another 15 minutes before the waiter returned Ended up leaving and going somewhere else

Whipped cream only on the weekends? Wtf is that? Stop trying to run my life, Yogurtland. Other than that, good yogurt, fresh toppings, and the place is clean. If anyone who can make decisions over there is reading this, a five star rating is contingent upon full time whipped cream.

Its a franchise, so you cannot expect to have real Chinese or asian noodles. I like it because its quick and fast, plus close to the university campus. Its clean from the inside, and they have plenty of tables, therefore you can always find a spot during lunch time.

We really enjoyed the vibe here, but the food was mediocre at best. We really enjoyed the live music, the central location, the fun/happylucky atmosphere here, but it seemed a little franchise- so maybe get that!

WOW! What an extraordinary meal! Everything was so well balanced, delicate and delicious. We ordered the meatball as the appetizer, sea bass and the chicken as our entrees and the bourbon brownie sundae for dessert. We ate absolutely everything and we were beyond stuffed. Will definitely be back!!

I can't decide if the bartenders were too cool for school or just clueless, but other than that, it was a great meal. I'm glad to see that neighborhood, notorious for stodgy old wasp food, finally getting some hip post-lunch options.

Pat's King of Steaks. Sliced meat with melted American cheese, scantly sprinkled with chopped onions neatly packed into a chewy roll . It was surprisingly clean and ordinary. Liked Geno's better because the bread was toasted, the steak was oilier and they gave me a whole lot more onions.
Not impressed with the food; both the gumbo and fried chicken. I was expecting the food to be great based on other reviews, but I was no tv blown out of my mind.

Good Asian Buffet, which is to say; For people who like this sort of place, this is the sort of place they like. Clean bright atmosphere, attentive staff, a wide variety of foods, an impressive variety of seafood. If you don't get your money's worth, you are not really trying.
C'mon guys! My sandwich was so wet it fell apart when I picked it up and you sent me toilet paper instead of napkins.
Lower grade Vietnamese food, not offering depth in Pho choices. Beware the loud, barking owner if you have to pay by cash and make sure your order is right - he tries very hard to make extra $$$.
pros: Sweet pool and hot tub $10 pet fee nice fridge cons: room was very hot when we entered unfriendly staff

I have lived in St. Louis for five years now, and for some reason I allowed myself to go that whole time without trying Black Thorn....what was I thinking? Called ahead for a Chicagospicy sauce, delicious sausage, TONS of cheese and great crust. Will be sure to return!

The food is delicious but definitely overpriced Note: The prices displayed on the menu, online and in the store are inaccurate. The actual prices are approximately $1 more than advertised, not including tax.

Good experience with All Florida. I appreciated the service from Jason and his ability to correct any issues. Also, the warranty makes me feel good about my investment! Did some research before we went with them and found that it was an A+ with BBB which made the decision easier.

Went here for a smoothie and while the guy behind the desk was nice enough, explaining they have an all natural smoothie, it's still made from liquified concentrate. It just didn't taste good and cost me nearly ten bucks.

This review is for the milkshake only. Got a coffee flavored one, she basically used the soft serve ice cream with some milk and 5 pumps of syrup. Tasted way too sweet. Ice cream looked really good though, should've just went with that.
Very pricey.. and the burger was way to small and the English muffin had a bad burnt tase to it and was stale af!.. Never ever coming here again...
Great beer selection, awesome patio, good nachos, bad 90's music played too loudly by bro bartenders, and lots of aspiring lawyers and doctors.

Smoke friendly bar! Nice beer selection and I've never gotten an attitude when asking to put a particular sporting event on one of the televisions. I will continue to drink here as long as my liver allows. The onion rings are very good as well.
Is it just me or does anyone else not like it when the fry cook blows cigarette smoke into the fryer. I know that that is a health code violation, not pleased! Thats what the windows are for.
If u order the salmon Benedict ur gonna end up paying $14 for cold canned fish and have to wait forever to get it gross get the burrito or omelette instead!
This is my favorite cupcake shop, it's in the same plaza as my job, and we visit 2 to 3 times a week. They taste just as good as they look and have such a beautiful variety.

Food was decent. Sat at the bar and the bartender was awful. Inattentive, dismissive and not interested in the fact I told him I would have ordered more but thirty minutes of being ignored... Shame, I wanted to try the dessert special but didn't want to wait another hour.

Some of the best seafood I've had in a long time. The manager is always walking about making sure everyone is enjoying their dining experience. If you want a nice strong drink on try the N'awlins Thursday selection, the $3 hurricanes are worth the trip alone.

Maryanne is amazing and very reasonable - she does great color and is great w curly hair.... She will do whatever you ask and provide feedback if she doesn't think it's a good idea :) which we all need!!! Go see her!!!!!
We've been going here for years and the kids really enjoy it. Sooo many lights! You used to be able to walk around the front part of the yard more but it's been closed off for the past couple years.

Wish our experience was better, but we waited over an hour for our food and only got it after we checked in with the staff multiple times. They also gave us the wrong order . The food was eventually delicious but the wait didn't make us want to return.

The whale watching was great but I stood most of the way there and back due to to many people being on the boat. It made for an unpleasant experience and I could not wait to get off that boat. They spotted whales fast and were very knowledgeable.

I love poutine, and I've been here three times. I love the toppings they have on the poutine, good quality, and a good amount BUT the fries taste old, like they're daystandard. Costco makes better fries.
The food is very decent but I really don't think Rasa Sayang can compete with Thai or Malaysian restaurants in big boy cities. I tried the Chay Koay Teow and chicken basil. Both of them were A-OK.

Came due to reviews but disappointed. Grouper was average, baked potato was cold to where the butter did not melt and broccoli was a little under cooked. Lobster bisque was good and large chunks of lobster. Service was average.

I signed in at 3:40. No one spoke to me or even acknowledged that I had been there for over 45 minutes and I walked out. This place needs some customer service training. One hour nails is a figment of imagination. Maybe 2 hour nails. Maybe.
Great food great service every time i order the food is just quality they never fail always delivered fast and never had I not got exactly what I asked for great job guys

Fast service from the lady waitress with our drink order and late night snack order. Only complaint is there no salad for the Grilled Chicken Salad I guess the day shift forgot to get it out for afternoon and night shift. Other than that great food again.
I felt it was durtty and extreamly long line to me it was not worth the wait I would never go again

Il a fallu 1h pour être servi sans compter les 10 min pour accéder au bar et être mal accueilli... La nourriture étant moyenne, la seule raison qui puisse vous faire venir ici en journée c'est les télés diffusant tous les événements sportifs

My fiancé and I go to sushi Terri on a fairly regular bases but this last time we had their ahi tuna sashimi and both of us have been sick for 4 days. Never again will we going. It sucks but can't afford to get sick again!
the clinic charged my card $940 instead of $94 and it took over a week to get them to correct it. I still do not have the refunded money in my account. do not recommend. or pay cash if you must go.

For folks who have never shopped at World Market, it is like Pier 1 Imports but is much larger and has a wider selection of unique furniture and home decor items. The store manager and staff at this particular store are super nice! Highly recommended!

Without a doubt the most bland smoothie I've ever had. The staff is super friendly and I like the idea of the place, however the smoothie I had was completely lacking any flavor whatsoever. I wanted to try the popcorn but their machine was broken.

It was alright, but nothing special. Decent size tables, free wi-fi and pretty well placed plugs. They only take cash and don't have a huge selection on the menu, but it did the job and gave me some decent people watching on the street outside.

At first blush, this place is somewhat confusing. The sign out front announces it's a Thai Restaurant the place serves up a solid breakfast for a reasonable price. The corned beef hash was made just like I like it and goes perfectly with a couple of sunny perfect comfort food.

There really is not much to say about this Little Caesar's other than they do everything correctly and the pizza has always been spot on. My gonturn intersection, so you'll have to travel a bit before you get another shot at getting into the parking lot.

The food here is great. Very tasty and unique. Only reason I took off a few stars is because the staff in the front of the house sometimes is not very friendly or kind, especially when I visit with my kiddos.

We liked sitting outside, drinking yummy cocktails, sampling the cheese and meat board, trying the fried cauliflower and the duck breast with brussel sprouts. The duck wasn't that great, a little bland? but the brussel sprouts were perfectly cooked. Our waiter was young and eager, very cute.

Would not return, the food was okay the service brought them to 3 stars. The staff was rude, they charged $7 for a small side of beans and rice which was bland and tasteless, will stick with Los Agaves
This restaurant is absolutely gorgeous the fish was cooked perfectly, served over a rich, buttery mix of shitake, salsify, and leek. All in all, a delicious meal, with pretty generous portion sizes.

The mussels are very good.. rockafella oysters are really good first time eating both didn't disappoint ..the place is kinda small and poor lighting couldn't see my food .. i ordered Savannah peach cocktail good kind of strong an the pineapple was very strong an not good enough to order again .

All throughout the Covid crisis we've had both carry out and when it could re-open dining on the patio at Bartolino's. The food is always fresh and of excellent quality, and the portions are more than generous. This is our favorite spot for great Italian

It works for moms to bring their kids to, but it isn't there for any man to do anything but be of service at. No self service coffee stations, and door codes at the bathrooms make this a rather exclusive to the momchild kind of setup.

SWAT Auto Glass has a very friendly staff, including team members Bruce and Brandon, who are very detail oriented, professional, and friendly. I would definitely use SWAT Auto Glass for all windshield repair service needs. Very good deals and will match other quotes.
This restaurant is pretty good but also pricey. I had a variety of appetizers and drinks that were all good, but not spectacular for the price they were charging for items.
The food was brilliant if small in portion. I had the ribeye sandwich when tasted amazing, but $12 for a small sandwich and no side is a bit steep.

Used to be a better deal but they are selling many things for maybe $1 less than Costco regular price and sometimes more. Even if the packaging is torn or its missing parts. Not to mention things that are on sale at Costco not worth the time

This place is terrible. They wouldn't serve me because of the color of my skin. We ended up waiting for our shitball ass food for 2 hours and one 8 oz drink took us 45 minutes. Very polite and courteous waiter though

Cute place, they had a drink special so I stopped by. The outdoor seating is on a weird corner so not exactly relaxing but good for people watching although a bum or two may come over to you but the food is great, service was okay and drinks were awesome

This Wendy's is pretty good. Service is usually pretty fast and the food is fresh and hot. The dining area is large and clean though like at most fast food places, it can be hectic at peak times. Otherwise it's standard Wendy's
had the seafood clay pot, was good, but not much seafood in it 5 shrimps, little bay scallops and little pieces of, ? looked like fish. pricey for 15, 99. 3, 5 stars if I could.server was nice.
Meh. A friend was very excited to see a Zaxby's, as she used to live south and has missed it, but after trying it, I can't see why. It's definitely edible, so if that's your minimum, then go for it.

Liked the atmosphere and decor of the restaurant. The sushi was good, and the seaweed salad we got was way larger than what I typically see at Japanese restaurants that offer it as an appetizer. Would come here again to try more of the sushi!

I like Picasso's! I have found the drinks to always be reliable, and it's a great place to spot a view of the Missouri River while sipping. Clearly, I need to branch out and explore more of the menu on future visits.
A great place to go if you like sitting at a dirty table for 20 minutes, only to wait another 30 for burnt, cold hash browns and smart ass waiters. Kill yourself.
Tourist seeking authentic New Orleans cuisine - recommended by a paddleboat employee when asked where was a good restaurant that we could walk to. Absolutely delicious dinner.
Cheap drinks and food. Definitely one of the top spots to visit in philly if traveling or want to get together with friends for a night out. Usually gets pretty crowded on the weekends!

Delicious beignets is the unofficial donut of New Orleans. Cafe Du Monde's beignet is a notch above, however, if you want a relaxing experience with wonderful customer service, Cafe Beignet is the place...
I was one of the only people of color in here and I was followed around the whole time, by multiple employees. Coincidence or racist?
If you're wondering where your beverage is, it's getting warm at the bar while all the cocktail servers are hanging out and gossiping.
Great service, friendly staff, overall great atmosphere, food was delicious and drinks were too, but way too expensive for small portions. This is not a place I could or would frequent.
Great atmosphere! I went on a Thursday for a few drinks and I was pleasantly surprised that there was a happy hour menu! Great music and decor, and the bartenders were awesome

i don't belong to this bank, but they have better hours than my bank so i get quarters from them for laundry. the line can be forever sometimes. i hope good karma comes around for me taking less than 30 seconds to make my transactions.
Philadelphia is full of over-priced grocery stores, which is why I prefer to go to the good old Port Richmond Thriftway. Plus, their bakery has black and white cookies.
Decent service, bussing could be more prompt, best part of the meal was the rosemary steak sauce, overall not a terrific meal
As soon as my pet is better and the reports are looked over by a few other doctors I will write a complete review
