We live on the east side of Franklin and come all the way to the west side just for the sushi here, because after trying pretty much every sushi place in the Franklin/Brentwood/Cool Springs area, nothing compares to Shiki. It's our favorite sushi in this general area.
This pizza was OK but not great. The toppings were OK but the crust was kind of soggy/uncooked in the middle and the sauce & cheese were just average. There's better NY style pizza out there.

This walmart is great. I sometimes drive four extra miles just to go to this walmart instead of one of the trainwreck trash cans that is the usual standard. The service can get slow late at night but overall solid.

BTW, I emailed the restaurant via the contact link to let them know about my last visit and nobody bothered responding. That speaks volumes about how much they value their customers. I guess if you're a monopoly you can do that and stay in business.

Awful....burnt pizza, wrong orders delivered and cheap ass owner. Weekend nights rated and expensive. The roll my son keeps asking for the dirty pizza but I refuse because half the time it is burnt or cold when we get it. Great idea, but ownership got greedy.
Stick to the sushi! The Thai food was too not done right, pad Thai was too sweet and no spice in the waterfall beef salad that was supposed to be spicy. No flavor at all. Sushi rolls were great!

Coffee Cartel now faces tough competition from FroYo, StarBucks etc which are improving whereas CoffeeCartel is getting old just standing there not doing anything new. E.g. Once it's USP, the free Wifi, is no more a unique offering, and is dying - reconnects a zillion time per hours.

Quite flipping good! Spring rolls not my favorite, however the Thai Basil Dish with Chicken {Thai Spicy level 4, yea I like my food extra spicy :)} is delish!!! I concur with Robert - Ok, stop reading now go have lunch or dinner there!! You can thank me later!
Giving these guys 3 for service as they forgot several parts of our order, didn't visit table during meal, but I give them a 5 on the food. Pizza was great! Service needs a lot of work though.

Food is decent, sometimes not so hot, but overall its decent. Car hops have always been nice and have no problem getting you anything else you need. I like that this location has a place to eat inside, the other sonics i've been to haven't had this feature.
Love Wendy's burgers, and they offer much better selection of side items than Mcdonalds They also have great dessert items and the drive thru is extremely fast compared to Mcdonalds.
They've got over $1000 of my money in an account that's no longer available to me because I left my job that it was administered through. Complete scam.

The chowder was floury and the "sea bass" was so meaty and dry that I have strong suspicions they are just serving plain white fish at sea bass prices. Service was decent and friendly though. Overall, I was excited to dine here based on the reviews but left very disappointed.

Exceptional service. The welcome at departure, everything was perfect. We had to have a standard SUV and Herman provided us with no extra charge a nice big fat Ford Expedition. I will be happy to return with Alamo for my next rental.
Good food and service very pleasant and child friendly but they need to have more than one stall in the bathrooms

It's an incredibly "eh" restaurant. Good prices and decent food, but there are so many other great places to frequent in Boise, places that are simply better. Fork is nothing special, but nothing horrible either.

We went there because it's down the street from Bryn Mawr Pizza and we were sick and tired of the miserable owner there. Glad we made the switch. Good pizza not great but tasty enough for the craving. Plus the owner was actually nice and welcoming.
The employees are super friendly. The hamburgers were thin and the fries were also thin, not what we were expecting with being steak burgers, cheese curds were yum!
Why do your hours say you CLOSE at MIDNIGHT when my fatass just tried to get a milkshake at 10:40 PM and you guys sit in the building saying you're CLOSED at TEN

A great place to go and watch the games if you are able to tolerate the most deplorable service in the city. The fact that it's in a casino is mind boggling. That place does everything wrong except broadcast games. Someone should have stuck to football. ‍‍
As always they do a great job w/ everything. We stopped in for a dine in lunch & devoured a lg zep, potato salad, a pickle, & a bag of chips. Cheap, tasty, & a nice little dining room is clean

The Hostess was fantastic other than that the dinner at Firebirds was great for my wife's birthday. You need to work on your service, sitting for a good 15 minutes without one person taking care of us is why we went next door for a wonderful birthday

I heard great things about The Shaved Duck and they did not disappoint. We had 5 in our party and tasted quite a few items on the menu from apps to entrees and dessert. Everything was outstanding! We will make this a regular stop.

Nice location, good ambiance, the server was polite and attentive. However I was slightly nauseated when my friend and I watched another server trim the hostesses hair at the hostess stand...where they pass out the menus...in the restaurant. We won't be going back. Ever.
This place is alright. Good mushrooms and decent wings. Nothing too special for this place but it's a good option if you're looking for just a change of pace from your regular spots.

The million dollar bacon is worth every penny, but the chicken burrito has a slightly odd flavor, kind of curry the biscuit was heavenly but the gravy was, well, gravy, like, think thanksgiving gravy. Not awesome.
I used to meet dates here, was once to be a nice atmosphere, but sort of gone downhill The exterior needs a major renovation as does the staff

Delish!! The raspberry milkshake not only had a ton of flavor it tasted like real raspberries not the icky syrup. The fish sandwich was hand breaded cob not pressed fish you get other places and it was big for only 5 bucks!!

Their chicken is not the best, it usually been sitting out under a hot lamp but it's still better then any fast food place. The Mac and cheese is something I'd go back for tho as it is definitely worth the money.

A summer evening on the patio at Manor Casual Bistro is a near perfect thing. The cocktails are interesting and delicious, and there's a wide selection of food from full entrees to smaller plates to satisfy any hunger. The baked goat cheese was a particular favourite.

I had to deal with these people for three different weddings - my own and two weddings I was a bridesmaid in. ABSOLUTELY HORRIBLE customer service. They have a nice selection for dresses, but be prepared to deal with a lot of bull.

I was not to happy tonight, I Oder from Uncle Charlies often, I ordered boneless wings but that's not what I got, I received regular wings, I'm a fan first I had to wait a hour for our food, then the order was wrong.
This salon used to be great..but I feel that over the years it has deteriorated and lost all of the quality people who worked there and great service that they had. Don't think I would go back.
~ good overall food & service. MY WISH: That they'd add Popeye's Sweet Potato Pies to their menu;) * Chicken = good * Chicken = good * MudPie = good

The price point is extreme compared to retail chains. They offer sales through their email program but make sure you confirm details of the sale prior to being rung through. One of the sales associates Is fantastic at helping you find the right fit, style and price point.

THE STEAK AND POTATOES ARE DELISCIOUS the service was wonderful! I have never been disapointed with the service at the keg, they have always been friendly, very professional, accomodating and aim to please. Their bathroom is very dingy but the restaurant atmosphere was nice with the brick walls.

It's a tourist trap but their hurricanes deserve the reputation as one of the best around these parts. Do not, under any circumstances, get the hurricanes at any one of the gajillion places that line the Quarter selling drinks from preetohammered set.
Great store! My husband and I were there last night just before closing, David and Katie were very helpful and went above and beyond to make sure we had a great experience!

Great place for breakfast and lunch! Wonderful choices of glutenstemmed daisies, which they appear to do regularly, as there was a stack of fresh-cut daisies on the counter. Diner is adorable and super clean! A great place to eat near the beach in Carpinteria!

Typical dive bar with good pub grub. The cheeseburgers and muscles are delicious. This was an "emergency we need food now" place to stop and we don't live in the area, so we probably wouldn't be back. It's good though, overall.

Frankford Hall is one of our gosafe outdoor dining done well and support local businesses, we have started an Instagram account @PhillyCovidDiningGuide showing the outdoor set ups! Check out our post on Frankford Hall and others here https://www.instagram.com/phillycoviddiningguide/

I ordered with GrubHub. They marked my food as delivered when it wasn't; I placed my order at 645pm and didn't receive it until 825pm. It arrived bone cold and they kept interrupting me on the phone when I called them. Ridiculous.
Not impressed with the food and I was told 50 minutes to pick up then left to wait a half an hour at the counter only to be give cold food... huh?

The food was delicious and over priced, the atmosphere is fun and definitely get there early for a good spot ~ the service was slow, and as a party of two we felt forgotten a few times ~ but we will try again.
Imagine my sadness when the baffoons at this store dont fill hard tacos with as much food as they put in soft tacos.

Walking into this restaurant surprised me because the decor was so modern you would not know it is in a stripmall. Sushi was very fresh. Service was okay the prices were way above average for sushi in this area.
I dont know why you would park like this your rude and disrespectful thank you how the hell would you like my to put my kid in the car with toi parking like this .......
Excellent taste for the battered Cod and great package for delivery. Not four star as size of Cod filet was smaller than bun so that's not the best but good fries and overall good meal
The downfall: $10/night parking ish/night 25 minutes outside of town +$10 parking per night, it's hard to say if we'll return next year.
I give 3 stars cause the good service, otherwise 2 Is not traditional Korean food, very plain side dishes, I prefer Bando korean even if is a little more expensive,

Great little out of the way coffee roaster. A little hard to find as it's tucked away at the end of a strip mall but the owner is more than happy to offer you a cup on the house. He knows his stuff about coffee too.

A very elegant place to eat. I had a very nice Valentine's Day dinner here, and I recently had lunch outside with a view of the river. It's pricey but good. Creative cocktails and vegetarian options. I really liked the spicy jalapeno martini!

Big Horn Tavern is a great casual place for food and drinks. I've been trying to drag my friends over here because the drink prices are good, there's pool, and I've never seen them overly packed with people.
The best Mexican food and horchata in Bucks County. Nothing more needs to be said. Their food is on point, every time, and reminds me of family home cooking from back when I was in Texas.
This is my second time at this restaurant and the service is slow, food is cold and soggy and the atmosphere is toxic. Horrible and will not return.
Like all most Wingstops I highly encourage you to order ahead of time. The food is all made to order so the average wait time is 20 minutes They always have a good variety of flavors to try out.
The white bean soup was very good, but the baked ham (which is advertised as their specialty was nothing special at all. It didn't even seem fresh baked. Not sure what makes this an institution.

couch tomato is our "go to" - the pizza, the salads, the garlic knots, the make your own wraps, and the blondie/brownie at the counter are just a few of the things that keep us coming back time and again. thanks for the great service!!

I am a huge fan of Wasabi on 82nd just for their albacore tuna and gyoza BUT they have to lay off the heavy sauces/mayos on their maki rolls. When eating sushi you want to taste the seasoned rice and the fish, not Kewpie mayo.
The meal was good had to send back some food due to being cold but was taken care of my manager
I didn't really like the pizza - i ordered the BBQ chicken and there was only about 5 pieces of small chicken on it. Will be ordering from again hopefully it is better this time!
Never used and never will use their services since they discriminate against "pit bulls" and dogs that they believe look like a pit bull.

My wife and I enjoyed some of the best sushi we'd ever had at this small unassuming spot right on the harbor in Santa Barbara. The prices were super reasonable for both the sushi and beer/wine. The rolls came out fast as well. We will definitely be back!
Would give them zero. They are worthless Wall Street Whores that fund Democrat politicians who are afraid to challenge the price gouging policies of this corporation.

I'm a big fan of Amish Market's and this one was very nice. They were a bit on the pricey side and while they were not rude, they were not nearly as friendly as the people from the Amish Market in Bridgeton. The highlight for me was the candle shop.
We used Nashville Checker Cab for a 4am ride from our hotel to the airport, as we couldn't get Uber to work. Our driver Darryl was super prompt and courteous. I couldn't have asked for better service

This place has it together now, service is very good, sushi portion is big enough and best tasting in town, half off apps after 9 pm are good, saki sangria 2 for 1 is ok. Love the modern clean atmosphere!

Charming bakery next to Cassis Bistro on the park in St. Pete. Excellent baked goods of European style and quality, fine coffee, fresh OJ and ample patio seating make this the go to spot for locals and visitors on the waterfront.

If I could give 3ons onto my burger as I want. Service is _always_ very good at this location. The same burger described here did not translate as well for take out, as it's usually pretty messy and ends up oozing everywhere before I get it out the door.

I guess they just don't care they ran out of bacon we waited and this is what we got and the funny thing is this lady next to us had some nice pieces of bacon on her plate ..I knew I should have stayed home and cook Breakfast..

I'm happy Rice exists, but the service can be a little aloof, and the food is OK and not real authentic if you're looking for great Thai food. The patio is the best part though, with the greenery and somewhat private location near the back.
Just came for a couple beers. Can't comment on the food but they did find me champions league soccer - kind of obscure sport in these parts.

I wanted to send flowers to my aunt who is in a rehab facility, but wanted them to come from a local florist. Shirley did an outstanding job in making this arrangement special. I will definitely use her again.

Beware! Very hot and humid in rooms for a resort that had a good reputation i guess reputations dont last forever at this place. Hotel floor in room dirty wear socks when walking around in your room or you will have black feet! a/c not modern at all needs upgrade!
Havent eaten here but read about the bloodies being phenomenal when reading reviews of the dauphine orleans which is more than a bloody is...

The food at Amerigo was amazing and very reasonably priced. The menu had a very nice variety of options to choose from that it was hard to decide what to get but I ended up getting the Three Cheese Tortellini and it did not disappoint!

I'm used to a slightly better selection of back issues. I mean they've got a CRAP LOAD of backissues but they do not have many "rare" issues in the books I was looking in. Was a cool place to kill some time when I needed to.
My review is based on prices quoted. Didn't select Firestone as their phone quoted price for alignment were 2x the price of another high star vendor and oil change was $20 higher.

I'm so happy to have found this gem, service from Antonio was superb, food amazing, can't begin to say what a pleasure our meal and service as well as drinks are! We had laparilla Mexicana. So fabulous I couldn't wait to take pics!

This is an excellent Thai restaurant in the Nashville area. The food was excellent. We ordered the curry special and the pad Thai. The appetizers were also excellent. If you are in the Nashville area and looking for a vegan alternative then this is a great place to go.

STAY AWAY FROM THIS AIRLINE!!! visited for my sons graduation, they lost my bag and could not locate it. We made it back home and 2 days later we were told it was at the baggage claim at the airport that we visited! Horrible horrible customer service!!!

Terrible location and staff. I used to work at chipotle and I can tell you for a fact many of the rules aren't being followed. The person on the line called me a b***h just for saying I wanted a little bit of beans. So unprofessional

I had a terrible experience! A dispute over some damaged property of mine ended horribly. I was satisfied with the way they cleaned but when a dispute arose they didn't handle it like a company I would ever do business with.
The food here is excellent, the service inattentive, but when I come from LA to Santa Barbara I drop in once a year and enjoy whatever I order.

To be honest at first I thought the guy working was kind of a jerk but once you talk to him for a bit he's a great guy great products good selection of premium juices has devices no one else carries go check it out people it's a great shop!!!!

This is a great getaway for a couple or family. They have many pools and spas including a water slide. It's tucked away so you feel secluded and has a great golf course as a view for many of the rooms.
No one from this company had the courtesy to respond to my complaint since then we found another company even better and reasonable

Sandwiches are very good, brussel sprout side was soggy, definitely previously frozen brussel sprouts. Beer list is good. They have some sort of shared service model that basically means you'll be going 30 min+ between seeing anyone to refresh your drink, order anything from, etc

Very satisfying and fresh ingredients! The burrito bowl had a wonderful set of toppings along with the rice and beans, and the chicken tinga we ordered in it was flavorful. The shrimp tacos were also good to.

It's a liquor store. Went in. Got my bottles. Left. The workers are kind of in their own world and they don't really communicate with the customers until you are checking out. I noticed that some were familiar with some of their customers who must be regulars.

There's really nothing to say that hasn't already been said. These bagels are ah.maze.ing. The owner is really nice and I'm adding this to my "worth the drive to stock up once a month" places. Everything, marble, sesame, poppy. It's a bagel purists dream come true!

I've been hesitant to go back to shady looking Asian places after the whole "Pho 38 Cockroach but this place is surprisingly done up and all my worries were assuaged. We went here for lunch on a Saturday they've got you covered.
Complete mess they have discount signs in front of clothing not on sale.theres stuff everywhere When you go to checkout its a long shot that you get the discount you think your getting.
For the uninitiated, make an appointment. Tried to walk in my first time and with only one person ahead of me, I waited for an hour and a half to get a cut.

I've been there once before for dinner, great food, but this last time I was sad to hear that it wasn't dog friendly on the porch. They turned away service and we might not go back because of that. What restaurant with a patio doesn't allow dogs???
Good food Go outside your box and try something different the jerk chicken was great and so was the stew chicken the yams are awesome and the cabbage has a good flavor

The food is still a lot to be desired! The waitress I had is gone but now I have a shicksa who can't write fast and isn't sure what a knish is!! This place is the dumps now! They asked me to ren-Cheese at home then anything here!!
We just bought a new Subaru from Glazman, and we were very happy with the experience they did rectify the situation, but it was a fairly big and inconvenient oversight.

I had a rather unique breakfast sandwich called a Viet hoagie. Stuffed with sausage, bacon, fried egg, jalapeño peppers and other veggies, it was a very filling meal with a spicy kick. The hoagie bread was pillowy soft. Service was good, and decor was nice.
Perfectly mediocre takeout Chinese. I get the mixed veggies with tofu and yes, it does have too much oil in it but this isn't Chinatown.

Have been here many times and can say that the food is consistently good, beer is always cold, atmosphere is cozy and friendly. Barkeeps are knowledgeable about mixing drinks and the place is always clean.

Just a great place stopped in twice while in town very relaxing great selection of smokes and liquor something for everyone. Ventalation system was very good so yes you can take wifey there for a drink while you smoke and enjoy the company of the staff

Was very disappointed as I drove to check the place out walked in they said they were closing in 5 minutes this was at 5 o'clock on yelp says open till 8 o'clock?????Better get your times straight!!!!
I love this place. The food is always delicious, the drinks are generous and good and best of all they have live music during the week. Jazz jam on Monday nights is my fav.
Great veggie burgers! Thanks to Sayda and Maddie she's very nice and seems to be doing well in training tonight Sayda has thought her well.. We will return thanks for the great service..
Don't schedule a simple drop off delivery. I scheduled a week in advance with there usual ridiculous 4hr window just to drop off a TV and nothing not even a phone call.

Delicious bbq straight from the smoker to your plate. Ribs falling off the bones so easily that when you get home you can just lift them out of your pile of meat. Sandwich deal is great too! Just be aware the sandwiches are on the smaller side.

I frequent this place often. Great food and fun atmosphere. Cash only but don't worry they have an ATM right inside. The food has always been an attraction for me here but I stopped going after I discovered another place with a very good breakfast.
Excellent espresso; great homemade oatmeal raisin cookies; unnecessarily loud music; fireplace; outdoor seating; odd policy re pets ; good sandwiches; ok seating but areas need cleaning; free wifi .

This place gets zero stars from me. It was really dingy & smelly . All of the wait staff tries to upsale the hurricanes, which have seriously diminished in quality over the years now tasting like Robitussin. Don't waste your time or money. #gross #151

Imagine my disappointment when I walked into the facility, saw only one other person in the waiting room and was quickly told it would be a 2-3 hour wait. No empathy, no I am sorry, just got the feeling they wanted me to leave...so I did.

Basics: too expensive; too small to handle parties of 6 or more; and finally, what a crap-load of garlic infecting Every Single Dish, except ONLY the dessert! Have been there a total of 2 times over 15 years and will not return.
Not that I am a fan of going into any shipping store But I did not have to wait long, and they helped me out on a return I got through Amazon.

On par with most bdubs. Timing is key for what games you want to see, teeming with st Louis blues fans, not a problem for me but if hockeys not your thing stay away during NHL season. Service was good and attentive.

Pretty good gyro's. Pita itself was a little too soggy. Good price. Only down fall is the location. Hard to find parking and with the one way streets made it difficult to just just pop in and pick up to go order. Will try again
Great tour that gave us a great look at the hauntings of New Orleans - even in the rain it was very entertaining and fun!

Cute place. Nice environment. Service was very attentive and helpful. Giving it three stars because burgers were okay. Group of us ordered burgers, and none of them were cooked at requested temperature Bit disappointed, but the burger meat was good quality, and not those gross frozen patties.

I would have gave them a 5 cause the burrito was amazing but the service wasn't the best they weren't very attentive to me, either way living in Oregon and coming to California this burrito feels like home.
This is my favorite place me and my 8 yrs old son was taken pictures we ate and played all night well from 12to 4 best day ever
Use to be one of my favorite places, but after a horrible experience and an OWNER who was the rudest lady I have EVER dealt with I will NEVER go there again. So sad.

Their Lipton burger is my favorite! They have so many other great burger choices to choose from, but I have a hard time getting myself to try them because I know I love that one! Their fries are great too
I'm kinda a bagel snob but i was super disappointed that the undersigned of an everything bagel looked so plain and flat? They did pile the lox high and it tasted fresh but the bagel was a no go
Just an FYI, Hg bus shut down do this is now the other option. Hve not taken them in a long time but their waiting area and buses seem cleaner, a lot cleaner than how I remember

Food was a 3. Service was a 1. I was going to order a slice of pie after my meal but was ignored for 15 min, no service in sight. Should have read reviews first. Just moved to the area and will not be coming back.
Prepare to loose when you enter. I went to their blackjack table and spent 25 dollars a hand and got 13 or 14 with my next card 10 or 8. This place is so rigged. YOU BEEN WARNED.

Quality work and extremely knowledgeable. After using a few other companies to try and save some cash and spending more in the long run, I called Ambiance. The process was easy and they did a great job. Highly recommend.
The only downfall of this place is it sometimes takes 5 days for the gas charge to appear on my debit statement
Come here for the soup dumplings and scallion pancakes you're in Chinatown, and can get far better traditional Asian dishes at other nearby restaurants. Stick with the soup dumplings.

It's odd, as I read everything MCOR responded with, none of it is true. That's not how it went at all. Still really happy with the job done by advanced, no BS about the warranty and like I said, BMW says that MCOR is wrong about the rear windows.
I like this place because it does a good job creating tasty and inventive upscale pizzas in an interesting dining setting. I've heard the wine list is also quite nice.

Things you'll get here vs. the Massachusetts location: more flavor selection - a bigger shop overall Of the cinnamon, twilight, and cookies 'n cream cuppies, the cinnamon was hands down the best! Yummeh. Moist cake, good frosting:cake ratio, and decent value!

My Family loveesss this places, they did a great job for all of them. On their birthday or any occassion I usually just take them here to get Mani Pedi, Wax and everything they have to offer at that place and they love itttt! Great Customer Service Also! 5 *****

Smoky even at 7:30 pm when there was barely anyone in there. But comfy couches, very attentive service, decent drinks and appetizers, and plenty of time to relax and enjoy the company makes it a fine place.
Honestly....I'm not impressed. There are half as any employees as there are ice cream flavors and none of the afforementioned have much of a "wow" factor.

SO these were the best tasting slushies that I had while we were in Nola, but I doubt that they had very much alcohol. Each of us got the largest size and none of us felt anything at all from it. Tasty, but not great for the money.

Do not go there, there room has fleas, I went there with my puppies and my puppies never had flea and they are house dog very clean. I only stay for 2 night and come home find there was fleas on my puppies .

Stopped in for a drink because I was craving a Margarita. I've seen these ppl squeeze a ton of limes so I'm thinking this Margarita is going to be amazing and fresh. $12 for something that tasted like a water down sprite. I was disappointed to say the least.

You just can't beat a $25 mani/pedi! Your basic nail salon, nothing fancy, but clean. The employees tend to chat in their native language which after a while, makes me feel like I'm crazy, but other than that, everything's just fine!
Applebee's used to be so good but lately I'm not sure what's going on with the food, they use to have real steaks now they are very low quality
Not the best, chicken is dry. I wouldn't recommend it, but it is BYOB so if your looking for a cheap place to drink and eat would be a good place.

It's a fun little trip if you like to explore flea markets. Some of the shops in side have a creepy feeling in my opinion but I guess it's similar to other flea markets. They Farmers market section was really cute and had a wide selection.
Super cute place food was amazing I was surprised how cute and clean this place was and food was the best!!!

Extremely rude staff. I was so disappointed with this location. Managers you need to take a look at the "friendly" faces your staff should be having and so disappointed if an out of towner got this first impression on our city.

This bread co is okay they have great food and everything but one of the big problems is that they forgot a side of our food that we paid for and half of the time they are out of stock on their bakery items.
Food is great but curbside pickup times are laboriously slow, I was given a pickup time an hour and a half from my order time. Cancelled and ordered from somewhere else...picked it up an hour sooner.
Swanky Bubbles closed a long time ago, and is replaced by Tir Na Nog Irish Bar and Pub at the same location.
Ok so for those who left a bad review, not trying to be mean but they're crazy. By far best, I her up on longs donuts and in my opinion Tim's is better they melt in your mouth

I have literally been waiting months for Kebab to open floured but these were nicely salted, hot, and went really well with the garlicky mayo that came with them! I am SO SO SO happy that Kebab is finally open - I plan on revisiting often!

The food is really good and you can get a good value if you come hungry. My husband, 3 year old and I ate two plates of hibachi, two sushi rolls, one salad, one soup and three desserts all for $36.00. Definitely coming back.

I waited awhile to go here because I usually worry o won't be satisfied with small plates, but that was not a problem here! Delicious cocktails, delicious food- we sampled several dishes, all great. I will be going back to try what they were sold out of!

Good products, good prices. Every time I bring a snowboard into the service department for waxing/edging, they are dismissive and tell me it will take multiple days to get it done. I go elsewhere for my winter sports needs because of this.

Been here and done that. It's a nice stroll and a place to buy your omiyage aka souvenirs for your loved ones aka kids at home. Typical open market with tshirts, art, and nick-nacks with better pricing than what you find in the B&M shops.
Great sandwiches, not the friendliest service. The salmon sandwich, notmayo-y cole slaw, and good beer selection along with intimate sports pub vibe keep me coming back again!
I'm giving this place a 4 because it was really clean lol It is way expensive, way small and the staff isn't very friendly. I had fun though
Not worth $10! I had a difficult time getting on the track, my back bumper is still dirty and the dryer barely dried my car. Was my first time and will be my last...

Kind of gross maili kofta. Very dense and doughy. Inedible. Samosa was pretty good though. Not a lot of food for the money, but I'm not really complaining about that, I'm glad I don't have to eat more of that stuff. Never again.

Make sure you look at the photos I just uploaded. Unlike the photos provided by LA Fitness, they are genuine photos of the club showing exactly what you would see if you want here. The pictures speak for themselves.
Had a pickownbypound breakfast here very early in the morning. They serve so many good things so I piled it up and it became a bit pricey, but everything was delicious.

If you're looking for a place to eat in Nashville, this is where you need to go. Crazy good service, even better food, only thing i noticed was they have the darkest bathrooms I've ever been in lol. Great place to eat though would recommend to anyone and everyone
if the shop doesn't have a record, they'll order it for you no extra cost. very exciting for me, as what i wanted online was going to be $20 ish, asked Euclid and it was $14.64 out the door.
As has been said before it looks and feels like a working mans bar with normal bar food but Johns stew is a classic and well worth the visit. If you want a Hoosier experience stop in and eat.

Will never eat at Subway again until they correct this problem! A woman went to buy a sandwich for a homeless man and the subway manager berated her And would not sell her the sandwich. She reported it to the corporate office and received a canned ridiculous response!
Food was really good, loved it. New restaurant trying to look like a traditional Japanese restaurant with a modern look felt a little too much like a chain .

Like others have said, not really a true poboy. Had the famous pork belly & while it is good, it's not that good & it's not a po$12 each definitely skimpy. Great servers & attitude. Verti Marte on Royal is far better.
Food was fantastic. Didn't have live music, so that was a bit of a drawback, but it more than made up for that in flavor and good service.

To me this is a great place to watch a sunset at the beach.. Just skip the first floor, go pass the second and straight up to the roof top lounge order a hurricane runner and sip it till the sun goes down looking at the beautiful gulf..
Not only the best place to eat in manayunk but it would give the entire philly area a run for the money. Must haves: brisket, pulled pork, ribs, and fried chicken.

The food is fairly good however it's not hot. Soup, egg roll and rice was all lukewarm. Also sit at a table not a booth the booths are old and if someone is sitting behind you every time they move, you move. It's pretty sad.

So in fairness we didn't eat here, but we did have drinks. The drinks were terrible, and the person eating next to me at the bar said it seemed like her chicken died long ago. The food looked like mediocre diner food. Not sure what the hype was about.
Awesome experience. Tiny place, but the throwback menu and decor along with the friendly staff and great comfort food make it worth the trip from anywhere.
Pretty much offers the same quality and care of being held in a Turkish prison camp but with a 100 dollar per person check added

I have been the to the hopital only a hand full of times in my life this time was very nice experience the staff was very friendly I never had to wait around for too long when I made a request over all this hospital has been great to me

The food is amazing and even though the service wasn't great I will still give 5 stars for the food alone. Homemade and very tasty. The service was pretty slow. Took is 10 minutes to get drinks and 45 for the food.

Love the Emerald Aisle; being able to sit in each vehicle to pick the one that "fit" best is such a great option! Dropping off the vehicle is so fast, we barely had time to unload our luggage before we were given our receipt! LOVE this company!!!!
total ripoff. get ready for hidden fees and other shady practices, such as paying for gas when there is no gas service in the apartment. buyer beware.
Had the oyster po boy, and my wife had the lobster roll. Very tasty. Got it from the takeout shack on Pendleton Pike; they were literally boxing up my meal as I walked up to the window.
not absolutely terrible but if you get dip powder, this is not the place, they use gel polish as top coat leading it to not feel smooth at all, and also chipping within a couple of days.

I looked up this place on yelp is a small cozy place for locals. The menu is great is has a variety of egg dishes and Greek dishes like Greek omelette, Pita and Dolmades and they have Crepes; it was really hard for me to cjoo
I had order for here during the pandemic and fell in love with this place, but there recent changes have left a little to be desired. My last order was bland. I was so disappointed.

Portion sizes not great for the price. One meal was cold the first time and no discount on the meal was offered after waiting for hot food, which was only lukewarm the 2nd time. Probably wouldn't go back

Absolutely terrible service. I asked the cashier a question about a fuel rewards card I have he was rude and ignorant towards me he talk down to me like I was stupid. I will never go to this station again.

One o the best "bangs" for the buck in St. Petersburg, I have been here a few times and its always quality! Service is good, location is easy to get in and out at night, lots of seating and the prices are fantastic.
Friendly service, received our food quickly, came by our table several times to check on drinks and our satisfaction with our meals. We will come back here again! Very tasty!

Decent omelette, but their bacon is horrible. Very slow service. Not worth $30 for breakfast, even by airport pricing standards. Better off with a cup of Starbucks java and their breakfast options, if you can stand to fund their political agenda.
It is a shtick. When I have friends in town we see the East River Drive, Art Museum, Liberty Bell, and go to Pat's, or Geno's. Every town has its tourist attraction. This is by far not the worst.
Stopped 2 days ago, they are no longer making their own fries, got plain US foods frozen, burger medocre at best. not impressed
This is a very cool place with some good gumbo but the roast beef poor boy was not very good at all. I've honestly had better at Arby's.
I called to get an x-ray and extraction and the lady asked me if I was a new patient or not so I said I'm new she said we only can take if you have immediate family that are patients.

This place is more of a upper end motel than hotel as the doors to the room face outwards, where you can hear the noise outside. The staff was very courteous and the room was decent. Location was decent as the place is about 5 minutes from downtown Santa Barbara.

The 18oz sirloin with garlic butter on top, loaded baked potato, and potato soup with cheese and bacon are to die for! It was served a perfect medium and juicy as can be. I'll be sleeping good tonight! lol

This place is DEFINITELY not better than Popeye's chicken! I They didn't get my husband's order right, I felt the biscuits were overpriced and the chicken little sandwich was VERY hard!! I won't be returning!
Now it's going to my third week without a water filter in my freezer and fridge and Colleen says you want me to mark it down I said no I want it installed
Food: 4 Decor: 3 Ambiance: 3 Service: 2 Value: 3 Meh, it is better than Chipotle, and that is my barometer for measuring fast mexican food restaurants.

I did a check in there were they offer a free drink, but when I showed the bartender, she said that wasn't their business. So it wasn't honored. Drinks are fairly priced. I forgot that not every state has banned inside smoking! I forgot how much I appreciate that law.

Love this place! It has the best kind of reclining seats and they make their own beer! They also have a full menu with great food so going early and having dinner & a movie it not just popcorn & snow caps!
My usual Chinese rest. Closed per virus GW The food, okay, overkill in safe distance with missteps, they're trying, GW will do in a pinch
Great food! Great service! Doesn't have beer or wine but can byob Had the guacamole was delicious tacos were just like grandma was in the kitchen from Mexico .. Very inexpensive
Had it leaving the club an fell in love. Went back a week or so later to make sure it wasn't a fluke because I was tipsy, now I have a new favorite restaurant. Must try the chicken Shawrma!

Delicious and quirky. Solid eggs florentine, Benedict, and omelettes. The Kahlua banana French toast looks amazing but too decadent for me to ever order! I wish they offered a childsoattired little ones order at the counter and take their number next to straggly-haired greying hippies.

I've only been to Sam's twice but I've never been disappointed. Really great margarita pepperoni and other cured meats. Their red bliss potato salad is amazing! They also have a great selection of breads, oils and pastas and other Italian specialty items that are hard to find elsewhere. Love Sam's!
I work close to this restaurant and I have been here for for Happy Hour a few times and co try coming to Happy Hour to try them out - I think you will find you may become a fan.

I almost puked when I saw the state of the women's bathroom a week ago. I understand foot traffic has increased since the start of mardi gras but someone should at least attempt to clean the bathroom...

The gooey butter cake is delicious, the glazed donuts were fine but Im giving it only 3 stars because they were waaaay overpriced. A dozen donuts will cost you $11.88, the gooey butter $8 something before tax. Thats ridiculous!

The yellow rice I had last night was the most tasteless yellow rice I have ever had and being from Tampa I have had a lot! Bland! Chicken ok a bit dry. Salad lettuce and thin slices of tomatoes. No need to go back!
This place has served my needs, is very high tech, and is probably the best in Goleta; but for basic cleaning it seems average. The hygienists do all the cleaning and xstars is a bit too much..

The service is really good. The rice to fish ratio is quite fair and if you get just nigiri they give you an awesome portion of fish to rice. The bamboo decor goes very well with the restaurants theme

Excellent food. Ordered a "light mild" chicken tenders plate and it was a good amount of spicy for me so flavorful, crispy, everything you'd want. The seasoning is great next time maybe to try the catfish which people around me were raving about!
This morning crew is great. I hadn't even paid yet and was second in line when the barista behind the counter asked what she could start for me. This may be my new fav store.

Been here several times. Daily specials are useful. Food is always made fresh and vegetables are always crisp. Portions are huge making their meals a great value. Although not as tasty as other Asian food places, they do a good job with the variety of items on the menu.

We order for delivery and it's pretty good. It's not like Chinese food quality from around NYC, but for around here it's one of the best I've had. There seems to be a considerable difference of opinion between eatout/delivery customers, maybe they don't do a good job dealing with diners.
This cvs needs some help in the customer service area bad never have I ever had an employee you that type of language because I wasn't moving fast enough them. Never ever ever going back
This is a great location if you're looking for a quick and healthy meal during lunchtime or any other time of the day. I have been here several times and see myself coming back more in the future

Ate there last night. Food was great! However there was one server who chooses to wear her mask around her chin and puts everyone including herself at risk. We won't be back for a while. Just wear the mask!

WOW! Very Fresh and Very Clean. The Food is excellent: We had Fried Veggie Spring Rolls= A+ Fresh Shrimp Summer Roll =A+ Fresh Veggie Summer Roll = A+ Green Mint Lemonade= A++++ Overall: Very Happy with Food Quality, Service/Staff, and Restaurant Appearance.

Wow! Great selection of seafood on the menu.. They make a good play off with the name of the restaurant to include grouper checks, homemade hot cooter sauce and lots more to choose from. Overall very enjoyable.

Used to love this place, but ever since having to go gluten-free it's been terribly disappointing that there's only ever one GF flavor. Always the same. Never changes. Never anything new. Amazing how that's helped me cut back on my purchasing!

This place is fun if you're trying to have one of those nights where when you wake up you can't remember anything ... Thursday nights are always poppin and the DJ plays a mix of techno, pop and rap music.

Went in the evening to the drive through and ordered the beignet bites, you got 12 per order and could get vanilla or chocolate. They were made fresh to order, We got one of each. The chocolate were ok, and the vanilla/plain ones were amazing, hot and fresh!!

We stayed on night while in Reno for a concert. Not sure what all the negative reviews are for, as we found the property very nice, very clean, and the personnel friendly. It is quite close to the Grand Sierra, and right next to the Bayview. I'd stay here again.
If you enjoy waiting 25min+ for 12 potstickers and a half order of fried rice while you watch employees eat their own food in the restaurant, then folks you have come to the right place!

So me and my son were at this morning and as we were picking up his order this young lady was slightly rude and threw his straw on the counter and we left so I will be contacting the store manager to let them know what happened .

Except pizzas, nothing deserves to try. Mussels not fresh and smell stinky. Noodle with 6 stinky mussels and 3 shrimps sells for $24 and a waiter recommended to me and said it is the best seafood here. Nasty.
Food was good and liked the vibe of the place all until I opened up my fajita to find a dead fly... If you eat here I suggest you open up and thoroughly search your food before starting to eat.

Horrible service worst service ever waitresses are so busy watching tv instead of serve and this is not proper Korean food either put kimchi in every food doesn't make real Korean feel sorry Tucson resident who thing this restaurant is real Korean......
Well, I can say that I don't really like the food selection, I did get the chicken and it was not very good..although the waitress was great, and so was the spinach dip.

Pretty good Self Serve Carwash and located on Donelson Pike. The parking lot has always been presentable, trashcans empty and inviting and the vacuum sucks Not always crowded and usually space in the parking lot to wipe down from car.
Horrific dealer. They are liars, scammers and rats. Especially jenny, she has the IQ of a shoe and will try to lie to you and scam you and rip you off.

The good: Pool tables to better embarrass myself with. I suck at pool, or anything that requires a minimal amount of coordination, quite frankly Why is it so bright inside of the Shanty? The brightness kills my buzz, and that makes me sad...
Horrible service rude employees took 3 hours to get our food and before they brought it called to make sure we were not mad ? Are you kidding? This place is ran by absolute complete idiots
Great pizza great service alway enjoy blaze in Phoenix glad it's in Tucson the staff in Tucson very friendly that alway makes my experience better

The sushi is decent, pretty basic, nothing fancy. The pick 2 is a great deal. If you order take out, add about 20 to 30 minutes to the estimated time it's done because without fail it's never ready when we show up to pick it up.

Had a cup of the clam chowder to start on Yelpers' recommendations it was quite good, chock full o' clams, almost too rich and thick. Followed up with grilled grouper good, nice fresh taste, moderate sized portion at best. Not great, but solid. Vegetables were a bit disappointing, being over-cooked.
Dr. Durski is wonderful and the office is attentive to CIVID but I had to wait over 45 minutes after my pupils were dilated because they were running late.

I get breakfast here every Friday. The egg products are excellent and seasoned well. It seems that most orders I make, they forget items even though they have a list of my order in front of them. Will no longer be a customer due to many mistakes made by them.

Went for dinner with a friend and sat at a table in the far back corner for about 15 minutes watching servers pace back and forth and we NEVER received ANY service so we just left. Terrible service, was unable to try the food, but it isn't worth going back.
Worst Arby's ever. Food is always cold. You may as well slap a $5 on the counter and say "just give me some food, cause whatever I order it won't be it". Forget it. This place sucks

Great spot right at Hendry's beach, it used to be the brown pelican years ago and it is a good restaurant with excellent service attentive staff fresh made to order seafood and appetizers plus they have a great Happy Hour Sunday through Thursday. 3 - 6

I had a very difficult time ordering via telephone. While the person trying to service me was nice and polite, she was having difficulty answering my questions and providing adequate solutions. They do not have healthy alternatives nor substitutions in case one is trying to monitor food intake.
I order food not order trash, why when u drop the food don't u just throw away but u they try gave to me, and the fried chicken was to salty.
The server Shelley was great, but they need to fix the gelato freezers as all the gelato was soft and soupy!

Was super excited about this place and then they said they wouldn't make hot apple juice for my kids because it takes too long..... I worked at grassroots coffee shops for years and this is totally because someone there is straight lazy. Bummer

We were really excited when this place opened up, and the first time or two we went it was delicious and provided great service. However, over time we found the food portions shrank, the quality wasn't as good, and the service was flat out terrible.
This has to be the worst fast food in the area Always missing items barely any meat in burritos and the tacos Had an order replaced and they still messed it up

Great place to stop in for a quart of Guinness and grab a great curry dish, or another great British Pub dish. Recipes are very authentic to what you have experienced in London! Very good specials offered!

Food was good but it took 45 minutes to get our appetizer even though it was super slow and people that got there way after us were served appetizer and entree before we got our appetizer or even refills on water. No apology or explanation for the slow service.

Nice and busy place. Seems to be a hit with college students. When it comes to the food, I'll say, it looks better than it is. A little on the bland side of thing, but service is prompt, is reasonably priced, and a decent choice for ramen in town.

Halloween....lots of drunk people....long bathroom lines....and coeds screaming for shots. Wouldn't be an everyday place for me, but we had a good time, paid a very inexpensive cover to get in and danced a bit to DJ spinning.

If your looking for Tanya McKee she is working at Lather Hair Studio located in the Fairmount area by the museums. Lather Hair Studio in Philadelphia http://www.latherhairstudio.com I look forward to hearing from you.

Went here for a dip manicure and the result was honestly terrible. I had to go somewhere else less than 2 weeks later to get my nails redone because they looked so bad. Also, I was charged $43 for dip nails which is definitely the most I have ever paid

I've been looking for a permanent salon-Williams Edge is it! They gave me the exact cut and color I was looking for. All the girls were very helpful and sweet; this will be the only salon I go to for years to come ;)

I come here for all of my motor vehicle services needs because I can always rely on fast and friendly service. Dealing with the paperwork associated with vehicles is difficult enough so I am grateful that I can be assisted here without any added stress about customer service.

Updating because of the awesome job they've done during the pandemic, they have contactless pickup and mobile order and check in. They're clear about their hours on social media and the coffee and pastries are still so good even though you can't sit and enjoy them at Provider!

Absolutely amazing place to eat, in a small strip mall but dont let the location fool you seafood!!! Only issue owner sprayed pinesol in the air ducts towards the end of our meal made it unbearable to sit there with the smell finished our drinks outside.

I just had J&M Gutter Pros come to my house to give me a price and they were nice reasonable and did the job then and there and are coming back to fix a spot the needs a repair that i would have never known about. I highly recommend.

The drinks are good but not the best things you've ever had, the employees in there always think they're better than everyone kinda hilarious, over all it's an ok place totally over rated, just keep in mind there are plenty of bubble tea places in Chinatown.
Hey, did you know that Zara produces only roughly five items of each clothing item to distribute to each store location to ensure that us women and men convey an individual look? Genius, Zara.

Surprisingly good! In a sea of corner pizza joints with steaks, Lazos has distinctive care put into its food. It's not mind-blowing but a crisp crust, balanced hot sauce, and not overdone chicken is a recipe for a winning buffalo chicken slice in my bike. I'll be back.
Had high hopes for this place because of the reviews, but it was just an ok option coming late into town and it being close to the hotel. Just average rolls.

First time in New Orleans and the room was close to the Harrah's Casino practically next door! Also Elena at the front desk assisted with a late check out and was one of the happiest voices I near my entire trip!

Pros: Nice Crust Plenty of topping Price Very friendly Cons: Sauce could be better A good Pizza, definitely not "The Best" in Philly as others stated but good. Nice crust and plenty of topping. I like a richer darker sauce.
Visited a few years ago got the pulled chicken asked for a spicy sauce oh boy did I get it great taste and flavor heat didn't stay long I asked for a bottle they had one left lucky me

Used to be my favorite till they started putting motor oil on their popcorn instead of butter. The Spanish muffalotta has experienced a significant decrease in the amount of meat but if you ask for extra they make it better. The Bolton's theatre has real butter

3.5 stars It was good but didn't blow me out of the water. Portions are huge, food is tasty but service was pretty slow - and this was during an early Saturday dinner when we were one of three tables. Recommend the Po Tek .

This is a bar with a WW2 Spitfire airplane theme. Decent atmosphere here with an interior setup that reminds me of Molly's at the Market with front bar and back area with pool tables. Add it to your Decatur Street pub crawl and see how you like it.
Good coffee and nice Place, the Cuban breakfast sandwich and CHeese danish are very good, my son love this Outdoor space
Good food but the waiter and servers are horrible rather good to mcdonalds than deal with the horrible atitude of the waiters especially the one charging people the food

Waited two hours, when the wait was supposed to be 40 minutes. Called a few times and they didn't answer the phone, called one last time and the girl seemed indifferent when we told her the problem so we cancelled the order. Disappointed.

The owner is completely rude and disrespectful! I have observed this behavior not only towards myself but towards other customers as well. I am never going back there, I'd rather buy all pieces of my costume than to interact with such horrible management.

Decent pizza arrived on time. Has a nice thin crust but but pizza has a pretty sweet tomato sauce flavor, if that's what you like then you will like this place. I personally like my pizza with sauce that's not so sweet.
The food was good but the kitchen is far too slow to keep up with a fast paced place like AW.

Cheap great produce! Cash only! Careful when buying some of the fruits, I wouldn't say they are bestest of quality but they they have tons of variety plus they have great plants and decorations for sale and lots of greenss!
Went there today to try the new firey burger there food is gross and cold not good at all go elsewhere if you want a good burger. The service was great that's a good thing
Best boots I ever put on my feet they last me atleas 2 years so comfortable I don't want to take them off and there steel toe boots is what I am talking about

Why does this only have 4.5 stars? This is top notch - the best sandwich you'll ever have I've been looking for a deli that sells boars head in the area and finally found this spot from a yelp picture. SO GOOD.

straight trash the lady gone tell me i cant talk on the phone then had the nerve to tlk to the other passengers about me like r u serious better off finding another way to the airport they are horrible
Pretty good car wash with friendly staff, wash for bulk of the car clean, not so much the bugs off the grill but good enough.

What an amazing find! New Orleans has some great Cajun food but this Latin and Caribbean fusion is a MUST! Everything was absolutely delicious. We ordered the pulled pork yucca and quinoa chowder tapas and the pork chop and mofongo entree and enjoyed every bite on the balcony!

Millie's is a great place for breakfast, the food is good, the service is good, the decor is somewhat scary J/K. Great breakfast spot, love their potato pancakes. They have a long wait on weekends so be prepared.

I'm not sure how this place got such good ratings my potatoes were burnt, my eggs were scorched and had egg shells the only thing that was edible was the sausage so I'm cool with never coming back. Too many awesome places to put up with this quality.
Fantastic food options that are interesting but the menu doesn't alienate picky eaters either, excellent beer list and also a great place for brunch.
The spicy tuna has the texture of someone chewing tuna for at least an hour and spitting it back out to serve it to you. I wish I got the non chewed up Salmon. Kelp noodles were interesting.

not usually one to leave bad reviews, but after having multiple bad experiences at this location i felt i had to. From being rude through the ordering speaker to being ignored at the window. and being over charged we will never visit this location again.
Closed Oh So Good is oh so gone All of the windows are covered and there is an eviction notice on the door.

Just wanted someplace clean and comfortable to stay 1 night, over half the guest were construction workers standing around smoking weed. Then the ac quit abound midnight and was blowing hot air, and couldn't open window because of very strong pot odor. Was miserable.

Went to Reno and stayed in western village inn in sparks all I got to say is we're coming back, clean comfortable beds clean rooms, Casino has really good service and Panchos restaurant is delicious!five stars.

The food here is delicious but the service leaves much to be desired. It might be an issue with management not scheduling enough staff, but if I ask to see a food menu again, you probably shouldn't leave me sitting for a long time before coming to take my order.

I love Mama's house! I am Korean-American living far away from my family. Mama's is the only place in Indianapolis that is as delicious as my own mothers food and makes me feel at home! I highly recommend!

Pretty pricey food and not very good. This was my second time going there and the food was find of dry and just not worth the prices they put up. I have not tried the drinks there, so maybe that is their specialty.
Went for dinner with friendssuch a cozy/cute spot but unfortunately we all felt the main dishes were not anything special based on the prices.
In most towns this would be a 4 star but overall was pretty average compared to the other options in the area.
Food = Bad Atmosphere = Horrible Clientele = Really? Are you serious? Beer Selection = not bad. All though most of the good beers are the ones on the Shelf that no one drinks and all are dusty.

Be aware of the rude worker she act like she don't want to work and taking cookie orders is hard I won't be coming back to this location and the cookies burnt do better people pay a lot of money for these cookies to get rude service

Arissa was my waiter when I went to visit this place, I had the chicken and waffles breakfast and it was delicious! Arissa was very kind and explained the menu to me very well and answered all my questions! It was a very good experience overall.
they pass a floor brush to the car, they do not wash the wheels, everything is bad, $ 18 dollars in the trash

Shout out to Andrew who went the extra mile when I needed to buy Tylenol and guest services was closed for lunch. He not only radioed the manager to come open it up and sell it to me but he waited with me until she arrives. Excellent customer service!
came in here and had a noodle soup and it was ok nothing special I think it couldve had more flavor but service was ok since I was the only one there
Great food and really friendly staff . Their food is off the hook, their burritos are great and their quesadilla is amazing as well will definitely keep on eating here

I was the only customer and with four workers here, they couldn't bring my food to me when I chose to eat here. Not great service, but good makes up for it. Good, could be ideally priced a couple dollars cheaper, and not the nicest atmosphere inside
They need to work on customer service as the guy at the front desk looked like he woke up on the wrong side with a bad attitude.
Good pizza to eat here the owner is nice I eat my chicken cheese steak and French fries and they are really good and hot even it fresh you beat that best food ever

This msg is for the super waiter who attended to us tonight : Thank You !! You've truly up the par for meaning of customer service and you've made our first night in New Orleans so much more memorable !! Thank you .
I choose the obvious, cochon, I came back twice, it was incredible, even now my wife and I would like to go back to NOLA just to try cocoon at Cochon and the Acme's oysters
Food is good. Service gets worse and worse each time we come here. Wasn't sure who our waiter/waitress was and the chef right in front of us didn't acknowledge us for about 10 minutes.

The food had good flavor but the bean were a bit tough, the tail had more fat than meat and I didn't understand the cabbage. It definitely wasn't bad, just wasn't my flavor. Had to try something new though!

Great location, good coffee and menu sounds enticing. One area of potential improvement is the kiddos. When we have been in they have been a bit loud which can be distracting when trying to work or hold a meeting. I hope this place stays and continues to improve!
Aweful three tables in the place and we had a work out after 25 minutes while we were all waiting for two pancakes and bacon lousy service
Thanks to Ken and the guys down at the Oro Valley location for going above and beyond even staying late to help with my tires!

We stopped to dine at this restaurant while visiting Indianapolis for a baseball tournament. It did not disappoint. The entrees were amazing and did not have the extreme sodium base of Thai dishes that I've had in the past. The service was impeccable as well!
Great stadium Friendly staff great food reasonable prices Great view from anywhere Old baseball memorabilia and World Series trophy are on display

More like an expensive diner. Not impressed. Service slow. Food bla. Manager did come around after we finished to see how things went and we were honest, he gave us desert on the house. VERY good deserts!! Recommend the limoncello cake!
Although the staff is friendly enough, and the service is fast and efficient, I have to say my last two times the bread was tough as hell and hard to bite through. Maybe this is normal? Not a fan.

When a spring broke on my vacation rental's garage door I called Overhead Door in Boise and they went out the next Monday because it was significantly cheaper wait a bit. The whole thing was taken care for a really good price, and with friendly communication throughout.
The server was good but the kitchen people need to be trained better sorry we ran out of whatever like oil.
Pros: customer service, food, location close to mississippi river, close to parking Cons: overpriced, TERRIBLE ODOR in the dining area, bathrooms needed attention
Being from Chicago we were in new Orleans so we had to get sliders from Krystal close to white castle but no cigar

While I'm definitely guilty of ordering again and again, there are definitely better Mexican style restaurants that are much better. Usually when I order here my order is messed up in some way but if you want some quick Americanized Mexican this is it.
Revisited after a couple months Was go to local quick place for a sandwich Seems to have really slipped Sorry still disappointed in quality of food and the ability to get an order right

Could hear the manager speaking to another customer about workplace drama and speaking poorly about employees while trying to enjoy my dinner. Food was good but wish the manager was more professional.
All right so like a week ago I was at cartel coffee lab it is ass. The coffee is nasty the brew is just gross and they don't know how to make iced lattes and almond milk was old.
This is literally the third time I've been and not gotten service. If you go, don't sit outside, you won't get any service and if you do it will be in intervals of maybe 30mins.

Everyone knows the Michael's schtick 50 percent higher than elsewhere in town, but it's oh so convenient my socks were blown off! This was such a pleasant surprise, I came back twice in one week to find it wasn't a one-off. The service REALLY is that friendly here!
Friendly service and food wasn't terrible, but it all came crashing down when a big roach walked across the floor by our table. Other guests saw it too.

Delicious, inexpensive, relatively quick lunch option. They are always busy during lunch time but even if the line is way out the door, they are able to get your order out to you pretty quickly. The Adobada tacos are my favorite.

Horrible. Waited an hour and a half when the wait was supposed to be 20 minutes. Finally sat and ordered drinks, after 20 minutes of our drinks not being delivered and no visit back from the waitress for our food order we left. Will not return.
The service was horrendous and took forever and our orders got mixed up the food was just so so and it was so expensive I felt ripped off and it was a big disappointment
Always Feel Treated Like a Queen :) The Staff Makes Me Feel More Than Welcome :) Fantastic Food Great Cooks Every Time!! Super Service - the Best!! Thank You Gentle Ben's!!

I feel knitty, oh so knitty they've got it. Best of all, they have a wonderfully knowledgeable and helpful staff to assist you, and even offer beginning and advanced knitting classes during the evenings. A bit pricey, but worth the quality and knowledge that you recieve in exchange.
Why 3 stars? Because smoking is allowed inside and that sucks. Stiegl, from Austria. If it weren't for the indoor smoking, The Independent would be one of my favorite places to go out in St. Pete.

My all time favorite is the brisket! Hands down some of the best that I have had. If you're in the area stop and support a local business and be sure to do the Mac and cheese with burnt ends as well !

Decent beer and food options here with a local/regular feel and ambiance, but there were definitely tourists there as well. Rusticout here, but glad I came to check it out to see what they had to offer in the ever-growing Tucson brewpub scene.

Scott has shown up and fixed the jacuzzi quickly, very reasonable and very professional man, my wife met him and told me about the amount of useful information we have received, pleasure dealing with punctual and professional people. They should have sent Scott on day one!
The worst property management company I have ever dealt with. I am not one to write a review, but when they have their mind made up and refuse to just listen its very frustrating.

It's fine. Steak fries limitless and pop is bottomless, as advertised but it offers just few other burgers an not much else for salads or soup options. It's clean & staff seem very pleasant. Tower of onions were 5 on the side for 2.50 +tax!!!
Excellent sandwiches and very friendly staff! Their other locations offer different sandwiches but if you want one that isn't on the menu just ask and they'll usually make it!

Just what I was looking for! Black and Blue burger: crispy, perfectly crispy, applewood bacon, plenty of melted blue cheese, red leaf lettuce, and fresh tomato. A perfectly cooked medium, pink in the middle, patty and seasoned fries washed down with a Motorworks Pulp Fiction Grapefruit IPA. Thumps up!

This place is ok in a pinch. I ordered the Thai Basil and it had *spicy* next to it on the menu but there was zilch heat factor and the dish was pretty bland. I also ordered the ginseng coffee, which was good, and the wonton smores, which were bleh.
After waiting 50 minutes for our food on Monday night, we asked the waitress and found out apparently they had lost the ticket . Unacceptable!

Overall a nice, low the lockers are too few/too close together, the restroom area always stinks like piss, and there are only 2 sinks, which makes shaving, brushing your teeth, and styling your hair a cramped, rushed experience. But the price is right.

El servicio es muy malo las personas que hoy están trabajando tienen una actitud de mierda no quieren atender a los clientes como es te apresuran demasiado jamás vuelvo a ir a ese lugar ojalá arreglen esto y pongan gente que de verdad quiera trabajar

Wish there was a 0 rating... Cheese steak had a strong burnt taste without it being actually burnt, I've given this place a couple of tries and the results are the same.... Better off going to Dons or Dicostanzas in chi.... Save your money and go elsewhere

Still open and still a pretty nice typical upscale steakhouse. Food, service and atmosphere were fine, but I probably wouldn't make a special trip there if I wasn't already staying in the hotel. Stuffed from the steak and a very good salad, so did not try the desserts.
Offered the band naming rights to my 2nd child for a Queen song (preferably "somebody to love" or "Bohemian" and they only knew "Fat bottom girls". Not what we were looking for.

Emerald Aisle service was excellent as usual. What I wasn't prepared for was my Ford Fusion had an admin mykey that restricted my speed and volume on the radio. It would have been nice to know in advance so I could select another car or agency.
It may be possible, but after numerous visits to this store, it is difficult to envision how the customer service could possibly get any worse

Wonderful food . Our waiter Michael Warren made our experience absolutely wonderful!! He's the best They have the best cantaloupe and honeydew daiquiris you will find in the French quarter TO DIE FOR !!!!

Enjoyable atmosphere;however, parents leave their children unsupervised, which means kids are flopping all over the ice rink and kamikaze into other guests. I would recommend another ice rink, unless you want a broken leg or babysit other people's kids.
I loved the atmosphere. I like to feel like I could be hanging out with Tony Soprano and this place has private quiet booths and the food is good. The price is a bit spendy.
I have a business card for Sam's but when I go in doing the business card only hours they let everyone in for breakfast. The problem with that is the people they let in walk around the store.
We were attracted by the reasonable price and opted to pre and I'm shocked Marriott hasn't pulled their name from the hotel.
The young lady who takes the take out orders is very rude & should not be working in the customer service industry. They also need a new chef, food is not cooked correctly. Oxtail was horrible.
do not place a order for delivery, my order was placed and it was cold and spilled in bag also delivery driver steals the food its a hot ass mess. dont order! needs 0 stars
I thought the rattlesnake aversion training went really smoothly and we were in there and out quickly - even with two dogs to train! Everyone was super nice and easy to work with.

We visited with our toddlermonthage children. I would bring my kids here also to ride their bikes or scooters since the path is closed off to vehicle traffic. I will definitely come back to explore the area more.
Don't get me wrong the singing is great but they wouldn't even let me get a word in.. also the Apple had a weird taste to it but my milkshake was good but kind of watery, wouldn't go back though

I like to rail about airport food but this place is pretty good although a bit on the salty side and not as good as "Five Guys". The employees do act like you are disturbing them and keeping them from their nap. No smiles no thank you just resentment.

I had forgotten what a truly gorgeous parade Hermes is. This year's parade was an intriguing mashup of Greek mythology and Carnival celebrations from around the world. I didn't catch a heck of a lot, but that's OK because I was just enjoying how pretty the floats were.

El lugar tenía muy buenas recomendaciones, dice que cierran a las 12 am, sin embargo, llegamos a las 11 y ya no habían opciones para ordenar. El problema, no fueron las pocas opciones, si no, la forma grosera en que nos trataron para indicarnos las opciones que quedaban.

The atmosphere, food, and coffee here were unreal cozy and delicious, but this place gets three stars for price and the shirty attitude of the holier than thou baristas. More humble baristas plz. Passed the Americano test with flying colors, breakfast burrito was on point.

If you want a different vibe than a Starbucks a throwback to the 60's for a coffee drink outside under a big oak tree, this is nirvana. A little rough, but it is completely outdoors. Drive/up is available.

I appreciate that the staff at Wolfgang's treat my sweet little " grand dog" so lovingly since he is a fearful little rescue dog . When my daughter adopted him from the Humane Society he was just skin and bones. Now he is the handsome gentleman he was meant to be .

One of my favorite restaurants in New Orleans. It's always good but often time's great. I think the meat is sometimes fresher just depending on your luck but bar b que isn't made to order and is such a long process so I don't fault them for it.

The only reason I'd go here is if Bar Louie was packed/crowded/couldn't get in and that was the only other outside seating option. I'd never go here to eat inside. Their food is okay, nothing oustanding. Sandwiches, salads, etc. Service is okay too.
I just got home from dinner at Kemoll's Chophouse me and my friend we had a great meal of two filets cooked perfectly great service great food I will be

We love the Buffalo wings, French Dip, hamburgers etc. We'll definitely come back and try more dishes. Update: We came back so many times, I still love the BBQ Wings, the Pork Burger and sweet potato fries are really good as well.

Decent little coffee shop. I ordered the hot Moroccan Mint Tea and oddly it had an incredibly disturbing bitter taste that in it familiar with. Not sure what happened. The offer pastry m, fruit and few soft drinks, no other fare is offered.

Went here on a Saturday 5:00 after an hour wait. The food was DELICIOUS! The service was SPLENDID! My favorite dish was the pork chops the Brussel sprouts taste a bit over cooked other then that everything was great.

Decided to try this place tonight, but when we walked in there was no hostess and only men in the restaurant. Though it's supposed to be a restaurant we didn't see any food, only hookahs. Because we are 2 young women, we left immediately due to the creepy vibe.

If you are looking for a disposal company to come into your neighborhood to do nothing but lose bags off their janky "garbage trucks" that are clearly illegally and dangerously overloaded, look no further. This company is what they haul. Trash.
Slowest fast food restaurant ever, no matter if you're in line or at the stall, no matter how few other people are there. Be prepared to wait at least 30 minutes at minimum.

Worst experience. Customer service = terrible. As the drive thru workers are laughing and not caring about their job and their customers, they completely forgot half of my order. They need to re staff immediately. I will not return to this location.
We had the hot wings- not great, just average, the seared Ahi tuna that was smothered in the teriyaki glaze, the loaded fries were a new take they had prime rib on them and were pretty good.

I don't know why no rules in this place! People go to smoke outside and open a huge garage door that don't close well, and when it's 20 degree outside, it's not pleasant. Not mentioning that some people still smoke inside! Drinks were very watery.
Crispy and thin beignets. No wait. Good in a pinch if you don't want to wait on line at Cafe du Monde, but the beignets pale in comparison.
Really good pizza with attentive service however a pizza with two toppings and two ice teas for $28 bucks is steep

Came in here late and it was relatively busy but only one bartender on hand made it somewhat tough to order drinks. Slot machines, air hockey table and some music made it a pretty average bar for my liking.
Nice building with plenty of employees. The reason for 3 stars is: 1) wait time is absolutely ridiculous, my time is as important as the office's time 2) unwelcoming robots at the front desk

Pretty typical standard cheesesteak, nothing too complicated. Got a steak with wiz and onionsthe steak was sliced a little too thick and was a little over cooked unfortunately. At least they have an array of toppings you can self serve.

I think the driver had ESP because the Colonial shuttle arrived at the same time that we hung up the phone to call for pickup:) Always great service, fast and professional- we will continue to park at Colonial every time we fly out of Philly.
I come here from NJ because the atmosphere rocks, the staff is great, my haircuts are always perfect, and the price is worth it. Angel is the coolest. I always leave happy.
I drove from Riverview Fl for a event and the event was cancelled but they never let you know on the website, so my review is not good through the missed information.

It's an older mini golf course that could use some updating, but it has 2 different courses that are fun and challenging. Driving range is great for practice and there are batting cages too. Usually not crowded so it's nice to play without waiting.
Great food but they won't deliver to Sicklerville. The chicken cheese steaks are great and the portions are nice, but I have to travel 40 minutes back and forth to enjoy.
