Stick with the appetizers salads and pizzas, the entrees are pretty mediocre, they're all over sauced, why does evety Italian joint in this area drown everything in too much sauce, the meatballs and arancini are worth the visit.
OK, I dig dive bars and Frenchmen St is packed chockundersidetherickshawor-miss with some serious potential for having a GREAT time pretty often. Yeah, we'll be back.

Amazing food, priced right for what you get, rice, soup, bread, entree. Always recommend this place when I have friends from out of town or cross town that have never had the chance to enjoy it. Will always recommend.
Just another mediocre sushi place in Santa Barbara in a weird location so it's kind of underwhelming and easy to forget about.

I love this place so much, the staff is super knowledgable and seems to always be willing to answer all your questions. they restock their supply often, and their space is organized so beautifully! fair prices too!

Absolutely phenomenal beer, however their policy on serving growlers is quite preposterous, simply stated they will not fill up one with their semi-regionally famous IPAs. I'm no trying to be WITy but their wheat is not worth the tainting my growler.

this place has people working there who are as about as solemn as morticians and about as modivated to help you as sloths. Food is pretty good though. Much better than most Subways and I cannot stand Quiznos. Wish they had more locations in other places.

Not sure if I like this place because of the cool bar or the quicky piece of pizza I can get in the front. Actually, i like their eggplant sandwich. I won't hesitate to swing by anytime i need a quick drink or food.

This is older venue, but it still has daily activities as well as awesome open hockey on Saturday nights. They do birthday parties, have a pro shop with surprisingly uninflated prices & a great gear manager who sharpens skates masterfully. I hope this place is here forever.

Awesome pizza and excellent service. Stopped in real quick for a bite to eat during lunch and was greeted by the hostess/server - she was attentive and quick, in no time my pizza was ready! If you're looking for good eats on the go, check out Bricco!!!

Jim's is the best, hand's down. yes it can take a while to wait in line, yes, it's a simple sandwich, but it is simplicity to perfection. The rolls, the meat, the amount of cheese, onions, a masterpiece!!!

Went here for a party with family. Service was not anything special which I thought tasted pretty unmemorable. Seems like the large diverse menu is why we went there with family, and I assume we will be there again. But I will not be going with friends anytime soon.

Overall good place to eat but still needs to work out some service kinks. Pros: Kind Waitress Hostess didn't greet us coming in or leaving Waitress did not arrive to the table for 15 after being seated. It wasn't busy. Truffle Fries....EXTREMELY OILY

The day we went in, we were the only ones in the joint! The wait staff was attentive and courteous and helpful when I couldn't decide what to get off of there fullthe calzones are the biggest I've seen!!
Small pig in a blanket nothing to brag about extremely expensive and they push stuff on you That you don't want
I got the house beef delivered last night and have been struggling with some pretty unpleasant food poisoning all day today; lots of vomiting. Be weary of this place, It's questionable.
Owner made us wait for an hour with next to no communication after saying it would "5 being dismissed like that was surprising and a bit upsetting.

Very nice hotel, clean rooms and friendly staff. Only complaint is the sound proofing isn't great, and there is a rail car that goes by pretty often that is really loud. I can't fault the hotel for that but it should be known

For all your Indian Grocery Needs. Can't think of anything I couldn't find there. Staff not only helped bag the food like in Publix but also helped place the products on the conveyor belt from the cart. Just needs a little crowd control. Bit too crowded.

An O-K Korean food joint. I wasn't so impressed with their soondubu . Not hearty enough, and it tasted too watered down. I think the only reason their business is decent is that it's located within walking distance of Penn, and all the international kids come here when a hankering arises.

Lucked up and walked right into Jimmy J's as the line for parties of more than 2 was out the door. Food was average. Not good, not bad. Service was OK. Not worth all the hype in my opinion. Wont likely return.
We have been dining here for twenty years unfortunately this visit was disappointing gumbo was lukewarm, shrimp remoulade was mushy, however the Funky Monkey drinks and service were great.
Great Restrant always go their when in New Orleans, First went 1980 always have BBQ srimp, Oysters on half shell, Recomend to every one I know when going to NOLA
It's sometimes hard to do a transaction sight unseen on the internet, but Robert Monica and Randall worked diligently with me and gave me a great deal. I would highly recommend them!

its atmosphere is cute and all but i thought the cupcakes were lil dry. the place was dirty . and when ure ordering cupcakes and see the lady that is working there lick her finger when decorating a cupcake, it was a lil gross. sorry

Food is "healthy" and okay, if you don't mind your eggs microwaved and a sometimes snooty morning crew talking about things they learn in art school. Great coffee and vegan treats! And I've been meaning to ask for a membership card.

Great service, fun place, food was sohot chicken and it was quite mild, so if you want the spice, ask for the hottest they have! They introduced me to a tasty local beer that I really liked; Hap n' Harry's...a light lager.
Place is awesome I went there got my self a set of bedroom they worked me as good deal Joseph his funny will be coming back for a living room

The food was good @ reasonable prices & the waitress was very friendly. The only downside was that even though they were fairly busy, they only had 1 bartender & 1 extremely busy waitress. She did a great job considering they could have used at least 1 more waitress.

we had a great guide! He knew a lot of interesting information on the history of the place and town. We had about 7 small shots and that was enough for me to leave happy, informed, and glad I did the tour!

I've found some really cool stuff here - furniture as well as clothing and linens. The prices tend to be a bit higher than they should be, but it's definitely worth checking out since there are usually some treasures tucked away!

Everyone was very nice at Poppy & Monroe, including my nail technician. I had a great chat with her and enjoyed my services, but I felt like $70 was pretty steep for what I got. Overall, it's a nice place, but maybe a little overpriced.

The food is fine, some of it is good even, but it is excessively overpriced, same as every other Starr restaurant. If I'm paying $10 for an order of miso soup it better have gold flakes in it, or feed a family of 5.

This airport is home so I hate to complain too much but when you travel out of Lambert and end up at modern airports with free WiFi that haven't fallen by the wayside you realize it's substandard. Sorry Lambert.

We needed limo services at the last minute for a ride from Baltimore to New Jersey and ETA Worldwide Transportation Services were there for us. The owner made it happen easily and without any problems. I will use them over and over again.

Did not appreciate Styrofoam I do not want my to go food that I picked up an entire dinner to be placed in a carcinogen like Styrofoam I didn't think a chain like Chili's would be so cheap as to use Styrofoam hope someday the government bans it

Moon's is a good place if you want an old60 minutes for my food. At this point, I'm probably never going back there again, it's absolutely agonizing and there are so many other places nearby that treat you better.
It's okay. Rooms are clean. Breakfast was average. You can hear the noise from other guests in your room, but you don't hear the airport noise - that's true, as other Yelpers have commented.

While it was very busy the food was amazing and I would definitely go back again I got a hotdog and my family got burgers we all said it was very good though if you do go I would recommend the eclair it is very good aswell
Ordered a large meat lovers pizza that was great but i also got wings which were extremely burnt and almost inedible. Will come for pizza again but will stay away from wings

The staff are friendly and the ice cream is to die for. The unlimited mixins are the cherry on top, especially when you have kids, who want everything colorful in the ice cream. Really takes indulgence to a new level.
Excellent. We were really happy with the food and service. We will definitely return here The server made it a point to go out of his way to exceed in service. Thank you again and we will return.

Food is actually quite good and consistent, but the price point is off and always has been. I think they take advantage of the lack of competition in the area, but I'll happily walk onward to Parc or Dandelion's to pay less, for better food.

Whenever I'm on the road and can stop at a Sonic I will. The two things I always have to order is a shake, whatever flavor I'm feeling at that given moment and chicken strips. If I can get those two things I'm in for a happy car ride.
No fancy bulls**t - just GREAT F**KING PIZZA! You can tell it's run by just a bunch of Italian guys who know how to do it better than anyone else!

My only gripe is when we ordered a growler to go, it was an extra $10 on top of the price. Nowhere on the menu does it say that. They basically catch you with your pants down. It's deceiving to anyone unfamiliar with the place. I was pissed.

The lady working the register around 10:00 AM this morning was an absolute gem! Very kind and was making everyone smile. Unfortunately I did not get her name but hopefully management knows who was working at that time and can give her my compliments!

Great owners always helpful great prices. Beautiful views great place to go kayaking paddle boarding or Jetske's they have four Jetske's very official place they're always open. The best prices that I have found in town. And for me they also have fishing kayaks which is totally awesome

The food was delicious and hot when we picked it up. The restaurant itself was pretty lacking, not the most inviting place to want to dine in, but I'm not completely opposed to it. Bonus points: they let you order mixed drinks to go.
This the worst KFC in Tampa, the food and Service if fine, the bathroom has no tissue paper and has no waste basket, if u have to do number 2, good luck cleaning yourself.
Great flavor and extremely tender/well cooked meat, but the portion was a little small and the spices weren't well mixed throughly into the dish Service was okay, not great.

AWFUL service! Waitress, managers are rude and have no clue how to run a restaurant. Food was not good. Save your money and time. Go enjoy your dinner at any of the many Italian restaurants in Philly who treat their customers like they actually want their business.

Update: when I transferred my prescription to CVS, that pharmacist realized that Philly Pharmacy had printed INCORRECT DOSAGE INSTRUCTIONS on the label. I was taking 2x meds due to their error. Avoid! Avoid!

Horrible customer service! I did not give 24 hour notice to reschedule my appointment and Tonya the owner applied my groupon to the appointment. I was planning to be a repeat customer because the location is convenient to my work but I will not return.

Tell me why you would cage in the 21+ crowd & limit them & their beverages to a small area around the bar??? Is this Disney on Ice?? Ridiculous. Money is in your drinks. Limit the under 21 area. I will not come back.

The line is ridiculously long and they left off a whole item on my order. When we brought it to the cashier's attention all she said was "oh sorry" and didn't even attempt to fix it. The line was way too long to have to wait through again.

Just gonna hit the quick details of my experience: climate control is not adjustable 20% chance of getting a decent view location is great for tourism only room rate and quality are not equal. Overpriced for sure -I've stayed in super 8's nicer than this place

I felt like the original owners are gone? The food was barely warm, portions on street tacos terribly small, no more sopapillas to end the meal with 'on the house' & only 1 bathroom in working order. Plus, the tables were dirty.

Since this city is full of history & museums... this museum is considered a smaller one. Admission is way cheaper as well. If you have limited time visiting the city, then use your time wisely since there are so many museums in this area.
2 1/2 stars. Had a fried pork platter with yellow rice and beans on 9/3/16 - Food was on the dry side, but it had a decent taste. Would consider trying them again, but probably won't.

Food was good, but was delivered cold within 30 minutes of placing the order, left me wondering if it was someone else's food. I don't mean "not piping hot", I mean the food was literally COLD. Once reheated, though, it was pretty good.

Great Price, good food, mediocre atmosphere Love the prices, the food is not bad too. The atmosphere... well, not so great. I hope they can renovate the place soon so that i dont feel like i am eating in Tijuana while I dine. Nice service. Get the #10

Similar experiences to Brad and Roadie. Pleasant to talk with, but I'm still waiting 45 minutes after our scheduled appointment time for Ramon to Come by and provide an estimate. Tried to text and call to see if they were still coming and no response.

I got takeout was very timely, I've never tried the delivery but if you pick it up you'll have no problem. Also, I called on a busy Saturday night and had to call 3 times in order to get through. So just keep that in mind.

Cashier who came out from behind the counter to assist had no mask on. Will not be back as it's apparent this company does NOT support the local community by refusing to follow simple mandates. Thanks "Mark".
It's okay. It's very healthy which is nice but it is not my favorite out of all the smoothie bowls I have tried
Horrible customer service. If the employees don't like working there and take out their frustrations on the customers, maybe they should get different jobs.
Could not even stay with our family as the reserved area was not big enough. Extremely overcrowded and noisy, cannot rare the taste of food as we were asked to leave due to lack of space.

Beer is good, but pretzels are barely tolerable, and seriously, you can't turn on the AC in the place. It's hot in here, and what's up with the ceiling, either dust it or power wash it because it looks nasty

This facility is NOT handicapped accessible! As much as the staff will tell you on the phone, it is not. A big disappointment that a establishment that does not accommodate my handicapped son it not a place I will give my money to. Very disappointed!!!

Took my best friend whose name is Dino for his 40th birthday & asked to take a picture with Dino behind the bar but that sweet lil bartender said hell no! Just wanted a picture!! And the ranch sucks too!!!!

Traditional and typical Hong Kong food. I love love their breakfast section. 肠粉好吃！It is not a good place to sit down and eat though, because there are so many people and they are always loud. However, the waiter was so rude!

This seems to be a good place for breakfast or lunch. The menu is varied and reasonably priced. The waitresses seem cordial. I wanted to rate it higher, but as we were checking out, the cashier just struck me as a bit rude.

There is a sewer line outside of IHOP and it has smelled like poop for the last 15 years or so. You would have to be starving to death to eat here after smelling that as you walk in. All in all yeah one star.

Horrible customer service. I just spent an hour on the phone with them, being shuffled from one person to another, and they still did not find me the right person to speak with. It is either incompetence, or a deliberate attempt to avoid dealing with problems.

I know being on vacation means eating at new places and trying new things but I really just wanted some fresh fruit, Greek yogurt and healthy granola. This market had everything I could ask for and the prices were affordable!

Came here and got their cheesesteak, big mistake. The portions were small, overpriced, and not that good. For the almost $10 I spent on one unsatisfactory cheesesteak, I 'd rather have gone to Noboru for the same price next door, and I don't even like Nobes.

Taking care of a customer involves more than taking their food order giving them their drink and ignoring them from then on. Customers should not have to ask for their check from another employee because your server is nowhere to be found.

The food is great but you pay $17 just to park and eat here. Not worth the extra $17. If you walk here it worth it but if you are a local resident there are way easier places with great food that you don't have to pay to park at.

Joyce and her husband are AMAZING! I was in a rush and needed my dress altered and Joyce was able to finish it within a week and did better than I could've ever imagined! They are both so sweet too. 10/10!!
I told the waitress my pasta i don't want too spicy but was still very spicy anyway and she was not friendly at all. Maybe too much customer make them grumpy

Walk in, made me feel welcome and gave a great haircut. I'm pretty easy going with my hair but there were a few "higher maintenance" dudes there getting cuts and the staff seamed very knowledgeable and capable.

Everyone is always so friendly here. If you happen to have a nail in one of your tires, they will remove it and get you patched up for free. I've never had less than excellent service at this location and will definitely come back!

Out of all the planet fitnesses I've been to around the Nashville area this one has to be the most boring one. They need to put in that CrossFit/Circuit training station like the Madison and La Vergne PFs has.
Based on two visits, I have found the beer okay but not quite up to the level of my favorite Saint Louis microbreweries.

People rave about this place but I think it's overrated. I've been here twice, ordering breakfast burritos but honestly the food was too greasy and the potatoes made everything taste kinda bland. Meh. I've experienced better.
Nice little corner dive bar. The po' boys were on great rolls; could have used just a little more dressing, but the stuffings catfish, oyster, crawfish, etc seasoned.
Worst krystal in my area left my hash browns off my order said they would bring them not the first time I had this problem I hope I don't have to go back to that place

Jesus, it's Chili's...is there truly a need to review the casual dining equivalent of McDonald's? The food is generic and served in portions the size of pig troughs, but it gets the job done in a pinch. The service was really good as well. That is all.
Megan is the most amazing GM in the industry and she cares about her staff and customers on a personal level, best crew around hands down

Overall great experience- top 50 pop music that you can dance to and an emcee that keeps it fun but the shot girls are a bit rude. One girl grabbed the back of my friend's head and was pushing her to take a shot.
Employees are arguing and cursing in the drive thru, they can't seem to get to get a simple order correct and management is rude.

They don't know what they are doing! I tried and tried to give them the benefit of the doubt, but could no longer let my dog suffer and had to go to another vet to treat his diabetes. Do not go here! They are all about taking your money!!

We eat here often and it is not your typical quicksol it is very off I contacted their customer service link on the website but a week later and no response so....I'm posting this apparent flaw in an otherwise nice restaurant.

Great ribs and even better entertainment. I was surprised with how good the band was going into a chain restaurant, but Charles Elam was amazing and hilarious! They have live music every night and every type of person comes to enjoy it. I highly recommend the entertainment and the ribs!

I'm here waiting forever for " wait to be seated". I don't understand how come so many people work here and the restaurant doesn't look busy and I have to stand here wait forever! But food is not bad~
This place rocked a few years ago so we thought we would go there again since we were back in town. The food was just ok the service sucked.

We decided to try Minerva as Saffron was temporarily closed. The chicken tikka masala which we both ordered was good but I asked to have mine prepared "very mild" and it was quite spicy. I'm looking forward to Saffron re-opening as they have made this dish just right.

breakfast there was delicious and the service was great as well, the only bad part was the crowd but I guess you gotta expect that with great food. make sure you try it out the next time your in Reno.
You won't leave hungry the hush puppies are great the baked potatoes are a meal in themselves I love the spinach Maria and fried catfish yum yum
Completely ruined my eyebrows. Overtrimmed, got wax on my face and hair, and literally took off 1/2 my eyebrow like you see in the movies. Will never come back!

I had the All American Juicy Lucy with fries. I love that they use Tony's Chachere season on their fries and despite how juicy the burger was the bread didn't fall a part. The service wasn't the best, but I would definitely go back.
I ask for beef and they gave me chicken I hate chicken we also ordered shrimp soup and like only 4 shrimp and it tasted like boiled water the worst.

Our latest visit here was very disappointing. From our waiter being forgetful to the food just being darn right disappointing. There were four of us for a late lunch and everything was of poor quality I'm sure it will be a long while before we'll be back.

Never showed up I had to call to find out that they couldn't make it because of another job. They didn't even have the professional courtesy of calling to let me know they couldn't make it when they had scheduled this the day prior

Not bad... This is a cute bar with a mildly fancy vibe . The drinks are yummy, albeit slightly pretentious . The service is slow, and that's the reason I took away a bunch of stars, but if you're in the mood for some yummy pretentiousness, then head on over.
Nothing short of impressive. Rory did an amazing job of dyno tuning my LS and resolved quickly a couple problems even the "experts" at other shops could not figure out.

Ice cream was extremely overpriced 7.99 w/surcharge to uses a credit card...these alleged money laundering fronts piss me off...some stupid young girl tried to explain to me the credit card companies charge them 2% so they have to charge consumers 15%!?!? Stay away
Delicious!! We had the privilege of eating the glazed donuts while they were still hot & they were nothing short of amazing! Definitely a spot to check out.

Would not go back. Below average meat quality, high prices. Only thing good was our server. The restaurant was full and he was doing his best, but there were only two servers working so he was struggling. Poor management leading good workers.
I am normally satisfied with the food here, but today was the second time I bought sopes that do not look or taste like sopes, was just a flat tortillas with steak and cheese.

Do not pay the New Orleans premium to eat the greasy, salty, dimensionless dishes that this restaurant is serving. You can get sexually harassed and eat premade/frozen crab cakes and spinach drowning in butter and salt anywhere in the French Quarter!

Let me start off by saying that Buca is a great business for large groups fast service friendly prices tasty salads The cons: almost like a Disneysauces lean on the Ragu which can be perfect for those days where you might be hankering for some guilt-ridden pasta
Adorable ambiance, very cozy and romantic. My baked lasagna was too cheesy and didn't love their tomato sauce but steaks were excellent as well as their service

Cute, very well-known, bistro with a bar in Edwardsville. I came for lunch on a weekday, which was the perfect time because apparently it gets packed at other times I tried the cauliflower and it was very flavorful, but not my favorite. The service was great however

The dining room is huge. We had dim sum; it came to $42.00 including tax and tip for two people. The food was pretty good and it was fun with the carts constantly rolling by, kind of like a buffet that comes to you.

While the margarita pizza was boring and tasteless, the spinach, goat cheese frittata was one of the best I ever had . Let me give mention to the waffle & pecan butter. O M G, fantastic . I can't wait for Wiregrass location to open.

Pats vs. Genos Pats for sure. Genos steaks arent even cut. I feel like I'm chewing on leather. I'm not sure if they use the same bread as Pats or maybe I'm just biased due to their past racial controversy but...it's not good. At all. What.so.ever.
Super rude, and then talked about how we didn't tip ? Maybe I'd tip you if you had better customer service for someone that wasn't even having a complicated order, no reason for the hostility.
Love Matt! :-) Before and after pictures are below; he took me from hair that I hated to hair that I live for! Greg also hung around and was super funny. See you soon to add some more blonde!!
It's pretty darn awesome. Good, fresh food. Great brews. Tour is a little noisy, depending what day you go, but it's great information at a local brewery to learn more about how your beer is made!

Three stars for a newly ish re8.99/pound is unheard of elsewhere. The produce and dairy are good as is the take and bake pizza. Editing down to three stars as the meat doesn't taste nearly as fresh as it used to at the old locations.

Ordered the catfish platter and it wasn't very good. At almost $30 with tax, it was probably the most expensive fish platter that I've had and not even the fries were memorable. Ended up giving it away to a homeless guy. I wouldn't recommend.

Very disappointing. Chinese food was old and dry....salt n pepper squid had no salt and pepper and there was a serious lack of cooked veggies on the hot bar. Overall, definitely not worth the $50 we paid for three people.
Woot! For Molly. Thanks to her and the amazing hospitality of This place I made it to work with all my documents in hand. Can't wait to come back on my next stay in Tucson! Thanks a million

This is an update from my review in 2014. This place only gets better with time. Food is great. Staff is pleasant. Only negative is the wait because it's small and so good that people love to come here and often have a line
Incharged on our bill when we asked our waitress about it she claimed she served us a dish we did not receive and refused to refund us. Would not recommend this place to anyone.

Good produce but I did feel that the prices were higher than usual. Mostly I was very disappointed that during this time of Social Distancing and Covid-19 that not one of the staff wore a mask. Now more than ever we need to be diligent with this pandemic.
Average food, average prices, average decor and service. If you want an old fashioned breakfast and don't mind a little oil, this place serves it up like the truck stops.

I have been waiting over a year to try in and out, the are not located in my part of the country . I was not disappointed freshly made burger with great taste. I would highly recommend giving it a try!
Smoothies are for the most part good and as described but the teenage kids working on multiple occasions are unfriendly and not excited to be at work.

Great food at great prices! I got the house salad, but I should have gotten some of the amazing specials they have on the menu like the other members of my family did. Great meals! Defiantly recommend for breakfast and lunch

Hands down the best hot dog I had ever tasted. Been to different hog dog stands from Richmond VA to places in the Sacramento CA area as seen on the food network. What made the difference was the bun. I will be back!!!!

LOUD is an understatement. The chef, standing not more than four feet in front of you has to yell for you to hear what they say. They need some serious sound control or walls to cut the noise. Save your hearing, go elsewhere.

The staff is absolutely amazing!! The atmosphere in this shop is so welcoming when I come back to Reno I will definitely make sure to come back here!! There was so many cool and interesting things I wanted to buy so much!! 10/10 would recommend
Went last weekend don't get me wrong it is a beautiful place however I thought the cake was very dry big disappointment to me. Certainly wasn't worth the price

Wow the nerve, the audacity, never in my life! Rude to customers very very RUDE! I left with in 20 mins of being there because my server mostly definitely was not up to date on HIS customer service skills

The people are nice... but I walked in there to try to get a simple issue fixed with my iPhone not connecting to my bluetooth and was told they could not help me without an appointment. There were 10 employees standing around with nothing to do! Super inconvenient policy...

Usual Taco Bell food, which is tasty. Staff at this location very polite and helpful. Most other local fast food places have rude, obnoxious kids on staff who feel no obligation to be polite to customers.

Great place with a neighood feel. They have good menu. The staff was friendly and the food was great. The owner, Wayne, was there and made it a point to visit with us to make sure our experience was enjoyable. I recommend a visit!

It was an "OK" experience it wasn't the best the lobby was beautiful but once you enter your hotel room it's horrible. I hated the smell of the awful water that I used to brush my teeth and shower it had a horrid smelll

Don't give this place your phone number while apartment hunting, if you can avoid it. After selecting another place, and many weeks after my move date, they continued to call asking if I was still interested in renting from them.

des·ul·to·ry nice job of plating by the kitchen. My tacos, a Cobb Salad, and that beer ran $34 so that seemed like a decent value for a great beer and some pretty good food. I've already mentioned what I thought of the service.

A star, for what? They do not provide a rest room! Be warned. If you come to this bar you cannot use the rest room. Unbelievable. If you are going to feed a massive crowd drinks it is logical to provide a place to use the mens and ladies rooms.
A honest review. Don't get the crab cake sandwich, there is not real crab meat and the wings are the worst I have ever eaten.

It's a neat experience watching your ice cream being prepared with liquid nitrogen in a machine resembling a giant Kitchen Aid mixer. There's plenty of seating towards the back of the café for small groups. Recommend: for those who have never tried liquid nitrogen ice cream.

A bit overpriced, some stones and jewelry really was shockingly high, but my sweet lawd there's such an amazing selection here I'll always go back. Whether you need a pearl necklace as a gift or a hunk of black tourmaline do protection these friendly folks have it!
I was initially very unhappy, however; they reviewed my concerns with me and refunded what I felt was an unfair charge leading me to change my mind about the business.

Land of Smile is a great place to go for good Thai food when aren't in any mood to wait for a table so I always indulge a little a drink a few cups...Also the Thai Iced tea really is incredible! Try it out...its not so shabby...

This is by far the best Enterprise location I have used, I was greeted right away by Patrick at the front door as I walked in, he extended a warm smile and hand shake. He and Darrian helped me with excellent fast customer service. I will definitely be back!

Yummy pizza with great combinations but the menu is very small. The seating is family style, which was fine for our family of 5 on a pretty empty day but many might not like this. A bit pricey but the pizza was great.

I had a great time at brickwall with my family celebrating a special occasion I was shocked it wasn't very crowded even during the Eagles game the service was prompt the food was good so are the drinks I definitely will come back here again
Good information but for a true ghost hunter you want to be closer to the actual sightings not on the sidewalk across the street hearing Stories

+2 for good chicken skewers +1 for decent fried rice +1 for decent chicken +1 because the servers were nice enough -2 for the scariest pad thai ever. it was florescent orange and tasted of ketchup. how can you have a thai restaurant and have shitty pad thai? mind boggling.

I've never been to this Rudy's in upper state I always go to the one in Montecito St. The portions is to small not the same quality like the tacos in Montecito and for the price not worth going to that location. I'm sticking with the one in Montecito St.

Store seems OK at best. Cashier was so busy flirting with the girl ahead of me in line that he gave me back the wrong change when my turn came. There is a Redbox out front which is the only reason I came to this spot.

What's the point of setting an appointment for two tires to be replaced and told an hour and a half to replace them. I have meetings to attend and trusted their time. Hour and a half of sitting and vehicle hasn't moved since its been parked.

Handy if you work downtown and can get through the pedestal but otherwise an always Mall since it closes in the evening. There is an interesting variety in here including EB Games, Bubble Tea, CBC Radio, movie theatre, and the Bay to name a few.
Smallish store aimed toward the student population. Was nice to take a stroll through bit wouldn't be my first choice if I really wanted to visit a book store.

The best record shop in Southern Il, Rich has a good collection of classic rock both used and new my thing is classic rock. He also has a most impressive selection of turntables, speakers, etc... I plan on continuing to do business here for some time to come!
This place used to be great. As a sat down and began to eat my food I happened to look up and this is what I saw, lost my appetite and left. I will never eat there again

Amazing flavours and pleasant service. Loved the dhoti. However, do not come here if you're in a rush, service was slow. Not due to the efforts of the server, but that it was lunch time, the restaurant was literally full, and they only had one server on. He seemed overwhelmed.

Sign near the door said to "please seat yourself" so we found a table, waited 10 minutes at the table with no acknowledgement from any employee, then got up and left. Won't ever even bother trying to go back.

The Good: Convenient The bad: The eggs had so much liquid in them that they soaked through the wrapper and dripped onto the floor. The surrounding area was disgusting with trash on the floor and counter, spilled food and beverages everywhere (se

Good food, bad service. Our server was rude and then complained at us because we asked for drinks that required her to go to the bar in the back of the restaurant. She also told us to go get our own water.
great food but for the price you can get better elsewhere, i like the outside seating, very busy so get there early. i love the ice tea options

Post Harbour Apartments are located in a great place near the water cheaply constructed apartments, linoleum floors and carpeting with the staples poking through. Not much closet space in a 1 look elsewhere.
Stay away from this place! My husband and I scheduled an appointment early in the morning and when we got there they had given our appointment to another couple! No apology or anything.
Wayne and his son did a quick and clean wall tear-down to combine two rooms into one, and it looks amazing. All for a reasonable price too. Highly recommended!

Go on Wednesday for Happy Hour. $5 of Magic Hat #9. Great deal. The pizza is alright too. Not my crowd normally, but I'll deal with the shiny shoe guys and the spiky hair dudes if I can pay 5 bucks for a good pitcher.

over priced on services, also, purchased a ton of product, one of the pumps didn't work.....When I called and spoke to "manager" she never said sorry or anything, you'll have to come in and swap out is all she said. what happened to customer service... Ughhhh....

Came in to get some pulled pork sandwiches but was very annoyed that there was no one attending the cash register or taking orders. Waited almost 5 minutes before I walked out. Either this place needs a bigger staff or better employees.

As much as one tries to avoid eating at a non-local chain when in New Orleans, sometimes PJs just doesn't cut it. For when that happens, this Starbucks is fine. The Northeasterners from Tulane flock here.
I got a gel mani last Monday and not only is it chipping but one of the nails completely peeled off. This is ridiculous. See pictures.

Just like every other panera which isn't a bad thing. Minus one star on this trip due to a longer than usual wait get it if you never had it before! Clean restaurant and fresh ingredients. Small outdoor seating area which was nice on perfect day.

This is a appointment only barber shop, just so you know. Tried to do a walk in but, nope, it had to be at a exact time, so another words, an appointment. Could be a great place but I can't do set times due to schedule.

This Doughboys is SO FAR away from my house, but apparently this is the one I'll be going to from now on. The girls behind the counter this late afternoon were so awesome, very upbeat and helpful even though I had a big order . Fast, fresh, I'm happy.

Passed through a bit ago, stopped in after seeing reviews. Was ignored, servers were rude when they acknowledged me at all, everything just felt very uptight and not welcoming at all. I can't in good conscience recommend this place. Just a bad experience overall.

I haven't been to a Schnucks in years since I moved from the Midwest but I really liked the store. The produce section looked great, the woman at the seafood counter was nice and helpful, the store was easy to get around and the people were just generally nice.

Blown away by their professionalism and integrity. In a field full of scammers these folks take a much different approach a refreshing break from the norm in this sector. I cannot recommend this company highly enough. Thanks guys!

The ambiance and service was great. The crab cake appetizer was delicious! Unfortunately, the blackened fish was just okay and seafood gumbo wasn't the best that I've tasted in NOLA either for they both lacked flavor.
Great coffee cool music and great service, the Mac and cheese is a must to try and there is lots of cool artwork to check out on the walls Greg is awesome
Unfortunately, I have yet to get to eat at Kenton'sin the meantime I can scream from the rooftops about how good the Pinhook cocktails are!

Terrible service. Every single time. Today we walked in and stood at the hostess stand for 5 min and not 1 single worker came over and said anything. There was also 2 people in front of us that had also been standing there. We walked out.

Delicious!!! Oh man! Fantastic fried green tomatoes and shrimp with remoulade, crab cakes with fresh spinach and exceptional bread pudding with a praline liqueur caramel sauce! Everything was so ridiculously tasty and we loved it! Customer service was excellent as well. So glad we went while we were in town.
Ordered soft shell crab and 3 hand rolls plus iced tea soft shell crab close this place yuh have no clue what food should taste. yes it is embarrassing to our community ... sad..only Snapple was good

I love coming here. I crave their noodles constantly! This place is a solid 30 mins away from me but I gladly make the trip for some good Chinese comfort food! I would definitely recommend the shaved beef noodle soup!
Person behind counter acted like o was bothering him, made me feel like I was bothering him with my questions, what ever happened to good customer service

Cheesesteaks used to be really good but It seems lately the quality went down, fries are good, staff is friendly last couple times I ordered though some minor issues with order being wrong. Chicken cheesesteak is good! Last time I got wings they were still raw could not eat!

The happy hour is good. I'm going to try this place again because I want them to succeed, but not all the staff seem to care. Service is inconsistent. The smokers kind of ruin it, too, because it blows back it. Hoping next time is better!

I must not be a calzone person. Still, their calzones are enormous and the fillings unevenly distributed and not in great proportions to one another, and oh my the grease. Lots and lots of greasiness.

Food was good, but dining area a total disaster. No one was here on a Saturday night yet dining room trash overflowing, floor filthy, and only four tables clean enough to eat at. Seriously need to work on this.
The best sushi in Delaware by far try the blackstone roll it's amazing and the hibachi chicken is an awesome lunch.

We were warned the Nashville airport did not have many dining options, but we bought the descriptions offered on the Nashville airport website...savory barbecue and the like. O'Charley's was a step up from the first stop where the bar was dirty, and fruit flies were multiplying t

Vegetable plate a disappointment. Carrots and potato casserole not even warm. When waiter told, comment was not to reheat or provide something warm but "they have that under a warmer; I'll tell someone".
Bruh the food was so got dam bad my meat wasn't even good Bad service literally we had to wait for our food like twice‍
We usually do take out and the food is usually good but unfortunately the order is always wrong or never ready. They need to get it together!

Great place to watch the game, especially if you are a Cleveland Browns fan and staff is very friendly! Tried the ribs and pulled pork, along with a crazy concoction called the hoof Overall the food was A-OK, but nothing was really mouthwatering or worth drooling over.

Could be better. Waitress was good. The Grits were BOMB. Bloody mary was good. Oyster Po-boy meh, and eggs neptune had no flavor or spice whatsoever. Scratched it off my list of places to eat, but it doesn't look like I'll be coming here again anytime soon.
used to be one of my favorite places to eat steak, escargot, gator and other dishes but like with all good things they change. not as good as it used to be.

Love this build your own pizza concept. The reg size is pretty small so I'd recommend the large if you have a big appetite. The trick is to get less toppings then you think you'd need otherwise the flavors are just all over the place.

Gotta love Alejandro! Good guy Alejandro always has a nice smile to greet you. Additionally, the rest of the staff are always attempting to make great remarks when you are at the counter paying for your food. There is a good range of character here at this store.

I understand it being busy on a Wednesday evening around 7:00 but to sit down for 30 minutes and never get greeted or acknowledged even once by the waiters passing by is completely unacceptable. I just walked out. I won't be visiting again. Terrible service.
only lulu in Stl area great place for nice amazing quality yoga pamts and bras expensive for sure but it's worth the money located in plaza frontenac in stl

Ordered a portabello panini, apparently they didn't have many portabellos half of the sandwich had no mushroom on it and the other half had one thin little mushroom cap on it... not at all how it used to be.

Unbelievably rude. A group of our coworkers decided to order out on Canada day. As soon as the receptionist heard we were ordering from Alberta Hospital, she coldly stated we don't deliver there and immediately hung up. Did not even gave me a chance to talk. Never again.
The hype of this place is the live music, but it doesn't really live up to it. Add to that the 'meh' food, small portions, and extreme prices, and you can skip this joint for a better place.
The food is really good, just make sure everything you order is there before you leave if you're not eating in.
Hot and ready pizza between 4 and 8 pm nevr ready have to wait 20 min they are in no hurry to serve you
STAY AWAY if you want to stay well!! Just about NO ONE in the Lowes on Manhattan in Harvery, LA store was wearing their mask properlymostly chin straps today. I got out as fast as I could.
Really love their sushi, but am I the only one that's really annoyed that they don't have a menu ANYWHERE online?!
I have been going here for 16 years. I get pink and white nails every 3 weeks and a pedicure at least every other time and I wouldn't go anywhere else. Joy B

Feeling irritated. Not only do they want to charge you when you are not to your appointment on time, they will let you sit in their waiting room for days. If you want to feel like cattle being herded to get your meds, this is the place.
Poor service, took twenty minutes to get two black, iced coffees out, and when they came out they were pumped full of simple syrup, took forever and they didn't even get the order right.

Mom and I stayed at this hotel a few years ago due to a free room offer she received in the mail for Super Bowl weekend. It is a nice atmosphere with decent rooms. And the free Super Bowl buffet was not bad either.

Decent pizza- horrible customer service. Not very customer centric I ordered a pizza tonight, had my husband pick it up 20 minutes later and was told they don't have my order. It's a large plain pizza, really? I have to wait for u to make another one? Never going back.

There is always some good deals to be had in STP, It is a quite strange store if you are going only for outdoor gear. I get the deals sent to me via email and can often find some good deals online also. Their return policy is 2nd to none.

Service was really slow, hard to get a seat web though we counted at least 10 suitable tables during out 20 min wait at 3pm on a Saturday. Food was ok but nothing new or special. Ok, but meh. I wouldn't go again. Definite tourist trap.

Nice menu and enjoyable outdoor seating. Loved when you place an order they ask you what fictional character you would like to be then when your order is ready they call that character! I hear them calling Tinkerbell now.... my order is ready.
You fucked up my coffee like usual Always something at this crappy dunkin Get real would ya Typical local Bristol township dump business

Ordered online for delivery. Two hours later I called to inquire and they said it was out for delivery, an hour later I called back and they said they never got the order because their online deliver system is not working.

Attended the ACS meeting here and the facilities were more than adequate. I would say the only thing lacking was in the food area as it has a mall court kind of feel. It's not a big deal as there are a lot of great choices nearby.

I expected more. My veal scallopini picatta wAs not thin enough or crispy enough and the sauce was a bit thick and not lemony enough. The minestrone soup was mostly a vegetable broth. My compatriot tried the lasagne and said it was fine. I will not return
Good pizza but they never have Hot and Readys of anything Even when I call ahead to order I still have to wait because they've given mine away

Went there today after work. The sushis are small and the fish are not fresh. Ok it's University City I get it, but chatting So Much when the costumer is right in front of you Without something to cover your mouth? For real??

Carne asada tacos were decent, with well seasoned if fatty meat, and sopes were flavorful. The salsa that came with the tacos was tasty, and the salsa that came with the tortilla chips was spicy and flavorful, although the chips themselves were bland.

Ehhhh....not better than Froyo in terms of bang for buck and set up. Convenient because next door to bath&body works and the flavors are cute but i found the yogurt a tad more creamier. It will do but not impressed

1. Gate never works, one night I got stuck outside and had to sleep in my car until someone drove through the other way. 2. It took 2 months for Seneca to fix my A/C 3. Upon moving out, I got charged $150 to clean the A/C.

Crew members waste your time trying to correct you and you don't even have time to jump they are rude and hate their job! Do not come here they are lazy and just want to point fingers! Let kids enjoy themselves!

Monday morning and cleaned out of water, which after the weekend is no surprise. Other than that the cashier was arguing with a customer and was mentioning racial stuff, plus someone smelled like weed which is also no surprise around here.

My favorite Ramen in town. We recommend the Vegetarian Ramen with an Egg and add mushrooms, the veggie wontons, and the Raw Veg Salad with miso mustard dressing. This place is so good! Call ahead and pick up at the window on the 2nd floor.
I agree... great dry cleaner. I've been using them for 4 years, never a problem, my stuff is always ready when promised - even the "rush" stuff. Very nice people run the place too.
The food is so good, the St. Louis ribs fall of the bone. But they need to work on there sides like the Mac and cheese need salt and baked beans need more sugar....
Usually they are great. Today they were out of blueberries which was no big deal but I asked for NO coconut and got double coconut. Disappointed,

I have eaten at Hawkers a couple of times now. Every time I eat here I have a different experience. The atmosphere and location is great, and on Wednesdays they let you BYO-Bottles of Wine but the food it hit or miss!
This is the worst Italian food I have ever eaten. Not sure what recipes they claim the are using but all bad and to add insult to injury the food came out cold.

No good only use if you are desperate please try somewhere else, they willl shut your car off immediately if you miss a payment, they sell beat up junkers and because you have bad credit you feel forced to buy them

This somewhat new bar offers a great happy hour that is every day including weekends 4-6 pm. They always offer great customer service. So whenever I feel like grabbing a drink and bar food locally instead of downtown this a good option to get your bag for your buck

Just to let you know called a different Plummer quoted me 185.00 plus tax no show up fee asked him to do the the job did it no problems with the siding so I feel that in good faith I should have my 79.00 refunded in good faith .

Way overpriced for mediocre work. I'm not sure if I was overcharged because she knew I was from out of state, or if it's their actual prices . $75 nails which were really thick and awkward looking . 2 stars since they took me quick and were nice inside.

The food was decent but unfortunately they obviously don't care about any COVID safety, no one was wearing masks the cook, the counter person not even most of the patrons coming in and out of the place !
Seems like this location only takes cash now. This has been the case for me my last 3 visits so if you only have cards on you don't waste your time.

***DON'T GO TO THE ELDORADO*** Went to the Eldorado for the superbowl the food gave both my wife and I **food poisoning.** THAT'S NOT THE WORST PART... Valet **STOLE** my 2 year old sons portable headrest DVD player. Will never EVER go back!
Tried the Corned Beef Reuben. Way too salty and greasy! And if you just ask for a cup of water, all they can give you is a cup of tap water without ice; was luke warm.
Great food but for me, not worth the hassle. My family loves going here when they visit so I will definitely be back but the parking and lines are terrible.
Had them do a PM, install a rear tire & install rear brake pads on my Vespa GTS 250 ie and the service was great.
My pork cutlet dinner tonight I think it was left in fryer since the start of the COVID shut down and I got it for my dinner
If you visit Florida, I would definitely recommend to stay in La Quinta and go for an unforgettable night out to St Petersburg, it's awesome!
The food is not very good, they fill the drinks with ice so that they can nickle and dime you on drinks, and the prices are much to high for what you get. There are better places to go for sure.
So disappointing. I didn't enjoy seeing numerous companies selling the same stuff or the same company is a variety of places in the venue.
Pulled pork sliders ok Mac n cheese typical Nachos, nacho cheese sauce, shredded chicken- good, but nachos were on the salty side. Was here for a private party
What's going on with the chicken the last 2 times I purchased the chicken it's cold and wet like wet paper no taste I don't think it's being cooked long enough, just won't be buying it anymore.
Was seen by doctor Moore there for 21 years and blood tests were miss read and was misdiagnosed with the flu when I went elsewhere got misdiagnosed with multiple gallbladder stones.
While not the best I've ever had, the quality of the pizza and cheesesteaks, combined with a location which is a fairly convenient proximity from our house, make Carmine's a great option for us.

Have not gone yet but I feel it is a public service to warn everyone that if you book a voucher via groupon or living social, they will not honor it the same day. This is no mentioned in the ad or fine print so please beware.
We're from Tennessee, where people think they know BBQ, let me tell you, I've eaten a lot of Q, and the Joint is the BEST! I mean THE best. Do I make myself clear?

Would tell you run especially if you have an I phone screwed up the repair will not refund my money screen does not work . Had to pay twice and get it done correctly. Had to buy a new phone because I do a lot of my business with my cell .

Stunning views from four sides, free parking across the street, beautiful tiles, murals, and a tower bell that goes off every 15 mins- not to be missed. They do offer an elevator if you can't handle the stairs.

The owner of this bar is the biggest piece of shit and should b in prison for all the shit he has done to his employees, and the illegal way he runs his bar!!! Do not go into this var and give this man your hard earned money!!!
This property is a lie. They say you are getting a suite but it is a regular room with one bed and a pullout couch separated by a curtain. I cannot believe this is a Hilton

Not pleased with this place at all. I showed up right at 7:30 and was told they already closed that I was not going to be able to order. I won't patronize this place again that's just very poor service on their part

We saved this place for our farewell to New Orleans dinner and we were not disappointed. The waiter offered wonderful and tasty suggestions from their menu and was ever present making sure we had everything we needed. If I ever come back, this is a definite must.
Food is okay, but not enough to make me want to go there, service is usually horrible, and the location isn't convenient unless you're a tourist.

I always get the calamari salad and I've only regretted once, and it was the only time I went for dinner. The service was very slow. And the salad was drenched in dressing. Lunch and brunch there's never an issue. Great cocktails and I would highly recommend during the day.

I'm going to get bashed on this but the place, even though it has delicious food, looks like a funeral home especially the reception entrance. Again, great food but it gives me the heebee-geebees so I try not to go unless I have to.
Formerly Gavins, except someone actually took a mop, rag and brush and cleaned up that pig) as I was meeting with some old college buddies, I found that I look damn good for my age ;-)

Don't waste your time at Petco! This place is great! The workers know their stuff and are very nice! I go all the time for all my pet needs- 2 dogs, fish, beardie and a few hermit crabs sends me here often! Prices are good and they send out coupons!

Brought tires there back in feb 2019 yet have they balance my tires right right first time weight came off the rim second time three balance right third tire weight came off again will never buy there again.

Good but nothing amazing. Everything was done well and tasty but the hype and expectations set by the reputation and james beard award left us wanting a lot more or at least something that stood out that would be special.

I was recommend to the salon by my daughter, I was consulted and told what would be best for my hair. I was truly satisfied Wil the service and how professional the salon is. I have plan to go back this week.

Excellent service from General Manager Elaine. I placed large order for a nearby shelter and Elaine was extremely helpful, professional and very willing to help support the community. Thank You Dominos!

Beer Good Churros - Bad Will miss the Duck fries as they were a nice compliment to any beer on the menu. Fireplace is also a great touch during the winter. Need to get a little more consistent and have a better overall menu than just the Mussels.

Well, it's Waffle House so you always know what you're going to get good hot food with 1, 000, 000 calories . But make sure if you come in this particular one that you asked for Sugar that's her name and she is as sweet as sugar.

I ordered the pulled pork, bbq beans and smokehouse caviar. The pork was chopped so small it looked like it had been through a grinder and had more fat and gristle than meat. The bbq beans were ok and the smokehouse caviar was flavorless. Very disappointed.
This place was amazing got chips and queso right when I got there and then I got my food 3 minuets later! I totally recommend this place.

One of the best places I've been to in Tampa to find unique and special gifts and jewelry. The people that work there were very helpful very kind and friendly if you don't go open this door you'll be losing out!

Ever since they switched companies their practice has gotten even more annoying for the patient. Same day appointments are next to impossible, and walking in, even when only one patient is in the building, takes 2+ hours of wait time. Find somewhere else to get your necessities met.
Don't get me wrong, I love this joint I won't even complain about a wrong order - but thisssss is hard for me not to vom vom

I stopped in for lunch and got the blue cheese burger, the fries were delicious but the burger was overcooked and the bun seemed old. The top was cracked open and it fell apart as I was trying to eat it.

The food is wholesome and decent which is not too common. It's kind of dark down there and the decor is definitely of a more personalized feeling almost like you're visiting someone's basement for dinner or something.

This place is a favorite and a good place to take visitors as the setting is very nice and the food is delicious. Service can be spotty so it doesn't get a 5 stars yet. Relax and order a John Prine cocktail. Welcome to Gulfport!

We stopped by for a drink and ran into the best jazz act we saw during the whole trip in NoLa. I wish I had had some cash to tip them. Bartender was friendly and drinks were reasonable. Must do again!!
Not as bad as many of the reviews say. I'd imagine if you go at 2pm on a Wednesday there are some pretty dirty folks there, but it was hopping like a Vegas casino on a Saturday night.

How anyone can like Moes over qdoba is beyond me... lukewarm chicken, instant style Mexican rice, and merely so so queso. It's a good thing I had a groupon, because I would be even more disappointed if I had paid full price.
I absolutely love the shrimp poboy. Usually more than I can eat! I'm not a stickler of sitting in the heat but good wise they legit The BEST poboy in New Orleans with amazing portions sizes

Ugh this place. I get anxiety just walking in the door. So much stuff. So many people. Lines are long but move fast. But good luck finding anything with the crowd of people that won't move to let you walk down the tiny rows.

Chicken Cheese Steak is like chunks of chicken meat, not like chicken steak-ums. Pizza sauce OK. Regular Cheesesteak very delicious, step up from 9th and Punk Ave, but maybe to me a step below Tony Luke's at Front and Oregon. Real Philly Cheesesteak people.

What can you say about this place. Straight outta Guy Fieri's DDD this hut at the side of Little Rd is knocking out killer crab cakes for under $10. The crab cake sandwich is to die for and the ODC burrito is equally great. You have to try this place!!
This is not the usual salad I get when I order dine in This is nothing but greens where are the cheddar, fig, and pecans?

Pretty terrible. Food took a really long time to arrive despite the fact that there were only a few people in the restaurant. Service was really strange... weird dude who kept apologizing but talking about how mean the kitchen staff were. Food was ok but not very good. Skip it.

My go-to. Food is fantastic and very consistent. Food is served family style so it's good to go with a group so you can try a bunch of things. My favorites are the French onion soup dumplings, lobster mac, and the continental salad.
Updating this to 5 Stars now due to a new dish on the menu: roasted brussel sprouts with purple mustard paired with a pear, almond and celery leaf salad. Delicious.

Food was OK. Service was terrible. Made a mistake and still charged for it. Also tried to charge me an extra fee when I wanted to pay with my AmEx which is against their merchant agreement. Shady joint.

The food was okay. Most of the arcade games were out of order. Was fun until Boys and Girls club camp came and were not told the rules and the rules were not enforced. Made it very difficult to enjoy.

I have to say this airport is outdated. I know they have done some things because of the tornado damage from a few years ago but just a small area compared to the whole place. It looks like the place is about to be shutdown or something.

Clean, Friendly and convenient. Beautiful rooms with hardwood floors and exposed bricks. Interior walls are thin so you could hear other hotel guest and the bathroom could use an update and new fixtures but overall a great stay!

Lots of stuff in this small market. It has most standard asian market items, with a leaning toward Korean items. We were able to score some specific rice we wanted, as well as soy sauce, curry mixes, oyster sauce and more.

Beautiful place. Service needs help. The lady who took our order was not paying attention to us and my husband got runny eggs and no hash browns. I got ham in my breakfast sandwich which I did not want.
Food was good and average Atmosphere was lovely Hostess was strange Waitress was great My friend and I thought the two wines we tasted were watered down I probably won't go back
Eh.... I must admit - the lasagna was very good and actually one of the most "italian" lasagnas I've had outside of Italy. The rest of the items we ordered deserved an "eh..."
We stumbled upon this place and had really high hopes We had to wait forever for our food and it wasn't really worth the wait Don't expect we will return
Rude seating hostess, slow service, however huge menu with lots of options. Would only recommend if you are not in a hurry and have lots of mouths to feed at a reasonable price.
The uptown burger was supposed add mushrooms bacon on it it had no bacon very few mushrooms The fries were overcooked and dry not hot not fresh Not impressed with their food today
First time trying and the food was really good. The only problem was one of my parties food came cold but the server was very kind and offered to cook him something else or heat up the food.

I'm not cool enough to wear any of the shoes in this store, but I totally recognize that. But if I'm someday struck by lightning & I magically become awesome I'm gonna buy my kneeheeled gold lame boots from here.

Natasha is amazing. I've been shopping around in Philly for the last two years for a good hairdresser and I have never been fully happy with one until she cut my hair. Afterwards I immediately made another appointment for 8 weeks ahead and can't wait to go back!

The Frist Art museum is rather mediocre, but its very cheap to get in and its a good way to spend an hour or two. The issue is that the exhibits always seem to be limited because the collections are so skimpy. I really hope they continue to operate!
As per any other Hard Rock this place if full of music memorabilia and rock collections they were setting up for a band when we were present.
For me this pie is awesome when I'm on that side of town I make sure to pie up some when I go. Dog friendly as well
The employees are awesome but there was a tall guy on his phone a lot and seemed to get in the way of the employees and didn't seem to very kind to them. I'm a regular and will keep going! Thanks!

I love Chipotle. Kinda obsessed. I ordered from this one online and went to pick it up. Super friendly staff, however when i got back to the office i noticed they were very chintzy with the chicken and cheese! I was disappointed. Still tasted good.

Came to Indiana for training came across the Egyptian hookah lounge, Great atmosphere, food is great hookah is good, friendly service the only thing kept me from giving 5 stars is that they were using quick light coals instead coconut coals ex.nara coals or natural coals

It's an OK beach. If you are into tidepooling, the tidepools are decent, but you have to time your visit just right with the current tide schedule. If you go at any time other than the lowest tide point, a lot of the good stuff is underwater.

Iv given this place many chances. Every single time my order is wrong! I got my ice cream on a broken cone and it was melting by the time I got it from the drive through window. The customer service is ok but the workers always seem overwhelmed
Food taste is good, however quantity is less, would recommend going to a Naf naf where the food is tasty and so as the quantity is perfect

Healthy options with a twist. Take the ti me to find this place. Weekends they offer an expanded breakfast menu Recommend their eggs Benedict which features their home made biscuits and avocado and southwest hollandaise sauce. French press coffee too! Funky atmosphere. Cali at its best

Ignorant jitbag bartenders that are dying for a tip, lol only time that they make money is when the phillies play! Don't come here trust me had a benefit for friend tonight amd not one but every bartender was a pure jitbag!!!!

Had a good time with friends but the best I can say about this place is that the beer was cold. The food was not worth the written words on the menu. For a group of ten people - no one enjoyed their meal. Drink here and eat somewhere else

Still achieving the top notch service and food! I stopped in for lunch just prior to their closing time but was able to casually eat my ordered pasta dish. We had a great lunch and I Fratellini continues to be a fantastic place to eat!

Excellent and unique selection of goods, and great people, cannot overcome the terrible in line experience - the lines are always too long and it is always such a groaner to know that you're going to have to go in for the one or two things you need.

Cheesecake Factory has always been super yummy. During COVID it is not a place I recommend, policies and precautions do not make it an enjoyable time to plan to go to and dine. Entire family was unable to sit together because of larger parties policy. Disappointing.
Had my truck in for Service and also had it tinted at the same time, everything Was great and the people were very helpful and nice .

No stars because unfortunately, I was not able to be served. I waited in a long food truck line for a chicken cheese steak and once I got to the counter the cashier said there was no chicken. Horrible and slow customer service.

queso: a little spicy, have a water near, however, it was very delicious. similar to el rodeo with more spice. chips: soft in a few places and under salted, however i am a salt addict quesadilla: very large, and pretty good tasted best when dipped in the queso

I love these guys. They are very honest, charging me low prices, when I really, frankly, do not know what is going on with my Mac. I go between them and the Apple store, and they are very clear with information. Great service I'm relieved to have found.

Wish I could give zero. Was in the drive thru for over 20 minutes and was able to place my order but never got my food. Still 4 cars ahead of me and I had to leave as I was late. Not fast food what so ever
Best pho in the Santa Barbara area. Broth is on point! If you're looking for fine dining, this isn't the place for you, but if you're looking for a great meal at a great price, this is your spot!

Cute store. They have a regularly rotating collection of things for sale from kids stuff to home goods to clothing/accessories to who knows what else. The staff are friendly and I found some fun random things for a friend's birthday present. If you're in the area check it out.

I got a burger with swiss cheese, truffle oil fries, and chocolate milk shake. The burger was delivered wellcooked burger, and an unrelated man at the same table also got a misgood or better burger for less money.

Absolutely the worst. Had the worst nail experience ever. Nails were terrible and pretty much rushed me out and didn't want to give me and designs or have time for anything extra. Won't get my money again.

Cute small place I love how friendly the waiter was and the coffee was very hot and the food was pretty good parking in the front or on the side streets. The price is awesome 18 dollars for two for breakfast can't beat that.

We go there for their $5 hot and ready pizza sometimes. Often we still need to wait for our pizzas! The employees are trying but they need to be trained to know the tricks to keep the pizzas stocked so people can just come and pick up and leave.
Needed a new head put on my wife's ring and the got it done fast and at a good price and cleaned it to almost new looking
We stopped on the way home from the central coast after searching Yelp for a good restaurant so friendly and attentive.

Amazing food, and a very friendly and amazing chef, that came out to let us know how everything was prepared, and a great bartender, Jesse who was very friendly and never had to wait for anything....!!!!!!

It's legendary and you have to go to say you were in philly, however don't expect much more. The food was ok at best, seating is limited, the experience was rushed, but it is what it is so enjoy it for the philly experience once
Good food for the price, but if you don't get the monster combos then there is nothing special, and no reason to frequent the joint as their food is about on par with everybody else.
Stopped in for a drink late afternoon wasn't sure how to make a negroni which was a bit surprising - nevertheless not a bad spot.

Went to this Pizza Hut at 10:30 and waited 5 minutes to order. Worker said they were closed and then rolled his eyes when I corrected that they are actually open until 11pm via their website. Very bad experience with an extremely rude worker.
Great cheap starter kits that aren't junk Was prepared to spend a lot of money but did not have to the low price option suits all my needs. Dales guy was a little weird and overbearing though.

If you are a country music fan and know many of the artists, it is probably worth the entrance fee and fighting the crowds. Otherwise, I would not spend the time or the money. The crowds are poorly managed and there is no natural flow to the museum.
Cheesesteak hoagie good but got a chicken quesadilla and it can't be chicken it taste like it turkey it gotta be turkey !!!
Got some coffee from this place and I guess I could say I had better as far as the restaurant side I still need to try.

When I first moved to Tampa years ago, Carmine's was one of the places to bring outtown visitors for the true Ybor feel. That is no longer the case, and I certainly wouldn't eat here again. It started with being sat I know you deserve better!

I did not order from this florist. I thought this would be a good one to use because it was less than a mile from the person I was planning to order flowers for. Distance is not taken into consideration nope.
I am sick a tired of ordering a extra meat French dip and not getting it this has happened so many times.

We ordered a German Chocolate cake for my moms birthday and don't get me wrong the best part of the cake was the coconut mixture they use not sure if they were keeping stale cakes because of the holidays- we picked up the cake New Year's Eve!

I would not recommend. My natural lashes were clumped together in groups of 4-5 and then an extension was put on. I had to get a fill elsewhere and completely remove the lashes that Shannon put on because they were so bad! I do not recommend.
I ordered some boba and they put some actual real life monkey balls in my drink. I also watched the workers pee in my drink and when they ran out of monkey balls they pooped in it... sad

The flavor in their empanadas in outstanding and the lemon dessert is phenomenal! I love supporting small, local businesses and this is one whose food is delicious and their service is very personal and exceeds expectations.
Donuts are just OK. Game selection is nice, I get the $1 playing fee, but $20+ for a family to come in for donuts and a game on a Saturday... Won't be in our regular rotation.

Please be careful when getting your car repaired here! They were gonna charge me $330 for a car battery they said it was a special Chrysler battery. I then called the dealership where I bought the car and they quoted me a price of $173 for the battery!
This outlet mall has declined in quality I know it was just rebuilt after flooding but it's in desperate need of a facelift Not as many stores as other outlet malls and less premium shops
Thee worst movie going experience I ever had, the line for the concession was out the door and it wasn't moving anytime soon, over a half hour in line just for pop corn

Outstanding food, can't miss Italian Restaurant!! Tried the lasagna and it was marvelous, my son had Chicken Alfredo and he loved it, said it was the best ever. Clean establishment and very attentive wait staff! In town for family vacation, I will be returning for another meal!!
ugh this was my favorite pizza place to go to in MD and i saw this one day and i freaked out. i haven't tried this location yet but i know once i will i wont stop

Went 4 weeks from grand opening and was super busy family of 5 Seemed to be in charge a Hispanic/Japanese lady seemed to not care when I asked what is your typical delivery time-30 minutes is quite some time to wait
Really liked the food hated the waiters had to get up and ask for a refill bc otherwise I would have not gotten one I enjoyed seafood thru just hated their costumer service.

Fall in love with Ethiopian food at Zemam's Too! Lentils, peas, potatoes, carrots, califlour, onion, cabbage, and more, all cooked to perfection and served atop a spongy bread that you tear and eat as you go. Lots of spice levels to choose from.

Sub par. Ordered the chicken Marsala and it was tasteless, chicken was rubbery and the Whisky Sour smelled of egg and was too sweet. Service was slow. The rest of my party wasn't at all excited with the food. Everything was kind of meh. Won't be coming back.

There is nothing more frustrating than ordering carry out and finding you didn't get what you ordered when you arrive home. I waited 30 minutes for that. Thanks Thai Select. 1-star for making it look harder than it is.
Was a fun place, good food and prices. The staff was friendly the inside was a bit smokey from the grills, great place to try instead of the old fast food line.

I love grabbing a quick meal here. The food tastes great and it is a good value for the amount you get. This is the only place to get hibachi in the area at a reasonable price and you don't have to sit through a whole presentation to get it.

Delicious but so over the top. This is where you go on a date or out with a girlfriend to share a super rich piece of $20 cake. It's good, don't get me wrong, but it's a once in a while kind of thing.

My family and I love going to our local library. They have put in a new kids only masterpiece section where the children can work on craft projects unassisted by adults. the staff is very friendly and the library has always been neat and organized.

The small place small spot my son and I always like this place the owner super friendly she always come out and ask how the food. Pho very testy and banh mi I'd great Super friendly place the servers are very friendly too.

Beer was excellent. Service was some of the worst I've had. The bartender couldn't break herself away from her conversation with her friend to refill drinks or check us out and then acted put out that she had to work.
It took nearly half an hour for them to even ask for the order of the car in front of me. There has to be a better system than just letting your customers sit forever in the drive through.

Please start recycling!!! So much single use plastic used during the tasting, all into the garbage. The tour was very fun and the rum was great, would love to see a more eco friendly approach to the tasting.
The best thing to get here are the soup dumplings. The service is friendly and fast. I have not tried that much of the entree menu, but the couple of entrees I tried were just okay, too oily.
Pretty good breakfast, there omelets are very good! but the service isn't all that great so if you are in a hurry definitely not a great place to go
If your white don't stop as there is a huge language barrier and I watched them make some ones sandwich in front of me with twice the meat when I asked they said same same. Utility bbq out of a can!
Best chick fil a I've been to, the staff is very nice and the owner made me feel very welcomed whenever I saw him, my favorite is the grilled chicken club

Bridaltown of Collegeville has the worst customerdone, the dress could not even stay up without someone holding. Over a half dozen safety pins later and a fair amount of stitching from a few friends, we were able to start the ceremony 35 minutes late because the dress FELL A PART.
So sad they have closed down, I wasn't a huge fan, but it's sad to see them missing at the Reading Terminal Market! Delilah's was a well known institution at the oldest farmer's market in America.
For being in Reno, there are better mexican places, but they do serve up a lot of all-around good mexican food. I did love sitting by the windows, eating some tasty tamales, and people watching.
Atmosphere is fun, good teen/family place, but I think the food is subpar, or, in the parlance of our times, sucks. I'd go here for dessert, the root beer is great, too.
Good relaxed vibe to chill with friends, pasta that bordered on a tourist's best meal of New Orleans and a gorgeous bartender. Couldn't have asked for a better place to eat.

Beautiful place for an easy nature hike and/or rent a kayak around the mangroves for a few hours. They also have a pretty cool visitors center that you can walk around and check out some cool facts about the area.
