Right now I'm just going to say it's just ok. I do plan on a few more visits. The guac was pretty good but when my guest and I shared that my drink was lacking, he just laughed it off and didn't address it. So, we'll see.

Not a clean location. The prepackaged food could be a safer purchase in comparison to the self serve hot & cold foods. I waited for a staff person to complete their cleaning of the ladies restroom - retraining is necessary; you don't want the details. This location seems understaffed.

The burgers are tasteless and don't come with any sides. Plus, a side of French fries is about 4 bucks and they give you a grand total of 11 of the plainest fries I have ever tasted. I don't understand the hype.
Very good place with a good selection of beers and great service and it's always great to support a small independent business like this

Nice place for lunch-their $20 deal had a range of choices from fish to vegetarian. Service was fine. And i loved the peacocks strutting outside our table side window. As an added plus it is set on 'Grounds for Sculpture' park which has nice walking paths and hundred's of displays .

Really love the pizza they have, but the Plymouth location has really gone downhill, you order puzzas to go and its just horrible. We go to the bridgeport location, they still care about the quality pizza that franzones is known for.
I wish my wife would stop buy junk here thinking it is a deal, then trying to find something to do with it or some place to put it in my house. Great if you like Chinese furniture that falls apart.

The chai tea is so silky and creamy ... Very good I had scramble . Excepted it to more scrambled but taste very hearty and fresh They have a lot of interesting items on menu so I will be back Everything is local natural and organic Very quaint and quiet today

Well organized, friendly staff, very clean, very spacious, comfortable seating, bathrooms very clean, alcohol is served here, food items prices are very high elevators are available, hanicap seating is available

This is your average hood laundromat. It's kinda old but not bad. I'm used to more up to date laundry machines that take credit cards. Its only coins here but the machines I used worked well and on a Sunday Afternoon I didn't have to wait for a machine.
Online ordered the lunch pork fried rice during COVID. I was only able to finish half and will save the rest for left overs :) being Chinese, this is definitely delicious in my book!
Solid as far as diners go and the food always comes out hot. The fact that there are no condiments on the table is a little annoying but they are quick to deliver once requested.
Food was okay. I expected it to be more flavorful but it was okay. Three stars were given because out waitor forgot about us several times and the prices were higher on the menu than posted online
It's nice to have a regular sitdipped pizza, follow it up with U-Swirl, and then see a free movie with popcorn at The Joe.
Beautiful views from patio!! Drinks were good - ask for the light up ice cubes from the bar for some extra fun but just an FYI monkey bread here is savory not sweet

I always get the spicy jerk chicken and have never been disappointed. Their sides are great too: sweet potatoes with pineapple, rice with peas, collard greens and Johnny cakes are all very good. Don't forget your fruit tea!

Server tried to charge our entire table for margaritas we didn't order, then insisted on checking the camera before correcting the mistake. 2 stars, because at least she admitted she was wrong eventually.
They have an amazing selection of colors and brands. The only complaint I have is a regular refill is 40 dollars which is double what I'm used to paying and an extra 20 for gel polish.

The smallest, most claustrophobic #ocean view" room we've ever stayed in. The good: Nice staff and good location The Reality: overpriced valet and overpriced wine. If you need light to get ready, more than a 6 inch walk-space, A/C and/or a real ocean view DON'T waste your money here.
This is one of my favorite places to visit when I'm home I love there chargrilled oysters Pretty much all of all the food there if you're ever in New Orleans check them out
Decent food, not the worst or the best Have a couple of drinks and it will seem better than average Got a good parking space right in front !!

Every time I eat here I am not disappointed, the food is very good and fresh, plus it is not expensive. I enjoy the beef BBQ and the macaroni salad. My husband likes the ribs a lot. If you like BBQ, you will like this food as well.
So fun!! Great happy hour prices and if you get there early enough you may be lucky to have the game room pretty much to yourself .

I've usually had a good experience here but tonight the app was cold and the steak over cooked the bartender is not friendly or approachable because he's so busy so no question about how my food was...sorry guys tonight was disappointing
Great service, but sometimes when I order to-go a item will be missing and my chipotle bowl will occasionally be mushy . The restaurant is well maintained and it is in a good location.

Don't overthink cheesecake, sometimes decadence isn't attractive or tasty, I loved the regular Oreo cheesecake tried the new one and found myself pulling it apart, sometimes you just want really good rich Oreo cheesecake.

Thank you to Beef O Brady's @ Wildnerness Lakes for providing a wonderful meal to the Land O Lakes Varsity Softball Team! It made the stress of rushing to feed our kids before the game diminish. The food was fantastic and the girls loved it!

Lots to choose from yet still difficult to find something you like. The price is great yet would rather not waste the food because much is not edible and cannot tail until you try a bite. Sushi is great. I would just eat that.
Worst service I ever had in my entire life. I wish I could give this place 0 stars. The manager was so rude and got personal when we asked where our pizza was when it was 3 HOURS LATE!

Donnie c is a loser, I called before we went to see if they're busy, they said they were very busy and it will be awhile for a table. Donnie C is just an a**hole who's never worked in the service industry.
Over priced chicken at its best. The food is not great I have eaten twice from there and was unimpressed it is not on my list of places to eat!

Here's how a visit to Night Market usually goes for me: The week of the event: "Omg, Night Market is coming this week. SahIndian I can't wait for the next one!" And that, folks, is how every single Night Market plays out for me.

The food is good, the coffee is good, the atmosphere is cool, but everything is very over priced. Most of the employees seem disinterested in making your visit a pleasurable one - it's almost like you are annoying them by ordering food/drinks. There are better coffee spots near by.
Food was ok oh no avoid house marg - no sweetened no lime flavor guacamole was fine but nothing special poZole was different service attentive and he listened to our feedback

This is, in my opinion, the best TJ's in Tucson. I always choose this one over the other one's because the parking's better, it's usually less packed, and the staff are very helpful for the most part. I've had a good experience every time I've shopped here in the past.
Was treated so rudely for having a service animal in the patio area that we had to leave Very negative hostile energy
This place is not too shabby great customer service bathrooms are decent, cooks still look like they came out of Labor Workforce
Wrong sizes given, wrong flavours given, wrong service too. Just go to marble slab up the road for the extra 3 bucks it's worth it to get decent ice cream .
Just a great place to go an kick back, relax and a good time with friends and grab a meal and a few beers

Great place to live lived here for years, friendly staff, close to rowan to walk to class and many bussiness in walking distance, has a convient pool to bring friends to, also a gym and tanning booth included in rent, great for college kids
I've only tried the ChiliDogs are good. Get the Hot Chili, if you want spicy, it's not actually very hot and the medium chili is not hot at all in my opinion. Good cheap eats here.

It's messy, it's crowded, and you might have to share a table, but if a little stimulation gets you crackin', then by all means come on down and enjoy the people watching. Bonus points if you score one of the leather chairs!
Smoke house chicken with loaded baked potato and beans finish it with the red label bbq sauce and a Sam Adams perfect Service at bar is awesome thanks Logan
We have taken two vehicles to this location - I have no complaints with their finished work, but doubtful I will ever return due to poor customer service.
Love this place my family and I always order pizza, but lastly it took 40 minutes for a medium pepperoni pizza

What used to be my favorite thrift store has deteriorated steadily over the last year. The quantity and quality of the clothing is poor, and some of the pricing is out of line with the merchandise. Merchandise has been moved about in a manner that is confusing, at best.
The Prime Ribs is great! I wish the Salad more cold, I believe they leave in room temperature, Salad not taste good when it not cold enough. any one agree?
Ordered online, told me it be ready in 30 minutes. Showed up on time but I had to wait an additional 15 minutes before I can get my lunch to go. Thanks Pei Wei for not valuing my time.

I visited on a Saturday night, live entertainment, busy on both floors, a good atmosphere. Drinks were okay and food was decent, this is a place you visit when you want to have a good time with some friends and chill.

Two stars for the professional staff. That's where my review ends. The Nachos Sencillo were nothing more than warm lethargic velveta, piled high with cold toppings and shrimp that didn't need to die in vain. My pineapple cilantro margarita, eh. Nothing spectacular there.

UPDATE: Jesse the manager is great! He took the time to talk with me about the issues one on one and was very easy going and friendly. I feel much better now that we will get a retry at mothers special day. 2nd update to come
Wow, , no employees Seriously on 3 Super slow check out over an hour, We won't come back Amazon is easier

As far as greasy spoons go, Commodore Restaurant delivers decent fare, both fast and cheap. I've only been with a friend during lunch, but can see how this unassuming diner would do well during the weekends for its breakfast specials!
Had a great time here very helpful sever - it started raining and he quickly set us up with a new table away from the rain. We only shared an appetizer for our group but it was good.
The best massage ever! Wanted to recommend Elena, she is definitely know what she's doing, got the best touch ever :) Me and my husband are coming back again and again
Such a great find! Yvonne did a beautiful job on my nails, including SNS on my split nail and Linda gave me a great pedicure. This is my new favorite Santa Barbara salon!

Super rude employees and they act like you walking in is an inconvenience if they are helping another customer at the time. Don't have "walk-ins welcome" if you act like people who walk in are an inconvenience.

I would definitely recommend brother's restaurant the food is awesome but more importantly the customer service is ALWAYS A 1 everyone is professional neat and clean if you haven't already go check them out good food good prices you won't be disappointed
Really nice place. Good sangria, the tacos were a little on the sweet side for my taste but they were good, I recommend the chipotle shrimp taco, the guacamole was delicious!

Although the server was very nice, she had way too many tables, and so the service was very slow. Some of my party members did not like their food whatsoever as it wasn't as good as other restaurants we have been to.
I had been buying all of my beans here since moving to Boise this was my last visit I'll pay more somewhere else if I can get in and out in a reasonable time frame.

A nice pub setting, paper on the tables. Nice place to eat crabs. The only reason I'm giving this place 3 stars is they were very low on crabs at dinner time and the price was expensive. Poor management for not ordering enough seafood for your business.

Ice cream is great but service is not good. Owner always seems annoyed and last time i went he over charged me and basically gave us $2 back so we would leave. I have also seen that he is extremely strict with his employees. Makes the environment feel very tense.
I have left several phone messages with this business, sent them measurements and photos that they requested, and they just won't call me back! I give up!
Good selection, knowledgeable staff, decent price. They let me run outside to test the shoes and there's a great return policy if you're not comfortable in the shoes.
The service received was excellent, and the staff were courteous and completed the service in a manner that was clean, efficient, and complete. I will definitely come back for future needs!
Wasnt crazy about the food. Gyro was nothing special and lentils were tasteless, not to mention it was served with a little bug running around on the plate. Fries were good. Won't be going back.
WAY too loud, they gave us the wrong pizza, completely forgot my husband's salad, and it's just about impossible to find a parking space. I miss Growler's.
This place is way overhyped. Their food was mediocre but not bad, wouldn't go to it again but if you haven't tried it it would be worth trying at least once. Way over priced for what you get.

Horrible rotten frozen water logged cucumbers in my salad That was five times smaller and five times more expensive since before Covid. No excuse for serving rotten frozen cucumbers . You're chef is a disgrace .
The food was pretty good! They have a special on mimosas! There is a bit of a wait so I would recommend getting a reservation if you don't want to wait about 25 mins for a table.

I've been here many times in the past however, the last two occasions the service was horrible and the food was not exactly how it used to be. I'm not sure about other locations however, this location has gone downhill in the past 6 to 8 months.

Absolute monsters who overcharge a service that is supposed to be safe and convenient. Surge charges are a joke and if anything, people choosing to get a driver as opposed to the many alternatives should be encouraged, not peddled.

I ordered takeout here for their chicken Kathi rolls. They give you two generously sized paratha . The chicken was seasoned alright but I don't know if some of it was over cooked or not but there were some really chewy pieces. It comes with the green chutney and brown chutney.
Decent late night spot. Staff is friendly and quick. Tasty tacos. If you've been out drinking and need to fill your stomach with something other than alcohol, The Taco Bus is a pretty good choice.

Wow! This place is a gem! My husband and I just moved to the area and this is our go-to for some good homemade diner food. I would recommend this place to anyone as you will be greeted by a wonderful owner and served delicious, consistent food, each time!
Was really looking forward to this place but unfortunately the ramen didn't really hold up to Terakawa or your average spot in Tokyo

Rude people. Dirty washers. Dark entry. Flooded parking lot. Avoid these people. They are not polite. They have no idea of the definition of customer and the man came at me when i took photos for review. Bad all the way around.

This place is always willing to fit me in on short notice. Their prices are reasonable and they explain what they do and why. They don't try to upsell you on anything, which a lot of places do when they assume you don't know anything about cars.
Meh feeling about this place bought a slice it was hood but the place needs renovation badly and it's too ghetto

This place is certainly nothing special, but if you're close by and looking for a fast, cheap and greasy breakfast this is the place. The servers were friendly and our omelette's, hash browns and toast were good. Total cost $14! You can't beat that!
I ate here two times on two separate nights and on both occasions the fries were done to the point where they were like little bricks. There isn't a lot of food options though in this area.
Tasty donuts and large selection, but it's hard to tell what's what; labels should be at the front of the display case. Also, the employees could be a tad friendlier. Just sayin'.

CLOSED for good as of June 29, 2015. I'm surprised they were able to stay open for that long! I feel sorry for those that had a deposit down on the banquet room and were given no notice that they planned on closing and now have nowhere to go!

Pancakes are pretty good but you can get better ones at Fido or Biscuit Love. There's a lot of hype here and interesting flavors to try, but because it is so popular on many days the service can feel really rushed.

Solid "standard" pizza at a very fair price. It's your standard "sports game with a bunch of people over, let's get some pizza" style pizza. Much better than most of the old local neighborhood spots, and a good alternative to the more expensive Beddia and Brain .
Fish House is a mustup a menu during your first visit so that you can call in your order and save time in the future.
Really nice decor. I thought the food was just "OK. The service was great, but I really wouldn't go out of my way to eat there unless I just happened to be in the area again.
First time here during Mardi Gras, the service was great, the food was delicious I am in love with the crawfish roll and their wings
The customer service sucks they'll tell you to wait outside and still put the food inside it's a complete waste of time!

Greeted by a guy in a filthy Trump 2020 mask, hanging from his face not covering his nose and mouth maybe take a cue from Goodyear tire co and not allow political statements. I left and took my $$ elsewhere. Thanks
I just moved to Boise and this is by far the best food I have ever eaten it will be hard not to come every day.

Great location. Great service. I had the fried chicken and my friend had the brisket. Both were super under-season. I wanna give it 5 stars because our server was honestly great, but you go to a restaurant for the food :(
They call a chicken salad sandwich two cubes of chicken with mayo in it and a salad with a salad that is a bowl Of lettuce a salad? Hmm left here hungry....

Food was good but service was bad. If you have more than 5 people they will automatically charge you the tip. The waiter counted MY INFANT as the 5th person and knew he would be tipped wether the service was bad or not. Probably will never go back.

i been to this walmart 3 times already, and the 3 times they treat me like trash, just because im spanic, the first time time i thought the lady had a bad day, but now i notice that this walmart in brownsburg appears to be racist to spanic

Orange spice rooibos tea tastes like dishwater. They do not use enough spice or flavoring and their prices are quite high. I have found a much better quality tea online to source the tea I drink daily and will never purchase Maya Tea again.

After accidentally vacuuming one of my daughter's socks and successfully managing to remove the sock myself, the vacuum lost suction power. I brought it over to this service location, the owner of this location took the vacuum apart, cleaned it and repaired the issue for no charge at all.

Cool and trendy space for dining in Old City. I've only experienced their brunch, which was decent. They also have a bloody mary bar - slightly disappointing selection of garnishes and pickles, and the main selling point is the large array of hot sauces they offer.

Not memorable for me... just a place to go to if everything else is packed. Food is not bad, just not memorable. At least it is not expensive and it's within budget for those of us who are trying to save a few bucks.

We put our name on the list for a 20 minute wait, sat at the bar for a drink and was never acknowledged. There was no bartender at the bar the entire time we were seated and when employees went behind the bar noone even looked our way.

They close to early its was a waste of my time i wont be back if they are planning on being a customer service resturant some people dont get off qork until 6 pm im giving this place two thumbs down booooooo
I've been here 3 times, has yet to dissapoint. This last time I tried the Mongolian delights, which Mongolian beef is one of my favorite, and it was really good. Definitely recommend this place.
i wouldn't leave any stars if i didn't have to, the people taking our order was completely distracted and continued to be an issue when we finally got our order. Then it was WRONG in the end
Fix the hours on yelp and your door. Says you are open till 9, at 745 locked tight. And the server who saw me at the locked door with crutches would not even come to the door to explain or apologize.

Back again and this time I had the pleasure to meet Natalia and she would be doing my service and she was so Awesome, super professional very easy to talk to and made sure I was comfortable, I definitely recommend coming to Brazilian Wax!
Great Mexican food! it's a must try if you enjoy ultra full flavor :) if you are getting tacos, try the el pastor and steak. Also the shrimp taco is amazing innovation~ it's an order of three tho.

Disappointing a Puerto Rican restaurant named Rice and Beans in the neighborhood that their actual Rice and Beans are nothing to get excited about. I've had way better. Empanadas were ok. Food was edible but not rushing to go back.
So upset paid 15 bucks for soda n popcorn to be denied a refill bull don't know if we will go back

Came here on a whim a while back... I had no complaints with the service and the food was just okay. I wouldn't deter people from coming here if they want diner food but I personally probably would try another place out.

Vegan treasure trove! If you like discount grocery stores with organic local produce and aren't picky about a dented box then this is your place. Great customer service and great selection especially for the health conscious!

Sure I was hoping for more Spain in a tapas restaurant, but the charcuturie was excellent and the meal pretty good. The fact the place was dead empty while PM was packed doesn't make me want much to visit again. If only I could buy the lomo in bulk.
The staff and service are great but the food was bleh I tried the Bourdain special and the meat was over cooked and the sauce very skimpy and bland rice noodles were good and garnish items fresh

We've been getting pizza, cheese steaks, wings and fries from there for years. Quality fluctuates between 2 and 5 stars. Sometimes the pie or wings are overdone, but when they do it right they are very good I didn't think it was very good.
Way overpriced. Didn't tell me the price before I even finished ordering and I was stuck with a $7 cone I didn't want to pay that much for with a hole in it and falling a part
This is a decent sushi place, i was visiting my parents and ended up at sushi 4 times in 2 weeks. Last time one of the rolls was cold and not fresh.

Do not fall in love with an animal at PAWS without having your application totally cleared first. They take approximately 2 weeks to inspect you with a fine-especially to the people who, in our case, helped foster them from infancy. Completely heartless policies that are frankly quite galling.

Good pizza if you like thin crust pizza, typical monicals experience. Not too upscale, more of a home style pizza joint. Prices are a bit high if you ask me but it's a staple for those who grew up in central illinois

ok... foods not bad service is fine but at the same time they always seem to have me waiting longer than I think it should take and the servers always want to 'upsale' me instead of just giving me what I want.
Really enjoyed myself at this cute restaurant! I work by the la scala's in old City and like that one this location seves similar foods and has great service!

Good work but extremely slow. Watched 2 vehicles come in after mine and both were finished before mine. 3+ hours for a wash and wax is pretty ridiculous, especially when the vehicle sat with no work happening on it for 75% of the time!!!!
Tried to get a simple document notarized. Not only would she not notarize it, but she tried to charge me $2 for the sheet of paper which needed to be printed. Terrible service.

They have the best philly steak sandwiches and the boneless wings are fresh not frozen crap like most places homemade sauces are some of the best I've had the teriyaki and mild are really good nice big burgers and they make a really good lasagna
With the gem show it was very crowded wish a third enchilada was included - only two enchiladas yet it was very delicious! I will go back when it isn't so crowded.

This library is pretty good, and the location is fairly easy to access. It does seem like a bit outdated. $12 a year for a membership and if you use the EPL app then you can pick up your books when they are ready!

The food is so fucking amazing!!l happy hour is the best time to eat there and they have 1$ wells on Wednesday you cant beat that....beer pong on Mondays and Thursday cheap beers and all good place..i dont have to drive far to drink

Oh so horribly not only your money gone so quick, I caught a live bed bug crawling all over my bag, probably all over my car and home, beyond disgusting oh never again ! I will include photos if I need too disgraceful

The definition of average. Perhaps​ it's the fact that I was raised on New YorkItalian​n, but this place would go out of business within one week if in NYC. Philly Italian needs to step up its collective game. Disappointed​ in this city's​ Italian food, over all.

Love the mom and pop feel and love that they also run a little market in the building!! I was able to buy a ready to eat avocado and added it right then and there to my Super Plate with my chicken and chili verde

Warning- you need to show up here with main character energy. We arrived for our 11AM brunch to be shocked to see a DJ and for our eardrums to ring the entire brunch. A fun time but do go if you are trying to hold a conversation on with someone.

There really isn't anything special about Pho Grand. The menu is easy to navigate and the descriptions are well meaning but the food itself is nothing out of this world, I won't totally crave it while I'm sitting at home wondering what to eat.

Tourist trap with frozen seafood in gumbo. Honestly do yourself a favor and go elsewhere. Dooky's Chase is a not as conveniently located but the make a trip out there if you want to taste real authentic gumbo.
I was not very pleased with my manicure. The woman was not very friendly, and when I went to my car, one of my nails smudged after waiting in the dryer for a half hour. I will not be returning.

A vegetarian and vegan café located in Vanderbilt's campus, Grins is an excellent place for any meal any time of the day. Relatively fast in their foodstudents and again, the food is awesome. I recommend this place for anyone who likes healthy alternatives to typically lunch fare.

The last three times I've gone I've gotten something wrong in my order. What bothers me is at that I reiterate my order to the male cashier and he acts like I'm bothering him. Definitely not coming back.

Great place crappy attitude. Purchased Easter flowers, Saturday before Easter Sunday. Went to leave the next day for Sunday dinner and the plant was DEAD. The women behind the counter tried to blame me for not watering it as soon as I purchased it the night before.

Was looking for a good chicken shawarma but I should've known you can't find that in Nashville, especially from a Greek place. The food was good but you cannot call that a chicken shawarma, very disappointed.

No parking. Hour or longer wait. Rude people. Wait a few months till that start loosing money like every other over priced place in kop and you can get a table where they are cause your dollar is important at that point.

Really like this new pizza place. Great pizzas and terrific delivery times! I really like their 'special' program who'd ever have thought broccoli and garlic and diced tomatoes on a truly crisp but "tasty" thin crust pie could be sooo good!!
This is a lovely little coffeeshop, with nice people and fantastic gooey butter cake in more flavors than you could imagine.

Had an early valentines day breakfast there with my husband and a good friend. The service seemed ok the food was ok. I had french toast and my husband had a western omlet with homefries and oyr friend had a egg sandwich and homefries. The coffee was ok too

Great company and great prices!! 100% reliable and ready when I was last minute the owner located a 26ft to accommodate for me and my kids to move outta state. I couldnt be more grateful to this rental agency.
I got a spray tan here while in town on vacation. The color was great, I got lots of compliments how it looked very natural, and it lasted for over a week! Would recommend.
Bought a few t-shirts yesterday, and I must say the cut and quality of the shirts here are second to none. I love to represent my city wherever I go, and now I can do it in a stylish way. Thanks Dno!
Food was great only thing needs is a way better way to order longest part of hole meal was ordering cause there's one lady doing it and menu kinda confusing

Paisano's Pizza is your basic, familyfriendly and really geared more towards that type of crowd. However, the pizza is worth checking out if you are in the mood for casual takeout; I wouldn't recommend dining in unless you have children 12 and under.

Cindy's Critter Camp is a great place to board your dog. We like the design of the dog kennels. Each dog has an indoormonth old mini poodle puppy after a 5for-profit rescue service that takes in unwanted dogs and finds them forever homes.

Welcome relief from the loud bars that populate the Rittenhouse area. Love how I can tell the staff what I'm in the mood for, and a delicious drink appears on the table shortly. Only $6 for mocktails.

I was a little disappointed to be honest. I was looking for a more Thai style restaurant though and the summer rolls and spring rolls were more like small egg rolls. Overall good food but probably a more focus on Chinese style than Thai.

All I can say is AMAZING!!! My boyfriend, myself, and my boyfriends sister are in love with this place. The steamed buns are to die for, this place is must try if you want some local, friendly, and amazing food!

This place is way overrated. I love the throwback vibe and the fact that it's a nice little summer hangout, but the food is overpriced and not that good. Burgers are overcooked and hosoft serve desserts. I had the strawberry shortcake once and I was severely disappointed.

Hand grenades - kinda strong drinks with a schtick. They are sweet and fruity and not bad at all. I guess the benefit of drinking these is the camaraderie you have with the other drunks that carry them around the city and the discounted refills.
This is my new favorite place to get tacos! The quality of food was outstanding! I had the ground beef tacos and it was so good even my 2 year old couldn't keep her hands off it !

Krueger's Tavern is a great find for both dinner/late night and a solid addition to the south end of Mass Ave. The restaurant features a trendy atmosphere with a nice patio space. Easily one of the better burgers in Indy. The Hot Beer Cheese is a must!

The food is the same food you'd get at any comparable restaurant. The wait staff intentionally lies about the wait, consistently saying 10-15 minutes when everyone in the room has already been waiting for 30. Don't go on Sunday, it isn't worth it.
The coffee is pricey, the book selection skews typically-mainstream, but the view of the parking lot from the upstairs cafe is exquisite. Well, at least it's clean and has free wifi.

Great place. We live in the neighborhood and this has become one of our favorite spots. The staff is great dine at the bar for something casual, or for the full experience get into the dining room. We have been there several times, and will keep going back. Highly recommended.
Went there to try a Phily Cheese Steak sandwitch. While the sandwitch was not that bad, it wasn't good either and definitely did not justify the price that was asked for it.
The $20 Calamari on the beach tasted like fried cardboard and was probably the worst calamari I've ever had in 23 years of living. Not even calamari shape. Would not recommend.

Like the vibe but some of the sweets don't quite keep up with the atmosphere The buttercreams are good as is the chocolate covered bacon but I was not a fan of their cashew turtles, as they were a bit caramel deficient.
The staff staff acted put out to take my simple order. They got it wrong and most embarrassing of all I bit into my cheeseburger and there was a bread tie in it. This is ridiculous. Will not be back!

Had lunch here the other day with a group of 20. The restaurant couldn't accommodate our party on one table so we had to split up into two tables charging for sour cream!! You'd think it was outrageously expensive!!

The interior design is pretty cool, it's a pretty hip vide. The coffee was OK, just typical coffee. The service was pretty bad. It was a bunch of high school boys who seemed pretty clueless as to what they need to do and very slow service.

Filthy disgusting awful bathrooms. I went into 3 on the international terminal for American and it looked and smelled like it had not been cleaned in days. How embarrassing for us Americans. What foreigners must think of us when they land. Get it together philly!!!!!!!

Amazing pizza, but now that it is no longer byob, I am disappointed. The bottled beers are $4-$6 each and it is no longer affordable to come to desanos for a cheap drinking night with excellent pizza.

The food was alright but seems to be very hit or miss and the service was pretty bad considering how many people were in the place. Also somehow you are allowed to smoke in a place that serves food which I thought was now illegal in Nevada.

I ordered a pizza at 11:45 pm and over two hours later it's still not here. When I tried to call to ask about it, nobody picked up the phone and I was on hold for at least ten or fifteen minutes. I want a refund

From the dry ribs, to the extremely dirty glassware that they pour beer into, to the flavorless green beans to the dirty single stall bathroom that was out of hand soap, even 20 minutes after I alerted their staff... completely underwhelming in every way.
Modern decor conveniently located in the international plaza mall, very friendly and fast service, good sushi but far from being great. It is a good place to go to after a long shopping afternoon.

Arriving in Tampa in 2001 everyone says you have to eat at the Columbia, Berns and Side the steaks at Ruths Chris and Charlies are better. My mother wanted a family celebration so we went. I loved the enthusiasm of the waiter the rooms but not mean

It looks glorious on the outside doesn't it? Well on the inside it just needs a little love. The seating is a little dated and holy cow I paid $9 for some Sour Patch kids and a diet coke but whatever because it's a theater and I saw my movie......

Beware of this salon! I recently had my hair color touched up and highlights added. The price was very high and the results were very poor. My forehead was covered with hair color stain and was swollen and itchy for two weeks until my doctor prescribed a steroid cream.

THE WORST they advertise a wait time at check in & on their app but it is at least an hour longer than they say. SO FRUSTRATING to see people who checked in an hour after us getting in first. DON'T GO HERE IF YOU CAN AT ALL AVOID IT!!!

Used to love this store, however the customer service is the worst. I drive out of my way to shop at other Grocery stores and will not shop In the store even though it is the closest grocery store to me.
I pretty much just go here on Sunday afternoons to play flip cup on the second floor, and I always have a good time. They should have a Flipadelphia tournament.

Plain and simple. Pie by the slice or by various sizes. Awesome crust. They didn't officially offer milk as a drink and I hope they will offer individually sized milk things because I definitely like me some cold milk with my pie...

Horrible company! Piss poor Professionalism! Hiring ROAD RAGE EMPLOYEES, who threaten to "slap the gay" out of a college student, then take no responsibility for THEIR HIRING DECISION, speaks to the incompetence of this bootleg business! DON'T USE THEM EVER! Incompetent in one area.... INCOMPETENT IN ALL!! Pure trash!
Decently priced. Fun atmosphere. Great food. Definitely a must try if you want some different seafood that is fresh from a restaurant that prides themselves on their food.
Food is really good. They seem to have switches to wild, really loud music in the lounge area - kk d of ruins the atmosphere. .

I order for delivery and The Chile relleno tasted like the batter was tamale masa and not egg batter we were very unhappy with it, The queso fundido tasted like edible puddy, it was blop. Unsatisfactory for us...

My mahimahi sandy was dry but Daddo's fish and chips was fantastic. Will have to try again on an evening when I can enjoy an adult beverage cause their drink menu looked pretty groovy. Enjoyed the outdoor seating even though it was in that weird strip mall.

My guest check in was challenging at the least. The room was clean, but sink wouldn't drain properly. My TV was old, and whiting out. Breakfast was ok, I didn't prefer the cereal selection, and the smallish dining was packed; I had to eat in my room.
Definitely worth a shot - the food is fantastic and the owners are great to talk to while you wait on the food
We had a great experienced, the food was delicious, nice ambiance and the vegan option are Amazing, clean place and very friendly people working there. We'll be back for sure
Dirty. Wait staff was slow and had poor attitudes. Disappointed to see the management not be able to raise the experience up to the rest of IHOP standards in other locations.

I stopped in for a much needed BluXmas return is fine. Meanwhile, at first I did not see all the models of Blu Ray players but the sales associate brought one out from the back. So far, so good ticket" items here yet.
Get your body in shape at the Dan bodybuilding place. The gym needs an A/C. The price not sure because I did not sign up I was with the other spectator of the gym's in house bodybuilding contest.
Great breakfast! They always deliver quality and quick meals. I go here often and have tried multiple items on their menu and really love all of them, although breakfast tends to be my favorite!

The after workout "shake" leaves a lot to be desired. I was expecting a nice cold refreshing beverage and instead got a lukewarm cinnamon almond liquid that eventually made me sick. The juices might be better but the shakes are not shakes.

Worst repair job I've ever seen and all they had to do was restitch a lose seam on my boots. The stitching they performed didn't even aid in the reattachment I requested; instead they practically just put holes in my boots. Completely ruined my Dr. Martens.
Customer service is terrible and after a 25min wait for 8 wings not only were they tiny but they shorted me one.
This pizza is much better than west shore but I prefer best NY in tampa off dale Mabry or tonys little pizza off 4th st.

I had high hopes for this place but was sadly disappointed. The broth lacks flavor and the noodles they use are skinnier than typical ramen noodles which is one of my favorite things about ramen. Not impressed and won't be returning.

Steak houses are not my favorite type of restaurant watch the prices because they are very inflated for ordinary, brand name wines. The room was very nice and comfortable I think this is the best choice in the vicinity.

The music was awesome and the burlesque show was fun. We had planned on eating but didn't; however, we heard from the locals the food is amazing!! Definitely check it out if you are looking for something a little different than the typical live music scene in Nashville.
I'm here again I'm trying to stay away but it have a problem It's real it's a lot off us out there Rehab center

Bagels are decent but the service is always spacey, walked in during a slow time of day and waited 25 mins for one bagel. Then had the two people behind me get their order first, unfortunately this has happen on multiple occasions for me.

Great place, plenty of parking, spacious lobby, the theater is very large with reclining seating. I will say that the line for snacks is really long, however you can order food and have it delivered to your seat to avoid the lines.
Food was okay, but not worth the price tag. I'd probably eat here again if I were in the shopping center anyway, but I wouldn't go out of my way to.

Great experience with Zach Underwood from Glendale Jeep. Zach and Glendale made the purchase of a new Jeep for my daughter a very easy experience and very fair pricing. He delivered the car to the house, did all the paperwork and so easy. Thank you Zach!!!

Absolute rip off! Was told we had prepaid for gas so returned car on empty only to be told they never entered it and were forced to pay $10/gallon to fill tank. Rude staff and terrible customer service! Feel scammed.

Overpriced and small portions make this place kind of a dive.......They offer delivery but require large orders and cahrge high delivery fees. The food is actually good but they have too many negatives to choose them over another place with more to offer.
eh, this was ok. went here on a date when I was in town. The date wasn't great, which I guess made the beer and burgers and stuff not taste as good as I would've hoped. probably my fault.

The food is fine, nothing to go crazy about but also nothing to really complain about. Standard bistro. I would say not worth going here in the winter, but on nice spring/summer days, the sidewalk tables facing Rittenhouse are great, and make the visit worthwhile .

They let an entire high school band use their restroom but they wouldn't loan me a usb cord to charge my phone for something I needed to print. They made me spend $20 for one. Thanks, FedEx. I'll be finding a new place to print.

Update fresh to order is still as amazing as it's always been since the first day up until now glad they're in Nashville still excited about going food is still amazing customer service above board so it gets two thumbs up for me

Unbelievable that this airport, in the great city of New Orleans, doesn't have a single decent coffee shop, such as a Starbucks or CC's Coffee. All they had in Terminal D was some nasty drip coffee with the tiny containers of halfhalf.

The perfect place to be on a hot summer night! The reason why I love this place is because they offer a "light" version of icecream flavor every day, and offer quartnight cravings and splurged for the light butter pecan or plain vanilla plenty of times! Scrumptious!
OVERRATED the cheesesteak was just awful put peppers on my cheesesteak and couldn't even taste any peppers the bread was normal bread simply overrated

It's the Four Seasons. As expected, everything was perfect. If you need a review to figure out if the Four Seasons is a good place, you're either a hillbilly or not from this country. Pay a lot, expect excellence.

Ice cream and water ice are great, however several times I've gone lately, the folks working there aren't wearing masks when engaging very closely with customer who also aren't required to wear masks. Hoping they resolve this :)
Great pho!! I had the combo with tripe and my lovely wife had #1 lunch deal with BBQ pork, egg roll, rice noodles, and veggies
Not impressed. It was easy enough to drop our car but getting picked up at the airport after our flight was a different story. I would never use them again. Just don't.
Always really pleased with Marcello's . Would def recommend I've never had any complaints other than the Service is a bit slow Love the atmosphere any time of year

I officially found an airport that I thought was worse than Newark. Nasty bathrooms, crowded gates that all seemed wedged too close to eachother. Yes, the white rocking chairs are a nice touch, but how about Airport employees get off of them and go clean the bathrooms?!

I purchased a couch from Mobler. When I bought the couch I was not offered a warranty repair package. A family member suggested I get it. When I called the next business day after delivery I was quite rudely advised I cannot but a warranty after delivery.

If I could give this place negative stars i would I decided to take a look at this spot because it has great reviews and its close and convenient for me . When I got here they were closed no note nothing just closed . Smh so heated

We were going to give this restaurant, in our neighborhood, a second try this evening. Tonight we we're refused at the door because it was 15 minutes before closing time while the restaurant was still very lively. We are very disappointed to say the least.

Service ok. Food is good. It is right next to the train station so it gets a little loud but the food makes up for it. They are very nice people who own it but they just need to work better in providing service. BYOB which is a plus.
Lovely beach very privet not a lot of people. But you have to pay for parking can get kind of expensive especially if you are planning on spending a whole day there.
I tried a few places in Tucson, but I've never gotten as many compliments as I did after Tony cut my hair. Great vibe, price, traditional barbershop atmosphere plus the great haircut.

The tortilla soup was like vegetable soup And the half sandwich was so dry I could hardly swallow with a drink. Where was the mayo is there a shortage???? Very disappointed today But mostly we have always been extremely happy with everything, this was just an off day I think

I've tried the bulgogi, chapchae, and kimbop here. It was good enough to come a second time around. The prices are reasonable, and I love how it is connected to the Korean market next door and is only a few doors down from the Korean bakery.

I don't think I've ever had an order be delivered in less than an hour. The food is always practically cold when it gets to me and I even call in and ask and they don't do anything about it. Absolutly horrible everytime

They promise a lot but deliver junk, spent 1 hour on the layout of the slab for cutting and they didn't cut it anywhere near to what we laid out. There answer was its close. Terrible place when they lie to you

This restaurant should do a service to the community and completely close down. I was in the drive thru with one car ahead of me, it took 15 minutes to get a hamburger and fries. 5 minutes later when I went to eat it, the hamburger was ice cold.

I went here with my grandmother and i found it to be a pretty good burger joint. . The burgers are a little big but I love the bottomless fries! We did have a bad experience at another red robin, but overall I think it is a relatively good burger joint.

Love this place! I've had great results from my laser hair removal and every appointment after the initial consultation has taken 10 minutes or less. They're always friendly and answer all of my questions with a smile!

i got a creek salad and tbey totally forgot my feta cheese. it's a very sad day:(......................................................... I will come back though because I would like to try the sandwich when I feel like I'm going to eat bread again
5 stars for Banh Mi and Sugar Cane drink, and 3 stars for everything else on the menu I have tried!
Cute atmosphere, but with a name like The Farm & Fisherman Tavern, you would expect the fish 'n chips to be awesome. Very, very greasy and bland. But the server was very sweet!
Wow que barbaridad sólo las bebidas de agua natural Son muy caras a 400 dólares y un ice tea también a 400 dólares eso es un robo que ase chilangos
I love babaganoush but they killed it with salt and lemon juice way too salty and sour which made my face cringe without me even trying. Other dishes were mediocre.

Good food, service was okay. The online menu IS different that what they actually serve. It is probably important to note that both our meals were the saltiest we've had since visiting New Orleans 5 days ago. That could be a definite plus for some though.
Jimmy Johns is usually great. Fresh food great staff he cut me off and said "you can grab a packet and put it on" I asked for extra lettuce and got none - I got some sprouts instead. I won't be back.

This place is a JOKE!! Dont bring your mower or equipment here. It'll just sit in their lot for weeks on end. And when you come to pick it up because they haven't done jack crap to it, they'll try to take your deposit. Stay away from M & M!!

One visit only, but Danielle's is a very good place. A goodsized sandwich, easier to eat than I had thought/feared, and every bit of it including the tomato slices tasted good. I doubt this will have been my sole visit.

Now I see the hours of operation on their website have changed and they close at 6pm everyday, so no dinner moving forward I guess. Wow.... sorry to all the new houses and family's that have moved into the neighborhood. Close it up!

BEWARE!!!! Decpetive company, ADT vendor, but dressed in ADT T-Shirt, when you complaint about incorrect monthly billings, they try to lure you to resign a new contract with lowered amount, but longer terms, and grand total.
Ordered large catered lunch from Primo for customer onsite, Josh and his team put together a great sampler of hero sandwiches, salad, red potato and macaroni salad everything was delicious !!
First time here, and WOW Food was fantastic, portions were large, and the staff was friendly It's a diamond in the rough for sure
Used this florist for my Wife's birthday. Not only were the flowers beautiful but they were able to switch to a last minute delivery to help me get these flowers to my wife on her birthday.

Food was very good. I ordered Chicken and broccoli and got Mongolian Chicken, but that's cool, I like that too. I didn't like running out of drink twice and having to wait, or waiting for the check, but, again, the food was excellent.
Bagels and sandwiches are really good. However, more than once when I've gotten delivery they've either brought the wrong drink or food items were missing from my order.
Great meals each time I visit - I wish I could try new things here, but I keep getting the effing delicious buffalo chicken pizza. I can't help it, it's too good.

If you've never been to Bubs, you have to go!!! You will not be disappointed. The only feedback I could give them is to get a bigger restaurant to support all the Saturday and Sunday morning demand :)

Quick run into the store for ice cream, then quick to my cooler in my car, and ice cream was delicious as I ate it at home, yum! Masks worn, no social distancing needed as I was only one in the store.
Good but not great, especially considering the price. Steak was cooked correctly but was served on a room temperature plan - arrived warm not hot off the grill and cooled rapidly.

So, is this the same Jack's that when I was growing up in Carmel had a location there, then when I moved to Broad Ripple, I got carry out there many times on College Avenue, then they became Circle City Pizza?
It is what it is, have not found a good Mexican restaurant on Boise yet you always know what you get when you come here, ok food and ok service, nothing to write home about, but ehhh.

Their work looks good on the surface but lacks pride of workmanship. Cheap switches, electrical tape from Harbor Freight, LED lights that can't be seen unless they are in the shade, poorly fabricated brackets. Overall lack of pride at high end prices.
the staff is rude, if I could give 0 stars I would, the employees get upset if you ask them for help they said ...

The chicken parmesan poboy was good, breakfasts weren't great. Hurricanes were good and strong. The service was at best disorganized. People were waiting for a while and definitely a bit of a tourist trap but we didn't have too much of a wait.

Super nice guy. Quality service he also did not try to oversell me. I went in thinking I needed them to be re soled and he said they could just be fixed up and get a few more miles out of the current soles.
Don't skip out on this restaurant!! They have a great quiet outdoor sitting area, they serve alcohol if you please and have THE BEST chicken salad wrap. We make trips out here just for these!!

How does one remove the senior leadership of a church again? The pastor is doing real harm. He also surrounded himself with godless individuals who judge others based on what you can do for them, or how much $ you have they can take from you

When we first sat down, we were told we could only order rice bowls or a bento box if we weren't ordering allcaninstar experiencethey just need to be clear on in-house dining guidelines. After a 30 minute wait, no one wants to be told they're limited in selection.

Customer Service was super unfriendly and I had to wait a while for anyone to help me they were too busy talking in the back.. if you have to go there I suggest going to a different location. This happened 819 at 9:30 am.
Nicely handles wait list though text messaging. Really nice unique menu options and fast kitchen that bring out food before first cup of coffee gets cool enough to drink. Also great friend service
** Beware ** I rented a car for 2 days and when I got the bill they charged me for FIVE days!! I have rented vehicles many times and never seen such a blatant money grab. DO NOT USE!
This place used to be pretty good, now the only reason to go is if you want to get food poisoning

Always takes at least 15 minutes on hold to get anyone. Home delivery calls at 7am and leaves a voicemail that if you don't call back in 10 minutes you won't get a delivery for another week. Consistently bad service and management, rude employees. Home Depot is a better option.
I'm still new to getting waxed and tend to squirm but Amelia is very patient and makes me feel very comfortable. She's quick and does a great job and is also super sweet. I definitely recommend her!

I have been seeing Sarah Day at H2O for over 5 years now and always been very happy with my cut, color, and styles!! She is so personable and always makes you feel welcome. I have also had facials with Egle and she is the best.

I remember the Explorer's Den, they always had good food. Andy's the name now, is ok, they don't give as much meat as Explorer's Den did, and the steaks are ok but the buffalo wings are terrible. I had to wait 20 min. for a cheesesteak. Friendly workers but slow.

First time ever and I gotta say the strawberry le moneda smoothie I had was great the burger and the bun tasted stale onion chips were good but even at $8 price range this is still not worth it . Smoothie was worth it every penny the rest wasn't

I hate when people call me M'am, but somehow it is so sweet when the ladies of Sevan Cleaners call me Mrs. They are so friendly, their prices are good, and best of all they do a great job! Quick, professional Dry Cleaners who also do excellent alterations.

I play at silver legacy alot and have alot of offers for a free room and free play everytime I call they want to charge me ...and they put me on hold for 20 minutes . I am so ready to start going back to play at peppermill Feelimg very frustrated

Buffet is a joke for the price you pay. Pizzas have very little toppings, salad bar is just bagged salad mix and 4 dressings, some noodles with marinara sauce and garlic bread. That's it for 9.50 with a drink. Save your money and go elsewhere!

Delectable food made with real ingredientsthis place is legit! A bakery set in an industrial area, we loved the lentil soup, tuna salad sandwich, tough love salad, as well as a macchiato. The bread was excellent and dessert was a worthy indulgence.

They take forever to update their website and you can stand around in their lobby for a bit before anyone will come out of their offices to help you. I suggest calling ahead and making appointment if you want to be helped promptly.

I want to like this place more than I do because the food tastes pretty good, but things were a little off. When my co-the space doesn't seem that well ventilated. Service was friendly though. Always a plus.
Good salondid my hair well but not the friendliest environment and I felt like I was told what I wanted instead of listened to. My hair looked good, the experience just wasn't what I wanted
Trust the five star reviews here, , , I've had everything on the menu except the bubble tea, it's just not my thing...makes me hungry just reviewing it...my fav is the carnitas and the shrimp.

A little disappointed - but may be because of our high expectations. We had the standard roast pork with provolone, broccoli, and sweet peppers. Personally could have done without the broccoli and peppers, but the pork was tasty and the provolone, and roll were very good.
I forgot to mention that the restaurant made an attempt to rectify the situation by offering to create the entire experience over, unfortunately, I don't live in New Orleans. But at least they tried.
I had a fun time and enjoyed my time with friend but, there was a hair in our honey and they didn't split the check. Unique place with yummy food. Will be back!
went for an easter lunch with the family all of our food was excellent :) the menu has so many choices and we will definitely be back to try the other intriguing dishes !!

The food itself is pretty decent, but what gets me here is the price. We had a kinda mediocre hummus dish which was $12 or $13 which is way too much for what it was. Pretty good diner, but there are probably better ones.

Without a doubt, the Tomatoe Pie is off the chats, both red and white, however their Strombolis are indescribable. This phenom of Fresh bread, perfect amount of cheese, and topped with ether an abundance of pepperoni or Spinach make me feel a whole again!
Food is always fresh and delicious. There can sometimes be a wait even if you have reservations, especially with a larger party, but well worth it every time.
The food is sometimes a hit or a miss and it's not very clean but its a decent, affordable chinese food restaurant.
Just waited at the bar for 20 minutes for a bud light - I'm very patient but it's not even busy! Cool spot with lots of potential but bartenders need to get it together!

Early morning daiquiri to start the day on Bourbon street it was good but a little too much ice not enough liquor for me I tried the Cajun Combo because the mix I usually get from daiquiri bars they were out of.

This is a fun place, well decorated with good service, but most of the loser hipster clientele are snippy and trying to act too cool for their own good. Good place, lame people, so go with friends and ignore everyone else.
Staff was nice enough, out of the only thing I wanted on the menu, how can you be out of crepes? Sausages terribly salty, eggs soso, coffee was good but nobody would give me a refill.

Their appointments never get confirmed only canceled even if you make it days ahead even when they are not busy they still are behind schedule i been trying to get in a chair at this place for a month what a joke

The burnt end appetizer was soooooo good! The house salad and gumbo is to die for! My hubby had the combo platter with pork and smoked meat loaf- he loved it and we both thought the baked beans were some of the best we have ever had!
pizza is amazing but the last 3 times I've tried to order they have been on vacation, just closed for no apparent reason and an 1.5 hour wait?!?!?
I gave this place 5 stars I had to update us because this is by far the most unprofessional ghetto hair Cuttery place I've been to in Brandon
Bad experience and no one cares to fix it so I am going two stars find chicken breast weren't very fresh the sandwich was wrong my cup wasn't full All-around bad experience

So far it's nice very clean ; it's nice for a around the way place . Breakfast all day which I love not over priced . The neighborhood is not too good it's right by broad and Olney train station which is crazy but if you pick up and good that's okay .

This place sucks, the show may be good but do not park in their parkcade. I went to see the illusionists and it took over an hour just to leave the place even though I left the second the show ended. Super annoying.
The Row time. We had a table in the bar area in an odd high traffic area which you can see in the photos I posted. So, good I'll certainly come back. Good value, Good drinks and really good food!

I Work next door to them. The service is great and people are really nice. I don't think there coffee is that strong or tasteful but the jack Russell is delicious just thought it could be heated up more.

Just writing this review, I am excited to go back here. Candidly, I felt like I just had an all the aesthetic was cute and they have a quaint outdoor patio which is a nice breathe of fresh air being located in the think of the city.

Reasonably priced, clean room and really comfy bed. Continental breakfast is lackluster, but serves its purpose. Only drawback was the noise - there needs to be better weatherproofing/insulation at the bottom of the doors to mask the noise from the hallway . I would absolutely stay here again.
Waited another 10 minutes standing at the bar, after my wife stood there for 5 minutes before I arrived will not be back period.
Bartender was extremely rude. Not just kind of rude, like insulting us to our face when we sat down rude, Menu looked good but we won't ever be trying it as we walked out and won't ever go back.

Awesome awesome awesome!! No pizza stands a chance with Lorenzo's in town I've been eating to the one on South Street in Philadelphia for 20 years and the one here in west Chester has that same great taste !

I've been here a few times because my friends seem to like it but It's not my favorite place to go. The food is pretty good - usually huge portions. By night this place is like a dad convention though.
Great Hoagies - Bread is soft and fresh; variety in choices of deli meats and cheeses and the price is right!

I'll give y'all another star for the response and offer but I won't be back you're simply charging too much in my opinion for the level of service - and yeah they should wear mask AND turn away if they have to cough... that's a no brainer
Consistently bad service, small chips selection, usually overcrowded, just don't go to this location, very time I've gone there it's been very unpleasant.

Generally I like mcAlisters deli, but this location just doesn't have the same quality as the location near international plaza in tampa off Boy Scout. Food was so hot for 15 mins like they just microwaved it and served it.

Went here for a late night bite. Got breakfast at 11:30 pm. Really hit the spot! Service was a little slow and the prices were a little higher than most diners but overall it was exactly what was expected.

Loved Nini's! They are on the pricier side but the service was exceptional! The nail techs my husband and I had didn't speak much so that would be the only thing that could be better. Make sure you check in with Yelp!

I hate car shopping! I love the shopping part but not the negotiations. I looked at several different makes/models but when I went to Lexus of Clearwater I was truly impressed by the knowledgeable and professional sales people. A very pleasant experience. And I love my RC350!!

The items in merchandise was very good prices with fair but the owner and the staff made me feel like i was a hindrance by my questions I asked and the responses they gave I would not come back to this store I would take my business elsewhere

Service was horrendous. I miss the old owners, the new owner is the complete opposite of a professional business owner, he is clueless, and unkind. He does not seem like he values the business from his customers. Thank you, Next!
I ordered food last Sunday for lunch Packing was good and curbside pickup was on time But Dint get garlic bread for main menu item And house salad was spoiled!! Disappointed

They came out on time and trimmed a very large sycamore tree so I now have no big branches hanging over my roof. Everything was done well and cleaned up. They are a no fuss company and very honest. I have used them for years. Anita Duke
They have cleaned the place up a bit and also serve real guacamole again. Much better than it had gotten but not as good as it used to be waaaay back when I first started going

First time going and it was a pleasant surprise. The sheer amount of choices should be enough to keep anyone happy. My group had Chicken Curry, Pickles, Pretzels, and Gyro as well as farm fresh honey in the comb and everything was delicious. Excellent taxi coverage in the area too.

Service seems to have gotten better now that this location has been open for a little while. There are still some people working there who clearly don't care about their jobs or the customers, but there are others who are great.
Today they were very slow. Food was great! They need to start giving military discount and Seniors discount, because there is a lot of retired and Veterans in the area.

We have always had great service and great food. On the weekend the may be a bit of a wait to get in. It's not uncommon for the line to be out the door, but don't let that turn you away because they do move very quickly!
Went there on 218 for a Birthday the explanation on the poor service given to them, WaterPark temperature was overbearing & The Strong odor of Chlorine/Chemicals was Horrendous!!!
The food is pretty good but the service and presentation is average to below average but what do you expect from a casino coffee shop? They do a great $7 steak and egg special though.

Terrible service. Was told my oil change and air conditioning service would take an hour and 1/2. It's now been over 3 hours. Asked mgr Scott Webster how much longer and was rudely greeted with a bunch of excuses and made to feel bad for even asking.
Gotta open more lines here, the line starts forming in the front and some are long enough to be in the past the jewelry section.
Enjoyed the view. Food and service at the table was good but trying to get a drink at the almost empty bar was a struggle! Bartender looked right through us.

I love the food here, but the costumers service has A LOT to work on. Came in with my mom to order some food, but young lady was on her phone and was cleaning and eating her nails while taking our order.
I asked three employees where the dog tag machine is and they all had no clue what I was talking about. Found it myself and it's broken. So run down too
Lives up to the contemporary distressedside room noise seems to be overblown in some reviews, it is nowhere near that of major metropolitan centers.
When we just had to have one more cheesesteak before we left Philly, we came here since it was close to our hotel. Very cheesy and had a lot of meat on it.

Always nice and clean with friendly staff in my experience. For some reason this location has a problem where people go against the arrows when browsing the store, making it difficult to get around on busier days. The food is excellent, as always.
My drink has been empty for longer than 20 minutes, I made a reservation, it's been two hours and my food still isn't ready, table is dirty service sucks.

My first time coming here was today when I found out that my former groomer, Sarah, had left PetSmart to come here. I was so very pleased with the service and the price . Everyone is very pleasant and my baby's grooming was perfectly done. I highly recommend this place.
Besides saving me $1000 for work I didn't need, John and Sheila got me out of their busy shop 15 mn earlier than promised. Nice people. Good job. ..........................

Cute place with indoor and courtyard seating in a casual atmosphere. Offers a variety of items from creole to steak. Not overly spicy which was a bit of a disappointment so if you want creole without the heat, it's a good place to start.
Swim-Mor Did a great job with my pool, workers who worked at my home were very professional and left the site very clean. I'm happy with the work.

Great, speedy service! Friendly staff! The pizza tastes great and lots of different styles to choose from. Take out or eat in, it's your choice.. You must try: the chicken Caesar salad pizza If you're feeling adventurous: the cheeseburger pizza Can't go wrong with: the plain cheese pizza

Your average selection of items to choose and the best Chinese in the neighborhood but the food still lacks a bit of flavor. It may be fast and quick but you're better off at a sit down Chinese restaurant if you're in the Carrolwood area.

Fun new place for ice cream. Good flavored and toppings. My only complaint would be you really need to watch because it goes by weight and depending how much ice cream and toppings you can cost yourself a small fortune! My wife loved the peanut butter frozen yogurt!
I used to go here when I was Grease Monkey, and I still come here from time to time now that it's a Jiffy Lube. I really can't complain about anything with Jiffy Lube. It's a fine establishment.
I visited this establishment on Wednesday the is very good it's authentic and tastes like the food my girl friend makes :):) who is Latina would come back here again.

It's fair. My hummus falafel was just a tad bit too hummus-y for me and I thought it was a little salty too. But the food is quick and easy and cheap and it's different from a lot of other places so it's good for variety.

Awesome place with tons of pinball machines, consistently good beer selection and really good non-alc options for those sober October peeps out there. They also have vegan wings and some other small bar bites. Also have liquor and usually play some really good horror films.
If you accept this place for what it is then it is ok, but it no way is this real Mexican food. It is close to the house, cheap, and everyone if the family can eat here. Sometimes convenience wins!
Only giving 2 stars cause the French toast wasn't bad and my server was great but my food was cold and pretty bad

Clean comfortable room nothing fancy but serves as a good home base for exploring Philadelphia and the surrounding areas there is also a dounkin donuts across the street just use caution as there are many many homeless folks wandering around the area
One of the best joint in IL, it's got everything you need, plus the girls here keep me coming back, especially the young beautiful Kimmie, she's one of the ones that kept me coming back for more
Food is so-so I probably wouldn't order again as it was expensive for what you get. but they really lack on style as a couple of the people appeared to be visibly high on speed which I will pass on.
Refused to even look at the job which really means, won't going to make a ton of money for a small job
Great pizza, awesome customer service. Always helpful. Have been to other Papa Murphy's in Reno and Sparks, I will go out of my way to use this one. Love, love, love the pan pizza!!!!

The food is typical bar food, but awesome nonetheless. Drinks are priced fairly and the people are super nice. Only downside is how smoky it is, so if you don't mind getting a little smoky then I highly recommend checking it out.

Probably the most organized and clean Walmart I've ever been to. Purchased a car battery here for a good price and I'm glad they are open 24 hrs as the battery died at the most inopportune time. Very friendly employees.

Yet another disappointing Hooters. The place was filthy dirty, the service was poor and the food was crappy. That about sums it up. But the location is close to the hotel and they stay opn late so they are an easy place to visit. Just wish it was better. Ugh.

Great patio, but I was bummed that they closed early when there were still several patrons at the bar. I assumed that the bar was open until 1:30 but the bartender told me at 12:00 they would be closing early because it was slow. That's a bummer.

Yooooo this mickey d's screwed up our order four times IN ONE TRIP and there was an obvious lack of communication between management and the team when we were told three different things by three different people. Honestly though the chicken is bomb as hell though so 2 stars.
I have been coming here every 2 I do not NEED to tip anyone that I feel does not deserve it. Tip is not required. It's based on service. She was lucky I tipped anything after that!
Bad service when there's rush, please stand in front of the line to ensure that your drinks don't get taken away by their folks! Coffee is la colombe, which I love but services need to be improved

Walked in everybody was on their cellphones and on African guy was working all the rest were ignoring customers playing on their cellphones asked for car alarms they didn't even know if they even sold them waiting there 40 minutes then I just left no purchase

Service was great, although we went pretty late on Monday night, however our steaks were dry and lacked flavor, even though they were not over cooked. Was disappointing as we have been there before and we had consistently had great experiences.
Great burgers decent enough drinks close to home never a disappointment have a few pool leagues and clubs there so it can get crowded or the week but not a bad place to stop off for a quick nightcap

petruce et al could make me go back to being a vegetarian. I actually preferred the vegetables over the meat. I had the roasted carrot with kale and the sweet potato with avocado, tomatillo and quest fresco to start and could have stopped there. The drynotch dining experience.

Food is 5 star but service is seriously lacking. I don't expect to be fawned over in a casual place but a check-in after the food is served and to see if you want a drink refill is standard. Left feeling full but thirsty.

Tried ordering twice in the last month, they don't answer their phone, then just drove by tonight and the lights were off but the window signage was still lit up. I think they're out of business. Shame, cause their baked wings rivaled Conshy's Boathouse...

We were turned away due to no parking. No sense making a reservation because there is not enough parking, you could park by the beach but they lock the gates so you can't get your car wtf. It's no great shakes food anyway. Just a good location on the water.

my manicure started wonderfully and my manicurist left me mid manicure and handed me off to someone else who painted my nails very subpar. I was super bummed. this was the second time going and I cant say I will be back anytime soon...

Hey Nicole I was standing outside ordering pizza that day, and YOU were the one screaming F*** THE POLICE like a drunk college school girl! You should have just kept walking with your tide pods instead of trying to slander a business with wonderful customer service and great pizza!

Pleasant setting and friendly staff. Overpriced, as most hotel restaurants tend to be. Another hotel restaurant trope Luna fulfills is the bland, diluted menu that strives to have something for everyone, but as a result stretches itself too thin. The food felt... corporate.

Dirty business. Rudest and most unprofessional customer service ever. Blind quality is mediocre and had some that were defective. They took over 2 weeks to get back to me and when he did he told me they will install whenever they feel like it then hung up
WORST TAXI SERVICE!! Called half an hour prior to the time which I needed to be picked up and it took an hour to get here. I will NEVER be called there again.
The food is not bad but ultimately too pricy for what you get. If it was cheaper or more consistent I would eat there more often, but Subway is better and Jimmy Johns more reliable.

Our server was a darling, they serve actual Northeast boardwalk pizza, they know how to make a proper cheesesteak and the baked ziti was good too. I'm picky about this kind of menu so I am overjoyed to know I can come here to satisfy that craving!

The worst taco bell I've been. All white workers more tattoos workers piercing colored nails more of a ghetto place, they don't know how to make tacos. They should hire more of an experienced workers that has knowledge of making tacos I wouldn't recommend this place..

The beignets were pretty delicious but there was more dough inside so it made it a bit more heavier in comparison to their beignet cousin down the street at Café Du Monde. Nice set up and friendly service too. They have a nice selection of other treats and meals too.

They had the one item I needed, a travel size static guard can, but wouldn't sell it to me because "it wasin our system." why would they put an item on the shelf, and then refuse to sell it?! The manager was rude and completely unhelpful. So stupid?!!
They wouldn't let me in the bar because I had a t shirt that was deemed too long by the security. What a joke.
Ordered small Pizza with sausage and pepperoni, the pizza was lukewarm and the sausage was mostly on one side, they only had to travel down the street.

Margaritas are good. Taco Tuesday is always busy so don't go then. The tacos/food is meh. Service is always good. Like I said before, margaritas and pick a dippa combo is good so I would definitely suggest going for a happy hour!!

Food was amazing!!! Service however was not. Went for fathers day and felt super rushed in ways. Server came by twice only. Understand it was busy but felt it was more towards getting things ready for dinner than worrying about the folks around for lunch.

Went because of Yelp reviews It was OK, but we enjoyed Peg's Glorified Ham n Eggs more. At the We Hen I was not impressed with my ham & cheese omelet which needed more cheese than the thin layer on top although the thinly sliced potatoes were very good.

The best burrito I have ever eaten? definitely! the owners daughter is just awesome and the staff is really good, the restaurant is clean and the decor is authentic southwestern this place should be packed every night! I will be back soon

Tried to go here but was rushed at as soon as I opened the door telling me that they were closing. It was 8:50 pm and they were supposed to be open until midnight. Totally put a bad taste in my mouth and I will not be returning.

This little Middle Eastern chain restaurant gives you a lot of tasty food for a reasonable price. If you order a platter, you get all the ingredients and you build your own little sandwiches with the pita bread.

Ordered Q8 with lychee. Really good but service was slow. There was only two orders ahead if me but the one girl was too busy talking to a customer instead of helping to make drinks. They should really write the orders on the cups too for accuracy.

Dirty place, horrible management. Asked them for housekeeping, after 3 reminders and 3 hours later, no one shows and they say "we will get to you when we get to you !" Strongly suggest you avoid this place like the plague
