Bought the Curly Honey and Lavender shampoo for myself but who knew it would be the only shampoo that works on my 6 year old's hair! Better than J&J no tangles...took all the knots out painlessly! We are hooked!!!!
The doughnuts are very good. The person makingy my order and got it wrong, I had ordered butter cream on all the doughnuts and only 2 had them, but they are still pretty tasty.

The food was authentic and amazing. The horchata was very creamy! I had a good experience. I am giving this a one star because me and my husband had a very bad diarrhea 30 minutes after eating. The diarrhea lasted for 2 days. I will not eat here again.
Maybe it was what we ordered but the sushi was only ok. It was convenient to the theater and the staff was very nice but I was not thrilled with the food - sorry.

Friend and I went to O'Briens to watch football, totally packed so we found this place on Google and great service & great fresh food. Nice group of people who appear to be regulars. And good TVs with selection of games Will definitely be back!!

When you get service, it's great place with a friendly staff, but ... and this may be the mid-west pace thing, but if you come at a time that's peaking for the area, get ready for a waaaaaaiiiiiiiittttttttttttttttttt .

A couple weeks ago I went there as apart of a wedding party to get gel manicure and pedicures. They were so accommodating and so nice! The only reason I didn't give 5 stars is because my gel manicure peeled off within 6 days of getting them done.
I do like the staff and food here, but they have allowed an old woman to bring in her "service" dog WITH A DOG BED. That must be crossing some like, even among dog advocate scum.

K. The food is really good but kinda pissed about putting 80 in the video poker machine and cant get a beer comped! What a joke. And the guy tells me it's because they dont own their machines. Whatever, you still make money on them! Ugh!

Good Caesar salad and French fries. I would recommend if you're in need of decent food nearby, but I wouldn't go out of my way to eat here. Seems to be somewhat of an older vibe, and not many drink options besides beer and wine.
Gyro was slightly on the salty side but it was very good. The drive-thru layout is a little poorly thought out and the location is a little scary but if you're in the area it's worth trying.

Great menu and price. It's take out only. The people that work there are nice and make you feel comfortable. I haven't had a bad experience with any of their menu options, which I believe I've had almost everything on the menu. His homemade soups are very good.

Chef Harold is so nice, and has tons of vegan options! This is real comfort food that is still healthy - the coconut pumpkin soup was amazing, and the seitan wrap was perfect. Huge portions, fresh ingredients, friendly team. Welcome to State Street, Embermill!
I used to go here regularly but they are getting over priced and portions are noticeably smaller, especially the deep fried shrimp and anything that is plated on a platter. It's too bad.

This is our favorite restaurant to hang out at in the neighborhood! Pizza and drinks are both so great, and the staff are wonderful! Also, they take COVID precautions seriously and it's been so nice being able to come here and enjoy a drink while still feeling safe
Tacos may seem a bit pricey, but one taco is double the size and 10 times the quality of your typical tacos! Well worth the effort and money!

Most of the time here is a bummer. I live down the street and visit every couple of weeks. Anyways, fries are cold as hell and I asked for barbecue sauce but got two honey mustard and two signature sauces. At the end of the day, crappy McDonald's and employees.
Such a nice find! Very busy for lunch when I joined them. Definitely check out their happy hour for margaritas but if you don't want to sit at the bar I'd def recommend a reservation.
Good beer selection usually but unfortunately they serve some of the more desirable beers in ridiculous goblets and don't switch when you request a pint. Also service is pretty poor. Sad.
The burgers and fries are good and pretty fast, but the staff is very distant and seen like they don't really want to help you.
I found this place to be your average runthebyslice, holethe-wall type places with a shabby seating area to stuff your face with decent pizza, and then move swiftly onto more FQ debauchery.
I ate her once and I fell in love with there tomato pie it was awesome and the staff were really cool to definitely will come back

After my first experience here, I would've easily given a 4worked. Which is sad, because folks don't tip well when the service is poor, but its not the servers fault when they are already working so hard. I hope the next time i go here, i am not disappointed.

We had a very large catering order and while the food looked good there were no plates or cups with the order. I called the restaurant and the women I spoke with was so rude it was really unbelievable. I will never order from them again!
Horrible staff, Canal's needs to step it up, their wine is ok but again no real selection of any other drinks.

Best bagels in the area and great spreads! I'm from New York and have been in search of a decent bagel shop that comes close to a New York bagel. Happy to have found my new go-to bagel place that I will be visiting every weekend.

I only tried the burger It came mediumrare, but that happens SO frequently, I can't take away a star for it. It was moist, but not SO juicy as to soak the brioche roll. Freshprepared. I'm looking forward to trying more of their sammies.
Best pizza in manayunk, but they stopped delivering to my address one day out of nowhere, so now I go to couch tomato.
Dim sum in south jersey! I don't have to go to Philly anymore and the quality of food is good :) excited to become a regular.

My family and I come here often and it is defined the best Italian food in the city. Shrimp scampi and fried asparagus appetizers are a must have and the meatballs and spaghetti are the best I have ever had.

The food was horrible. I was rooting for this place, because it's cute and would have been nice for south Kenner, but it was such a disappointment. And it was expensive. They need a new cooking staff and a new menu.

Bottom line up front: this is by far hands down in the top 3 best BBQ restaurants I have ever eaten at. I was raised in the south so that is a legit statement. Super friendly staff and clean facility too :)
Good food, but service was definitely lacking the day we visited. Forgot half our order and we couldn't grab him to let him know as he was sitting with patrons at another table socializing

Great food and very friendly service! The sangria is excellent and the menchego & honey appetizer was awesome! One thing to note, the pizza dough used is of the chewy variety, so make sure that's your thing before jumping in and ordering pizza. All in all, excellent place!
Not even remotely good. The last thing this world needs right now is another brew pub, but if that's your bag, at least serve some fresher, more interesting food.
Months ago the service was awesome, today is the second time, i ask for a medium stake, but they got it well done! This is the second time, i hope there wont be a third one

This is the second time I came here and it was again amazing! They are able to make reservations, however, when we arrived they weren't quite ready for us so they gave us free drinks. A cool activity for a girls day or date night.

Got my nails by Nikki and I am so pleased. I am almost 40 weeks pregnant and needed a fill on my nails that would be the perfect shape and length for being a new mom, and that's exactly what I got. Affordable and reliable!
Over rated, it was fine but nothing to wait in a 45 minute line for! If you are lucky enough to find there aren't a lot of people, I would stop but otherwise find another place!
Nice selection of cigars and accessories staff friendly and accommodating smoking lounge in back with television nice atmosphere will visit again

Great atmosphere very fun and lively, we usually go for their lunch or dinner, which is always good no matter what you get. We love their Guinness fries and honey mustard chicken yummmmm! Sometimes the service can be a little slow but there usually really busy which is understandable.
Excellent food, friendly staff. Food prices are very reasonable. A little hard to locate but just a few door down from the Walmart in the same shopping center before the archway.

Alligator cheesecake and carpetbagger steak are the best !!! My favorite place in the city - aftwards head next door to the Maple Leaf for some great music or across the street to Frenchy's Art Studio !

Sliders are a fond childhood memory. We lived too far from Indy to get them regularly so whenever my parents went to the big city, they would bring several bags of 'em home. I like them now as a late night snack since they're open 24 hours on the weekends.

The food is wonderful- variety, execution, all of it. The atmosphere can't figure out what it's trying to be, and the teenage staffers could use a pep talk in "you'll be doing this the rest of your life if you don't pull it together."
I like them. I gave three outta five stars bc of the price but they're very personable and work with u on payment plans

Take the road less travelled and venture out to Treme for a bevy of choices in Cajun seafood. We got a pound of crawfish, a pound of shrimp, corn the Cobb, pigs feet and gumbo including drinks all for $35. You can't beat the price or taste of this place!
Terrible! The shrimp quesadilla had what seemed like Kraft shredded cheese, jar salsa on the side, and like three tiny shrimp on the whole thing. Waste of time and money. Never again.

I've been ordering from Circles since I moved to South Philly in January, and the frequency has increased is it me, or do they keep stepping up their game? From my first soto spot for Southeast Asian food in Philly. It's also BYO, and the servers are really nice!

Atmosphere is three stars! Food is about 1.5: tuna was slimy, shrimp were good but expensive, scallops were tasty but four isn't worth $29, crab cake was not done inside, and overall experience was not what I thought it would be, find another place!
I ordered a 20 oz veal chop to go. The chop was very large but there was very little meat on the bone and the meat was tough when it should have been tender. After all it is veal. Disappointing.
I love food that is fresh and healthy, the staff is friendly and attentive to what I need; the only problem that it is dirty especially the floor need to pay attention to cleaning.
This food is not the best quality, but I guess if you only have $5 on you you will get full. They have a burger basket for $2 or tacos. But I guess the chicken wings are ok.

Terrific food, great service, tapas style and portions were just right, you may have to "order up" to get enough food if you are really hungry. Short ribs were very good. Pan cookie at the end was a nice dessert to share. Good atmosphere as well.

This is a great, no frills place to get mens haircuts. Don't expect cappuccinos and massages, just great haircuts at reasonable prices. I've only ever seen Roberto there, as far as I can tell he is usually the only guy working when I go, and he does a great job.

These people are criminals. Legitimate criminals. They'll charge thousands of dollars for things like bubble wrap and tape, all while doing a half assed job, taking as long as they can to do their 'work' to bill more hours. Avoid these criminals at all costs.
Great service, including a quick response to my initial inquiry, same-day service, punctual arrival, friendly diagnosis of the lock issue, and prompt repair. Very pleased!

I came here with 4 friends the night before the Philly half and full marathon. We didn't make reservations and instead just wandered around South Street in search of a hearty carbnotch and I would definitely be back to try the other varieties on a subsequent Philly visit.

I'm always up to try new brewery's but I was pretty disappointed by the beer here, it was very forgettable and nothing really seemed too good about it. I did like they're little setup for food and I did enjoy my meal very much.

Addressed emails to the wrong people consistently. Only time he was helpful or informative with out us having to go to his office was when we requested to be released from him. Unprofessional and not worth the money.

I concur with the other reviewers. You come here to snap a photo under the LOVE sign with your crew or SO and then go on your way. The park is kind of dirty. It smells like piss. The fountain looks filthy. It's nothing that great.

If you are in the hurry and are tempted for fast food, try out McAlisters.. I love all of their saladsevery indegredient FRESH! This is a stop by while on a shopping or working break but go someplace better if you are on a date kind of place.
Looks like this restaurant did not make it, drove by the other day and the sign on the building was removed. Made the mistake of eating there one time.

They have an excellent filet. It is expensive, but delicious. My husband and I split our dinner and they split the salad, filet and vegetable for us and don't charge extra for splitting our food. Very good service.
I have been here a few times in fact every time i come to New Orleans the food is good but sure seems to me since Jamie Shannon passed yrs ago the food has just not every been the same
Been here many times. Great real Mexican food one of the best in St. Louis. I have even asked so mm e friends from Mexico and they say it is as authentic as you can get. Mom and Pop place.
Boba is decent. I don't think it's worth going back to honestly, there's so many great boba shops in the area, I don't think this one compares to the others

Bisbee Bowl was a winner for the meat lovers, but watch out for the huevos rancheros...it was disappointing in size and wasn't anything special Overall I'm gonna come back, but if the next thing I try is like the huevos rancheros it'll probably be my last time
Local taco used to a fine establishment, then the menu was changed, this was essentially suicide for a restaurant that was a favorite for many nashvillains.

Classic breakfast dishes. Diner feel but not greasy and satisfying. Great for picky kids and older peeps who dont like new culinary modern twists on food. The food was good but nothing unique or different that I cant make at home or get at a chain breakfast restaurant.

I was casually eating when an obvious autist walked in waving his arms and sticking out his tongue. The manager stormed in with his boys, waving guns and said "you're dead moose meat" and proceeded to destroy the poor mans equipment and started a ruckus. The chicken was good tho.

Yes food is great just don't like the cashier handling money and then handling my food with her bare hands money known to be the most dirtiest thing in the world for those reasons I prefer not going back
I think Primex. is a wonderful store they are nearby and always seem to have what I need and the sales people are very helpful

I do my grocery shopping here. I don't enjoy it, but it's convenient. Prices are consistent with California grocery stores, but this is Tucson and prices should reflect the poorness of the people who live in Tucson. WTF is with poor people all over the place?

Great food and service, but I wish they correctly instated the city's covid guidelines instead of relying on the honor system at the door...it would make customers like myself feel more safe when dining.

Standard Starbucks but in a great building - the flying saucer building! 3 Stars is a stretch considering after 2+ months of nearly daily visits at the same time, they still can not remember my name or drink. Guess I am asking too much.
Wait, wait, and more waiting. Management totally unresponsive. I feel disrespected. I purchased online with store pickup, I checked in, and over an hour wait so far with no end in sight.

I can say that the end result of this processs was Sloane Toyota of Glenside did honor their promise in response to my advocacy. Its important for customers to be informed, thoughtful and fair self-advocates, know their responsibilites and for businesses to be as responsive as possible.

We went there twice, giving it a second chance . Each time, the quality is just barely average. Rolls are ok but entree really not great, the pad Thai has very little flavor and all tempura is over fried.

calls the business i work for daily pretending to be returning a call to our maintenance manager one girl even lied about having a meeting with him and another tried to lie about her place of work...shut this place down already

Pretty good! Had a few drinks, an appetizer, and a sampling of two entrees. Neither of us felt sick even though we got overly stuffed which is a good sign of the quality of the food, kitchen staff, and overall cleanliness. I would gladly come back to try more!

Worst service ever they charge $115 to diagnose a problem . Took to chevy service for burned out wiper motor came home with cracked windshield.... service manager said I must have broken windshield on my way home or my regular mechanic broke it when I took it to him.....
Coffee is not great. Plenty of room to work and good wifi. Same totally sketchy guy who's not a customer has been in the mens room at least 3 times in 1 hour....

My family loves the selection of add on's- cheesecake, brownies, pecans, etc. Yogurt taste is good but tastes a little artificial. Be careful with how much you put in that bowl because it can be the priciest dessert ever once it's weighed! Atmosphere is family friendly and clean.

The Tikka Masala sauce taste exactly like the Patak's Masala sauce that you can buy in a jar at Walmart, I hope it's not the same though. The garlic naan looks and taste the same as normal naan. I heard good things about this place but was really disappointed.
The Hub always serves great coffee and it is really nice to have one close to UNR! Now, if I have to park up past sierra street, I can stop at The Hub on my way to class.
For the life of me I cannot understand the appeal of this place frozen fries with old bay and American cheese sauce. 2 orders of crab legs and a burger. $100. Outrageous.
Came in for late day snack started with clams and oysters and then had house salad with a nicely cooked chicken breast. Along with a draft great picker up meal from Bocca
Mediocre. Even though the food is not spectacular, This is a place where we would go on Saturday morning when we don't have nothing to eat at home. Always take advantage of your student ID.

Everything is so immersed in salt that is all tastes the same. The show is entertaining so maybe its something you do once but after you pay the bill and retain a couple pounds in water weight, I don't think you'll go back.

I've never been to this location but the floor is filthy. It's 3pm and crumbs are all over the floor. Everywhere. Have no idea how long it's been like this or how often staff are supposed to sweep, but I haven't seen a Starbucks this poorly kept up in awhile.

This is a nasty place to live.! trust me, bed bugs, roaches, brocken car windows cabinets falling apart, a/c sucks, we expend 3 days without air conditioning and they just don't care all they care about is money and they renewed the lease contract without telling you nothing.
Horrible service Had empty table but still made us wait and seated people coming in after us as they came in

Friendly service and good pizza. I love thin crusts and feta! To make it a 5 star perhaps they could use fresh herbs in the sauce and a slower simmer to cut down the acidity, then it would be perfect.

If you ask for a bath and brush, that's what you'll get. I'll know next time to ask for my pet to be dried along with that. My pet was clean and smelled great but his coat was wet and many loose hairs had not been brushed out.

My wife and I enjoy this diner's offerings. The crab cake special on Friday has returned, consisting of two crab cakes on macaroni and cheese with soup or salad, one side vegetable and dessert. We also love their eggplant parmigiana mini meal.

Great food and great service by Vincenzo but the food was very slow. Drink order were messed up and the owner Michael did not even Comp us a drink or dessert on a $400 bill after mentioning our 2 hour wait on a Birthday dinner
Taco Mar - please consider turning your music down. It's 12:30 on a Thursday. We do not want to have Despacito blasted at us while we're trying to cram for a test or have a conversation. Thanks.
Lots of yummy local food, so much so I could t decide what to get until we came to the convulsion that we were sharing it all. Awesome vibe and friendly staff.
Waited for well over an hour for a pizza. Got up to leave and was sill charged for the one soda we ordered; which sat empty for 45 minutes do to lack of service.
I haven't been here for a few weekswalked over and it is out of business, with "For Sale" signs on the building! This is too bad; it was an asset to this neighborhood.
The cream brûlée pancakes were amazing! I had to wait a little bit even on a Thursday morning so make sure you call ahead of schedule reservations. I will definitely make it back for a savory dish.

Arrived at 9 when they opened and practically had the place to ourselves! We also went on the 10:30 RCA Studio B tour, which was an informational and historical tour I recommend doing even if you're not big on country music. Brenda was a fantastic tour guide!

My wife and I ate at this restaurant Saturday night and because it was very clean and delicious we came back to it on Sunday for lunch and all of these happened in a two day trip stay in Santa Barbara. Good quality food!!!.

They tried to say they couldn't make us more food at 8:35 when they closed at nine and they were out of everything besides a few bullshit items that aren't very popular. What a bunch of worthless, lazy people.
I had the hamburger it was dry tasteless hockey puck they do not use fresh meat and whoever the cook is cooking it it was so bad I could not eat it

I like to stay here. Great breakfast. Great service. Brand new hotel, nice rooms and really clean. It's easy access to the freeway and the airport in my case close to the warehouse sites I need to go see. Great location. You can get to Indy in 15 minutes

This place is awesome! My wife and I stayed here for two nights during our miniprivate balcony, a two person spa tub, and a comfy bed. Plus, it's within walking distance of the downtown area. In other words, a great stop on any getaway.

Updated: Russo's is completely professional. Upon seeing my review, Russo's reached out to me to resolve the issue and refunded me the complete amount I had to give as a tip. I can honestly say I don't think that would've happened back home. Thank you, Russo's for your professionalism.
The slowest drive through ever. Everytime I come here. Coffee is good staff is friendly, but for some reason with only a few cars it always takes longer than 10 minutes. So GO INSIDE is my advice
Good food and a wide variety of beverages. The service has always been pretty quick and attentive. It's a great place to go when you want to watch a sports game and have some food and a drink.

The food, space, music and noise level were good. However, 2 servers on a Friday night, a week into being on Groupon is not a good look . The restaurant had about 12weekend day or if I had a good chunk of time to devote to a weekend dinner.

Been back a number of times since my first rating and not only has the menu improved but so has the consistent quality of the food. Definitely a solid place for a wide variety of sandwiches apps and salads

Well, called 4xs today in hopes of having my Jojo seen for possible tic Receptionist swore could not not fit me in I'm right around the corner - would not even consider seeing my dog !!!!! 4 phone calls Does the Vet know how she turns away patients Like seriously !!!!!!??? Shawn

i had an appt. with the geek squad, and i was helped about 20 minutes late . The guy fixed the problem but was some what rude and acted like he wished he was any where but there . Customer service is not that good, but they did fix the problem.
Spinach bacon pizza toout, its best to get their as early as you are able as they do not keep your food in a warmer, but on the front shelf near the register. At least that was my experience.
I like Nuddy's I usually only get the waffles witch are good my son has gotten other things from there he said it was pretty good
Food: 3.5 Decor: 3 Ambiance: 2 Service: 4.5 Value: 4 It definitely has the hotel lobby restaurant vibe going on, but the food is pretty good, and the service here is great.

Of course, they are overly friendly and nice and the treats are delicious but they never have a variety of waterice. It's like the same six or seven flavors everyday. I wish they would change it up a bit.

Gotta send some mail? This is a great place to do it. Send mail, that is. Seriously, though, the staff here is very friendly, lines aren't very long, and it doesn't smell like feet or piss or anything. Mailing is good. Viva la posta!

Interior looks nice and the service is good. The rolls are a little too large and expensive for my taste, but the cuts of fish are generally pretty good. For American-style sushi I'd rather go to Woksabi, and for the real deal Sagami and Fuji are miles ahead.
First time here. Ok nothing extravagent or special. I guess I would go back again if I was really hungry and in the area, but I would not make a special trip.

Big selection, but very stingy people. The person who helped me was very nice and helpful, but a lot of the others seemed rude. I have always gotten measured before, but they would not measure me unless I was definitely buying the dress, never heard of that.

Its friggin INOUT and its closer to me than ever before... I go its nice and clean its sorta out of the way by itself and seems to have reasonable traffic because of that.... Expect shorter waits for the same great taste of fresh fries, and great burgers.....
Food was good, a lot of choices and reasonable prices but when we went to pay they already included the tip for the waiter $5.29 for a tip at a buffet?!

Cozy, genuine place for hot gumbo. Bread pudding is excellent and service is quick and friendly. Not sure why the veggie gumbo is served unseasoned, I ended up spicing it with what was available at the table... Came away feeling like I missed out on serious Cajun flavor.
Don't bother coming here after 9 even if they stop serving at 930 because they will rush you pit before you can even order drinks.food is pretty good and not greasy, but a bit overpriced.
Great fajitas and tres leches good, but service poor. It was not busy, but the two female servers in here appear to be more interested in their cellphones than they do in serving the customers.

Worst bangs trim ever!!! Avoid this place. I left with my bangs still soaking wet, and had to go home and recut it because she missed a huge chunk and it was crooked. My 3yo would have done a better job!
My wife's steak was almost raw, her baked potato undercooked. When asking for a replacement meal, the server said "I suggest a different type of potato because they're all like this". Really?

Horrible experience. Went for an upper lip wax and told the stylist that I had sensitive skin but she still ripped the skin off my upper lip leaving me with a huge raw wound during the holidays. Wish I could get my money back, so disappointed.

With the ad currently running again with the idiot in the green suit - I would rather walk that buy a car from this company. If they have to stoop to this annoying level of advertising then I can only expect what they are selling is also crap.

The store is clean and well organized but they offer the same products as other stores in the area but are more expensive. Even with the items on sale. I'll stick to Trader Joe's and Natural Grocers for now.

Went today with my hubby and there were at least 4 tables available to sit at and were told there was a 45 minute wait. No one else was waiting but some tables were reserved. Not happy. We will not be coming back!!
Food was good but my Raw Oysters were dirty with pieces of sand and shell inside the shuckers did not do a great job in keeping the dirt out.

We will not return. When the check Was delivered I gave the server an Entertainment coupon. I was told they no longer honored that deal No poster was on the door telling us they no longer honored the coupon. Not good. Deceptive practice.

I really wish somebody would get on the ball and recognize that Weso's is dead priced drinks with good pours Great and fast staff service Expanded outside seating Plenty of live music A place i use to avoid is now the obvious inheritant of the Ron's SchoolHouse transplant regulars.

Worst place ever. Trust me!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! You'd be better off living on the street. As you can see from other reviews, they are dishonest and greedy and will take your last dollar for anything they can make up. Run the other way.
Hands down, the best Dim Sum I've found in Pinellas! Clean, classy, and great food selection - just be prepared to wait if you order from the standard menu rather than the Dim Sum.

We had heard so many good things about the east side location that we had high expectations for the south side location. We've only picked up cooked food. It appears they have a big selection of raw fresh fish & will try that before stopping our patronage.

The cutest place in Bown Crossing the friendliest servers and the most delish food ever. Breakfast, brunch and lunch only, so get in early on the weekend especially if it's too cold to sit outside, cuz it'll be packed inside.

Saturday brunch. The food was really good and a great breakfast menu. However the wait was awful. Was very satisfied with my food and the classy environment but wouldn't recommend coming here because you end up spending a couple hours here.
Really delicious meal and amazing service. Everything about this place is 5/5, we got the whole red snipper, dozain of oysters with the salad and the potatoes - I recommend it to everybody.

Service was extremely slow due to our waitress. My Tampqueña plate which was a piece of steak, a cheese enchilada, rice and beans was sub-par. Sad because this place was much better on my previous visit but then again we were one of the only customers here.

The driveout. Nuggets were dry and had been sitting for a while. Not great - the sundae machine was working, at least, and the summer ice slushies were smaller than years past it feels like, but still refreshing on a very hot day.

Absolutely wonderful experience. The technicians are professional, efficient, and not unaware that the procedure is uncomfortable! After 6 Brazilian sessions, I have seen about an 80% reduction in hair growth, and after 5 under arm sessions, I have seen almost 100% hair reduction! I am incredibly happy with the results.
I have only ever ordered out, so I cant speak to the atmosphere, but they have the best Arroz con Polo in Brownsburg.
Great food Bread Pudding is amazing Nice local space Staff nice in the front Accommodates large group Pecan pie banging Fish and crab cakes were food I recommend this place and prices are reasonable

Green chile beef soup was pretty good. Venison was OK. Wine was good. Service was good. Liked the ambiance. May have earned a 4 star if I had more data points, but I have to rate it on my one and only experience.
Kwalnut miniPaul is a great experience if you're looking to spend a little more in New Orleans on some magically seasoned meats, killer appetizers, and awesome bread.
Otherwise great location but girls in deli run and hide in side break area and talk when they see customers come.

Ordered Spicy shrimp tempura roll came with soup, soup was in a white cup bowl filled almost half way only had a few veggies n 2 mushrooms smh so sad, the Spicy shrimp tempura was good though wasn't spicy but... it was edible.

What kind of company doesn't back up their repairs? ICracked. Can't believe they damaged my daughter's phone and then are not taking any responsibility to repair it and get it back in a timely manner. I will never use iCracked.

I was looking for awhile for a used mattress for my son because I thought I couldn't afford a new mattress, but then I found Santa Barbara Mattress and with them I was able to afford a good quality matters at a great price.
I paid $75 for my food, I only ordered 2 things and they forgot one of the dishes and didn't have anyone to bring me my missing order. Said they would refund me but still waiting never again

By far our favorite place to hang and day drink thanks to affordable alc and a crazy fun vibe with dancing, karaoke and so much more! Grab a drink from elsewhere and then stop here for the atmosphere if need be.
Enjoyed the spicy chicken sandwich. I was shocked that the drive thru window gal said she didn't have any change so she rounded up my bill to make it even money. WTF?
Hey the customer service here is literally amazing one of the employee's took down my order wrong by accident and they fixed it no problem with a great attitude
Made it to Louis Armstrong airport at 8:00 am for a 10:30 flight and the line to check bags was 1 -2 hours long. Absolutely ridiculous!!!!!
Milkshake was decent but not worth the 65+ min wait from the register on top of the 15 min wait in the line.

The sales and management team is a disgrace. They over promise and greatly under deliver compounded with no follow up. Corporate should take a hard look at this, but on a better note the cafe staff as well as front desk staff are friendly and inviting.

We had a non-insurance repair done to remove rust and repaint around the windshield and rear window of our older Tacoma. The work done looks great and was done in a timely fashion. We would use Fix Auto Reno again.

Floors were not particularly clean. Disappointed there is no breakfast since it states online that there is AND the display sign out in the street days b-fast. This is very bad management in my opinion.

Really good waiters super nice fries amazing overall best burger ever. The burger was like I was in heaven it was delicious my brother had the buffalo wings also they were amazing it's was the best place I've ever at. You should definitely go there

Wow I didn't realize something as simple as trying to locate the store's phone number would send me on such an adventure! Apparently the stores have no contact numbers, and the only numbers I could find were to the corporate office which is of course closed on weekends^

I recently moved to Boise from California and I've been searching for a good Pho place and I have finally found it. This place is AMAZING!!!! I've been here at least once a week and I totally recommend it.

While the smoke was ok on the meats the sauces were lackluster, ribs had no crust and were not very tender. The bbq is acceptable but underwhelming. Whole hog meat quality was the highlight. If there is a line I would not waste my time.

Tis the Season to be Jolly!! If you're having some trouble this is the perfect place with all the christmas spirit at this christmas-inspired French Quarter store. From ornaments to lights, you will have a plethora of options. And the prices are right. Happy Pickings!!

I wasn't impressed. I hoped for the best due to the price and wait time but on top of the girl taking our order with the attitude as if we were bothering her with our first time there, I doubt I'll be dropping another $100 on dinner at Fat Jack's.

What an unpleasant experience. I'm giving 2 stars because the clerk with long hair was very nice and I think a bit embarrassed by his extremely rude co sorry for the people that work there. If he isn't - fire that rude and pretentious guy.

Had ppl just standing there. The burgers were just covered in sauce and the patty was drie and u could tell that they don't change the oil for the fryer cuz my fries came out dark and covered with black stuff from the previous food that was fried there
Great experience at this location highly recommend the locals to try this car wash thanks again for a wonderful experience Justin.

Good enough rental place. Everyone was friendly and helpful. The place is crazy busy all the time though, since it is right by a number of body shops and car dealerships. Get ready to wait est car on the planet. I would've rather had a damn Edsel.

Food was horrendous and was nearly inedible. However, you don't come cause it's great food. You come for the entertainment and the culture. With that being sad, don't ever bring a Karen here cause they will get offended and the waiters will cook them.

As if their customer service couldn't get any worse each box was large and although not really heavy, just large enough to be clumsy He LITERALLY STOOD THERE watching me struggle with the boxes Way to train the employees who are in the CUSTOMER SERVICE field - just awful!!!!!!!!!!!!!
They WILL NOT stop charging your bank account no matter how many times you go to the gym and tell them you want to cancel your membership.

Use to love this place and visited every time I was in St. Pete. Tried to stop by today, but apparently you can't park in their parking lot unless you are a member of some parking club? Sign actually says to Uber or walk there?!?! Sadly went somewhere else.
Best place ever I don't know why people saying this yes they included 15 % so what they work for tips why not . Food it's delicious
Called Monday 9/17 lady who answered the phone was super rude and told me they would call me the next day because I needed an appointment and then they never called! Won't try again!

I am on a wedding on the Spirit of Philadelphia and all I hear is "nigga" coming from their speakers. It would have been nice to respect the ceremony on the Spirit or the fact kids are on the boat and on Penns Landing. Trashy boat....

Located inside the mall, lowest level food court - this place is quick and offers the best burger option in the area. Free refill on drinks, extra scoop of fries as usual, this place is definitely a plus to have in the mall.

Excellent appetizers and lamb. Steak was good but a bit overdone. Staff were lovely and the atmosphere was relaxed. A long wait in the bar downstairs but well worth it - and made more pleasant by the bartender and the live music. Would definitely go back !!
Recently have noticed a number of times where the pies toppings are a bit skimpy. We usually get a half and half and the end up being 1/3 and 1/3 with a bare space in between. Go figure
POSITIVES: + There's a driveFinding cute things to shop for when you really just need to grab a meal and quit shopping!
Wonderful location in Flourtown :)) Had a great facial with Bridget skin feels fantastic :)) I will be back again soon

Terrible restaurant restrooms are ugly its completely for viamatnies I am not sure about other dishes but I ordered salmon main{13.99} course and chicken grill fried rice 11.99 both were bad and chicken was too hard to chew.
Couple times I've gone to this chilis it's awful including the service, first thing we sit down and the knives are filthy with food and our food was terrible.
Food was ok the service was horrible but I gave it a 3 because of there traditional decor and clothing #chic

I went in for a replacement SIM card last month, and they tried to sell me a case, screen protector, and insurance plan. I declined all, but this month I see my bill has a new $27 insurance charge added. Check your plan features after visiting this place.

my daughter ordered from here just because it was close..MISTAKE, this found has weird brown colored fried rice that was mushy, beef that smelled old and must wonton soup that was probably week sold. this place is so bad yuck

This is the third time I've been to this location and it was closed, even though it was during their normal business hours. I like the food, but I'm tired of driving over here to find out they are not open. Off to Pita plus.

Was my home pub until Si decided that explicit lyric songs are no longer acceptable on the juke box of a 21+ establishment...don't waste your time coming here..go see Ashley @J Clyde's or hit "The Butler Inn"

I often just come for the drinks as i don't think this restaurant is anything spectacular to any other Mexican restaurant in the city. I do, however, come for one appetizer: get your freak on queso! This appetizer is a must and will change the way you eat queso!
Overpriced, crowded seating and an outdated/poor method for reservations to even be able to dine-in. My bad experience may not be the norm, but it was bad enough for me to have to write this review.
I really enjoy this restaurant, which is located just off the lobby of the Fort Harrison historic hotel in downtown Clearwater. The food is absolutely excellent. The chefs are 5)
Won't go back Hamburger under cooked Rubber chicken in the Chinese chicken salad, , , They don't space tables for social distancing.
My cat Lagniappe was quite ill throwing up for 4 days, Took him to the Cat Practice and the fixed him right up. He is now home with his brother and feeling quite fiesty
30 minute wait & food not only incorrect but also burnt, shouldn't have to try a sandwich in the parking lot to make sure it's edible.

Greatest environment overall good ambience best service all the food is really really spicy so be careful with what you order. Overall experience was cool I was very pleased with the fast service our server was great. Regarding the guacamole it was chunky not so great guacamole.
Worst hamburger I have ever eaten. Sorry folks but wife and I both got the classic burger and well needless to say it was some gray meat looking patty with zero flavor !

Everything is way way too salty! We had the chicken rice soup, lots of chicken, but even diluted with some hot water, it was still too salty. The French dip was tasty but again too salty. Cannot eat this food!
TGIF is a franchise if you have ever been to a TGIF it is the same atmosphere and food as them all. Service is good, especially from the experienced servers.

Good atmosphere. Great beer selection. Keep in mind it was only the 2nd day it was open, but the waitress struggled through the menu and cook/waitress forgot a section of our meal. This is their second restaurant, they have another in Webster Groves. Average meal $16 beer $5-7
Tasty firestorm in my mouth Water boiled fish is solid Chili oil dumplings are addictive Super addictive, schezuan style Chinese food

My husband and I, waited more than two hours, yes 2 hours just for appetizers, the food isn't what you see in the photos, and my french onion soup was very very salty. The best think was the corona beer lol. Don't waste your time.

I will make this short and sweet, stay very very far away from this company, we have had nothing but nightmares with this company, we are in the process as of right now is to hiring at an attorney because we cannot get any information from them.

Well they have sent two more letters since the first, both have the same words. So it was not a one off! Still a bait and switch, will be either driving to Phoenix for the next upgrade or the other Toyota dealership here in town.
I don't have anything to compare it to, but I have a lot of fun climbing there, even though I'm not that good. I guess it's a little pricey, but what do you expect with no alternatives?

"I only do quotes with walkthrough, and yes, if you go to mcdonalds and order a pizza you may be disappointed." So obviously a small move 1/2 mile away from a previously happy customer who has referred them dozens of times means jack crap.

We all love The little one and I thought they should of just kept the original name, because of the flavor of their food is nothing little about. Still, get your chef combo plate it might go over your lunch budget but Its worth it.
stopped by this store to get a money order and Alex Bernal and his manager Gordon were very nice and helpful.

Horrible management service. Sold me a car over the phone showed up had the wrong interior and they tried to continue to sell it to me. They double sold the vehicle I wanted and wouldn't budge to make it right. Very disappointed.
Mouth on fire... Not 100% sure if it's the Great Basin 20th Anniversary Ale or the award winning hot wings but who-wheee my mouth is on fire. Totally worth the 8 minute walk in the snow to get here!

Solid sportsbook. Not a lot of screens of games but the screens for lines and totals are easy to read. There's a 24-hour William Hill kiosk which makes life easy if you wanna place a bet in the middle of the night.

We visited Oceana Grill a few times and weren't disappointed with the service nor the food. The po'boys come dressed with coleslaw and remoulade sauce which makes them so much better than just a dry po'boy we've had elsewhere.
So supportive and friendly! Arrived late during the week with a decent amount of items to return & Rafeek was SO pleasant and patient with me. This place deserves five stars. Stay professional :)
This place is great the juices are great the Acia bowls are great my favorite is the nutty bowl but I giving it a 3 star because it is quite pricey.Sometimes having to pay up to 50$ per meal.

I like this but; Pros: large portions good food cool atmosphere Cons: over priced charge extra$$$ for take out!!!!! Alway under estimate the time for a waiting attitude with people handling take out this place charges $$$ per carton for your take out on top of the normal

What's the point of having business hours if everything is ALWAYS already cleaned up, put up, and ran out well before closing time? Do your customers a favor and not waste there time. I hope the restaurant doesn't operate like this too.

I would never recommend this company. There were several boxes that never got delivered after having been in storage between moves. Called the office to asked if they would check if any boxes were left never called back then had to call again. The movers were very inexperienced .

We had a taste for pizza but wanted to try some place new so we saw Amici had wood fired pizza so we gave it a shot. We had mushroom and olive and it was amazing. It had great flavor, great crispy crust, and we'd definitely repeat.

I have to admit a vulgar affection for kitsch, and Black Bear Diner with its wall of bearshirts and coffee mugs, glass case heavily stocked with individual cherry and cream pies, and cozy booths eerily reminiscent of Denny's in its heydey had me at its newspaperwaddling upon our reluctant departure.

OMG. The BBQ nacho/potato chips were to die for!!!! The kettle chips were perfect and cooked to a nice crisp then piled high with tender pulled pork, flavorful BBQ sauce, shredded cheese and then more melted cheeses I wanted more more more!!!!

First visit here and the place was impressive. Staff was friendly even though they were busy and the buffalo cauliflower was amazing. Throw in a great recommendation on a good gin from the bartender and this place was a five out of f

Just OK hotdogs. Went with my son and was expecting a better hotdog from a place that only really does hotdogs. I am not a fan of boiled hotdogs and as other reviewers have said the quality of their hotdogs is not great. One more hotdog for my last sentence.

Great food but the cook times are all over the place often erring on the side of long. I would avoid this place if you have anywhere you have to be soon after as you will surely be late, even if you order ahead for take out.
the lady taking orders tonight called me sir. i am a woman who came from working a 12 hour shift as a nurse in a hospital and all i wanted was a nice night and some ice cream and i got called a dude.
This is a 3.5 star review, and here's the breakdown: On the side of 4 stars: 1) Beautiful space with an open, Sanwe poured the soup into it which improved things a bit. 5) Food is preto-order.

After multiple visits $10 is cool for a sandwich if there was something on it and the bread has some character. fries undercooked, cold, its lunch time? no taste cheap cheap service is almost non existent Maplewood deserves better

If you are looking for creative cuisine that happens to be perfectly prepared pizza this is the hidden gem you've been looking for. The market salad is handsto pizza outing spot. It is something pretty special.

Food, ambience and service are average. We were directed to go next door to Sasha's to get a drink while waiting for two bar seats to open up. After dinner - wished we had stayed at Sasha's for dinner.

I went to five guys in Ewing yes it's pricey but the burgers and fries in vanilla milkshake were very good and I think the customer servicewas very friendly and they will help out in anyway and the store is absolutely spotless

What can I say about starbucks that hasnt already been said? Well, this place had a really cool and friendly vibe that made me want to stick around a while and enjoy my slightly burt tasting coffee:-)
Food is tasty although the cafe is filthy dirty, employees don't speak English Very Unfriendly I don't know that I would recommend it.

Excellent value; consistently delicious. Jose's burritos are excellent, they have great lunch specials which all include rice and beans, and the staff is quick and super-friendly. It's worth going out of your way for if you want great food and don't want to spend a lot.

Tamera did magic on my hair! Best haircut in a long time. So happy to have found her and her salon in Reno, since we moved here from Marin to Truckee a few months ago. And yes, she is totally worth the drive from Truckee!

Worst place ever. Ordered combination seafood platter and nola bbq shrimp to go. They did not give any dipping sauce and forgot the salad. Of course when we went back to get the salad there was no dressing on the salad or on the side. Never going back again.

Big on charm, less so on service. Went in once for gelato, and when someone finally got up and wandered to the counter to help me, the gelato ended up being disappointing and a little bland. Have not been back to try their sandwiches, maybe someday.
My g/f and I visited this place about a month ago, and I have to say it wasn't bad at all. Good food, nice atmosphere and great service, loved their desserts.

Had a cake that was brought in at work and it tasted like mold. These cakes are not made fresh daily and some of the cookies have had freezer taste to them before but thought I'd give it another chance and was not impressed.

Great and prompt service. Was running low, dangerously low. Requested my refills on Friday on my app, with 2 day shipping, and literally got them today, in really just 1 business day. THANK YOU EXPRESS SCRIPTS.

Loved the savory salmon crepe for breakfast. Staff was friendly but not very experienced. Wouldn't say their menus has a ton of options but overall good food and great price point for catching up with friends.

Atmosphere was hip and interesting, food was okay. To start, we ordered the chilled avocado soup wise and didn't seem to have enough sauce. Overall, would go again for drinks as it was a really fun atmosphere but would probably eat dinner elsewhere before/after drinks

The service is good, but the food is just above average. We ordered hot pot. the Qing Tang soup in the hot pot is really nice, while the Spicy Tang in the hot pot has strong herb taste, which I don't like.

For the past 3 years this location has consistently been terrible. Whether it's that the 4 people behind the desk are too busy to help people in a timely fashion, too disinterested, too self I guess it's the Fishers fed ex location for me from here on.
I orederd an ice coffee and it was a solid ice coffee. Would have liked to have tried their drip, but it was 90 degrees outside so I couldn't bring myself to do it.

Friendly knowledgeable low pressure sales staff helped us find exactly what we wanted. My only complaint is they didn't throw in a free mattress protector since they failed to mention it and had a promotion at the register. Other than that great overall experience.
We had to bring a family member to the ER and everyone was very nice, but I would think a hospital ER room would be cleaner.
Solid bar with fun atmosphere. We stopped here only briefly, so I can't say much about the food or beer, but drinks were good and having a large connect 4 and jenga always is a plus.

I am going to be in the minority here with my review 3 day old heated up meat with tomato sauce on top, seasoned very heavily with cinnamon. Very strange combination of flavors that didn't go well together.

I want to love this place, really I do. The price is OK for the food to get. But the service just isn't that great. I don't know if it's the management style, or the company expectation or what, but I am left feeling unsatisfied every time I go here.
Great French Dip. Menu is a bit eclectic, they could ditch the Mexican food, doesn't quite fit with what they are trying to do. Awesome location in historic St. Charles, very clean and cute.

Don't ever order catering from this location. When I arrived at my scheduled pick-up time, they had no record of my order, nothing was prepared, and no one spoke English so it was impossible to get help. Terrible experience.

Well executed breakfast with lots of options. big portions little prices Maybe 15 minute wait ? Fast service . The shrimp and grits was outstanding the broccoli Rob and sausage frittata same Scrap it was okay- I still like Habbersets the best.

Slowest service in Brandon for a Restaurant with half the tables of your normal restaurant. Granted the food is great, and the unlimited mimosas are a great reason to come here, but plan to spend half your day here while watching the staff stand around.
Food is ok, nothing special, i ordered online and they messed it up pretty bad, but aw well it's still food, nothing special at all, just another place to have an average meal

Some cute stuff, but the prices are borderline ludicrous. They're charging $59 for the same Ikea plates I bought online for $24. I mean, more power to them if people are buying their stuff, but I didn't see much that I'd be willing to pay that kind of premium for.
Dr Gooberman is very sweet and their waiting office is very nice for both kids and "teens" teen room is pretty tacky and kinda bad but the doctors and nurses are good overall:)
I appreciate the staff wearing gloves. However if you just mopped the floor, played with your hair & adhudted your hat, maybe you should consider changing them before servicing food & drinks.
The food was good, but our server Lakeem was fantastic!! I was visiting the area for event for He weekend, and was recommended to try this restaurant by a friend of a friend. Not bad!

Good ambiance and good coffee, will definitely come back . The evening time is very crowded and sometimes you need to wait to get a seat, so try to get there with some wait time as an addition to your planned stay there
Good atmosphere, very limited and overpriced menu selection for what you get. During warm weather the patio is nice, but I'm not sure if I'd come back here on the regular with other options nearby.

This is hands down my favorite barbecue place in St Louis I like it more than pappys Bogarts and way more then bandannas. Everything I've tried it's been fantastic ribs are great briskets great salmon sides are fantastic. Must try!

Definitely over rated and must be so due to tourists who do not understand that there are much better choices in this town. Grime everywhere as well. There are much better choices here. Look around and notice that this has a low rating compared to other places.
The Pretzel Bun Pub Burger is not the Pub Burger. The Pub Burger is a solid 10/10 but the Pretzel Bun Pub Burger is a slight downgrade from the original but a solid 7/10.
I had higher expectations with the baguette I got here; it looked and felt right, but the bread was pretty bland.

If you like gardening and beautiful landscaping, you should check this out. Over the years they have created a beautiful display of just about all the plants you can grow in the area. It has been here for many years, so the plantings are mature and beautiful.

The manager had the audacity to ask me to leave with my dog in respect of their "service animal only" policy. I own a whippet. On a leash. Well trained. So no more rei for me. Im going to local outdoor stores.

If you like noisy this place is for you. On saturdays this place is full of spiked hair, tribal tattoos, black tee shirt, bedazzled jeans meatheads watching MMA on most of the screens. Mediocre food and understaffed
I was in the mood for a big delicious burger and five guys hit the spot. Topped with the onions, mushrooms and peppers I was only able to eat 4 bites but it definitely satisfied my cravings.
I like the option of a blended fruit beverage without dairy. The strawberry banana option was delicious, it separated quickly but also swirled back together quickly with a twirl of the straw.
Food and service horrible but good vibe in music, and it is pretty chill in here compared to the big boys on Broadway in Nashville
Went for a front derailer check and he made it actually worse I had called early to be at the shop by a certain time. Altho I got there before then, the derailer guy had just left.

It may no longer be a large chain with a racist sign, but the food sure does taste like it still is. Add to that it's tourist location guarantees a long line on the weekend and it's truly a pointless breakfast destination.

Not bad! I went here for lunch today with an old friend and colleague of mine who loves it here. She had a 4 star Chicken Parm and I had a really small, but tasty piece of Lasagna can't beat that! I will definitely be back.

The service was very good and very good COVID-19 protection was good. Food was adequate, not exciting. Lemon chicken was good but looked like they lawyered a slice of ham & cheese on the meat & put it under a broiler, not good.
So sick!!! Staff was terrible and the produce tasted funky now I've been sick for 3 days!!!!! I'm so sad because Quiznos was my favorite for years and I was so excited to have one by my house again!!
0 when in fact its just a rinky dink bar and grill He did nothing when I called to complain that we got misinformed about Sunday brunch please don't bother with this 2bit operation- YUK!!

Unfortunately a rather unsatisfactory dining experience. I order their best cut of bone in ribeye and the quality of meat was substandard with lots fatty parts you couldn't even cut through. But they were gracious enough and did not charge me for the steak.
I just wish they had more in stock ! :( Every time I go they never have the NYX Matte lipsticks but other than that this is my number one store .
Absolute crappy service at night, don't know about the day but they are taking forever and I've been waiting for my food for 40 minutes now. Will never come back here. It's ridiculous
Cool atmosphere was able to seat right away Nice beer selection Cons Salty chicken Not sure if it completely would pass a health check but, won't complain if I find my way there again.

Trying to establish new service and was surprisingly mistreated by representative Andrew 3177487. If this is the way they treat future clients, I cant imagine how I would be treated after I gave them my $Money$.....!
Great meat, great service, but for the love of god don't get the darn spring water it's a ripoff that's why it's 3 stars. It's $7 for it and tastes exactly like the regular filter water!

Captain James put us on the fish! We have been on a family vacation for a week in the area, my teenage son and daughter said our fishing trip with Lowe Tide Fishing Charters was the highlight of our trip. Highly recommended, you will have a great time.

The food is good, and its pretty fast if you're looking to eat quickly. The restaurant itself is plain, and the service is impersonal. I ordered the chicken biriyani and it was good, but I ordered it at a spicy level medium, and was definitely expecting more spice.

Hooters south county- TERRIBLE. Carrryout order was expensive ; the wings were cold, gummy and far too hot, even though we ordered half mild, half medium. Grocery store chicken would have been a superior choice.

Outstanding service. Food is some of the best in Media. Other breakfast venues in the borough need to take note. Pancakes, French Toast BLTs, Pineapple stuffing ham sandwich, Brown Sugar and spiced thickly cut bacon and Fair Trade coffee set the pace for a very good menu.
Beer is fair. Dog area is disappointing. If you are going to have dog in your name, you should allow dogs in more than 5% of your real estate.
When I am researching where to go to dinner, I a few key factors help influence my decision: Stellar table service Fun, themed ambiance -you're bound to enjoy yourself.
Haven't eaten here but I'm from the south and I don't see anything on this menu or the pics I would call SOUTHERN

Terrible service, didn't get what I ordered, went back to get what they forgot and nobody even said sorry sir. Wouldn't recommend this McDs I have lived near this location for 15 years and this is the worst McDs in town. Stay away from it

I still think I like Bogarts more then Pappys... not sure why. But that burnt ends is out of this world and so are their sauces. If you are visiting Stl and want bbq this is 1 of like 3 places I recommend along with Pappys and Shaved Duck

Its cool for Pho if you're on the WestBank and hard up, but there are most definitely WAAAAYYYYYY better places to have Vietnamese cuisine. If you're looking for something quick and cheap this will do...just don't expect 5 stars.
Food is good however the service can be very spotty. Was there for lunch when there were only a few other guests and the waitress was MIA and the food took too long to come out

The beer selection is amazing! A huge selection of local drafts and even more in bottles and cans. Was surprised to see 4 sours on tap. Looked like a former repair shop but it was nice to have the roll up doors open and a food truck on site.

A tiny place with limited seating inside or outside. We found one availabe spot right next to the front ordering station, which was a bit awkward with a line of people right next to us. Sandwiches, paninis, salads and drinks were all good.
Everyone was very polite, and the Ultra sound technician was very professional and friendly She really checked every part of the stomach area. She followed the correct protocol.

Picked up a half dozen fancies- one of each flavor. And while the grapefruit brûlée and chocolate peanut butter were amazing, and the blueberry mascarpone good enough, the honey, glazed, and chocolate glazed were far from fancy and totally forgettable.

Didn't get the chance to eat, my party of 5 was sat a table with leftover rice on table and salsa and chips on the chairs.Good indicator for the cleanliness of the kitchen. I'll pass on going back not a big fan of food poisoning.

Apparently the "good" bartender doesn't work on Fridays... Bartenders waited on three other couples and served food to the first couple before another regular patron asked them to serve us... NOT COMING BACK SOON... She just said her name... Arianna.
The food in this place is delicious. The best creamy vanilla iced coffee I've ever had and if you like french toast definitely try the cinnamon french toast batons, they're amazing!!!

Kamara must have eaten all the oatmeal todaywhy even put it on the menu if you don't serve it? Update: last time I was here I ordered the chicken biscuit:( biscuits were hard as a rock: note to fire martial: see attached picture of door
Great sandwiches but I've mostly been talked down to and felt like I was a bother when I called to order food. Would be a 5 star review if I didn't get such rude service.
There is no place better in the world to be than the Indianapolis Motor Speedway, especially in the month of May!
This place is the worst. I patronize even during the pandemic and not once have they honored "Happy Hour", which it clearly advertises as 4-7 on their receipt.
I love this place, the rice is so awesome and really a surprise but one of the best wing places in Tucson as well!

This location is not your typical Chuy's. I've eaten it a lot of Chuy's in my lifetime and the menu seems a lot smaller at this location than any of the others. The food came out lukewarm but still had those great Tex-Mex flavors the Chuy's are known for

Chunks of chilled sweet lobster spilling out of a perfectly toasted roll, so what's not to like? The whopping price for a single lobster roll. I won't gripe about the sensible portion, but 16 bucks could buy an equally scrumptious and filling meal and then some.
Still some good finds but it could be so much better. If the daily rent were lower, place were cleaned up and the fake items were removed this place could be a great flea market.

Extremely upset with how this establishment caters to its customers. I came here a few days ago for burger week and they would not accommodate my meat-less diet by allowing me to replace it with the falafel burger.

We ordered through Seamless. Waited 2 hours and after numerous call of being lied to was made aware that they never even prepared our food. They told us initially it was out the door for delivery but that was never the case. At least tell us what the status is.

Our server was not around long enough to order a new drink let alone ask for a napkin. Out chicken wings were so under cooked we lost our appetite ans the kitchen was so backed up my husband and I just paid and left.
This review is not to take away from the great services provided by Southern Oaks, BUT they should do something about providing adequate parking for ALL guest. There is NOT enough parking.

I am madly in love with the Black Bean and Rice Salad! And, the best restaurant to buy it "to go" is the Harding location as their BBQ dressing containers are the biggest! Tell 'em to go easy on the lettuce though... sometimes it gets a bit overwhelming.
They were a lot faster than any other McDonald's I been to before and they didn't ask me to pull up wow

Management reached out to me to try to make things right. I appreciate their effort and will upgrade to 2 stars for that but unfortunately I don't think they can change quality and taste of food and as I am out of town, I certainly won't be back.
Diamond is a great car service, I've been a customer since 2009 and they are always on time, reliable and professional. Best way by far to get in & out of Tucson or Phoenix airports.

Very small restaurant with a small menu. The food is OK, but the croquetas are amazing. It's an easy place to find a seat in the evening and they have a nice variety of beer and wine. but I usually feel like I'm settling on food.

Would give zero stars if I could, worse oysters and calamari in my life. Super low quality definitely not fresh. Was thinking ab giving the seafood boil side a try but honestly don't want to go back and I live 4 blacks away

Sat at the bar with RJ on a Monday night. I tried to describe the drink I wanted to the bartender, and as soon as I said swirl she knew it was the Georgia Peach. We had great drinks and great service. I should have ordered cheesecake!!

Only giving 2 stars because location was perfect. There were hairs all over my sheets, the carpet had not even been vacuumed, and the walls were so thin you could hear everybody's conversations in the courtyard. Would not come back despite location.
Brunch menu comprises several egg Benedicts, chick / waffle, shrimp and grits and steak The green tomato bene is tangy, smokey and Rich .

Would definitely not come back. The menu has basically zero healthy options and the service was terrible. The restaurant was less than half full, we ordered super basic things, and it took over an hour to get our food. Crazy!

An amazing financial institution I've been with for years. Never had any surprises or issues up until recently, but their customer service was very helpful at getting matters resolved rather promptly. So good job!
Just got a slice of pizza from there can't wait to get home and try it so glad they have a cheeseless option for my dairy we allergy

What a piece of crap, delivered the entire order wrong and as a business traveler I have an early flight tomorrow. Someone on the phone said we'll be back with right order in 30, 4 hour ordeal and dude shows up beating on my door just now...terrible experience.
Amazing sushi. Had the "all you can eat" deal and found the fish to be fresh, rolls to be well made and good appetizers. Great value.
This place has good food the curry is a little Sweet but all in all perfect place to get Thai food the mango with sticky rice is amazing

If you're in the French Quarter and want to sit down with a drink while you listen to live music indoors, this is the place! The bands are always talented, and servers don't mind at all if you want to just order a drink, sit back, and enjoy the blues.
Great location but motel very dingy and old, dirty too no pool and no air so if you get 2nd floor, get ready to melt paid over 300 for one night, never again
So cheap and so delicious! While we were eating a guy came in shortly after they stopped serving food and they made something for him anyway. Great service! Definitely try the pirogies.

Not the cleanest S&S I've ever been to, but the waitresses are phenomenal at keeping up with the busy lunch rush. I'll take sticky floors over a 2 hour wait any day. Do yourself a favor. Go. Order the Frito's Chili Cheese Steakburger. Thank me later.

Extremely unprofessional all around. Didn't have a shuttle even though I had requested one with my appointment. I would suggest going anywhere but here if possible. Then lied about the wait time being one hour, took almost two, so do not believe them when they tell you the waig time.

My family loves Perkins. Before we started going here we would ask my daughter where she wanted to eat and it was always chick fil a or McDonald's but now it's always Perkins. Their burgers are pretty good and you can't go wrong with any breakfast item on the menu.

Cool place right off the water and broadway, but I wouldn't recommend the sweet potato fries, the dipping sauce isn't great and they were super soft. Friendly people there, though! Decent number of beer on tap
Everything on the menu is awesome and the soda that they have is made from cane sugar and it's really good too.

The shop owners and employees are very nice. However, I got a full set and gel and I am extremely disappointed with the results The gel seems cheap and is not smooth. I've had them for a week and half and need a fill-in and color change already
Great food, great bloody marys, beautiful waitress, but loser playing guitar when im hungover really hurts the team and docks the lime 2 stars

Horrible - please do not go here... Had appt came 15 mins early with all paperwork filled out and sat there for 45 mins and told them to cancel my appt and left. The customer service is awful they are rude and extremely unconsidered.

Reeked of acetone. Got a basic manicure where the edges of my nails were really sharp and had remnants of polish on four fingers. Also, they had no air dryers only uv lights which I don't like hence the reason I don't get gel.
Baby back ribs are rubbery, pulled pork is a little fatty but the sweet Kansas sauce is really good and mash potato balls are really good
Food is amazing!! But the service needs improvement We kept having to flag down our waiter restaurant was empty just us and 2 other tables. They had enough employees just standing around

I ate there today for the first time and it was really good! The employee was so friendly and told me what the most popular empanadas were - Beef & Cheese and Spinach Artichoke. I will definitely be back to try more
This place has been here for ever at least as long as I can remember and always has good food, nice atmosphere, friendly staff, and fair prices...
I tried a few different flavors and didn't think anything was that noteworthy - all the flavors were fine but nothing that packed a huge flavor bunch and no unique/standout flavors.

Much like the other reviews, the prices are a bit steep. But, I had a group meeting here and we enjoyed the atmosphere and food enough to make it a regular meeting place. I had the meatloaf and it was pretty good.

A long time Sparks business near downtown, they do a good job for most of your auto repairs. Went to the customer appreciation BBQ the other night for some burgers and dogs and some good saison from Under the Rose. Won a gift card in the raffle.
I'm a foe guy and this place has some of the best. Good atmosphere and vibe in the place. Typical nail salon decor but they actually had the Preds game on the TV instead of those odd Asian tv shows.
I heard great things about this place, I was disappointed, horrible food, all it tasted like was salt, I will never go here or any of their other locations again

+Convenient location +Rates are reasonable +HUGE hotel +Starbucks in the lobby +Staff is friendly +Gym facilities is pretty spacious, cardio equipment is updated & well maintained over -Ridiculous fee to use wireless

Came on Saturday at around 830AM waited in Drive-thru about 20 minutes, I was late for work my iced coffee was ALL Ice I'm very Disappointed!!!!!! Get Faster waiting that long and Still having drink made Wrong Is crap!!!

A gem. Monk's sets out to provide superb beer, superb mussels, and superb plates and exceeds the mark in all categories. What was once a little known holethe when they say "Small Mussels" they mean "These mussels could feed a small family"to-earth of a location Monk's really is.

Hi we're an overpriced, bunch of corporate jerks using "hip" young college students and professionals to sell recycled clothing at five times the cost! Oh Urban Outfitters do you really think it's fair to sell reprints of tshirts that you found at Goodwill for $18? Really?

They need some work on customer service I walked in first then 2 people after me and they helped those 2 people first and had me standing there waiting for 10 minutes before helping me. They have good product tho.

So you can not order the donuts you want because you will hold up the line and you get yelled at for asking if they are serious that you can not order your own donuts. So I guess you are to take what they decide you like. Never going back

The only complaint I have about this hotel is the fact that the only parking option is $20 a night valet. I don't have a problem paying the fee however I do have a problem that there is no note of this cost anywhere on the hotel's website.

If I could give no stars I would. Same as some other people stated. They quote you one price and then charge something completely different. The biggest problem I had is that the guy scared my wife so bad she wanted him out of the house immediately!

Went on the Oak Alley Plantation Tour. The bus driver was really good - gave lots of information and history on the bus ride. The only issue I had was that the attendant at the ticket counter next to Cafe du Monde was extremely rude and unprofessional.
Peculiar little place Not my style but not the reason for 3 of 5 Not the cleanest or the dirtiest just not acceptable for scrubbing my skin open
The waitresses stalk the tables constantly and they don't clean in between the chairs in the booths they don't clean up well it's gross gross I couldn't even tell who works here and who doesn't .
Workers lie about the saw on the lumber side of the store being broken, all they have to do is say the person who operates the saw isn't available but instead they lie and say the saw is broken

My friends hosted a birthday lunch for me here and we had the best time. The staff was so accommodating to our party, helped with every detail and the chef even came out to celebrate and help us cut the cake. Definitely recommend!
Lameo people Yes, they have a deep fryer and the food is below average. If your idea of a good time is hanging in a loud ass bar w/ dudes listening to Journey then "THIS BUD'S FOR YOU"

Ordered a birthday cake and when I went to pick up they are closed with a notice that they will reopen later and the result - a disappointed family at home. No one even called saying that they are closing due to whatever reason....never again

This was the cutest spa and super friendly! They helped my sister get set up with a great pedi and polish. You will want to call in for appointment because they are busy busy, but they do not let their service falter because of the busyness. They were amazing!
The view wasn't even that great, the carpet leading into the restaurant is gross, servers were not friendly, sat us at knee-high tables which were uncomfortable for our group and insufficient space,

We have been long time customers dining 2and this is the reason we can no longer exchange the unhealthy options for a healthy option. This is one of many reasons obesity is rampant in America. Again, appreciate the reply, however, we will no longer be dining at any Keke's.

Tried to support a local business during the quarantine. The calamari is sparse at best, and smells so bad we won't eat it. Also10 minutes after the food was supposed to be ready and waited a good 5-10 more just for the bartender to finish talking to her friend.

If you don't like soft serve it's not worth going. Their hand dip ice cream isn't good at all and the times I've gotten the hand dip it was freezer burnt. The water ice however is Rosattis and it's pretty good.

Well, as you can see from the reply from AJS to Steve that there will be no review and that they will submit it to customer service so that the next person might get better service. JP Morgan was right. Don't be one of them like me. Stay Away
NO stars I got food poisoning there. Will never go back. Sorry !! Not much else to say about this place like I said sorry I wish there was a Nother place to eat Basque food. Sorry

awwwfuuulllllllll!! i would not let my dogg eat here!! they don't post the prices on their menu board, and don't give you a bill at your table, so that you have to pay at the counter and they routinely have overavoid!!! avoid!! avoid!!!!!!!!*************

I just wanted to thank you for the great service your technician provided in fixing our ice machine, he was quick, responsive, a true professional and my wife and l look forward to using your services again should the need arise.
I will never order from this store again got my order after an hour then the driver told me sorry I forgot ur drink I will bring it to you within 20mn so funny !!! Never seen that ...
I love Cross Culture. It's tucked away and you might miss it, but if you're a fan of Indian food, this is definitely a place to try. They have a goodout.

Great food and service! Had their food delivered a few times before this and loved it so had to finally check out the experience inside. Appreciate all staff wearing masks and cleaning/sanitizing after every customer!

A highlight of Company Burger was their bunsesque, buttery. Their new ones are a downgrade, flat and just like regular McDonald's buns. They brought the mayo bar back from which is exciting, but I wish they would bring back their old buns too.
