Nope... Not a fan. Food is average, restaurant is average, service is average and just not sure why you would pick this place with all the other options out there.

Never again! Never! Ever! We were greeted by two roaches before we got to the first section. I don't care about selection or price when the roaches walk around like they are filling up plates of their own.
Best pizza in this area by far n our new pizza place!!! Pizza was well cooked n sauce is the star on this pizza n cheese was good but, slightly less cheese for me would b perfect.

The Veggie Quesadilla is amazing! Also had the Spicy Chicken Burrito which was very good as well. Great selection of beers to try, and the open bar area has a great feel on a comfortable night with the windows open.
Hands down, my favorite soup! This spot is one of a kind and the hand drawn noodles and home made wantons are out of this world. Perfectly spicy and delicious. I would recommend this spot to anyone!

Really disappointed for the extra charge to "toast " my veggie burrito especially since I said no cheese or sour cream which are probably the two most expensive ingredients that I am saving them from putting on the burrito.....time to head to another place....bummer
Such a wonderful place to go for families and people who just want to have a good time and eat excellent food. I recommend this place to everyone I know. Delicious and unforgettable.

My facial was outstanding. I was so relaxed that I feel asleep lol. I went here for a friend's birthday and we had champagne, Bellinis, and dessert as a party of the party package. This spa was very clean and cozy.
Good food Fresh sushi Order at counter grab a table quickly because it is crowded wirh Penn kids Reasonably priced Lots of choices
I moved to Cincinnati, I drove here to get nick and Elina's pizza again, haha well worth the drive, I really miss this pizza.

This place is AMAZING! So clean you could eat off the floors, the food is exquisite and the atmosphere is so lovely with the beautiful decor & lighting. Will definitely be back, the kebabs & the feta appetizer are absolutely to die for!

I've eaten at Gino's in south Philly several times for Gino's at the airport the bread is stale the meat is tough it's the worst Philly cheese steak I've ever had in my life the one in South Valley is OK the one at the airport is gross
Mr.B's has seen better days. Service is lacking . The food is still good, but they really need to work on getting the service to the level it used to be.

Very good peruvian food. Peruvian cuisine has to be some of the best in the world and these people pay attention to keeping the recipes pretty authentic which is so important. One of the best restaurants in Nashville and my kids love this place!

I will certainly be back here again! I found this place when I searched on Groupon for a massage took her time and made sure to get those knots out. The member deals aren't bad either. Think I'll be back for a facial next week...
It's freaking Taco Bell you get what you pay for the lowest grade meet possible for $.99 they somehow make it taste good but you're so stoned you don't care but they don't serve it with a smile

Restaurant was beautiful but the service wasn't great. Water cups are short so we needed them refilled shortly after receiving them and our waitress did not pass by for $11 the portion size and flavor wasn't what I was expecting.

Great location! But... In 3 days, our room keys quit working 3 times. Each time we had to get it reprogrammed, staff implied we broke the key somehow that it's a "four star" hotel, you expect more than that.

Beautiful dining room, friendly service, and good food. My girlfriend and I were sad our favorite Indian restaurant closed on the Loop, so when we discovered this new gem we were relieved to find a new favorite.
Cozy place. Disappointed in the bar food Calamari boring bland bad Thai sauce cheese steak egg rolls ok bad red sauce Based on bar food doubt I will return for dinner

You simply cannot beat the Grey Lodge for a cool, welcoming vibe, an always surprisingly diverse tap lineup and killer food. Tonight I had the Cajun fish tacos and they were big, spicy and delicious. Great place to hang, always.

Came over for lunch pizza is not good at all, cheese hard as a rock, did not taste fresh at all. Mozzarella frita was more like supermarket bought Soda no fritz Customer service ok Bathroom hallway across from main kitchen smell like fake crab meat

The theater is okay. When I go there, I pretend I'm in high school when stadium seating was brand new and exciting - and seats didn't recline. There's one thing ultra modern about this theater: the prices. When did it happen that matinee prices start at 3 p.m.?
Wow service is amazing, food is amazing, the chef are amazing, it's a yes all the way, thank u for the complimentary sushi there :) was a nice touch :)

Unimpressed. Sorry Philly but this place does you no justice. If I could go back in time just once in my life I would use the opportunity to eat at the subway across the street instead of this place. Food: eh, Service: Slow, Price: $$$

The build your own meat/cheese board was delicious. The most delicious brie I've ever tasted very plain, nothing fancy. We had a party of 7 and it took a pretty long time to get our food but the apps made it worth the wait.

Best deli sandwich in Tucson none compare the Italian food is great the soups are wonderful if you want to cook at home by their fresh ingredients mark is a real treat this place is a landmark highly recommend
I love the new remodel but it's so overpriced compared to Cobb ... my friend bought the popcorn and 1 drink and I went to buy mine and I couldn't believe a medium was $6!

Beautiful venue. The building is hip and very modern, the open kitchen was amazing. The service was great. Really like the alligator hush puppies. Outside of that the food was bland and average in my opinion especially for the price -2 people lunch no alcohol $60
The Thai bowl with chicken and steak was okay, I was a little disappointed with the flavor, more blan than I expected. We sat on the bar, and had quick and friendly service.

Love this local mom and pop eatery . Don't bother going to the Waffle House next door they don't hold a candle to Caposey's. The staff is friendly the food is great and the price point also makes this place one of my favorite places to go.

I'm from Colorado it was visiting Philadelphia this was the first cheesesteak I had the service was great the food was OK however there are other places in Philly that have original cheesesteak! Della Sandro's would be my recommendation.
Breakfast special, for the price is not bad at all the service definitely needs help as all the servers seemed they were in a bad mood and everything was slow!!

Would not recommend. Was told it would be a 45 minute wait and came back and was told they had no idea how much longer it would be but still 8 parties ahead of us. Keep in mind this was a weeknight.....how unprofessional. I won't be back

I am absolutely in love with this place! Such and awesome old school ice cream parlor! The ice cream is delicious and the sundaes are fabulous! When in Philly I always get a cheese steak followed by Franklins ice cream, I mean does it really get any better?

I tried this place and was disappointed. The sushi was huge and hard to eat without making a total mess. I ordered the dragon roll which i can say had good flavor just to me was over shadowed by huge sloppy presentation. Prices are cheap service is fast.

The proportions of the vermicelli bowl were much smaller than expecting for the price and the sauce that came with it was eh. The pork in the bahn mi and vermicelli was underwhelming. Not worth the prices for what we got
Came here while we were waiting for a table at a spot midtown but were too hungover and hungry to wait to eat. Ordered some tacos and quesadillasto places.
This room was more than disgusting, roaches, everything is soaked with condensation, dirty sheets on the pullout bed, and mold under both sinks in the suite. Never again.

They're okay, but a bit overrated and kind of expensive. I was not really impressed with the fried chicken. There's better, and less expensive, in Indy. I also dislike the community tables, too millennial for my taste, but that's a matter of personal preference, not a dis.

Horrible customer service. After waiting over 30 minutes for a latte, my 15 year old daughter asked about it and was told by the loud head guy "she's in charge of coffee" pointing to another employee.
Run of the mill restaurant. It was clean and the fried shrimps were good but I was disappointment that the shells on them were not really soft like I would expect on a soft shell shrimp.

Love this gym! I came in for a free trial and loved how clean and tidy everything was. I then quickly signed up for a full membership. Deb is very friendly and is constantly cleaning and doing a great job of keeping all of the equipment in full operation.
Good food love bartenders and food. Only issue is if your a non smoker it can get overwhelming if it's busy due to cigar, cigarettes and vaping.

Not only did the cashier make fun of my name, he also ordered me a drink that I did not want. Additionally, we paid extra for the ice and in the end they gave us less than an ounce of actual mocha coffee . Tasted like trash, everything was trash.

Strict and awful service eating food with mask still on ears and getting warning and threaten to be kicked out please lmk I'm supposed to eat through it ? They hired Karen's to walk around and make little comments about the dumbest things
Lady at the front desk Naaaastyyy She should have stayed home My son thought she was not courteous Go to pats
Been there twice over night, bartenders suk at customer service and rooms are trash they only get by because there is no where else to stay downtown Tucson.

Welll...we were expecting decent and got horrible. We waited 1 full hour before getting our food. Then it was cold. Then they gave no refills on drinks, forgot 1 cup of gumbo that was part of the original order placed at 6 PM. We will not be returning. Sad...

Who doesn't love a good pretzel!?!? I guess a lot of people. I like pretzels. I used to have the chain pretzels, then I discovered GOOD/FRESH pretzels, similar to a great bagel, i now appreciate pretzels, Center City is as good as it gets... Thank you Pretzel.
Reasons to like this place: friendly staff not the best hibachi in the area the wait for food can be quite long sub par sushi 2.75/5

If you want an amazing biscuit sandwich that will keep you full till the next day serve still and sparkling water and the food comes out rather quick. The service was fantastic as well. Definitely a must-try in Nashville.

Kristen offers a wide array of healing modalities that focus on the body centered while contemporaneously healing/aligning other facets of my being. Her style is calm and centering, her massage varied and therapeutic. I highly recommend her!
Only eat here if you have no other optionsfood is very average and extremely over priced whether you are downtown or out in Leper's Fork. All hype and no really quality.
Worst facial I've ever gotten!! Lasted 30 minutes and Nalalia was impatient snippy and not good at all If you want a good facial ocean blue is the best a few blocks away

This place is awful. Selections are few. They do not accommodate different eating requests. Limited menu including awful drinks - slow service and we were here at 11:30am and took us over an hour for 2 canned beers,
The famous St Elmo Steak House so we had to treat our self to a once inlife time. So this is a nostars for the service and a 2-star for the meal as they did not screw up my wife's baked potato.
Only one experience here, so take that for what it's worth, but the pizza was burnt enough that it was rough to eat. Not much else to say, but just not great pizza in my book.

I'm not sure what the food is like, as I am unfortunately gluten free but stopping for a lavender lemonade during the summer while I'm walking my dog past the 2nd street location is an absolute treat!
We should totally have in door stadium don't want to sound to girly, , , but it's nice to actually sit and watch a game without freezing your bun'z off !!
Second time here had breakfast both times Food is good and waitress on both occasions Was nice We will be back for dinner sometime I enjoyed the food and is not all they expensive Would recommend
While Allure offers an affordable pedicure and I love who I assume is the owner hoping to find more consistency from a nail salon do drop ins are a gamble.

Just moved here from New york figured I would try this car wash will never come here again barely vacuumed and I paid $23 for a full service car wash and got a half ass one I dont even get a dashboard and console wipe down??

Thank you guys so much for everything, I really love this place it's like a home for me, I do come here more than twice a week, and it makes me feel like another family, thanks to Angelo and Gabriela, you guys are the best !

I've been going here regularly for over a year and they are awesome!! Recommend making an appt bc they can get busy. Legit comfortable atmosphere, complimentary wine, HGTV rolling, this is definitely the best nail salon I've been to on the East side.

They have such a great variety of choices from appetizers to sides to entrees! I got to work directly with John Favazza to reserve for a large party and he made the experience easy and enjoyable. You can tell they value their customers here, and I will definitely be back!
Everything was absolutely delicious! Best pancakes I have had in a long time. I will make my way back another day for one of the best cheeseburgers I have had in a long time!

This is one of the best Greek restaurants that I have been to, both in terms of how well done the dishes are and how delightful the host and servers are. And the cries of Opa! add a bit of aural excitement to the meal.
Great customer service here and the food is great loved every bit of it plus you sign up right at the door to get discounts.
This is some of the worst pizza I've ever had in my life :/ Because this restaurant is called "Michaelangelo's" I'm ashamed to be Italian. That is all

first they don't accept visa of any form. i had to walk to the bank next door, and be a creeper while standing in line waiting on the ATM. I waited 2 hours and it took all of 5 min including to written exam. unfourtunately, it is a neccassary evil.
My wife and I love this place, not only is the food great, the staff is so friendly and they always have fast service

Very poor selection for a buffet, food was cold and poor quality. We voiced our concerns with the manager and she was very rude. We will not be visiting again, a shame since my boyfriend raves about this place but hasn't been here in 9+ years.

Green chilaquiles with scrambled eggs...nasty. Sauce poured from a gallon over fried tortilla chips, plated next to can poured ferried beans placed under heat lamp, with liquid fake eggs. Started eating and yes the nasty suave still cold in the middle. Beans can taste the can. First and last.
I feel like they're going down hill. The service and cocktails are still amazing, but my dry truffle mac & cheese was tasteless and my tiny grilled chicken salad had an odd smokey flavor.

This is the quintessential place in Medford to get your ice cream. Ice cream is very high-quality and very creamy, they also have gelatos I believe, anyway the place is very well decorate it inside and everybody from Medford knows to go here for Their ice cream
I actually went back a day or two after writing that review, the salad I used to get was their "log salad" it was bomb, and they stopped making it. D':

Horrible customer support! Customer support technicians don't either know how to fix the issue over the phone nor can they properly schedule their sub-contracted technicians. Two appointments missed and not even a phone call to apologize. Sorry BrightHouse but your support will no longer be needed. I'm switching to Fios!!!

OMG . Thats all I can say . so gooood! The Peruvian fried rice is delicious . I have nothing bad to say as of now about this place. Friendly staff, great food I haven't tried much on the menu but the charbroiled chicken is so yummy the skin is marinated to perfection!!!!
I went here when if first opened, and have never desired to go back again, I was so very disappointed at the quality and the taste of the food. I would absolutely not recommend dining here.

I brought my 2007 Ford Truck from Veterans Ford in 2007. I don't bring my truck anywhere else for service. I'm completely satisfied with the honesty the Service Department provide me about my vehicle and confident their mechanics will get the job done. Great job guys.

Food is good and sometimes the temperature of the steak is wrong. I do love their shrimp on the barbie, cocktails were consistently good as well but the service can be sloooow and not attentive at some instances. We will always come back because we love their free bread lol.

Chago's knows they can just syphon whatever money they want out of the rich ignorant college kids across the street and the upper class white people who don't know any better .... 2 tacos with rice and beans used to be $13syphoning cultural impostor of a Mexican restaurant.

New management. Used to come here for a decent burger fix, but since new owner the burgers are punny and not worth it. : ( I'll try it again, but only cause there ain't a lot of choice for kosher beef downtown, eh?

Booked this hotel as a group. They 'assigned' us a room and kept telling us it was not ready. While we sat politely in the lobby for four hours, we watched others able to check in because their exact same rooms were 'ready'. Maybe they had not prepaid?!?!
Just seen them at a Yelp event on Thursday, wasn't very impressed with their featured pasta dish, really lacking in flavour and oily, unfortunately

The timing was wrong for when we had to pick up our takeout. The pancakes weren't fluffy, my bacon was overcooked, the eggs were a little watery and barely had flavor and the French toast was dry. I wouldn't order from this location again for a while.

I got a great rate here, so was pleasantly surprised But the service was nearly perfect, the rooms were very nice and well cared for, and the lobby is bizarrely art deco, but kinda lovely too The gym is pretty great too, though I could have used a hot tub

I ordered a 5 inch sandwich with the extra of avocado and on foccacio bread...total cost over $9.00. The sandwich was good, even though it was overTowne again and will share my experience with friends to discourage them from supporting a business with no customer service.
Thank you so much to the drive up order staff for being so patient, so pleasant and dealing with all the COVID insanity. I appreciate you being there so i don't have to go inside.
I enjoy this place for a quick bite to eat. I enjoy their cranberry walnut bread, I usually buy a loaf and take it home to have for my toast in the morning.

Every time I come here there is a problem with a handful of their frozen yogurt machines and the teenagers behind the counter couldn't care less. When it's working, their flavors are good, but I'm tired of having to settle for my 3rd or 4th choice.

Ramen Bar is what got me hooked on to sushi. The Sweet Green Veg roll was one of my favs but I ordered it to go and was really disappointed did not taste fresh. I'll hold off on returning till things are back to normal!

This place has a large inventory of clothing, shoes, books, records, kitchenware and furniture. I think it is the only alpha left in Goleta and is a good place to stop if in the mood for a little second hand perusing.
first off the employees are rude even the managers will never return here the approached in a rude way after we paid to have a party here very bad customer service

I went here for the first time today and it was great fun to look over 'clearance' items in their showroom. If you had a weird desire to 'dress up' your dog or cat, you can get some reallly tacky weird clothes marked down to a dollar.
Terrible chicken dried out .thought this was going to be a great new place sides where good must of been the location try it again doubtful ..

I came here for an event with a friend. So far I like the food we had, even though my drink was not the best I had- had a Mojito. Overall I would have to come back to further write my review. So stay tune for an update.

Bill is hilarious, took a late night Wendy's run through the drive though and was greeted at the window by a hilarious guy with Wendy's jokes flowing. Gave us a good laugh, Bill. "You know why our burgers are square? Cause we don't cut corners!"
The people who work here are the rudest screamed at us to wear a mask yet they are wearing theirs inappropriately my sandwich looks like a child threw it together absolute terrible customer service.

The Greek salad is good here, and the pita and tzatziki sauce are quite decent as well. Chicken souvlaki here is always dry, and I haven't ever been brave enough to try the gyro, since it just looks like strange hybrid-meat roasting out in the open.
i hope this club turns out to be as good as I hope. I am a new social member. I hope they add evening activities for those of us who work and that the ladies room sauna gets fixed fast .
We needed to have one lock replaced and another fixed. They did an excellent job even to the point of replacing our hardware store keys with new keys that were correctly cut.

We have been twice and we're not overly impressed but it was not bad either. Our second visit was through the drive through where our kids got kids meals and the cookies they came with were very stale.

Second time here, and delicious food both times- I honestly couldn't care less if a place has great food and not so friendly staff, but this restaurant has both. Great management here, we'll trained staff and fast service.
They refuse to hire more people. Been a few times and usually there is one person working and it takes over thirty minutes to get your tea. This place will close soon.

Nadias is a good Thai place, BYOB like most the places in PA which were recently under construction, their staff is very nice and friendly, the place looks very clean. The food was very good. For my appetizer, I had the Chive and pork dumplingsin on Yelp.
Not happy I tried to call tonight and they didn't want to answer the phone so never getting anything from there again

Great place. Clean, smoke free, good environment.. Owner/bartender = no people skills. I understand that you have rules and want to run a clean, fun and inviting place but seriously; your approach towards customers.. It hurts.

We stopped here after place we were looking for had closed down. We were not disappointed. The Gulf Shrimp boil came potatoe, corn on the cob, sausage, the Crab Cakes with grilled squash & zucchini with Creole sauce. The food was good and tasty. We would come back! Manny
Food was edible service ok but what more can you say about a chain just hope I don't get sick like last time...

I am usually a huge fan of Dunkin' Donuts' coffee- after tasting the coffee in this location I've started to lose my affinity! The other food items are average tasting! The service is also below par! Overall disappointing!

Came here for happy hour with friends all 2 for one drinks and cheap appetizers sitting out on the patio ad long as you don't mind the sound of the traffic, we aren't minding our server brian is doing a great job!

They have so many types of pedicures here and my nails look great but the woman who did my nails was rude and made very inappropriate assumptions and comments about my body so I will not be back again.

I never order from this dominos because every time you order from there they have issues They never got an order right. The place is usually under staffed probably the reason why the orders are usually messed up

When I contacted TAKL, I was told that most of the providers are mostly unemployed "drifters" looking for odd jobs and that they have no experience. This did not sound like a safe or reliable option for any type of work around the home.

Rude! Seriously! We ordered through Grubhub and forgot to ask for chopsticks. My husband called and Lee said it was extra, she became irate when he tried to explain and told him, "You go take your 53 dollars and shove it somewhere else!". WTF?!?

Some like it hot. As do I. Go for a tasting and let the owners help you start your blazing journey. The selection of hot sauces are plentiful and with so much to choose from, every customer will find "the one" to make their taste buds tingle and cheeks rosy!

This place is awesome, found it through a friend and from the moment I walked in the bartenders made me feel like a regular. They have pool tables, golden tee, putt putt machines and darts. They also do poker on wed and sun nights.
not bad very generic prices are high the employees don't look like they feel like working there was kind of just grab some food and leave no atmosphere. BTW the food was pretty good.

The City Museum is a pretty cool place, but my first visit was as a college student in search of an adventure. This adventure involved dodging the tons of kids and tweens running around. Consequently, I am not a huge fan, but I will give it a try in future.
We sat down with 2 hungry toddlers and after 15 minutes we left because even the place wasn't busy no one stop by at the table

This was my first time coming here... Walked in sat in the chair to get a pedicure waited about 25 minutes wasn't to mad because I didn't make a appointment but I got my feet done. The massage did not feel so good. My feet were cute though!!

By far one of the most unique places that serves sweet and savory drinks open late and has very particular cocktails with caffeine and non caffeinated options. If you wanted to die by chocolate or sugar overload this is my highest recommended place to date!
When I'm down town and want an overpriced cool drink, I go here. It's great to get a drink on a hot day but for some reason I always feel out of place here.
Brunch was great but no churros and the server we had sucked but the bar back and food runners made it a memorable meal one of the food runners even ran out to give us a compact we left at the table
The manager of this store was so helpful! Me and my friend are from out of town and she gave Us all the insight on local stopes, super cute store as well :)
We came here because of drive thru thought it would be faster but the service was not very fast we where left about 15 mins at the window to pay then 5 mins or more to get are ice cream

Coffee was great however I felt the beignets were overlooked and quite bland. Not worth wasting your money on. Service is great and parking easy so these are great pluses however, I would not order the beignets again, perhaps a muffin if ever to visit again.

what a pleasant surprise - in the very center of Treme is a fine, friendly, clean and pleasant little coffee shop offering just what you want on a hot afternoon. Refreshing drinks; terrify and thoughtful service. a real find that's worth looking for.
Chef Ryan is absolutely amazing I live his sea urchin pasta and his braised short rib pasta he is amazing a god of food
Poor Customer service, the kids high chairs were greasy and sticky, dirty floors, dirty silverware dirty tables, this location needs new management

I was welcomed when I first came in and they were very kind and gave me a sub and a drink for my birthday you need to join their point system so you too can have something special on your birthday they give you an entire year to use it
Great place to eat, but they need to change the rule if someone know what the rest of their party want, they should seat them.
Had the chicken fajitas....blech. The onions and peppers under the sad tiny piece of chicken were so charred and burnt there's no way anyone could eat them. Service was so slow. Will not return
Beware!!I have been here 3 times and twice now they have served me chopped up plastic in my milkshake, I have almost choked on it both times. I am never coming here again!!

Alyssa and Stephanie were the best!! They were super friendly and helpful. I was in and out of there in less than 15 minutes and I could not be happier with my shirt!! Plus it was super affordable and just all around an awesome experience. Will definitely return!!

This place is BIG! We drove through the entire park and it was very clean and well kept. It seemed to be in a less than desirable neighborhood but still a great place to walk and catch up with a friend during the day.

For what it is definitely a memorable one but like the other posters said not an every week thing. I personally prefer the more low key laidback atmosphere of Franklin Mortgage but I recommend people to try this place and decide for themselves. Just remember- no sneakers.
I was hoping for a new local Ramen place to provide some nice authentic Japanese Ramen however the broth need chili oil and soy sauce to give the dish some flavor.

Unprofessional doordoor solicitor simply won't leave when I asked. Told him I wasn't interested multiple times...pointed out our neighborhood's no solicitation policy. Still wouldn't leave. You can bet that if I hear of anyone needing windows, that I will urge them to steer clear of this company.

Definitely worth the visit and a diner/dive must in Nawlins. Glad it came recommended. Had their signature po boy and the ham was as advertised and the juices it sat in were awesome capped off with hot sauce. Breakfasts looked awesome

Nice location. Friendly staff, Jill at the front desk was amazing and went above and beyond to make sure guests had everything they needed to fully utilize all amenities and perks. Clean rooms, beautiful patio bar. A free hot breakfast never hurts either. Will be coming back again.

The service and food are excellent at this restaurant, I ordered calamari for an appetizer, grouper for the main course an we shared the jalapeño potato's and Brussels sprouts. All we cooked perfectly and tasted great. It's too pricey for frequent dining but a great business or special occasion restaurant.
No complaints about the actual dishes but if you get take-out, check your dishes because we got a cashew chicken instead of the cashew shrimp. It was good but a bit unexpected when we got home .
Fixed a cracked iPhone 4S screen within 20 minutes at prices lower than quoted elsewhere. Confusing at first cause its within an AT&T store but everyone was nice and they have a TV while you wait.
Overpriced. Unhappy staff. Owner is a tool who demolished the great local bar across the street for more parking for his personal yuppie hangout. Decent craft draft selection, that's it .
I been to FOGO DE CHAO and Rodizio Grill does not compare, it is OK for this side of the bridge.
Better, better with DJ Tierra spinning vinyl, a snappy female bar staff, and the owner's dad in attendance with his ultra cool classic car parked in front.
They sometimes carry items I can otherwise only get online, and the employees I've asked for help have been very friendly and knowledgeable.

I think the kabobs are overpriced. I got the chicken kabob meal that came with 5 pieces of chicken, rice, one side and naan. It was pretty good but I wouldn't get it again for $13 especially since it's good that is so inexpensive to make.
If gracious manners, respect, cleanliness, and professional treatment describes your ideal salon experienceslacking other salons within the small area of Greenville - but this Salon is a real gem.
I ate the salsa, which tastes like a spicy version of fast food sweet and sour dipping sauce then decided there was zero chance i was spending20-35$ on an entree. Thats about all i have to say
Very mediocre food, make sure you don't order those "ramen" because they are basically instant noodles with an egg in it.
food is okay but the service is terrible and you'll be there for an hour even if you only order one thing.
I wanted to like this place but it's kinda just your typical diner with to many options, nothing to brag about but it's omelettes are huge but you can't really screw then up can you!

Fantastic service at bar for fast dinner. Good pork ribs and beef, as well as tasty beans and cold slaw. If I'd had more time to enjoy the food and not been so rushed, I might have given it an extra star.
As a Vetri restaurant I would only come back for that octopus roll for lunch and hope that the pot of french fries would fill me up. Otherwise, it isn't worth the trek or the money.

Love pizza and this is definitely a heaven of my favorite food. However this time is not a good experience, wait for a long long time to be served and a little pricey. Foods are quite ok, maybe go back.
Professional all the way through. They arrived on time, emailed the contract and insurance information, did a nice job for a reasonable price, and cleaned up. Nice owner and crew.

Beautiful place but not the atmosphere we expected. We went on a Sunday night. There was no entertainment and we waited so long for our drink order that we left without ordering a meal from the small menu available that night. Very disappointed.

Beware! Appointments made are not always honored. I called and made an appointment and when I arrived I was informed it would be another 30 minutes or so. Apparently they gave away my appointment. Very disappointing. How to trust them???
Keep an eye on ur receipt! The delivery guy kept the receipt and I found out that they charged me $4 for delivering food because it was snowing! The thing is they never told me.....how petty!

So many reasons why this super unfriendly place sucked but one wouldn't know it bc there is no photographic evidence . Also found it creepy that this angry dude, who claimed to be the owner, was filming our group with his phone without permission. Weird and why are you yelling, dude

I moved to the area about 6 months ago, and my husband and I tried Sagami for the first time last night. I truly have no idea what all of the hype is about. The sushi at Sagami is pretty standard wise, I've definitely experience better.

Ed was the Best! He was so friendly and informative! He helped me out with a great deal then I was stuck for a ride to the airport and he wanted to assist! I was so grateful! Thank you Ed! You make the business shine!!

This place is the restaurant equivalent of Gremlins 2 or Back to the Future 2. It isn't the best, it isn't the worst, it's decent and certain items on the menu will come close to hitting the spot but it isn't going to be that memorable.
Had a wonderful weekday brunch experience, service was wonderful Had the avocado toast and a wonderful margarita and the biscuit flight was fun and delicious #carbsrule
Just love the grits, can't find these anywhere else in Renotip- not chewy and BBQ chicken in either a sandwich or wrap. Super nice folks too. True family operation.

Normally i love eating here.. but last time I went with my Vegetarian friend and I order veggie salad for him but later found out that they put beacon in their salad... SO that was the let down moment for me... Otherwise good place....

I been in shops for much of my life, but I witnessed and received some of the worst customer service at my last visit. Hey guys: you work in a bike shop; you're not the most powerful people in the world. First and foremost: take care of the customers.
consecutively they don't reach their goal and are considerably late and the person who I spoke with named 'JB' was of no help at all. I will definitely be reporting this place until they shut down

Ok I mean it's not gourmet but they have good sliders, incredible fried pickles and the bartenders are really nice. When your other options in the area are places like chuys, I don't know why you'd complain about a decent slider with fries and fried pickles!!
High expectations coming here, overall flavor pretty good and it's a huge hoagie - onions mushrooms nice but too much cheese dumped on became such a mess. A little more balance would go a long way!

Pizza was really good ... owner stopped at our table and was very nice !!! We had Pepperoni Mushroom it came out hot and was really flavorful ... we had a salad we split it it looked unreal but we're gonna be back there a lot I'm sure - place was hopping busy !!!
Worst motel in the world, smells like garbage, nothing works if you wanna fill like in third world country good luck to visit this ugly motel

Great at first... until your dog is being attacked aggressively all night by the same dog and staff watching. *thats upsetting *. All dogs gets excited but owners should be notified if they need a calm down before they start biting other dogs.
Small beach but clean and great views. If you don't want to be in the hustle and bustle of the larger beaches, this is the place to go. Very enjoyable and peaceful views.
Desert heat dry rub is a personal favorite. Take the kids, let them be loud or go with friends, grab a good beer with some good winds and watch about any sport imaginable.

DiNic's would have been 5 stars had you asked us any other time in the past decade. We were there this week after a long hiatus, and were sad to discover that the oncea-roll thing for a smaller length, is just crappy. Wish they hadn't changed things.

Cute place, very knowledgeable staff. We were impressed by their selection of coffees and teas, and the way in which they steep their teas is cute and makes it easy to remove the tea leaves with no muss or fuss.

This was truly a one of a kind experience! My husband and I came in for a couples massage, and everything from the ambiance to the customer service to the massage itself was completely unique and top notch. We strongly recommend this place to anyone and everyone!

Love this place! I personally love the bourbon brown sugar bacon and the cheddar hash brown casserole so based on the bad review regarding each is to own personal option! Been here several times the food and service never disappoints

Better than average espresso. But the inside dining doesn't feel as covid-safe as they could make it. With a few basic steps such as leaving the door open and having open windows, ventilation could be enhanced for better ventilation.

Excellent customer service! Informative, caring, gentle and compassionate. Highly recommend this office. I have had a lot of bad dental experiences mostly due to there not being much wrong and therefore not much work to do. This place treated me well and I'm glad to have found them.

Such a great nail salon! Customer service is phenomenal; very professional and friendly, place respects Covid protocols, super clean and the food and drinks next door is delicious!! Going there soon for my nails!

I was aware of the prices going in, but wanted to give them a try to see if they lived up to the hype. My wife and I each ordered cheeseburgers, small fries and small fountain drinksN 4 stars Prices- 2.5 stars

There were 20 in our party for dinner and we only had one waiter. I felt so bad for this guy, he was definitely hustling but management should have taken this into consideration and sent him some help.
This place was terrible! The food was mediocre and we waited almost 2 hours for our food and then our hot food was served cold. Would give half star if I could! Definitely not worthwhile!
Lunch was brought in and had the tough tasteless pastrami with a bunch of sauerkraut and a thin piece of cheese. I really wanted this place to be good but it wasn't.

Whilst it's a grand building and convenient and beautiful inside, with a good team, the air conditioners in the rooms are just plain noisy. If you can't rest well as a result then that rather defeats the purpose of a hotel right? Sadly.

If you dont mind 30+ minute wait times, and IF the cashier gets your order right, and if you dont mind slightly higher price tags, the food is usually pretty good. Also, crawfish slightly above average quality, just not as big as you'd wish. Worth going at least once.

This location is the worst I've ever been to. On any day you will have 1 or more of the following: a long wait, workers who mess up your order or don't know what they're doing, or donuts that taste a day old.
This establishment chose to host a fundraiser supporting Mike Pence and the new policy to separate immigrant children from their parents and keep them in cages.

Roto 4 times higher than all other bids received from reputable construction & plumbing companies. I called Ruben to discuss and he could not explain to me what went into his costs / break down labor & materials. Makes me question the % of profit built into their estimates.

Their tomato pie is best I've had in Philly, but the plain pie is no slouch: thin crust, cooked well, flavorful sauce. I'd put it up against any slice. These guys are a worthy successor to Beddia, no doubt.

This is the best restaurant for a good steak dinner I've visited this restaurant a few times and I've not been disappointed the flavor is outstanding and they have the best mushrooms keep up the good work

This place has been an institution on the west side and a go to for great Italian pub food. I usually get take for the office everyone loves it, I am giving it 3 stars because the service is terrible.
Was very disappointed went for brunch with a gf and our food take a long time and when it came out it was cold service was ok but food was not worth the price. Wont be going back.

nachos: 30 cents of chips, 2 tablespoons of avocado guacamole, an eighth of a cup of salsa, 1 ounce of cheese and one jalapeño equals $13 of nachos. Rip Off. Never again and they wonder why they'll go out of business. Blame it on COVID.
Despite my distaste for the dress code for servers here, I have to admit that the food and service were good. Our food was served promptly and was well-prepared, and we will visit again.
If you are visiting this is a stop you need to make and you do need to try the alligator cheesecake. I enjoy bringing friends from out of town here, its becomes a treat.

Don't turn your back on the owner. If he shoots his friends in the back of the head while at his bar, imagine what he would do to someone he doesn't like. I cannot recommend eating here unless you are armed, too. Maybe he only shoots the defenseless.
Was not expecting to pay $155 for the services I receivedthe girls are nice but I really thought the price would be lower then it was:(

The food here is never bad, if feeling unsure what to eat but want something filling, this is the place to go! If you're wanting it for lunch and working around the area.. avoid it during high school rush hour or you'll be late for work!

The Mexican Post is just okay to me... The last time I went, the server that we had was pretty darn bad and the nachos should not have been called nachos. I guess to each his own though because my neighbor simply LOVES the place... Me - not so much!

Rich Nails is extremely inexpensive and the staff has always been welcoming and they remember me each time I go in. I have never gotten a spa pedicure for this price nor with such quality. The woman spent nearly an hour with me and my toes look awesome!
I love the concept of bite size desserts and a shot of coffee I'd rather try a bite of a few flavors than have one giant slice. I just wasn't wowed by anything I tried though .

Poor service and mediocre food were the highlights of our visit to Rapscallion. The scalloped -type potatoes were undercooked and the waiter appeared confused and unable to provide the service levels expected for an establishment of this pricing category. A big disappointment.
Just stopped by to get a chocolate shake because it's very hot out, the drive-in staff was very courteous, very pleasant.
Touristy food and drinks, good service. The fried pickles are really good. We sat at the bar, and the bartender was great, he hustled and did a good job with both drinks and table service.

What a great place. Unfortunately nasty people work there. Sort of takes the fun out of a beautiful day to have to deal with the condescending and unhelpful people who work there. They must hate their jobs and one cont help but wonder why ...
The best Indian restaurant in the area Every dish we ordered perfectly prepared Lal mash is one of their best dish.
Cute place by the beach and has a great vibe. The food choices for vegetarians is limited but was nice mexican eatery given that Tampa / Clearwater doesnt have a great choice

Love their egg noodles, fried rice, and kwetiaw siram. The bone soup tasted really savory. If u eat there, try to order young coconut drink too Better order it for to go because the place is small. And u might be seated with somebody else

Clueless, uncaring, unaware staff trained by snailrocksbrains-tools. I am not kidding when I say we arrived at 6:30 pm and got our first drink served at 7:15 pm. No apologies. No clues. Food was under the lights for a half hour. These people are idiots. Steer clear of this dump.

One of the best Haitian restaurants, although customer service need some improvement, the food is always delicious and they give you plenty. I spent a good deal of time looking for a good Haitian restaurant, once I stumbled to this place it instantly became my spot. Definitely recommended

This place is surprising based on looks but was a pleasant surprise! The staff was wonderful and very friendly. Tried both the famous grouper sandwich and the spicy shrimp tacos and I would go with the latter, it was a generous portion and very tasty!

I LOVE this place! I normally order the Calypso Fried Fish Sandwich because it is delicious, but this time I stepped out of my comfort zone and tried the jerk chicken with a side a vegetables. It was authentic and scrumptious!

I've sat here for about 20 minutes. Many tables sat after us have already been waited on, we have been ignored and any attempt to grab attention of wait staff has failed.. I understand low staffing would cause slower service but this is unacceptable.
Sushi is good for it's price, haven't had much of the Chinese food but from what I've had is good, plus they deliver which is nice!
I throughly enjoy the ambience of this restaurant, it felt as though I was at the opera while having dinner and that in itself was a great experience. The pasta on the other hand..

Perfect Florida bar. Had dinner and drinks at a table with great music, and then went out to the fire pits to have another drink. Nick was AMAZING. Super prompt with drinks and gave us great recommendations. Can't wait to come back!

Kayla is the best bartender ever the food came out in a timely fashion and was up to my standards from what I am used to in Texas. The only downside was that this location didn't have crab cakes!!!!! That's my favorite thing on the Saltgrass menu!

There is a Denny's which I don;t know why but it isn't listed anywhere on teh Yelps. I just happened to see the giant yellow sign floating over the truck stop and made a beeruns on TV with my new truck driver buddies. Hells yeah.
Pretty fun atmosphere you can throw peanuts on the ground food is pretty good and the service is pretty good overall three out of five

I only ate here once, and only got the Stromboli so I have no idea what their other food is like. The ends were good but the middle was really greasy, dripping grease and soggy. Great drunk food probably
At one time this place was awesome, the food is mediocre and they are a little pricey the only reason I continue to eat there is in hopes of getting a taste of what was.
Cool place to hang out small portions, the beignets Really good with coffee really like this restaurant and they have life music clean and price is ok

Once again WALMART losses serious customer service training because everybody seemed like they would have rather been in a room picking their noses than satisfying customer. Just were do you find these people?

Fish was fresh, salad dressing good. Minus one star for teriyaki entrees swimming in too much sauce. Would take away 1 1/2 stars for automatic 20% tip snuck onto a bill for 5 people with no warning on menu- and service was fair.
Wings didn't get cooked liked I added it didn't come with ranch or anything not even a bag just a container. Which I wish would of been taped or stapled at least but it taste good will try again

In a city like New Orleans, no reason to settle for a mediocre brunch with outrageous prices. Service was meh. Server really didn't want to split up the check and took a long time even though we were the only people there.
The spring rolls and Beef lo mein was very flavorful!! The server was polite and helpful while we navigated their menu and kept and eye on us from a distance which was perfect for our evening.

good an bad experiences here. They have every part you need for any window. They are expensive. Sometimes I call and they are so nice but I have called later and ask questions and sometimes can be rude.

The first time I went it was great but this time I was a bit disappointed. My nail broke and the guy doing them wasnt paying attention and was more interested in his game than my nails. I liked this place but not sure I'm returning
This pollo loco has a really nice set up and the place is really clean but the customer service there is trash like they were so rude, I don't think I'll be coming back anytime soon.

The food is very good. Having said about the most important feature of the restaurant, let me comment abut a couple of suggestions: 1)The place needs to be redecorated since tables and chairs look really bad. 2) The servers should wear clean uniforms instead of wet t-shirts.
I get my seafood from here. PERIODT Snow Crab Clusters Skrimp Salmon And if you only want a certain amount they have no problem doing that for you.

Literally stood 10 minutes in front of workers who did not acknowledge our or the other 6 people who came in after us presence. They had plenty of time to talk to each other. It's not like the place was full with the one table that was seated. Pathetic.

Great staff and clean hotel. A good bang for the buck stay except for the poor quality and condition of the mattress in 3 of the rooms that myself and business companions stayed in. The mattress we so worn out they were concave in the middle.

During the pandemic we have ordered from Roy 6 times and its always so good and hest of all Farmers Market fresh, every salad is an assemblage of nutrion and contrasting flavors, the soups fresh and creative, the bread, the entree well planned, balanced, good value, and delicious.

Want to try Mexican food while here on St Pete Beach? Maybe you should pass this one up. The food was bland and the portions were small, felt like we needed to go grab a bite to eat when we left. Charged extra for everything.
Love this place...was super bummed when they left the Mercado, but I'm always happy to visit them at their new location because it's delicious!

Love their açaí bowls! Especially their traditional. Their soft serve is a little weird but here's my problem, they never blend the bowls properly I always find full on frozen fruits in my bowl that I obviously can't eat. A photo for reference.

This Bookmans is smaller than others I've frequented, and they do not have as wide of a selection of video games/electronics. The book section is nice though, it is dog friendly, and the staff are very friendly.

Bought tickets to Mission Save Elf. Thought it would be as precious years. Went through all the sections of the games waiting for the ice sculptures only to get to the end without any ice sculptures. $30pp for an Christmas, Chuckie Cheese experience. A TRUE DISAPPOINTMENT!!
The bar had a nice vibe to it; we tried Hawaii 5-0 and Spicy Margarita; could not have been more perfect!

I was super unimpressed with the restaurant. Although the cashier was very nice and the only person on staff that knew anything about the menu, she wasn't enough to make me even consider going back. The food was warm..... And not all that fantastic. Oh well......

Not my favorite location for Goodwill. The parking lot is a bit run down but the lot is on a light so it's nice to get in and out of. I'm not a huge fan that the donation door is on the front of the store rather than the side.

This is a fabulous family friendly hotel! Free parking, right off the river walk, great pool for kids that is open until 10pm, and a super yummy breakfast. The decor in the rooms is a bit dated, but the bed was comfy, the shower warm, and it was clean.

Starbucks is just OK. They never make anything sweet enough for me so I always have to get extra flavors but they are coming up on their food menu which is always helpful. Just wish they weren't so pricey. Good quick drive thru though.

Best Cheese Steak I ever had!! The Roast pork with spinach and sharp provolone is good too, but slightly disappointing after seeing and hearing so much about it. Place has a great feel. Outdoor picnic type seating.

Once again the Route 99 Diner came through with an amazing breakfast! Large portions and cooked to perfection. My hubby is always suggesting that we come here to eat every time we come to the city from the NWT. Thank you once again.

Our family had dinner there on a weeknight. It was ok. Fairly cheap and the meal showed it. It's ok for a quick meal or to get a burger but just know it's no fine dining and the steaks are not top choice that's for sure.

Fairly typical urban deli with large breakfast and sandwich menu. Simple, honestgoodness ingredients and quick, efficient service. Little ambience to speak of, which is the point: it's good for a quick, tasty, and inexpensive inout order or onspot chowdown.
Just celebrated my grandson's 10th birthday but it's 10 years of celebration with Harold seltzer and family on his birthday thank you .
Incredible food and friendly service. I am not a pizza fan in general but their scratch made wood fired pizzas are wonderful and the flavor combinations are unique and delicious.

$14 for two scoops of ice cream. Throw in a BLM sign in the window, ice cream not hand made but from Ohio and an expectation for up to a 30% tip on the credit card reader and no samples before ordering, and it's a hard pass. Difficult parking too.

Main reason I came here was to hear my high school friends' band play, but the food was also pretty good. The decor is cool, kinda hipstery. Menu was a bit confusing, food was a bit pricy. Tasted all right but nothing was amazing.

Worst customer service. We walk into the restaurant to order food for pick up and get a drink and are not attended to for 10 minutes and then are later rudely told to order online and leave as the host is on the phone with another customer.
Kim has done a really good job on my nails friendly and professional services at this nail place the services are responsible for any budget.
Every Wednesday for the past there months I've tried to order stew peas and my order gets canceled every single time. Why put something on the menu that you NEVER have? This place is a joke.

Excellent. Excellent. Excellent. The burgers are of a supreme quality, and the fries are delicious. Overall it's a bit expensive, but you get all the peanuts you want to eat in addition to all the condiments your heart desires on your burger with no extra charge. Forever a winner.
Decent breakfast grub - french toast special is really good comes with 2 eggs bacon or sausage and well of course french toast.
Great services, the red velvet is moist but the icing is a bit too sweet for my taste, couldn't taste the cream cheese.

I used to love their Arrow con pollo, tonight it was a gross dissapointment. The large chunks of chicken were nowhere to be seen, the olives had shrunk, and the sauce tasted like a bottle if katsup, and I don't like katsup. It was a huge dissapointed.
Their food is good, the prices are alright and the atmosphere is great! However, I'm a big fan of the basics and their frijoles and rice portions are so small and the rice seems to always be dry.
I bought massages for my 2 daughters through Groupon; unfortunately they won't be using them because no one answers their phone, or returns calls.
Have not been there for a few years, Used to be the best but guess the near by competitor got them beat. much quieter, more expensive and minus some menu items. oh well.
Pizza is usually good here but was annoyed last time I paid for an extra garlic sauce and it wasn't there when I got home. Always super sucky to pay for something and not get it. Disappointed

Not very good lol But the other locations usually are Scrambled eggs were gross Overdone I usually get sunny side up Million dollar bacon Is worth about 50 cent lol Not good at all Buttery grits are good Toast ok

Food good, service very good, fun crowd but the band was so loud that it really took away from our enjoyment. They were a good band, but so over-amped that it was unpleasant. In fact, I had to purchase ear plugs at the gift shop!
I've had Sabrina's countless times over the last few years, and it has been so consistently a 5filled very generously through every stay. The hype is real, folks!
They tricked us into buying five shots which we were told were free, then they just put it on a credit card tab that we opened for beer. Very not cool. Disappointed.

Fantastic service and excellent set pieces. We signed in and were quickly on our way to adventure! This location has multiple levels of rooms to visit, and we explored the newest room about an Indianaesque escapade, only our tour guide was no Harrison Ford.

I've been here a couple of times before a Blues game, and mostly have had good service and a good time. I went with a friend last night before the game, and as usual before a game, it was pretty busy maybe he was having a bad night.
Overrated their pork tacos are good but the meat is dry and over cooked their carne ascada is surprisingly horrible which Is my favorite meat and pork which I normally don't get is good here

Good riddance to a bad company that failed to pay its employees and when it did, usually failed to pay on time, now issued false W-2. The November 1st payroll, for example, wasn't paid until November 18th.

Just your basic chicken teriyaki bowl. What disappointed me the most was I substituted noodles instead of rice for a dollar and it was just spaghetti noodles... wasn't expecting that. I'll get the brown rice next time.

It's hard to believe that I'm giving an Asian restaurant in the casino four stars but the food is pretty good and it's a great alternative to the buffets. It's located in the El Dorado and has reasonable prices. The ribs are good and the vermicelli too.
my worry is there are too much pork fat in the dumplings . I am very wary of animal fat in general, although I know a little fat is required for the good taste. Priced very reasonable.

I landed at TPA airport and ordered dinner before the restaurant closed. The green curry seafood was delicious, with fresh snap peas, eggplant, green beans, red peppers and basil, and included chunks of shrimp, scallops, crab, and clams. Good job! Thanks

Just a note to parents: this place doesn't have a high chair and seems even a little hostile to those who bring in children. I guess I don't begrudge them that. But I think it's worthwhile for other parents to know before trying to take kids here.
It would be a lot easier if you could understand what they are saying But food is typical of Chinese nothing special
Let's just start with covered unloading zone, easy access to Storage rooms, Dolly's available for your use, air conditioned and GREAT! Helpful service! Also very clean.

1. The food was extremely overpriced for the TEEEEENY portions. 2. The service SUCKED. It wasn't very busy, but we had to remind our server/busboy/bartender/food runner what we ordered and were waiting for multiple times. 3. The drink prices were pretty decent if you're just drinking beer.

I've been to other millers including the Philly location and never had a complaint but we stopped going to the mount laurel nj location. Ive received cold lobster bisque soup and a horrible tasting burger. I believe they need new management.

Nice hotel - location is perfect for walking to local spots downtown but there were several loud guests, dogs barking, and late night bands that played over the course of our stay. Not a dealbreaker but also not something that we enjoyed waking up to multiple times a night.
My woman just didn't want to be there Barely put an effort Would not come back She barely spent anytime on the pedicure and I almost asked not to pay

Consistently forgetting items from my order that I've paid for. Asked for a credit this last time... Didn't get it... Called and left a message for a manager and a week later I still haven't even gotten a call back- or my $$ back! Never ever again.

Great place to go and eat there do you have specials of a lot of the times that we are in there love sitting at the bar staff is very friendly must try some of their specialty cocktails they have a pretty darn good she crab soup

Racists! My brother and I waited 30minutes before walking out on our order cause the 6 people bypassed us and got their just placed orders in a few minutes. Best of the bay should be pulled from people like this.
This place looked promising when you walked in the door, but the service was HORRENDOUSLY slow and the meal was just OK and it was extremely pricey.

What a delicious and pleasant lunch I had today at Cafe Desta! The owner was our server and he was so gracious and sweet - and the food was delicious and reasonably priced. Decor is beautiful. Mango cocont pie was divine. I can't wait to eat here again!
The owner did a good job on my nails but someone else did my pedicure and it wasn't what I expected from this place.

The past two times we have ordered food, the order was wrong or we just didn't receive the food we purchased. First time we didn't get a soup we ordered and the second time I did not get the correct count of nuggets.

Nice to have them back open again but can't give the same review as before because it just isn't the same. So many of the previous menu options were taken away so it's just not as good as before. 3 entree dinner options?? Come on...

Quick friendly service very convenient and the store was pretty clean the manager was nice and made sure to ask her everything was. I have worked at other Zaxbys and i have to say at this one the food looks better

The grilled octopus was also good would be better if they charred the outside a little more I do NOT recommend the cajun pasta. Not much taste to it, the chorizo wasn't very tasty, and the dish overall could use a lot of work Our server provided great service

I grew up eating here once a week with my family. Price has steadily increased over the years, but nonetheless quality Japanese food! Portions are big. I would recommend getting the combo shown in the front page of the menu, which comes with soup, salad, meal, and ice cream!

They do not reliably pick up your recycling. They are extremely difficult to reach by phone to reschedule/resolve issues. They frequently miss the rescheduled times, leaving your can on the street for your neighbors to admire for days at a time.
My gel nails started chipping on day 6 when they were supposed to last up to three weeks don't think I'll be getting gel here again.
TERRIBLE! I have a car that i got less than 3 months ago and they wont fix a problem that is obviously nothing that i did without me having to pay for it. I will never go back to them ever!!!!!

Yum yum in my tum! This place has the best calzones possibly in this entire world. I don't think I have ever eaten anything from here that was bad, nor have I had anyone I know have less than an exceptionally flavorful experience.

If you ever go to founding fathers for dinner, you have got to get the impossible burger or the beer can roasted chicken. It is the best thing you will probably ever put in your mouth. And the burger is only $7!

Really good food here. Great little hidden spot in Runnemede. Working class crowd and hearty plates, cold beer and big shot glasses make this a place I will definitely try again! Not super fancy though, so only bring your lady if she's low maintenance.
The service was slow at first but picked up and ended up being good, the food was pretty good and I enjoyed being there.

Really nice bartenders, beautiful girls in Catholic school girl uniforms done like Opps I did it again, Brittany Spears. The beer was flat and there were several choices but they were all very similar to each other so not really a choice.

Excellent locksmith, great guy too. Carlos was very responsive, prompt, transparent with pricing, fast with service, and even offered some free advice when we were finished. Definitely will reach out next time we need any locksmithing advice or services.
Took 35 min to get out of parking garage on Friday 1 person working gate, only total of 3 gates for exit. They should give out free parking passes for the extra time we all sat in line
Good service. I had the deep dish and it was pretty good. I'm from Chicago so I am spoiled, but driving by and seeing the name on the sign made me give it a shot.

I had a great time in Waffle House today. Our Waitress Donn was awesome. My only complaint is when I order a blueberry pancake, I expect it to look like the pictures you all have advertised. No getting enough blueberries in my waffle is unacceptable.
Great food. Get there early so you can have full selection because when the run out which they do, you don't want to miss oiit.

Rather spendy, tasty, not all that different from what you would get at other mediterranean restaurants nearby. Owner/staff often park in the alley in the back, which is fine unless you need to drive down the alley in the back.

Delicious cronuts. On those days when you feel like taking out a second mortgage on your house to buy a dozen donuts, go there. Sadly I've only had that urge once. They're good but they're not THAT good.
So...I ordered the rad thai and I was given everything except cabbage and cucumbers, but with added beets, broccoli, celery, and a bunch of quinoa. Thank you?

Great place to get pizza and other Italian specialities like lasagna calzones spagetti and meatballs and they also offer daily special. Sometimes the sauce can be slightly sweet but I guess I'm use to eating mo's that it doesn't bother me. Large portions and fast and friendly service.

The place smelled incredible, decorated well and could have been a good place, but 20 minutes until closing the young person working shuts the espresso machine down so no espresso drinks for us, we walked over across the street to Dawson Taylor's Coffee House
No matter ur body shape or experience at Flaunt Fitness, u are not judged, everyone has fun, helps each other, and makes u wanna come back for more definitely.
*Lots of pumps *Cheap gas *Pay at the pump *Easy to get into/out of from Big Bend Oh, and cheap Slurpee drinks.
I am reviewing their selection only here. They are rather accommodating as a staff, but so much of their stock is for another demographic that I don't find much there to be happy about..
Had dinner with 3 classmates, and not one complaint. Everyone enjoyed their food. We were seated right away, the food took a bit to come out, but that's because they make it all fresh.
Stopped in for lunch and was pretty disappointed. The Polish sausage sandwich was oily and barely warm, made on packaged sandwich bread that was stale, and took 20+ minutes to make.

Cleanliness not exactly a strong suit and don't be surprised if they go straight from putting money in register to handling your pizza but it must all add to the flavor .... Very good large sized pizza slices with very reasonable prices ....
Came here on a Thursday morning in October on vacation we got our food fast, but our lattes after we finished the meal. Good price for what you get and you can't beat the location! Will visit again!

I've been here a few times and always enjoy it: Poorboy sandwiches and the Maineto's. My only complaint would be that some of our oysters had bits of shell/grit in them, which is a bummer when you're paying $3-4 per.
Rudy's use to be one of my favorite places but they've back slid a lot and that was before the pandemic. I hope they do better because I miss having a place to go.

Extremely disappointed for the quality of the food at take out, during a time in which you would think they would be trying to step up their game and maintain quality and freshness when they are asking everyone to help them during this time/ Covid just disappointed.
Our 1st order, choose to do takeout due to Covid, little late to fulfill our order which kinda understand might be short stuff, but our food was leaking due to poor and rush service!

Amazing Indian restaurant in Bellevue! The servers were so nice and helpful and even helped us order and taught us how to eat our meal the Indian way! Everything was delicious! The vegetable samosa starter was my favorite part of the meal. We will definitely be coming here again!

panda express is all owned by one guy he is super nice met him before the way he runs things is great... but the mall location is disgusting they don't open on time they are rude they ignore you. they are always behind on putting food out
Sonny's is one of our regular places to enjoy food. The salad bar is fantastic my wife loves the pulled pork and or chicken and I get the grilled chicken great waitresses especially Amanda.
It serves it's purpose, has a lot of little, basic, items you would need for a day at the beach or just around the house when you don't feel like dealing with Wal-mart.

most of the food is over ten dollars with that being said breakfast is way over priced compared to other places, customer service is ok, order only breakfast items and it wasn't that great, lots of parking
The worst. I could do all my holiday gift wrapping in the time it takes for someone to acknowledge my presence at the drive Jon Taffer

Been here for an hour for a drug screen still haven't called none of the guys that were ahead of me management need to check this lazy ass girls that have people waiting for hours is just a drug screen how long does it take
Ask not what you can do for your country ask what's for breakfast Come join Fritai to a life changing taste
The lady rushed though my manicure and the French manicure has air bubbles galore and the white lines are way to big and inconsistent.

I tried the pork sub with broccoli rabe (been wanting to try this ever since I saw them on a cooking channel. August '11 tasting provolone instead of mild. They went overkill with garlic in broccoli rabe. I was so disappointed.

Very Very Delicious!! I had the Grilled Pork and Egg Roll Bun Bowl. Freaking amazing. Everything is made with fresh ingredients. They have a large selection of teas and coffees so I definitely want to come back and try some of those and of course get more bun bowls!
Worse customer service. They are ruining ADT's reputation. When you call ADT to install a new service make sure you are dealing with them directly and not with defenders.
The coffee is good quality but the girl who are working the counter are very rude and they touch their hair and mouths when making your coffee which is so gross. Last time I will be here.

Fast service. Dessert was average price and big portion. I got the egg waffle with ice cream and it was so much I couldn't finish it by myself and I have a major sweet tooth. Friendly staff. No dining in but there's outdoor seating

For someone not experience in eating Vietnamese food this would be a good starter place for someone to try some pho. But even if I'm hungry I'm gonna go with the pizza somewhere rather than this because it's average pho from a good Vietnamese restaurant.

As a local, I appreciate the great location and view at Stanley's. However the food wasn't. Service was mediocre and every time some of my party got up from the table they kept trying to buss the table.

I can't say much more than what the consensus among the bicycling community seems to be, that this is the largest reseller of stolen bikes in NOLA. I have seen it far too many times to believe its accidental.

4 guys standing around asked if they vacuum or me no response very strange....left and drove down to crew carwash. S uprising given the other reviews and yelp has a coupon but would rather pay full price somewhere else with good service.

Way good! Got the bison burger and a classic beef burger to share with my wife and they were both amazing and super flavorful. They have great fries too with all sorts of dipping sauces. We will eat here again

Worst service I walk in sit at the bar and no one acknowledges me at the bar. The 3 girls behind the bar stares at me and walks to the other end 15mins pass and still no one. Sad that someone recommended this place to me ‍

For the beer lover this a good place to visit to try different brews on draft get bartenders who love/live/breathe beer, are sociable, and have some personality . Also, work a bit harder on the speed and quality of the food leaving the kitchen.

Just found out that they do make rvs with tubs . Which they told me they didn't ... someone posted a 2017 keystone Montana 3920FB which has a full bath room, a shower and toilet all in one area ... huh

Awesome coffee! If you travel for business skip the Starbucks and go here. The brew is very tasteful. I actually love the buddy brew BOLT from Knee Deep Coffee Shop, coffee is very flavorful, which is important for a die hard coffee fan. Support local!!

Food is ok Service not nearly as good as it once was bar service hss taken a big step down they got rid of a good one should never hsd let her go they have lost a lot of business because of her dismissal
Good pizza but pasta dishes and so forth not good and way over priced for what it is, so I'll just stick to they're pizza

I met up with a girlfriend here for lunch. The concept is great and easily customizable free lunch for a reasonable price but I won't be going out of my way to make it there. I much prefer MAOZ vegetarian in Washington Square for my falafal needs.

I have to say, the first pie I got from here was on point, and ever since, the quality has gotten worse and worse. I honestly think at this point I'll just go to the Conshy location because their product is consistent.

Uncle Bill's has a nice selection of pet supplies soaked newspapers lining the bottom, and the whole place just seemed a bit dirty. The prices and products available were a plus, but I probably wouldn't go out of my way to visit this place again.

Cool spot for 1-2 drinks ! I love there gin cocktails, so delicious ... Can be deadly at times :) The best part abt this spot is the ambience with the cigar room feeling and always the right the leather chair.
Steak is Ok things that Not ok those peanuts tissue even utensil on the floor can't this restaurant clean up once in a while for some people maybe it's Ok but not for me yaiksss :-(

The facility seem to be fairly clean I ordered eggs hash browns and toast sunny side up eggs way over cooked no ketchup in the ketchup bottle on the table as usual you don't mind waiting on herself and complaining about the food

Just because I'm not eating animal products at the moment doesn't mean I can't enjoy some deep- the menu is huge and I want to explore. Plus, the hostess/waitress was really friendly and helpful. However, the flavors didn't blow me away.

Even for casino buffets this place comes up short limited selections even more so when trays are empty. Food quality -10 poor cooking seasoning and really snotty buffet help One bright point was our waitress Pat sorry she has to work here

I did the delivery option yelp gives you, I've been waiting over an hour, I called the restaurant, asked where my order is, the gentleman said he just now received it . I hope the food is good, cause the delivery service that's going through yelp is not.

I like the CONCEPT of this place but the overall food, subso and the ziti, pretty good . I guess I'd try their pizza as my friend raves about it but I would NOT go back to this place. I think they should've paid ME for going in!

The aesthetic is nice but I ordered an americano and all he did was put coldbrew into a cup and mix it with a little water. They have an americano on their menu but I later realized they don't even have an espresso machine. Underwhelmed and under-caffeinated.

The customer service in the vibe of the restaurant is great but if you have a mindset of coming to get good Spanishlike food this is not the place. It is a little bit expensive for what you get though. It is a fast and simple service
Tasted like it came out of a box or jar Very disappointed Service mediocre I won't be back but stuck with 2 gift cards lol
This place is great, I have only done takeout b/c of Covid but the staff is always super nice, the order is always right and the food is pretty good!

The coffee is really good and most of the staff were really nice however I went there to do a bit of work and found the music really loud and the wifi connection wasn't working so I ended up leaving and going somewhere else after one espresso.

Three Words: Mango Chicken Salad!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! I'm not a big fan of Mexican food, but their Mango Chicken Salad is DELICIOUS and only available in late spring/summer. Also good: Chicken Quesdaillas and Naked Burritos. Perfect for a nice summer lunch. I only eat here in the summer.

Love their pizza and their rojo potatoes are awesome. The downside is their service. We tried to order a pizza tonight and were put on hold for 6+ minutes and then had to argue with them about their combos. We just gave up and ordered from PizzaHut. Too bad.
The brisket was so tender and juicy. The Mac and cheese was exceedingly tasty and I loved the old police station atmosphere, we actually ate our meal in a jail cell.
We tried to AMC theater at painters crossing yesterday and it was fabulous the new restaurant style theater with the reclining seats is the way to go. Plus the price was right.
Wait staff were wonderful. Only complaint was the rock music was blasting - unsure about you, but I don't want to hear rock music and heavy drum beats blasting in my ear at 8:00am.

Great place to get a tasty BBQ brisket and sausage with a generous helping of sides. The gang here are fans of Shadowblaze's epicsaga, so if you mention it, they may give you a discount on your order! YMMV!

This place almost got five stars, but service was a little lacking and the place could use some updating on the I side. However that said, the food is ON POINT! I had the stuffed French toast and my husband had the shrimp and grits. Both were delicious!!

The grand searria is not so grand with room service if they don't have time for you no service valet parking was good but bell desk lost my luggage and had to deliver it late two times I'm so ready to go back home

I love going to this Dairy Queen . Good food, excellent pricing and some of the best Chili Dogs I've ever had and I don't even like Chili Dogs. Ice cream is great and you gotta try their pretzel sticks with queso, delicious!! Recommend!
