Never bought anything here, mainly because of the price tag, but they do carry a great selection for both guys and girls. The employees are also very friendly, so I'll give them that. Just waiting for a sale so I can actually go in and buy something!
Juan treated us right. I talked about a diamond upgrade but Juan was honest and said we were in good shape with what we have. He was right. The ring is excellent. Very much recommend.

No option to provide less than 1 star to post but unbelievably poor staff, more into their convenience than in serving guests. Stone cold food made so long ago and sitting under lukewarm lights. Stay Away and try anywhere else. You have been warned. Horrible experience.

The lady who served me was so rude. I understand the line was long but there was no need to be rude. I've had good service before but today the cashier appeared to hate her job and have an attitude with everyone she served.

I believe my wife and I partly ordered the wrong things, but she had the Ragu which was really nothing special and I had the Chicken DaVinci which was very bland. Service and drinks were good. Won't be on our revisit list.
The food is good but the delivery service is not good, this is the second time I have ordered from them and I am still waiting after an hour and half last time I never got my food at all
Most disgusting hotel I've ever been in!! Feces backing up in the bathtub from other rooms, holes in the walls, windows haven't been washed in what looks like years! Never again!

The pint and slice deal here is great! We were informed at the end of the night that there's a ten dollar minimum on the orders, our average order was well above ten dollars but some of us weren't drinking much that night.
Closed. Would've been nice if they had updated sites like Google maps and yelp to advise that they are moving their store, let alone advise of the new address.
I don't know how to change the date on my review of the laundromat we were there some time in October of 2013.
Neet place fresh made pizza giant olive bar it all looks so good Free fruit for kids just a feest for the eyes

On my first night as a new resident of Santa Barbara, my landlady suggested Cody's and I'm so glad she did. It does everything rightwellto local cafes and it should be on everybody's list of the best places to eat and drink jn SB!!

Super beautiful inside. Concerts are good because you stand. Went here two different times for a comedy show the chairs they have are cheap folding chairs that are super uncomfortable and not put together well. One broke and the person fell to the ground.
Don't be like me if you get your tires done and have a ton of loose change in your ashtray ‍ but someone might of needed it more than me ‍ great work and easy breezy experience!

Horrible. The bread was burnt to crisp. My steak was raw, then they put it back on the grill, and it came back burnt on the outside and raw on the inside. The server could care lessone hundred dollar meal for burnt food and lousy service.
I got a grande mocha latte with a shot of espresso, and this is the second time where they didn't fill up the cup' If you're paying 5$ for a coffee it should at least be worth it.

There were no other customers and I ordered a plain burger with no cheese and regular fries. The fries were undercooked and cold and the burger had cheese even though the receipt attached to it says no cheese? Disappointed

Try one of the chef's special creations, you'll be glad you did! I can't remember the name or remotely how to spell what I had, but it was an eggplant type of dish with bechemel sauce. I've got to go here at least once more whilst traveling around Tarpon Springs!
can not review as it is closed but web site shows open on sunday wasted and hour this afternoon but ended up having a great meal at Gulf Shores

My son took me there for my birthday for lunch in the meantime other people arrived were seated and served complete dinners immediately they were hard and could not be eaten! I would not recommend this place to anyone

DO NOT EAT HERE.....especially at late night! I don't have time to write a full bad review. All I'll say is the food is dry, lumpy, bland, old and not worth a penny of my time or money. I'm leaving. the service was excellent.
They don't tell you they are out of condiments until they already charged you in dont want to give your money back after you tell them you don't want it won't return
I'm not sure if this Whyte Ave location forgot they were a Goodwill or if they got confused thinking they were a bougie vintage shop 'cause these prices be outrageous!

The food looked out but the chef looking out into the distance when we walked over put me off ordering anything, so we just got Pepsi. This is one of two places we saw that served Pepsi instead of Coca-Cola.

It's simple great burgers, REALLY crappy french fries and expensive drinks. Heavy-metal is being played all the time which is great but oddly enough it rarely matches up to the iconic bands they name most of their food with, to bad.

Shopping has been a sport of mine and since I'm athletic, I try to get sports or work out stuff for cheap. Adidas is a hit and miss, sometimes you find something and sometimes you don't. Just depends on what you're looking for.

If you are going to eat a burger this is the place to do it! They use organic, grass and I don't see a way around it other than better ventilation it's just sort of a stale, fried meaty smell. Just my 2 cents! Great place to bring the kids!
The stuffed mushrooms were awesome order it twice mushrooms were awesome but I did not realize that they had clams inside of them so I had allergic reaction and to them
Went there tonight and it was horrible. Really was very disappointing Went to the one in Slidell and just thought that location went to a cheeper quality of food. Now I know it was both locations.
Definitely a fun place to stop for unique foods you may not find anywhere else, but sometimes it is overly crowded and touristy.

After wasting 2$ on the sucky vacuums next door at Aqua Jet Carwash, I went to mapco to finish the job and that was a mistake. Just as bad and cost 1.50$ for 4 minutes of low pressure vacuuming. Went over one blade of grass twice. Ugh. I'm pissy.

When I need some beer and food that feels like it comes from local farms and breweries, but doesn't, I hit up TJ. The store is way too cramped and the checkout system is ridiculous, but I keep going back.

Been here twice, first time was awesome!! Second time after bragging to my husband about it, it wasn't good, the biscuits and gravy came out like it was under a heat lamp but when you took a bite cold. We will try again tho.
Used to be my favorite burger stop, I haven't been in almost two months, when I did return the hostess was rude and the burgers aren't as thick as they used to be.

Unimpressed. Start off by mentioning that their poorly formatted online menu had us thinking the pizza was significantly cheaper. Follow that with the owner's lack of grace in acknowledging that fault mainly due to the owner's disinterest in his customers.

I went to this place after my co coworkers braced about their cheese plate which I hurried to try and I am SO happy I did!! I only had their cheese and charcuterie and that worth the 5 stars!!! See my pictures!!!

Good food and amazing service. Our waiter was extremely doting. The only reason I didn't give them five stars is because their aisles are a little tight and my dad kept getting bumped by ladies purses walking by.

This is a great store for random supplies and the staff are friendly however the hours are terrible and make it hard to access :/ I would go way more if they were open on weekday evenings or both weekend days

They sell bags of coffee beans and feature different roasters from all over the country fun to pop in and see what they have in stock. Although, the last time I went here, some of the bags were super old, with roasted dates of months-1year ago.

Pretty expensive for no reason when it comes to the sushi. They should def start to re-price and also elect a 50% off menu in order to stay competitive in the area. Better to go down to Verree and Red Lion for Wasabi if anything.

The food was very enjoyable and the only reason I'm not giving it five stars is because the restaurants layout was very crowded and I barely felt like I could move in and out of my seat. I really enjoyed the octopus and charcuterie board!
During the last month of your lease, the office has the right to let strangers into your apartment to tour the property. Not a secure or safe area and isn't that cheap. Do not recommend.

Lots of TVs to watch games. Food is just ok. Regular bar food. Usually drink specials are good. Gets kind of crowded and hard to walk around on weekends or when big games are being played- a good scene for the World Series!
This is probably one of the worst places ever on earth 2 hr for 1 plate every one else had eaten.

We were surprised by the lack of a drive-thru, but I guess that shouldn't really be something that brings the rating down. We just bought some Frappés for our trip back home. Everything went smoothly, and the drinks tasted fine! Just another McDonald's!

Great diner steps from i Independence Hall ham and cheese and Scapple which is mushed up pork, cornmeal and buckwheat which is grilled in slices specialty only available in Pennsylvania and probably an Amish dish which is an acquired taste.
Excellent tacos, queso dip and beer selection, waitress was not super attentive, but it was a good crowd - and loud!
Service was good. However I ordered the Eggs Benedict and what possibly could have been good was ruined by a "tough" muffinhard to cut with a knife

Never open on time. As much as I would prefer to give my breakfast business to Burger King, the McDonald's right down the road gets it simply because they operate at the posted hours and this Burger King does not.

Absolutely horrible customer service! Went in to simply ask if they took my insurance and they immediately dismissed me and didn't offer to help with anything else. Nice glasses selection but prejudiced employees. Will never go there again.

Awful customer service. Owner is extremely rude and should not be operating a business during a pandemic if she is seriously that scared of Covid. Close your doors or be more compassionate, we are ALL dealing with this not just you lady!
It's a health smoothie place. I think the shakes are made of different flavor protein powder, at least it tastes like the protein powder, not exactly what I expected, but hey it's healthy!!!

5pm every day, which worked out well for me on my midweek weekend. All the wines were excellent, but this is Santa Barbara forgetting that you poured a wine and pouring it again boosts the chances I'll buy there! :-D
Asosooutside February days. Literally woke up damp in damp bed sheets with a foggy mirror and prunein to check-out, and that's the most important thing!
If I could leave no stars I would. Yea it's cool and all when your nails don't lift hut not when they're practically cemented on and you're forced to go back to them to avoid more pain.
3 ice makers "out of order"; colleague's room was occupied; room never got warm; TV and guide were all messed up ; elevators don't work; balcony door won't open... Don't stay here!!
Ordered a breakfast panini to go and they did not put avocado on the sandwich, when the sandwich is supposed to come with avocado, but was charged full price anyways. Will not go back.

Was there this evening it was busy fine, beer was warm lager and bud light bottles both I can understand one kind but both eehh. Food was was good as usual but beer should be ice cold especially bottles. Please stock best sellers ice cold.

Mmm...bland, flavorless, overpriced pizza and a waitress that came by twice after we placed our order until she delivered our check. Not worth the trip. My kids said they really liked their pizza, tho, which is why they got 2 stars.

Had great full slab of ribs, wilbur beans & fries. That being said my moms ring tips were burnt and dried out and there is no way that you could eat them we had to send them back and she had to get something else instead so she had chili

Walking to Daisy's, the line wasn't too long. The service was very nice. Our waiter was kind, and made sure we were pleased. As for the food, it was pretty good, I would recommend if any place has a long wait line and you want to grab a quick bite!
come and pour you coffee as soon as you sit down spicy sausage is awesome good portions and very filling small place so you might have to wait food comes out really fast
While the doctor is extremely nice, the glasses selection was pretty minimal and the support staff wasn't overly friendly or helpful.

Food is good, but they literally have no employees. This creates slow service and wrong orders. Use to be a hit, but not so much anymore. Maybe put some money into revamping the atmosphere and upping employee pay, so you get employees that care and are dedicated.

very bad very slow. i highly not recommend this place . if this place is the only place on earth to heal me i rather to die than going this place again . they are rude and slowest place you can ever seen in your life . STAY AWAY FROM HERE

I had to give this restaurant 2 stars because the most important item in a pho shop is the soup - this soup was way too salty and lacked any beef flavor. Other than that, the rare flank steak was good. The service was good.

World class BBQ. Craft beers. Whiskey flights. Yes please. The only reason this place gets 4 stars is because its just a bit too pricey. I would still go back, and I will cause the place is so beautiful, I just wish it was slightly cheaper.
i had the spicy chicken this time. still good, alots of nice size pieces of chicken and a great sauce that wasnt too spicy but I still prefer the beef.
Ordered delivery. The Chicago style wasn't truly Chicago style pizza, but it's the best I've had in 12 years of living on the East Coast!

Shawn and Gina done my snow removal for many years and are extremely dependable and responsive. I refer everyone to them who's looking for snow removal service that's there when you need it and highly recommend them.

Confirmed Zabihah Halal! I called and confirmed, today, that all meat is Halal. That is so awesome since I only eat meat that has had the blood drained out before processing so to help avoid disease/viruses. I'll be dining here with colleagues/friends this week and will update :D

Excelente lugar para irnos en familia grandes y pequeños podemos caminar y encontrar gran variedad de dinosaurios estanques con peses vegetación abundante pero eso si vallan prácticos hay calor y hay q caminar pero un hermoso recogido

Aside from parking challenges facility was ok. But when my wife cancelled, they told her my membership was cancelled and i didn't find out until a trainer telemarketed me, then did not get response from manager for a week; deceptive practices, unresponsive management.

I got the riesling poached pear sorbet and the wildberry lavender and together they made the PERFECT pair! The pear sorbet is packed with flavor and tastes just like a fresh juicy pear and the wildberry lavender was so aromatic and creamy! Would highly recommend to anyone.
Excellent food what we ordered mild was actually the hottest of the dishes we ordered, the others were medium and spicy hot. The buffet, on the other hand, has always been phenomenal.

Absolutely perfect will definitely be recommending this place to everyone and I'm a server/bartender and CHRIS is 100% the best I've ever had not only at Waffle House but in many of places that I've received service to die for waffles as well

I have lived in Chinatown for 20 years, the Pho scene there is not nearly as good as the ones in South Philly but this place really gives them a run for their money. Hands down best Pho in Chinatown, maybe even in the city
Closed during normal business hours. Sign said "drive Thur only" with the hours posted and they had the drive thru closed/blocked off during those hours of operation.

Decent crepes, nice atmosphere, ok staff. My friend and I both ordered lunch crepes. She and other customers had two times the side salad I had, no explanation as to why I had so little. They also didn't take my substitution into account. I wouldn't return.
The smoothie was delicious! However it was very disheartening to see an employee smoking a cigarette, then come in and start working on the food prep area without washing her hands...

Very nice ambiance, great service and a great deal. Monday night special was worth it. a 6 ounce filet mignon with a nice salad and light dessert, overall great meat with nice side dishes and very cozy. thank you

We've been here twice in the past few weeks. The food is very well seasoned and the portions are generous - we will make this part of our regular dining. rotation. If you enjoy good Jamaican food, this place is a must visit.

Being from NYC I'm used to really good sushi but being in FL I was expecting to have to settle for ok sushi but I was pleasantly surprised! My whole meal was excellent and service was also great! I'd definitely go back!

This place was one of the highlights of my trip. The fried chicken was moist and juicy. We were a bit early for lunch and the line was a bit long - when we walked out around 1PM, the line was out to Broadway. Get there early or else!
Attended for my bachelor party, first time I'd ever been here I had a great time as did my guys and will definitely make more trips to Mons

Everything is excellent here, from the rolls to the pho without forgetting the friendly atmosphere. We went there on a weekday and were warmly greeted, the beef pho is excellent and they do not skimp on the meat. Definitely a neighborhood favorite!!
Will never go here again. Owner has decided to discriminate against a burlesque star Bella, because HE doesn't think her body image is appropriate for his venue. What an arrogant POS.
Charged me $3 for water just so I could get the password for the WiFi because the airport's wifi was down. And just to add insult to injury, the speed of the connection was slower than 90s Internet.
Absolutely disappointing. They are unprofessional, cannot complete a job, and there is no one to own responsibility for the shoddy mess they leave behind.

Great portion sizes for a hungry college student. I always get their Eggs Benedict and it always satisfies. Friends and family that join me have gotten their breakfast burrito, which is served in at least a 12" pan, is good as well.

If i could give them no stars i would. I waited almost 35-40 for my Rasta Pasta to taste like nothing but Alfredo sauce i just spent 41 dollars on BS. Fire the cook immediately I'm going back tomorrow when they open after this I'm never going back

Shout out to Amir for the great cut and got me looking fresh, definitely have to check him out and the other barbers are fresh too. Need a fresh looking cut in the city? Barber on 24th is where it's at.
Sunday 8:00 pm Glad i ordered a BigMac with lettuce & special sauce which is what its suppose to have, NOT!!! What tool doesnt know what is in a BigMac?? Thanks for ruining my day & wasting my $
I took my wife and daughter there to eat we did not enjoy any of the meals we ordered especially the fried chicken no taste what so ever, this is not a good place to eat stay away.
I like the place the services all right if you get the Carls wash don't expect your car to be superclean. I feel like they either need a stronger vacuum or just completely missed spots of your car

Clean restaurant and the food was generally good. I was not happy though when my bill showed an up charge on three items that our server failed to alert us about. When I called attention to it, she curtly defended the billing process. Lesson learned.
If you like spicy chicken this is the place for you! Lines are out the door and around the corner so try to go at an off time if you don't want to wait. But it's worth it if you do!

Didn't get food here, but browsed around the 3 bars in here on a Friday night and the view from the rooftop bar and the dj there were solid. Otherwise just another meatpacking place- at least on the end of Broadway
Great food and outstanding service! The staff and owners go above and beyond to ensure you have a good experience whether dining in or carry out.

Staff is so sweet. Very fast service delicious food and cheap!! Went with my mom, and little sister and got a waffle, kids cheese burger, grilled chicken sandwich, egg sandwich, coke, orange juice, and coffee for only $26!!

This was one of my favorite restaurants in Nashville as a local based off my first visit. Good food and service. The second time the food was consistent but the attitude of all three servers that night was so bad that I will never go back again.
came as part of the bike tour and were fed fried oyster po boy roast beef po boy just ok, the bread was slightly dry but the oysters were good.
This post office definitely needs an upgrade and more staff. It's always super busy and they tend to lose mail pieces or drop the packages even when it's clearly marked fragile.
I like The Nail Bar but having to call the day ahead to have a specific nail tech is bad when they won't answer the phone.

11/17 update dining experience wasn't as pleasant. Would go back to the restaurant again for the food as it was yummy. 11/19 update the post dining experience is where the restaurant lost it's stellar rating - and it could have been handled much better.

We order from them alot because their bugers are great. But, , the last few times our bugers were all cold, not jucey. Today I got a BLT.... everything is cold one huge piece of lettuce, 3 tiny pieces of tomato and 3 tiny pieces of bacon with no mayo.

TRIVIA THURSDAYS at this huge bar with lots of seating, thankfully since there were many teams competing during trivia night when i came i came a bit late joining my team's trivia so i didn't get to try the food but this place is your typical casual NO FRILLS bar
Pros: Close to home, friendly staff and cheap drinks! Cons: smells like dog piss and the bands that play in the back room are incredibly loud you can't hear your own thoughts.
This place has some of the best pulled pork I have tried in a while, there is always a line out the door and for good reason. They also have a new outdoor patio upstairs which is great on a nice day.

I just called to see if the restaurant has outside seating. The woman who answered said umm I don't think so, I'm pretty sure it's all inside. I will wait a few weeks before going there hopefully by then they will let there staff walk around the restaurant.

We had been looking for a good local bakery since we moved to AZ last year, and we have found it! EVERYTHING we have tried is absolutely amazing! From the pies to the French macarons to the chicken salad sandwich, it is all incredible! A local gem:)
Everyone loves their roast beef Poboy but its dry to me! But its a little good too lol so idk, their cheeseburger with gravy bomb but the meat taste mushy which is a no no. But its good smh idk
Not good at all, the rice has no flavor, the seaweed salad is bitter in aftertaste and the basic rolls are overpriced
Really wanted sushi and this place is close to home so we decided to try and the service was very prompt, they're kind and the food was fresh and satisfying.

Lots of great metal shows, almost never have a cover; small stage so the vocalist is usually on the floor with the crowd. Also, if you forget your card at the bar, they don't charge gratuity, which is awesome for someone like me...

I walked in to Pia last weekend and they got me in right away for a pedi and scheduled me later that day for a massage! tania and don were wonderful, as was the front desk receptionist! thank you, I'll be back!

If you're looking for one of those diamond in the rough thrift stores with designer clothes on every rack, don't go here. But if you need the basics this place is great! Awesome for finding household accessories for college students first apartments.
Amazing food, unfortunately bad service. I tried really hard to be nice and they kept being rude :( they rushed me through ordering and just didn't make me feel welcome.

If you're looking for something particular for your hair, you're likely to find it at Kim's. Loved the widetoo-walking around and assisting those looking for something specific or on the brink of being overwhelmed from the mountain of options.

Train your people or replace them. The pizza is great but the front of the house is so incompetent and apathetic that it almost makes it more trouble than it's worth to go here. Simply awful service .

Had the seafood bucket. It was good, but seemed a little deceptive on quantity...mostly good service but given it was not too busy service could have been better and they would have sold another round of drinks if they would have come back sooner

This place has the best cheesesteaks from anyplace outside of Phili It is cash only which is the only trick - but a trip to the atm is worth it! Don't forget an order of their delicious onion rings to share as well.

I've been here several times, for beer and coffee drinks and it's an amazingly chill, relaxed vibe. Friendly bartenders, big couches, hightops, all in an airy, rustic space that invites you to sit and enjoy your drinks with friends. Love the throwback Atari setup too

Called them this am said they will send someone out for a free estimate and the guy that came was here less then 5 mins looked around and said $4800. Didn't event try to see if he could dislodge the pipe NEVER USE ROTO ROOTER!!!!!
I got food poisoning here & for my first time trying, gave me the worst stomach ache I've had in years !!

Beautiful selection of all types of antiques, from furniture to decorative accessories, but the man who helped us was not very informed about the provenance or use of the items. This was disappointing as an antique lover because the item's history & lore add to its charm.
Order pizza there day before yesterday they acknowledged it was horrible and had set too long and would replace when I called today they would not
This location is horrible. I've been there twice and both times my sandwich 1) looked like it was thrown together and 2) contained a pathetic amount of chicken.

Apparently, you can only order online if you have a local number. Lived here for three years but don't want to give up the number I've had for 15, so it looks like I have to take my business elsewhere.
Menu is small, but the was pizza delicious. I think the paper dishes and plastic cups could be replaced with real dishes and glasses since it's an eat-in restaurant.
Generally when shopping it takes some time for an associate to ask if you need help, but when they do they are courteous and helpful.
I have found hair in my food, bones in my boneless chicken, hard burgers that were requested as medium-rare, yet I still come here. Why? You know why. There's nowhere else to go.

Not a vegetarian by any means. But i did decide to stop in one day and grab the sweet potato fries i got the sriracha alioli with it and they're so addicting. Everyone gets the groothie, Im the "im not eating grass ew type" but thats my next try.
The food was not fresh there, and it smelled so much that it seemed like a vomit, and I even went home and got diarrhea.

Food was good, service was lacking. Our waiter was all over the place. Empty drinks and a long wait for our food-we saw people come and go but it took 50 min to get our food. The shrimp creole and seafood gumbo were good but otherwise was disappointed.
Dirty store, staff sitting with their backs turned playing games on their phones, eating McDonald's where you can see them right when you walk in. Pizza is greasier from this location than others.
Oysters were fresh tasting. But since they were on the half shell it was a lot of shell attached to the oyster that was broken so I couldn't eat them freely.
The first I ever taken a tour bus. I was born and raised in Philly, we learned so much on that tour and had the funniest tour guide and best bus driver.

I haven't tried anywhere else for the floating experience but this place has a very friendly owner and staff that adds to the pleasure of doing something great for our health! If you can afford the time and money, this is such a healthful experience:)

While the technician was very nice, the place was very dirty. My appointment was in the morning so you would expect it would be clean but there were nail shavings dirt smudges and goodness knows what else all over the tables equipment and floor.
I can't really get over the pets on the tables waiters/waitresses petting the dogs and serving food but it's good for a food meetup and drinks only.
been several times for bike night on sunday service is terrible if you want to sit outside takes forever to get waited on. ' they need more staffing or something food is good if you have time to wait

This business is unprofessional! Responded to my quote, asked for pictures but never responded with a price. Also, after messaging them after sending my address they requested - I never heard from them after they send they were going to check their availability.
Nice brunch place. The "Kitchen Sink" was too much potatoes and after a quarter of the way through it, it just tasted like cardboard. The steak, I heard, was exquisite.

I thought for sure I knew how the sushi burrito would taste. If you've had enough sushi, you're not going to be surprised by any combination. Man, I was wrong here, the different unique flavors and textures make this place a unique treat every time you go.

I recently visited the checkers in Smyrna if you are in a hurry do not go approximate wait time for the drive thru 20 minutes when you finally get to the window order is wrong they need to be more productive instead socializing.

the room is fine. nothing special.. save your money and get some place for $70 or so or spend the same money for something nicer and better. I do not recommend this hotel and I will not stay here again.
Excellent service will continue to bring my car there always friendly just was a great experience I wish I had brought my car here sooner
Hair in food lost my appetite, what would you you do if you cut in a burger and you look at a hair? Never seen a manager guess he/she doesn't care...
For a hotel bar pretty good a little pricy 12 a cocktail but I guess that's what they get in NOLA

Generally when you're ready to grab a slice of pie at Joey's, you're not in search of the most amazing pizza. For what is it it did the trick. But it wasn't a good treat. Truth be told, I'll be back here again someday soon.
I came here for a birthday party and really enjoyed myself. I'm not sure if I would come back as I prefer to skate only and there are many other activities here. However, overall I enjoyed my visit.

Mojo's is a frequent for our family. The taco's are always delicious and the service, especially for the volume of people that visit on Friday and Saturday evenings, is outstanding. Great food and terrific service is hard to beat. Love Mojo's!!

Two words. French toast. You will want to take a nap afterwards, won't want to eat for the rest of the day, but they are amazing. Whenever I go I make sure and get there around 730. I hear the line gets long the later the morning gets.
Service was good. Place was Lovely and quick but the sushi just isn't good. It's not bad but it's like if you want sushi and you want a lot and your ok with Kroger quality than this is your jam.
This place is awesome, The service is very friendly and second to none The food brings me back to Bavaria where i lived as a child in a little city called Mainbernheim Germany just south of Kitzengen
It's too early to make an overall decision about sprouts vs sunflower, but I do have one huge issue with the changehoney toast but this week just killed it. Had to go with oatmeal over that crap :/

I visit this spot every time I'm in town. Good food and quick friendly service. Today we had the healthy oatmeal and the egg white feta scramble, both delicious and the scramble came with potatoes and fruit. The prices are very reasonable. Yum!
BEWARE: This business has closed. There was no notice to loyal customers, and no attempt to contact those customers who have lost hundreds of dollars in pre-paid massages.

Horrible, the guy that did my fill didn't know what he was doing! I had to leave that salon and go to another salon have those nails soaked off and a new set out on. Beware very dirty and terrible service

Service 3 stars Cooked to Order Fi which means I could check up on email while waiting. We were just passing through, but I'd recommend the place to anyone who's looking for a relatively inexpensive place to eat and hang out.

Great UK styled pub in Nashville with an awesome selection of drinks and food. If you've been to the UK, you'll recognize a broad selection of ales that you've seen in local pubs, plus a bounty of US selections. Enjoy yourself and relax...its a place to do it!

Located in the middle of the farmer's market and across the street from the Sounds stadium, The Picnic Tap offers a pretty good variety of craft beers. There is a pretty small seating area and the place is nothing special but it was a decent stop.
First time eating raw oysters... Hated it, I didn't care for their patron margarita either, it tasted like lemonade even after I ordered an addt'l shot of patron...
Food was good. I don't know if it was so good that it redeemed the terrible service. They have a "don't care if we're rude" type attitude - if I wanted that, I would've gone to Dick's last resort.
ok, so another sunday, but late i love it: remember the days when you could make a song just using the word "pussy"?

Burger was outstanding however the appetizer plate left a lot to be desired and the chicken strips were fried in catfish batter. Yuk. I might have ranked 5 stars if we had only ordered burgers. the food was priced fair for the quality and quantity.

My friend and I was served luke warm chili and stale pita chips. Using the word chips, plural is an understatement, since we both were only served a whopping 2 chips per bowl of chili. Service was above average but heat up that chili bowl!

Yummy food, inexpensive, and great service. I love their Iced Vietnamese Iced Coffee with condensed milk and so far have tried a seafood soup with rice noodles, a won-ton soup, and a combination pho and they have all been delicious. Definitely worth a visit. C:
Staff is unbelievably rude, I tried to call and leave a message and she told me "actually it's my lunch rush nevermind" and hung up the phone on me.... will never refer this place ever again.

Friendly service. Great prices but the food was very bland. The ravioli was just ok and the cream of artichoke soup I had to add salt and pepper so it would have some flavor other than cream. The bruschetta was decent, but could have garlic added to it.

Absolutely fraud and unprofessional staff, made me wait for 10 days on a property for virtual tour and at the end send me a message saying sorry the property was leased. I am glad I didn't fill out the application and didn't give them no deposit. Not recommended at all!!!!!

I love Chipotle, but I haven't had the best experience at this location. I ordered a kids cheese quesadilla and it was burnt. They didn't give me the sides and drink that came with it and when I asked they put it in tiny to-go containers.

This place is a gem. Who would think Jamaican in Ewing, NJ? In all sincerity, I don't eat Jamaican regularly, so maybe my understanding is skewed, but this place was an incredible find. Amazing jerk chicken, rice and beans were on point, plantains were perfect.

Had the Bestfriend burger with avocado and it was amazing. I didn't realize it was a beef patty AND a piece of fried chicken when I ordered but I have no regrets. Little holethe-walls like this are perfect.

We stopped in here for drinks and appetizers, and although it is a beautiful space and the service was quite good, we all agreed that the appetizer list was a little underwhelming. Such a beautiful space deserves a food menu that matches the quality of the space.

An fun place, but the acoustics leave much to be desired. The DJ also needs to insert pauses between songs during their Friday Latin night and play more traditional salsa/bachata songs instead of strange remixes that are extremely difficult to dance to, even for seasoned dancers.

I get the same thing every time - general Tso's, lo mein and egg foo yung. This food is consistent and delicious. To me this is the American version of Chinese food done very well and it's a solid choice plain and simple.
If you wanted to get your food in under an hour and a half it is not here, the food is good but I'd do pickup only if you wanted your food in a reasonable time
Sean was amazing called him do to some carpet cleaning for my daughter I live in California and She's here in Idaho. He was easy to set something up did a great job. Would differently recommend him

I've only ever had two people cut my hair in 30 years, but needed someone new postconscious business I've experienced in the last 2 years. It's wonderful to see how deeply they care about the health and safety of their employees and customers.
For a 9.99 exterior wash, we didn't expect it to be epic, but at least maybe the dirty rims would have been a little better cleaned. Lame. The people were nice though.

If you're not careful, the staff can seem slightly abrupt but I can understand since they are limited in the number of hours. The food is worth it, however long the wait is but you might want to preview the menu otherwise you won't know your Crixus from your Spartacus.

We are so fortunate to have this dance studio in Tampa. With over 30 years of experience, a huge, clean studio with multiple rooms and waiting areas, ample parking, and most of all a happy, supportive environment that fosters teamwork and a desire to improve. We love the studio!
The food is delicious, but when you order to go they will never give you a utensils, you always have to check before you go, otherwise you gotta eat with your fingers

I'm pretty disappointed in how this place has changed. I love the vibe and the coffee but the service is lacking and a lot of my fav baristas no longer work there. The turnover rate seems like it's a lot.

Waited 40 mins to get burnt salmon that was dropping oil! and tasteless broccoli, was running late for my flight so couldn't order something else and had to eat the broccoli and they charged me for it lol .

I don't often get down to Broad Ripple, so when I found myself down there today with time to kill, I'm lucky I drove past Yats and remembered the glowing Yelp reviews. Great Drunken Chicken, great people, cool place.

The most bland burger I've ever had besides the one my 90 year old father in law cooked for me. I love smash burgers but this one was way beyond over done, literally no seasoning, and might had well been made in a microwave. Sad.

This location is in the Gallery interested, underpaid staff has a distinctly "ghetto" vibe here produced, el the snooty law firm folks I work with could sniff that out in a minute. Instead, I lavish my pre love the cheap socks.

When it comes to covid conscious places, tailgate is doing it right. I watched as multiple groups left and had tables cleaned a couple of different times before a new party sat down. Add that on top of the awesome pizza and beer, you can't ask for much more
Horrible ER, if given the option stay away. Would give a 0 if I could. Expect to wait at least 2-3 hours and expect the service to be what you would expect from a hospital that excepts Medicaid.
BOMB breakfast sandwiches!!! Friendly staff and quick service. I'm very particular about my BEC sandwiches so when I came across Christie's after having just moved to Fairmount, I was thrilled.

Great service. Friendly staff. The owner came by and hung out with the kids. No kids menu but we got two plates of sweet and sour chicken for 5 little ones which they happily shared. Kids loved the fish tank.

The food is pretty good, but had to give two stars because the establishment wasn't very clean. One of the employees grabbed the stack of trays on top of the trashcan and then reused them without cleaning or even wiping them down. The floors and tables were pretty dirty too.
My laptop refused to come on My deadline had 'way come and gone I fell to my knees God whispered, "Tech Ease" All fixed thanks to David and John.

This place is awesome if you are in the mood for small plates & a few good drinks. There are many options for flights of wine & whiskey and their food is tapas style, so I would definitely suggest sharing!
I find it amazing that a Cuban which is such a simple sandwich, can taste so different at so many places. This place has the absolute best tasting Cuban ever

Happy to finally have a Rack here in Indy. Just found a bunch of great deals and will be back. Word to the wise - weekdays are best to avoid the crowds, which can be intolerable, and look for their special events for major scores.
In brief - very overpriced mediocre sushi. But it wins some points back with a unique futuristic atmosphere, great location for Penn folks, and a fantastic crab fried race.

I had a sign made here a while back, and I think everyone needing a sign Should expect A1 top notch craftsmanship from ms eve. She is amazing. I also purchased her " original pothole recorded in new Orleans dated 1718" hand painted sign from her also. It is AWESOME
There's buckets of Budweiser and karaoke on Thursday nights. If you're looking for a spot to chug domestics and sing your heart out among southsiders, 31 Bar & Grill is the place for you.
Just waited over 30 minutes for a take out order of egg rolls they forgot to give me the last time.

I ordered the Lanzhou Noodles and Pan Fried Chicken Gyoza for takeout the broth is in a separate container that you can later pour into the noodles and everything else is packaged nicely. Im excited to try other items that pack a bit more punch.
This is my favorite hotel in Tampa and I'll tell you why. It is reasonably priced, the rooms are clean and there is free breakfast The also offer internet and they are close to everything

This is one of my go to places in Clayton. Good food and drinks. I've never been disappointed with anything I've ordered. Service isn't always stellar, but they have open air doors in good weather and they've got great live, acoustic music on Wednesday nights.

Really great little shop. Brought a bag of clothes that I have no need for and ended up selling 2 scarves and a dress for $21 store credit. I'm always second hand shopping so now my next trip here I will feel like it's free haha.

Wish I could give minus 1, walked in and sat at a table for 10 minutes, several bartenders and waitresses around with almost no customers but we never had a single person stop at our table. Apparently if your not "known" by they staff your not welcome.

Highly recommend! Excellent food and Superb Service. We have dined 4+ times and never a disappointment. Absolutely elated with Coast & Olive after being Montecito Cafe regulars for years which was a Montecito gem that we sadly miss, but greatly appreciate Coast & Olive addition to the 93108 lineup.

Really nice atmosphere and beer choices. Monday night is 21 beers which is a deal! I split the Belgian fries with a friend and got the yum sauce, it was just okay and I probably wouldn't eat here again. I definitely want to try the shot ski!

The cabs and drivers were awesome!! Always on time and very professional. Even went out of their way to get something I left in the cab back to me before my flight left. Great customer service, would totally recommend them!!
Not impressed. Have had great meals there before but yesterday had cold eggs, stale muffins and no name on the wait list that I registered,

I was not fully aware that this was a speed bingo place. Man, they call the numbers fast! And to my disappointment, they closed early without much notice, so we spent a lot of money and time to get there, only to play 1 of the 3 games.

Food was really good and yummy tasted very fresh they put the croutons in the salad dressing so it was kind of soggy but overall silver flavor. Our server was super nice and attentive. Will definitely be going back it was delicious
On a Wednesday delivery time was over 2 hours. I've wanted to order from here for awhile but no one answers the phone when they do it's a 2 hour wait. Oh well

What a great place. I had the pleasure of eating here a while back and sure enjoyed it. They happened to have all their bottles of wine 1/2 off the night we went so we took advantage of that. The service was top notch and the food tasty.

Tip top nails is rude. Worst customer service I have ever had in a nail salon. I wouldn't mind as must if they actually did a decent job but they always rush and give you attitude if you try to correct something you don't like. Wish I didn't go

Disgusting. Definitely the worst Chinese buffet I have ever been to. The food is terrible, and if you order the to go buffet they of course weigh it but they also dish up your sides for you and then charge you for however much they decide to give you. Ridiculous.

The staff is friendly and will explain for those who don't speak Spanish fluently. My food was okay, it's was similar to a beef patty but filled with chicken and pork; my daughter loved every bite. I'll probably try the chicken or pork chop next visit..

Pizza = AWESOME this place rocks, salads are fantastic, prices are fair, service was great, it's a small location and it was packed but the patio area was nice. It's not typical pizza, it's not round, it's not greasy, you really need to try this place to appreciate it.

Highly recommend, very small place that at first glance may seem like you won't have a decent meal, very surprised by the seafood and friendliness of the entire staff, prices kinda expensive for some things but overall a good experience.

We celebrated our wedding anniversary here. It was an amazing experience and I'm happy to meet our server who's my fellow kababayan everything is great can't wait for our next dine in. My family really love it! Thank you!
8/5/2014 Been going here for 20 years and whoever is currently running this operation obviously has no regard for the CDB name. On the plus side the food was good and our server gave it her all.
Went there for dinner this past Sunday at 4 pm, walked in and saw the tanks empty, asked if they were out of lobster and they were!!!! What kind of mismanaged Dump is this?? Will NEVER be back

Good place that brings me back to my Southern upbringing! Interesting to see how they combined Caribbean/southern cuisine with a few small things I'd change to the Flan and the Catfish . Great Sweet Tea, Southern Hospitality, and Live Music!

Before trying Max Well, I doubted that a vegan dish could hold offer any flavor or depth . The NOLA bowl proved me wrong. The juices and smoothies are good, but the price point feels a bit high to make them a regular item for me.
I am so glad this place closed, it probably saved a lot of people from getting food poisoning like I did.
The food is always good but they always forget my extra sour cream or desert and it ruins it for me then when i call i feel bad cause the kids that work there are very nice

I'm always pleasantly surprised by what I find in Moda, puffy prince pants & belted heels for one of my Neo-Victorian outfits? Affordable work khakis? The selection is not a large as Eternity Fashions, but they usually have a few really nice pieces that Eternity never manages to get.
WOW! We got the quiche, sausage gravy go cup, and banana pudding something or another that comes in a clear jar and YOU MUST TRY IT! It was so delicious!

Do not go here. Impossible to straighten out any billing mistakes on their end. It took my insurance company over six months to get this squared and I'm now owed a refund from them and cannot get a hold of anyone. Nothing but voicemail with no return calls.
Most horrible service ever at. Starbucks. Server said they were out of all breakfast sandwiches but as I was waiting for my coffee, barista pulled about a variety. Waited for 45 min on line.

Not a big fan of Cajun food so hard to fairly judge their food but I do like the environment here. If it's you first time to eat Cajun, you can try red bean with rice. The bowl with dishes need to be clean before giving to the customer.

Delicious donuts but need bigger boxes or to separate the donuts. I bought them for a work event they put a dozen in a box and bagged them but now I have two that are completely smashed:( Not exactly a dozen anymore..
I enjoyed my veggie burrito. Having a restaurant that is non-GMO is perfect! However not being able to guarantee the vegetables organic has my rating at 3 stars today, as I am a Vegan.

This is the steak burrito I don't get to eat because I asked for no cheese or sour cream and there's sour cream. Lots. The first couple bites tasted great. Called 3 times and no answer, not even a hello could I wait. Sad

Top steak house in all of New Orleans. This is by far my favorite place my wife and I go to. It's really pricey on regular days but if you're in the service industry they have a SIN night on Thursdays after 9pm
Good treats and coffee at the register with a nice and efficient staff, good to stop in while you are perusing the Italian market.

My standard of XLB is set by Ding Tai Fun in Taipei both make large XLB and err on the side of greasy broth and chewy top knot. However, Dimsum Garden's broth is less greasy than Joes and there is no weird aftertaste in the crab and pork filling.
I travel all around the map and this restaurant is awesome I'm stopping here everytime I'm in Reno great place great service nice and clean!!

Rough casino A ton of smoke Drink service is less than decent Rewards program....verdict is out Positives are free parking, cheesesteaks on premises Good size casino with plenty of gaming tables and slots Poker room is the draw for me

Awesome family own place, the best dammmm pre-sliced carne asada meat I have ever had. All them other one have all that fat on them that your paying for I just wanna pay for the meat. This place even has a little Mexican restaurant as well.

Fantastic. Been in this area three years looking for the best pizza. FOUND! Seriously this is really great NY style pie - and even though it's a drive from Franklin, we will be back!!! PLEASE open a Franklin or Brentwood location!!

The service was bad and the food was over rated. I wouldn't recommend. In fact when I left after having dinner my stomach starting feeling a little rough and had to ask the waitress for crackers to settle my stomach.
Great coffee and açaí bowls, but it does take forever, and it seems like the people that work there aren't happy to be there . Seems like the management may be over criticizing to the employees.

Been here a few times each time service was really slow not sure if they do that on purpose or not. Burgers are pretty solid but a tad skimpy if you like a big burger add an extra patty. Fries arent worth getting though.

Brussels sprout hummus!!! Meg is the best waitress and gave us so many recommendations, she also has a rockin sense of style and made me feel loved and appreciated. I just went through a really bad breakup and meg made me feel that maybe id love again one day.

Rude workers! Containers for the food they offer won't work for airplane travel. Flight crew as well as another customer never got as far as getting any food because the service was so incredibly bad. AVOID!

Worst, Worst, absolutely the worst, ordered around 6pm received order at 8:24pm then I'm thinking ok going to enjoy my pizza the pizza wasn't cooked I been calling the store and no ones answering so pissed never again will I order from this place !!!!
Signs say dining room open its BS not 1 table set up only take out not even a " we are sorry" just a ow well such a shame !

**** BUYER BEWARE**** Quadratec charged our credit card on May 22nd for an online purchase, to this date July 4th still receiving email that they apologize for the delay! After going through all this we decided to do some research, guess what? hundreds in the same position!
We made a small delivery order via UberEats and got royally screwed with a tiny portion of beef brisket for more than $10. Very disappointing.

Went here once and loved the yoga studio, instructor, and session. It was very clean and peaceful. They provide yoga mats and blocks etc so all you need to really do is show up with water and a napkin if you need one.

Terrible. I ordered them through postmates and the steak was very undercooked and I ordered a cesar salad and they literally gave me a box full of cabbage yes just cabbage not even sliced lettuce no crutons literally not a salad just cabbage.
Unbelievably rude attendees and this is that like cannot believe that they close at the beginning of the season at 8 o'clock and refuse to serve the 50 people waiting in line
I used to go out to lunch w my coworkers Chinese joints in KoP pretty often, but have been eating vegetarian recently. This place is a godsend! Highly recommend the Peking duck and bbq pork.
Ok food, burnt cheese on my cheese bread, mislead on calimari or I wouldn't have ordered it, man, better than Pappas John's though
We have been in town for three days and have had 5 loaves of the "bread and butter" - order it. A lot of it. You won't regret it!!

Johnny's is hilarious. It follows the Hooter's food service business plan: bar food, alcohol, and scantilylover's dream: lots of cheese slices and expertly sliced onions, peppers, lettuce, and tomatoes. Good stuff! Another visit turned me on to their wings, which are so much better than their corporate counterparts.
I checked in for maybe 2-3 hours room was filled with white cat hair and dust brown pillows I stepped in and just wanted to leave
A hidden jewel! Cool atmosphere nice pour on the drinks . Seared Tuna with soba noodles House salad Apple crisp was the combination I chose from the DEVOUR DOWNTOWN menu and I was not disappointed.

I wanna love this place because pizza is yummy but the mere fact the one time I order pizza and don't check it then get home n it looks like someone took a bite out of it is so disappointing n disgusting!!!
Waited over an hour for nachos, they comp'd us a drink in the meantime, but then closed out and went over to FGL and had a way better experience for food, drinks, and a better band.

The fact they charge $2 and some change just to pay online, and $5 via checking account online really chaps my ass. It's actions like these that really show the customers how much you value their business. Wonderful core values PECO, you guys do a bang up job

One of the worst banking experiences ever. If you want to be treated like a criminal who's trying to fraudulently get money out of your own account then bank here! Los Altos location will certainly give you the "criminal" experience!

Atmosphere awesome, meal fantastic, great energy awesome vibe. The two bartenders that waited on us with food and drink the entire evening had very little personality and very little appreciation for our cash tip etc. Not impressed with the bartenders!!!!!

My go to breakfast spot when I'm in Reno "" everything is freshly made and executed with passion " professional waiters get these covers out quick and that makes me happy if your in Reno go check them out you won't be disappointed.
Took forever and what we ordered didn't taste like normal, the barista did give us a free coffee to try which was very good. So five stars for that.
Enjoyed are meal, thoroughly. The food was tasty, the steaks cooked to our wishes, and the Caesar salad was a s good as it gets, without being prepared at the table. Enjoyed their Margaritas, too..

Place needs to work on their service. Waited for 10 minutes before being seen, thus bumping time out of the happy hour range. And wasn't seen until 6:02 and was told I couldn't do happy hour because it ended at 6:00 when I sat at around 5:50.

Chickarrones, NOT Chicken Skin, just popcorn chicken with some soft skin attached to it covered in that Chinese sweet chili sauce. I was expecting Crispy fried chicken skin based on the name and the other photos of fried chicken skin from previous guests.
Update - I finally received a call back from the post office. Though they couldn't provide a reason my packages never arrived, it was nice that they took the time to call me.

Took 45 minutes to be seated then another 30 for food. Had to ask waiter for another drink twice, took 10 minutes in between, watched him help bus a table while waiting. Food came out room temperature
Sophie was a great waitress; food was delicious except we don't like cold syrup, but super timing & location to go to movie nearby
Is this place still in bad shape does anyone know I booked room there Tuesday and wensday, just saw the reviews

The food isn't terrible, but there's just nothing very remarkable about it. Not a lot of flavors, the bao was rather dry, noodle soup was bland, soup dumplings were ok, black milk tea was ok. Service was amazing and hospitable, but the food left a lot to be desired.

Tried the classic burger and fries. I was disappointed. The patty was bland tasting, dry and overcooked. The meal was saved by the fries which were a fresh but still, I would rank a few steps below places like Five Guys. The staff was friendly.
My ice cream was good, just not sure it was worth all the hype and standing in line. I will be back if I'm in the area but I am not sure I would make a special trek out to try it.
Kim and her staff go above and beyond in the care of my puppies and i would never trust anyone else when it comes to boarding or training.
Friendly, Family Oriented, spacious, Quick and easy service, food and service is consistently good, prices are fair and always enjoy my meals here.

The manager wants the rent paid within 3 days of the beiginning of the month but does not deposit the checks till 18 days later. I mean why would they want it so fast when they do not even deposit it till 18 days later?
CON: Service is inconsistent. - BOTTOM LINE: Out of 3 of the strongest BYOB Mexican places in the area/city, this one has the highest quality entrees and the most space for big groups.
Its so crazy we cant even get a refill on our coffee we have been seating here for 15 mins no one has stop to ask
Food was fantastic and worth the wait! Food also came out quick so although you may have waited in line you know you're going to at least get fed quickly. Get the B-biscuit it's worth every bite!

A glorified diner with amusing pretensions and crashingly loud music, which could exist only in a city with low restaurant standards that doesn't know any better. They should have stuck to just plain diner, where at least the food used to be good.

Really not very good. Slimy processed packaged sandwich meats. I don't know why I go there every 8 months or so, it's usually when I am hungover on a Sunday. One positive is that they are consistent and open late-ish.
Staff was fine but the no smoking room reeked of smoke and there were nats flying around and we left with BED BUG bites. For a little bit more you can find a much better place to stay.

great sweet zesty taste i do prefer a bit thicker crust then they make at this spot, though.... overall, seems to be high quality ingredients and sh*t, any place that freakin barrels there aqua from nyc gets a least a thumb up - check out when on downtown tampa grounds

I ordered the Tuna and it was good....honestly hard to screw up but I did like it and I would recommend trying it out if you are in the area! Staff was helpful and it was packed so I am guessing everything was good!
If I could give no stars I would, the service team here is absolutely awful, just drive your broken car don't even bother coming here.

Why did this place not come up instantly when I searched for dinner near my current location just 3 doors down?! It was delicious! Homey, yet elegant, with friendly service and delicious food. An overabundance of salt knocked it down a star, but we would definitely return!

Got the buffalo pizza, it was very tasty and I understand the nature of this style of pizza but I wish there was a tad more cheese. The sauce fortunately saved this pizza two complimentary garlic cheese knots to tide us over before we could get our pizza home. Awesome!!!

Very poorly managed... dirty tables, dirty bathrooms, dirty floors, over flowing trash receptacles, unfriendly staff and if you order inside you are going to wait . I suggest skipping this one... if not, you will be disappointed.

This women does not care about making money. We walked in and were looking to buy a bunch of stuff to take back home when she literally kicked us out because she was on her "lunch break". Why is the store open when you're on your lunch break? Very rude.

DO NOT GO HERE! The only upside is that it is Popeye's . They gouge truckers with prices 25-50% higher than a regular Popeye's, they didn't have half the items we ordered, plus the food court is dirty. This place is a disgrace to the other excellent Popeye's stores & chain.

The expansion looks good, but the customer service is horrible. We waited over 5 minutes at the hostess stand and not a single one of the 3 or so employees who saw us walk in attempted to acknowledge us. We walked out after 6 or so minutes of standing there.
I have no desire to ever come back to your business you were extremely rude to my husband and I and I will never be back. I'm sorry if you cannot except that but that is the way it's going to be.
This isnt the best dollar tree as it is a smaller location and has an ok selection of things to shop.
So sad to to spend my hard earned money here, I was okay with my mediocre food but some of my party had to send their food back!
performed check out of units efficiently and completely replaced condenser pump with switch and provided details on possible future repairs expensive though
The food is decent but nowhere near amazing. Have been here twice now and definitely had a better experience the second time around though I've experienced better South Asian food elsewhere.

One of the best brunch spots in the city, hands down. Gorgeous space, delicious food, really nice people. I've been here with large groups a few times, and they are very accommodating even during the crazy weekend-morning brunch rush.
We LOVE steelbach! We had a party of 9 looking for a last minute brunch reservation and we tried calling everywhere we'll be back!!

I loved the food but did not like the rowdy noisy staff both waiting and cooking if only they kept the discussions professional and more quieter noticed the manager or lead staff not saying anything sad.........good food though
Worst steakhouse ever....Made a reservation a several months ago for a graduation party and sat over an hour and half past our scheduled time. Rude staff and horrible food. Don't go

We didn't get sweet and sour sauce with the crab puffs, the twice cooked pork was not twice cooked pork, they ate skimpy on the protein with the house fried rice and the servings are small. Don't ever have to eat here again.

Went a few times. Each time I was not overly impressed. Their bbq selection was a bit dry and it is so loud that at times you can't even have a real conversation. Since the first time I went the prices have gone up in their meat platter to share.
Really like this place, bustling atmosphere and food variety. Some of the foods could be a little tastier but overall still my fav place for quick lunch in downtown Indianapolus

Rivergate Mall shoppers will enjoy this Panera Bread location with free wireless internet. This is one of the few Goodlettsville neighborhood places with free wifi. Quieter than some of the other Nashville Paneras, it serves the same madeeachbowl soups are especially popular when the temps go down.

Very cool sushi dive. Wait goes quickly, sushi comes out fast and fresh, BIG bottles of Sapporo. My 7 yo loved sitting at the sushi bar watching everything get made and my husband and I enjoyed the laid back vibe. Definitely recommend, will definitely go back.
Don't go here unless you are prepared to spend the whole afternoon. I have been here four times a while the food is pretty good and the servers are nice, I always leave pissed off.

I gave them the repairs needed per the dealership. It turns out the majority of those repairs were not required. They could have performed them anyway without notifying me but instead they let me know those additional items were not needed. They saved me a great deal of money.

This was a pretty decent and standard Hampton Inn. The staff was very friendly and helpful . And the breakfast was standard Hampton Inn fare. I did enjoy the fact that they had the little brown "to go" breakfast bags for those of us who woke up at an obscene hour!
Great service in a small space. The bar is set pretty high for the rest of the Starbucks, if not for every coffee house, once the customer comes into this place.

food was the standard Fazoli's food, the dinning area was dirty and the restroom was gross. The place was crazy busy, and the management was not allowing people to find a table until they had ordered food.
Menu variety is nice and I loved the backRoom club seen was pretty good but space is very limited and not the cleanest

Pretty disappointed, we here for avengers opening weekend, concession line was over 25minutes deep, totally overwhelmed for the crowd they should have expected. Poor management: would not recommend for busy weekends in the future
bad service I did not feel so welcome here n I felt like they was rushing us to eat n wanted us to get out

No idea what kind of bar this is although maybe a bit pricey. As usual my test breakfast was the Eggs Benedict eggs were perfect, potatoes tasty and crisp and the salad was a nice touch. Overall but not sure I'd go for drinks.

Currently the place is not taken care of. The food was not very good, the rice was not cooked properly and the macaroni seemed to have been left out for quite a while. I would recommend to go to another pollo loco.

This used to be one of our favorite places to get Chinese. I'm not sure what happened in the past year but we've eaten there a few times here recently and I found bones in my chicken and a hair in rice. We will not be ordering from here again.

It's Walmart. There's plenty of parking. It's clean and the prices are good. I came to the deli today and my experience wasnt bad except for the fact it took 30 minutes to buy some cheese and cold cuts. At least the staff was friendly.

Eh, it's just another cinema. Insert complaints about expensive food and obnoxious customers here. I do dislike that this cinema doesn't have the middle connecting hallway between the two wings of theaters which eliminates half my options for movieturns necessary...

Really cool place to try Latin food, mainly Colombian style, with very unique, creative, and sumptuous flavors from regions of Latin America. The coconut flan is INCREDIBLE and the pina colada is delicious! The supervisor Elizabeth was sweet, delightful and accommodating, and our server Ivette was very attentive.
Not enjoyable. I was harassed by Gia for not doing a dance. Maybe it was a bad day for them but I had came in with the intent to spend but left because the lineup wasn't very attractive.

When I moved from NYC, I was excited that there is a Vietnamese restaurant close to my new house, but That was short lived. I don't know what this is, but it's not Vietnamese. Very disappointed. I will be driving 45 minutes to Tampa to get my Vietnamese food.
Terrible customer service. Not worth time or money when there are so many other great places to work out that offer great customer service and overall experience.

I used to go to BSI back in 1999, and definitely changed for the better. Everything is clearly organized: new releases right by the entrance, older back issues and card games upstairs, graphic novels in the back.

I never had Viatnamese food before I got the soup with the steak and an order of spring rolls they were both good and I really like the different Hot sauces and hot oil .I will definetly go back again.
Place is good for a Wendy's. Did have an extended wait for a few chicken nuggets but the place is new so I give them a slight pass.

Came for brunch and overall it's just okay. The prices are steep, portions small and flavors just soup brunch and the waitress starting clearing utensils with food still on plates & my bread plate while I was mid bite. ... not a fan

Used to be a great waterpark. Very hard to breathe in there and my eyes burned the whole time. I could actually see people struggling to breathe and most people were teary eyed because of the insane amount of chlorine. Paid full price for half the attractions to be closed.
Nice clean rooms good breakfast nice employees but it's a stones throw from the highway and a major off-ramp so it's an all night truck air brakes and noice.

I love Starbucks. A lot. But this drive through on the weekends is so incredibly slow. I don't know if they're understaffed but sometimes a car won't come out of the drive through for over 5 minutes. Sometimes it seems almost 10.

Nico's is perfect if you can't make it to spots like Maico, Anita's, or La Fresita. Standard burritos, nothing-special tortillas, big portions. Don't come here expecting a culinary experience, but if you have a hankering for Mexican fast food and nothing else is available, definitely make a stop at Nico's.
We love this location always friendly and almost always very quick. We dont come here daily like a lot of coffee junkies but when we " got to have it " this is the place.

Great variety for your muscle car! I've been spending money with Summit for over a 1/4 century, it allowed me to build my Chevelle and upgrade my Camaro. There online process is smooth as well, sometimes you just wanna see items first hand. Definitely recommend, pricing is fair.
Terrible service and food Ordered the crab crepes to find out it was imitation and they refused to replace even though it was not listed as such on the menu. Will never return
Their service is pleasant and a little slow. The food is very good and authentic. 4 stars because they do not have Hunan Beef but I will eat there again next time I'm staying in Santa Barbara.

Really good breakfast spot. Got the "Everything but the kitchen sink" which was delicious. The red velvet pancakes were a little too much like cake for my liking, but the rest of the table enjoyed them. The chicken and waffles was very good. CASH ONLY!

This venue has good sandwiches, is in a good location. Counter ordering and very casual dining. The artwork is in an unusual format and doesn't do much for your appetite, however this didn't seem to affect the crowd. I'd give it a C

Great food bad customer service. Must be someone new behind the counter. Typically great service but the messed up my order multiple times and then the woman behind the counter just kept looking at me like it was my fault. Fix it.

I choose Holiday Inn so I can get United miles... not such a good reason huh. Well, overall the place was okay, nothing special. I would recommend the best western over the holiday inn though since the bw has complementary breakfast, friendlier staff, and nicer rooms. Oh well, lesson learned.

When in Metairie, this is a great meal but the line is always so long and moves SO slowlyno such thing as running in for a quick meal. But if you want a burrito the size of your head, they always come through.

Over all 3.5 Atmosphere is a 4 Food is a 3 soof-a peanut butter lovers? Kids friendly which is nice, because as a parent I can't be relying on a stranger to watch my children and believe or not kids enjoy eating too. Will come here again.
I herd they had great burgers I felt it was average I went healthy with the lintel burger I like this place better when it was the Mexican restaurant
Stay at Hilton 50+ nights a year. Not real picky. Came in late and was woke around 7 with men outside rooms window on the 6th floor in scaffolds removing plaster oh well.

just had the Fenway burger to go. great burger with hot Italian saugage. as always a great variation from the old burger. that with truffel fries can't beat it the order was ready when I got there and when I got home it was still hot. five stars

After visiting Arizona over Christmas and stopping in at Quiktrip, I've lowered my score for Speedway. This place is just terribly slow, plus the gas they have is not top tier, so your car will not be happy in the long run either.

Longest line out of all the options in the food court. Pros: They skimp on everything. No matter burrito bowl, burrito, taco. The portions, protein, toppings are all skimped unless you ask for more but even then the servings are small -Employees complaining why the line is always so long

The selection is very limited. The Sakana roll was the only one I liked, and it's double the price of normal rolls [10 dollars for 5 pieces]. I had high hopes for this place, especially since it's in Somersett, but I probably won't be coming back again.
Best Cubans in town!! Any family or friends that come to visit from out of town, get a trip to Bodega for their mouth watering Cuban.

Todd Bruno Guy's ROCK! they went out of their way to try and ensure that I got a issue fixed on my vehicle I purchased through them, I will do business with then again. They not only earned my trust, but my business.

I work in Saint Pete but live in Tampa. So every Friday before I head over the Howard Franklin Bridge to home I stop here for some out of this world Mexican. Love the beef brisket taco and cheese enchilada, it's called the Favorito CombinadoAuthentic mole sauce too!!
Drove 30 minutes, spent two hours, and Paid $50 for acrylics with gel not even 24 HOURS AGO and 4 of the nails are already peeling. Furious. Waste of money.
Food is ok but service is horrible every time, the kids act like they are doing you a favor to wait on you, never been in here that this was not the attitude

My fries and burger were very cold not even remotely warm in any way for the past three times I have been here! Get your act together one of my friends saw employees smoking in the back of your store.
Have they opened up to do elective surgeries my husband his other knee done since they done so well on his right knee

This place was really great, the service was great, the staff was nice and welcoming and the bubble tea and shaved ice was amazing. I give this 11/10. P.s I would travel to Pennsylvania just to go here.
Fast food sushi. I'm not really into fried sushi rolls and was disappointed in the lack of rolls that didn't included part of them being fried.

The fly's and flying insects in general are so bad I feel like I'm eating this in one of those feed Africa commercials. Luckily I have the bowl so I can cover it between bites. I won't mention the buffet, oh I just did.
I have been in this facility since 12:30 with my daughter to treat a bronchial infection we still have no update on her X never come here for "urgent" care

The Best Cheeseburger in Nashville. No longer will I have to look through the pages of Yelp or any other site to find a great "I am definitely going back again" Cheeseburger. Forget the rest, this is the best!

I was here Sunday The wait was extra long because the cashier had to phone orders and orders at the counter. The cheesesteak wasn't that good Minimal amount of steak and the cheese wasn't fully melted like you would expect. Roll was ordinary and doughy. Was not worth the wait.
A woman just got kicked off our plane Flt 946 from New Orleans to Dallas Field with captain Scott, Debi and crew just because she didn't have the "correct" mask. Shame on the crew and Southwest.
Food is great service fair and I was missing my drink and was told it was my fault probably wouldn't go back shame good food

Prompt, polite and professional service. Great local place! Took in my lawnmower last Saturday - the work was done in less than a week, very thorough and not a strain on the wallet. Highly recommend this neighborhood business. Thank you Kellner's!
Trash. I've tried this location at least 3 times and twice the order was wrong and the last time the meat on our sausage pizza tasted spoiled. I am angry about my wasted money here. Never again.
Worst service ever waiting in line for over an hour while one person works and the other plays on the phone I would never rent from here

Definitely much better customer service than then neighboring Home Depot. I just wished it was not on the same complex with Ikea because both drive the parking lot traffic crazy especially on Saturdays.

This was one of the best gluten free hamburgers, fries ever. The knowledge of gluten free food and handling of the same was very comforting to a person with severe health issues. I lovec my burger and fries.

I cannot believe that I forgot to mention the shampoo! My God trip, midintonew-apartment delirium. The shampoo smells JUST like an orange creamsicle! Holy hair, Batman! I'm not one given to excessive exclamation points, but I'll make an exception for the "Ohhhhhhaaaaaaaaahhh*sniff*" wonderful scent of their shampoo.
Couldn't tell you the last time I went and they didn't just forget to put an item in the bag and/or not give any sauce
The best chocolate ever!!!!!! I went there with my best friend when we were in the area and I was surprised there was no one there, there's a rolled ice cream place nextdoor too!!!

Very disappointing. The rice tasted like soap and the cheese wontons had a super strange flavor in one and the next one had an entirely different filling! Very mediocre. Left most of the food there. Sorry to be so tough but Santa Barbara needs to raise their bar for food.

This place had a large number of souvenir tshirts because there were a lot in the two areas of the store. They also had other souvenirs like magnets for example. There were books, post cards, and pretty much anything you can think of that would be categorized as a souvenir.

If you can order too much of a good thing then I'm going to find the limit . Their red curry is ahing. It is rough to open a brick and mortar location during the chaos of 2020 but I'm so glad they did . I promise you won't regret it.

Honestly, this is our go-to mall since it isn't far from where we live it's busy, the food court is amazing. I personally don't feel unsafe here, and honestly it's a very clean and good mall, I highly recommend this mall if you're in the area.

They are expensive for subpar service. The other day they were finished with the car but we got in it and there was a ton of ash left in the cupholder. How is that finished? This is not the first time we've had something like that happen and it's annoying.

Order never came and when I called back their were so many people trying to talk through the phone, my fiance was like screaming cause he could hear himself. Disappointed thats all & on a friday .. #pullittogether
Bring lots and lots of money Locker rentals are $40 U can rent 8x8 tent called a cabana for $600 Parking goes for $25 Extra costs for everything Cheaper to go to Disney World
