Good people working I have a good day at low prices sometimes the food is really good here but mostly sucks big-time

We were there last night, 5 of us .made reservations for a table / couch outside . We asked if could move to another couch and they said no cause other people were coming, we were there from 6-9:30, one of the sofas remained empty . Sad, that they couldn't accommodate us .

I have never had a better grilled chicken Caesar salad then here. I also I'm not a Beer Drinker but their waitress once suggested some type of beer that was dark and had undertones of cocoa, as in chocolate & that was pretty.
Theyre good bagels! Great options, but the staff is extremely rude and dismissive with a really chaotic structure sooo i regret my 20% tip i paid for online ordering which was incorrect yikes

Overall very comfortable stay, I feel they lack a lot in supplying the kitchenettes with the appropriate cooking utensils. The staff was very friendly and helpful they made every attempt to make sure all your needs are taken care of.

L station is amazing I love being here, the people really are top notch. Anna is the best bartender, not only does she know how to make the best drinks, she's also super cool and attractive; Like you're living in the city.
This place is definitely a popular spot and their neon sign on Canal street can be seen from a mile away. I enjoyed the drinks and food here kind of dry. Worth visiting for sure.

The staff is wonderful but every time I go whether it's for a tan or a wax, I feel like it's very subpar for the amount I pay. For example, my last wax left me bleeding, and my last tan left me with CHUNKS of orange on my legs.
I wanted to love 47 Scott but came away unimpressed. The menu looks amazing but the mac and cheese had an odd taste and was filled with rubbery chunks of bacon.
After I posted the review below, the store manager called to follow up and credited my account for the missing ring.

In the everbrew pubs, Triumph is noteworthy not for what it does right, but rather for what it doesn't do wrong. Food is very satisfactory, atmosphere is always nice, often with live music, and most importantly- the beer is excellent.
To keep it simple: XXI & shoes. That is all. I like it because it's the long drive to Lakeside I save when I need a last min outfit or just need some retail therapy.

Dr Erlich is a really good doctor but Every time I am here I have to wait for an insane amount of time. Today I wasn't seen for 90 minutes after my appointment time. I question if I will come back for this reason.

first time I've been to a Panera with the original name :) just a few blocks from our hotel... the staff is all super friendly, though I suppose anytime I travel south of where I live the people get friendlier and friendlier :) clean, quick & convenient!
Food was pretty good but small portions, good service. Biggest complaint- if you advertise a burger as having bacon on it don't serve it with bacon bits mixed in with grilled onions.
Amazing service from Elijah! Great food as always I've been here like 10 times and I always get the Cuban sandwich with Mac n cheese or the sweet potato fries

This was just ok for burgers & appetizers. The burgers were put together sloppy, which made eating them a chore and the apps tasted like they had been fried in old grease. Food was ok, but I would have a hard time recommending this place to others.

Fri visited and ordered from menu, ribeye steak for $16.50 When recd ck was charged $21.50. Questioned waitress who advised"meat prices have gone up and so have our prices" In fairness to customer the price on menu should have been honored. Bait And switch??

While riding around the Santa Barbara area my rear axle had come loose and moved forward. This shop was nice enough to help me out and get me back on the road to enjoy the rest of my day! Awesome place fully stocked and excellent mechanics. Thank you
Not fancy inside, but OK enough to eat in. Garlic cheese Fazio's bread on a sandwich? Brilliant! Deli meat on The Tower was just OK, but the roast beef and bacon was pretty great, so I will be back!
I have not been but my family has and they said it was very well laid out, the people giving the tours are very knowledgeable and it is educational and interesting. They said they would go again.

When I came here with my group, the guy who took my order claimed he didn't hear me when I ordered and is refusing to take the blame and was hostile. Caution when ordering the gentleman may not hear you and berate you.
Their boba is nothing special. Not sure about all the hype. I really am waiting for a boba place to come to Reno that's on par with california or vegas boba shops

I don't know what's going on with Taco Bell's in the Riverview and Brandon area but the wait lines in the drivethrough lanes. Corporate has to take notice of this. Put in an additional lane, aff more staff, do something! This his wait is something we shouldn't have to endure.
In 2 week a go in vn hair salon the owner cut my hair is terrible job and uneven my hair looks like a dog I can't blow dry and they charges $20 for short hair I think I'm never come back there again

I shop here a lot. Some staff are really great here. Sadly though I find myself shopping more and more else-where as their prices have gone up some much in food section and school supplies. Its usually cheerful and pleasant in there.
New Jersey loves Mesa Verde!! We loved everything about our dinner and we are so sad we won't be able to have this delicious food back home! Fabulous food, flavors and atmosphere! Bravo!!!!!!

We got crispy wings with butter garlic and one with spicy lemongrass. Both really good! I give them 4 stars since they were slow in the order-taking and the sandwiches on the menu were not available to order, but otherwise these guys seem to be the real deal.

Best clam chowder EVER! Having lost all our Shells restaurants in the East Coast years ago, we were pleasantly surprised to find this little gem of a restaurant alive and well in Brandon. Michelle is simply awesome as is her staff. Try the shrimp pasta. It's perfect!
Nice place great view but the food is just ok Had the signature scallops lol They were ok Nothing special Served with some broccoli

All I have to say is the BYO Mac and Cheese is absolutely phenomenal. Had it with andouille sausage and roasted red peppers but I'm sure it would be fantastic with any of the other options . The other food was good too, but this was the highlight.
If you're looking to wake up in the middle of the night choking on acid in your throat, order a pizza from Big Sam's.
Dollar rental has a preauthorization for over $2, 000 on our account and now we are on vacation and we have no money. It has been 5 days and they will not take it off. The cost was $589.00

Run of the mill Beet salad Watermelon with tomato and feta salad Tomato spinach, and radish flatbread looks a bit more appetizing than it sounds. - Cornbread: A bit too sweet, could only take a few bites.
Not too bad, tried the milkshakes, the Nutella shake had an overbearing amount of Nutella and the chocolate chip mint had no chocolate chips.

Got the chicken pad Thai lunch todown but nothing for "toy/sticky taste other pad thai's seem to have. However this lemon I received looks like it was definitely used- now I'd just be petty pointing something small like that out but... that's pretty gross
Food pretty good but tasted baked not grilled, took us 45 minutes to get our order, no serving spoons for rice and beans. The fried Yuka was great as we're the plantains. Doubt I will go back.

Pleasant Turkish food in Tampa, it's a cozy place, small but comfortable with some outdoor seating, almost like a coffee shop that decided to serve food, the paper plates gives it a bit of an informal fast food vibe despite the restaurant type prices
Guy fieri said it was good even the sign said it but it was EXTRA gross with no taste. They need to learn how to season there food all of it from chicken to beef not my cup of Tea
This place is pretty good been there many times. I would say but the customer service is pretty good to the prices are pretty high though but during their happy hours they are great!)
Food was good but the waitress that always wear the super short jean shorts needs to learn to be a lot more pleasant. Now the waitress that brought us our food was great

"Good food for hungry people!" Jack's motto I was excited to try this place out when I read about its history and reafternoon and were the only people there. One person came in for some takelooking. I wish them well in developing a following.

Bounce U in Oaks PA hour bounce time but only get 30 mins. The Staff did nothing to reimburse us for the shorter bounce time or even letting us know that we would only have 30 mins to bounce. The kids were disappointed. That will be our last time there!!!

Great place to shop if you want to be completely ignored when the sales staff outnumbers the customers - they're really good at running around looking super busy and talking into their headsets. We parked in their lot, walked over the value city and bought our couch from them instead
Great Chicago grinder !!! go here often because of the quality and workers care. Just off i40 and 109 Lebanon Tn very consistent that's what make a great food stop you get what you pay for

Finally a place near midtown that serves pizza late and plays really shitty speed metal. The scene looks like all the kids from Whole Foods banded together, stole the iPod on rotation at Shea's and built a pizza restaurant.

We had breakfast here and it was great! It was over Memorial Day Weekend and even though it was busy, we got in pretty quickly and the food and service were great. I had the breakfast burrito with sides. My wife had an excellent veggie omelet.

I love to visit Blue Willow Restaurant and Gift Shop, the food is good and you get to purchase jewelry and other unique things. Below is a picture of my breakfast.!!! Huevos Rancheros:) my IG: @yelgarieats

Review: An Expensive Brunch that Underwhelmed Folks, I really wanted to love Justine. Well the place obviously has a ton of promise, and others have posted some great reviews - could have been an off day.

One of my favorite things to do on the weekends is to stroll through the Broad Ripple Farmers Market. Every Saturday morning my friends and I pile in the car and drive to the BRipp Winter Market has to offer and report back!

45 mins for a delicious grilled cheese, and a bowl of soup. Not sure, but you shouldn't make caramelized onions to order. There's no other reason why it would take you nearly an hour to get a grill cheese, and soup to my table.

Awesome new spot, staff very attentive, food was very good, variety of new tastes, incredible bread pudding, I don't usually get bread pudding anywhere, theirs is killa! Cool drink menu. Can't wait to try the bbq style salmon And the wings

Chinatown cafe is the worst restaurant ever! Foods are not fresh, prices are very high, foods taste very bad, the new owner doesn't speak English, he is not nice to customers, he doesn't have good manners, and his daughter has bad services, and she is very rude!

2/3 times I've used Stones it's been great. Today I waited 4 hours and the beer that I had requested "cold, " was definitely not in the refrigerator before it left the store. I'd still order from them, just disappointed today.
Used t be 5 star unfortunately staff turnover and change and on policies have made them just another"doc in the box
Just wanted to update and say that it appears as if the $5 burgers on Tuesday is not a thing anymore. Since a few have mentioned it.

I've eaten here I few times the 1st time the food was great the 2nd time it was different their wifi doesn't work and for a meat and 2 their food is not as good as it could be their are other great all the time places near by

The adult slides are fun but it's such a toxic smell from the chlorine, I was rubbing my eyes since I walked in the place. Not much to do. Skipped the food because it was expensive. Not very impressed.

the portions were small for the price and the food was sub par three of us had three different dishes and it looked like ea all had the same sauces, all were very oily. also very noisy will not go back

No wonder they are empty! Sign says new temp hours 11a-10p, walked in at 1145a, no one there at all, and I dont mean customers, waited 10mins and no one ever came over to seat us, didnt even see a person at all.
Rene Thompson is the best service advisor I have met he is honest and kind I Definitely recommend working with him.

Unauthentic food. I ordered meatball soup it was terrible they making the beef balls as it's a spaghetti meatball. The Sambal is fake which means it's a can Sambal in any Chinese spot has this place need to work on authenticity of the food or just QUIT It!!!

Now that we moved we don't get to Dogs as much as we used to and boy oh boy do be miss it! Their fries are the best and the many flavored or dressed hot dogs are too if you're looking for a yummy and casual meal.

We've stayed at this Courtyard several times. The place is always very clean, the staff is friendly and helpful, and the location is convenient to shopping and interstates, but it's quiet. The food is also good, so I am sure we will be staying there again.

Free wifi, many choices on the food court and shops, $10 economy parking daily with free shuttle that's been pretty consistent on time and a short wait. And if you're here to pickphone lot for you to wait and relax until you get that call to pickup who you're chauffeuring.

I usually love Wendy's because of the food and friendliness that other fast food restaurants don't offer but this location is ridiculous. The staff is rude and the dining area is disgusting. Thank God the good was good.

The service is bad. I ordered take out because the place is always too crowded for such a small space. The person who took my order messed it up and when I took the food back to get my order fixed they tried to charge me for their mistake.
These guys do A+ work. Cleveland and Tyrone were super easy to work with, punctual, detail oriented, and did a superb job on both our cars. I cannot recommend them highly enough.

This place provides a lousy service, we have to ask for several times to get water and other beverage we ordered. We have to wait for pretty long between dishes. The bbq did not taste satisfying, either, some too salty, while some no flavor.

The decorations are sort of Tiki, but it would be better if they had the style of music to go with it. Seems a little like the bar doesn't know what it wants to be. The drinks were good, but skip the "Volcano Bowls" as they are mostly ice.
When I went, I ordered the beef ribs and for around 20$ I was served 3 beef bones with little to no meat on them. Extremely disappointing. Beer selection saves it from 1 star.
Still having to fight to get the money back that was stolen from me after house keeping broke into my room THREE TIMES.

This is the first time I go there . The baked goods are the best ! I tried the Casserole which I don't recommend because it has a lot of sausage which made the dish a little too heavy and had me running to the bathroom 3 times.

I try not to eat fast food but I do occasionally crave some fried fish and when I do, I head over to Captain D's. This location is clean and the employees are attentive and friendly. If you want some fast food fried fish, go here.

I love this place, they treat me like family, I used to work at the one on Manchester Rd for a Program. I miss them sooo much!! I wish I was still with them! By the way it's Marin Rust who is messaging you guys. I hope you reply sometime.

Not sure why but I can't get this location to show up for mobile ordering ever, even though the website says it's available. Employees are always friendly. Would use this location more if mobile ordering started working.

Usually a good experience but sometimes There is a long wait in the drive-through . Staff is friendly and they don't mess up on the order that often Vinny close it So they definitely deserve a better reading than what they currently have.

These guys were amazing! They fixed a microphone issue i had been having for a few months and some other issues and accomplished this in less than the estimated and less money than they thought too! I am truly amazed and thankful! Kudos!!!

I really don't like this Starbucks. They take forever, when the one just up the street on 82nd doesn't have a problem getting my coffee out in less than a minute. I just don't think it should take 15 minutes to get my coffee.
First time here, fantastic crab cakes but could use a little more selection if I'm going to get a full meal for my family. Parking lot is a nightmare
Great cheesesteak and cheap prices! If you are in North Camden, stop by and order to go or you can seat and eat at the small counter.

The Sandbar Bar and Grill is one of the best places in Tampa to relax, watch sports, and eat good food! Jason and his staff are very professional and go out of their way to make their customers happy. Tell all your friends!

One of the better Italian chains. Really awesome food, humongous portions, pretty restaurant... all good. We made reservations for 7 and still had to wait 45 minutes which was kind of ridiculous, but the food was well worth it.

I was not very impressed with the food me or my fiancé ordered however our service made up for it all she was absolutely wonderful I will come back and hopefully next time the food will be a little bit better

Delicious BBQ and a great experience. Our son has a wheat allergy and they were very helpful and knowledgeable about ingredients. We will definitely be back :) All of the sauces and main dishes are gluten free - fries do contain wheat flour

Not only did this cake totally hit the mark for our coffee aficionado's birthday, it also hit the mark for moist chocolate butteriness and smooth and not overly sweet frosting. Totally custom based on ideas I threw at them. Thank you BoB!
This Starbucks is closest to me and I go here oftenbut friday I wanted a salted caramel mochait makes a huge difference when you neglect an ingredient or don't steam the milk correctly.

Great beer selection and awesome service! The atmosphere is really low key but very classy. Nice place for happy hour. It is hard to fine parking but it is pretty close to a school so you can park in their lot after school hours.
atmosphere is amazing, the food is alright not the best and the prices are a bit high, must park at the mall to enter. does contain tvs throughout so you can watch sports...
I was a regular at PM until it was clear our family would never get to sit anywhere but next to the bathroom. Anecdotally, I hear that's the deal for patrons with kids.

The food is okay. They have the fried wings but do not give out the radish cubes like University City location. Korean wings are best with the radish cubes and they're not difficult to make so I'm disappointed that they do t have it together.
Don't bother with the app for reward points. They ask you to take a photo of your receipt then respond a week later that the photo was too blurry so you get no points.

My wife and I went to Johnny's again 919 and were very pleased with the quality of the food and service. The waitress took her time and we did not feel rushed even though they were very busy, we need to come back more often.
This place is in a great location and the music and live band is top quality, however the price on food is outrageous and not very much food, for a drink and an appetizer is a great place!
One of my favorite spots at the airport before I get on the plane boy - the bread it comes on it WONDERUL!!! Tasty!

Ordered delivery. For $13 per bowl of pho, I would have expected more than 3 small pieces of shaved beef. The food was ok but won't be ordering from here again as I see no justification for what basically amounts to $13 for broth and noodles.
Called a bit ago to see if they were open for dine in and were told yes but when we showed up the doors were locked. Please update your hours or don't tell people lies on the phone. (:

Very good and quick service. Super knowledgeable. Prices are not the cheapest but they use high quality names so if you like good works and respected brands, John and his crew should be your next call.

Great new addition to the area! Delicious food and delightful customer service. Too bad there are two delicious restaurants right next to each other and parking can be complicated for a workday lunch. I look forward to my next visit and trying many of the mini donuts
Not sure if they have a new manager or of they have a new cook, but this was the best Denny's experience ever. Hot food, great service! Nice job!

I used to love going here for happy hour, but now their portion sizes have gotten a lot smaller! The dishes are still delicious, so definitely try the edamame dumpling dish and the brussels sprouts from the happy hour menu.

Average food, sub-par service, expensive for what it is. The only thing memorable was the bill, which came back $35 for quinoa bowl, some really amateur juevos rancheros, and two coffees. Was hoping for better, but will try again and report back.

Quality clothing and cute fashions for conservative women, usually over 35. However, low stars because of Customer Service specifically a associate named Heather who I don't with who could not have been less friendly and lazy while doing her job.
I understand you're paying for the experience, but when plates are $20 and taste like garbage that's when you never come back. Service was on point, but it was some of the worst food I've tasted.

This is a rather large mall that my wife and I visited when we were in St. Louis. It's nothing great it's kind of run down in old nowadays. But still has some shops and different things to see you so it's still worth a shot if you like shopping

Long but quick moving line. The sausage and apple biscuit is pretty good but don't order a plain buttermilk biscuit, its very dry by itself and crunchy. Menu is a little overpriced but in all its a decent breakfast stop.

I wanted to check Drago's out since I've had Acme but I didn't enjoy it as much as I liked Acme. Maybe I need to give Acme another go but I felt like the oysters were so heavy at Drago's. I'd be willing to give it another try!
I want to like it more, and I like the atmosphere, service, and prices more than Martin's, but the food is only ok. There just isn't enough flavor in anything.

Waited 20 mins after being seated at a high top then moved to a booth and still waited another 5 mins to see a waiter. The place is busy but not packed. I'm barely seeing wait staff walking around. Sounds like they need more waiters!

The good was pretty good. Their seafood is pretty average and it seems that their jambalaya is pseudo vegetarian considering the two pieces of meat they included. But is pretty packed at lunch time and kinda cramped. Overall it was okay. Nothing to write home about.

I love this place. Seriously makes one of the top 3 burgers I've ever had, but that's not the best part the mac n cheese is phenomenal! I ate til my belt burst open. This place is pretty pricey, but oh so worth it!
Used to be Very Good i don't coming here often anymore Food is ok the lady is very slow Slowww often mistaken order Just annoying i will go to sarione more.
This had to be the worst food ever. Don't get anything with asparagusI don't think the kids that cook there know you can't eat the fibrous end of the stalk.

My burrito was awesome, I ordered a vegetarian burrito and it was for sure tasty. However, if Im going to be honest if I wanted my guacamole in a blob at the bottom of the burrito, I WOULD HAVE GONE TO CHIPOTLE.
Scam company do yourself a favor and take your car to a real BMW service these guys doing unnecessary fixes to charge more! Really bad experience
They do not call back or write back. I even cancelled my quarterly service because I couldnt get a hold of them through email and phone and they didn't even call me back.

Three of us dropped in after church today. I got the avocado toast with braised egg; daughter in law got the breakfast and my son the waffle and bacon. All of us enjoyed our meals thoroughly. Our server was attentive and welcoming.
Just use Carvana, these guys will run your credit ten times just to put u in something you don't want I walked away
Went to this theater had had to sit through 20 more than we've ever had to endured at any other movie theater before. We won't be back. We'll just watch a movie at home and watch zero commercials.

Recently had their gator bites, sweet potato hush puppies and their filling and flavorful gumbo with an unusual cocktail of gin and cucumber and jalapeño. Very happy hour indeed. Will be back for dinner and drinks soon. Cool spot.

Really good beer boring menu unoriginal just burgers and a few other options you find at every other bar / restaurant you've ever been to slow service just over all not really worth price unless just looking for drinks

Horrible for breakfast! The Waffle House is better honestly. The potatoes were burnt, they forgot a couple things in our order oh and the worst part it took them 54 minutes to come out with the food. Never again for breakfast. First time and a real DISAPPOINTMENT

The sushi is amazing; however, the service is slow, unorganized and honestly ruins the experience. They don't treat you as well if you don't order all you can eat and honestly it seems like no one is too concerned with giving the customer a good experience.
Fun clean very nice zoo animals are always out playing and showing off one of the best zoos I have ever went to have a season pass because it's that good:)

I usually go to Superior because other people want to...like my brother and his kids. It's a good place to bring children because it's so loud you don't have to worry about your noisy ones disturbing other folks' meals. The cocktails are free flowing and the food's OK.

Amazing food! The salsa is delicious, the Texas margarita and Memo's margaritas are amazing, and I would highly recommend the chicken and mushroom quesadilla, the verde quesadilla, the fajitas, and the combo plates.

This place is good, not great. I don't entirely understand why everyone says it is THE place in philadelphia for great food, but it's definitely worth going to. If you like Ethiopian or want to try it this is a good place.

First of all, we got to our table and it was dirty, we had to ask for our silverware, service was slow, waitress had extremely low energy, took forever, got our order wrong, overall mediocre experience.
Not bad but I was expecting it to be mind blowing after spending an hour wait in line to place my order. I've definitely had better.
Horrible service. Waited 30 min to order just for them to say they were sold out of everything when there was still an hour and a half to close. Dumb asses

Oh yes! The custard is the BEST easily beats red drews, the only thing red drews has better is the mix ins but my main concern is that the custard is good. Love the seasonal flavors #pumpkinpieconcrete
I have 9 year old carpeting that had may high traffic areas and Jeff cleaned it so well it looks and feels like new. I highly recommend All-Pro and I'll never have anyone else clean my carpeting.

We like to go to outback for their specials. Steak and lobster; steak and ribs.... you get a good value for money especially if you happen to go on bloomin Monday service can be hit or miss. Place is usually clean

Decent Thai food. I thought the green curry was solid, but overall the standard Thai entre items we order aren't anything outstanding or bad. Nonetheless it's our go to Thai takeout spot. The ginger chicken is good
Nice roomy back patio, music loud on the patio so you can't talk without yelling, good bar food menu, and drink prices are really good. Friendly bar service.
Went to try them today, May 22, 2021 & they were closed, no business sign or anything, business next door said they were closed for good. Company needs to update their website.

This auction house is running by crooks. It purchased fake Chinese antiques from China and sold in auction claiming genuine. When you wanted a refund, it claimed all items sold AS-IS with no refund even though it cheated with wrong description in the first place.
My number 1 favorite restaurant here in Indy, the food is amazing, the drinks are amazing and the service is always great!
I had the salmon caesar last night and the salmon was one of the best I've had, cooked to perfection but the caesar dressing was basically non existent and our server in the bar was awful.
We found Alex to be a consummate professional although we were not able to get a loan through him and his firm we look forward to working with him in future endeavors.

Great coffee and amazing service the girl that took care of me today was very nice and help me decide what to order, I order the pumpkin spice latte and it definitely beats Starbucks pumpkin spice latte I will go back and try their Red Bull spritzers !

We love this place and they never disappoint. I tried the drunken noodles for the first time and they were to die for, as well as the papaya salad, which we always order. I am glad they are located in our neighborhood.

You really can't go wrong with Acme. The raw oysters are amazing, and the grilled oysters are equally delicious and fresh. I had the roast beef po boy that is really really good, and doesn't get as soggy as a lot of roast beef po boys in town.

I wrote a previous review about this company but liked the fact that he took the time out to respond to my post. He had all the wrong information in his response but it showed a bit of professionalism so I changed my review.

Meh is right. If you're looking for the bare minimum, Eddie's is the place for you. The food is average at best, the dining room is nearly clean, the game room mostly functions properly and is almost maintained. If you're looking for a forgettable experience, look no further.
Keith is so cool, he showed me really interesting vintage items and gear for my new office and I bought some nice stuff too it was awesome

Nice spot but they made me wait literally 3 hours and 45 minutes...they said that other people paid but are still drinking and will not be able to seat us, but we saw a lot of people walking in and being seated. So disappointed.

In line for popcorn on what will probably be one of the biggest movie opening weekends ever and they don't have all the lines open. Good thing we expected them to not be ready and we came very early to stand in line for 20 minutes.

Excelente servicio lo recomiendo 100%, he estado en dos ocasiones una para limpieza y la ultima ves cirugía, me atendieron muy bien, ay personal bilingüe, todos ay muy atentos y muy amables... volveré pronto
I had the grouper reuben and it was probably one of the best sandwiches I have had in a long time. Service was typical for a beach bar - strange thing is that they don't have beer on tap.
We came to Santa Barbara for the day and we stopped at about 3 other Mexican restaurants before going with this location. The food and service were really good and the price was reasonable.

The food here is awesome, but recently they have been neglecting the people that call in for take out or delivery. I have been ordering from them for years and have been happy. Not sure what we did, but I am very disappointed with them.

This place has incredible Indian/Pakistani food, it's more of a take out place so don't judge it for its grocery store appearance. Very friendly owners and great fresh food. Priced fairly A total gem in NE Philly

Went in for a full and a pedicure. Lady was extremely rude, didn't actually fill my nails just filled down the acrylics so that they were even with my actual nail. Nail polish chipped in a few days. Will not be back

The staff was very friendly. The reason I gave a 3 star status was because the tables were dirty, they were out of some of meat. The sub that was suggested was super yummy though...Meatball sub with sweet/spice sauce.
Yo no recomiendo este lugar pedi tacos de cabeza y sabian a pescado tambien pedi taco arabe y tenia pollo y olia mal definitivamente nunca regresare a este lugar

The service was mediocre, they refuse to split checks for large groups which led to us staying at the table an extra 10 minutes figuring out everyone's tabs. The raw oysters were amazing and everything also good, but nothing to write home about.

We hit the new Jalapenos spot in Oaklyn all the time. The food is as close to authentic as you can get around here but the chicken tacos and taquitos are fantastic. The drinks are good, try a Habanero Margarita hot spicy and delicious.

Smh. Went there for the 2nd time and I usually order a hot n' spicy so the first time it came out bad and I figured you know not all come out great but I went there for a 2nd time and it came out the same...
i loved this beer for a period and thought it well worth the price until i bought a 6 pack of the beach beer, it was totally flat and the taste was all off. Doubt I'll buy again
went here to study with some classmates Highlight: free wifi, excellent service, tasty items on menu Lowlight: food portions seemed to be on the small side and a bit TOO healthy.

As expected from a restaurant and pub, food was good, kind of expensive, but you pay for the atmosphere i suppose, good place to hang out with friends, drink, eat, and be merry, especially after a long day on walking the mall that its attached too.
Super bummed Haven't ordered a chicken panini in several months and today's was disappointing It was more of a bread sandwich than a chicken sandwich :-/ Definitely was not worth the money.
Bread was rock hard and stale, mac and cheese portion was sad, turkey sandwich was barely put together and didn't include some of the toppings requested . This was an online order

The food was good especially the crab cakes. The communication between the wait staff and kitchen did not seem good, it took an exceptionally long time to be served. The wait staff was at times disinterested. To go orders is probably your best bet.

It's a really great restaurant with pretty decor, and the food is really nice as well. however, not only did the waitress mix up an order with something different entirely, but the customer service wasn't good either.

usually i come here and we get good service and our student discount. today this lady in star shirt gives us attitude and i said im a student at temple can i get my discount? she said "shoulda told me that before" BEFORE SHE SWIPED MY CARD ummm what??????

***Very Bad Customer Service*** Every Time I Visit. It's Like You Can Literally Feel The Racism Especially When They Are Taking Your order And Someone Hispanic Walks In And They Instantly Start Talking To Them Mid Order. Would Definitely Not Recommend To Anyone.

It's got it all, no argument on that end. Crystals, incense, shamanic stones, tarot stuff. And so on. I'm not a huge believer, but if you have money to burn and you need key chains and useless stone dice, this is the place for you.

Im not sure about the food but my daughter used to work here and quite honestly I did not approve of the outfits they are expected to wear, your selling food and alcohol and good service not the young ladies wearing skimpy clothing

This has to be the dirtiest pizza shop I have ever stepped foot in. I should have known not to taste the food but it was one of the worse pizza I have ever had. The cheese left a nasty after taste in my mouth. Wont be returning.
Glasses started falling apart a month after I got them Cheap Local store didnt offer to fix both pair correctly just fix the one pair that was broken Wont go back
Food order took about 45 mins and I have no idea where the food came from because they don't have a kitchen. Good luck.

Really really good steak and service tonight. Mashed potato and macaroni sides were okay, but their garden salad was probably my favorite and that says something when it's stacked up against those sides. The shallot dressing made it- don't by pass the salad here!

Definitely stay away from this company, they do not honor any mattress warranty, makes you go around and around talking to different people. They give you different reasons to get out of it. Stay away from their SERTA brand mattress as well.

Great family owned ice cream shop with a Spanish twist! They offer traditional Cuban sandwiches and Empanadas as well as a variety of other popular sandwiches such as Italian, turkey, egg salad etc. The offer outstanding local ice cream in a large variety of flavors!
These guy make it so that you never have to sweat your car breaking down out in the middle of the desert.

Very rude people working here, never greeted me, was going to spend 150 on some sunglasses but they never even looked at me or gave me the time of day, so I left. Would never enter this store again. Employees should learn people and customer service skills.

Visiting family so we went out by grandmas request I was expecting better it wasn't good at all especially for a place in the south I've had better soulfood in California but I did like how they keep passing u food and they were friendly

There are a lot of Middle eastern/afghani eateries in Philly especially near New York Gyro but this place is by far THE BEST!! *very clean restaurant and food *tasty food *generous portions *very good price *nice workers

I'm not sure what happened to this place, I used to LOVE Yogorino but it seems like the quality of ingredients has decreased since my last review. The yogurt tastes just like any plain yogurt at PinkBerry or any other yogurt place.
Would give 5 stars because they food is always served promptly, 9 times out of 10, and the magritas are amazing... But I always have to wait 20-30 minutes to get my check.

The crawfish was amazing. I ordered Cali and Cajun, personally preferred Cali, which was butter and garlic flavor. The Cajun one was too spicy, black pepper kind of spicy, which I don't like even tho I can eat spicy food. The location is not good.
My kids favorite pizza place! We lived out of the country for a year and this was one of the first places they wanted to eat at!
Look up from the counter You are perfectly an example of how you Attack customers Your loss you don't my money And why are my rating low because I tell the truth, I know that hurts.

We were visiting Boise State and found this gem. The food was delicious! I went in to order and take out and they went above an beyond packing my order and didn't leave any condiments out. I would return!

Favorite Thai place around the area! The service is fast and portions/prices are reasonable. No lunch menu on weekends is a little annoying but the food tastes so good that being forced to buy the slightly bigger dinner portion doesn't really bother us haha.

I would give this place zero stars if that were possible. The one older guy who works there was the absolute rudest piece of shit I've ever encountered at a retail store. Please save yourself the condescending attitude and go to the KOP store instead.

Paid $14 for a very subpar Italian sandwich. Bread was stale and the ham was cheap/low quality slimy ham that was clearly package ham. Used to come here all the time but exhorbitant prices for crappy food like this is not going to cut it.
Get your wallet out and empty it out, to expensive for a boars head deli sandwich, , for this being a little dirty looking corner sandwich shop the prices are higher then the Publix supermarkets

Seated right away, service was good, huge portions, was given lasagna instead of eggplant rollatini but server corrected mistake, cold garlic knots, okay food... not great but not horrible... might try again.

Its the real deal. As anyone in the Yelp community knows that I am always always in search of a solid Cuban sandwich that gets me as close as possible to the real thing. The Cuban sandwich is really my deeply find them - get a Cuban sandwich.

Truly the best McDonalds I've ever been to. The food comes quickly, the staff is friendly and on point, and the manager really is a great manager who looks out for others. Thank you for the great experience, Tori!!

Great shop plus the owners go above and beyond to support their community. Not only do I love their sweets Protesters showed up was kind and very calming- I would recommend everyone who visit StCharles Main Street stop by and get a sweet!

Usually its great, we come here all the time. Today, waitress was rude, food was bland, didn't get our 7th meal free with our "rewards" "frequent customer" card this time. Managment was dismissive. Really disappointed

You can have really good Chinese food here, but you have to call at least 48 hours in advance, and speak to the cook...in Chinese. Otherwise it's Western-style Chinese food, and it's popular with Sparks residents. That doesn't mean it's bad. It's okay.

Everyone was super nice and it was a loud busy afternoon. Although the food had a great taste our burgers were very greasy and I feel like you didn't quite get the bang for your buck here. Probably won't visit very often
Food was good, staff was obnoxious and very lethargic. On the fence if I will go back but if I do, it will only be because of a good cheesesteak. Speak to people like they are human beings!
A lot of places just don't give a shit about the customers. Have you ever gone to Wal3 times a week for jobs I have to do and each time it's just a great experience.

NOT LGBTQ+ FRIENDLY!!! We met all requirements and they "could not disclose" the reason we were denied. Lies on top of lies to cover their behinds. So sad that we still live in a world like this Took 400$ in fees to not even hold the un

I REALLY LIKED THE VEGGIE STEW!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! And good potatoes. But great food, cute little place, Awesome cajun veggie stew highly suggest for vegetarians and non vegetarians it's just really good

Probably closer to 4.5 stars. The bahn mi is a great value here the Thai milk tea was really well done and the passion fruit tea was also okay. Overall great experience- service is fast and seating is quick. Minimum $10 for credit card.

Overall this was a disappointment. I didn't expect much but the service was strange, and the rice was so hard I couldn't even eat most of it. The jerk chicken and cabbage weren't bad but I've had better.
Thomas did a great job - very thorough and provided us with a great list of repair requests for the seller. Talked through everything as he completed the inspection.

I've been to Hattie B's several times now and I don't get the hype. The service was excellent, the atmosphere was fine, and the food was good but not great and definitely not the best hot chicken in Nashville.
Danny was very prompt, professional and did a great job! I called him to help my mother, when when a plate mirror fell off a wall and shattered, in her home. Thank you for the fantastic service!

Disappointed. It been awhile since we've been there, because the last time we were there the steaks were not to our liking.before that the steaks were outstanding. This use to be one of our favorite places.
One of the best car wash I ever been to, highly recommended, once you'll try it you'll never go anywhere else
Waited 3 hours this place is horrible the sign they have in the front has misspelled words and they are rude people the nurse didn't wear a mask I am calling the health department on them!!!!????

so I decided to give Anna's Bakery a try again after a long time and decided to pop in for a iced chocolate glazed donut. Well, it was very disappointing as it tasted day-oldish. So I'll pass on Anna's from now on.
Kung pow chicken was okay only because it had small cloves in it which over powers the rest of the dish. The fried rice was good! Egg rolls were good! General tsaus chicken was too soggy.
Food above average. Their deliver people need to have money to make change. Next time we can't tip as we want - your delivery person will either go get money for correct change or be turned away.
I love their chips and guacamole. The food is very tasty but if you go at the wrong time of day you can be waiting on line forever.

Great service from beginning to end, very professional and friendly staff. Car looks amazing. I brought it in for an interior detail and exterior wash and they went the extra mile to get some of the superficial scratches off the car!!!!! Will absolutely be back and highly recommend their services.

Well... this is a 24/7 Tavern thank you Brandon! The food was quite delicious - we had both hash dishes with eggs, the potatoes were soooooo well seasoned, biscuit with added white gravy! Oh my goodness!!! We'll be back! Ambience is dark and cozy with cool tunes.
Sushi was decent My order was made when I went to pick it up nothing too crazy tho it's like a fast food sushi spot

Service is above beyond! Loved this place! Cocktails were heavily poured....calamari was perfectly cooked and the steak was yum. Waitress knew all about what was good to eat since we were done trying to make decisions on our last meal of the vacation.
The food is good, but we waited half an hour for two breakfast sandwiches which is a little long for a to go order. Also, the staff wasn't apologetic about either. Not happy.

One of Boise's original restaurants and still one of the best, only on its second owner family, traditions are strong here. Food is great, drinks are stiff, wait staff is the best in town! Great locally owned establishment. Been here 1000s I times - every visit consistently fantastic.

This has always been my favorite CFA in the area, although I moved to St Pete, I still prefer this one over them all. The staff is always polite, and they are always having awesome deals for their customers via text message, Instagram, Facebook. Food is always fresh also.

The decor of this place was adorable, absolutely loved the uniqueness of it and bright colors. Unfortunately, my latte was not very good. I'm not sure if the milk used in it went sour but the latte definitely had a weird taste which was disappointing.

So this place has turned out to really let me down. Really bad customer service. They never have anything. They are the most expensive around. I'm always getting emails telling me that they have stuff and then when I go to look they don't have it.
Worst haircut I've ever gotten in my entire life, I could never recommend this place if you care about your hair please please please do not go here !!!!

The food was hit or miss...I had the smoked chicken Alfredo and it was sooooo bland and flavorless and my friend had a catfish platter yet the fries and onion rings was cold..no sweet tea you had to add sugar...I will not return here

The hotel wasn't clean and they ran out of rooms even though we had a reservation for over a year so they had to move us to the other hotel across the street and it was like something off a horror movie.

Rude service workers who were clearly working slowly/lazily. Out of cheese, toaster was broken basically eliminating half the menu. Took 15 mins to make a sandwich in the airport - normally that's fine but in the airport that is too slow. Could be great but looks like no one cares.
Awesome owners and a great place to take your kids on cold, rainy or even hot days ) Birthday parties are so easy too!

Good prices and atmosphere, the waitress works her tail off. Beer is fine. I had a cheesesteak in lieu of the Roast Beef sandwich, and it was decent, though I had a couple of gristly bites. Overall it was fine though. I'll be back.

hipity to the hip hop ster lota money, kinda cool vibe tho . its dim with lights so its good i dont gotta look at them . my bike almost got stolen from right out front in under a min so it is seedy besides that ehh neat looking place

JD's is a friendly place, good food, great service, they have outside entertainment, but I preferred the piano bar, very comfortable, fun, and a good way to spend a few hours, just enjoying the music and dancing the nite away!!

We stopped here to get lunch and we waited 45 minutes never got our appetizer no one came to the tables let us know if they were running behind and we just had to leave because we were too hungry to wait any longer

The ricotta cheese is key!! The super picky hubby loved the BBQ Chicken Pizza and said everything was cooked to perfection, no one flavor overpowering the other. Everything was perfect. It was definitely worth the 30line made it super convenient and the pizzas were ready when we got there.
Rooms are clean, the hotel is really old more like a motel style, breakfast is over by 8am, no more food left after that time. The outside of the building is dirty. Nice staff
Coffee is usually hot & fresh. They love to up-sale you with every order, they ask you at least 3xs if you want hash browns or a donut & it gets annoying when you say all you want is your coffee!

Went today for drinks and food. Good prices and plenty to choose from. Bathrooms needed some cleaning there was a trash bag on the toilet and urinal not sure if they are doing construction. Looked like it needed a face lift. Overall alright nothing special.

I came here on a Sunday afternoon after a round of golf with a couple of friends to get a bite to eat and relax. The waitress that served us got the order wrong. Do not come to this restaurant unless your a glutton for punishment.
Too busy of a location to have to wait 35 Minutes for a table the bar people hoard Seats because they afraid of covid why go Out to eat if u afraid
A customer of mine brought In a few pastries from this place and I was instantly addicted, THE best cannoli I have ever had!!!
The service at the big bar was awesome, cold beers great wings steph started us off awesome and Katie finished the night, will return for sure!!!
Chicken was very good also the boba tea was great only thing that was a draw back was there customer service needs a little help seem to be kind of upset every time we went in there

We go down to New Orleans five or six times a year and this has become one of my " Go to" places. Last time we went, my wife and I split a roast beef with gravy poboy. It was great and reminded me of my childhood in Thibodaux.
Food was good. Large portions. Flavors were standard, nothing unique or out of this world but it was on par with what you would expect from a good restaurant. Price was average for seafood.

I'm done with this place. I ordered a glass of Chardonnay, in full view I saw my server pour something from a wine bottle and then top it off with something else from a sweating cocktail shaker on the bar. Flag on the play.

My friend from San Francisco was looking for a Restaurant that served Breakfast 24 Hours a Day, and we found Cafe Central @ the Silver Legacy. The Denver Omelette I ordered was Fantastic. I've been here before with my former In-Laws.

Nemi took amazing photos of our family, including our dog, and made the experience easy and stress he captured so many beautiful moments and candid shots. He was also relatable and easy to talk with. I would highly recommend Nemi to capture your next family moment!

Not bad. This was a necessity meal as we had to put something in our stomachs before heading out on a "cocktail tour". It definitely coated our stomachs in grease and spice. The salsa bar was a nice touch.

Mallory is my hair stylist/colorist and always does a wonderful job! I highly recommend her for any blondes wanting to achieve that white, cool-toned shade or wanting to get some heavy highlighting, but thinly weaved! The front desk receptionists are attentive and nice. Professional salon with great customer service.

I am a disabled veteran and at the game tonight I was treated terribly by security as they made 2 of my family members move seats away from the ones they had tickets for. I will never come back here again and I have been a fan since the 60's
Fries are skinny and underdone. We ordered delivery also soggy almost to be expected. Too skimpy on the cheese curds and they had very tasty gravy, but not a fan of the fries or value.
The upstairs patio is a great spot to see the strip but unfortunately the band was amateurish and the pulled pork was mediocre at best. With so many choices it's not worth going here.

This is really the worst seafood restaurant I have ever been to, horrible service, horrible food, just a bad experience overall. How is it that you have seafood and it's tasteless plus cold? I don't enjoy writing negative reviews but this has had to be said.
I think that the kids working there are inexperienced workers and the manager is very unprofessional and doesn't lead the employees in a professional manner.

Food was ok. Super rude customer service. Waited two hours and there wasn't that much food like in the photos which was pretty disappointing. Also the employees serve your plate and I had to keep asking for more lemons, paid 90 dollars for two people

Food was tasty but I should have checked the reviews here first because they got my order wrong too. I even asked nicely for a dipping sauce and the lady said of course and it didn't make it into my bag either.

Best place to work out in town. Staff are friendly, there are plenty of machines and weights to choose from, and you will always be able to find a treadmill or elliptical machine because there are so many.

My go to spot for my caffeine fix. Great location because it's typically on my way to most places. Only bad thing is very little parking but I always do drivethru line moves along fairly quick so no big deal.
The line is ALWAYS so long and slow. The coffees are so expensive, if they r allowed on campus they should have to mark down their beverages it's crazy.
CANOLA OIL IN THEIR HOME MADE ICE CREAM! They have GREAT coffee and great service, but how can you trust a food establishment that would put canola oil in ice cream?

I didn't dislike it by any means but the hype really had my expectations so very high that I was disappointed. The food was fine. Our server was excellent. The hostess was less than stellar. I wouldn't come back or write home about Puckett's but it was a decent lunch.
I Love it I think this is the best hot pot in China town thank you Angel he the best server I never have an experience with "thank you"

Disgusting... food came with hair and then when we returned the pancakes they said there was no more frosting which would have been nice to know before we ordered.... will never eat here again amd advise people to find another breakfast spot.

The owners are this awesome, informed and intelligent couple. Both are extremely helpful and consistent in their advice. They helped us both pick out running shoes to make our running experience comfortable and tailored to our bodies and style. Highly recommend!
For the area, 4 stars. Food choices can be limited and this place hits the spot for a seafood fix, if you're willing to wait the line for dine in. Takeout is always not as good but what can you do.
This place was pretty cool- it has a very chill atmosphere with big open windows that open out on the street. It is supposed to be the oldest bar in the US?
The food was delicious and the ambience was great. But one waiter didn't know how to talk kindly to the customer and another obviously didn't know HOW TO COUNT CASH. Just bad memory.

I was looking for the perfect dress for a friends wedding & found it at Shandy! the girls who work there were very helpful & gave great advice for the bras, shoes & jewelry to really make my dress stand out. I will def be back soon :)
Stopped by thg this place to pick up a few items, but to be honest, there was just something about this place that just didn't feel right. It kind of gave me the creeps.

Went for a preemployment physical, waited over an hour to tell me that my company was not in their system even though I showed up with concentra paperwork. I was then sent to a New Jersey location, wasting even more of my time.
Ehhh not very friendly and not insanely good either. I'm still just absolutely perplexed as to why an establishment with a full kitchen can't warm up a croissant when requested.

Really great staff and affordable prices. Helped me with a pretty strange project this summer and we're responsive and personable the entire time. Got the prints made quickly and let me stick around to verify the dimensions for a while to make sure everything was correct.
I wouldn't run to this place for the best Italian in nashvillevarea however it has a certain charm and food is usually good. They do serve family style so keep that in mind!
I paid $10 for the self service car wash and the car wasn't even dry, and it looks as dirty as before, I will not go back to this car wash
Malls are going the way of the drive in movie theaters This still flourishes mall walkers and a carousel food court and yummy food smells - the cookie store mmmmmm

Wonderful, friendly small business with super cheap cruiser rentals in great condition. Helmets and locks were included, and they had plenty of bikes available on a November afternoon when several other places were sold out. Highly recommended!

Good food, the chips and salsa are delicious. That being said, the service is not great and the staff, though nice, are not English speaking and found it difficult to order out due to this. The staff is also sparse and not attentive to customers walking in.

Love this place From the shrimp & grits to the fried green tomatoes, chicken hash and my fave the shrimp creole wrap ! The NPR location has this awesome outdoor dining area, check it out, you won't be disappointed !

Don't tell me that you can't perform an oil change because the cap is on too tight AFTER I have waited 2 hours. That is NOT acceptable. Just stay away, if possible. Overall, a poorly managed store. Lacks organization and full of incompetent and rude employees.

Could not understand foreign accent from person trying to wait on me. I asked him to repeat himself at least a dozen times. He finally went in the back and there was yelling, not in english, another person came out and finished my order. Very unprofessional. Wont be back!!
Food great service absolutely sucked and one of the bartenders refused to even look our way or ask if we needed anything

It's 3.5 stars good. I love the fries and the Greko salad was fresh. I wasn't bowled over by the chicken pita. My only petty complaints are that the chairs are curved and thus one cannot hang her purse on the back, and that the music was too loud.
How can a French restaurant have bad French fries? They were greasy and limp, I asked if they are always like that, he offered to cook us crispy ones, they were about the same!!!
Is NOT handicap friendly. Couldn't get into the restaurant because they have ice and snow not cleared out in front of the restaurant and no handicap entry or parking.
Girls night in at our house, tons and tons of take out, nothing weird or wild here just good solid american -ized thai food done well.
The workers are polite and very helpful, and it's an awesome place to go to when you need anything pertaining to exotic pleasures

This is my go to cleaners and the only one I trust in the Indianapolis area when I have special clothing to clean. I actually drive across town to use them. They take the time to do it right and have always done an excellent job for me.

Good food. Good beer. Friendly staff. Originally wanted to go to Green Eggs for brunch a few blocks away, but the line was out the door, so we went here instead. It wasn't packed, food was out quick, and it tasted very good.

I want to love this location because it's the only drug store for quite some distance on South Street, but it's nothing special. The store just feels cramped, and it's not enjoyable looking around. On a positive note, the cashiers have always been pretty friendly.
First things first super expensive 32 per adult just to see like 3 fishes 2 dolphins just horrible everything is so expensive and not worthy of being called an aquarium when it has like two fish

I love the overall hustle and bustle of the restaurant, but carts are slow and unless you're sitting near the kitchen, the selection of food that makes it's way to the other side of the restaurant is meh.

Bubbles were fresh - soft. I always order the traditional black milk tea with bubbles wherever I go, and it does the trick in satisfying the craving. I appreciate that you can adjust the sweetness and was given the opportunity to sample prior to capping. Excellent service.
Good, sweet creative doughnuts. No public bathroom. I have a medical condition and they asked me to walk two blocks down the street to go at another restaurant. Pretty crazy
Zero stars. The tech literally took half of one of my eyebrows off and then told me there was no hair there to begin with! Seriously ruined my day.

Long lines, slow register, slow cooks, average ingredients, above average price for the fare, and slow, piss-poor coffee just don't justify its "coolness." Bring a sandwich from home for 2 dollars and sit on the bench out front if you want the "ambiance."

I have ordered takeout from El Limon numerous times over the past two years but am just getting to my YELP!! It is delicious, reasonably priced and fast. The burritos are huge! Actually all the portions are a really nice size! If you are in Conshohocken, try it!

Lots of hype, average food, long waits, high prices. That basically sums this place up. I'm sorry to anyone that enjoys spending 30+ dollars plus parking for breakfast for 2, because that is about the only thing that is extraordinary to me about Goldy's.
Good mall with great options but it was very weird that you could not get into the outdoor shops from the inside of the mall.

The food was great!!!! Because of the slow service I received, I'm giving it a 3boy, regular hot sausage po-boy and an order of fries. With that being said, I will return to Melba's to allow them to redeem themselves.
Struggling to be mediocre dose of " we couldn't care less about you being here" Would be better named as "The Last Resort" Move along, nothing to see here.
Really good and unique food. On the pricey side. Unless things have changed there's no beer specials :( Unique to Nashville and wide variety of menu items from steak to BBQ to quesadilla's.
Horrible, I got acrylic full set they left my nails very thick & did not look like the picture I showed them for reference .

OK for a cheesesteak could have been better. I figure it was a good place to get one because of the line. 62$ for 4 steaks 4 fries 4drinks DAMM maybe it was all the tourist on line that messed me up next time I will try Tommy DiNic's .
the layout of the gym is not bad. When it's busy it seems more crowded than it needs to be because the machines are all sort of close together. All in all though it's not a bad gym.
The nachos were great, though I wasn't a fan of the main courses. However, our veggie quesadilla was unimpressive- too much cheese, outside not crispy, and the grilled fish tacos were dry and bland.
Our first time was a good experience, but not so much on our recent one the waitor was pushy and having attitude.

Bring an umbrella! This beach is great, the distance from the tide to the top of the beach is shorter than on any other beach I've been on, which is different but kind of cool. There are kayak and paddle board rentals as well.
Toasted ravioli with marinara sauce and a fishbowl! This is a STL landmark. The food is not the best on the hill, but the friendly servers, fun ambiance and portions make up for that and then some.

I can't begin to express how much I love Sit Stay and Play and the people that work there! They truly care about your dog! My dog, Sammi loves it there so much and sometimes she doesn't want to come home lol It's the best place in town!!
I bought 2 poboys on July 8th and the bread was hard as a rock couldn't eat it very dissatisfied and disappointed been a customer for years and I won't be back

I like Sprouts - but I've stopped going.... The last 3x I was there, Employees were not wearing masks. Employees would walk closer than 6 ft from customers even in parts of the store where they could have easily gone around someone who was shopping and not paying attention.

This place would've had 5 stars if the service wasn't so crappy. The beignets are amazing. Really. So is the coffee. It was cheap too. But the place itself needs a bit of deep cleaning and the people there need to learn how to wait tables.
They honestly have the worst food ever they used to be good at one point but I'm telling you RUN this place is NOT good!!! I'm only giving one star bc I have to . I would put ZERO stars ‍

Love this place, get there early for lunch a line forms. Fresh shell fish, great clam chowder, my only complaint is that the bread bowls are kinda stale, over all always recommend it. Thank you, Sunny

improved food over the past couple years but service is poor and inattentive whether it's a little busy or slow on a couple recent visits

The staff and facilities are Great, awesome location, huge array of nonwater pool and spa area where you can enjoy a nice glass of wine or a book. Beautiful people everywhere you look. I wish the music they play was a bit more contemporary.

Delicious Wish they offer small size like a personal pizza for myself. I travel and my body size is petite. Too much pizza for me but the taste is so good I asked for box to go twice They brought me wAter and didn't fill up more

Incredibly tasty beef massaman curry. The spice level here seemed a bit lower than at other restaurants I've gone to, so you might want to keep that in mind... or maybe get some extra spice on the side.
This venue is okay. The room itself was very clean and comfortable, yet the walls are super paperthin, this America's Best Value Inn is okay.

great pizza for the late night drunkie haha. the wings arent as great tho but you get a gigantic pizza for the money and thats whats so awesome about this place :D

Rose & Scott, owners of Yorun businesses in the area that offers tons of delicious & healthy meals for breakfast, lunch & dinner all served up with lots of smiles and warm hospitality. I'm here almost everyday...you have to try the "Elvis" protein shake.

The food is always fresh. It's a little pricey and delivery can take quite a while sometimes but there is very little else in the area that delivers. I have ordered here quite a few times and its always hit or miss with the delivery.
I had their scallops never again, and then they over priced me for me to be not satisfied with the food but the people that work there was very nice.

Typically I've had pretty good luck with Jimmy John's but for some reason at this location you can be the only customer and see 5 workers staring at the walls not doing anything taking them 15 minutes to make 1 sandwich.
They got rid of my two fav things wait was little, fries were soggy biscuits were wet service was ok waiter was nice parking was horrid wait was exceptional

After spending time on Broadway we were looking for something a little more authentic and old-school with a bluegrass feel, well this was it. What an amazing place, great seating, pizza and beer and your good to go! Don't get spooked by the parking, it's available in the area.

Walk through Erin Rose bar and you'll find This place. Cash only! For the price, I thought the sandwich was just ok. Had the Glazed Pork Belly Po'Boy - I liked the flavor, but for size/price combination, it wouldn't be my go to place.

Blueberry donut was pretty good but def lacking on the service. Place was pretty empty and when I finally got help she was very curt and seemed dismayed that I only ordered a couple pastries uhhh... Thanks but no thanks

I have been here twice for hair and make up for Mardi Gras balls, and both times I left feeling like a beauty queen. Miranda does an amazing job! Fun, friendly, clean, and affordable. I will be back fo all my speacial occasions.
Finally caught this place while open... I did not feel welcomed. The other patrons, older white ppl, and cashier looked at me as if they did not know black ppl were free. Not going back.

Whatever you do don't get the Fried Chicken!! The food here is not that good. My friends was not happy with their food either. If to have a few drinks and listen to some music it's a good place to go BUT DON't EAT THE FOOD!!

Nice ambiance, food was great! Didn't really know there was a cover charge, so be sure to check if they have a band performing before you go. Other than that our service was great, didn't really care for the sangrias. All in all, I will be returning!
There was am lil long wait here, after been seated took atleast 10 mins to get a server to take our order, the manager eventually came and took our drank order. Food was pretty good.
Dated rooms Poor concierge services Nice front desk staff Alex - Dir of rooms is the single best employee in the hotel Wait staff @ breakfast = a bit lazy and slow Beautiful views 5 star location

Food is good but the lady at the drive through just was completely rude and wouldn't wait for us to order.. Kept just cutting us off. People need to learn costumer fricken service. It also takes like a million hours to get your fricken food

Visited with my disabled sister. We had front row seats and back stage passes for an event. Venue is NOT accessible and the staff told us to sit in the back with the rest of the patrons in wheelchairs. Do not recommend!

It's a nice store, very clean but because it's in Eagle everything is WAY overpriced!! The meridian and downtown Boise locations are actual thrift store prices but the thrift store that had the very best prices and good finds would be the DI, Deseret industries.
Do not order from their website, kicksusa.com. I'm not sure what kind of scam they're running, but they tried to get me to send a picture of my photo ID after I placed an order online.
Ordered creamy shrimp for takeout, for 19 dollars literally got 5 shrimp with 5 pieces of walnut, the frying batter was really thick.

This place is very very cool noise was ok price for play pass is not the worst I've seen all the games give you ok amount of tickets the prizes are the best I've ever seen feels like your in a target overall Experience is 5 stars

Went and got sugared last week and had a wonderful experience!! The worst part of the appointment was when the waxer told me it was her last day, although she assured me her replacement was just as good as her; so I'll def be scheduling again in 3 weeks.
Sorry or maybe even 3 stars when I had just been there for a pedicure I mean who can resist that price? Resist. Trust me. It was a mediocre "fluff & fold". Sorry - but I will not be back.

A good place to watch the game: Flat screen TVS at every possible viewing angle, baskets of peanuts everywhere, fun sports bar vibe. But the food is pretty dissapointing the mac & cheese and chili both tasted very school cafeteria- and, frankly, the service sucked.

They only get one star because they had plenty of TV's to watch the Bears playoff game. Ordinary would be an upgrade for the food and they should be forever barred from using the term Po'Boy on their menu.
Went in for a plain slice Worst pizza ever Crust is ok but the slice had zero taste Save your money Don't eat here Ever.....bottom of the barrel pizza Bland tasteless

Menu isn't as diverse as the location in Chesterfield, but it has a wonderful staff and beer selection. I'll definitely give it another go, but if you get to choose between locations- drive out to the mall and visit that one!

Been here multiple times be it the chicken breast, different sausage varieties, ribeyes, ground beef, brachioles, racks of lamb or the bacon sliced to your preferred thickness - you simply cannot go wrong, especially at such reasonable prices!

Out shopping with my mom this morning and once we did find an associate to help us they did an excellent job. Taking points off for lack of open customer service counters not being staffed and the store was way too warm.

Here's a before and after picture Lol let's just say that plate was AMAZING. I highly recommend that you come here, the people are extremely friendly, the drinks are solid not like other places that are watered down.

I was excited to try pad Thai here was really disappointing the flavor was rather bland just not tasty I have a pretty iron stomache it's one thing to not taste great and be disappointed it's another thing to become ill. I don't rec this place at all .
Wow! So yummy! East Nash has needed a spot like this4 plates and a cocktail was $35 before tip, and there was food leftover to take home.
I hate drive through coffee with 6 creams & 6 sugars this was missing - I usually check the bag BUT when I didn't it was missing!! They want $15 per hour but first you need to read and count!!

I enjoy coming to this shop and getting my crochet faux locs done by Alice. I'm tender headed and she makes it her business to ask me every step of the way how do I feel. She will be the only person I let braid my hair. She's awesome
Cake was good. She did a nice job decorating it and listened to my needs. She was rude to my mother in law who paid for the cake and also rude to friends when dropping it off.
It's just a standard Zoo/Aquarium IMAX theatre that plays the same 3 movies over and over and over again from the early 1990s.

Negatives Parking was easy and the food was AMAZING! No joke, it tasted heavenly! If you can tolerate the long wait times for a table and are not bothered by sitting next to strangers than it's totally worth it. I recommend it completely.

It wasn't the best food, the chicken was mostly breading, but the fried rice was alright. The main reason my family and I decided to order here is because they deliver, which they delivered our food fairly quickly.

So great they have saved both of my dogs in the most terrifying and uncertain situations. They are expensive, that is for sure, but they have the best vets in the city and are always honest with you even when the truth hurts!
Amazing food I recommend the Tennessee two step but everything is awesome! Ryan was very attentive and kept the food and drinks coming over all it was the best dinning experience iv ever had!

We went for the lunch special and enjoyed ourselves so much. Very attentive staff, and delicious food. Pecan bread pudding is a must! We had coffee after a 3 course meal and then meandered around the back to see the beautiful extra private dining rooms. Such a beautiful place!

The donuts and drinks lack flavor and are consistantly poor . Shame really as there aren't too many other options available near by. Coffee beans over roasted, tea drinks are weak sliced white loaf bread at the grocery store equivelant sliced, store bought white bread.
Great Happy Hour!!! however, i didn't like it how the happy hour customers couldn't be seated by the window but had to be seated in the middle bar area.... a little annoying.

This place is OK, my hot dog wasn't hot when I got it, as if it had been pre-cooked, then warmed on the grill for 30 seconds or so. They fries were good, not a bad place to stop in if you need a quick bite.
Breakfast buffet is a great deal for the price . You can basically create any of their breakfast dishes from the breakfast buffet so there's no point in ordering dishes if the buffet is going on.
If you want to go away to the place and never get your food this is the place to go talk about it and coordinator that they bumiles everything!

It's qdoba! Food is incredible depending upon who is working. Some staff listen well and act like they want to be there and others just stare around you and can't grasp the concept that a burrito is a cylindrical food item.

Food is very good there. Service was great too! I'm giving you only 3 stars because the restaurant was empty at the time I went, and they sat a table right next to me. No 6 ft separation. I just don't understand why they allowed someone to sit there.
This is my favorite chipotle restaurant to visit, they are always friendly, especially Scott, the food is always fresh and the restaurant is always clean, organized and well stocked.

Chickie's and Pete's is a Philly favorite and has three locations notch stuff, it's bar good that compliments the whole game day experience. They're known for their Crabs and their Crab Fries. I don't eat seafood, but their Crab Fries are off the hook. Well done, crinkle don't tell 'em!
Usually this place is so good and the food is steaming hot but tonight all of our food was cold and there wasn't any cheese! I was not thrilled but I will eat there again!
Clerks always seem to take their time getting customers through the line. Not such a sense of urgency, however the cash back rewards on gas are nice if you are a freqeuent customer....cheap gas to!

Great hoagies and very polite and helpful staff. I'm mostly a WaWa guy but they have stolen my business lately. Great store baked rolls, very fresh ingredients, the lettuce is not something I usually highlight on a hoagie but it is so fresh and tasty!

Best Chinese food in 1998 when the rice cooker first opened now there crab ragoons are a joke there's no crab just cream cheese fried in a wonton wrapper. It's still good the portion sizes and everything I know what to expect now when I vist the rice cooker
We were very disappointed in our service and the food for lack of taste we frequent cheesecake factory all over the country and this was a complete let down

Right in the K-Mart shopping center. This place serves average Chinese cuisine. They tried doing dim sum on the weekends, and all I remember was that it gave me a stomach ache and was not worth the price.
My go to Pho place on the south side. The only negative I can say is that if you order a pho bowl, they can sometimes not give you as much meat as you sometimes get at other pho places.
The chicken Katsu is my go to meal. Always great except I found a giant hair in between my chicken Katsu and I'm bald, I'll be back but I'll make sure to check my food first
Pretty good but they couldnt even make me a negroni????? Like what? The atmosphere is really cool though and the food is pretty good from what ive tried, a little grungy but cool at the same time.

If you enjoy activities like running around in circles, chasing your own shadow or banging your head against a wall, then this is the place for you! I'll never be sure if they excel at printing anything, because they have the communication skills of a caveman. Go elsewhere.
Worst one ever. And they don't care Ask waited for my food one min turned into several As the manager looked at me three times No sorry no anything Burgers are not good cold Never again

I really like this store but what bothered me yesterday was the people working in the garden center not wearing masks. They had a guard at the front door enforcing the rule for customers. If nobody is around then sure, take it off for a break.
The owner fucked over our company christmas party by over charging for drink tickets and only letting us get bottom shelf. Don't come here if you don't support crooks.

Went to Aki sushi last night and just wasnt impressed. Waiting 30 minutes at table. Seemed very unprofessional to me. The sushi was fresh enough but it just didnt have anything special that would make me want to go back and try it again.
