Food is still delicious, but service has gone down the drain since we last came a few months ago. 20 minutes to order, no refills on water, been waiting for 10 minutes for our payment to be taken while writing this. Seriously?

The France erected the statue in 1972 as a gift to New Orleans, one of 10 copies made from the original plaster mould sculpted by Frenchmen Emmanuel Fremiet. The monument include two cannons pointing down the streets, and the statue was moved to the present French Quarter location in 1999.

A tourist destination that's currently floundering as there are more things for visitors to Downtown to do without visiting a mall. It's worth going just to see the place, but there really aren't any destination business left .
Food is nice, but they charged us for the ranch and old bay fries we requested and didn't give it to us. Sounds like a stupid thing to get irritated by but it was very emotional for us :(
I didnt love the gossip I heard about the patients by the nurses while I was waiting, but we were seen quickly and my boyfriend was happy with the doctor and how he stitched his hand.

OMG they are ridiculously SLOW!! Where is management to oversee the inefficiency and speed of service here?? They do a good job of washing your car but nobody needs to wait 45 minutes when there are 2 cars being washed. NEED NEW MANAGEMENT ASAP.

Lower your expectations before ordering oysters and service is as bad only because the manager dont feel responsible to the services offered, he actually dont care about customers satisfaction. Food was not tasty.

I think that the variety of topping options obscures the fact that this is only a slightlythan-average burger. It's certainly not a bad choice, for a chain restaurant, but Red Robin pales in comparison to the really outstanding burger places available in most large cities and many smaller towns.
I don't frequently indulge in Vietnamese food, so my expectations for this joint were nongo, they forgot to include the basics, and the meal did not include any side items. Hence the 3 stars
Van Goghz had been in decline for the past couple of years. I heard that it recently changed ownership so I'll have to stop back in and see what changes have been made.
It was a quick and easy check in and check out for me. I dont really remember much since we didn't spend too much time in this airport, but it was nothing horrible either. :)

The person that tears around town in their red Jeep Wrangler sets a very poor example for this business. This Jeep with the company name on the door nearly hit me I will always recommended against using this business - they have zero respect for anyone's safety.
Just have to say our server Angel was the fastest server I've experienced in a long time and took real good care of us for my birthday!

I didn't find this place exceptionally more exciting than your standard cheap Asian place in philly - and it's not even that cheap! Still a good option for informal eats when you're craving ramen/sushi but want to eat in sweatpants.
was a bit disappointing did not resemble photo at all so far golden flower has the best Vietnamese I have tried

One of the best donut spots in the city. Only negatives are the neighborhood with the enfaces on "hood" and the customer service is lacking. If you just want donuts and not ordering regular food, they will skip you in donut line for the person in the hot food line.
I went through a lot of trouble to order from Wingstop through Doordash and, at the last minute, Wingstop cancelled the order! WTF?!? Worst service, ever!
These were fantastic! There are a ton of interesting flavors to choose from and the cafe is a cute place to sit and eat. The mint chocolate was my favorite!

Juan C. has come to our house twice over a couple of years and was quick and professional and seemed to diagnose the problem with accuracy and solved our problems efficiently. I would highly recommend him and will continue to rely on him for our AC needs.
Make smoothies with expired fruit and spoiled milk, employees are told to make smoothies with bananas that are over ripe i've also seen bugs numerous times
Must get: wood fired oysters - fried alligator Wait, I just realize I didn't try pork dish here even though the name is Cochon . OH well, that means I will have to come back and try next time!

There are two types of visits to this store 1. Line too long, you leave immediately 2. Line too long, but you need X so bad you have to wait in it The new target they're building cant come fast enough

Phoebes BBQ is awesome! The food is always delicious and the staff couldn't be nicer. The last time there I got a whole chicken dinner and brisket platter also yams, spicy greens, mac & cheese and beans I honestly can't pick a favorite. Try it all you'll love it
This restaurant makes Olive Garden look like a gourmet restaurant, owner has an attitude and blames the customers on his short comings and poor food avoid it

I proposed to the delivery boy when he brought me hummus and falafel pitas at 11p on a 95+ moving day. Anywhere else, it would have been weird; but this is the Pita Pit so he smiled, said thank you, and went on his merry way.

Great food and variety. Great concept, fresh and local ingredients. Lets just say that I eat here for lunch many times per week and the level of inefficiency for a busy lunch spot that employs so many is staggering. Truly staggering.
Dr. Martin changed my life. He helped get my gut in order after years of slow growing misery how I wished I had his guidance through treatment! I can't recommend him enough.

This vet is down to earth, dedicated to the health and well being of his patients, and flexible with families about how they can put veterinary recommendations into action. He and his office staff are well informed and responsive to customers.

The food was pretty good and our waitress was nice but the hostess at the front had a bad attitude and was just pretty rude to our party. The three stars is because of her attitude and my food was a little cold. Other than that, I recommend this restaurant.

I liked the hot dogs and burger wasn't bad however it's nothing new. The vibe inside is different but that's about it different music makes you feel like your in the city of I'm guessing Chicago although the music sounded very Louisiana

Good value and good location if you need a place near the airport. Minor inconvenience was that the restaurant was closed for renovation, but there were several others close by - easy walking distance.

Do NOT waste your time .. the sauce is basically chef boy r d and the manager Tara is rude and class less and doesn't know how to handle customers... food is awful an seafood is rubbery ...Tara you are the donkey of the night

Fun restaurant, good chimichangas, and it is CHEAP! The $7.95 chimichanga platter is a TON of food! It tends to get loud and quite crowded, so be prepared to wait for a table on a weekend night, but it is a colorful, upbeat and vibrant place to eat.
It was simply amazing from the time I walked in and was greeted by mike and the facial was out of this world not to mention the bomb hair cut I got.

They're known for their burgers and I got the Soft Shell Crab BLT with French fries. The sandwich contains three slices of bread; one part is the BLT part and the other is the soft shell crab. I enjoyed the sandwich very much and the seasoned fries were perfect.
Pesticides were applied even though we opted for the organic program. After 8 phone calls of trying to get an explanation, each time with a response that someone would call me back, I gave up.
roaches found in the pizza never ever ever order from d&c pizza. the lady had the nerve to ask me what do i want her to do about it and no they did not give refunds.

Love the burgers and a great pint, service can be a little slow sometimes. On this visit there was a slight problem with the doneness of our burgers, both came a notch overdone from what we ordered. Definitely still a favorite for burgers though and of couse the beer!

It's nice to be able to sip and an enjoy a Starbuck coffee while my wife shops at Sephora at Keystone Xing. This Starbucks is a little small and has an odd layout considering the two entrances and exits.

My best friend and I went there yesterday to get our nails done and it's not a good place to get your nails done!! That's like as if they were in a hurry. They wound up hurting me and making me bleed for 7 fingers.

Beautiful view, good food and nice tropical drinks. Valet blocked our exit from the parking lot and yelled at me when I asked him how I was supposed get out. Not a great way to end my visit and I will not return. Horrible rude man!

I've dined at Deacon's on two separate occasions after my initial review and I wasn't as impressed. The service was extremely slow on both occasions. The servers are always amazing and the drinks are good, I just don't feel confident in giving it a four star anymore.

Good food waiter sucked but host was awesome gave her a tip instead and asked for sample of the gumbo and it was a shareable portion for me and my wife! Most definitely will be back once i visit NOLA again

We had to get five stars here because the service was excellent and I have to say when the best hamburgers I've ever had. Nice crowd I can see it becoming a really popular hang out in the near future. Definitely regulars hang out great for newcomers to

Don't go here I called and spoke with Jessica She was so rude I ended up hanging up and not even scheduling an appointment. If the owners let her speak to inquiring customers like the way she did, they are not permitted to work on my teeth.
Went for a birthday dinner with family. Far too overpriced for what you are getting, also there are a lot better pizza places in Tucson, land of the pizza joint.
Man, the berry flavored hefe was actually quite good and I would find myself thinking of ordering it this summer, so I am excited to go back and enjoy my time there with a berry-lightful summer beer!

I cannot believe I went to this place. Run far far away as the customer service is horrendous and your clothing won't be done when they say it will be. Extreme false advertising on their website and the horrible reviews all online speak for themselves.

I'm so tired of paying for service that I don't get. I've had problems since the beginning and finally had a technician admit that their equipment is cobbled together and upper management refuses to replace it with new equipment.
Tranny is a piece of sh7t after 4 trips there i just quit they dope your car up enough to get past warrenty. You are better off with amcco

Very over cooked fish rubbery I would not eat here if you are on the road - they have a great atmosphere but don't know how to cook fish had the snapper ugh The soup was good seafood gumbo was the hit of the night

I got the Triple Threat and it was great! The waffles are your typical batter, nothing fancy there BUT they make for a great combination alongside the peppered chicken breasts. I will most definitely be back again.

I still haven't tried the pizza, but will eventually, wanted to up the stars for them because the owner took the time to contact me, that shows someone who cares and that to me means as much as having good food and service.
Dumplings was not bad... all the noodle soups they use the same broth but it's not too bad the pork is way over cooked and no flavor.... this place is not too good and not too bad
Me and my husband had food poisoning here, the truck was outside cigar city and we have both been vomitting all night.

What happened??? The food has changed for the worse. The Plantain Nachos didn't have the same awesomeness at all. The pork tacos were pathetic and nasty greasy with minimal filling This used to be a wonderful treat and worth the long drive down too. So sad this has happened.

A lot of hype and hip over nothing. Food okay, service Could use some improvements! Half the menu was not available so out of five sandwiches only three where available, in my opinion it's to pricey for an un satisfying sanwich.

This has been my go to car wash for some time. I went two days ago and felt very frustrated because they put in new vacuum hoses and they are too short!!!!! I have a Hyundai Santa Fe and I couldn't reach the cargo area with the hose.
Pros: *Really tasty food boy was great like atmosphere *Spent $76 on one app, two entrées, a tip and no cocktails. That's Bourbon Street for ya.

Amazing! The groomers are super sweet and do such a great job on my cocker spaniel giving her such a cute cocker cut...every time! Paws has been the best hands down in south tampa, I highly recommend!

I woke up today and I looked in the mirror, realizing what a fatinBox and ordered a delicious sirloin cheeseburger meal. This place has some of the best fast food burgers around. Take it from a fattyfat-fat: it's good.

Clean, wellmaintained, secured property. Property manager directly on property. Great customer service. One thing to note, however, the location is somewhat confusing to get to, so if you are planning to rent with the, call and get directions.
Service sucks most of the time but really good food and atmosphere so we go regularly, but always build in a little more time to eat and can always expect about 3 screw ups each visit.
Best deviled crabs around, came all the way from Englewood, Fl to get some. They were wonderful as usual, but didn't get the crystal hot sauce, had to stop by Publix, then life was good Donna Rewis

Was very excited to go here and somewhat underwhelmed by the dishes. The ramen was nothing to write home about and was expecting more due to the recent feature in food and wine mag. Would still go back and try the pho

One of the best local Chinese food restaurants. When I say they are fast and fresh that's what I mean. My hubby and I always head there especially because they are close and comes in handy for a quick meal, especially friday nights

Had a craving for dim sum. They allow you to bring your own beer or wine with no corkage fee which is cool, though we didn't know beforehand. Very nice, seemingly newly done interior and an overall spacious restaurant. Great service and never and empty glass.

I was skeptical, but it was one of the best pizzas I have had since I was able to make it just the way I like it. Price is super reasonable, too. The customer service was excellent. This place get's it right. I'll be back!

We were very disappointed. The facility appears dilapidated, unkept, and needs an overall facelift. Many exhibits were closed I understand the high cost of keeping animals but the entrance prices are steep for the quality of this facility
Went across twice to get a roast beef sandwich on 2 separate occasions and they were out of roast beef each time and wasn't even noon yet! !! Very disappointed

This brewery is highly overrated. The environment was very unwelcoming and the selection was quite small and unimpressive. Having been to majority of the surrounding breweries, this one falls to the bottom and I don't think I'll be returning any time soon.
We signed in june, were told installation would be Agust, everytime I call I get the run around, no one returns calls, everytime, its 2 weeks. My advice, dont use them

Definitely a good deal for the money, but wings were dry and overnight stand"... not likely to come back I'm all about being friendly so it's not too often that I get a cold shoulder, but the employees did make me feel that I didn't belong there.

Great place to bring the family. Delicious ice cream and the rum raisin was great . If you don't like ice cream there's at least 8 flavors of sorbet in the back and plenty of candy to choose from. Don't miss this place while you're in the area.
What this neighborhood really needs is a drop those were the neighborhoods that actually needed literacy and homework help and computer access. center city residents already have that!
The beef soup was the best. Don't get the chicken broth one, it was flavorless, had to add plenty of soy sauce in order to eat it. The place looked a little dirty...

Wizards is a great little establishment. Not a huge selection but has a very good one. The employees are very friendly and turned me into a regular because of that exact factor, even with other comic shops more in my normal route home.
Aside from DD, I also go to Starbucks. Do you think I am a coffee junkie? No, I do not always go to the coffee shop daily but when I need to stop I go get a coffee at Starbucks as well.

The food's not the best, but it's CHEAP and somewhat tasty and perfect for that late night urge to sop up all the alcohol in your tummy; it's also open 24 hours and serves breakfast all day. Their malt milkshakes are delish and the service is great.
Ordered the red beans and rice thinking it was beans and rice, but the menu fails to mention it's also includes bacon. As a vegetarian, that was a far from pleasant surprise.

This place has been around for awhile and finally got to check it out. Happened to be one of the few maybe only bars on Main Street to have the Bourbon County Stout released on Black Friday with several varietals.
This is a nice Michael's and has a lot of products we were looking for that we couldn't find at other Michael's!

My daughter cooperated so well for Lacy for her newborn pictures and I just can't wait till she gets to take her other pictures with them. They are very professional and will work with your schedule. I love them so much!
I love going to saffron the food is always delicious try the samusa and the chicken tikka masala and the service is outstanding I highly recommend it
Very cute place. 3.5. Nice variety of sweet and savory crepes. If you eat in, you order upstairs and they bring you your food to your table at a more spacious downstairs eating area.
Good doctors, but office staff is very slow. No matter what time of day, expect an extra hour even if you arrive early and only see the doctor for a moment.

Outback has a new delivery service didn't show up until after 8:15. That being said, food was still good. They forgot the sauce for my friend's burger, but other than the wait time/sauce situation- decent food, cooked to order, and arrived warm.

In general I love Macy's no matter what location. What ticks me off about this one is lack of housewares and the unclear placement of escalators to move from floor to floor. The construction is also annoying Other than that it's Macy's so it's grand.
The chicken is so different from any burger king that you would expect it does not taste the same it is gross to me.
The roof fell midway through our dinner which I mean isn't so bad whatever, as long is the food is good but the ramen was kinda cold and bland. Who knows maybe it was just an off day for them

Great restaurant! They were able to accommodate me and my friends and their daughter on New Years Eve and were great about it! Dinner was great and a great value. I definitely want to dine here again to try out some more dishes in the future.

I ordered a chicken cheese steak and got a meatball sub. It didn't taste bad, but when I only order one food item and a soda, I expect them to be able to remember the ONLY food that I ordered. Apparently that was too much to ask.

They have good burgers a little greasy for my taste and fries. Prices are higher than I would normally pay but it is designed like an old diner from the 50s I guess. So if you're looking for 1950s atmosphere and greasy burgers this is the place

terrifying experience. the owner is an absolute psychopath that ended up getting in the face of and almost hitting my wife and screaming threats at me just because i told him he could not be inside my car if he refused to wear a mask. stay far far away

I've been here twice. The first time I had a pulled pork sandwich; the most recent visit, I had a half rack of ribs with beans and slaw. I think the food is solidly good, but not great. The atmosphere is excellent and the customer service is outstanding.

I've had color, highlights, bronde, cuts, upJane cut, color or whatever it is you want to get done this is the right place for you. I just left Hightech highly satisfied after my Brazilian blowout or aka keratin treatment!

Pretty insensitive and offensive establishment and arrogant owner. Basic $5 cocktails marked up because you get to see them in a red light. Can't help but think what the uproar would be if a place themed itself in a scandalous manner, poking fun or mocking a different religion.

Tea was very mediocre. Employees seemed like they had attitudes when I asked them about some of the tea options. I do not recommend this place because there are better bubble tea options around with way better customer service and prices!
Everything was meh. The avocado fries and onion rings were great going down, but there was so much grease that it caused them to come back up i'll stick to booze at this bar.

Sorry but 8.50 for a medium sized breakfast burrito is pretty ridiculous especially since it's just the tortilla, 2 scrambled eggs, meat choice and cheese inside. I'm interested in trying the other dishes, but some things are just overpriced.

This store is TRULY an experience ~ a MUST DO! Very friendly and knowledgable staff to assist you on your "taste and savor" adventure of their vast array of fabulous fresh pressed olive oils and delicious basalmics. THIS IS THE REAL DEAL in the BEST! YUM!!!!
Best place to stay in clear water. excellent customer service, extremly clean and the food so yummi, the restaurant staff is so kind, I can't wait to go again.

Really a special spot Beautiful ambiance Wonderful food Creative menu Service good and borders on great Wine list is wonderful but to overwhelming Have a drink in the bar downstairs first Walk the gardens Enjoy the entire experience

Lazy people, showed up with over 2 hrs left before they close and they refuse to take anymore walk ins, they had technicians standing around but didn't want to do anymore work. Is a shame that Apple will hire people with such poor work ethic.
good tasting sandwiches, the mobile ordering is a plus, the only downside is their sandwiches are a bit pricey compared to other options in the area.

this place denied me and my friends because her ID had a small little bubble under the lamination, we even suggested to call the police and they said that they don't do that kind of thing, anyways they ruined our quizzo night and will never be coming back
Got the enchiladas agaves and thought it wasn't very good. The halibut tastes bland and hte sauce was overly creamy and not too chipotle no Tex Mex flair, holethelooking and underwhelming in flavor.
I went here with my wife and while the setting is nice with dim lights and almost sound proof tables but the food is so so. Go for the atmosphere not the food and you will like it .
Good service thought i had an exhaust rattle but it turned out i had a loose backing plate behind the brake rotor fixed for a reasonable price.
Pretty standard PetSmart! The staff at this location are very helpful; every time I visit I am approached by a number of employees making sure I am finding everything I need!

Best hot yoga studio in the area! All of the instructors are amazing there's flow, bikram plus yin, rocket month membership is super affordable, the place is clean, parking is easy... Literally no bad stuff to say about this place. 10/10, A+++, would recommend.

Horrible service. Waited an hour for a table because the text that the table was ready never came as they inputted the wrong number. So, after another lengthy wait, we ordered a simple egg meal and it took another 45 minutes and was cold. Very disappointed.

This place is NOT partnered with Grub Hub do not order. I ordered food and paid and the employees had no idea what I was talking about or what grub hub even was. If you are wanting to eat here call the store and order or physically go.
This is the place to go in Rittenhouse if you want to drink 40's with fratboys, until you puke on yourself and pass out in the gutter.
Had the lunch specials with a group of 4 and it was okay. For chinese food... probably won't go back for lunch since its not what I expected but I might have to give it a shot for dinner...

Has sign posted on the entrance door that says "face mask required", but none of the employees or customers are wearing face masks. I watched one girl employee wipe her nose with her hand then wipe it on her pants. We're still in a pandemic folks.

Had lash extensions put on Friday June 7th, by Wednesday June 12th, all of the center lashes on my left eye had fallen out. Called to cancel my follow up appointment, no one answered or returned my call. Wouldn't go back or recommend this place to anyone.

Good premium burger joint. Get the nachos-their queso is the best. Of course, it is Mass Ave, to it will cost you 20% more than the same meal off the beaten path. This is one of the better choices on Mass Ave., in my opinion.

The service is slow. Waiting over 20 minutes for 6 oysters. I was staying at the Crown hotel and I was told I would be able to charge it to my room. But the bourbon house recently update their system and said they didn't know how to charge the room.
They where a good place to buy. Don't try to get it repaired I called them to get it fixed and never got back to us that was back in February 2014 it is now September 2014.

Been here a few times, it's decent tex has a charred flavor with a little hint of garlic 30 minutes in between the apps and entrees. Overall, decent food but nothing worth an outside visit to Northern Liberties if you're not located near that neighborhood.
Skip it, disappointing and not worth the money, guid was good story teller but he said upfront he didn't believe in ghosts which fine but was a mood killer meh
The beignets were a 3/5. Customer service was 2/5. I probably won't be returning to this particular beignet shop when there are so many more with nicer employees in NOLA.
Delicious, also has the best Arnold Palmer I've ever had in my life, I wish I could buy it by the gallon. Service was good, our waitress had an awesome attitude
Interesting place. Summary: small, bar quickly gets packed during games, never sat in the dining room, awkward if you dont have a seat, food is excellent.
OK so I ate lunch here for the first time today and had the caritnas and the guacamole starter and got food poisoning. Would not recommend.

I've been to this restaurant probably 10 times and I never know whether the crispy chicken wrap will be a full size wrap or something tiny like this. I won't be going back until they get some consistency with the portion sizes.
Awful customer service. They didn't notify me when they were withdrawing money from my account or when they put me on a 2 year agreement.
Mozzarella sticks and crab cheese fries were excellent but waiting for a drink at the bar to wash it down was painful. Need more bartenders on a Sat night.

Not bad, but not great. We sat on a balcony overlooking Bourbon st. The food is largely forgettable, but the service wasn't too bad and it was a nice spot to spend some time for lunch. Try the Voodoo Punch.

Horrible experience. They first got our order wrong then the Cherry Limeades tasted moldy. We had to wait another 20 minutes to order a replacement and another 20 minutes before we had to complain that we were still waiting on our replacements. Staff was polite but very unorganized.

Very nice place! Staff is very knowledgeable about their products and very friendly. High quality and delicious products! The bottles that you buy your oils are glass and come in different shapes and sizes, you can use them the next time you come to shop:)

Went to Benihana for the first time on Tuesday and enjoyed the experience. I went for my birthday and they make a big "to-do" for your birthday especially if you sign up for the Chef's Table. Will definately be going back.

Left the store after finally getting someone to serve us because they were "currently dealing with an issue" which happened to be mice which is only known because I saw some in the restaurant lobby as well as kitchen. They were knowingly serving people through the drive through .

Stayed at tradewinds just waiting for a table when restaurant wasn't busy was awful extremely slow, calamari was good, ordered shortribs were tough but the parmesan risotto was yummy. Added chicken to penne vodka you couldn't even tell if the chicken was in there. Not that impressed

Excellent tasting iced cappuccino. I'm extremely picky about my coffee, and I was guessing that anything named "beans" would be concerned with the taste and quality of the coffee they offer. Cute place, nice and efficient staff, great coffee!

The newest social scene in Tampa! The eclectic style and variety of food, drink and shopping options are absolutely the best. Whether its a casual day outing or a cocktail sipping night, Armature works is seriously an awesome place to visit with family, friends, or for dates.

Cool place to stop in every now and then and browse through the selection of vinyl, CDs, etc. They have something for everyone, regardless of your music preferences, and if they don't have it they'll try and locate it for you. A nice place to kill some time!

First time coming to this location and I was very disappointed to find out they don't have a salsa bar and the salsa they are supposed to have for the chips was being made because they ran out. I preferred the location on 22nd.

ONE OF NEW ORLEANS' BEST This classic restaurant is one you don't want to miss in your visit to the French Quarter. Outstanding food, excellent service, elegant but comfortable ambience. What more could you want? A little pricey, but well worth it.
Great store. This is our "go-to" but, waiting in the deli is an ordeal. You literally can stand their minutes before anyone acknowledge you when all you want to do is get your lunch meat and go.
Food doesn't really have any flavor, some of the bourbon chicken was dry, the chinese vegetables were tough, the egg roll wasn't good either. sorry. not a fan

OMG the brie and apple grilled cheese! So good. I love this place because they have so many options ranging from typical greasy diner, vegetarian, lighter options, and more creative/nonstandard fare. This is my favorite place to go for breakfast because I know that there will be something for everyone.
Amazing food and if you like guacamole come here you can watch them make the guacamole Street from scratch out of the avocado

Let's just say...be patient. I don't know if I pick the bad times to go but I always have to set aside at least 30 minutes to cash/deposit a check. I dunno. The employees are really nice and they always get the job done but it's just...slow.

Slower night so service was not an issue and everyone was hospitable as you would hope at a restaurant of this level. The flavor and temperature of the beef was outstanding anything larger includes bone. Make some bigger steaks people!!

Going to keep this short, I will never eat at this establishment again! I bit into an egg roll and I was literally chewing on plastic... See picture attached. Food was over cooked and over salted, and the plastic issue did not seen to be a concern to the waiter...

very convenient if you need to stay near the airport..... i recently stayed here after a wedding out of town and both me & my date had flights out the next morning....at different times and to different places.

Its great that they offer free air for customers but if you ever stop in the store for any kind of flavored or featured coffee don't bother. They are always sold out of everything except regular & decaf. Luckily there is a Starbucks across the street.

The food here is decent, nothing special but it passes. Make sure you ask for anything you order spicy if you like spicy thai food, as their regular is not spicy at all. 3 stars for good service and a great location, but average food.
It's been 2.5+ hour and my food is still not here. I've called twice and the only response is I get is that they are really busy and its on the way. JUST DON'T DO IT!
Best Sonoran hotdogs in town. The carne asada burritos are great. I don't care for the cheese so I get it with meat and cabbage and then I spice it up with all the fixings they have.

Perfect place for Saturday/Sunday brunch or for after hitting up the clubs. Obviously don't expect a five star meal, but this place delivers! My favs would for sure be the Chicago dog, Ace sandwich, Bloody Mary, and the BIG mimosas that are only $8.00!
This place isnt pretty and shiny but the food is good and in my opinion tastes better than across the street. Has more soul in the food.

We use to come here for happy hour. Well it's been awhile since we've been here, probably almost a year, but within that year the service and product quality have diminished greatly. However the clam chowder soup is still the best I've ever had.
I enjoy this store than the other pet store located in Warminster, well lit and plenty of choices of pets and product.
stayed 2 night and 3 days, someone steal 55-300 telephoto lens and 100 dollar, please don't leave any valuables if u stay here !!!! cleanings lady are theft .....

Great service wonderful customer service I normally Get Hot chocolate and Banana Nut Bread Today I Had the Double Chocolate Chip Cookie..warmed up of course. .it was mouth watering and delious.I want More..
This is so close to Jersey style pizza it's ridiculous awesome people also food it's incredible I feel like I'm back in Newark New Jersey getting the real deal especially the Sicilian pizza
Should be renamed the dirty loud oven, 91 degrees inside on a cool afternoon, loud music and filth everywhere, you can probably do better at the Starbucks down the road.

Had a slight problem with the appetizers ordered the artichoke dip, chips were stale, waiter came right away and easily rectified the issue. Had a great waiter food was awesome can't beat the view of the sailing boats drifting in and out of the marina. A true gem!

Awesome food, awesome drinks :) The staff was very friendly and accommodating. My party came late and there turned out to be more people than the reservation was for, but the waiter and hostess were very friendly and helpful. I would recommend the chocolate fondue, and the turtle drink .

Caliber is one of my favorite local coffee shops to frequent on Saturdays. I love the fact that they have a driveto coffee is the cinnamon dulce latte which I've gotten my boyfriend stuck on as well. If you're in the Donelson area, definitely check this place out!
Takeout via grubhub was fine. Shrimp Pad Thai: okay Sauteed Eggplant w/ Tofu: good Vegetable Samosas: alright A little overpriced, but the food wad good and the delivery took about 50 minutes. eh.

The food was not good neither was the service. I had lasagna and my wife had fettuccine Alfredo the lasagna noodles were overcooked and crispy the fettuccine noodles were fine the Alfredo sauce was like water all over a plate

Qute possibly the best bagels in the city! We love Star Bagel, too, but our commutes take us by Bagel Face much more often and it has proven to be a bit addictive. Their humble storefront should not fool you - you are going to get QUALITY bagels inside!!!
Great spot. I always went to the original location, but I found this south street version to be sunnier and a bit lighter in general. The food is the same great quality though.

Its your standard Taco Bell... service is average for a fast food joint and the food is consistent with that of other Taco Bell locations. If your looking for authentic mexican, look elsewhere, but their tacos can hit the spot especially when you have the late night munchies.

Out at the best blues joint in the region and jamming in a few minutes to Rich McDonough and Rough Grooves! An incredible blues guitarist and also enjoying delicious food!! Always a great time at BBs!!

This use to be a awesome place to eat. Now it's nothing special just your typical Asian Buffet. Quality has gone down hill tremendously. I'm waiting on the next new Asian buffet to open, they'll be great for a year, then down hill they always go.
Biggest scam in New Orleans: Can you give a "HalfOY SI- try Tommy's Cuisine, Maximo's, Irene's Cuisine or Frank's restaurant, etc.

Peking duck, pineapple fried rice, and shredded Sesame Beef are top of my list here unfortunately only the rice seems to remain available on special/holiday dates! On the negative both with respect to attentiveness and friendliness.
Owner manager behind the bar was incredibly rude, at first this seemed like a nice place, good food, decent beer selection, but will never go back.
5 stars for atmosphere 5 stars for taste 5 stars for location 1 star for drink selection 1 star for no gluten-free options

Poor customer service and they cater to Indians before Americans. The cashier will wait on Indian customers even after seeing an American has been waiting In line ahead of other customers. They need a number system for fairness. The staff are rude.

First time eating here and probably the last. Service was not good. Food - Got BBQ flatbread that had hardly any chicken on it and my husbands Buffalo chicken pizza tasted freezer burnt. Best thing was the Mich Ultra.

This is a beautiful little restaurant in a quiet area uptown. The service was good and the food was decent. The problem was the food all needed salt and more seasoning if they would've done that it would've been really good except the red fish which wasn't exactly fresh.
Notoriously late train was, well, late. But the amusing fact that the attendants were constantly updating us with two or three minute increases of arrival time allowed for more quiet time in the sun.

Friendly staff. I never know what to order and feel pressured usually bc there's a line behind me of caffeine deprived, impatient people. But today was diff and the cashier helped me pick something to have. The toffee nut iced coffee and it was really good. Glad I listened.

They literally get pissed when you don't give them a tip. Like come on. I'm a bartender and make $2 per hour before tips and you don't see me pointing at my tip jar and treating customers poorly if they don't tip me.

They serve three slices of Ellios pizza laying on top of each other as their "margarita" pizza and put moscato in their mimosa..it also comes out black...I could say more about the rest of our order...

Not a big place the mosquitos seemed to be out in full force the night we went, and our waitress brought us some bug spray. The next morning we stopped by the fish market to take some seafood home, but we thought the takeout seemed a little expensive.

Great customer service. Super quick with each customer order and make sure your order is correct. However, the iced coffee vanilla was terrible, I don't know if it is this location but I have tried better in others ChickA.

While taking a morning bike ride along the beach and into town we stumbled on this super chill spot. Was great for a lazy breakfasting morning with my best girl friend and enjoy the slow morning start with good coffee and excellent food.

We walked in here to get lunch . There were several people at tables, and several servers standing around. We stood there for 5-6 minutes, making direct eye contact with several servers, and NO ONE even said anything to us... I just don't understand.

If you like old school diners then this is your place. Open early until 2pm with breakfast and lunch like the other places, complete with regulars on a first-name basis reading their newspapers and drinking their coffee.

I want to like My Thai, in fact it's fine and certainly comparable to any other Thai place in Philly but the food just doesn't quite hit the spot. Service is always good and at the very least, they are consistent.

This used to be Waldo's. They have heads/tails night on Friday where you can flip a quarter and call it and if you get it right you drink free. Very much a Tulane hangout bar and seems to be more for earlier drinking.
Good chicken cheese steak, terrible wings. I will go back for the chicken cheesesteak every once in a while, but there's no way I will touch the wings, even if they were provided free of charge.

Annual pass is nice, everything is good, except overpriced vendors. $9 for half cup dipping dots and $30 for a pie of pizza, we got the whole pie because its $8/slice. That feeling when you think you get honey but then get screwed.

Review is for drinks only. Mixology at its finest. Glad I checked this place out, but probably don't need to return unless I'm waiting to be seated at the Pharmacy. Service was great, as was the drink. Fun to check out at least once for anybody.

Came on Saturday night and the price was $42.50 per person. You got to be kidding. It used to be 26 bucks. Somehow they got an award for best Buffet in all of Nevada Sorry but nobody is going to believe that, Time for new management for the buffet

Id give this place zero stars if possible. They are closing permanently in June but they dont have anything now so save your money and find a good place. Guy Fieri's Diners Drive-ins and Dives is now on my blacklist for finding good places. What a pile of SH@T.

One star for effort. This was my build your Own 10" Gluten Free Pizza. After a long hour drive thought I'll grab a nice gluten free pizza with hopes it would be delicious per the pictures posted .. well mines was super crispy if you can't tell by the picture.

An embarrassment of place. Today I went here for dinner and a drink and was denied service because I showed a valid nonUS citizens in the United States. In solidarity, please do not go to this place. I deserve an apology from the owner and manager.

While there is a variety & good quality of smoking products and accessories, i think almost every person that works here is really pretentious & are constantly watching you walk around the store....not a fun shopping experience. lol.
When you're a young woman who knows nothing about cars, it's nice to have people available that you can feel comfortable with. Gil and his staff were excellent and so good to me. Highly recommended.

Fish was clean tasting, iced tea was not. The sauce they chose to drench a couple of the rolls in was odd tasting and did not encourage me to order more. Husband enjoyed the special habanero sauce they make in house. Overall, it was edible, but sadly not very enjoyable.

Well, it's been about 6 weeks and still waiting for that follow up call back.. that's okay. My missing items are probably in Someone's possession. After all, I've got somebody's TV stands just sitting in my garage waiting for SOMEONE from this company to give a shit and call.

Pretty standard for an Old Navy, but they lose major points because despite having 10 registers available there is rarely more than 2 open. The line to check out is always insanely long and insanely slow moving. If you think you can get in and out, think again.
Horrible! Totally lacking in compassion. The front desk girls are rude and unwilling to help, advise or direct next step with a dog in severe pain! If you love your pet don't go here

Was not a fan of this place for dinner. Everything about it felt uncomfortable and we didn't like our food or drinks. We had wanted to try it for a long time because of all the great reviews but we will not be returning.

I usually get the shrimp poboy not the hamburgers because it has longer hours and a drive through which most poboy joints don't. If you go inside you do get dress your sammiches yourself. The fries are big steak fries which I like.

Found what I needed, and at a decent price. While this location wasn't exceptional in any specific way, I was able to find what I was looking for, so I'm a satisfied customer. If I was returning to Nashville, I'd stop in again to make a purchase or two.

Most egregiously incompetent management you will ever find. "Fitness center" is an off brand boflex, the pool is gross and was only open for 1 month of the season, leaky bathroom ceiling. Just don't ever rent here.

Andrea's has been a favorite of mine for years. My most recent meal there was at a fundraising luncheon, and even though everything was pre-set for the guests, it all tasted wonderful. The service was good, and the chocolate mousse is still outstanding.

Decent food but the service is indifferent at best. I was asked not once but twice if I was there alone. I understand wanting to serve an entire party but making me feel weird about eating solo isn't going to inspire me to bring a date next time.

It arrived late and cold! So soggy I could barely get it out the box and hold it without it falling apart and the fries were way overcooked. Kind of ruined my whole night. My dad enjoyed his cheeseburger though.
Had been going to Kira for over 2 years but will no longer be returning due to a dispute with the owner over services. Did not have a customer first mentality.

Tommy was the best wine connoisseur I've met on our wine tasting journey! He was really on top of it and gave us a great history lesson and even showed us the map of wine country! I would definitely recommend.
I think they serve the worst burgers ever, I get a better burger at McDonalds. They're fries were old and the side salad I ordered was still frozen lol I will not come back to this place again
I love Drunken Fish, however during this visit I was very disappointed with the service and the taste of the food :(

Clean the bathrooms!! Disgusting! I was going to stop and eat here, but my quick trip to use the ladies room made me see how gross and unkept this locations is. I lost my appetite. I will never stop here again, for this was my 2nd trip gone bad.

It's been years that I've been here the atmosphere is the same great but they ruined there jambalaya they served it as ice cream 2 scoops and too dry the gumbos were great as usual service great and hurricanes were the best

Too hot to eat lunch on the water but the interior has absolutely no decor - not sure if it was because they had recently reopened or that's the usual look? Either way, decent lunch of fruit salad and grilled chicken and parking wasn't difficult.
Had one of their pumpkincheese filling, however, makes me wonder whether anyone tastes these concoctions before they bake it and put it out for sale. The concept was a lot better than the taste.

Service was HORRIBLE! Employees touch the cones with their hands instead of using a napkin. When.I requested another cone and please dont touch my cone with your hands, the employee through the cone down and gave me a NASTY LOOK. I immediately requested a full refund.
I have been coming here once a week since they opened, my favorite so far is the piña colada, it's so good. Staff has been very friendly every time I go, definitely worth a try.

I've been speculation what it would be like to eat a turd, and I must it wasn't nearly as shitty as I expected. The turd was full of chunks and dense, pretty warm, but not nearly as spicy as I expected. All in all, solid turd, but room for improvement.
This is Marcie Turney's baby. Before 13th street became what it was, before El Vez piggyy with my fave and like other BYOBs, ugh, cash only.

There was trash in the bathroom trash bins, somebody had used a toilet and not flushed, and there were leftovers in the refrigerator. I left 2 messages with management. No reply at all. A very poor value considering I paid $300 per night for 3 nights in a suite.

The staff here were really friendly and we got the veggie platter with a bunch of sides- okra, hush puppies, cabbage, green beans and corn bread... With sweet tea of course. Pretty good! Parking is easy and the prices were reasonable.
i'm sure it's delicious based on the theme park lines, i'll revisit my stars when i actually have enough time to wait in line. i'm sure it's worth it.

Not only does this place have amazing ice cream, they also have great customer service! They accidentally forgot one of my items in my to-go bag, so they personally sent me a $10 gift card and refunded the item. This was not expected but very much appreciated!

This was my first time visiting this location and I was happy because I had a not so good experience at another location. The food only took about 15 minutes to prepare. The staff was friendly and the food was really good. I will return!

You would only go here because you are in the park for something else. The coffee and the beignets are below average for New Orleans for sure but if you are taking the kids to the playground and want a snack it's your best option.

Called back at the time I was told to, then asked what time they were thinking for the job we discussed. Man on phone got angry and told me, "I don't run on no schedule, take your business somewhere else." Bad service, go somewhere else.
I ordered 2 large waters and you tell me the biggest size you can sell a water in is a medium??? I ordered it obviously I'm willing to pay for it.

I called the office of the registrar because I was having trouble requesting my transcript and the woman I talked to on the phone was so incredibly rude and made me very upset. VERY POOR customer service!!! RIDICULOUS!!
Sorry to say that I would love to give this place four stars for the food, but the night we were there, the service was slow and inattentive.

No complaints as far as Taco Bells go. Terrible for you and terribly delicious. This place is my fast food kryptonite. The service here is quick & friendly and they've never screwed up my order, which is more than I can say for other Taco Bell locations.
The guacamole is to die for but way expensive Try the pomegranate margarita I would recommend this place for drinks and light snacks

We ordered delivery and the delivery guy didn't have any change on him and expected a $10 tip on a $30 order. The mozzarella sticks were good but the marinara sauce was ice cold. The pizza also came cold. Would not recommend delivery.

By far the most reliable, cost effective and professional business that I've used for home maintenance in the greater New Orleans area. Do yourself a favor and use these guys for all your plumbing needs!

I really just stopped in to use the restroom but the lady working to counter greeted me so I thought I'd get a quick bite after all. The place was pretty clean considering. But everyone know what McD's is so I'll leave it at that.

This location of the Y is very clean and offers up a great deal of options to get your fitnesswide option so that I can utilize any of the Y's in Middle Tennessee. Very convenient as the Downtown and Green Hills locations are normally part of my daily route too!

Girl on the phone said they were completely booked all weekend so I went on the website and they had full availability for Sunday so confused why she wouldn't make me a reservation. When we got to the restaurant they were not even busy
Their pizza was really, really good. My husband and I polished off a large between the two of us in one sitting - it was that good. Highly recommended.

not sure what is the fuss, the food was not great at all, not an asian restaurant, but some sort of fusion and it was not even well done. The food is overkilled in flavor, very often way too sweet. Not a great place for food.

Drinks are very small but they are also not overly priced. Serving sizes were also on the smaller side. The food is tasty and the service is great but if you're really hungry go to one of the other Moxie restaurants.
Food 3/5. Service: what? As soon as the waitress dropped off the tip she yanked my tea and water as I tried to drink them. Terrible service and obviously trying to get us to leave.

Don't bother wasting your money here. Just because it says bacon doesn't make it good. Food was over cooked and bland, bacon was over cooked, worst tasting country gravy I have ever had, it was almost sour tasting. It was over $50 for 3. Never again.
Great shop, friendly service, and they have a range! One of my favorite things about this store is that when you buy a gun they give a free pass to the range!

Not safe for gluten free. Brought out the wrong food, when we sent it back they must have just re-plated, as I got very sick later. Everyone else enjoyed their meals and everything tasted good, but more care needed to be taken when I started the conversation with allergies.

Great fajitas tacos! So much food at a great price. They were very flavorful. Fresh brewed ice tea is always a plus since most places are lazy and have fake soda fountain tea which is terrible. Can't wait to get a burrito next visit.
Called one hour ahead for my food show up and hour later and still had to wait another 20min stupid how can you not have stuff prepared already disappointed!

Nice shop, nice owner. The prices were weird, a lot were crossed out, some were Very high, a lot was on sale, but it was unclear what was. No negotiation, no cash discount, which is lame and not in my experience in antiques. The owner knows his stuff.
Dont rely on their website to book, their technology is deplorably useless. Also be very mindful in making sure they do not round your toe nails, they like to do that and it causes ingrown toenails.
I just donated at the Ochsner main campus and the experience was painless a voucher for a 10neck t-shirt with an awesome local design. They had masks and crew neck tees as well.
Such a great place to grab a drink at the bar while walking around the city or sit and have a good meal. Solid place. Always a good choice if you are in the area.

Fabulous! Our airport shuttle driver suggested we dine here. So HAPPY that he did. We had a group of 10 with all ordering different entrees from Po Boys to seafood pizza as well as chargrilled oysters. YUM!
eh it's hit or miss most days, not many sir down resturants in the area so it's alright if u want that.
Been here a good five times now and the food is always good and the service is always great as well. Big portions for fair prices!

I don't even know why we bother coming here.... Every Friday we come here, and for some odd reason they always skip us and leaving us wait for more than what they had told us! We love yard house. However, their seating system is disappointing!

This used to be my preferred CVS store because of the very convenient location, but the last couple of visits, 2 of the female employees were really rude to me when I was just politely asking for help with picture printing... not ever coming back!!!
small location with a major focus on prepared foods. regular grocery items feel hard to find, a nd the majority of space is used inefficiently in its promotion of prepared foods.
After leaving us high and dry with no place for our rehearsal dinner, mollies didn't even send us back our $300 deposit. Really?
Bought couch 2 years ago. Already showing significant wear and the pull mechanism that you pull for the leg rest broke and now it won't recline. Going to Ashley.

Good ice cream, great prices, but very slow service and all of the food items absorbed the taste of the cleaning supplies they used. My napkins smelled like Fabuloso, and my cone and sprinkles had the distinct taste of it. Cover your food before you clean!

The food was good nothing special, I think most people in Santa Barbara that gave this place high reviews really don't have a clue what good seafood is because it's not that special and the alcoholic drinks was terrible.

The wait time is horrible, the doctor here today was sitting at the nurses station while all these rooms are full. And then she had the nerve to have an attitude. The staff in the back not friendly. I would not recommend this urgent care at all

Male cook is picking scabs and cuts in his hands while making eggs. Was asked to wait for a table so they could clean it off and watched for 5 minutes a they just stared at the table like they're waiting for it to clean itself.

First time and last. Coming from an island with cheap Chinese food I have to say :worst sweet and sour chicken I ve had in my life. And the lettuce wraps?good luck finding chicken in the filling. Just..DONT.

I ordered Wanton in chili oil and Black pepper beef for lunch. The wanton was fresh and delicious. It cost $19 for one beef dish which you can get a similar one in any other Chinese take out place $10ish. Not worth it.

Horrible service!!! Drive thru lines were slow and one window for cashier and food pick up. They forgot to give us hash brown. I was a little disappointed since those were for kids and I didn't feel like turning around to go stand in the long line to ask.
Truthfully, I still like Jamba Juice's blends better, but it is there when I want a fruit type smoothie and Jamba is not. Not much other selections and not all that different from Jamba.
Overpriced. Tea was cold. Service non-existent. We left and went across the street for lunch since we could not get waited on and they were not busy.
They did a great job replacing the vinyl that was peeling off the insides of the doors on my ten-year old vehicle. Reasonably priced, fast and friendly service. Highly recommended.

What a place! There's really nothing like it in the Tampa Bay area. Where else can you get a $5 muffaletta?!?! Wash it down with a Chinotto, finish off your meal with a cannoli or two, grab a pre-made pizza for dinner that night and it's a wrap!
PROS: location nice views clean, comfortable, spacious rooms reasonably priced connected to shopping mall CONS: elevators attracts loud, boozy crowd no hot water one morning

Great place to stop by during a spring/summer afternoon to grab a beer and some delicious snacks while enjoying the outdoors and a game of ping but it can be worth it if you have the right group. Enjoy!
Good food but you can get the same quality for less money at El Maguey right down the road, and the service at La Casa has been terrible every time I've been there.

This place does not observe safe food handling protocol! Beware! Observed several serious violations while watching them cut meat. When we brought the violations we observed to the attention of the owner, who was cutting the meat, he became very combative. Needless to say, we will not go back.

My appointment was with Anna. She was very helpful. She was very attentive and did an excellent job explaining everything to me, including the health of my eyes and my insurance coverage. The staff was also helpful with looking up my new insurance benefits.

The older guy who came out to give the bid was friendly just drilled a large hole in my floor and tacked a box about a foot up my wall doing some plaster damage in the process and leaving it looking very very ugly. I will not use them again.
Ambience is very nice, but thats it. Asked for coffee, the waiter brought cold coffee, no cream or sugar or spoon, when asked for cream, he went and pored milk in a shot glass.

So, the food's not great. But the lunch buffet is super affordable, and the service is great. So, no, the food doesn't really impress. But if you're craving a huge Chinese food buffet and want to stuff your plate, this is a good option in the Donelson area.

Absolutely love the food and the SERVICE is so great! I came in this weekend to pick up a carry out order I placed and I had FIVE different staff members check on me while I waited for my food. I'm already looking forward to going back again.

called and called, no one answers the phone, 3pm on a Wednesday, after ringing and ringing it ends up saying goodbye and disconnecting the call. wow, waste of time and I was going to spend a few hundred on a new printer
They are wonderful, customer service is on point, very attentive, very good greasy food joint, they pay attention to the little things which is nice from your neighborhood pizza joint.

If you're looking for a cheap Italian dinner, this is a fairly decent place to go. This is a step above The Pasta House or The Olive Garden, but definitely not as good as just about any of the other authentic Italian places in STL.
I'll bump this up to two stars, as they seem to be consistent in having raw and unsalted nuts for purchase at decent prices. Plus, they have several types of soybeans for sale.
I love this place it was closed for awhile due to change of ownership they use to be Dong Huan Restaurant. I love Jajangmyun this is my go to dish from here, the portion size is big.
Ordered the combo which came with fried rice. However the fried rice was hard, it was probably left over from from the last few days, it was like eating plastic. Definitely not recommended.
So happy I found this place, been craving birria and it was as amazing as the one I eat in Mexico, carnitas are d-lish too and the hand made tortillas are amazing! Prices are reasonable!
The food was amazing . Will definitely be back but the service was a little slow but the staff was friendly and the restaurant was fun.
Not sure if you guys are used to small burritos but this is supposed to be a regular burrito it looks like a baby burrito ‍

Not as much as i thought there would be to see, but still seen some great animals. Alot of construction going on during the visit, which resulted in them moving animals elsewhere and not getting to see them.. All in all it was a nice visit.

Weird, but my sushi didn't really taste the freshest. The price was to be expected for a sushi place, but the rice was hard, and the spicy tuna roll was not very spicy. pretty fast and nice service though.

It's a hit or miss here! I have ordered pasta and salads and it has been amazing! Last time I went though I ordered the cabbage rolls and they were covered in a disgusting sauce that ruined my whole meal and the waiter was also rude.

The food was phenomenal, the servers were very polite. I have eaten at a number of Thai places in the area and Thailand has the best Thai food I've found. Great atmosphere and very reasonable prices. Definitely worth a drive and would recommend to anyone looking for quality Thai food.

Great place for breakfast! They are really friendly, the food is hot and yummy and you can even order booze :) I've only been for breakfast but next time I'm in town, I want to try the lunch or dinner menu.
The food was delicious! I had the lobster spaghetti so good but it gave me the RUNS The waiting area is terrible, the tables are too close together, I felt like I was in the way of people

Unfortunately this will be our last visit food is always great but the service continues to decline to the point where they actually act as if they don't want you to eat in they'd much rather you provide a pick up order
Slow service, mess up orders constantly. Literally every time you ask to put a small amount of mayo or something they put way too much or just use the wrong type of mayonnaise.
Brenda was great to talk to and I dug the laid maybe it was just a bad day - but I can't recommend this place.
Went here on a hot Wednesday night and we had reservations but still had to wait about 15 for the food, and a C for the service!

We're sitting here right now. 'Took a little while to get seated and even longer for our server to get here. It was 6 ondot when we asked for the happy hour specials, and we were denied because happy hour stopped at 6. Not cool!
Poor service and flat out Worst experience at a panda I've ever had and I've been a frequent customer of many locations all over in many states.
Went to Bub's for dinner with my fam and although my food tasted good, I experienced severe food poisoning between 11:00pm to 1:00am that same night. Obviously I will never return to this restaurant.
Francisco was great, viewed the unit, got through paperwork, and got my gate code set up in less than 30 minutes. Super helpful and informative!

Overall a good experience with a great dining atmosphere. Food was good and quick. Guest with me ordered medium eggs and received over easy, stuffed French Toast has a strong hint of Orange Zest to them which was surprising. I would likely give this place another shot.

If you're going through the drive through it's great, I've never had problems - if you're going inside the people are really nice and the food is still good but pee before you go because the bathrooms are just nasty

I'm beyond disappointed that the park is closed already for the season. I suppose as a member I should have known but this is the best time of year for indoor fires in the hearth and fresh baked bread...super disappointed today.

Typical dive bar with a good beer selection. This is a great place to watch a game, but be warned: the ceilings are low and the place gets really smoky. It's a neighborhood place and the patrons are friendly and nice. The staff is pretty awesome, too.

We used to like this restaurant a lot. However, tonight the food was of questionable quality. Chicken rubbery and shrimp mealy. Maybe it was an off night, but to have both chicken and shrimp consistency not great, I think the quality of the product seems lower grade.
Ordered a Pitaya today and the new hire Desire I think was her name made it and straight slayed the game! Best I've had and definitely makes up for the last time I went and got a booty smoothie.
Five stars for their pizza. The crust is AMAZING. I prefer not to eat in, as the actual restaurant is small and doesn't have AC, but the food makes up for the ambiance .
Hearty portions Well attended service Easy location Ask for the Ratatouille But beware of the mice around your f It has closed !
Great space, plenty of stalls. Only problem - they advertise as heated stalled. The heaters could not be turned on and the individual working stated that he did not know how to turn the heaters on.

Pat's is a cool dive. Affordable, old school drive up. We need more places like this. However as much as i like this place, be careful because it looks very dirty there and this food may not sit well with your stomach.

There aren't that many used book stores anywhere anymore, so finding a multilevel old house crammed full of every kind of book you can think of is pretty cool. Aisles and stairs can get narrow, but it is well worth it.

Food is good but horrible customer service. I am turned off mainly by their poor customer service. I talked to the manager and gave him my feedback of what happened and hopefully he will talk to his staff so they won't lose any more customers.

The husband and I drove 15 minutes searching for a non starting with the staff and seating and ending with the refreshing choice of music . Probably returning tomorrow with tons of essays to grade and the sustenance and space to do it.

My second new windshield. Used another company first time- Safelite was SO MUCH BETTER!! Guy showed up on time, worked fast, no problems, let me know he was done and a couple hints on letting it set properly. Great service!!

I shop here because it's close, but I've preordered items here and have been told they've been sold to other customers upon pick up. Really turned me off from shopping at gamestop. Up your customer service or I'll be using Amazon for everything.

Very fun goth shop, good for goths or any other fantasy creatures of the night, they have a huge range of shoes and lots of really comfortable but still funky ones! Lots of accessories and corsets, pretty much had any goth staple you could think of
If you want to experience true south Philadelphia Italian, loud, neighborhood friendly, traditional, drama filled fun, sports bar, this is where you want to be.

Food: 4 Decor: 3.5 Ambiance: 3.5 Service: 3 Value: 3.5 Honestly, the food is surprisingly good for airport food, and the prices weren't that much more than other options around. Not a bad option for a layover.
Big spacious place, had fun but the people who work there are just SO unfriendly and seem to hate their lives & their job. Next time we will go to sky zone.
Great food, very high prices, but the house wine and beer were amazing, the service was a slight lacking, but the ambiance and food made up for it

Been here twice ... EXTREMELY slow and/or nonexistent service both times. Unable to rate food as I was not offered a menu and got tired of waiting for the server to check on our table. Will not be going back ...Two stars for semi - decent beer selection.
I love this place but am disappointed right now that I took a cab here to find that they were closed; according to Yelp they're open til 2am and right now its only 1245 but they're closed.
I've had some really good burgers but the CEO burger "go green" style was up there. You can not go wrong with wagu beef and bacon I spent $17 for burger, regular fries, and bottle of water .

Late night booze. However, Michelle during the day is sexy and smart and sexy and terrific and knows all the poop going on in the city and sexy. I go here after work for the needed Ketel. Cheap lovely drinking without a gaggle of hipsters.
Go try the Veggie or Spinach Stromboli! The service was great as well. I will be back when I visit the mall again which is pretty much every other day if not every day.
Just ate breakfast there, awful, tables were all dirty and employee 's were playing on their phones runny and food was terrible where is the management??? close it down

Really loved this place when I was living in Philly. Its very standard and solid inexpensive breakfast/lunch place, except that they get the all the little things right and extra delicious. I especially love the scramblersmost places only offer omelets but these are always inspired and wellto.

This was the worst smoothie I ever had. God forbid someone orders an incredibly simple recipe not on the menu y'all get thrown all out of whack. I also was hungry so I ordered a medium and was handed a 1/2 full cup so really happy about that, too.

Been here a few times and had mix feelings about the food. The Ropa Vieja doesn't come close to the real thing but the seared Salmon was fantastic, drinks are oK and the atmosphere was great so overall good place to hang out and enjoy some good food.

This restaurant noodles are kind of lack of Chinese noddles' taste, but each bowl of noodles contains loads of delicious meat or pork. The environment is not really good. Some tables are sticky, but I still had a good experience on its beef in the noodles.
The food is not the best, but I like the atmosphere, the service is really good, and you can't go wrong with the margarita and mimosa flights.

Watch a know is whatcha get. Great for their unique amenities, kinda sucks for just regular ole food shopping. Although, I'm not one to care about having all organically grown and made food in my household, so I may be biased.
I had a Caesar salad. It was fairly pedestrian, nice croutons, bagged lettuce, waxy cheese, and what turned out to be manufactured Caesar salad dressing from a plastic bag.

Gorgeous setting and extremely friendly, knowledgeable staff! The grilled octopus with balsamic, mango, and arugula was in all honestly one of the most delicious things I have ever eaten. They also have a stellar wine selection!
I'm literally in love. They have somehow managed to combine my two favorite things in life cover books in probably because this place just recently opened.

this has been the best experience I have had while getting my oil changed they don't break the bank with their prices, they check everything on your car and the staff was very professional and friendly 10 out of 10 would come back here

Our dog has been favoring his right foot paw for a few weeks so we decided to take him here for a checkbusters. I also liked that they trimmed our dog's talons as part of the initial doctor visit fee. Highly recommended.
Just ordered was fantastic! Loved the bread! I know people hate on you saying you kids food but that's child's play because you got a grown child for a mascot. Stay busy! Go Bucs!!!!

Good food, good pasta, service and byob! Got mozzarella with prosciutto as an app, primavera with shrimp, my husband had pasta with crispy pancetta and shaved vidielia onions, everything was delicious right down to creme brûlée, service was friendly too

Food and service mediocre. Nothing special. The drinks seemed to be fun and well priced and possibly a fun patio, but we came at night and sat inside and weren't impressed. If you come, come to drink and sit outside.

First time the food was wonderful, but it took more than twenty minutes for us to be even spoken to. I feel like they should just go with more of a self serve & completely eliminate the server if they aren't going to pay attention to the guest!

If you are craving donuts at a late hour, this location is open 24 hours. The area seems safe and the service was quite friendly. I would not say they stand out from other Dunkin Donuts locations but the fact that they are open 24/7 is great.
Prime rib on thursday is unbeatable in town they also have babyback ribs! Place is a bit noisy, not a romantic place to take a date, more of a local happy hour spot for great happy hour!
This place is one of the really good ones in the area, The ambiance is fantastic but food is not that great. I had their fresh caught salmon, wasnt that great.
its usually a nice place to eat but that date the meat was lack of flavor the waiter was slow, I order a medium well steak and came out Burnt so for the price that I paid, it wasn't a good dinner

My first time and HiGHLY RECOMMENDED. For a $8.99 lunch buffet all worth it. Lota of options for a vegetarian too. I disnt get the chance to taste everythong in buffet sonce I got stucked with the veggie paneer and chicken masala. I love the carrot desset too!
Breakfast special is up to $7.50. Not worth it. This used to be nice spot for an early bird special but over time the price crept up to where what they serve just isn't worth it anymore.

loved the chocolate bread pudding & mashed sweet potatoes. we had brisket, ribs and chicken. ribs were good. brisket ok. wasn't a big fan of the chicken - too much of a smoke for my taste but my husband liked it. :)

Visited again just before Oktoberfest. Fine food again and attentive, entertaining service by a mock-sarcastic probable family member. Watch for new menu with the standards and some new dishes, plus free wine as well as free beer, and live music on Fridays and Saturdays........
The place is very over priced and the female owner was a complete snot and rude about wether or not we had a reservation
Girls are all very sweet clean space very relaxing kiersten does my lashes she us very sweet and does a excellent job
Great, happy servers, good fresh food, my significant other had two orders of grits, and she is a southern grits maven. We loved it!
The carne asada taco was incredible but tiny, and I wasn't particularly impressed with the quality of the Sonora Hog Dog.
Not your typical cirque du soleil show. The music and costumes were awesome, as usual, but as for the performances, they didn't seem up to par for cirque's prestige level.

So delicious gryo was so good also the gyro plate which is huge and fresh rice salad pita bread and your meat of choice yum!! Baklava is perfectly sweet we will be back really nice place customer service awesome!
It was fine but some people kept telling me to enjoy a Ritual Fast so I am not enjoying a Ritual Fast. Also, I mention to the Waitress that I'm a Yelp Reviewer.

Discovered this place on Uber Eats back in December. We've now ordered from here FOUR times Delicious! We are particularly fans of the grilled pork on rice vermicelli, chicken with crispy egg noodles, and of course, crab ragoons. The pad thai is really good too

This place is ok if you like cafeteria food, but I found the fried chicken to be very greasy, the scalp potatoes to be mushy and have way too much cheese. The saving grace was the butterscotch pie, which was very good.

Pizza Taste: 9/10 Price to the size of pizza: 3/10 The pictures online make the pizzas look irresistible and again the taste is very good, but for the amount of pizza you get for the price - you leave hungry.

This museum is so unique; it's the gem of Philadelphia. This is a huge priceless collection you won't see anywhere else. Barnes knew his stuff before everybody else did including Philadelphia Museum of Art that made fun of his collection back in the day.
great find where do we start oj fresh and worth it omelette 5 eggs service is right on every thing is more then enough it your on the beach worth the ride over the bridge you should try it

The pizza here is decidedly mediocre. They've essentially extended the Potbelly and Qdoba model to pizza. I'm guessing families love it because it's quick and everyone can do their own thing, but the quality of the toppings is so so and the crust isn't great.

My burger was DISGUSTING. The only reason I'd give this place two starts is because they took it off my bill and the waitress was friendly. Other than that, my chips were wayyyyyy too salty and the burger was atrocious. Not coming back.
The only think I eat at a diner is breakfast, and it's always good here. The place is pretty clean, the service is good, and the breakfast is just about as good as any other diner.
I just received a call from someone in Mexico they have my missing item, he went through some of my personal paperwork and found my phone number and contacted me. Hopefully I can get my things back!

Quite simply the best buffet around. It can be summed up as what Grandma cooked on Sunday but on a large scale and you can enjoy it every day. We highly recommend eating here and don't tell Grandma because you don't want to hurt her feelings.

I have eaten at many "Authentic" Mexican restaurants here in Florida and El Huarache Azteca is by far the most delicious and authentic place. A hidden gem, No gimmicks and not pretentious. Seriously good food at great prices.

Just had the best experience ever at this place. I brought in my black leather boots for new laces and a polish. The very nice gentleman measured my old laces so I would get the exact size I needed and polished them to perfection within minutes! Highly recommend this place!

I had the Redfish Oceana and it was quite good, not the best seafood I've had in the city, but excellent nonetheless. What pushed this to 5 stars was our server Darrick, he was friendly and helpful and all around a great server. I would definitely recommend trying this place.

This is like so many "better" Tucson restaurants, where the concept is great, but the food is just sopriced at $8+. Although excellent, $4 to $6 would have been a more appropriate price. The service was surprisingly superb, wellthebutt, as he responded to our every inquiry with a keen knowledge.

Not my favorite experience. We were seated at a dirty table, and it took entirely too long to be waited on or served our food. We would have complained but there did not seem to be anyone around to listen. At least the food was good.

The food is okay, but somewhat pricey considering Hoang Long, also Vietnamese, is better located for me at at West Edmonton Mall and their prices are cheaper for food that tastes as good or better, and with greater dessert options.

This is such a beautiful building and I love how so much of the art connects to Nevada in some way. It's free on Saturdays which is a bit of a mad house but definitely worth going. The staff is friendly and very knowledgable.

For one reason or another I've been here at least 5 times in the last 3 years, every time it has been as good as it can be, everyone was nice and helpful, most recently it was Marie, she had a good aptitude and disposition to help. Appreciate that.
