What type of sadomasochistic, servile nutbag would give these Phucking Phascist Assholes anything more than 1 star? I'd list the myriad of ways in which the PPA succeeds in totally drying my vagina up, but obviously, most people on this page are all-too familiar with their evil ways.
It was okay. We happened to try Taste of Saigon before we came to Pho Quyen, and this place just wasn't as good for broken rice, or pho.
Stayed in a suite . . . Needs a "refresh" Pleasant but inattentive staff Terrible service Great concierge Poor pool service Will not return - too many options at this price point
Food is great but do not order for delivery, waited almost 2 hours for our pizza when we live less than a mile away
great place to hang out with friends and family food is great not expensive people are friendly and easy going would recommend to anyone and everyone

Do not volunteer and do NOT let your daughters go alone - my daughter was fondled and groped by a volunteer and the management did NOTHING! Disgusting response and terrible experience for my daughter.

Best Detroit Pizza in PHILLY hands down! I travel from Plymouth Meeting in the middle of rush hour to get his square crack pies :) Thats over an hour and a half commute. That Dan G is a damn wizard or more likely a Voodoo witch doctor.

I love the warm feeling from Nabruzzi. Every time we go the food is amazing and the staff is great. The kids chicken parm is huge and a great price too, I like that they provide great real options for kids at a fair price. Awesome wine list too.

Seeing the 4 stars and pretty decent amount of reviews I made the assumption that ordering takeout wouldn't be a bad choice based solely on taste not service. Food was bland and lacking. Breadsticks tasted doughy. Maybe a second visit would yield better results but who knows.
This is the rating for the eye Doctors downstairs no glasses are needed, but we'd certainly consider getting kids frames here - they are pretty reasonable, too.
The tacos are very small for the price, chips and salsa are not free and tacos are served with plain iceberg lettuce, tomato, cucumber and an underwhelming side of pico de gallo.

Don't bother making an appointment. Walk-ins will be tended to before your dog is. Your dog will be left in a cage on the back while people who are too important to make an appointment will have their dogs groomed immediately.
Very dishonest an disloyal lady, To be black own business an to actually see for yourself how she conduct business it would make you at a loss for words.

The curry dish was disappointing the sauce was watery. Pad Thai had good flavor but the chicken pieces were hard and dry. The heat in the restaurant was not working well and we ate with our coats on we were there for dinner.
A server named Hallie treated me and my party with the utmost disrespected and verbally and beligerantly confronted is when our tip did not meet her expectations
Pizza is ok. This place needs a manager that knows how to keep a restaurant clean and teach customer service to all the kids that work here. So much potential but very disappointing.

Kind women next door brought over some Bolton's Spicy Chicken & Fish because they said it was too hot for their palate. The meat was cooked to perfection, but this stuff was so hot that we had to drink coffee creamer.

Yo its a hot dog sold from a street cart so don't expect too much. It's not the best chili dog you are ever gonna eat, but if you are hungry, need a quick bite and like hot dogs from street carts...then this is probably gonna hit the spot.
Food comes out super fast 195 egg pancakes and French toast from 9 to 11 am Nice bar Great brunch buffet on Saturday and Sunday for only 1095 great place a lot of food great soup
When in NOLA this cafe is a must visit on every ones list just as I did back in March 2017. The coffee and beignets are a classic New Orleans sweet treat.

Second time here..... Thought first bad experience was iffy so gave it another shot Service is awful Food subpar Silverware was dirty but never replaced when we asked Ants on table Definitely not returning.

Thought I'd check this place out based off the good yelp reviews. Service was very slow, food was average and neighborhood is sketchy. Won't be in a rush to return, but if you're in a mood for average Mexican grub for cheap, this is your place.

Swanky ambiance, cute restaurant, pompous service, contemporary menu, NOT dim sum as noted on Yelp. Octopus pasta: Strange texture Salad: Best part of the meal but overdressed Miso apple tart: Sounded so interesting but tasted like a very standard / mediocre tart.

Great food, drinks, and service. We stopped in for a drink and only tried the smoked fish dip and we'll definitely come back for the pizza. Bottomless wine, beer plus a shot, and mixed drinks?!? Yes, please.
Awful meal was inedible and the place was not clean - I left vowing never to return which is a shame as I love a good diner

I am a picky eater and by the name I was thinking I may have an issue finding something- however I was quiet surprised when I arrived. The atmosphere is amazing and the food is even better. The meatballs may be the best I've ever had.
Glad I made the trip over here, it was awesome, the barbecue sauce is some of the best I've ever had. The bbq beans had me wanting more this is good barbeque.
Arrived for breakfast on a Sunday morning breakfast was fine for us All egg white veggie omelette w/toast I was stuffed

I Nachos are very good here I just wish when you order them to go they would put the queso on the top instead of in little cups. Beside that the food is very good and the service is very friendly and efficient.
Looked awesome, unfortunately we were not even here 5 minutes and my 2 year old broke his leg :( Spent hours in the emergency room. Staff were friendly and the place looked clean and fun !

Outstanding find...small classic Tuscan restaurant suggested by our hotel consciege Bakes bransini served table side was fresh sweet moist fish with a olive oil sauce. All of the pasta was home made and fresh Service was special...limoncello on the house to end the meal. Special evening for everyone

Had a very slapdash lowboys of cheap lager. Decor is fine but music totally non-tiki. Overall a letdown. I've had better Mai Tais at dive bars where the bartender needed to Google the recipe on their phone to make it.

So update, Chris the new GM for that location contacted me to apologize for the service and explain the process so because of that i am changing from 1 star to 4.. Customer care is everything so i appreciated the call

Not bad. Decent beer, good food, lots of tv's for watching the game. Slightly odd that everything has to be ordered from the bar.Which is good for watching a game, they dont really bother you constantly and act like they are trying to get rid of you.
Wow what a gem nice decor clean, spacious and the best thing is the margaritas simply outstanding food is great too

Amazing food, great service. The owner is super accommodating and definitely appreciates your business. The chef and all of the employees take pride in what they do. People have good and bad days, but I truly believe that any complaints are just people who can not be pleased.

Loved loved loved. I was stressed about my cat not digesting right and the quickly ran some tests, got my medicine, and some food as well to help her stomach. Everyone was super nice and explained things in a manner that was understandable.
Great urgent care! Very clean! Staff friendly. Dr Struble that works there use to be my pcp and diagnosed a condition I had for YEARS that no dr thought to test for. Love him!

I came from Saint Louis Missouri to indy 500 race and after the race I want to eat gyros and I call this place to ask until what time is open sinnce today is sunday and a woman said "same as always" . terrible first impresion

Servicenot worth it at all...my go to drink is crown royal with a splash of sprite and I ended up with sprite with a splash of crown Food-it doesn't matter what you order it all looks and tastes the same their food is a couple steps above taco bell

I've been to other metro diners and they were much better. I don't know if the service was really slow because they are fairly new and still getting use to things but the food wasn't as good as other locations I've been to

POOR QUALITY FURNITURE!!! I received an entertainment center a couple weeks ago. One of the handles has already broken off. When I called customer service, her response was "handles break and fall off all the time" How is that an acceptable response??? I will never purchase from Mealey's again!
Good Darjeeling tea. If you go and have some time to relax, there is a great little loft area up above the open kitchen.

They need to fix their parking lot... it's always a nightmare. I totally agree with Thao N "This target is a lot like its parking lot - people are all over the place, customers are lost, confused, don't know how to walk/drive/park, and not really courteous."
absolute shit of a place..... please never go here I use to work there and I found maggots in the pretzels and I have video evidence... NEVER GO HERE.

Dine IN do NOT order out. At least if you like pad thai. I DO NOT understand why i order pad thai there and i get this lovey dish, i order take out, and i get dry noodles. I would have given 4 stars if i never ordered out...
I had my vehicle come in for the 60, 000 mile maintenance, and was very satisfied by the service provided by the staff, I would recommend it to any Lexus owners in Santa Barbara area.
Stumbled up on this place riding up Carrollton. Good bbq not the best I've had but if your in the mood for BBQ and this the only place open they won't disappoint. I'll go back again to get the ribs.
Well considering my yelp account is my nickname and not my real name; no you would not be able to find a record of me.

Had a great experience buying my new RAV4! Jack Peck at Wesley Chapel Toyota was referred to me by a friend and he was as helpful and trustworthy as she had said! Happily driving into a new year in my new car! Thanks Jack!

Libertine is one of my favorite places! Great drinks, food and atmosphere! My fiancé and I frequent there. They change their menu and drinks quite often, but if they ever have the Burro Caliente again, I suggest getting it!

Makiman is good, but a bit pricier than other sushi places in town if you don't have some kind of deal. I've had various fish and vegetable rolls, which have all been decent, and the vegetable tempura is good. Service is average.
Pork Belly was out of this world good. Really really tasty. But on the other hand, 2 mains, a tea and a coffee came to $50 and as a meal, it wasn't quite worth that.

Sat outside for drinks and opted not to eat there as the birds outside were a bit overwhelming. The menu looked good but from the lack of people in the restaurant we were a bit weary about eating there.
horrible job not what i asked for, i came in asking for dip acrylic but she did gel acrylic instead, the males at the salon do good nails though...

5 Stars and without knowing what that bid was just went to work estimating what it would cost and how he would do the job. I was totally impressed with his professionalism. James was thorough and very fair. I accepted his bid and recommend to others.

Lobby Bar looks great, was told at 10 minutes to 1pm the bar doesn't open till 1pm, the bar looked totally stocked and ready to serve, we then watched the bar tender play on their phone for the next several minutes while we sat and waited for it to open....

I've been coming here since they first opened and, while overpriced, the food is great. The waiters are a little strange and one had a coke nail but the Ramen, BBQ Mix, and Boba are all delicious. Oh, and a 10% student discount!
enjoyed a classic reuben here. Hit the spot after a long day of traveling and the side of macaroni and cheese was pretty off the charts.
The most honest repair man you will find. He takes care of his customers, doesn't tell you something you don't need and shows up when he says he will. I will never call anyone else.

the restaurant lied and said they had prepared the food when I tried to cancel it within. 5 to 10 seconds of placing the order. how is it possible for the restaurant to accept the order and make it with 1 min I was talking to the Uber eats help.
Third time that I have walked in there recently to find out that they don't know how to run the cash registers and was yelled at for offering cash to buy cigarettes. This place is a joke. Stay away
The food is great and you can get half meals amd choice 2 different entrees so it's perfect for people who can't make decisions!

Stood at the counter waiting to order for five minutes while three employees stood next to the food in the back pretending to not see me. Food came out fast once ordered. But was completely cold. Avoid this one...

My cats are like my family, and everyone here has treated them as such. Dr. Sally Mobraaten in particular is one of the most gentle, compassionate, and calm people I've encountered despite her complete commitment to her many patients.
Loved how there's a drive thru, but my tall white chocolate mocha with non fat milk, no whip cream was not good. Does EVERYTHING taste different in FL? Sigh.

Spinach and sesame 4 Chicken karaage 3 Tuna tataki 3 Baby potatoes 3 Sake choice 5 Service 5 Very nice Japanese food for Edmonton, not in Vancouver's class but still good Japanese chefs and staff! Give it a try

So-the bread was really stale. Since I don't live very close to it I'd say it's a one and done for me. Not a bad place but it doesn't really measure up to the best gastropubs in the city and I'm surprised it's generated such a buzz.
I usually go to 5 pm sunday mass at the old cathedral, but decided to try the Basilica, both are old and historic but the basilica is just beautiful!

I have been practicing at Sumits for the past 4 years and I absolutely love it. Whether you're looking to increase your flexibility, looking for a good workout, or just need a stress reliever Sumits is the place to go. Get ready to sweat!!

Pretty pricey and there are a good bit of new things in there, but it's a good resource if you need an $800 dresser or a settee bench. Basically a large warehouse that seems to get new inventory frequently. Check it out for yourself if you're looking for furniture.

The old structure has not been well Maintained and it shows It's your only train option and that should mean that they take good care but they don't. The train lines are crazy and organization is minimal The septa area is worse than than the Amtrak area

The service was excellent. The appetizers were great. The entrees were underwhelming. They have a decent wine menu with most bottles between $35- that included a round of drinks plus a bottle of wine. It was a nice meal, but I expect a bit more at that price point.
The cake here is delicious, but very pricey. This also isn't a place where you can just walk in and be seated there is a room in the back that they reserve for larger parties.
My experience this go round was much more pleasant the all my other previous visits here and the food is always good.
Self parking it was pretty expensive but it was in a very good location if you want to do a lot of walking but it was hot outside so we parked here

You can not trust the reviews on this site as it was brought to my attention that the employees are being told by upper management that they NEED to write reviews. I'm not sure how I feel about a place that is this dishonest about their reviews.

I've been on a diner kick lately so was excited to try Trip's for breakfast. The restaurant definitely gives off an old if you're in the area I recommend checking it out, but there's nothing unique enough about the atmosphere that makes me want to drive across town to visit.
Not a bad place. You can get a yummy and fast dinner, it is much better than getting a fast dinner from a pizza joint or McDonalds.
My 21 mo old son hated getting his haircut and Darian did a fabulous job handling his rough behavior and cutting his hair!

beautiful, well-kept shop with delicious sandwiches. the guy at the counter was super friendly and helped me come up with a sandwich that was just what I was looking for . great food and great atmosphere!
Place used to be great now it's not answering the phone half the time, acai bowls barely blended with chunks in them. Understaffed half of the time and terrible hours on weekends

We wait to get seated for at least 1 1/2 hr, then after ordering we didn't get the food after almost 1hr, they are busy but they have to work on the kitchen speed, food is ok but will not go back until service get improved....

I used to live in Berry Hill, so this was my closest Walmart. I hated their selection of everything. I remember going there for simple things in the arts and crafts department, which was only a quarter of an aisle, and they had nothing I needed.

We called them several times to ask questions about the property and they were not helpful but rather annoyed we called. We called when at the property to report the hot tub was dirty but they never returned the call.
First visit was a mess, sent home with the wrong desert, took a long time, but she was also doing the busing of tables too. Second visit the waitress was speedy and helpful.
John is a true craftsman, a great find! NOTE, with the closing of the Sherman Brothers store in Montgomeryville, The Towne Cobbler has moved to 427 South Broad Street in Lansdale.
Fun place to end up after a night of bar hopping to chill in the lounge, check the sights from the top and enjoy the live music on the ground floor.
I took the children here for pajama saturdays... a very nice time for a cool price although the pancakes are pretty huge next time I will come with a bigger appetite

Amazing staff with the small community vibe to it, clean well kept cafe, amazing food. I don't get to eat here often because I work weird hours but, when theyrE open I like grabbing lunch here. Def. recommend if you live in the area.

I love their jewelry boxes and fast shipping....but was so disappointed in the "Reclaimed Paper " I received 500 bags in 1 design and 500 bags in another. I have 1000 bags in 2 designs, that's not so random. Stock # GB3

Wow! I don't even eat raw food but this place is so fresh and real deal I had to try it. I got pretty much the only meal with cooked protein and it was an experience unlike any place I have been in that price range. Don't miss it!

The stay was nice, but I almost felt dirty there at all times maybe it was the rooms being so extra. We had a suite and it was nice, I am more simplistic in my Taste and that is not what this place had to offer.

The food was good, I would give 4-5 stars. Service wasn't what I expected. Our server barely came to check up on us, from the moment we set down to our dinner was served was over an hour. Dirty table, dirty wine glass....
The sandwiches are pretty good but there are so many places in Philly where you can get a good sandwich at a cheaper price. That's why it's only okay with me.

Paul's team did a great job from start to finish; quoting, scheduling, loading and delivering to three separate locations without a hitch. Very conscientious, friendly and accommodating. I've moved many times, and these guys were the best!

The hotel is OK, but the Hertz here is the worst! Made seven people wait in line for an hour and a half only to tell them that they don't have the car that we reserved. Marriott, kick these people out of your hotel they treat your guests very poorly!

This place makes a great wood fired pizza. I stopped in for a business lunch hoping that they'd be good . Attentive wait staff, relatively simple menu, and a high quality product I normally wouldn't go for a fig and arugula topped pizza well worth it!
Just recently discovered Mondays are kid night. For $3 plus tax any child under 12 can fill an 8oz cup; they don't even bother weighing it WHOA buddy!!! And they have frozen Greek Yogurt ha

Delicious hot food, pretzel is to die for. Good beer. TVs playing. Wings a bit dried over cooked but sauces taste great and the second time I orders I guess possibly another chef because the wings were delicious.

Stopped in on a busy Friday night, prompt courteous service, large sausage pizza was enough for 3 guys to have 2 slices each and a couple pieces leftover. Decorated like a TGI Fridays, why? DJ played a weird mix of music given the scene on Broadway. Music was a bummer

Solid Vietnamese and Chinese-American food. Nothing amazing, and the pricing is maybe a touch high for what it is, but it's good on the whole for having such a large menu and serving up most stuff in under 10 minutes.

Went in there with three broken ribs order beers when were seated. Soon after the server came over and took our beers, that were paid for, and said we were drunk and couldn't serve us. They did not refund us the cost of the beers. We will never go back.
The place is Ok in my opinion too much seasoning on the meat, large size burger and nice side for the price. My order was overcooked and the avocado was hard and not edible.
I haven't actually been inside or bought a cupcake from her, because every time I try to stop in their closed. You can't go by the hours they say they're open.

If you want to pay $50 for a bunch of under qualified morons to help you with absolutely nothing at all, go here! And be sure to take the shuttle service if you enjoy being forgotten about and waiting outside in the cold for 3 hours!

Service was poor, food was overpriced, as well as the drinks. 20% gratuity for a 6 top even though 4 of us only got drinks and one ordered at the bar and paid there. Not what I would expect, this was a low blow for sure.

I was disappointed that Silvergreens didn't have more vegan options. It really harshes my mellow when restaurants that bill themselves as being vegetarian/vegan-friendly don't offer some kind of vegan protein source, like tofu. Counter service.

Stopped by the drive-through as I was already in Media. Very slow through the drive through as they have three lanes and only one computer which today was having a meltdown. Finally got through after 10 minutes or so.

Glad that I found this cute little spot to have breakfast.my boyfriend and I loved the food everything was delicious and I loved the way they decorated the inside it has a very warm and cozy feel to it.
Everytime I go my nails chip. Everytime. They don't even last a week. It's nice that people are able to understand you and the staff is so incredibly nice but I will never go back again.
Finally tried it, was hoping for much better, I ordered the duck had to send it back, very chewy, settled on something else, which was ok. Probably won't go back. Sorry Thank you Sunny

Food is good but the 4 dollar delivery fee is insane, when everybody else in this area is free- 2.00 max. Seriously it's also very off putting to see the manager or owner argue with people who leave bad reviews on grubhub. Terrible business practice.

Great service and good food. We are transplants from Dallas and this is a good Mex spot. Wish they would have made their own tortillas but that's a cost and labor till I'm sure they don't want to absorb.... would recommend it

Went in for a haircut today, zero wait time one employee Carmen who has over 35 years of experience and did a fantastic job. I would highly recommend this location and Carmen. I will definitely be going back there again myself and taking my parents too.
Not worth your time or money honestly they charge you extra for everything including if u wanna pay w a credit card.

Very friendly staff but I was disappointed with my visit. He said he could refer me to a psychiatrist and when I called and asked them to make the referral they said they would. It has been 2 weeks since my appointment and I haven't heard anything.

I been to the Sucre on Magazine plenty of times, but this was the first time at this location. They are not as welcoming as the one on Magazine, but nevertheless, there quality is still there, this time we really came for the king cake, and boy was it delicious!

Pablo is an excellent amazing human being who's passionate about what he does! I've been taking my boyfriend for his birthday haircuts for the past 5 years and it's one of his favorite gifts the place is super clean and chill, definitely a must!!

Stopped here before a field trip to the Franklin Institute with 15 teenagers we had organized everything ahead of time, and the pizza was served almost immediately! The staff was wonderful and the pizza rocked. Most kids said it was their favorite part of the trip .

Great customer service, was very reasonable with return times and gave me even a better car than expected since the original car wasn't available. They accommodated me very well. Very pleased and would definitely rent here again!

Super friendly new owners Herb and Grace have taken over and breathing new life into this corner Shell gas station and car wash. Wishing them lots of success. I rolled in on their 9th day in business for a fill up. Nice to see a mom/pop business in the community.
Be prepared to wait, its a little slower than most fast food restaurant but worth the wait, Very tasty hot subs.
I shit better food worst joke of hot dog I've ever had a 7 11 hot dog at a high price

I was here with a gentleman suitor. The experience was great, server was very attentive, and the owner/chef was amazingly nice and spent a lot of time making the night very special for us. Would recommend 11/10!

used to serve the most amazing delmonico steak sandwich where the meat was so tender it almost melted in your mouth. firebirds has changed the sandwich and no longer serves it with delmonico steak... the new sandwich doesn't even come close to the original
The owner is super creepy, stay away. I was there with my parents while I visited over Christmas break, and he kept harassing me, right in front of my elderly mother!
We order Calamri, tuscan flat bread, cesar wrap and mojito The food and drinks were awesome and so tasty We the love the food and service

So I had the traditional banana foster with condense milk and caramel, it was alright it tasted like banana laffy taffy lol wasn't really expecting that taste. Also it didn't look like the pictures it was flat didn't have the traditional sno-ball look. Would come back again tho!
I paid over 100 dollars for a detail and they didn't even shampoo the seats then they said well do it and rubbed soap on the two front top seats in 5 minutes ... Never again!!!

Skip it Food was cold service was horrible Took 30 minutes to pay the check. Drinks were watery. Took the order for half the table then 15 minutes to get the other half Have not been to a bonefish grill in years. Will not return.
Offers "All you can eat to go" but follows and tells you what food you can and cannot have without charging extra after paying full price. Would give No stars if I could.

"We can't you any food that needs to be made, we are short handed" Two bites later of a rock hard scone and I wondered why they were open! Don't pass up Einsteins to get to River City, that boat has left the dock.

chain, but good for a chain. if you sign up on line you can get buy one get one offers but not much of a selection and the people that work there are rude, they are still pretty new so I hope it does not get worse.
I used to order Snarf's all the time when I worked on the Loop, because the food is delicious STAY AWAY FROM DELIVERY.
As a collector, this shop isn't at the top of my list, but for inexpensive books and gifts, particularly for kids, it's a great place to pick up a bargain.

I've been hoping to find a place for Thai food in the area and was so excited when I noticed Mama Thai. I've gotten take out twice now, and I've really enjoyed my masssaman curry! I can't wait to try some different menu items.
Went here based on good Yelp reviews and wasn't disappointed. I loved that they didn't do my eyebrows with the same wax in the back used for Brazilian waxes they did a fabulous job!
there was a f*cking fly in my water & the cashier was so rude worst experience of my life, will not be going back there. would out 0 stars if i could,

I was a pateint for years & tried to schudule my yearly exam today, the woman how I talked to was awful!!! Very very rude!! I will not be returning!! Im sorry because it has nothing to do with the doctors. Your front of the house staff is rude!

It took eight weeks and five visits to get one pair of glasses that weren't off. I've never had that kind of problem with an optometrist, and even after all this time and visits I'm not happy with the glasses. I will not go back.
I got a gel manicure today and this is what it looks like cannot believe they actually charged me for this it looks like it was her first time she ever did nails
Decent food, good beer....horrible service!!!! The staff literally won't make eye contact so they don't have to stop if you have a question or need something. Very disappointing.

Don Pablo's is one of my favorite standbys for a quick, notexpensive meal that never disappoints. The service is always decent, the margaritas are tasty, they keep the fresh chips and salsa coming, and although it is obviously a chain and sort of fast-foodish, I always enjoy my meal.
Great pizza but the employees had argument over who makes the best sandwhiches and fastest other then that service was great
I love this place with all my heart, but everytime I go through drive-thru they ALWAYS forget something on my order. maybe I'm cursed. or maybe this happens often

The wait for a black coffee was about 15 to 20 minutes. The benches seat so low compared to the chairs opposite the table my 6'3" husband wanted to ask for a booster seat. When we finally got our food it was just alright. Not worth the drive.
Quite delicious sandwiches! The Meatball sub is especially good. I've only had it through delivery so I can only imagine just how good it is hot, fresh and in person.
Food is good here! The salsa and the Queso are excellent! The only reason it's not 5 star is the hostess people are extremely rude and very unfriendly every time I go here. Smile :)

A clean little diner. Can be a bit slow at peak times, and the food's generally uninspired, but there are a few gems to be discovered They've earned a fourth star based on rave sandwich reviews from my omnivore colleagues.
